1.1: *Yesu *K…ôriste na, ara s…ôkway Ňčga Bay *Davit. Davit e may, a yawa daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Ab…ôraham. Nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste he na, a zley ta Ab…ôraham.
1.2: Ab…ôraham a na, aŇčga papaŇč Ňčga *Izak. Izak may, papaŇč Ňčga Jakwap. Jakwap, papaŇč Ňčga ata Juda ta m…ôlmaha hay.
1.3: Juda, papaŇč Ňčga ata Fares ta Zerah ma yat…ôrwa ta Ňčgwas aŇčga mez…ôley Tamar. Fares, papaŇč Ňčga EsraŇčw. EsraŇčw, papaŇč Ňčga Aram.
1.4: Aram, papaŇč Ňčga Aminadap. Aminadap, papaŇč Ňčga NaasaŇčw. NaasaŇčw, papaŇč Ňčga SalmaŇč.
1.5: SalmaŇč, papaŇč Ňčga B…ôwaz ma yarawa ta Ňčgwas aŇčga *Rahap. B…ôwaz, papaŇč Ňčga Awbet ma yarawa ta Ňčgwas aŇčga Rut. Awbet, papaŇč Ňčga Jese.
1.6: Jese, papaŇč Ňčga Bay Davit. Davit e na, aŇčga papaŇč Ňčga SalamaŇčw. Mamaha ta key Ňčgwas Ňčga Uri la.
1.7: *SalamaŇčw, papaŇč Ňčga Rab…ôwam. Rab…ôwam, papaŇč Ňčga Abiyah. Abiyah, papaŇč Ňčga Asaf.
1.8: Asaf, papaŇč Ňčga Jawzafat. Jawzafat, papaŇč Ňčga J…ôwaram. J…ôwaram, papaŇč Ňčga Awziyas.
1.9: Awziyas, papaŇč Ňčga J…ôwatam. J…ôwatam, papaŇč Ňčga Akaz. Akaz, papaŇč Ňčga Ezekiyas.
1.10: Ezekiyas, papaŇč Ňčga Manase. Manase, papaŇč Ňčga AmaŇčw. AmaŇčw, papaŇč Ňčga Jawziyas.
1.11: Jawziyas, papaŇč Ňčga ata Yekwaniya ta m…ôlmaha hay, a yat…ôrwa daa masa nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga *BabilaŇčw ma h…ôlmata *Israyel hay aa hwayak ata.
1.12: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa ata ma h…ôlmata la a BabilaŇčw a na, Yekwaniya a yawa Salatiyel. Salatiyel, papaŇč Ňčga Zarubaabel.
1.13: Zarubaabel, papaŇč Ňčga Abiyut. Abiyut, papaŇč Ňčga Eliyakim. Eliyakim, papaŇč Ňčga Azawr.
1.14: Azawr, papaŇč Ňčga Sadakw. Sadakw, papaŇč Ňčga Akim. Akim, papaŇč Ňčga Eliyut.
1.15: Eliyut, papaŇč Ňčga Eliyazar. Eliyazar, papaŇč Ňčga MataŇč. MataŇč, papaŇč Ňčga Jakwap.
1.16: *Jakwap, papaŇč Ňčga *Jawzef, zel Ňčga *Mari ma yarawa Yesu ma z…ôlmara K…ôriste, anda mel…ôvey, ndaw masa Bay *Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.
1.17: Anda ke…óe, d…ôga fa Ab…ôraham haa kasl fa Davit na, dedeŇč Ňčga dedeŇč hay kuraw a ray a m…ôfa…ó. D…ôga fa Davit e may haa kasl ta pas masa ata ma h…ôlmata Israyel hay a BabilaŇčw na, dedeŇč Ňčga dedeŇč hay kuraw a ray a m…ôfa…ó. Yaw, d…ôga ta pas a Ňčgene kasl fa mayawa Ňčga K…ôriste na, dedeŇč Ňčga dedeŇč hay kuraw a ray a m…ôfa…ó saya. Mey da ray mayawa Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste (Luk 2.1-7)
1.18: Ehe c…ôndamara mey da ray mayawa Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste. *Mari mamaha na, ara kwakwa Ňčga *Jawzef. Daa masa Jawzef ta la Mari a way aŇčga daa ba araŇč na, Mari ta key hwa…ó sem ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay.
1.19: Jawzef, maŇčgasl Ňčga Mari na, ara ndaw maaya ta leŇčgesl. Daa masa aa ma c…ônda Mari ta key ta hwa…ó sem na, a wu…óey a par hwaray fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay ba. Da ray Ňčgene, a wulkey Ňčga mb…ôkda kwakwa aŇčga, ama a wu…óey Ňčga mb…ôkda na, kwa ndaw a s…ôra mey a ba.
1.20: Daa masa Jawzef fa wulkey da ray mey a na, *maslaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó ta‚Äô, a sawa a ray a, aa guzlar daa mes…ôfney, a l…ôvar: ¬ęJawzef, s…ôkway Ňčga *Davit, ka da zlurey Ňčga la kwakwa akah Mari ba, maja a key ta hwa…ó Ňčgene na, ara ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay.
1.21: A yawa b…ôzey mez…ôle la, ka da par mez…ôley Yesu, maja a da l…ôhdata nd…ôhay aŇčga hay daa meb…ôrey ata hay.¬Ľ
1.22: Cek aha ke…óe c…ôpa ta key la anda Gazlavay maa guzlwa zleezle ta mey *ndaw ma t…ôla mey aŇčga, ma l…ôvey:
1.23: ¬ęN…ôka taw! dam-sa…ďara a key ta hwa…ó la manjar zel, a da yawa b…ôzey mez…ôle. A da z…ôlmara Eman…ôwel¬Ľ, anda mel…ôvey, Gazlavay aa ta al…ôkwa.
1.24: Jawzef a sl…ôk…óey daa …óar, fa d…ô…ďa ha a ka anda maslaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay ma l…ôvar heyey. LeŇč! a la kwakwa aŇčga Mari a way,
1.25: ama ta c…ômam cew e daa ba, haa kasl mayawa Ňčga b…ôzey a. Jawzef a par mez…ôley Yesu.

2.1: Yesu a yawa da Bet…ôlehem daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude, daa masa *Herawt aŇčga bay Ňčga hwayak a. Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga mayawa aŇčga, nd…ôhay ma s…ôra mey da ray wurzla hay a samawa ta da wurza aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem.
2.2: Aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvam: ¬ęB…ôzey masa ata ma yam…ôrwa ma da key bay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay heyey na, aŇčga dama? Ya ta h…ôtm…ôrwa wurzla aŇčga la ma bawa ta da wurza. Anda ke…óe, ya samawa na, amba ya ragadamar.¬Ľ
2.3: Bay Herawt ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe na, rav aŇčga a j…ôvey ga, asaya, nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Jeruzelem tabiya rav a j…ôvtar may.
2.4: Ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*K…ôriste, ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga key bay na, a da yawa dama?¬Ľ
2.5: A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęA da yawa da Bet…ôlehem daa hwayak Ňčga Jude. Ya s…ôrmara maja *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta wuzleley la da ray a zleezle, a l…ôvey:
2.6: ‚ÄúAkwar, nd…ôhay da Bet…ôlehem daa hwayak Ňčga Jude na, slala akwar aa mahura da wuzlah slala hay mahura hay da Jude, maja ara da slala ha Ňčgene yah ma da bawa bay ma da n…ôkey dey fa nd…ôhay a…óaw hay Israyel hay.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
2.7: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Bay Herawt a z…ôlt…ôrwa nd…ôhay ma s…ôra mey da ray wurzla hay heyey ta mayal a, amba aa c…ôf…óata wurzla ha a bawa na, ta pas wura.
2.8: Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrdata a Bet…ôlehem, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam a Bet…ôlehem, s…ôpmara b…ôzey a ta d…ôk-vaw. Da masa akwar ma h…ôtm…ôrwa la na, ka samawa, ka wuzdamiwa, amba ya daw, ya ragadar may.¬Ľ
2.9: Nd…ôhay a ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga bay a cay na, ta‚Äô, a diyam. Masa ata daa c…ôve…ó na, a h…ôtmar wurzla masa ma bawa ta da wurza heyey fa daw fa mey ata. Wurzla ha fa daw fa mey fa mey, a wusey kasl aa slam masa b…ôzey mec…ôhe aŇčga da hwa…ó a heyey na, deŇč! a lecey a ray way a.
2.10: Masa ata ma h…ôtmar wurzla malacakaya heyey na, aa s…ômam ga, ara mey ba.
2.11: A wusam aa slam aha, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôzam aa way a, a h…ôtfamar b…ôzey a ta mamaha *Mari. A h…ôlmamara, a ragadamar. Cay, ta‚Äô, a p…ôskamata gabal ata hay, a v…ôlmar cek hay ma h…ô…ókam ba. A v…ôlmar …ď…ôrey mewe…óey p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó ta mat…ôway Ňčga wudez mezey maaya, leŇč slalak mezey maaya mez…ôley ¬ę*mir¬Ľ.
2.12: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mes…ôfney a katar. Daa mes…ôfney a na, Gazlavay a k…ôtata Ňčga diyam ta fa Bay Herawt saba. Maja Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a lam c…ôve…ó mekele Ňčga v…ôhey aa hwayak ata. Ata Jawzef ta Mari a hwam aa hwayak Ňčga Ejip
2.13: Daa masa nd…ôhay ma s…ôra mey da ray wurzla hay heyey ma diyam sem na, ta‚Äô, *maslaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay a wuzar vaw a *Jawzef daa mes…ôfney, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, la b…ôzey, hwam ta mamaha aa hwayak Ňčga *Ejip. Njamawa fete…óe, haa kasl pas masa yah ma da l…ôvkwar Ňčga v…ôhwa, maja Bay *Herawt a da s…ôpa b…ôzey a amba a k…ô…óa vagay.¬Ľ
2.14: Masa Jawzef ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe la na, p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, leŇč! a la b…ôzey a, a s…ôhwam ta mamaŇč Ňčga b…ôzey a dasi tava…ó a Ňčgene a Ejip.
2.15: A njamawa fete…óe haa kasl mem…ôcey Ňčga Bay Herawt. Cek aha ta key la anda Gazlavay maa guzley ta mey *ndaw ma t…ôla mey aŇčga zleezle, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęYa ta z…ôl…ôrwa b…ôzey a…óaw daa hwayak Ňčga Ejip la.¬Ľ A k…ô…ómata b…ôza hay mez…ôle da slala Bet…ôlehem
2.16: Bay *Herawt ma s…ôra nd…ôhay ma s…ôra mey da ray wurzla hay heyey ta f…ôcmara sem na, mevel a car ga! Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey nd…ôhay aŇčga hay Ňčga k…ô…ómata b…ôza hay mez…ôle da Bet…ôlehem ta b…ôza hay masa gweegwe ta slala ha tabiya vagay. A wu…óey Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay na, b…ôza hay masa ma yamawa t…ôlam haa kasl fa b…ôza hay mevey cew. A k…ô…óta b…ôza hay mec…ôhe hay a anda Ňčgene na, maja aŇčga ma s…ôra mevey Ňčga wurzla ma bawa masa aŇčga ma c…ônda da mey nd…ôhay ma s…ôra mey da ray wurzla hay heyey.
2.17: Mek…ô…óey b…ôza hay a vagay Ňčgene na, ta key la anda Jeremey, ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, maa guzley zleezle, a l…ôvey:
2.18: ¬ęA c…ôndamara fa wudam ta g…ôdaŇč da slala Rama, mat…ôway ta mewudey sl…ôw a! a nd…ôvey ba. Ara Rasel ma t…ôway b…ôz aŇčga hay. Mevel aŇčga a d…ôkey ba, maja b…ôz aŇčga hay a ta m…ôcam sem.¬Ľ Mav…ôhwa Ňčga ata Jawzef ta Mari da Ejip
2.19: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga mem…ôcey Ňčga Bay *Herawt heyey na, ta‚Äô, *maslaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay a wuzar vaw a *Jawzef daa mes…ôfney daa hwayak Ňčga *Ejip heyey,
2.20: a l…ôvar: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, la b…ôzey, v…ôham ta mamaha aa hwayak Ňčga *Israyel, maja nd…ôhay ma s…ôpmara b…ôzey a Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay heyey na, ta m…ôcam sem d…ô…ďa.¬Ľ
2.21: Cay, Jawzef p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, leŇč! a la b…ôzey, ta‚Äô, a v…ôham ta mamaŇč Ňčga b…ôzey a, aa hwayak Ňčga Israyel.
2.22: A da c…ônda na, Arkelawas fa z…ôma bay Ňčga papaha Herawt daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude. Da ray Ňčgene, mand…ôrzay a kar, a zlurey Ňčga njey daa hwayak a. Ta‚Äô, mes…ôfney a kar a Jawzef saya. Daa mes…ôfney a na, Gazlavay a k…ôta Ňčga daw aa hwayak Ňčga *Galile.
2.23: Anda ke…óe, a daw a njey aa hwayak a, da slala *Nezeret. Menjey aŇčga da slala ha Ňčgene na, ta key la, anda nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ma kadamara zleezle, ma l…ôvam: ¬ęA da z…ôlmara b…ôzey a na, ndaw Nezeret.¬Ľ

3.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw daha mez…ôley *JaŇč-Baptis, a wuzwa vaw da wuzlah-ley daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude, fa wuzey mey,
3.2: a l…ôvey: ¬ęMb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, s…ôpmara Gazlavay ta mevel pal, maja gweegwe cay, bay Ňčga Gazlavay a wuzwa.¬Ľ
3.3: *JaŇč a na, ara ndaw masa *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle, maa guzley da ray a, a l…ôvey: ¬ęNdaw fa wudey da wuzlah-ley, a l…ôvey: ∆äiymar c…ôve…ó Ňčgada Bay Mahura, …óiymara c…ôve…ó e maaya maaya d…ôr e.¬Ľ
3.4: Zana fa vaw Ňčga JaŇč a na, macakaya ta eŇčgwec Ňčga slagwama. Vaw aŇčga maj…ôwkaya ta hute…ó. A z…ômey na, ayakw ta amam da ley.
3.5: Nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem ta daa hwayak Ňčga Jude tabiya, leŇč daa hwayak hay mekele mekele gweegwe ta wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč tabiya a diyam a fa JaŇč a,
3.6: a wuzdamara meb…ôrey ata hay. JaŇč ta‚Äô, a katar *baptem daa wayam a.
3.7: Da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma diyam fa JaŇč a amba a katar baptem na, *Fariza hay ta *Saduse hay ga daha. A da h…ôtatar na, fa samawa a fa v…ô…óa, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęHey! akwar b…ôza hay Ňčga kucesl hay! Ma l…ôvkwar ka l…ôham la daa banay masa Gazlavay ma da hand…ôrwa a ray akwar na, wa?
3.8: Kam cek maaya, amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara akwar ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar sem, akwar fa s…ôpmara Gazlavay ta mevel pal.
3.9: Ka da wulkam daa mevel akwar, ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúPapa ala na, ara *Ab…ôraham, maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay a da s…ôrfandar dey-ceceh.‚ÄĚ Ka da l…ôvam k…ône ba, maja ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, Gazlavay a gwa Ňčga t…ôrdata aŇčgwa hay ke…óe Ňčga s…ôkway Ňčga Ab…ôraham may.
3.10: Zlamba maŇčgakaya cay Ňčga Ňčg…ômey wudez hay ta slaslalay a c…ôpa. Wudez ma yey bab…ôza maaya ba na, a Ňčg…ômamara, a pamar awaw fa v…ô…óa.
3.11: Yah na, ya kakwar baptem ta yam, Ňčga wuzwa fara fara akwar ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar cay. Ama ndaw ma f…ônya fa sawa. AŇčga na, kwa ya wusa Ňčga c…ôkwra tarak da salay aŇčga ba. Ndaw a na, a kakwar baptem la ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč ta awaw.
3.12: AŇčga da g…ôdak ta v…ôley mek…ôfey daw da har, amba a wunka b…ôz-daw ta cekwesl e. B…ôz-daw na, a da h…ôla a wude…ó. Ama cekwesl e na, a da g…ô…óar awaw a ray a, awaw masa ma m…ôcey ba Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ Mey da ray baptem Ňčga Yesu (Mark 1.9-11; Luk 3.21, 22)
3.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a sawa daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile, a daw aa wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč fa *JaŇč, amba JaŇč a kar *baptem.
3.14: Ama JaŇč a wu…óey Ňčga kar baptem e ba, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAm! Anja ma da daw fa kah, amba ka kaya baptem na, yah jak, ba diya? Kaa, ka fa sawa fa yah jak na, kwara?¬Ľ
3.15: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAma wure ke…óe na, t…ô…ďa Ňčga kaya baptem, amba ya kakwa sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay masa aa maa c…ôf…óa tabiya Ňčga key.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, JaŇč a, a t…ô…ďa Ňčga kar baptem e.
3.16: Masa Yesu ma h…ôtey baptem cay fa bawa daa yam na, wure Ňčgene, slam da va…ó b…ô…óaŇč! a wurey. A da n…ôkey dey na, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay fa pawa salay da va…ó, anda makurgwadakw. C…ôkwam! a njey a ray a.
3.17: Asaya, …óay fa c…ônwa da gazlavay da va…ó, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKe…óe he, ara B…ôzey a…óaw, masa yah ma wu…óa kalah. Ya faa s…ômey ga da ray a.¬Ľ

4.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a handa Yesu a wuzlah-ley amba *SataŇč, bay-malula, a jada Ňčga bata.
4.2: Kwa Yesu ta z…ômey cek daa ba, …óar kwakwar m…ôfa…ó, taa va…ó, taa pas. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, may a car d…ô…ďa.
4.3: Ta‚Äô, bay-malula a daw a cakay a Ňčga bata, aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa kah B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay na, t…ôrdata aŇčgwa hay ke…óe Ňčga …óaf taw!¬Ľ
4.4: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNdaw na, a njey ta cek mez…ômey daada ba, ama ta mey c…ôpa masa ma bawa da mey Gazlavay.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
4.5: Cay, bay-malula ha ta‚Äô, a handa a *Jeruzelem, berney Ňčga Gazlavay. A t…ôpda aa ray Ňčga *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay,
4.6: a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa kah B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay na, j…ôvey a hwayak, maja Mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúGazlavay a da ka amba a sl…ôrwa maslaŇč aŇčga hay, a sl…ôwmaka la a har ata amba salay akah a gurzey fa aŇčgwa ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
4.7: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya a l…ôvey saya: ‚ÄúKa da jada Bay Gazlavay akah ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
4.8: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, bay-malula ha, a handa saya, a t…ôpda aa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa maaz…ôma, a wuzdara hwayak hay da b…ôla c…ôpa ta zleley hay c…ôpa da hwa…ó a, aa guzlar,
4.9: a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa kah ma ragadaya la, kah ma d…ôrya daŇčgay la na, hwayak hay a ta zleley hay c…ôpa da hwa…ó a ke…óe na, ya v…ôldatakawa la.¬Ľ
4.10: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSataŇč, hway la fe…óe! Mb…ôkdaya maja Mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKa da ragadar na, si Ňčgada Bay Gazlavay akah gway. D…ôrar daŇčgay Ňčgada Bay Gazlavay pal taava aŇčga.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
4.11: Daa Ňčgene, bay-malula ha, mbak! a mb…ôkda Yesu. Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč hay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a samawa a cakay a, a j…ônmara, a v…ôlmar cek mez…ômey. Yesu a zlar sl…ôra aŇčga daa hwayak Ňčga Galile
4.12: Menjey nek…ô…óey na, ta‚Äô, a k…ôrzamara *JaŇč-Baptis, a mb…ôzdamara aa f…ôrs…ône. Masa Yesu ma c…ônda ata ma k…ôrzamara JaŇč-Baptis sem na, a sl…ôk…óey, a v…ôhey aa hwayak Ňčga *Galile.
4.13: Ta njey da slala *Nezeret daa ba, ama a daw a njey a Kapernayum. Kapernayum na, ara slala da mey d…ôhwa Ňčga Galile, masa daa hwayak Ňčga s…ôkway Ňčga ZabulaŇčw ta Ňčga Naftali.
4.14: Anda ke…óe, cek aha ta key la anda *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, maa guzley zleezle, ma l…ôvey:
4.15: ¬ęNd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga s…ôkway Ňčga ZabulaŇčw ta Ňčga Naftali, hwayak hay masa gweegwe ta d…ôhwa Ňčga Galile, ta dey laŇčgar Ňčga wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč, hwayak Ňčga Galile masa nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay ma njam da hwa…ó a,
4.16: nd…ôhay a, ata daa l…ôvaŇč, ama a h…ôtmar mewe…óey mahura la. Ata masa anda nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya, ama slam a we…óey la a ray ata.¬Ľ
4.17: Masa Yesu ma daw a Kapernayum a na, ara daa Ňčgene, aŇčga ma zlar mewuzey mey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar da b…ôla, maja gweegwe cay, Gazlavay a wuzd…ôrwa bay aŇčga.¬Ľ Yesu a z…ôlwa gula hay m…ôfa…ó Ňčgeeme (Mark 1.16-20; Luk 5.1-11)
4.18: Pas pal daha, Yesu fa p…ôkey da mey d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile. Ta‚Äô, a h…ôtey m…ôlmaŇč hay cew daha, ara nd…ôhay ma k…ôrza ewet. Ata *SimaŇčw masa ma z…ôlmara *Piyer ta m…ôlmaha *And…ôre, fa k…ôrzam ewet ta *tabaw daa d…ôhwa ha.
4.19: Yesu ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSamawa asi a…óaw. Akwar na, nd…ôhay ma k…ôrza ewet, ama d…ôga wure ke…óe ya da t…ôrdakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay ma z…ôlwa nd…ôhay aa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
4.20: Wure Ňčgene, mbak! a mb…ôkdamata tabaw ata hay, ta‚Äô, a diyam asi Yesu.
4.21: Yesu a Ňčg…ôchey nek…ô…óey fa mey na, a h…ôtey m…ôlmaŇč hay cew mekele saya, ara ata *Jak ta m…ôlmaha *JaŇč, b…ôza hay Ňčga Zebede. Ata manjatakaya daa kwambiwal ta papa ata Zebede, fa …óiymata tabaw ata hay. Yesu ta‚Äô, a z…ôlta ata Jak ta JaŇč Ňčga diyam asiya.
4.22: Wure Ňčgene, mbak! a mb…ôkdamara kwambiwal leŇč papa ata, ta‚Äô, a diyam asi Yesu. Yesu a wuzey mey ta a mb…ôley masa-macay hay (Mark 1.39; Luk 4.44; 6.17-19)
4.23: Yesu fa p…ôkta slala hay c…ôpa daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile, faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa way-mewuzey-mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay, fa wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray *mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay, fa mb…ôley nd…ôhay daa macay hay wura wura c…ôpa leŇč nd…ôhay maah…ôl…ďatakaya hay tabiya.
4.24: Nd…ôhay tabiya daa hwayak Ňčga Siri a c…ôndamara mey da ray a. Anda ke…óe, a handamar nd…ôhay ga daa macay hay mekele mekele, siya hay masa vaw fa catar kalah, siya hay masa malula da ray, siya hay masa ta cek da ray fa …ď…ôrzlam, leŇč masa maah…ôl…ďatakaya hay. Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ôldata.
4.25: Nd…ôhay ga fa diyam asiya. Nd…ôhay a na, a samawa daa hwayak Ňčga Galile, daa hwayak mez…ôley Berney-Hay-Kuraw, daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem, daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude, leŇč daa hwayak ta dey laŇčgar Ňčga wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč.

5.1: Masa Yesu ma h…ôtatar nd…ôhay ga fa diyam asiya na, ta‚Äô, a t…ôpey a aŇčgwa, c…ôkwam! a njey ta njey. Gula aŇčga hay a diyam, a kusam a cakay a. Mey da ray maaya Ňčga Gazlavay ma da sawa a ray nd…ôhay (Luk 6.20-23)
5.2: Yesu a zlar Ňčgaa s…ôrkadata, a l…ôvtar:
5.3: ¬ęMaaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay ma l…ôvam mbalay Gazlavay, ba na, ata cek hay Ňčga tede. Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray ata na, maja ata ma t…ô…ďmara amba Gazlavay a wey da ray ata fara fara.
5.4: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay masa ta mat…ôway daa dey, maja ata na, ara Gazlavay ma da d…ôktar mevel.
5.5: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay meekwe…ó-mey, maja ata na, a da h…ôtam slam menjey anda Gazlavay ma l…ôvtar a da v…ôldatara.
5.6: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay ma wu…óam Ňčga key cek ma mbafar a Gazlavay ta mevel ata c…ôpa, maja ata na, Gazlavay a, a pata la aa wiya.
5.7: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay ma s…ôram dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay, maja ata na, Gazlavay a s…ôrfatar dey-ceceh la may.
5.8: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay ma s…ôpmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta mevel pal, maja ata na, a h…ôtmar Gazlavay la ta dey ata.
5.9: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay ma c…ômtar …óay Ňčga nd…ôhay, maja ata na, Gazlavay a da z…ôlta b…ôz aŇčga hay.
5.10: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay masa nd…ôhay ma s…ôrdamata banay maja ata ma kam cek ma mbafar a Gazlavay. Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray ata na, maja Bay Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata.
5.11: ¬ęDa nd…ôhay fa c…ô…ómakwar, fa s…ôrdamakwar banay, asaya, fa mb…ôrzlam a ray akwar maja akwar nd…ôhay a…óaw hay na, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akwar.
5.12: Ta s…ôrdamata banay ta nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle la, ba diya? Yaw, da anda ke…óe na, maam…ôlkam, njam ta mees…ômey ga ara mey ba, maja ara Gazlavay ma da p…ôlkwara mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra akwar maaya maaya da va…ó.¬Ľ Mey da ray manda ta slam-mewe…óey (Mark 9.50; Luk 14.34, 35)
5.13: Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay saya: ¬ęDa b…ôla ke…óe, akwar na, anda manda. Da mec…ôrey Ňčga manda ha daa saba na, ka da s…ôrmara ara manda na, kwara? Da mec…ôrey Ňčga manda ha daa saba na, aŇčga maaya saba, a kwiydamara aa papalah saw, nd…ôhay a h…ôrpamara.
5.14: ¬ęAsaya, akwar na, nd…ôhay ma wa…óa b…ôla. Da berney aa daa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa na, a …ďey fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay la daw?
5.15: Yaw, ndaw a g…ô…óey awaw aa pet…ôrla, a pa asi maŇčgayak ba, si a pa aa slam mepey pet…ôrla amba a wa…óatar dey Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa way a tabiya.
5.16: Anda ke…óe, si ka wa…óam fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, amba a h…ôtmar sl…ôra akwar maaya, a h…ôslmar ray a Papakw akwar Bay Gazlavay da va…ó.¬Ľ Mey da ray kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz
5.17: ¬ę*Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta mees…ôrkedey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ka wulkam, ya sawa Ňčga n…ôsa daw? Ara k…ône ba. Ama ya sawa na, amba ya wuzdakwara mabara Ňčga mey da ray a.
5.18: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a, kwa kuset k…ô…óey, fa daa z…ô…óey daa ba s…ôlak, haa kasl slam da va…ó ta slam da hwayak ma nd…ôvam. Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz fa daa z…ô…óey daa ba, haa kasl ta pas masa sl…ôra Ňčga kwakwas a ma nd…ôvey cay c…ôpa.
5.19: Anda ke…óe, da ndaw ta zl…ô…ďey mey la, kwa kuset k…ô…óey daa kwakwas a, asaya, da taa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay la Ňčga kamara anda aa ma zl…ô…ďa ha na, ndaw aha a da t…ôrey ndaw mec…ôhe da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wey da ray ata. Ama da ndaw ta nar ray la Ňčgada kwakwas a c…ôpa, asaya, da taa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay la Ňčga kamara k…ône na, ndaw aha a da t…ôrey mahura da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wey da ray ata.
5.20: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, akwar fa da nd…ôkwam a wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wey da ray ata na, daa ba, si ka kam cek ma mbafar a Gazlavay ma f…ôna *Fariza hay leŇč nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz.¬Ľ Mey da ray mecey-mevel
5.21: Yesu aa s…ôrkadata gula aŇčga hay da cakay a heyey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzldatara Ňčgada dede al…ôkwa hay zleezle la, ba diya? Mey a, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKa da k…ô…óey ndaw vagay ba. Kwa waawa ma k…ô…óey ndaw vagay na, a kamar sariya la.‚ÄĚ
5.22: Ama yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar saya, kwa waawa ma cey mevel a ray m…ôlmaha na, Gazlavay a kar sariya la. Kwa waawa ma l…ôvar a m…ôlmaha: ‚ÄúKah manjar leŇčgesl‚ÄĚ na, a handamara ndaw a la fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga Israyel hay. Asaya, kwa waawa ma l…ôvar a m…ôlmaha: ‚ÄúKah mar…ôzlkaya‚ÄĚ na, Ňčgene, mak Ňčga mb…ôzda aa v…ôge…ó Ňčga awaw magaza.
5.23: ¬ęYaw, da ka fa daw aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay amba ka v…ôlar cek a Gazlavay, daa Ňčgene, ka s…ôrfada, m…ôlmakw fa cey mevel da ray akah na,
5.24: Ňčgene, mb…ôkda cek akah ha a cakay slam-mef…ôkey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay a, daw fa m…ôlmakw a, c…ômamawa …óay ta aŇčga la …óagay, wara ka v…ôhwa, ka v…ôlda cek akah Ňčgada Gazlavay.
5.25: ¬ęDa ndaw a wudka, fa handaka aa sariya na, wusey vaw, …óiymara mey akwar ta ndaw aha daa c…ôve…ó. Da daa ba na, a da v…ôldaka a har ndaw ma ka sariya. Ndaw ma ka sariya ha, a da v…ôldaka a har sewje hay. Sewje hay may, a da k…ôzlamaka aa f…ôrs…ône.
5.26: Ya fa l…ôvka fara fara, ka fa da bawa daa f…ôrs…ône he daa ba s…ôlak, si kah ma p…ôla d…ôvaz a la tabiya ndav.¬Ľ Mey da ray meley-vaw saw
5.27: ¬ęAkwar ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzlda la, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKa da ley vaw saw da palah ba.‚ÄĚ
5.28: Ama yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar saya, kwa waawa maa h…ômey Ňčgwas Ňčga ndaw daa mevel aŇčga Ňčga ney ta aŇčga na, Ňčgene anda ndaw aha ta lam vaw sem ta Ňčgwas aha.
5.29: Da dey akah Ňčga z…ômay fa h…ôldaka Ňčga key cek hay maaya ba na, wuzlka dey a, hazakada d…ôreŇč ta kah. Ňägama mez…ôvey Ňčga vaw akah pal meez…ô…óey da ray vaw akah tabiya ma da k…ôzley aa v…ôge…ó Ňčga awaw magaza.
5.30: Asaya, da har akah Ňčga z…ômay fa h…ôldaka Ňčga key cek maaya ba na, …ó…ôsla har a, hazakada d…ôreŇč ta kah. Ňägama mez…ôvey Ňčga vaw akah pal meez…ô…óey da ray vaw akah tabiya ma da mb…ôzey aa v…ôge…ó Ňčga awaw magaza.¬Ľ Mey da ray me…ď…ôley Ňčgwas (Matiye 19.9; Mark 10.11, 12; Luk 16.18)
5.31: ¬ęMey mekele daha saya, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKwa waawa ma …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga na, si a v…ôlar …óerewel Ňčga wuzda aŇčga ma …ď…ôla sem.‚ÄĚ
5.32: Ama yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar saya: Ndaw a da …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga ba, si da Ňčgwas aha ta ley vaw la da palah kwa. Da ndaw a …ď…ôla, fa d…ô…ďa ha Ňčgwas aha a ley zel mekele na, a key Ňčgene, a t…ôrda Ňčgwas aha Ňčga Ňčgwas meley-vaw saw da palah. Asaya, ndaw ma la Ňčgwas masa zel e ma …ď…ôla Ňčgene na, aŇčga anda ndaw ma ley vaw saw da palah may.¬Ľ Mey da ray membe…óey
5.33: ¬ęAsaya, akwar ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzldatara Ňčgada dede al…ôkwa hay la, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKa da mba…óam Ňčga tede ba. Da akwar ma mba…óam sem na, si ka kamara cek aha fara fara ta mez…ôley Ňčga Bay Gazlavay.‚ÄĚ
5.34: Ama yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar, kwa ka da mba…óam ba s…ôlak, kwa ta slam da va…ó ka da mba…óam ba, maja ara slam-menjey Ňčga Gazlavay.
5.35: Kwa ta slam da hwayak ka da mba…óam ba, maja ara slam-mepey-salay Ňčga Gazlavay. Kwa ta *Jeruzelem ka da mba…óam ba, maja ara berney Ňčga Gazlavay Mawaca-waca.
5.36: Asaya, kwa ta ray akwar hay ka da mba…óam ba, maja ka gwamara Ňčga t…ôrdamara kwa eŇčgwec Ňčga ray akwar matara pal Ňčga mabara ba.
5.37: Da mey a ara aŇčga na, l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAhaw, ara aŇčga!‚ÄĚ Da ara aŇčga ba na, l…ôvam: ‚ÄúKay, ara aŇčga ba!‚ÄĚ Da ka l…ôvam mey wal na, Ňčgene mey a, a bawa ta fa *SataŇč, bay-malula.¬Ľ Mey da ray mep…ôley c…ôhwal (Luk 6.29, 30)
5.38: ¬ęAkwar ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley la daa slam mekele, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúDa ndaw a wuzlkakawa dey na, wuzlkara Ňčga aŇčga may. Da ndaw a p…ôlŇčgwakawa sler na, p…ôlŇčgwara Ňčga aŇčga may.‚ÄĚ
5.39: Ama yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar, akwar na, ka da p…ôlam c…ôhwal ba. Da ndaw a k…ô…óka a cakay baazlam Ňčga z…ômay na, mb…ô…ódara dey Ňčga gula saya.
5.40: Da ndaw a wudka amba a t…ô…ďa …óeŇč-kece akah na, g…ôrda Ňčga t…ô…ďa dawura akah saya.
5.41: Da ndaw a t…ôkaka …óay Ňčga ley cek dadakw k…ôlemeeter pal na, handara a key k…ôlemeeter cew.
5.42: Da ndaw aa c…ôf…óafaka cek na, v…ôlar. Asaya, da ndaw a ded…ô…óey cek na, kwa ka daa zl…ôka ba.¬Ľ Mey da ray mewu…óey masa-g…ôra hay (Luk 6.27, 28, 32-36)
5.43: ¬ęAkwar ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley la daa slam mekele, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúWu…óa jam akah, masa-g…ôra akah na, ka da pey dey a ray a ba.‚ÄĚ
5.44: Ama yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar: wu…ómata masa-g…ôra akwar hay, d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay amba a p…ôstar mey a nd…ôhay ma s…ôrdamakwar banay.
5.45: Anda ke…óe, a da wuzwa akwar na, b…ôza hay Ňčga PapaŇč Bay Gazlavay da va…ó, maja aŇčga na, fa wa…óarawa pas a ray nd…ôhay maaya ta maaya ba hay, asaya, fa parawa var Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma namar ray ta Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma namar ray ba tabiya.
5.46: Da ka wu…óam nd…ôhay ma wu…ómakwar daada gway na, Gazlavay a da p…ôlkwara mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra akwar na, maja me? Kwa ma cakala budaw hay na, fa kamara k…ône may, ba diya?
5.47: Da ka cam har Ňčgada s…ôkway akwar hay gway na, ka ta kam sl…ôra maaya ma f…ôna maamandaw la daw? Kwa nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara Bay Gazlavay ba na, fa kamara k…ône may, ba diya?
5.48: Papakw akwar Bay Gazlavay da va…ó, aŇčga maaya kalah, a wu…óta nd…ôhay tabiya. T…ôram nd…ôhay maaya kalah anda aŇčga.¬Ľ

6.1: Yesu aa s…ôrkadata gula aŇčga hay da cakay a heyey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWam vaw fa sl…ôra masa akwar ma kamara Ňčgada Gazlavay. Ka da kamara ta mezlepey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ba. Maja da ka kamara amba a h…ôtmakwar na, Papakw akwar masa da va…ó na, fa da p…ôlkwara mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra akwar a daa ba.
6.2: ¬ęYaw, da ka v…ôlam dala a nd…ôhay masa-viya hay na, ka da wudam ta wudey anda nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew ba. Ata na, fa kamara k…ône daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč daa mep…ôkey ata hay, amba nd…ôhay aa h…ômdamata. Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, meeh…ômey a Ňčgene na, ara mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra ata.
6.3: Ama kah, da ka fa v…ôley dala a masa-viya hay na, v…ôlda ta mayal a, amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara ba.
6.4: Anda ke…óe, Papakw Bay Gazlavay, ma h…ôtar cek masa kah ma v…ôlda na, ara aŇčga ma da p…ôlkawa mawur…ďay akah.¬Ľ Mey da ray med…ôrey-daŇčgay (Luk 11.2-4)
6.5: ¬ęYaw, da akwar fa d…ôram daŇčgay na, ka da kamara anda nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew ba. Ata na, a wu…óam melecey Ňčga d…ôrey daŇčgay daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč da mey-c…ôve…ó hay amba nd…ôhay tabiya a h…ôtmatar. Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, taa h…ômdamata cay, meeh…ômey a Ňčgene na, ara mawur…ďay ata.
6.6: Ama kah, da masa ka fa da d…ôrey daŇčgay na, daw a ver akah, g…ôrca mey-slam, d…ôrar daŇčgay a Papakw Bay Gazlavay fete…óe, daa slam masa nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a daa ba. Anda ke…óe, Papakw Bay Gazlavay, ma h…ôtar sl…ôra masa kah ma ka ta me…ďey Ňčgene na, ara aŇčga ma da p…ôlkawa mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra akah.
6.7: ¬ęDa akwar fa d…ôram daŇčgay na, ka da …óulam mey ga anda ma ta kuley hay ba. Ata a wulkam na, Bay Gazlavay a c…ôndatara mey ata me…óuley ga Ňčgene la.
6.8: Ka da kam anda ata ba, maja Papakw akwar Bay Gazlavay na, ta s…ôra cek masa akwar ma daa c…ôf…óafamara sem.
6.9: Da akwar fa d…ôram daŇčgay na, l…ôvam: ‚ÄúPapa ala Bay Gazlavay da va…ó, anja nd…ôhay tabiya Ňčga namaka ray maja kah na, Bay Gazlavay pal.
6.10: Anja bay akah Ňčga wuzwa. Ka amba ya namaka ray da b…ôla ke…óe anda ata ma namaka ray da va…ó.
6.11: V…ôlndar cek mez…ômey Ňčga wusndar tasana.
6.12: Mb…ôkdandara meb…ôrey ala anda ala ma mb…ôkdamatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma kamandar cek maaya ba.
6.13: J…ô…óndar amba cek a batandar Ňčga key meb…ôrey ba. Badand…ôrwa dasi har Ňčga bay-malula.‚ÄĚ [Ahaw, ara kah Bay Gazlavay ta g…ôdaŇč, ma wey da ray cek hay tabiya. Ara kah masa nd…ôhay ma h…ôslmaka ray Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Amen.]
6.14: ¬ęS…ôrmara, da akwar fa mb…ôkdamatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma kamakwar meb…ôrey na, Ňčgene, Papakw akwar masa da va…ó a mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar la may.
6.15: Ama da ka mb…ôkdamatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay ba na, Ňčgene, Bay Gazlavay Papakw akwar a mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar daa ba may.¬Ľ Mey da ray mekey daliyam
6.16: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęMasa akwar fa kam *daliyam na, ka da nd…ôr…ďam dey anda nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew ma kamara ba. Ata na, a nd…ôr…ďam dey amba nd…ôhay tabiya a s…ôrmara ata fa kam daliyam. Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, taa h…ômdamata cay, meeh…ômey a Ňčgene na, ara mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra ata.
6.17: Ama kah, da masa ka fa key daliyam na, p…ôra dey akah, nj…ôra ray akah,
6.18: amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara ka fa key daliyam ba. Ama, ma s…ôra na, si Papakw Bay Gazlavay, ma h…ôtar sl…ôra masa kah ma ka ta me…ďey Ňčgene, a p…ôlkawa mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra akah la.¬Ľ Mey da ray me…ď…ôcey zleley da gazlavay da va…ó (Luk 12.33, 34)
6.19: ¬ęKa da s…ôpam Ňčga …ď…ôcey zleley da b…ôla ke…óe ba, maja kwa m…ôtal, da daa ba, maaca a gwa Ňčga z…ôma. Kwa mayal hay a gwamara Ňčga sl…ônmara way Ňčga lalamara.
6.20: Ama s…ôpam Ňčga …ď…ôcey na, zleley masa da va…ó, maja fete…óe na, m…ôtal, da daa ba, maaca a gwa Ňčga z…ôma ba. Kwa mayal hay a gwamara Ňčga mb…ôzam fete…óe, Ňčga lalamara ba.
6.21: Ya l…ôvey anda ke…óe maja daa slam masa zleley akah aa da hwa…ó a na, mevel akah may aa fete…óe.¬Ľ Mey da ray mewe…óey masa fara fara (Luk 11.34-36)
6.22: ¬ęB…ôz Ňčga dey na, aŇčga anda pet…ôrla Ňčgada vaw tabiya. Da b…ôz Ňčga dey akah aŇčga maaya maaya na, Ňčgene vaw akah c…ôpa aa daa slam-mewe…óey.
6.23: Ama, da b…ôz Ňčga dey akah maaya ba na, Ňčgene, vaw akah c…ôpa aa daa l…ôvaŇč. Da mewe…óey da ray akah fara fara daa ba na, Ňčgene, kah daa l…ôvaŇč …ď…ôk-…ďek.¬Ľ Mey da ray mes…ôpey Gazlavay, da daa ba, zleley (Luk 16.13; 12.22-31)
6.24: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęNdaw pal a gwa Ňčga key mad…ôrlam Ňčga bay hay cew ba. Da ta key la k…ône na, a da wu…óa bay laŇčgar ma f…ôna bay laŇčgar, da daa ba, a da nar ray Ňčgada bay laŇčgar, a r…ôsa bay laŇčgar. Ka gwamara Ňčga s…ôpmara Gazlavay leŇč zleley cewete daa slam a ba.
6.25: ¬ęMaja Ňčgene, ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, daa menjey akwar na, ray akwar a da h…ô…ďey da ray cek mez…ômey ta cek mesey ba. Asaya, ray akwar a da h…ô…ďey da ray zana Ňčga k…ôzley fa vaw akwar ba. Yaw, cek mez…ômey na, a f…ôna heter akwar daw? Asaya, zana na, a f…ôna vaw akwar daw?
6.26: ¬ęWulkam da ray …óiyaŇč hay taw: fa sl…ôkam daa ba, fa Ňčg…ômam daw daa ba, fa …ď…ôcam kwa meeme a wude…ó daa ba, ama Papakw akwar Bay Gazlavay da va…ó fa v…ôltar cek mez…ômey c…ôŇčga. Kaa akwar na, ka f…ônmata …óiyaŇč hay, ba daw?
6.27: Ndaw da wuzlah akwar ma gwa Ňčga pey kwa …óar pal a ray …óar aŇčga da b…ôla ta mewulkey aŇčga na, wa?
6.28: ¬ęKaa, ka wulkam ga da ray zana na, maja me? N…ôkmara meefekwey hay da ley cey! Aa fakwam na, kwara? A kam sl…ôra ba, a cam zana ba,
6.29: ama ya fa l…ôvkwar, kwa Bay *SalamaŇčw zleezle ta zleley ga ta gwa Ňčga k…ôzley zana ma mbey anda meefekwey pal na, daa ba.
6.30: Gazlavay a ka amba kusaf aa fekwey tasana, ama mandaw na, kusaf a, a wewurey. Da Gazlavay fa key cek maaya Ňčgada kusaf masa awaw ma da wawura anda ke…óe na, Gazlavay a n…ôkfakwar dey ma f…ôna kusaf a Ňčgene daa ba daw? Akwar masa ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara ba Ňčgene, s…ôrmara Gazlavay a k…ôzlakwar zana la ma f…ôna meefekwey hay a.
6.31: ¬ęDa ray Ňčgene, ka da wulkam ga ba. Da ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúYa da z…ômam me? Ya da sam me? Ya da k…ôzlam fa vaw me?‚ÄĚ na, ka da wulkam k…ône ba,
6.32: maja ma s…ôpam cek hay a Ňčgene na, ara nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara Gazlavay ba. Asaya, cek hay masa akwar ma wu…óam c…ôpa ha na, Papakw akwar da va…ó ta s…ôra sem.
6.33: S…ôpam teese…ó na, Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray akwar, asaya, kam cek anda aŇčga ma wu…óey. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Bay Gazlavay a v…ôldakwara cek hay siya la c…ôpa.
6.34: Ya fa l…ôvkwar d…ô…ďa, ka da wulkam ga fa cek ma da key mandaw ba, maja mewulkey Ňčga mandaw na, aŇčga wal. Mewulkey fa …óar pal na, a wusa Ňčgada …óar a.¬Ľ

7.1: Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa da wulkam daa mevel akwar, ka l…ôvam, ‚ÄúAnja manaŇč Ňčgaa z…ô…óey maja meb…ôrey aŇčga‚ÄĚ na, k…ône ba, maja Bay Gazlavay a daa z…ô…ódakwar maja meb…ôrey akwar k…ône may.
7.2: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, Bay Gazlavay a daa z…ô…ódakwar daa sariya anda akwar ma wu…óam manaŇč na, Ňčgaa z…ô…óey Ňčgene may. Asaya, a da …ó…ôsla mey da ray akwar anda akwar ma …ó…ôslmara mey da ray nd…ôhay mekele may.
7.3: ¬ęKa n…ôkey dey fa guzer daa dey Ňčga m…ôlmakw, ama hwadam mahura masa daa dey akah na, ka wulkey da ray a ba na, maja me?
7.4: Ka gwa Ňčga l…ôvar Ňčgada m…ôlmakw, ‚Äú∆äagay, ya lakawa guzer daa dey akah la‚ÄĚ, anja hwadam mahura daa dey akah daha gway na, kwara?
7.5: Kah, ndaw masa ta neneh cew! La hwadam daa dey akah la …óagay, amba ka h…ôtar dey nj…ô…ó-nje…ó Ňčga ley guzer daa dey Ňčga m…ôlmakw.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey da ray nd…ôhay ma r…ôsmara Gazlavay
7.6: ¬ęCek hay maaya masa Ňčgada Gazlavay na, ka da v…ôldamatara Ňčgada g…ôdey hay ba, maja a da tat…ôrmawa a ray akwar. Asaya, ka da k…ôzlamata bersle akwar hay maaya asi salay Ňčga vetem hay ba, maja a da mb…ôrzlamata ta salay.¬Ľ Meec…ôf…óey cek fa Bay Gazlavay (Luk 11.9-13)
7.7: ¬ęCac…ôf…óam cek fa Bay Gazlavay, a v…ôldakwara la. S…ôpam cek fa Gazlavay, ka h…ôtam la. Z…ôlam fa mey-mbew, a wurkwara la,
7.8: maja kwa waawa maa c…ôf…óafar cek na, a v…ôlar la. Kwa waawa ma s…ôpey cek fa v…ô…óa na, a h…ôtey la. Kwa waawa ma z…ôley fa mey-mbew na, a wurara la.
7.9: Da b…ôzey akah aa c…ôf…óafaka makala na, ka v…ôlar aŇčgwa la daw?
7.10: Asaya, da aa c…ôf…óafaka ewet na, ka v…ôlar zezekw la daw?
7.11: Akwar nd…ôhay malamba hay ma!, ka s…ôrmara Ňčga v…ôley cek maaya Ňčgada b…ôz akwar hay. Da k…ône na, kaa wara Papakw akwar Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a v…ôltar cek maaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa maa c…ôf…óafamara ba na, kwara?
7.12: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, kamatar cek maaya a nd…ôhay anda akwar ma wu…óam a kamakwara k…ône may. Ke…óe he ara mey masa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz leŇč nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa s…ôrkadamara.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta mey-mbew hay cew (Luk 13.24)
7.13: ¬ęS…ôpam Ňčga mb…ôzey na, ta daa mey-mbew meeŇčg…ôlez e, maja mey-mbew maabaŇč a na, ara c…ôve…ó meez…ô…óey ndaw. Ma daw taa c…ôve…ó e na, aŇčga ta banay daa ba. Nd…ôhay ga fa diyam ta da hwa…ó a.
7.14: Ama mey-mbew Ňčga c…ôve…ó ma hendey ndaw aa heter mawiya na, ara mey-mbew meeŇčg…ôlez e. Ma daw ta hwa…ó a na, aŇčga ta banay. Nd…ôhay ma h…ôtam Ňčga daw ta da hwa…ó a na, ga daa ba.¬Ľ Ňäga s…ôrey nd…ôhay maaya ta maaya ba hay na, kwara? (Luk 6.43, 44)
7.15: ¬ęWam vaw fa nd…ôhay ma pamata ray ata Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay. A da samawa fa akwar na, ta meney ray z…ôkwa…ď z…ôkwa…ď anda t…ô…ďaŇč hay, ama a da kam h…ôma na, anda g…ôdey-ley hay.
7.16: Ka da s…ôrmata na, ta fa sl…ôra ata hay maaya ba. N…ôka, ndaw a gwa Ňčga Ňčg…ôley maŇčgwara fa hatak-daw la daw? Da daa ba, ndaw a gwa Ňčga Ňčg…ôley gudav fa manjaraf la daw?
7.17: Wudez ma…óa…óakaya gu…óaf! gu…óaf! na, a yey bab…ôza maaya maaya may. Wudez masa fa …ďetey ta …ďetey na, a yey bab…ôza maaya ba may.
7.18: Anda ke…óe, wudez maku…ófafar a na, a yey bab…ôza maaya ba na, daa ba. Yaw, wudez masa fa …ďetey ta …ďetey may, a yey bab…ôza maaya na, daa ba.
7.19: Wudez ma yey bab…ôza maaya ba na, a …ó…ôslmara, a pamar awaw fa v…ô…óa.
7.20: Ara anda ke…óe, ka da s…ôrmata nd…ôhay ma pamata ray ata Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ta fa sl…ôra ata hay maaya ba may.¬Ľ Mey da ray sariya Ňčga Gazlavay (Luk 13.25-27)
7.21: ¬ęS…ôrmara nd…ôhay ma z…ôlmaya ‚ÄúBay Mahura, Bay Mahura‚ÄĚ na, fa da mb…ôzam c…ôpa a wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wey da ray ata na, daa ba. Ama ma da mb…ôzam na, si nd…ôhay ma kam cek ma mbafar a Papay Bay Gazlavay da va…ó gway.
7.22: Ta pas masa yah ma da katar sariya a nd…ôhay tabiya na, nd…ôhay ga a l…ôvmaya la: ‚ÄúBay Mahura, Bay Mahura, mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa ala ma wuzdamara na, ara ta mez…ôley akah. Malula hay masa ala ma …ď…ôlmata da ray nd…ôhay ga na, ara ta mez…ôley akah. Asaya, maazla hay ga masa ala ma kamata na, ara ta mez…ôley akah, ba diya?‚ÄĚ
7.23: Anda ke…óe, ya daa guzltar ta‚Äô a mey, ya l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúKwa ya s…ôrkwar ba s…ôlak! Diyam d…ôreŇč ta yah, akwar nd…ôhay ma kam cek hay malamba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta way hay cew (Luk 6.47-49)
7.24: ¬ęYaw, kwa waawa ma c…ônda mey a…óaw ke…óe, ma ka cek anda mey a la na, aŇčga anda ndaw masa ta leŇčgesl, ma l…ôma way aŇčga da ray p…ôra…ó.
7.25: Ta piya, b…ôrgadaŇč a kawa a ray way a, var a pey, wayam a ley. Ama way a, a b…ôzley ba, maja salay Ňčga way a mapakaya da ray p…ôra…ó.
7.26: Ama kwa waawa ma c…ônda mey a…óaw ke…óe, ma ka cek anda mey a daa ba na, aŇčga anda ndaw manjar leŇčgesl, ma l…ôma way aŇčga da ray mawur…ďay.
7.27: Ta piya, b…ôrgadaŇč a kawa a ray way a, var a pey, wayam a ley. Way a k…ôrep! a b…ôzley, kwa dey laŇčgar ma mb…ôkey daa ba.¬Ľ Yesu aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay na, ta me?
7.28: Fa d…ô…ďa ha Yesu ma nd…ôvda Ňčgaa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay cay da ray mey hay a Ňčgene na, nd…ôhay a, a r…ôzlam da ray mees…ôrkedey aŇčga ha,
7.29: maja aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay anda nd…ôhay ata hay maa s…ôrkada *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ba, ama aa s…ôrkadata na, ta g…ôdaŇč masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldara.

8.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a b…ôrŇčgawa da aŇčgwa heyey, nd…ôhay ga fa s…ôpmar wurzay.
8.2: Ndaw-maas…ôkula daha a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a, a regedey fa mey aŇčga, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, da ka wu…óey na, ka gwa Ňčga p…ôrya daa maas…ôkula a…óaw ke…óe.¬Ľ
8.3: Yesu tal! a t…ôlda har aŇčga, a g…ôsfar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa wu…óey amba maas…ôkula akah a p…ôrey. T…ôrey ndaw map…ôrkaya d…ô…ďa!¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene, ndaw-maas…ôkula heyey sa…ó! a s…ô…óey.
8.4: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęPey leŇčgesl, ka da wuzda cek masa yah ma kakawa ke…óe kwa a ndaw ba. Ama daw fa *ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, amba a n…ôkaka. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, v…ôlar cek a Gazlavay anda *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma l…ôvey, Ňčga wuzey a nd…ôhay, maas…ôkula fa vaw akah daa saba.¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ôlda mad…ôrlam Ňčga mahura Ňčga sewje hay
8.5: Yesu fa daw a Kapernayum. Masa aŇčga fa daw na, ndaw Rawma daha, aŇčga mahura Ňčga sewje hay temere, a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a. A kar ambahw amba Yesu a j…ôna,
8.6: a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, mad…ôrlam a…óaw, aŇčga manakaya da way daa macay. Maah…ôl…ďakaya, fa s…ôrey banay kalah.¬Ľ
8.7: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa fa daw, ya mb…ôlda la.¬Ľ
8.8: Ama mahura Ňčga sewje hay heyey a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, kwa ya ta wusa amba ka mb…ôzey a way a…óaw na, daa ba. Gweguzley mey pal gway na, mad…ôrlam a…óaw a, a mb…ôley la.
8.9: Ya l…ôvka anda ke…óe maja yah na, sewje hay mahura da ray a…óaw daha, asaya, yah mahura da ray sewje hay mekele may. Da ya l…ôvar Ňčgada sewje laŇčgar ‚Äúdaw‚ÄĚ, a daw. Da ya l…ôvar Ňčgada ndaw laŇčgar ‚Äúsawa‚ÄĚ, a sawa. Da ya l…ôvar Ňčgada beke a…óaw ‚Äúka sl…ôra ke…óe‚ÄĚ, a ka.¬Ľ
8.10: Masa Yesu ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe la na, a mbafar ara mey ba, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma diyam asiya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, kwa ya ta h…ôtey ndaw ma paya Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara anda ndaw ke…óe daa ba s…ôlak, kwa da wuzlah s…ôkway a…óaw hay *Israyel hay, ya ta h…ôtey daa ba.
8.11: Ya fa l…ôvkwar: Ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da wuzd…ôrwa bay aŇčga na, nd…ôhay ga a samawa la daa slam hay tabiya da b…ôla, Ňčga key gwagway da va…ó ta ata *Ab…ôraham, *Izak leŇč *Jakwap.
8.12: Ama nd…ôhay masa ma yamawa da wuzlah s…ôkway Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay na, a da k…ôzlamata aa ambaw aa l…ôvaŇč. Fete…óe na, a da t…ôwam, a daa p…ô…óam sler.¬Ľ
8.13: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzlar a mahura Ňčga sewje hay heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDaw a way d…ô…ďa. Anja cek masa kah ma wu…óey ke…óe na, Ňčga key, anda kah ma t…ô…ďa mey a…óaw ke…óe.¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene mad…ôrlam aŇčga heyey mbal! a mb…ôley. Yesu a mb…ôley masa-macay hay ga
8.14: Cay, ta‚Äô, Yesu a daw a way *Piyer. A h…ôtfar mamaŇč Ňčga Ňčgwas Ňčga Piyer e, vaw fa car, manakaya, awaw fa vaw ga.
8.15: Yesu ta‚Äô, a g…ôsfar fa har. Da ray Ňčgene, awaw fa vaw heyey daa saba. Ňägwas aha p…ôrta! a lecey, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlar cek mez…ômey a Yesu a.
8.16: Taa kwa…ó a Ňčgene, a handamawa nd…ôhay ga ta malula hay da ray. Yesu aa guzltar mey pal, ta‚Äô, malula hay da ray nd…ôhay a, a bam. Asaya, a mb…ôldata nd…ôhay masa-macay hay tabiya.
8.17: Cek aha ta key la anda *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley zleezle, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęAra aŇčga ta ray aŇčga ma j…ônndakwar daa b…ôle al…ôkwa, asaya, ara aŇčga ma mb…ôldandakwar daa macay al…ôkwa hay tabiya.¬Ľ Mey da ray nd…ôhay ma wu…óam Ňčga diyam asi Yesu
8.18: Masa Yesu ma n…ôkta nd…ôhay ga fa zl…ôrmar ray na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay amba a zl…ôŇčgam a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile.
8.19: Daa Ňčgene, *ndaw maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daha a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a, aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, kwa aa slam wura wura masa kah ma da daw na, ya daw la asi akah.¬Ľ
8.20: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMbiga hay, ata ta v…ôge…ó ata hay, …óiyaŇč hay, ata ta way ata hay. Ama yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, kwa slam Ňčga ney nek…ô…óey amba ya m…ôskey vaw da hwa…ó a na, daa ba.¬Ľ
8.21: Ndaw mekele da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu heyey, a sawa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, v…ôlya c…ôve…ó amba ya daw ya j…ôh…ôrwa papay la …óagay.¬Ľ
8.22: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSawa asi a…óaw, mb…ôkdata nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya Ňčga j…ôhmata nd…ôhay ata hay mam…ôctakaya.¬Ľ Yesu a lacada b…ôrgadaŇč da wuzlah d…ôhwa (Mark 4.35-41; Luk 8.22-25)
8.23: Cay, Yesu kula! a mb…ôzey aa kwambiwal, gula aŇčga hay ta‚Äô, a diyam bama.
8.24: Daa masa kwambiwal a fa daw na, wure Ňčgene meme…ó mahura aa b…ôrey a ray yam, mend…ôrey nek…ô…óey vaŇčgwala Ňčga yam a s…ôrta kwambiwal a. Daa Ňčgene, Yesu na, manakaya daa …óar.
8.25: Ta‚Äô, gula aŇčga hay, a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, a sl…ôk…óadamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Mahura, sl…ôk…óey, l…ôhdandakwar! Al…ôkwa fa da m…ôckwa.¬Ľ
8.26: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa zluram na, maja me? Akwar fa padamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara daa ba daw?¬Ľ P…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, ta‚Äô, aa b…ôctar Ňčgada meme…ó ta yam heyey. Meme…ó deŇč! a lecey, yam a wusey saba.
8.27: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a r…ôzlam, a l…ôvam da wuzlah ata: ¬ęNdaw a ke…óe na, ara na, wa? Masa kwa meme…ó ta yam a c…ônmar mey ke…óe na!¬Ľ Yesu a …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay cew (Mark 5.1-20; Luk 8.26-39)
8.28: Daa masa Yesu ma wusey la a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile heyey, masa daa hwayak Ňčga nd…ôhay Gederen hay na, nd…ôhay cew daha ta malula da ray fa bamawa daa c…ôvay hay mavav…ôrkwatakaya daa aŇčgwa, a cam ray ta Yesu. Nd…ôhay a, fa zlazl…ô…ďam nd…ôhay ara mey ba, kwa ndaw ma gwa Ňčga daw taa c…ôve…ó e Ňčgene daa ba.
8.29: Nd…ôhay a, a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvmar a Yesu: ¬ęKah, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay, ka wu…óey fa ala na, me? Ka sawa Ňčga s…ôrdandar banay d…ôga pas Ňčga sariya araŇč daw?¬Ľ
8.30: Da fete…óe na, Ňčga…ďa Ňčga vetem hay ga daha da mec…ôkwer gweegwe ta ata.
8.31: Malula hay da ray nd…ôhay kaa heyey a b…ôrkwamara Yesu, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęDa ka da …ď…ôlndar na, v…ôlndar c…ôve…ó amba ya diyam ya mb…ôzam aa vetem hay katay.¬Ľ
8.32: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam, mb…ôzam.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, a bam da ray nd…ôhay ke…óe heyey, a diyam a mb…ôzam a ray vetem hay a. Ta‚Äô, vetem hay a c…ôpa, a hwam ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčgadaa heeleŇč, a tataram, a kwiyam saf! aa yam, aa z…ô…óam ku…óap! fete…óe.
8.33: Mec…ôkwer hay Ňčga vetem hay kaa heyey takw! a h…ôlmara mahway a slala, a kadamatara mey a leŇč mey da ray nd…ôhay ta malula da ray heyey c…ôpa Ňčgada nd…ôhay da slala ha.
8.34: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay tabiya da slala ha a bamawa, a cadamara ray ta Yesu. Ta‚Äô, a b…ôrkwamara Ňčga daw la daa hwayak ata ha.

9.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a t…ôpey aa kwambiwal, a v…ôhey a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa, a daw a slala aŇčga.
9.2: Ta‚Äô, a handamar ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya daha, manakaya da ray …ďe…ďele. Masa Yesu ma n…ôka nd…ôhay a, fa t…ô…ďmara aŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga mb…ôlda ndaw ata na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya heyey: ¬ęD…ôka mevel, b…ôz a…óaw! Meb…ôrey da ray akah daa saba.¬Ľ
9.3: Fete…óe na, nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga *Mawiz daha, a wulkam daa ray ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw a ke…óe, a pa ray aŇčga Ňčga Gazlavay na, kwara?¬Ľ
9.4: Yesu a s…ôra mewulkey ata. Da ray Ňčgene, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wulkam maaya ba anda ke…óe na, maja me?
9.5: Ya gwa ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúMeb…ôrey akah daa saba‚ÄĚ da daa ba, ya gwa ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúSl…ôk…óey, daw ta salay akah.‚ÄĚ Dasi mey hay cewete ke…óe na, masa ta banay Ňčga l…ôvey Ňčgada yah na, wura?
9.6: Yaw, ya wu…óey ka s…ôrmara, yah *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, yah ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga mb…ôkey meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay da b…ôla ke…óe. Wure ke…óe, ka h…ôtmar cek ma da key la.¬Ľ Anda ke…óe, Yesu, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya heyey: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, la …ďe…ďele akah, daw a way!¬Ľ
9.7: Ndaw aha p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, ta‚Äô, a daw a way.
9.8: Daa masa nd…ôhay makustakaya ma h…ôtmar cek aha mekey na, a zluram, a r…ôzlam. A h…ôlmamara Gazlavay maja aŇčga ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč mahura anda ke…óe a ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč. Yesu a z…ôla Matiye (Mark 2.13-17; Luk 5.27-32)
9.9: Yesu a sl…ôk…óey daa slam aha, a daw. Masa aŇčga fa daw na, a h…ôtar ndaw daha mez…ôley *Matiye. AŇčga manjakaya fa key sl…ôra daa slam mecekeley budaw. Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSawa, s…ôpya.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, Matiye p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, ta‚Äô, a daw asiya.
9.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey, Yesu a daw Ňčga z…ômey …óaf da way Matiye he. Daa way a, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a z…ômamara …óaf a na, ta nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw ga leŇč ta nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz.
9.11: Masa *Fariza hay ma h…ôtmatar fa z…ômam …óaf bama ta nd…ôhay a na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvmatar a *gula hay Ňčga Yesu: ¬ęBay akwar a z…ômam …óaf ta nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw leŇč ta nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey hay na, kwara?¬Ľ
9.12: Yesu ma c…ônda mey a na, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay masa wurwer na, mey ata ta ndaw ma v…ôlda slalak daa ba. Ama ma wu…óey mey Ňčga ndaw ma v…ôlda slalak na, si nd…ôhay masa-macay hay gway.
9.13: Ehe, s…ôrmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa wu…óey na, nd…ôhay a s…ôram dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay, ba na, a h…ôrmaya g…ônaw hay ba.‚ÄĚ Yaw, nd…ôhay ma wulkam ata nd…ôhay maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay ta sl…ôrdiwa Ňčga z…ôlta daa ba, ama a sl…ôrdiwa na, Ňčga z…ôley nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey.¬Ľ Mey da ray mekey daliyam (Mark 2.18-22; Luk 5.33-39)
9.14: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, gula hay Ňčga *JaŇč-Baptis a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay Yesu, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAla ta nd…ôhay *Fariza hay na, ala fa kam *daliyam , ama gula akah hay na, a kam daliyam ba s…ôlak na, maja me?¬Ľ
9.15: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ndaw a z…ôlwa nd…ôhay aa mekey m…ôlak Ňčga kwakwa Ňčga z…ômey cek na, nd…ôhay a, aa s…ômam da cakay zel-kwakwa ha daa ba daw? Ta pas Ňčgene a kam daliyam ba. Ama pas a, a sawa la masa ata ma da k…ôrzamara zel-kwakwa ha na, a kam daliyam la d…ô…ďa.
9.16: ¬ęYaw, ndaw a gwa Ňčga …ó…ôpa zana magurma ta zana mawiya daw? A key ba, maja zana mawiya ma…ó…ôpkaya na, a n…ôsa zana magurma ha la, zana magurma ha a da Ňčg…ôrey a dey a.
9.17: ¬ęAsaya, ndaw a gwa a zl…ôrey wuzam meede…óek e aa kwene-kwene magurma ba. Da a zl…ôra a hwa…ó a na, wuzam a, a m…ôsley, a Ňčg…ôra kwene-kwene he la. Anda ke…óe, wuzam a leŇč kwene-kwene he a n…ôsam la cewete. Da Ňčga key maaya na, si ndaw a zl…ôra wuzam meede…óek e na, aa kwene-kwene mawiya. Anda ke…óe, wuzam a, aa daha, kwene-kwene may aa daha, cewete a n…ôsam ba.¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ôley Ňčgwas ta a sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa dam daa mem…ôcey (Mark 5.21-43; Luk 8.40-56)
9.18: Daa masa Yesu faa guzltar anda Ňčgene na, ndaw mahura daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa fa aŇčga, ta‚Äô, a regedey fa mey aŇčga, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDam a…óaw ta m…ôcey sem wure wure ke…óe. Ama ya fa kaka ambahw, sawa, pa har akah a ray a amba a h…ôtar mes…ôfney aŇčga aa slam a c…ôŇčga.¬Ľ
9.19: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a lecey, a diyam asiya ta gula aŇčga hay.
9.20: Ňägwas daha, mambaz fa mb…ô…ówa da hwa…ó d…ôga mevey kuraw a ray a cew. Daa masa Yesu fa daw na, Ňčgwas aha a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a ta fa d…ô…ďa, ta‚Äô, a g…ôsfar har fa mey Ňčga zana Ňčga Yesu a.
9.21: A ka anda ke…óe maja aŇčga fa wulkey daa mevel aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ya gwa Ňčga g…ôsfar har kwa fa zana aŇčga na, ya mb…ôley la.¬Ľ
9.22: Yesu p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey dey fa d…ô…ďa, a n…ôka Ňčgwas aha, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęD…ôka mevel, dam a…óaw! Ka ta mb…ôley cay maja kah ma paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara.¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene, Ňčgwas aha ta mb…ôley cay.
9.23: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a wuswa a way ndaw mahura heyey. A h…ôtfatar nd…ôhay ma fa sl…ôlam, asaya nd…ôhay makustakaya fa mb…ô…óam haya! haya!
9.24: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay a: ¬ęHwam la fe…óe! Dam aha ta m…ôcey daa ba, ama a key a ney aa …óar.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay a, aa saŇčg…ôram da ray a.
9.25: Daa masa nd…ôhay a ma bamawa sem aa ambaw na, Yesu a mb…ôzey a way a, ta‚Äô, a k…ôrza dam aha fa har. Dam a p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey.
9.26: Mey da ray dam aha, a c…ôney aa wura aa wura tabiya daa hwayak a. Yesu a wurey dey Ňčga nd…ôhay wulaf hay cew
9.27: Masa Yesu ma sl…ôk…óey da way ndaw mahura heyey la na, wulaf hay cew daha, a s…ôpmar wurzay ta mewudey, a l…ôvam: ¬ęS…ôrfandar dey-ceceh, may taw, B…ôzey Ňčga *Davit!¬Ľ
9.28: Yesu a wusey a way na, wulaf hay cew heyey, a mb…ôzam asiya. Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wulkam na, ya gwa Ňčga wurkwara dey akwar daw?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAhaw, Bay Mahura.¬Ľ
9.29: Da ray Ňčgene, aŇčga gas! gas! a g…ôsfatar har fa dey Ňčga wulaf hay a, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDey akwar Ňčga wuram anda akwar ma t…ô…ďmara ya gwa Ňčga wurkwara.¬Ľ
9.30: Dey ata wur! wur! a wuram. Yesu a k…ôtata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya, ndaw a da c…ônda cek masa ma key ta akwar ke…óe ba.¬Ľ
9.31: Ama nd…ôhay cew kaa heyey, a mb…ôkdamara slam aha nek…ô…óey na, ta‚Äô, a kadamara mey da ray Yesu a nd…ôhay daa hwayak a tabiya. Yesu a …ď…ôla malula da ray ndaw ma gwa Ňčgaa guzley ba
9.32: Masa nd…ôhay Yesu ma wurtara dey heyey fa bamawa da way a la na, ta‚Äô, a handamar ndaw daha ma gwa Ňčgaa guzley ba, maja aŇčga ta malula da ray.
9.33: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a …ď…ôla malula da ray ndaw a, ndaw aha aa guzley d…ô…ďa. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe a r…ôzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęD…ôga Ňčga menjey al…ôkwa, ya ta h…ôtkwa cek ma key anda ke…óe daa hwayak Ňčga *Israyel ke…óe daa ba.¬Ľ
9.34: Ama nd…ôhay *Fariza hay na, aa guzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra bay Ňčga mes…ôfney maaya ba hay ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay.¬Ľ Mey da ray Yesu, ma key dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay
9.35: Yesu fa p…ôkta berney hay ta slala hay masa gweegwe ta d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile. Fete…óe faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa way ata hay mewuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay, fa wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray *mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay, asaya, fa mb…ôley nd…ôhay daa macay hay wura wura c…ôpa leŇč nd…ôhay maah…ôl…ďatakaya tabiya.
9.36: Masa Yesu ma h…ôtatar nd…ôhay makustakaya na, dey-ceceh a kar maja a g…ôram, g…ôdaŇč ata daa saba, ata anda t…ô…ďaŇč hay manjar mec…ôkwer.
9.37: Maja Ňčgene ta‚Äô, a Ňčgatar mey a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek ta key la ga da ley , ama nd…ôhay p…ôreh Ňčga kam…ôrwa Ňčgada way.
9.38: Anda ke…óe, kamar ambahw a bay Ňčga ley a, Ňčga sl…ôrwa nd…ôhay mekele saya a dey a Ňčga kawa cek hay da ley a.¬Ľ

10.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu ta‚Äô, a z…ôlta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew amba a sl…ôrdata Ňčga key sl…ôra aŇčga. A v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga …ď…ôley malula hay da ray nd…ôhay, asaya, Ňčga mb…ôley nd…ôhay daa macay hay wura wura c…ôpa, leŇč nd…ôhay maah…ôl…ďatakaya tabiya.
10.2: Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey kuraw a ray a cew e na, ara *SimaŇčw, ndaw masa ma z…ôlmara *Piyer ta m…ôlmaha *And…ôre, *Jak ta m…ôlmaha *JaŇč, ata cewete b…ôza hay Ňčga Zebede,
10.3: *F…ôlep, *Bartelemey, *Tuma, *Matiye, *ndaw ma cakala budaw, Jak, b…ôzey Ňčga Alfe, Taade,
10.4: SimaŇčw, ndaw da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma wu…óam Ňčga l…ôhdamata nd…ôhay ata hay dasi har Ňčga masa-g…ôra ata hay, leŇč Juda Iskariyawt, ndaw ma v…ôlda Yesu a har masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay. Mey da ray sl…ôra Ňčga nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu ma da kamara (Mark 6.7-13; Luk 9.1-6)
10.5: -6 Yesu a sl…ôrdata gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew heyey, a k…ôtata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam fa nd…ôhay *Israyel hay. Ata maaz…ô…ótakaya anda t…ô…ďaŇč hay maa z…ô…óam. Ama a slala nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay na, ka da diyam ba. Ka da diyam a slala *Samari hay ba may.
10.7: Da akwar fa diyam daa c…ôve…ó na, wuzdamatara a nd…ôhay, l…ôvmatar, ‚ÄúGweegwe cay, bay Ňčga Gazlavay a wuzwa.‚ÄĚ
10.8: Mb…ôldamata masa-macay hay, sl…ôk…óadamat…ôrwa nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya, p…ôrmata maas…ôkula hay, …ď…ôlmata malula hay da ray nd…ôhay. G…ôdaŇč a na, ya v…ôldakwara Ňčga maaya. Yaw, akwar may, kamatara Ňčga maaya.
10.9: Da akwar fa diyam na, ka da lam dala a har ba.
10.10: Ka da diyam ta gabal da har ba, kwa ta zana hay cew ba. Ka da diyam kwa ta tarak ba, kwa ta zlanday ba. Maja ndaw ma ka sl…ôra na, si a h…ôtey cek mez…ômey maja sl…ôra aŇčga.
10.11: ¬ęDa akwar ma wusam la aa berney, da daa ba, a slala na, s…ôpam ndaw masa ma wu…óey Ňčga t…ô…ďkwar. Njam da way aŇčga haa kasl pas masa akwar ma da diyam.
10.12: Da akwar fa mb…ôzam a way ndaw na, ka camatar har, ka l…ôvmatar: ‚ÄúMaaya Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga sawa a ray akwar.‚ÄĚ
10.13: Da nd…ôhay da way a ta t…ô…ďmakwar la na, cac…ôf…óamara Gazlavay amba maaya aŇčga a njey a ray ata. Ama da ta t…ô…ďmakwar daa ba na, cac…ôf…óamara Gazlavay amba a la maaya aŇčga ha la da ray ata.
10.14: Da way, da daa ba, da slala masa nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a, a g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmakwar ba, asaya, a g…ômam Ňčga c…ôndamara mey akwar ba na, raramatara lagwada fa salay akwar hay , bam la da way a, da daa ba, da slala ha.
10.15: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ta pas Ňčga sariya na, Gazlavay a da s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay daa berney a Ňčgene ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga *Sadawm ta Ňčga *Gwamar .¬Ľ Mey da ray banay ma da sawa a ray nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu (Mark 13.9-13; Luk 21.12-17)
10.16: Yesu a patar leŇčgesl, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay, ya fa sl…ôrdakwar anda t…ô…ďaŇč hay Ňčgada wuzlah g…ôdey-ley hay. Anda ke…óe, wam vaw fa nd…ôhay anda zezekw hay ma wam vaw fa ray ata. T…ôram nd…ôhay meekwe…ó-mey anda makurgwadakw hay.
10.17: Wam vaw, maja a k…ôrzamakwar la, a handamakwar la fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sariya. Asaya, a sl…ô…ómakwar la daa way ata hay mewuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
10.18: A …óa…óamakwar la fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay leŇč fa mey Ňčga bay hay maja akwar nd…ôhay a…óaw hay. Gazlavay a p…ôskatar mey la Ňčga handamakwar amba ka kam sede da ray a…óaw fa mey ata leŇč fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay.
10.19: Da ta handamakwar la aa sariya na, ka da h…ô…ďam ray da ray mey masa akwar ma daa guzldamara ba, maja mey masa akwar ma daa guzldamara Ňčgene na, a bawa la daa masa akwar faa guzlam.
10.20: Yaw, mey a, a da bawa ta fa akwar ba, ama ara Mes…ôfney Ňčga Papakw akwar Bay Gazlavay ma da balakwara mey a.
10.21: ¬ęNd…ôhay a v…ôldamata m…ôlma ata hay la Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay. PapaŇč hay may, a v…ôldamata b…ôz ata hay la k…ône. B…ôza hay a kam h…ôma la a ray papa ata hay ta mama ata hay, amba nd…ôhay a k…ô…ómata vagay.
10.22: Nd…ôhay c…ôpa a da Ňčg…ôldamakwar ba maja yah. Ama ndaw ma …ď…ôsa banay a la haa kasl mend…ôvey a na, Gazlavay a l…ôhda la.
10.23: Da fa s…ôrdamakwar banay da slala na, diyam a slala mekele. Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ta pas masa yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ma da v…ôhwa na, akwar ma nd…ôvdamara sl…ôra akwar da slala hay tabiya Ňčga *Israyel daa ba araŇč.
10.24: ¬ęNdaw maa s…ôrkey na, a s…ôra cek a f…ôna ndaw maa s…ôrkada ba. Ndaw ma ka sl…ôra na, mahura da ray bay aŇčga ba.
10.25: Ndaw maa s…ôrkey na, a da t…ôrey anda ndaw maa s…ôrkada ha gway. Ndaw ma ka sl…ôra na, a da t…ôrey anda bay Ňčga sl…ôra ha gway. Yaw, akwar na, anda nd…ôhay da way a…óaw, da ta z…ôlmaya ‚Äú*Beyelzebul ‚ÄĚ sem na, Ňčgene he, akwar nd…ôhay da way a…óaw, a da c…ô…ómakwar ma f…ôna.¬Ľ Ka da zluram ta nd…ôhay ba (Luk 12.2-9)
10.26: ¬ęDa ray Ňčgene, ka da zluram ta nd…ôhay ba. Cek tabiya masa nd…ôhay ma …ďadamara, a wuzwa la a palah, cek hay masa nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara ba na, a s…ôrmara la.
10.27: Mey masa yah ma wuzdakwara ta mayal a ke…óe na, wuzdam…ôrwa a palah. Yaw, mey a…óaw masa akwar ma c…ôndamara ta mey-mees…ôkey ke…óe na, t…ôpam aa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa, wudmara ta g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay tabiya.
10.28: Ka da zluram ta nd…ôhay ma da k…ô…ómakwar vagay ba, maja a da k…ô…óam na, vaw akwar daada gway, ama a gwamara a ray mes…ôfney akwar ba. Zluram na, si ta Gazlavay gway. AŇčga na, a gwa Ňčga k…ôzla vaw akwar ta mes…ôfney akwar aa v…ôge…ó Ňčga awaw magaza.
10.29: ∆äiyaŇč mec…ôhe mec…ôhe cew na, a gwa Ňčga h…ô…ókedey dala pal daada, ba daw? Ama kwa …óiyaŇč mec…ôhe pal fa da k…ôzlwa a hwayak Ňčgaa z…ô…óey na, daa ba, si Papakw akwar Bay Gazlavay ma v…ôlda c…ôve…ó Ňčgaa z…ô…óda.
10.30: Akwar may, kwa eŇčgwec Ňčga ray akwar hay na, masl…ôftakaya pal pal tabiya.
10.31: Yaw, maja Ňčgene, ka da zluram ba. Akwar na, Gazlavay a wu…ókwar a f…ôna …óiyaŇč hay mec…ôhe mec…ôhe ga Ňčgene, ba daw?
10.32: ¬ęKwa waawa ma l…ôvey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay, aŇčga ndaw a…óaw na, Ňčgene, yah, ya da l…ôvey fa mey Ňčga Papay da va…ó, aŇčga, ndaw a…óaw may.
10.33: Ama ndaw ma l…ôvey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay, a s…ôrya ba na, Ňčgene, ya da l…ôvey fa mey Ňčga Papay da va…ó, ya s…ôra ndaw a ba may.¬Ľ Mey da ray nd…ôhay ma wunkam …óay maja mey Ňčga Yesu (Luk 12.51-53; 14.26, 27)
10.34: Yesu a patar leŇčgesl saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa da wulkam ya sawa Ňčga handawa zazay a b…ôla na, k…ône ba. Fara fara, ya sawa na, Ňčga handawa zazay ba, ama ya handawa v…ôram.
10.35: Ya sawa na, amba ya wunkatar …óay Ňčga b…ôz-mez…ôle ta papaha, Ňčga dam-maŇčgusa ta mamaha, leŇč Ňčga Ňčgwas ta mamaŇč Ňčga zel e.
10.36: Kwa da way ndaw pal na, nd…ôhay siya hay a da t…ôram masa-g…ôra Ňčga siya hay.
10.37: ¬ęKwa waawa ma wu…óa papaha ta mamaha kalah a f…ôna aŇčga ma wu…óya na, ta wusa Ňčga njey ta yah daa ba. Asaya, kwa waawa ma wu…óta b…ôz aŇčga hay ta dam aŇčga hay kalah a f…ôna aŇčga ma wu…óya na, ta wusa Ňčga njey ta yah daa ba.
10.38: Kwa waawa ma …ď…ôsa banay ma da sawa a ray a maja yah daa ba na, ta wusa Ňčga njey ta yah daa ba. Asaya, kwa waawa ma s…ôpya daa ba na, aŇčga ta wusa Ňčga njey ta yah daa ba may.
10.39: Yaw, kwa waawa ma wu…óey Ňčga l…ôhda heter aŇčga na, aa z…ô…óda la. Ama ndaw ma v…ôlda heter aŇčga maja yah na, a h…ôtar la aa slam a.¬Ľ Gazlavay ma da p…ôley mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra na, Ňčgada wa hay wa? (Mark 9.41)
10.40: ¬ęKwa waawa ma t…ô…ďkwar la ta mees…ômey na, a key a t…ô…ďey Ňčgene na, yah. Ndaw ma t…ô…ďya na, a key a t…ô…ďey Ňčgene na, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa.
10.41: Yaw, kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďa *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta mees…ômey, maja a s…ôra, aŇčga ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, a h…ôtey mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga la anda Ňčga ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Yaw, kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďa ndaw maja a s…ôra, ara ndaw maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, a h…ôtey mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga la anda Ňčga ndaw maaya ha may.
10.42: Kwa waawa ma v…ôlar yam mak…ôslkaya Ňčgada ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar, masa ma pa ray aŇčga Ňčga mec…ôhe, maja a s…ôra, aŇčga gula a…óaw na, ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, a h…ôtey mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga la.¬Ľ

11.1: Masa Yesu ma k…ôtata nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mesl…ôrey kuraw a ray a cew heyey cay na, p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, a daw Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčgada nd…ôhay da slala hay fete…óe. JaŇč-Baptis a sl…ôrdata gula aŇčga hay fa Yesu
11.2: *JaŇč-Baptis, aŇčga daa f…ôrs…ône. Daa masa aŇčga daa f…ôrs…ône he na, a c…ônda mey da ray sl…ôra Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste. Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey gula aŇčga hay siya fa Yesu a
11.3: Ňčgaa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKah na, K…ôriste, ndaw ma da sawa Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay heyey daw? Da daa ba, ya s…ôkwam ndaw mekele ma da sawa daw?¬Ľ
11.4: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam, kadamara cek masa akwar ma c…ôndamara ta sl…ômay akwar, ta masa akwar ma h…ôtmar ta dey akwar ke…óe a JaŇč-Baptis.
11.5: L…ôvmar na, wulaf hay fa h…ôtmar dey d…ô…ďa, jegwer hay fa diyam maaya maaya ta salay ata, maas…ôkula hay ta s…ô…óam sem, madagazlam hay fa c…ônam sl…ômay, nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya fa sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey, nd…ôhay masa-viya hay fa c…ôndamara Mey-maaya-mawiya d…ô…ďa.
11.6: Ndaw ma mb…ôkda mey a…óaw ba maja sl…ôra masa yah ma ka na, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray a.¬Ľ Mey da ray JaŇč-Baptis
11.7: Masa gula hay Ňčga *JaŇč-Baptis ta diyam sem na, Yesu aa guzltar mey da ray JaŇč-Baptis a, a nd…ôhay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ma diyam a wuzlah-ley na, Ňčga n…ôkwa me? Ka n…ôkmawa na, guzer masa meme…ó ma wusa daw? Ara aŇčga ba, ba diya?
11.8: Kaa, akwar ma diyam Ňčga n…ôkwa na, me? Ka n…ôkmawa na, ndaw masa ma pey zana maaya fa vaw daw? Anja nd…ôhay masa ma pam zana maaya fa vaw na, ata da way bay hay, ba diya?
11.9: Wuzdamiwa, ka diyam Ňčga n…ôkmawa na, wa? Ka n…ôkmawa na, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ba diya? Ya fa l…ôvkwar, fara fara ara aŇčga. Ama a f…ôna ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay la saya,
11.10: maja *JaŇč a na, ara ndaw masa mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya maa guzley da ray a, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay a l…ôvar a B…ôzey aŇčga: Ehe, ya fa sl…ôrey maslaŇč-c…ôve…ó a…óaw fa mey akah, amba a …óiykawa c…ôve…ó akah.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
11.11: Yesu aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da wuzlah nd…ôhay da b…ôla na, kwa ndaw ma f…ôna JaŇč-Baptis na, daa ba. Ama ndaw mec…ôhe da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata na, ndaw aha a f…ôna JaŇč-Baptis.
11.12: D…ôga ta pas masa JaŇč-Baptis ma zlar Ňčga wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay haa wure ke…óe na, nd…ôhay malamba masa-h…ôma hay fa k…ô…óam vaw Ňčga t…ôkmara Bay Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray nd…ôhay. A wu…óam Ňčga wamara b…ôla aa slam a Ňčga Gazlavay.
11.13: Kwakwas Ňčga *Mawiz ta nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey hay tabiya taa guzlam la da ray Gazlavay ma wey da ray nd…ôhay. Aa guzlam anda ke…óe haa kasl pas masa JaŇč ma wuswa.
11.14: Da ka t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw na, ya fa l…ôvkwar, *Eli, ndaw masa nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey hay maa guzlam zleezle da ray a ma da v…ôhwa heyey na, ara JaŇč-Baptis a.
11.15: Da ndaw, aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, Ňčga c…ônda mey a maaya maaya.
11.16: ¬ęS…ôkway Ňčga nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe kaa na, ya da wata na, ta me? Yaw, ya da wata na, ta b…ôza hay masa manjatakaya da slala fa kam wasa ta mandala ata hay, a wu…ókam …óay da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam:
11.17: ‚ÄúAla ta famakwar sl…ôlam la, ama ka ta g…ôrvam daa ba. Ala ta zlamakwar walay vagay la, ama akwar ta t…ôwam daa ba may.‚ÄĚ
11.18: Yaa guzlkwar anda ke…óe na, maja JaŇč ta sawa la Ňčga wuzkwar mey. A key *daliyam, asaya, a sey wuzam ba. Kaa nd…ôhay a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAŇčga ta malula da ray.‚ÄĚ
11.19: Yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya sawa, ya fa z…ômey cek, ya fa sey cek anda nd…ôhay mekele. Ama nd…ôhay a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúN…ôkmara, ndaw a ke…óe, a wulkey si Ňčga z…ômey cek ta Ňčga sey wuzam Ňčgada hwa…ó aŇčga gway. Asaya, aŇčga na, ara jam Ňčga nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw ta Ňčga nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz.‚ÄĚ Ama yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar nd…ôhay a da s…ôrmara leŇčgesl Ňčga Gazlavay aŇčga maaya na, ta fa sl…ôra maaya masa nd…ôhay ta leŇčgesl Ňčga Gazlavay ma kamara.¬Ľ Mey da ray banay ma da sawa a ray nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu ba (Luk 10.13-15)
11.20: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a mb…ô…ótar ray Ňčgada nd…ôhay da slala hay masa aa ma key maazla hay ga da hwa…ó a. A mb…ô…ótar ray na, maja nd…ôhay da slala hay a, ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata daa ba.
11.21: A l…ôvtar: ¬ęHaya! nd…ôhay da slala KwaraziŇč, banay a sawa la a ray akwar. Haya! nd…ôhay da slala Betsayda, banay a sawa la a ray akwar. Da nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Tir ta Ňčga SidaŇčw ta h…ôtmatar maazla hay a la na, anja ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata sem d…ôga zleezle, anja ta k…ôzlam zana Ňčga sak meef…ôrey vaw sem fa vaw, asaya, ta p…ôtkwalam sem daa beb…ô…óes Ňčga wuzwa na, ata ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata da b…ôla cay.
11.22: Da ray Ňčgene, ya fa kadakwara, ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da ka sariya da ray b…ôla na, Gazlavay a da s…ôrdakwar banay ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Tir ta Ňčga SidaŇčw.
11.23: Akwar nd…ôhay da Kapernayum may, ka wulkam na, Gazlavay a Ňčg…ôlkwar la a va…ó daw? Ara k…ône ba. A da k…ôzlakwar aa slam Ňčga nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya. Ya ta key maazla hay la da wuzlah akwar. Da nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga *Sadawm ta h…ôtmatar maazla hay a ke…óe la na, anja berney ata ta p…ôlhey daa ba, anja aŇčga daha haa wure ke…óe.
11.24: Da ray Ňčgene, ya fa kadakwara, ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da ka sariya da ray b…ôla na, Gazlavay a da s…ôrdakwar banay ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Sadawm.¬Ľ Yesu a kar suse a Gazlavay ta mees…ômey (Luk 10.21, 22)
11.25: Daa Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWaa Papay Bay Gazlavay, ndaw ma wa slam da va…ó ta da hwayak, ya fa kaka suse, maja ka ta wuzd…ôrwa maaya akah la a nd…ôhay ma s…ôra cek ba anda b…ôza hay mec…ôhe hay. Ama Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa ta leŇčgesl ma s…ôra cek na, ka ta …ďada maaya ha sem fa ata.
11.26: Ahaw, Papay, maja ta mbafaka sem Ňčga ka k…ône.¬Ľ
11.27: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęPapay ta v…ôldatiwa cek hay tabiya sem asi har a…óaw. Kwa ndaw pal ma s…ôrya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, daa ba, si Papay. Asaya, kwa ndaw pal ma s…ôra Papay daa ba may, si yah, B…ôzey aŇčga, leŇč nd…ôhay masa yah ma wu…óey Ňčga wuzdatara.¬Ľ Mey da ray Yesu ma da m…ôskadata vaw ta nd…ôhay
11.28: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay masa fa g…ôram Ňčga s…ôpey mey hay mekele mekele Ňčga *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz Ňčgene, samawa fa yah, akwar fa da g…ôram daa saba.
11.29: C…ôndamara mey a…óaw, samawa, sas…ôrkam fa yah, maja yah ndaw meekwe…ó-mey, ka da m…ôskam vaw ta zazay.
11.30: Mees…ôrkey a…óaw na, aŇčga ta banay Ňčga c…ôney ba, kwa sl…ôra masa yah ma da l…ôvkwar Ňčga key na, aa ta g…ôra daa ba.¬Ľ

12.1: Pas pal daha, ara ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a diyam taa ley Ňčga cek anda daw . May fa catar a gula aŇčga hay a. Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a h…ô…ďam cek hay a heyey, aa mb…ô…ómara.
12.2: Daa masa nd…ôhay *Fariza hay ma h…ôtmatar gula aŇčga hay fa h…ô…ďam cek aha na, ta‚Äô, aa guzlmar a Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęHaya! N…ôkta gula akah hay fa kam sl…ôra ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw, ara cek mat…ôkakaya daa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz.¬Ľ
12.3: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ta jaŇčgamara daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay cek masa *Davit ma ka zleezle na, daa ba daw? Ta pas laŇčgar daha, ata Davit ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay, may fa catar, ama cek mez…ômey fa ata daa ba.
12.4: Maja Ňčgene Davit e a mb…ôzey aa way Ňčga Gazlavay, aŇčga ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay, ta‚Äô, a z…ômamara peŇč masa mav…ôldakaya Ňčgada Gazlavay. Kwa kwakwas al…ôkwa ta p…ôskatar mey Ňčga z…ômamara daa ba, anja Ňčga z…ômamara na, si nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay gway.
12.5: Asaya, ka ta jaŇčgamara mey Ňčga kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz la, ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas a fa kam sl…ôra daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, ata fa zl…ô…ďmara kwakwas Ňčga pas mem…ôskey-vaw, ama ara meb…ôrey ba.
12.6: Ehe, ya fa l…ôvkwar, cek mahura ma f…ôna Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, aŇčga fe…óe da wuzlah akwar.
12.7: ∆äerewel Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa wu…óey na, nd…ôhay a s…ôram dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay, ba na, a h…ôrmaya g…ônaw hay ba.‚ÄĚ Ama ka ta c…ôndamara mabara Ňčga mey a fara fara daa ba. Anja da ka ta c…ôndamara la na, ka gwamara Ňčga mb…ô…ómatar ray Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa manjar meb…ôrey ke…óe ba.
12.8: Yaw, ma wey da ray pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, ara yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw.¬Ľ Yesu a …óiyra har mam…ôckaya Ňčga ndaw ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw (Mark 3.1-6; Luk 6.6-11)
12.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, a daw a mb…ôzey aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay da slala ha.
12.10: Ndaw fete…óe daha, har mam…ôckaya. Nd…ôhay *Fariza hay daa way-mewuzey-mey a, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKwakwas al…ôkwa ta v…ôley c…ôve…ó la Ňčga mb…ôley ndaw ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw daw?¬Ľ Aa c…ôf…óamara anda Ňčgene na, amba aa d…ô…ófamar mey.
12.11: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa ndaw da wuzlah akwar, aŇčga ta t…ô…ďaŇč pal, da t…ô…ďaŇč a, a k…ôzley aa v…ôge…ó ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, ndaw aha, a bad…ôrwa daa v…ôge…ó e daa ba daw?
12.12: Yaw, ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ndaw a f…ôna t…ô…ďaŇč ta maaya. Kaa wara kwakwas al…ôkwa a v…ôley c…ôve…ó Ňčga j…ôney ndaw ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw ba na, kwara?¬Ľ
12.13: Cay, ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvar a ndaw masa har mam…ôckaya heyey: ¬ęT…ôld…ôrwa har a.¬Ľ Tal! a t…ôldara har a. Ta‚Äô, a …óiyey anda har laŇčgar.
12.14: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay Fariza hay a, a bamawa aa ambaw, a kusam, a c…ômdamara …óay ata Ňčga k…ô…óey Yesu vagay. Mey da ray ndaw ma ka sl…ôra masa Gazlavay ma wala
12.15: Daa masa Yesu ma s…ôra dabaray ata la na, p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey daa slam aha, ndal! a daw. Nd…ôhay ga fa diyam asiya. Ta‚Äô, a mb…ôldata masa-macay hay c…ôpa da wuzlah ata.
12.16: Ama a katar mey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwa ka da wuzdamara mey da ray a…óaw a nd…ôhay ba.¬Ľ
12.17: Yesu maa guzley anda ke…óe na, mey a, ta key la anda *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle, ma l…ôvey:
12.18: ¬ęGazlavay a l…ôvey: Ke…óe ara ndaw ma ka sl…ôra a…óaw masa yah ma wala, yah ma wu…óa kalah, yah faa s…ômey ga da ray a. Ya sl…ôrey Mes…ôfney a…óaw la a ray a, amba a wuzdatara a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba, ya da katar sariya a nd…ôhay ta c…ôve…ó e.
12.19: Kwa fa da t…ôrey vaw ta ndaw daa ba, kwa fa da wudey ta wudey daa ba. Kwa fa da key baazlam da wuzlah nd…ôhay daa ba.
12.20: Fa da Ňčg…ôrfa panay masa fa da h…ô…ďey na, daa ba. Asaya, kwa fa da m…ôca pet…ôrla masa fa da m…ôcey na, daa ba, maja ara ndaw mes…ôrey dey-ceceh fa masa-b…ôle hay. A ka sl…ôra aŇčga ha la haa ta pas masa aa ma da ka sariya fara fara da ray nd…ôhay c…ôpa.
12.21: Nd…ôhay tabiya a da pamara Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara.¬Ľ G…ôdaŇč Ňčga Yesu a sawa na, dama? (Mark 3.20-30; Luk 11.14-23)
12.22: Ta‚Äô, a handamawa ndaw-wulaf daha ma gwa Ňčgaa guzley ba, maja aŇčga ta malula da ray. Yesu ta‚Äô, a mb…ôlda, a gwa Ňčgaa guzley, a gwa Ňčga h…ôtar dey maaya maaya d…ô…ďa.
12.23: Nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe a r…ôzlam, a l…ôvam da ray Yesu: ¬ęDa ara B…ôzey Ňčga *Davit heyey kwa?¬Ľ
12.24: Ama nd…ôhay *Fariza hay ma c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe na, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe fa …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay ta maazla Ňčga *Beyelzebul, bay Ňčga mes…ôfney maaya ba hay.¬Ľ
12.25: Yesu a s…ôra mewulkey ata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa nd…ôhay daa hwayak pal a kam v…ôram da wuzlah ata na, hwayak a Ňčgene a n…ôsey la. Asaya, nd…ôhay da slala hay, da daa ba, nd…ôhay da way ndaw pal, da ta c…ômam …óay da wuzlah ata daa ba na, slala ha a n…ôsey la, da daa ba, way Ňčga ndaw aha a n…ôsey la may.
12.26: Da nd…ôhay Ňčga *SataŇč fa k…ô…óam vaw da wuzlah ata na, Ňčgene he, ara SataŇč a, mek…ô…óey vaw ta vaw aŇčga. Kaa wara a da c…ômtar ray Ňčga wey da ray ata na, kwara d…ô…ďa wura?
12.27: Da ka l…ôvam ya …ď…ôla malula ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Beyelzebul, bay Ňčga mes…ôfney maaya ba hay na, kaa gula akwar hay na, a …ď…ôlam malula ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga wa? Da ray Ňčgene, gula akwar hay na, a wuzdamakwara la, mey akwar Ňčgene, ara aŇčga ba.
12.28: Fara fara, ya fa …ď…ôley malula ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay. A wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey, Gazlavay fa wey da ray akwar cay.
12.29: ¬ęYaw, kwa ndaw-mayal ma gwa Ňčga mb…ôzey a way ndaw masa-g…ôdaŇč amba a lalat…ôrwa cek aŇčga hay meedey aŇčga na, daa ba. Si ndaw-mayal a, a key g…ôdaŇč teese…ó, a j…ôwa ndaw masa-g…ôdaŇč a …óagay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a gwa a h…ôlt…ôrwa cek hay da way a.
12.30: ¬ęDa ndaw ta njey ta yah daa ba na, Ňčgene ndaw a ara masa-g…ôra a…óaw. Asaya, da nd…ôhay a j…ônmaya Ňčga …ď…ôcwa ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčgada fa Gazlavay ba na, a key Ňčgene, aa wa…óamatar ray.
12.31: Maja Ňčgene, ya fa l…ôvkwar, da ndaw ta key cek maaya ba sem, kwa a c…ô…óa Gazlavay na, Gazlavay a gwa a mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga c…ôpa. Asaya, a gwa a mb…ôkdara mey hay maaya ba tabiya masa aŇčga maa guzlda da ray Gazlavay a. Ama da ndaw a c…ô…óa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay fa da mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga daa ba s…ôlak.
12.32: Kwa anja ndaw aha aa guzley mey maaya ba da ray a…óaw, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, Gazlavay a gwa a mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga. Ama ndaw maa guzley mey maaya ba da ray Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay fa da mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey a daa ba, kwa wure ke…óe, kwa ta vara ta vara, fa da mb…ôkdara daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta wudez meyey bab…ôza maaya ta maaya ba (Luk 6.43-45)
12.33: ¬ęDa wudez, aŇčga maaya na, a yey bab…ôza maaya may. Da wudez, aŇčga maaya ba na, a yey bab…ôza maaya ba may. A da s…ôrmara wudez ke…óe maaya ta maaya ba na, fa bab…ôza ha.
12.34: Hey! Akwar b…ôza hay Ňčga kucesl hay, akwar nd…ôhay maaya ba, kaa wara ka daa guzlam mey maaya na, kwara? Maja mey masa ndaw maa guzlda na, fa wuzd…ôrwa cek masa ma…ďadakaya daa mevel aŇčga.
12.35: Anda ke…óe, ndaw maaya na, fa wuzd…ôrwa cek maaya daa mevel aŇčga. Ndaw malamba may, fa wuzd…ôrwa cek malamba daa mevel aŇčga.
12.36: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, ta pas masa Bay Gazlavay ma da ka sariya na, kwa waawa a kadara mey aŇčga la a Bay Gazlavay da ray mey hay maaya ba masa aa maa guzldata c…ôpa.
12.37: Anda ke…óe, da mey masa kah maa guzlda aa maaya ba na, Gazlavay a mb…ô…óka ray la. Yaw, da mey a maaya na, Ňčgene Gazlavay a paka la Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu Ňčga key maazla (Mark 8.11, 12; Luk 11.29-32)
12.38: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz leŇč *Fariza hay siya aa guzlmar a Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, ya wu…óam ka kandar maazla ma wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
12.39: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe na, malamba hay, akwar ma mb…ôkdamara Bay Gazlavay sem! Ka wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtam maazla ma wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay fara daw? Kwa akwar fa da h…ôtam maazla ha daa ba, si maazla anda ma key ta *Jawnas, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle.
12.40: Anda Jawnas ma key …óar maakar taa va…ó, taa pas da hwa…ó ewet mahura heyey na, ara anda Ňčgene may, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ma da key …óar maakar taa va…ó, taa pas da v…ôge…ó.
12.41: Ta pas sariya masa Gazlavay ma da ka na, nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Niniwe heyey na, a lacamawa la Ňčga mb…ô…ómakwar ray, akwar nd…ôhay wure ke…óe, maja daa masa ata ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa Jawnas ma wuzdatara na, ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata sem. N…ôkmara, da wuzlah akwar fe…óe, ndaw ma f…ôna Jawnas daha, ama akwar ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar daa ba.
12.42: Asaya, ta pas sariya masa Gazlavay ma da ka na, Ňčgwas ma key bay daa hwayak Ňčga Saba zleezle heyey a lacawa la Ňčga mb…ô…ókwar ray, akwar nd…ôhay wure ke…óe, maja aŇčga na, a sawa da d…ôreŇč Ňčga c…ôney mey da ray leŇčgesl maaya Ňčga Bay *SalamaŇčw. N…ôkmara, da wuzlah akwar fe…óe, ndaw ma f…ôna Bay SalamaŇčw daha, ama akwar ta t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga daa ba.¬Ľ Mey da ray malula ma v…ôhwa a ray ndaw saya (Luk 11.24-26)
12.43: ¬ęDa masa malula ta bey sem da ray ndaw na, a daw a p…ôkey da ley saw, a s…ôpey slam Ňčga m…ôskey vaw. Ama da ta h…ôtey slam daa ba na,
12.44: a wulkey, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúŇägama, ya v…ôhey aa slam a…óaw masa yah ma bawa da hwa…ó a heyey.‚ÄĚ A v…ôhey a ray ndaw aha aa slam aŇčga heyey, a h…ôtfar slam aha ma…óiykaya maaya maaya, kwa meeme da hwa…ó a daa ba.
12.45: Da ray Ňčgene, malula ha a daw, a Ňčg…ôlwa malula hay mekele maasala ma f…ônmara ta h…ôma Ňčga key cek maaya ba. A samawa a ray ndaw a heyey. Anda ke…óe, ndaw aha a da s…ôrey banay ma f…ôna masa Ňčgeeme. Ara anda ke…óe, cek aha a da key ta nd…ôhay masa maaya ba wure ke…óe.¬Ľ MamaŇč Ňčga Yesu ta m…ôlmaha hay na, ara wa hay wa? (Mark 3.31-35; Luk 8.19-21)
12.46: Daa masa Yesu faa guzltar a nd…ôhay na, ata mamaha ta m…ôlmaha hay malacatakaya daa ambaw, a wu…óam Ňčgaa guzlmar.
12.47: Ndaw daha a l…ôvar a Yesu: ¬ęMamakw ta m…ôlmakw hay ata malacatakaya daa ambaw. A wu…óam Ňčgaa guzlmaka.¬Ľ
12.48: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMamay na, wa? M…ôlma a…óaw hay na, wa hay wa?¬Ľ
12.49: Fa d…ô…ďa ha Yesu, ta‚Äô, a wuzey har Ňčgada fa gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMamay ta m…ôlma a…óaw hay na, ara nd…ôhay ke…óe,
12.50: maja m…ôlma a…óaw, dam-mama a…óaw, da daa ba, mamay na, ara ndaw ma key cek anda Papay da va…ó ma wu…óey.¬Ľ

13.1: Ta pas a Ňčgene, Yesu a bey da way, a daw a njey a mey d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile Ňčgaa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay.
13.2: Nd…ôhay ga a kusam a cakay a. Maja Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, Yesu a t…ôpey aa kwambiwal, a njey a hwa…ó a amba aa guzltar. Kwambiwal a, aa da ray yam, ama nd…ôhay a na, malacatakaya da mey d…ôhwa ha.
13.3: Aa guzltar da ray cek hay ga ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw meh…ôvey daha, a daw Ňčgaa kwecey hulfa…ó a ley aŇčga.
13.4: Daa masa aŇčga faa kwacada hulfa…ó a na, hulfa…ó laŇčgar a k…ôzley aa c…ôve…ó. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, …óiyaŇč hay a samawa, a ndamara.
13.5: Yaw, hulfa…ó laŇčgar a k…ôzley aa slam masa p…ôra…ó, hwiyak da ray a ga daa ba. Hulfa…ó a, a p…ôcey fiyaw, maja hwiyak da ray a ga daa ba.
13.6: Ama menjey nek…ô…óey, da masa pas fa tey na, a …ďata. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a kweley, maja slaslalay a daa v…ôge…ó ga daa ba.
13.7: Hulfa…ó laŇčgar a k…ôzley a wuzlah hatak. Hatak a, a g…ôley, aa nj…ôr…óa hulfa…ó map…ôckaya ha.
13.8: Ama hulfa…ó laŇčgar na, a k…ôzley aa slam masa maaya, a g…ôley, a yey bab…ôza ga, wurzay pal, a gwa a yey bab…ôza temere, laŇčgar kwakwar maakwaw, laŇčgar may, kwakwar maakar.¬Ľ
13.9: Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa ndaw, aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, Ňčga c…ônda mey a maaya maaya.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzltar a nd…ôhay ta mey-meŇčgey hay na, maja me? (Mark 4.10-12; Luk 8.9, 10)
13.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKaa guzltar Ňčgada nd…ôhay a ta mey-meŇčgey hay na, maja me?¬Ľ
13.11: A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYaa guzltar ta mey hay meŇčgey na, maja akwar na, Gazlavay ta v…ôlkwar c…ôve…ó la Ňčga s…ôrey mey hay ma…ďadatakaya da ray mewey aŇčga da ray nd…ôhay. Ama nd…ôhay a ke…óe na, Gazlavay ta v…ôltar c…ôve…ó Ňčga s…ôrey mey a daa ba.
13.12: Anda ke…óe, da ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga s…ôra mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay a j…ôna Ňčga s…ôra mey a la a dey a. Da ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga s…ôra mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba na, kwa mey a masa nek…ô…óey daa mevel aŇčga na, Gazlavay a bad…ôrwa la tabiya.
13.13: Yaw, yaa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey na, maja ata fa n…ôkam dey, ama a h…ôtmar dey ba, fa j…ôkam sl…ômay, ama a c…ôndamara ba.
13.14: Anda ke…óe, cek aha ta key la Ňčgada ata, anda mey masa Gazlavay maa guzlda zleezle ta mey ndaw ma t…ôla mey aŇčga *Izay, ma l…ôvey: ‚ÄúAkwar fa j…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya, ama ka c…ôndamara ba. Akwar fa n…ôkam dey maaya maaya, ama ka h…ôtmar dey ba.
13.15: Maja nd…ôhay a, a g…ômam Ňčga c…ônam mey ba, a d…ôzlmata sl…ômay ata hay, a …ó…ôpmata dey ata hay. A kamara k…ône amba a h…ôtmar dey ba, a j…ôkam sl…ômay ba, a t…ô…ďmara mey a, aa mevel ata ba. Da ray Ňčgene, fa da mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata amba ya mb…ôldata na, daa ba.‚ÄĚ
13.16: ¬ęAma akwar, gula a…óaw hay na, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akwar, maja akwar fa h…ôtmar dey, asaya, akwar fa j…ôkam sl…ômay.
13.17: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey hay ga zleezle ta nd…ôhay siya ga masa maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta wu…óam la Ňčga h…ôtmar cek masa akwar ma h…ôtmar ke…óe, ama ta h…ôtmar daa ba. Ta wu…óam la Ňčga c…ôndamara cek masa akwar ma c…ôndamara ke…óe, ama ta c…ôndamara daa ba.¬Ľ Mabara Ňčga mey-meŇčgey ta ndaw maa kwecey hulfa…ó (Mark 4.13-20; Luk 8.11-15)
13.18: ¬ęEhe, c…ôndamara mabara Ňčga mey-meŇčgey ta ndaw maa kwecey hulfa…ó heyey d…ô…ďa.
13.19: Nd…ôhay siya hay a c…ôndamara mey da ray *mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay, ama a c…ôndamara mabara Ňčga mey a ba. Bay-malula a sawa, a la mey maaya daa mevel ata la. Ňägada ata na, mey a, aŇčga anda hulfa…ó ma k…ôzley aa c…ôve…ó.
13.20: Nd…ôhay siya hay saya ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay la na, a t…ô…ďmara fiyaw fiyaw ta mees…ômey. Ňägada ata na, mey a aŇčga anda hulfa…ó ma k…ôzley aa slam masa p…ôra…ó.
13.21: Ama nd…ôhay a, a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga …óar nek…ô…óey gway. Ta pas masa banay mekele mekele ma da sawa a ray ata maja mey a na, nd…ôhay a, a da mb…ôkdamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay a fiyaw fiyaw. Ata na, anda hulfa…ó ma p…ôcwa daa slam masa p…ôra…ó, slaslalay daa v…ôge…ó ga daa ba.
13.22: Nd…ôhay mekele a c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, a t…ô…ďmara, ama mey a, aa z…ô…óey maja ata fa wulkam kalah da ray menjey maaya da b…ôla, asaya, maja a wu…óam zleley kalah. Ňägada ata na, mey a, aŇčga anda hulfa…ó masa ma k…ôzley a wuzlah hatak, manjanj…ôr…óakaya daa hatak a. Ata anda cek ma yey bab…ôza ba.
13.23: Nd…ôhay mekele saya, a j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, a t…ô…ďmara. Da ray Ňčgene, fara fara a kadamara sl…ôra ta aŇčga. Ata anda hulfa…ó ma p…ôcwa daa slam maaya. Anda ke…óe, mey a, a yey daa mevel ata anda hulfa…ó ma p…ôcwa ma yey ga, bab…ôza fa v…ô…óa a key temere, mekele a key kwakwar maakwaw, da daa ba, kwakwar maakar.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta ley Ňčga daw ta zl…ôrav da hwa…ó a
