13.24: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey mekele a nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*Mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, ya gwa Ňčga wa na, ta me? Ehe, ya Ňčgakwar mey da ray a: Ndaw daha a sl…ôkey hulfa…ó maaya a ley aŇčga.
13.25: Ta tava…ó masa nd…ôhay fa nam na, masa-g…ôra aŇčga, a sawa, a sl…ôkey zl…ôrav aa ley a, ta‚Äô, a daw.
13.26: Menjey nek…ô…óey, daw heyey a p…ôcwa. Zl…ôrav a, a p…ôcwa may. A g…ôlam daa slam a, a pamawa ray .
13.27: Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga bay Ňčga ley a, ta‚Äô, a samawa, a l…ôvmar a bay ata: ‚ÄúWaa Bay ala, ka sl…ôkey aa ley akah na, hulfa…ó maaya, ba diya? Kaa zl…ôrav na, a sawa dama?‚ÄĚ
13.28: A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúAra masa-g…ôra a…óaw ma ka sl…ôra ha.‚ÄĚ Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay a, a l…ôvmar: ‚ÄúAnda ke…óe na, ka wu…óey ya diyam, ya m…ô…ómata daw?‚ÄĚ
13.29: A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúKay, a njey, maja da akwar fa m…ô…ómata na, ka da m…ô…óam daw maaya asiya may.
13.30: Mb…ôkdamata Ňčga kam daa slam a haa kasl kiya mekey daw. Ta kiya ha Ňčgene, ya da l…ôvtar Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma da kam…ôrwa daw a, Ňčga Ňčg…ômamara zl…ôrav a la …óagay, Ňčga j…ôwmata maa…óay a, Ňčga pamatar awaw fa v…ô…óa. Ama daw maaya na, a kam…ôrwa, a handam…ôrwa a wude…ó.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta bab…ôza Ňčga bazlawar leŇč ta cek ma h…ôsla makala (Mark 4.30-32; Luk 13.18, 19)
13.31: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey mekele saya a nd…ôhay fete…óe heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*Mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, aŇčga anda bab…ôza Ňčga bazlawar, masa ndaw ma la, ma r…ô…ďa aa ley aŇčga.
13.32: AŇčga mec…ôhe da wuzlah hulfa…ó hay siya, ama a p…ôcwa, a g…ôley mahura da ray cek hay siya, a t…ôrey Ňčga wudez, …óiyaŇč hay a samawa, a …óiyam way fa mey-har hay a.¬Ľ (Luk 13.20, 21)
13.33: Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey mekele saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, aŇčga anda cek ma h…ôsla makala masa Ňčgwas ma h…ôley kuset k…ô…óey, ma jaha…óa ta hapa Ňčga makala ga, amba a h…ôsl…ôrwa tabiya.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley ta mey-meŇčgey na, maja me? (Mark 4.33, 34)
13.34: Yesu a wuzdatara mey hay c…ôpa Ňčgada nd…ôhay na, ta mey-meŇčgey. Kwa taa guzltar ta mey mekele daa ba.
13.35: A ka k…ône na, amba a key anda *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley zleezle, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęYa daa guzltar a nd…ôhay ta mey-meŇčgey, Ya da wuzdatara cek hay masa zleezle ma…ďadatakaya d…ôga Gazlavay ma l…ôma b…ôla.¬Ľ Mabara Ňčga mey-meŇčgey ta ley Ňčga daw
13.36: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkdata nd…ôhay heyey, a v…ôhey a way. Gula aŇčga hay ta‚Äô, a samawa a cakay a, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęWuzdandara mabara Ňčga mey-meŇčgey ta zl…ôrav da ley heyey cey.¬Ľ
13.37: Ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw ma sl…ôka daw masa maaya na, ara yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw.
13.38: Ley na, ara b…ôla. Hulfa…ó masa maaya na, ara nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara amba Gazlavay a wey da ray ata. Zl…ôrav na, ara nd…ôhay ma namar ray a bay-malula.
13.39: Masa-g…ôra ma sl…ôka zl…ôrav na, ara *SataŇč, bay-malula. Kiya mekey daw na, ara pas Ňčga mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla. Nd…ôhay ma da kam…ôrwa daw na, ara maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó.
13.40: Anda ata ma Ňčg…ômamara zl…ôrav Ňčga tekwerey na, ta pas mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla na, a da key k…ône may ta nd…ôhay ma namar ray a bay-malula.
13.41: Anda ke…óe, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya sl…ôrdata maslaŇč a…óaw hay da va…ó la Ňčga badamata nd…ôhay ma t…ôknamata nd…ôhay Ňčga key meb…ôrey leŇč nd…ôhay ma kam cek malamba da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wey da ray ata.
13.42: A da k…ôzlamata aa awaw mend…ôvey ba. Fete…óe na, a t…ôwam la, aa p…ô…óam sler la.
13.43: Ama Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma namar ray a Bay Gazlavay na, a njam la ta Papa ata, Bay Gazlavay, da va…ó, a wa…óam la anda pas. Da ndaw, aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, Ňčga c…ônda mey a maaya maaya.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta zleley ma…ďadakaya leŇč ta bersle
13.44: Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey mekele saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*Mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, aa letek ta zleley ma…ďadakaya daa ley. Ndaw a daw, a h…ôtar, a …ďada ma f…ôna saya. Aa s…ômey ga da ray a. Maja Ňčgene, a daw, a h…ô…ókadata cek aŇčga hay tabiya amba a h…ô…óka ley a.
13.45: ¬ęAsaya, mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, aa letek ta ndaw ma ka filaw, ma s…ôpey bersle maaya membey Ňčga h…ô…ókey.
13.46: Da ta h…ôtey bersle maaya membey ma h…ô…ókey ba la na, a daw, a h…ô…ókadata cek aŇčga hay tabiya amba a h…ô…óka bersle he.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta tabaw
13.47: ¬ęAsaya, *mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, aa letek ta *tabaw ma k…ôrzawa ewet hay daa d…ôhwa, a kusmawa s…ôkway Ňčga ewet hay mekele mekele ga.
13.48: Masa tabaw a ta r…ôhey cay ta ewet e na, ta‚Äô, a badam…ôrwa a mey d…ôhwa. A njam ta njey, a walamata s…ôkway Ňčga ewet hay masa maaya, a pamata aa gabal, ama s…ôkway Ňčga ewet hay masa maaya ba na, a k…ôzlamata.
13.49: -50 Ta pas mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla na, maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó, a samawa la Ňčga wunkey nd…ôhay ma namar ray a Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay masa ta meb…ôrey. Nd…ôhay masa ta meb…ôrey na, a k…ôzlamata aa awaw mend…ôvey ba. Fete…óe na, a t…ôwam la, asaya, aa p…ô…óam sler la. Sariya Ňčga Gazlavay ma da key na, ara anda ke…óe.¬Ľ Mey da ray mey hay meŇčgey Ňčga Yesu
13.51: Yesu aa c…ôf…óata gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ta s…ôrmara mabara Ňčga mey hay meŇčgey ke…óe la daw?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAhaw, ala ta s…ôrmara la.¬Ľ
13.52: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a Ňčgatar mey mekele saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwa waawa da wuzlah *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma t…ô…ďa amba Gazlavay a wey da ray a na, aŇčga anda bay Ňčga way ma bad…ôrwa zleley aŇčga mawiya ta magurma Ňčga j…ôney nd…ôhay.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay da Nezeret a r…ôsmara Yesu (Mark 6.1-6; Luk 4.16-30)
13.53: Masa Yesu maa guzltar a nd…ôhay ta mey hay meŇčgey cay na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey fete…óe,
13.54: a daw a *Nezeret, slala masa aa ma g…ôley da hwa…ó a. Fete…óe aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Nd…ôhay tabiya daa way a, a r…ôzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęHaya! Ma v…ôldara leŇčgesl a ndaw a ke…óe Ňčga s…ôrey cek hay anda ke…óe na, wa? A h…ôt…ôrwa leŇčgesl Ňčga s…ôrey cek hay a ke…óe na, dama?
13.55: AŇčga na, b…ôzey Ňčga ndaw ma sla hwadam, ba diya? Mamaha na, *Mari, ba diya? Ata *Jak, *Jawzef, *SimaŇčw leŇč Jud na, m…ôlmaha hay ba diya?
13.56: Dam-mamaha hay tabiya, ata da wuzlah al…ôkwa fe…óe, ba diya? Kaa a h…ôt…ôrwa leŇčgesl ke…óe ta g…ôdaŇč ke…óe na, dama?¬Ľ
13.57: Ara maja mewulkey ata Ňčgene, ata ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu ba. Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*Ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, nd…ôhay a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga kwa dama dama, ama ma t…ô…ďmara ba na, si nd…ôhay daa hwayak aŇčga, nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway aŇčga.¬Ľ
13.58: Yesu a key maazla hay fete…óe nek…ô…óey gway maja ata ma t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ba.

14.1: Daa Ňčgene, *Herawt, bay daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile, a c…ônda mey da ray Yesu.
14.2: Da ray Ňčgene, aa guzltar a mad…ôrlam aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw aha na, ara *JaŇč-Baptis. A sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey. Ara maja Ňčgene, aŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key maazla hay.¬Ľ
14.3: -4 Herawt aa guzley anda ke…óe na, maja ara aŇčga ta ray aŇčga ma k…ô…óa JaŇč-Baptis a vagay. Ehe mey da ray JaŇč-Baptis a: Herawt a la Herawdiyat, Ňčgwas Ňčga m…ôlmaha *F…ôlep Ňčga Ňčgwas aŇčga, daa masa F…ôlep aa ta dey …óagay. Maja Ňčgene, *JaŇč a l…ôvar a Herawt: ¬ęKah ma la Ňčgwas Ňčga m…ôlmakw Ňčgene na, ara cek mat…ôkakaya daa kwakwas al…ôkwa.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, Herawt a l…ôvtar a sewje aŇčga hay Ňčga k…ôrzamara JaŇč a. Ta‚Äô, sewje aŇčga hay a, a k…ôrzamara, a j…ôwmara, a k…ôzlamara aa f…ôrs…ône.
14.5: Herawt a wu…óey Ňčga k…ô…óa JaŇč a vagay, ama a zlurey ta nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay maja a wulkam na, JaŇč a ara *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
14.6: Yaw, ta pas gwagway Ňčga mes…ôrfedey …óar Ňčga mayawa Ňčga Herawt na, dam Ňčga Herawdiyat a g…ôrvey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay maz…ôltakaya aa gwagway a. Meg…ôrvey a, a mbafar kalah a Herawt.
14.7: Ta‚Äô, a mbe…óey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay, a l…ôvar a dam aha: ¬ęKwa meeme masa kah maa c…ôf…óafaya na, ya v…ôldakawa la.¬Ľ
14.8: A mb…ô…ódara a Herawt, a l…ôvar: ¬ęV…ôldiwa ray Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis aa v…ôley wure ke…óe fe…óe.¬Ľ A l…ôvar anda Ňčgene na, maja mamaha ma balar mey.
14.9: Masa Bay Herawt ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe na, mevel a t…ô…óar. A gwa Ňčga mb…ô…óda mey aŇčga ha saba, maja ta mbe…óey sem fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay maz…ôltakaya heyey. Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a v…ôley c…ôve…ó Ňčga v…ôlda ray Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis Ňčgada dam aha.
14.10: Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey ndaw aa f…ôrs…ône. Ndaw aha a …ó…ôsl…ôrwa ray Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis,
14.11: a parawa aa v…ôley, a hand…ôrwa, a v…ôldara a dam a heyey. Ta‚Äô, dam aha a handara a mamaha.
14.12: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, gula hay Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis a, a diyam a lamara vagay a, a p…ôshamara aa c…ôvay. Ta‚Äô, a diyam, a wuzdamara mey a, a Yesu. Yesu a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma f…ôna gabal zlam (Mark 6.30-44; Luk 9.10-17; JaŇč 6.1-14)
14.13: Daa masa Yesu ma c…ônda mey da ray mem…ôcey Ňčga *JaŇč-Baptis la na, p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, ta‚Äô, a daw ta kwambiwal amba a wusey taava aŇčga aa slam masa nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a daa ba. Masa nd…ôhay da slala hay ma c…ôndamara aŇčga sem na, a diyam ta mey d…ôhwa ha ta salay, a s…ôpmar wurzay.
14.14: AŇčga ma wusey cay na, ta‚Äô, a b…ôrŇčgawa daa kwambiwal a, a h…ôtfatar nd…ôhay makustakaya ga fete…óe. A s…ôrfatar dey-ceceh, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôldata masa-macay hay da wuzlah ata.
14.15: Ta pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó na, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a Ňčg…ôcham fa v…ô…óa, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęWure ke…óe hakwa…ó cay, al…ôkwa da wuzlah-ley. Ňägama na, ka mb…ô…ótar mey a nd…ôhay a Ňčga diyam a slala hay, amba a h…ô…ókam cek mez…ômey.¬Ľ
14.16: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay a na, si a diyam a slala hay daw? Akwar, ray akwar na, v…ôlmatar cek mez…ômey a.¬Ľ
14.17: Ama a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKwa cek mez…ômey fa ala daa ba, si peŇč zlam ta ewet cew daada gway.¬Ľ
14.18: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęHandam…ôrwa fe…óe.¬Ľ
14.19: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a l…ôvtar Ňčgada nd…ôhay tabiya Ňčga njam a hwayak. AŇčga hal! a h…ôlta peŇč zlam ta ewet cew heyey, a baŇčga…óa dey a va…ó, a kar suse a Gazlavay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a pap…ôsa peŇč e, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldatara a gula aŇčga hay amba a wunkamatara a nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey.
14.20: Kwa waawa a z…ômey haa a r…ôhey. Gula aŇčga hay ta‚Äô, a cakalamara siya Ňčga peŇč e. Memb…ôkey na, a r…ôhey gadakar kuraw a ray a cew.
14.21: Nd…ôhay ma z…ômam peŇč e na, ata ga ara mey ba, a f…ôna nd…ôhay gabal zlam, Ňčgusay ta b…ôza hay manjar Ňčga sl…ôfam. Yesu a daw ta salay da ray d…ôhwa Ňčga Galile (Mark 6.45-52; JaŇč 6.15-21)
14.22: Masa nd…ôhay a ma z…ômam cek cay na, wure wure Ňčgene Yesu ta‚Äô, a t…ôktar …óay a gula aŇčga hay Ňčga t…ôpam aa kwambiwal amba ata na, a zl…ôŇčgam teese…ó a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile. Yesu na, a njey fa d…ô…ďa …óagay amba a mb…ô…ótar mey a nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey Ňčga diyam a way.
14.23: Masa ta mb…ô…ótar mey a nd…ôhay a cay na, ta‚Äô, a t…ôpey aa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa Ňčga d…ôrwa daŇčgay. Haa tava…ó, aŇčga pal taava aŇčga da aŇčgwa ha c…ôŇčga.
14.24: Kwambiwal masa gula aŇčga hay da hwa…ó a heyey, aŇčga da wuzlah yam, aŇčga d…ôreŇč ta rav-zazay, vaŇčgwala Ňčga yam fa zakada kwambiwal a maja meme…ó fa key ga Ňčgada ray ata.
14.25: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, gweegwe slam Ňčgaa p…ôrek na, Yesu ta‚Äô, a daw ta salay da ray yam Ňčgada fa ata.
14.26: Masa gula aŇčga hay a ma h…ôtmar fa daw da ray yam na, a zluram ga, aa wasam p…ôr-par! Aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra mamayam!¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč maja mand…ôrzay fa katar.
14.27: Ama, wure Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęD…ôkmara mevel! Ara yah, ka da zluram ba!¬Ľ
14.28: *Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, da ara kah fara fara na, v…ôlya c…ôve…ó amba ya daw da ray yam Ňčgada fa kah taw.¬Ľ
14.29: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvar a Piyer: ¬ęSawa!¬Ľ Piyer a b…ôrŇčgawa daa kwambiwal, a daw da ray yam ta salay Ňčgada fa Yesu.
14.30: Ama, masa aa ma n…ôka meme…ó fa key ta g…ôdaŇč na, mand…ôrzay a kar. A zlar Ňčga mb…ôzey asi yam, ta‚Äô, a wudey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęBay mahura, l…ôhdaya!¬Ľ
14.31: Wure wure Ňčgene, Yesu tal! a t…ôley har, a k…ôrza fa har, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa wulkey cew cew na, maja me? Kah, ndaw masa ma paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara ba Ňčgene.¬Ľ
14.32: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a t…ôpam cewete aa kwambiwal a. Wure wure Ňčgene, meme…ó e, deŇč! a lecey, a key saba.
14.33: Gula hay Ňčga Yesu masa daa kwambiwal, a ragadam fa mey aŇčga, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęFara fara, kah na, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ôley masa-macay hay daa hwayak Ňčga Genezeret (Mark 6.53-56)
14.34: Masa ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay ma t…ôŇčgam la a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile heyey na, a wusam aa hwayak daha mez…ôley Genezeret.
14.35: Nd…ôhay daa slam aha na, a s…ôrmara ara Yesu. Ta‚Äô, a kadamatara mey a, a nd…ôhay da slala hay mekele mekele daa hwayak a. Daa masa ata ma c…ôndamara mey a cay na, ta‚Äô, a handamar masa-macay hay.
14.36: A b…ôrkwamara amba masa-macay hay a, a g…ôsam har kwa fa mey Ňčga zana aŇčga gway. Nd…ôhay ma g…ôsfamar har c…ôpa na, ta mb…ôlam sem.

15.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *Fariza hay ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a samawa da *Jeruzelem fa Yesu, a l…ôvmar:
15.2: ¬ęGula akah hay a zl…ô…ďmara kwakwas Ňčga papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay zleezle na, maja me? A da z…ômam …óaf na, a p…ôrmara har anda kwakwas al…ôkwa ma l…ôvey ba na, kwara?¬Ľ
15.3: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar na, ka zl…ô…ďmara *mewey hay Ňčga Gazlavay ta mes…ôpey kwakwas akwar hay na, maja me?
15.4: Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNatar ray Ňčgada ata papakw ta mamakw.‚ÄĚ Asaya, ‚ÄúNdaw ma c…ô…óa papaha, da daa ba, ma c…ô…óa mamaha na, si a k…ô…ómara ndaw aha vagay.‚ÄĚ
15.5: Ama akwar na, akwar faa s…ôrkadam nd…ôhay, ka l…ôvam ndaw a gwa Ňčga l…ôvar a papaha, da daa ba, a mamaha: ‚ÄúCek masa yah ma da v…ôldakawa Ňčga j…ônka heyey na, ya v…ôldakawa daa saba, maja yah ma v…ôldara sem a Gazlavay.‚ÄĚ
15.6: Ňägene na, ndaw aha a nar ray a papaha, da daa ba, a mamaha ha saba, ba diya? Ara anda Ňčgene, akwar fa n…ôsmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ta mes…ôpey kwakwas akwar.
15.7: Akwar na, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew! *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle maa guzley da ray akwar na, anja fara. Izay a, a l…ôvey:
15.8: ‚ÄúGazlavay a l…ôvey: Nd…ôhay ke…óe fa h…ôslmaya ray ta mey Ňčga tede, ama mevel ata na, aa d…ôreŇč ta yah.
15.9: Ata fa h…ôlmamaya, ama meh…ôlmey a, ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga cek Ňčga tede, maja kwakwas masa ata maa s…ôrkadamara Ňčgene na, ara kwakwas Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč daada gway.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Mey da ray cek mekey meb…ôrey a ndaw (Mark 7.14-23)
15.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a z…ôlt…ôrwa nd…ôhay makustakaya ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay, c…ôndamara mey ke…óe maaya maaya:
15.11: Cek masa ndaw ma nd…ôkwda a mey, ma z…ôma na, a kar meb…ôrey ba, ama ma kar meb…ôrey na, si mey ma bawa da mey aŇčga.¬Ľ
15.12: Ta‚Äô, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKa fa s…ôra mey masa kah maa guzlda ke…óe na, fa catar mevel a *Fariza hay, ba diya?¬Ľ
15.13: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwa wudez wura wura masa Papay da va…ó, ma r…ôva ba na, a m…ô…ómara la.
15.14: Mb…ôkdamata! Ata na, wulaf hay ma …óa…óam wulaf hay anda ata. Da ndaw-wulaf a …óe…óey wulaf c…ôla ta zlanday na, ata cewete a t…ô…óam la aa v…ôge…ó, ba diya?¬Ľ
15.15: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *Piyer ta‚Äô, aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęWuzdandara mabara Ňčga mey a ke…óe cey.¬Ľ
15.16: Yesu a l…ôvey: ¬ęAkwar gula a…óaw hay kwa na, ka c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe ba saya na, gway daw?
15.17: Cek masa ndaw ma nd…ôkwda a mey, ma z…ôma na, a daw Ňčgada hwa…ó Ňčga ndaw aha. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a bawa a palah. Ka ta s…ôrmara daa ba c…ôŇčga daw?
15.18: Ama mey masa ndaw maa guzlda ta mey aŇčga na, a sawa d…ôga daa mevel aŇčga. Ňägene, a kar meb…ôrey a ndaw aha.
15.19: Mewulkey maaya ba a bawa na, daa mevel Ňčga ndaw. Ara mewulkey a ma h…ôlda ndaw Ňčga k…ô…óey ndaw vagay, Ňčga ley vaw saw da palah, Ňčga key cek malamba saw k…ône, Ňčga leley, Ňčga mb…ôrzley a ray ndaw, leŇč Ňčga key mba…óa fa nd…ôhay.
15.20: Ara s…ôkway Ňčga cek hay malamba anda ke…óe ma kar meb…ôrey a ndaw. Ama, da ndaw a z…ôma cek ta har manjar Ňčga p…ôrey na, ara meb…ôrey ba.¬Ľ Ňägwas masa J…ôwif ba a pa Yesu Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara (Mark 7.24-30)
15.21: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey daa slam aha, tal! a diyam ta gula aŇčga hay aa hwayak mekele masa berney Ňčga Tir ta berney Ňčga SidaŇčw da hwa…ó a.
15.22: Ňägwas daa hwayak a daha, aŇčga dam Kana. A sawa fa Yesu, a kar ambahw, a wudey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęWaa Bay mahura, B…ôzey Ňčga *Davit! Dam a…óaw daha, aŇčga ta malula da ray, fa s…ôrda banay kalah. S…ôrfaya dey-ceceh may taw!¬Ľ
15.23: Yesu taa guzlar kwa mey pal daa ba. Gula aŇčga hay a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęMb…ô…óar mey a Ňčgwas a ke…óe, maja fa s…ôpndakwar wurzay ta mewudey.¬Ľ
15.24: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęGazlavay a sl…ôrdiwa na, fa nd…ôhay *Israyel hay gway. Ata na, maaz…ô…ótakaya anda t…ô…ďaŇč hay manjar mec…ôkwer.¬Ľ
15.25: Ama, Ňčgwas a heyey a daw, a regedey fa mey aŇčga, a l…ôvar: ¬ęWaa Bay mahura, j…ônya may taw!¬Ľ
15.26: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMev…ôley …óaf Ňčga b…ôza hay Ňčgada g…ôdey hay na, maaya daw?¬Ľ
15.27: Ňägwas a heyey a l…ôvar: ¬ęAhaw, Bay a…óaw, kaa g…ôdey hay na, a z…ômam meep…ôsey Ňčga …óaf ma k…ôzley daa slam masa bay ata hay ma z…ômam …óaf c…ôŇčga, ba diya?¬Ľ
15.28: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMaaya kwakwa! Kah ma paya la Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara. Cek aha Ňčga key anda kah ma wu…óey.¬Ľ Daa Ňčgene, dam aŇčga heyey a mb…ôley. Yesu a mb…ôley masa-macay hay ga
15.29: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a sl…ôk…óey daa slam aha, a daw ta mey d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile. Ta‚Äô, a t…ôpey aa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa, c…ôkwam! a njey fete…óe.
15.30: Nd…ôhay makustakaya ga, a samawa fa v…ô…óa, a handamawa nd…ôhay jegwer hay, nd…ôhay wulaf hay, nd…ôhay maah…ôl…ďatakaya hay, madagazlam hay leŇč nd…ôhay ta macay hay mekele mekele ga. A njadamata fa mey Ňčga Yesu. Ta‚Äô, a mb…ôldata.
15.31: Nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey a r…ôzlam maja ata ma h…ôtmatar madagazlam hay heyey faa guzlam d…ô…ďa, nd…ôhay maah…ôl…ďatakaya hay heyey ta mb…ôlam cay, nd…ôhay jegwer hay heyey fa diyam ta salay ata hay, wulaf hay may fa h…ôtmar dey d…ô…ďa. Ta‚Äô, a h…ôlmamara Bay Gazlavay Ňčga *Israyel hay. Yesu a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma f…ôna gabal m…ôfa…ó (Mark 8.1-10)
15.32: Yesu ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDey-ceceh fa kaya fa nd…ôhay makustakaya ke…óe, maja aŇčga kaa …óar maakar ata da cakay a…óaw, wure ke…óe cek mez…ômey da har ata daa saba. Ya wu…óey Ňčga mb…ôkdata Ňčga diyam a way ta may ba, maja da a da h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga wusey a way ata hay ba kwa.¬Ľ
15.33: Gula aŇčga hay a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKaa al…ôkwa da wuzlah-ley ke…óe na, ya da h…ôtmawa cek mez…ômey Ňčga r…ôhdata nd…ôhay tabiya makustakaya ke…óe na, dama?¬Ľ
15.34: Yesu aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa har akwar fe…óe kaa na, peŇč we?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęDa har ala na, peŇč maasala ta ewet mec…ôhe mec…ôhe nek…ô…óey gway.¬Ľ
15.35: Yesu a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey Ňčga njam a hwayak.
15.36: AŇčga ta‚Äô, a h…ôla peŇč maasala ta ewet hay heyey, a kar suse a Gazlavay, a pap…ôsa, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldatara a gula aŇčga hay. Gula aŇčga hay a, a wunkamatara a nd…ôhay makustakaya ha.
15.37: Kwa waawa ta h…ôtey cek mez…ômey la, haa a r…ôhey. Ta‚Äô, gula aŇčga hay a cakalamara siya mamb…ôkakaya. Macakalakaya ha a r…ôhey gadakar mahura mahura maasala.
15.38: Yaw, nd…ôhay ma z…ômamara peŇč ta ewet e na, nd…ôhay gabal m…ôfa…ó, Ňčgusay ta b…ôza hay manjar Ňčga sl…ôfam.
15.39: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a mb…ôkdata nd…ôhay makustakaya ha Ňčga diyam a way ata hay. Ta‚Äô, a t…ôpey aa kwambiwal, a diyam aa hwayak mez…ôley MagadaŇč.

16.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *Fariza hay ta nd…ôhay *Saduse hay a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay Yesu Ňčga jadamara, aa c…ôf…óamara amba a key maazla Ňčga wuzda g…ôdaŇč aŇčga a sawa ta fa Bay Gazlavay.
16.2: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę[Masa pas fa k…ôzley, gazlavay fa key magaza na, ka l…ôvam mandaw na, gazlavay Ňčga var a key daa ba.
16.3: Asaya, p…ôrek p…ôrek da masa pas fa bawa, fa cey na, ka l…ôvam tasana na, var a pey la. Anda ke…óe, da akwar fa n…ôkam dey a gazlavay na, ka s…ôrmara cek ma da key tasana ta cek ma da key mandaw. Kaa sl…ôra masa yah ma ka na, ka s…ôrmara mabara ha ba na, kwara?]
16.4: Akwar nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe na, malamba hay, akwar ma mb…ôkdamara Bay Gazlavay sem! Ka wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtam maazla ma wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay fara daw? Kwa akwar fa da h…ôtam maazla ha daa ba, si maazla anda ma key ta *Jawnas zleezle.¬Ľ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkdata, a daw. Mey-meŇčgey da ray mees…ôrkedey Ňčga Fariza hay ta Ňčga Saduse hay (Mark 8.14-21)
16.5: Daa masa ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay ma t…ôŇčgam sem a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa na, gula aŇčga hay a ta s…ôrfadamara Ňčga handawa peŇč daa ba.
16.6: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWam vaw fa cek ma h…ôsla peŇč Ňčga *Fariza hay leŇč Ňčga *Saduse hay!¬Ľ
16.7: Da ray Ňčgene, gula aŇčga hay aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAa guzley anda ke…óe maja al…ôkwa ma sakurwa ta peŇč daa ba daw?¬Ľ
16.8: Yesu na, ta s…ôra mey masa ata maa guzldamara da wuzlah ata sem. Da ray Ňčgene, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay masa ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara ba Ňčgene, ka wulkam da ray peŇč masa akwar ma handamawa daa ba na, maja me?
16.9: Haa wure ke…óe akwar na, ka c…ôndamara mey a ba c…ôŇčga daw? S…ôrfadamara peŇč zlam masa yah ma wunkatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay gabal zlam heyey. Mamb…ôkakaya na, a r…ôhey gadakar we?
16.10: Asaya, s…ôrfadamara peŇč maasala masa yah ma wunkatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay gabal m…ôfa…ó heyey. Mamb…ôkakaya na, a r…ôhey gadakar mahura mahura we?
16.11: Yaw, daa masa yah maa guzlkwar: ‚ÄúWam vaw fa cek ma h…ôsla peŇč masa fa Fariza hay leŇč fa Saduse hay‚ÄĚ na, yaa guzley na, da ray peŇč ba. Kaa ka c…ôndamara ba na, kwara?¬Ľ
16.12: Anda ke…óe, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu heyey a s…ôrmara, Yesu aa guzltar na, da ray cek ma h…ôsla peŇč fara fara ba, ama a Ňčgatar mey da ray mees…ôrkedey Ňčga Fariza hay ta Ňčga Saduse hay. Piyer a wuzda, Yesu na, ara K…ôriste (Mark 8.27-30; Luk 9.18-21)
16.13: Yesu a wusey aa slam masa gweegwe ta slala Sezere-F…ôlep. Aa c…ôf…óata gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay a padamaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, Ňčga wa?¬Ľ
16.14: A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęNd…ôhay siya a l…ôvam kah na, *JaŇč-Baptis, mekele hay a l…ôvam, kah na, *Eli, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle. Nd…ôhay mekele hay saya a l…ôvam, kah na, Jeremey, da daa ba, ndaw mekele dasi nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle.¬Ľ
16.15: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa c…ôf…óata saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKaa akwar may, ka l…ôvam yah na, wa?¬Ľ
16.16: *SimaŇčw *Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, *K…ôriste, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay, ndaw masa aŇčga daha ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ
16.17: Yesu aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSimaŇčw, b…ôzey Ňčga *Jawnas, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray kah, maja mey masa kah maa guzlda ke…óe na, ara ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma wuzdakawa ba, ama ara Papay da va…ó ma wuzdakawa.
16.18: Yaw, yah may, ya fa l…ôvka, kah na, mez…ôley akah Piyer anda mel…ôvey ‚Äúp…ôra…ó.‚ÄĚ Ya da pa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay da ray p…ôra…ó a. Kwa mem…ôcey na, fa da gwa Ňčgaa z…ô…óda daa ba.
16.19: Ya da v…ôlka g…ôdaŇč Ňčga wurey c…ôve…ó Ňčgada nd…ôhay amba a t…ôram nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay. Mey masa kah ma da j…ôwa da b…ôla na, aŇčga maj…ôwkaya da gazlavay da va…ó may. Asaya, mey masa kah ma da p…ôska da b…ôla na, aŇčga map…ôskakaya da gazlavay da va…ó may.¬Ľ
16.20: Yesu ta‚Äô, a k…ôtata gula aŇčga hay, a katar mey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęFara fara yah na, K…ôriste, ama ka da wuzdamara a nd…ôhay ba.¬Ľ Ndaw ma wu…óey Ňčga s…ôpa Yesu na, si a key me? (Mark 8.27-30; Luk 9.18-21)
16.21: D…ôga ta pas masa *Piyer ma wuzda Yesu ara *K…ôriste heyey na, Yesu a wuztar mey Ňčgada gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSi ya daw a *Jeruzelem. Mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, leŇč *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, a s…ôrdamaya banay la fete…óe, a k…ô…ómaya la vagay. Ama Ňčga …óar maakar a na, ya sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
16.22: Piyer ta‚Äô, a z…ôla Yesu ta cakay, a mb…ô…óar ray, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKay! Bay mahura, Gazlavay Ňčga ka k…ône ba! Anja s…ôkway Ňčga cek anda Ňčgene na, Ňčga h…ôtfaka ba s…ôlak!¬Ľ
16.23: Ama Yesu p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey dey Ňčgada fa Piyer, a l…ôvar: ¬ęHway la da cakay a…óaw, kah, *SataŇč. Kah na, ka fa s…ôpey Ňčga zlaŇčga…óadaya daa c…ôve…ó a…óaw daw? Maja mewulkey akah Ňčgene na, ara mewulkey Ňčga Gazlavay ba, ama ara mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč gway.¬Ľ
16.24: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga s…ôpya na, si a mb…ôkda mewulkey fa ray aŇčga, a s…ôpya ta mevel pal, si a …ď…ôsa banay ma da sawa a ray aŇčga maja yah, anda yah ma da m…ôcey fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya.
16.25: S…ôrmara, kwa waawa ma wu…óey Ňčga l…ôhda heter aŇčga na, a key aa z…ô…óda, ama ndaw maa z…ô…óda heter aŇčga maja yah na, a h…ôtar la aa slam a.
16.26: Da ndaw a h…ôtey cek hay tabiya masa aŇčga ma wu…óey da b…ôla ke…óe, ama taa z…ô…óda heter aŇčga sem na, cek hay a tabiya Ňčgene, ta l…ôhdamara ndaw a la daw? Yaw, ndaw a gwa Ňčga mb…ô…óa heter aŇčga na, ta me?
16.27: S…ôrmara, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, ya da sawa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Papay leŇč ta maslaŇč aŇčga hay da va…ó. Ya da p…ôla mawur…ďay kwa Ňčga waawa c…ôpa, t…ô…óe fa sl…ôra masa ndaw a ma ka.
16.28: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah akwar fe…óe, fa da m…ôcam daa ba haa ata ma h…ôtmaya ta dey ata la …óagay, masa yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya fa z…ôma bay a…óaw.¬Ľ

17.1: ∆äar maakwaw fa d…ô…ďa ha na, Yesu ta‚Äô, a z…ôlta ata *Piyer, *Jak, leŇč *JaŇč, m…ôlmaŇč Ňčga Jak a, a Ňčg…ôlta aa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa maaz…ôma, a njam fete…óe taava ata.
17.2: Yesu a, p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey fa dey ata, dey aŇčga a we…óey anda pas, zana aŇčga mabara nd…ô…ó-nde…ó.
17.3: Wure wure Ňčgene, ata *Mawiz ta *Eli a wuzmatar vaw a gula aŇčga hay heyey . Gula hay a, a h…ôtmatar fa kam ma…óay ta Yesu a.
17.4: Da ray Ňčgene, Piyer aa guzlar a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęWaa Bay Mahura, maaya na, ya njakwa fe…óe. Da ka wu…óey na, amba ya k…ôrcey slam hay maakar, pal Ňčgada kah, pal Ňčgada Mawiz, pal Ňčgada Eli.¬Ľ
17.5: Daa masa faa guzley araŇč na, mekwtene mewe…óey nd…ô…ó-nde…ó! a sawa, s…ôrat! a s…ôrtata. A c…ônam …óay maa guzlwa daa mekwtene he, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKe…óe he ara B…ôzey a…óaw masa yah ma wu…óa kalah. Ara b…ôzey masa ya faa s…ômey ga da ray a. J…ôkfamar sl…ômay!¬Ľ
17.6: Masa *gula hay Ňčga Yesu ma c…ôndamara la na, a zluram ga, ta‚Äô, a t…ô…óam ta mey ta mey, daŇčgay dar! a hwayak.
17.7: Wure Ňčgene, Yesu a Ňčg…ôchawa a cakay ata, a wusta ta har, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSl…ôk…óam, ka da zluram ba.¬Ľ
17.8: A baŇčga…óamara dey na, a h…ôtam ndaw mekele saba, si Yesu taava aŇčga gway.
17.9: Masa ata fa b…ôrŇčgamawa da aŇčgwa ha na, Yesu a k…ôtata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa da wuzdamara cek masa akwar ma h…ôtmar ke…óe a ndaw ba, haa kasl pas masa yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ma da sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
17.10: Ta‚Äô, gula hay Ňčga Yesu aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęNd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a l…ôvam si Eli a sawa la teese…ó da ray *K…ôriste na, maja me?¬Ľ
17.11: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAhaw, fara fara si Eli a sawa Ňčga …óiyta cek hay c…ôpa maaya maaya.
17.12: Ama, yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar, Eli ta sawa cay. Nd…ôhay ta h…ôtmar la, ama ta s…ôrmara daa ba, ta kamar cek maaya ba la anda mevel ata ma wu…óey. Ara k…ône may, nd…ôhay a ma da s…ôrdamaya banay, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw.¬Ľ
17.13: Anda ke…óe, gula hay Ňčga Yesu ta s…ôrmara sem Yesu aa guzltar na, da ray *JaŇč-Baptis. Yesu a bada cek da ray b…ôzey (Mark 9.14-29; Luk 9.37-43a)
17.14: Masa ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay maakar heyey ma wusam la a cakay nd…ôhay makustakaya na, ta‚Äô, ndaw daha a Ňčg…ôchawa a cakay Yesu, a regedey fa mey aŇčga,
17.15: a kar ambahw, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, b…ôzey a…óaw aŇčga ta cek da ray, fa …ď…ôrzlada, fa s…ôrda banay. Da cek aha ta zlar Ňčga …ď…ôrzlada la na, ta pas laŇčgar a t…ô…óda aa awaw, da daa ba, aa yam. S…ôrfar dey-ceceh may taw!
17.16: Ya ta handa la fa gula akah hay, ama ta gwamara Ňčga mb…ôldamara daa ba.¬Ľ
17.17: Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęHey! Akwar nd…ôhay mar…ôzltakaya masa ma pamaya Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara ba ke…óe. Ya da njey ta akwar na, haa ta vara? Ya da …ď…ôskwar na, haa ta vara? Handamiwa b…ôzey a fe…óe!¬Ľ
17.18: Masa ata ma handam…ôrwa b…ôzey a la na, Yesu ta‚Äô, aa b…ôcar a cek da ray b…ôzey a. Ta‚Äô, cek aha a bey. Wure Ňčgene, b…ôzey a, a mb…ôley.
17.19: Masa ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay ata taava ata na, ta‚Äô, gula aŇčga hay a, a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAla ta gwamara Ňčga badamara cek da ray b…ôzey a daa ba na, maja me?¬Ľ
17.20: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMaja akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay fara fara daa ba. Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay kwa kuset k…ô…óey h…ôma bab…ôza Ňčga bazlawar na, Ňčgene, ka gwamara Ňčga l…ôvmar a aŇčgwa mahura ke…óe, sl…ôk…óey la fe…óe, daw Ňčgada fata…óay na, aŇčgwa ha a sl…ôk…óey la. Anda ke…óe, cek masa ta g…ôra Ňčga key fa akwar na, daa ba. [
17.21: Ama Ňčga bey cek anda ke…óe da ray ndaw na, si ta med…ôrey-daŇčgay a Bay Gazlavay leŇč ta mekey *daliyam.]¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley saya da ray mem…ôcey aŇčga ta masl…ôk…óawa aŇčga (Mark 9.30-32; Luk 9.43b-45)
17.22: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a v…ôhmawa a *Galile, ata tabiya daa slam a. Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęA da k…ôrzamaya yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a da v…ôldamaya a har nd…ôhay.
17.23: Nd…ôhay a, a da k…ô…ómaya vagay. Ňäga …óar maakar a na, ya sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ Mey a ke…óe a t…ô…ótar mevel a gula aŇčga hay. Mey da ray budaw
17.24: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a diyam a Kapernayum. Ata ma wusam la na, nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw Ňčga *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ata fete…óe. Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay *Piyer aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay akwar na, a p…ôley budaw Ňčga Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ba daw?¬Ľ
17.25: Piyer a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę‚ÄôA, ‚Äôa, fa p…ôley.¬Ľ Daa masa Piyer fa mb…ôzey a way masa Yesu aa da hwa…ó a na, Yesu aa guzlar teese…ó, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSimaŇčw Piyer, ya wu…óey Ňčgaa c…ôf…óaka, ma p…ôlam budaw a bay hay da b…ôla ke…óe na, wa hay wa? Ara b…ôza hay Ňčga bay hay a daw? Da daa ba, ara z…ôgdaw hay daw?¬Ľ
17.26: Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAra z…ôgdaw hay.¬Ľ Yesu a l…ôvey: ¬ęAnda ke…óe na, b…ôza hay Ňčga bay a p…ôlam budaw ba.
17.27: Ama Ňčgama ya p…ôlkwa budaw a, amba mevel a catar ba. Anda ke…óe, daw aa d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile, k…ôzla tet…ôlem akah a hwa…ó a. Ewet masa kah ma da lawa teese…ó na, ka wura mey Ňčga ewet e, ka h…ôtfey …ď…ôrey Ňčga dala mak Ňčga p…ôlndakwara budaw a la. Larawa amba ka p…ôlndakwara budaw al…ôkwa cew e.¬Ľ

18.1: Daa Ňčgene, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęDa wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata na, mahura na, wa?¬Ľ
18.2: Yesu ta‚Äô, a z…ôlwa b…ôzey mec…ôhe, a lacada a wuzlah ata.
18.3: Ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da akwar ta mb…ô…óam amba ka t…ôram anda b…ôza hay mec…ôhe daa ba na, Ňčgene, akwar fa da njam a wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata na, daa ba s…ôlak.
18.4: Ndaw ma pa ray aŇčga Ňčga mec…ôhe anda b…ôzey mec…ôhe ke…óe na, ara aŇčga ma da key mahura da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata.
18.5: Kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďey b…ôzey anda b…ôzey mec…ôhe ke…óe maja a wu…óya na, a key Ňčgene, a t…ô…ďey yah, ray a…óaw.¬Ľ Mewey vaw fa cek ma bata ndaw (Mark 9.42-48; Luk 17.1-2)
18.6: ¬ęAsaya, kwa waawa ma betey ndaw pal dasi nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey a…óaw hay ke…óe Ňčga key meb…ôrey na, Ňčgada aŇčga na, Ňčgama ata ma j…ôwmar aŇčgwa mahura a …óay, ma k…ôzlamara aa b…ôlay gway.
18.7: Kay! Banay daha fa nd…ôhay da b…ôla ke…óe, maja cek hay ga fa t…ôknamata nd…ôhay Ňčga key meb…ôrey. Ahaw fara, cek hay a, a da batamata Ňčga key meb…ôrey mandaw mandaw. Ama banay a sawa la a ray ndaw ma h…ôldata nd…ôhay Ňčga key meb…ôrey a.
18.8: Da har akah, da daa ba, salay akah, fa h…ôldaka Ňčga key meb…ôrey na, …ó…ôsla har a, da daa ba, salay a, hazakada d…ôreŇč ta kah. Ňägama kah ma h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba ta salay pal, da daa ba, ta har pal da ray kah ma da mb…ôzey aa awaw mend…ôvey ba ta har akah hay cewete, da daa ba, ta salay akah hay cewete.
18.9: Da dey akah fa h…ôldaka Ňčga key meb…ôrey na, wuzlka dey a, hazakada d…ôreŇč ta kah. Ňägama kah ma h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba ta dey pal, da ray kah ma da mb…ôzey aa v…ôge…ó Ňčga awaw magaza ta dey akah hay cewete. (Luk 15.3-7)
18.10: ¬ęPam leŇčgesl, kwa ka da r…ôsam ndaw pal letek da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma pamata ray ata Ňčga mec…ôhe anda b…ôza hay ba. Fara fara, ya fa l…ôvkwar maslaŇč ata hay da va…ó fa lacafamatar a ray da cakay Papay da va…ó mandaw mandaw. [
18.11: Maja yah *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya sawa na, Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay masa maaz…ô…ótakaya.]¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta t…ô…ďaŇč meez…ô…óey
18.12: ¬ęDa ndaw aa ta t…ô…ďaŇč hay temere, da pal da wuzlah ata taa z…ô…óey sem na, ndaw aha a da key na, kwara? A mb…ôkdata t…ô…ďaŇč hay kwakwar zlam-letek a ray a zlam-letek da aŇčgwa, a daw a s…ôp…ôrwa pal masa meez…ô…óey a Ňčgene daa ba daw?
18.13: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da masa ta h…ôt…ôrwa la na, aa s…ômey la ga da ray t…ô…ďaŇč a pal Ňčgene, ma f…ôna da ray kwakwar zlam-letek a ray a zlam-letek masa taa z…ô…óam daa ba heyey.
18.14: Ara k…ône, Papakw akwar masa da va…ó may, a wu…óey kwa ndaw pal letek da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey aŇčga hay aa z…ô…óey ba.¬Ľ Da m…ôlmakw ta kaka cek maaya ba la na, ka da kada na, kwara?
18.15: Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa m…ôlmakw ta kaka cek maaya ba la na, daw fa v…ô…óa, kadara meb…ôrey aŇčga ha, akwar taa cew e. Da ta c…ôndakawa mey akah la na, Ňčgene ara cek maaya, kah ma …óiya m…ôlmakw a sem.
18.16: Ama da a c…ôndakawa mey akah ba na, Ňčg…ôley ndaw pal, da daa ba, nd…ôhay cew asi akah. Ka ka anda ke…óe na, anda …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKwa cek wura wura maaya ba masa ndaw ma ka, Ňčga s…ôrey mey da ray a fara fara na, maaya na, nd…ôhay cew, da daa ba, maakar a n…ôkmara mey a, a kam sede da ray mey a.‚ÄĚ
18.17: Da a c…ôndakwara ba c…ôŇčga na, kada mey a, a nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay. Da a c…ôntar mey a nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray a ba c…ôŇčga na, pa m…ôlmakw a Ňčga ndaw ma s…ôra Gazlavay ba, da daa ba, pa Ňčga *ndaw ma cakala budaw.¬Ľ Mey da ray med…ôrey-daŇčgay
18.18: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, kwa mey wura wura masa akwar ma da j…ôwmara da b…ôla na, aŇčga maj…ôwkaya da gazlavay da va…ó may. Asaya, kwa mey wura wura masa akwar ma da p…ôskamara da b…ôla na, aŇčga map…ôskakaya da gazlavay da va…ó may.
18.19: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar saya: da nd…ôhay cew da b…ôla ke…óe, a c…ômam …óay Ňčgaa c…ôf…óey kwa meeme daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay na, Papay da va…ó a v…ôltar la.
18.20: Maja da nd…ôhay cew, da daa ba, maakar ta c…ômam la ta mez…ôley a…óaw na, yah da wuzlah ata.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta ndaw ma ka sl…ôra ma s…ôrey dey-ceceh ba
18.21: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *Piyer ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôchey fa Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, da m…ôlma a…óaw fa kaya cek maaya ba mandaw mandaw na, ya da mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga na, dey we? Haa dey maasala daw?¬Ľ
18.22: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKay! dey maasala daada ba, ama dey kwakwar maasala haa dey maasala ha.
18.23: ¬ęMaja Ňčgene, ya wu…óey Ňčga Ňčgakwar mey amba ka s…ôrmara Gazlavay a wey da ray nd…ôhay na, kwara. Bay daha a wu…óey Ňčgaa c…ôf…óa d…ôvaz aŇčga fa nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay.
18.24: Masa aŇčga fa zlar Ňčgaa c…ôf…óa d…ôvaz a na, a handamar ndaw pal masa ta dala aŇčga da ray a ga a sl…ôfey ba.
18.25: Cek aŇčga Ňčga p…ôla daa ba. Anda ke…óe, bay a, a p…ôskatar mey a gula aŇčga hay Ňčga h…ô…ókadamara ndaw aha, ta Ňčgwas aŇčga, ta b…ôz aŇčga hay leŇč cek aŇčga hay c…ôpa Ňčga p…ôley d…ôvaz a.
18.26: Ta‚Äô, ndaw a heyey, a p…ôtkweley fa mey Ňčga bay aŇčga ha, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúAmbahw, bay a…óaw, v…ôlya …óar nek…ô…óey, cay na, ya p…ôlkawa c…ôpa.‚ÄĚ
18.27: Bay heyey dey-ceceh a kar fa ndaw aha. Anda ke…óe, a mb…ôkda d…ôvaz aŇčga da ray ndaw aha heyey c…ôpa, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkda Ňčga daw.
18.28: ¬ęMasa ndaw aha fa bawa na, a cam ray ta ndaw mekele masa ata ma kam sl…ôra bama. D…ôvaz aŇčga fa ndaw aha daha may, d…ôvaz a, kuset k…ô…óey gway. Kaw! a k…ôrza ndaw aha kasl! asi …óay. Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúP…ôlyawa dala a…óaw.‚ÄĚ
18.29: Ndaw masa ata ma kam sl…ôra bama heyey, ta‚Äô, a p…ôtkweley fa mey aŇčga, a d…ôrar daŇčgay, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúAmbahw, v…ôlya …óar nek…ô…óey, cay na, ya p…ôlkawa.‚ÄĚ
18.30: Ama ndaw kaa heyey a t…ô…ďa ba. Ta‚Äô, a handa, a k…ôzla aa f…ôrs…ône, haa aŇčga ma p…ôlra d…ôvaz aŇčga ha.
18.31: Mandala aŇčga hay siya ma h…ôtmar na, a r…ôzlam, mevel a catar ga. Ta‚Äô, a diyam a wuzdamara mey a c…ôpa a bay ata heyey.
18.32: Da ray Ňčgene, bay a heyey a z…ôlrawa ndaw aha, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúKah na, ndaw malamba. Ya ta mb…ôkdakawa d…ôvaz masa da ray kah sem c…ôpa maja kah ma d…ôrya daŇčgay.
18.33: Kaa kah na, ka s…ôrfar dey-ceceh fa mandala akah anda yah ma s…ôrfaka dey-ceceh ba na, kwara?‚ÄĚ
18.34: Mevel a car a bay heyey, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlda a har nd…ôhay Ňčga s…ôrdamara banay, haa aa ma p…ôlra d…ôvaz aŇčga ha c…ôpa.¬Ľ
18.35: Cay, Yesu ta‚Äô, a patar leŇčgesl, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYaw, ara anda Ňčgene, da ndaw da wuzlah akwar a mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey Ňčga m…ôlmaha ta mevel pal ba na, Papay da va…ó, fa da mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga daa ba k…ône may.¬Ľ

19.1: Masa Yesu ma nd…ôvda mey aŇčga cay na, ta‚Äô, a bey daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile, a daw aa hwayak Ňčga *Jude da dey laŇčgar Ňčga wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč.
19.2: Nd…ôhay ga, a s…ôpmar wurzay. Fete…óe, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôldata masa-macay hay da wuzlah ata.
19.3: *Fariza hay a diyam a cakay a, amba a jadamara. Aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKwakwas al…ôkwa a v…ôley c…ôve…ó a ndaw Ňčga …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga, kwa fa mey wura wura daw?¬Ľ
19.4: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúDaa mezley Ňčga b…ôla, Gazlavay a l…ômwa na, zel ta Ňčgwas.‚ÄĚ Ka ta jaŇčgamara mey a daa ba daw?
19.5: Gazlavay a l…ôvey saya: ‚ÄúMaja Ňčgene, ndaw-mez…ôle a mb…ôkda papaha ta mamaha, amba a c…ômam ta Ňčgwas aŇčga. Ata cewete, a t…ôram anda ndaw pal.‚ÄĚ
19.6: Anda ke…óe, ata nd…ôhay cew saba, ama ata anda ndaw pal. Yaw, cek masa Gazlavay ma c…ôma sem anda ke…óe na, ndaw a da wunka ba.¬Ľ
19.7: Fariza hay a, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu a saya, a l…ôvmar: ¬ę*Mawiz ta wuzleley mewey la ma l…ôvey, da ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga na, si a wuzlalar …óerewel Ňčga wuzda aŇčga ma …ď…ôla sem. Kaa a wuzlala mey a anda ke…óe na, maja me?¬Ľ
19.8: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMawiz a v…ôlkwar c…ôve…ó Ňčga …ď…ôley Ňčgwas akwar hay na, maja mevel akwar maaya ba. Ama daa mezley Ňčga b…ôla na, cek aha ta key k…ône na, daa ba.
19.9: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, kwa waawa ma …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga, Ňčgwas aha ta ley vaw saw da palah daa ba, a ley Ňčgwas mekele, a key Ňčgene na, a ley vaw saw da palah.¬Ľ
19.10: Gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęDa Ňčga …ď…ôley Ňčgwas si anda ke…óe na, Ňčgama, ndaw a njey manjar Ňčgwas.¬Ľ
19.11: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay c…ôpa a t…ô…ďmara mey a Ňčga key k…ône ba. Ma gwa Ňčga t…ô…ďmara na, si nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey a.
19.12: S…ôrmara, cek hay mekele mekele daha ma t…ôkta nd…ôhay Ňčga ley Ňčgwas. Nd…ôhay siya maja vaw a latar ba d…ôga Ňčga mayawa ata, siya maja ata maaŇčgwa…óatakaya, siya hay may a njam manjar Ňčgwas, maja a wu…óam Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčgada Bay Gazlavay gway. Da ndaw ma gwa Ňčga t…ô…ďa mey masa yah ma kada da ray meley Ňčgwas ke…óe daha na, Ňčga t…ô…ďa.¬Ľ Yesu a p…ôstar mey a b…ôza hay (Mark 10.13-16; Luk 18.15-17)
19.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay a handamata b…ôza hay fa Yesu, amba a patar har a ray, a p…ôstar mey, a d…ôrey daŇčgay maja ata. Ama gula aŇčga hay, a kamatar mey a nd…ôhay a.
19.14: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMb…ôkdamat…ôrwa b…ôza hay Ňčga samawa fa yah! Ka da t…ôkmata ba, maja Gazlavay fa wey da ray nd…ôhay masa anda b…ôza hay a.¬Ľ
19.15: Ta‚Äô, a patar har a ray, a p…ôstar mey. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndal! madaw aŇčga. B…ôz-gula masa-zleley aa c…ôf…óa Yesu da ray meh…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba (Mark 10.17-31; Luk 18.18-30)
19.16: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, b…ôz-gula daha a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay Yesu, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ya da key maaya amba ya h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba na, me?¬Ľ
19.17: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKaa c…ôf…óaya da ray mekey cek maaya na, maja me? Ara Gazlavay pal taava aŇčga, ndaw maaya. Da ka wu…óey Ňčga h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba na, si ka nar ray a *mewey hay Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
19.18: Gula ha aa c…ôf…óa Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa ney ray na, a mewey hay wura?¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da k…ô…óey ndaw vagay ba, ka da ley vaw saw da palah ba, ka da leley ba, ka da mb…ôrzley a ray ndaw ba.
19.19: Natar ray Ňčgada ata papakw ta mamakw, asaya, wu…óa meseembew akah anda kah ma wu…óa ray akah.¬Ľ
19.20: B…ôz-gula ha, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMewey hay a c…ôpa ke…óe, ya ta zl…ô…ďta daa ba s…ôlak, ma mb…ôkya Ňčga key na, wura d…ô…ďa wura?¬Ľ
19.21: Yesu a l…ôvar a b…ôz-gula ha: ¬ęDa ka wu…óey Ňčga t…ôrey ndaw maaya kalah na, daw, h…ô…ókadata cek akah hay tabiya, wunkatara dala ha a masa-viya hay. Da ka ta ka la anda ke…óe na, ka da h…ôtey zleley fa Gazlavay da va…ó. Masa kah ma v…ôldatara dala ha cay a masa-viya hay na, sawa, s…ôpya.¬Ľ
19.22: Masa b…ôz-gula ha ma c…ônda mey a anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, a daw, aŇčga ta mees…ômey daa ba, maja aa ta zleley ga, a wu…óey Ňčga v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay ba.
19.23: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, aŇčga ta banay ga Ňčgada ndaw masa-zleley amba a t…ô…ďa Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray a.
19.24: Asaya, ya fa l…ôvkwar, aŇčga ta banay Ňčgada slagwama Ňčga mb…ôzey taa v…ôge…ó Ňčga baatal. Ama, aŇčga ta banay ga ma f…ôna saya Ňčgada ndaw masa-zleley Ňčga t…ô…ďa Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray a.¬Ľ
19.25: Masa gula aŇčga hay ma c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe na, a r…ôzlam ga, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKay! Da anda ke…óe na, ma da l…ôhey daa meb…ôrey na, wa?¬Ľ
19.26: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a n…ôkta, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMel…ôhey daa meb…ôrey na, ara cek masa ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma gwa Ňčga ka ba, ama Gazlavay na, a gwa Ňčga kata cek hay tabiya.¬Ľ
19.27: Ta‚Äô, *Piyer aa guzlar a Yesu a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYaw, ala na, ya ta mb…ôkdamat…ôrwa cek ala hay sem c…ôpa, amba ya s…ôpmaka. Kaa ya da h…ôtam fa salay ala na, me?¬Ľ
19.28: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ta pas masa cek hay c…ôpa ma da t…ôram mawiya na, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya da njey aa slam-menjey a…óaw mawa…óakaya Ňčga wey da ray nd…ôhay. Akwar, kuraw a ray a cew masa ma s…ôpmaya ke…óe na, ka da njam aa slam-menjey Ňčga bay hay amba ka kamatar sariya Ňčgada s…ôkway hay kuraw a ray a cew Ňčga *Israyel.
19.29: Da ndaw a mb…ôkd…ôrwa way aŇčga, da daa ba, a mb…ôkdat…ôrwa m…ôlmaha hay, dam-mamaha hay, mamaha, papaha, b…ôz aŇčga hay, da daa ba, a mb…ôkdat…ôrwa ley aŇčga hay, amba a s…ôpya na, ndaw aha a h…ôtey cek hay a la ma f…ôna masa aŇčga ma mb…ôkdat…ôrwa Ňčgene a key dey temere. Asaya, a h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba la may.
19.30: Yaw, nd…ôhay ga ma t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw Ňčgeeme, a da v…ôham fa d…ô…ďa. Asaya, nd…ôhay ga masa fa d…ô…ďa, a da diyam fa mey.¬Ľ

20.1: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa gwa Ňčga wa cek masa nd…ôhay ma da h…ôtam ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da wuzd…ôrwa mewey aŇčga da ray nd…ôhay na, ta me? Ehe, ya Ňčgakwar mey da ray a. Bay Ňčga ley daha, a bawa taa p…ôrek e Ňčga s…ôpey nd…ôhay Ňčga key sl…ôra da ley aŇčga.
20.2: A kam ma…óay ta nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra. Fa mev…ôrndey na, a da v…ôltar dala t…ô…óe Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga ndaw mev…ôrndey da ley. Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar Ňčga diyam a ley aŇčga ha d…ô…ďa.
20.3: Pas t…ô…óe meh…ôley maaca na, a bawa da way saya, a da n…ôkey dey na, a ray nd…ôhay mekele hay manjatakaya Ňčga maaya daa slam aha.
20.4: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúDiyam ta kam sl…ôra da ley a…óaw katay may, amba ya p…ôlkwar dala t…ô…óe fa sl…ôra akwar a.‚ÄĚ
20.5: Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a diyam aa sl…ôra ha. Bay Ňčga ley kaa heyey a bawa ta wuzlah-pas, a h…ôley nd…ôhay mekele. Asaya, a bawa ta pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó, a h…ôley nd…ôhay mekele saya.
20.6: Pas gweegwe a k…ôzley na, a bawa, a h…ôtey nd…ôhay manjatakaya daa slam aha saya, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúKa v…ôrndam Ňčga maaya anda ke…óe na, maja me?‚ÄĚ
20.7: A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ‚ÄúYa v…ôrndam Ňčga maaya na, maja ndaw ma h…ôlndar aa sl…ôra daa ba.‚ÄĚ Anda ke…óe, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúYaw, diyam a ley a…óaw, ta kam sl…ôra may.‚ÄĚ
20.8: ¬ęMasa pas ta k…ôzley cay na, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlrawa *bay-ray Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúZ…ôlt…ôrwa nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra, p…ôltara dala ata. Ka zlar ta fa nd…ôhay ma samawa madagway-dakw haa kasl fa nd…ôhay ma samawa Ňčgeeme.‚ÄĚ
20.9: Nd…ôhay madagway-dakw heyey a diyam fa bay-ray Ňčga sl…ôra heyey d…ô…ďa, a t…ô…ďmara dala ata, kwa waawa a h…ôtey dala t…ô…óe Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga ndaw mev…ôrndey da ley.
20.10: Nd…ôhay Ňčgeeme heyey a diyam may, a wulkam na, a da h…ôtam ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay madagway-dakw hay heyey. Ama, a h…ôtam na, dala t…ô…óe Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga ndaw mev…ôrndey da ley c…ôŇčga gway.
20.11: Masa fa t…ô…ďmara dala ha na, faa Ňčguram mey da ray bay Ňčga ley a,
20.12: a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúNd…ôhay ma samawa madagway-dakw ke…óe, a kam sl…ôra …ď…ôrey pal gway, ama ka v…ôltar dala letek ta ala ma kam sl…ôra hipas daa pas mecey na, kwara?‚ÄĚ
20.13: Ta‚Äô, bay Ňčga ley a, aa guzley Ňčgada ndaw pal da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúJam a…óaw, ya ta bataka daa ba s…ôlak, maja ya kakwa ma…óay na, da ray dala t…ô…óe Ňčga mev…ôrndey Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga ndaw pal da ley, ba diya?
20.14: T…ô…ďa dala akah masa anda al…ôkwa ma kakwa ma…óay, daw. Ya wu…óey Ňčga v…ôlar dala h…ôma Ňčga akah a ndaw ma sawa aa sl…ôra fa d…ô…ďa ke…óe.
20.15: Fa kah na, ya gwa Ňčga key cek ta zleley a…óaw anda yah ma wu…óey ba daw? S…ôleŇč fa kaka maja yah ndaw maaya daw?‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
20.16: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAra anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay madagway-dakw, a da t…ôram nd…ôhay Ňčgeeme, asaya, nd…ôhay Ňčgeeme a da t…ôram nd…ôhay madagway-dakw.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley Ňčga dey maakar da ray mem…ôcey aŇčga ta masl…ôk…óawa aŇčga (Mark 10.32-34; Luk 18.31-34)
20.17: Ata Yesu fa diyam a *Jeruzelem. Daa masa ata daa c…ôve…ó na, ta‚Äô, Yesu a Ňčg…ôlta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew ta cakay, a l…ôvtar:
20.18: ¬ęEhe, wure ke…óe al…ôkwa fa nakwa a Jeruzelem. Fete…óe na, a da v…ôldamaya, yah *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a har *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. A da kamaya sariya Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay.
20.19: Asaya, a da v…ôldamaya a har nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba, amba aa saŇčg…ôram a ray a…óaw, a sl…ô…ómaya ta laway, a d…ôrmaya fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya, ya m…ôcey la. Ňäga …óar maakar a na, ya sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey a.¬Ľ MamaŇč Ňčga ata Jak ta JaŇč aa c…ôf…óa Yesu (Mark 10.35-45)
20.20: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Ňčgwas Ňčga Zebede ta b…ôz aŇčga hay a Ňčg…ôcham fa Yesu. Ňägwas aha a regedey fa mey aŇčga, aa c…ôf…óa Ňčga j…ôna.
20.21: Yesu ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa wu…óey na, me?¬Ľ Ňägwas aha, aa mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa wu…óey na, ka l…ôvya d…ôga wure ke…óe, daa masa ka fa z…ôma bay akah na, ka da njadata b…ôz a…óaw hay cew ke…óe, pal ta har-z…ômay akah, laŇčgar ta har-gula akah.¬Ľ
20.22: Yesu aa guzltar a b…ôza hay Ňčga Ňčgwas a heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa s…ôrmara cek masa akwar maa c…ôf…óam ba. Ka gwamara Ňčga s…ôram banay la anda yah ma da s…ôra daw ?¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAhaw, ya gwamara.¬Ľ
20.23: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAhaw, ka s…ôram banay la anda yah ma da s…ôra. Ama Ňčga njey ta har-z…ômay a…óaw, da daa ba, ta har-gula a…óaw na, ara yah ma da …ó…ôsla mey a Ňčgene ba. Ara Papay ma …óiyta slam hay a Ňčgene Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa aa ma walata.¬Ľ
20.24: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa gula aŇčga hay siya kuraw ma c…ôndamara mey a na, a cam mevel a ray m…ôlmaŇč hay cew heyey.
20.25: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a z…ôlta tabiya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa s…ôrmara da wuzlah nd…ôhay da b…ôla ke…óe na, bay hay daha. Bay hay a na, fa wam da ray nd…ôhay ta g…ôdaŇč, asaya, mahura hay mekele fa wam da ray nd…ôhay ta c…ôve…ó e ba.
20.26: Ama da wuzlah akwar na, a da key k…ône ba. Yaw, da ndaw da wuzlah akwar a wu…óey Ňčga key mahura na, si a t…ôrey ndaw ma ka sl…ôra akwar.
20.27: Asaya, da ndaw da wuzlah akwar a wu…óey Ňčga key *bay-ray na, si a t…ôrey anda beke akwar.
20.28: Anda ke…óe, kwa yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya sawa a b…ôla na, amba nd…ôhay a kamaya sl…ôra ba. Ama ya sawa a b…ôla na, amba ya katar sl…ôra a nd…ôhay, ya v…ôlda heter a…óaw Ňčga l…ôhey nd…ôhay ga daa meb…ôrey.¬Ľ Yesu a wurey dey Ňčga nd…ôhay wulaf hay cew (Mark 10.46-52; Luk 18.35-43)
20.29: Masa ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay fa bam da Jerikwaw na, nd…ôhay ga fa s…ôpmatar wurzay.
20.30: Nd…ôhay wulaf hay cew daha manjatakaya da mey-c…ôve…ó. A c…ôndamara na, Yesu fa daw ta Ňčgene. Ta‚Äô, a wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęBay Mahura, B…ôzey Ňčga *Davit, ambahw s…ôrfandar dey-ceceh may taw!¬Ľ
20.31: Nd…ôhay ga heyey a kamatar mey, a l…ôvmatar Ňčga njam teete. Ama wulaf hay a, a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč c…ôŇčga, a l…ôvam: ¬ęBay Mahura, B…ôzey Ňčga Davit, ambahw s…ôrfandar dey-ceceh may taw!¬Ľ
20.32: Yesu ta‚Äô, a lecey, a z…ôlt…ôrwa, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wu…óam ya kakwar na, me?¬Ľ
20.33: Ta‚Äô, wulaf hay a, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Mahura, ya wu…óam ka wurndara dey ala.¬Ľ
20.34: Wulaf hay a, a kamar dey-ceceh a Yesu. AŇčga gas! gas! a g…ôsfatar har fa dey ata. Wure wure Ňčgene, dey ata ha, wur! wur! a wuram, a h…ôtmar dey maaya maaya d…ô…ďa. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a diyam asiya.

21.1: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay fa diyam aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem. Masa ata gweegwe ta berney a na, a wusam gweegwe ta slala daha mez…ôley Betfaje da rav AŇčgwa Ňčga *Awliviye. Yesu ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey gula aŇčga hay cew teese…ó Ňčgada slala ha,
21.2: a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam a slala fa mey akwar katay, ka da h…ôtfam madi-z…ôŇčgwaw maj…ôwkaya ta bab…ôza da cakay a. P…ôskam…ôrwa, handamatiwa cewete.
21.3: Da ndaw a t…ôkakwar Ňčga p…ôska na, l…ôvmar: ‚ÄúBay Mahura a wu…óey.‚ÄĚ Ňägene na, ndaw aha, a mb…ôkdakwar la Ňčga p…ôska wure Ňčgene.¬Ľ
21.4: Yaw, cek aha ta key la amba a key anda Gazlavay maa guzlwa zleezle ta mey *ndaw ma t…ôla mey aŇčga ma l…ôvey:
21.5: ¬ęL…ôvmatar a nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga *SiyaŇčw: n…ôkam dey, bay akwar fa sawa fa akwar. Ara ndaw meekwe…ó-mey, aa da ray madi-z…ôŇčgwaw, aa da ray bab…ôza Ňčga madi-z…ôŇčgwaw aha.¬Ľ
21.6: Da ray Ňčgene, gula aŇčga hay cew heyey a diyam, a kamara anda Yesu ma l…ôvtar ha.
21.7: A handamar madi-z…ôŇčgwaw ta bab…ôza ha d…ô…ďa. Gula aŇčga hay a, a ciymata zana ata hay a ray z…ôŇčgwaw hay a. Yesu ta‚Äô, a njey a ray a.
21.8: Nd…ôhay ga malacatakaya daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga cey ray ta Yesu, a ciyam zana ata hay aa c…ôve…ó Ňčga h…ôslmar ray. Siya hay da wuzlah ata, a b…ôzlham mey-har Ňčga wudez hay, a pamata aa c…ôve…ó e may.
21.9: Nd…ôhay fa diyam fa mey aŇčga, leŇč fa d…ô…ďa aŇčga, ata tabiya fa wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ę*Hawzana! H…ôlmakwa B…ôzey Ňčga *Davit! Anja Bay Gazlavay Ňčga p…ôsar mey a ndaw masa aa ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa ta mez…ôley aŇčga. H…ôlmakwa Bay Gazlavay da va…ó!¬Ľ
21.10: Masa Yesu a fa mb…ôzey aa berney Ňčga Jeruzelem na, nd…ôhay daa berney a, a mb…ô…óam haya! haya! aa c…ôf…óam vaw da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKe…óe he na, ara wa?¬Ľ
21.11: Nd…ôhay ga ma diyam ta Yesu heyey, a mb…ô…ódamatara, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęAra ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, mez…ôley Yesu, ndaw *Nezeret daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile.¬Ľ Yesu a …ď…ôlta nd…ôhay daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay (Mark 11.15-19; Luk 19.45-48; JaŇč 2.13-22)
21.12: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a mb…ôzey aa papalah Ňčga *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Fete…óe na, nd…ôhay fa kam luma. Maja Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a …ď…ôlta nd…ôhay tabiya ma h…ô…ókadam cek hay leŇč nd…ôhay ma h…ô…ókam cek hay. A b…ôzlta slam hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma mb…ô…óa dala ta jaŇčga hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma h…ô…ókadam makurgwadakw hay.
21.13: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúWay a…óaw na, ara way amba nd…ôhay a d…ôrmaya daŇčgay da hwa…ó a.‚ÄĚ Ama akwar na, ka t…ôrdamara way a ke…óe Ňčga slam Ňčga mayal hay!¬Ľ
21.14: Nd…ôhay wulaf hay ta nd…ôhay jegwer hay a Ňčg…ôcham fa Yesu daa Way-mekey-kwakwas a. Ta‚Äô, a mb…ôldata.
21.15: Nd…ôhay mahura hay da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, a h…ôtmatar maazla hay masa Yesu ma ka. Asaya, a h…ôtmatar b…ôza hay daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a, fa wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ę*Hawzana! H…ôlmakwa B…ôzey Ňčga *Davit!¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, mevel a catar.
21.16: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvmar a Yesu: ¬ęKa fa c…ônda mey masa ata maa guzlam ke…óe daw?¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAhaw, ya fa c…ônda. Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay, ka taa s…ôrkadata b…ôza hay mec…ôhe hay ta b…ôza hay da mey …ó…ôwa la Ňčga h…ôlmamaka.‚ÄĚ Ka ta jaŇčgamara mey a daa ba daw?¬Ľ
21.17: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a mb…ôkdata, a bawa daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem e, a daw a slala Betani. A ney fete…óe dasi tava…ó a Ňčgene. Mey da ray wudez manjar bab…ôza (Mark 11.12-14, 20-24)

21.19: Daa masa aŇčga fa daw na, a h…ôtey wudez daha da mey-c…ôve…ó, a yey bab…ôza anda gudav. Ta‚Äô, a daw a cakay wudez e, ama a h…ôtfey fa wudez e na, si gwaslaf a gway, bab…ôza fa v…ô…óa daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a n…ôsa wudez e, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKuse! Ka yey bab…ôza saba Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene, wudez e, a kweley.
21.20: Daa Ňčgene, gula aŇčga hay, ata da siya. Masa ata ma h…ôtmar wudez e ma kweley anda Ňčgene na, a r…ôzlam, a l…ôvmar a Yesu: ¬ęWudez e, a kweley fiyaw fiyaw na, kwara?¬Ľ
21.21: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da akwar fa pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara, asaya, da akwar fa wulkam cew cew daa ba na, ka gwamara Ňčga key cek anda yah ma ka Ňčgada wudez ke…óe daada ba, ama ka gwamara kwa Ňčga l…ôvar Ňčgada aŇčgwa mahura ke…óe: ‚ÄúSl…ôk…óey la fe…óe, k…ôzley aa b…ôlay‚ÄĚ na, a key la k…ône.
21.22: Da akwar fa pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara na, cek masa akwar maa c…ôf…óamara daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay na, a v…ôldakwara la c…ôpa.¬Ľ Ma v…ôldara g…ôdaŇč a Yesu na, wa? (Mark 11.27-33; Luk 20.1-8)
21.23: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a mb…ôzey aa papalah Ňčga *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay fete…óe. 21.24: Yesu, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYaw, yah may, amba yaa c…ôf…óakwar mey pal. Da akwar ta mb…ô…ódamiwa mey a la na, yah may, ya kadakwara ndaw ma v…ôldiwa c…ôve…ó Ňčga kata cek hay a ke…óe la.

21.26: Ama da ya l…ôvkwa: ‚ÄúAra nd…ôhay ma sl…ôrdam…ôrwa‚ÄĚ na, ya zlurakwa ta nd…ôhay maja nd…ôhay tabiya fa wulkam JaŇč-Baptis na, ara *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
21.27: Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódamara a Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęYa s…ôrmara ba.¬Ľ Yesu, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYaw, da anda ke…óe na, ya fa da kadakwara ndaw ma v…ôlya c…ôve…ó Ňčga kata cek hay a ke…óe, daa ba may.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta b…ôza hay cew
21.28: Yesu aa guzltar a nd…ôhay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa wu…óey ya Ňčgakwar mey amba ka wulkam da ray a. ¬ęNdaw daha, aŇčga ta b…ôza hay cew. A l…ôvar Ňčgada b…ôzey mahura: ‚ÄúB…ôz a…óaw, tasana daw ta kawa sl…ôra da ley.‚ÄĚ
21.29: B…ôzey a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúYa fa da daw daa ba.‚ÄĚ Ama menjey nek…ô…óey na, a mb…ô…óda leŇčgesl aŇčga, ta‚Äô, a daw Ňčga kawa sl…ôra ha.
21.30: Papaha, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar Ňčgada b…ôzey mec…ôhe saya, k…ône may. B…ôzey a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúAya, papay.‚ÄĚ Ama fa d…ô…ďa ha, b…ôzey a, ta daw Ňčga kawa sl…ôra heyey daa saba.
21.31: Kaa dasi b…ôza hay cew ke…óe, ma ka cek masa papa ata ma wu…óey la na, wura?¬Ľ Nd…ôhay a, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAra b…ôzey mahura.¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay a d…ô…ďa, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAhaw, k…ône, ama ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, nd…ôhay maaya ba hay anda nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw ta Ňčgwas-barlaw hay, a mb…ôzam la teese…ó da ray akwar a wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wey da ray ata.
21.32: *JaŇč-Baptis ta sawa la Ňčga wuzkwar c…ôve…ó masa d…ôr e, ama akwar ta t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga daa ba. Nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw ta Ňčgwas-barlaw hay, ata na, ta t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga la. Kwa masa akwar ma h…ôtmar ata ma mb…ôkdamara mekey meb…ôrey na, akwar ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar Ňčga t…ô…ďey mey Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis a daa ba c…ôŇčga.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey da ray nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay ba (Mark 12.1-12; Luk 20.9-19)
21.33: Yesu aa guzltar a nd…ôhay saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey-meŇčgey mekele. Ndaw daha, a key jerne Ňčga wudez ma yey bab…ôza mez…ômey. Ta‚Äô, a zl…ô…ďa jerne he ray a zlar. Daa jerne he na, a …óiyey slam Ňčga …ó…ôcey bab…ôza Ňčga wudez e, a l…ômey way mag…ôlkaya maaz…ôma Ňčgada ndaw ma j…ô…óa jerne he. A v…ôlda jerne he a har nd…ôhay Ňčga kam sl…ôra da hwa…ó a. 21.38: Ama daa masa nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra daa jerne kaa heyey ma h…ôtmar b…ôzey aŇčga ha fa sawa na, ta‚Äô, a slam yawa da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúKatay ara b…ôzey ma da wa jerne ke…óe fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga papaha. Nakwa ta k…ô…ókwa vagay, amba ya wakwa jerne he ke…óe.‚ÄĚ

22.1: Yesu aa guzltar Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey ta mey-meŇčgey hay saya, a l…ôvtar:
22.2: ¬ęYa gwa Ňčga wa *mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, ta me? Yaw, bay daha, a key gwagway ta pas b…ôzey aŇčga ma lawa kwakwa.

22.4: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha, a sl…ôrey mad…ôrlam aŇčga hay mekele saya, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúDiyam ta l…ôvmatar a nd…ôhay masa maz…ôltakaya na, Ňčga samawa aa gwagway a. Yah ma h…ôrta sla hay ta …óahway cay, cek hay tabiya ma…óiytakaya cay, Ňčga samawa Ňčga z…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway a d…ô…ďa.‚ÄĚ
22.5: Ama nd…ôhay maz…ôltakaya ha, a pam leŇčgesl fa mez…ôley a ba. A diyam Ňčga key cek ata hay mekele. Ndaw laŇčgar a daw a ley, ndaw laŇčgar a daw a kawa filaw.

22.8: ¬ęCay, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar Ňčgada mad…ôrlam aŇčga hay siya: ‚ÄúCek hay tabiya Ňčga gwagway ma…óiytakaya cay, ama nd…ôhay maz…ôltakaya na, ata t…ô…óe Ňčga samawa aa gwagway a saba.
22.9: Anda ke…óe, diyam aa c…ôve…ó mahura hay, z…ôlmawa kwa waawa masa akwar ma h…ôtam amba a samawa, a z…ômam …óaf Ňčga gwagway a.‚ÄĚ
22.10: Ta‚Äô, mad…ôrlam aŇčga hay kaa heyey, a diyam aa c…ôve…ó mahura hay, a z…ôlmawa nd…ôhay masa ata ma h…ôtam, nd…ôhay maaya ta maaya ba hay c…ôpa, haa way masa ata ma kam gwagway da hwa…ó a kaa heyey a r…ôhey.
22.11: ¬ęBay kaa heyey a daw, a mb…ôzey aa way Ňčga gwagway Ňčga n…ôkt…ôrwa nd…ôhay ma z…ômam …óaf Ňčga gwagway a. A da n…ôkey dey na, a ray ndaw daha da wuzlah ata, zana Ňčga gwagway fa vaw daa ba.

22.13: Ta‚Äô, bay kaa heyey aa guzltar a ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúJ…ôwmara salay ta har Ňčga ndaw Ňčgene, hazakadamara aa ambaw, aa l…ôvaŇč. Fete…óe na, a da t…ôway, asaya, a daa p…ô…óey sler.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
22.14: Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzltar a nd…ôhay a saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAhaw, nd…ôhay ga maz…ôltakaya, ama mawalatakaya na, nd…ôhay nek…ô…óey gway.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay mahura hay a jadamara Yesu da ray mep…ôley budaw (Mark 12.13-17; Luk 20.20-26)
22.15: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay *Fariza hay, a kusam ta cakay Ňčga s…ôpey dabaray, amba a k…ôrzamara Yesu fa mey masa aŇčga ma daa guzlda.
22.16: Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôram gula ata hay siya, ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Bay *Herawt fa Yesu Ňčgaa c…ôf…óamara. 22.17: Anda ke…óe, ya wu…óam Ňčgaa c…ôf…óamaka, kwakwas al…ôkwa na, a v…ôley c…ôve…ó Ňčga p…ôley budaw a bay mahura *Sezere daw? A v…ôley c…ôve…ó ba daw? Wuzdandara mewulkey akah da ray mey a ke…óe cey.¬Ľ
22.18: Ama Yesu ta s…ôra mewulkey ata maaya ba Ňčgene sem. Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew, ka wu…óam Ňčga jadamaya na, maja me?

22.21: A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAra Ňčga Sezere, bay mahura Ňčga *Rawm.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, cek masa Ňčga Sezere na, v…ôldamara a Sezere he. Cek masa Ňčga Gazlavay na, v…ôldamara a Gazlavay a.¬Ľ
22.22: Masa ata ma c…ôndamara Yesu ma mb…ô…ódatara anda Ňčgene la na, a r…ôzlam ga da ray mey a. Mbak! a mb…ôkdamara, ta‚Äô, a diyam. Mey da ray masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey (Mark 12.18-27; Luk 20.27-40)
22.23: Ta pas a Ňčgene, nd…ôhay *Saduse hay a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay Yesu. Saduse hay na, ara nd…ôhay ma wulkam, ma l…ôvam da ndaw ta m…ôcey sem na, fa da sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey daa ba. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu, a l…ôvmar:
22.24: ¬ęBay ala, mawuzlalakaya daa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúDa ndaw a m…ôcey ta h…ôtey b…ôzey daa ba na, si m…ôlmaha a la Ňčgwas-vagay a, amba a yamawa b…ôza hay Ňčgada m…ôlmaha mam…ôckaya ha.‚ÄĚ
22.25: Yaw, m…ôlmaŇč hay maasala da wuzlah ala daha, ata Ňčgaa maŇč, Ňčgaa paŇč. M…ôlma ata mahura leŇč! a ley Ňčgwas, pam! a m…ôcey, kwa ta h…ôtey b…ôzey daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, a mb…ôkdara Ňčgwas aŇčga a m…ôlmaha laŇčgar.
22.26: Cek aha, a key letek ta mambaray a, a key letek ta m…ôlma ata Ňčga dey maakar a haa kasl fa m…ôlma ata Ňčga dey maasala ha.

22.29: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar faa z…ô…ódamara ray akwar maja ka s…ôrmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba, asaya, maja ka s…ôrmara g…ôdaŇč aŇčga ba.
22.30: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ta pas masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey na, zel hay fa da lam Ňčgusay daa saba, Ňčgusay fa da njam ta zel hay daa saba may, ama nd…ôhay, a da njam anda maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó.

22.32: ‚ÄúYah, Gazlavay masa *Ab…ôraham, *Izak, leŇč *Jakwap ma namar ray.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęGazlavay na, ara Gazlavay Ňčga nd…ôhay ta dey, ba na, Ňčga nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya ba.¬Ľ
22.33: Nd…ôhay tabiya ma c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe na, a r…ôzlam da ray mees…ôrkedey Ňčga Yesu a. Mewey Ňčga Gazlavay masa mahura na, wura? (Mark 12.28-34; Luk 10.25-28)
22.34: Masa *Fariza hay ma n…ôkmara Yesu ta kusta *Saduse hay sem ta mey na, ta‚Äô, a kusam, a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay Yesu.
22.35: *Ndaw maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz da wuzlah ata daha, aa c…ôf…óa Yesu amba a jada, a l…ôvar:
22.36: ¬ęBay a…óaw, *mewey Ňčga Gazlavay mahura ma f…ônta siya hay na, wura?¬Ľ
22.37: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ę‚ÄúSi ka wu…óa Bay Gazlavay akah, ta mevel akah c…ôpa, ta mes…ôfney akah c…ôpa, asaya, ta leŇčgesl akah c…ôpa.‚ÄĚ

22.40: Yaw, *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz tabiya ta mees…ôrkedey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle mac…ômtakaya tabiya na, daa mewey hay a cew ke…óe.¬Ľ K…ôriste, aŇčga bay Ňčga Davit na, kwara? (Mark 12.35-37; Luk 20.41-44)
22.41: Daa masa *Fariza hay makustakaya na, Yesu aa c…ôf…óata may,
22.42: a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay na, ka wulkam da ray a na, kwara? AŇčga, s…ôkway Ňčga wa?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAŇčga na, s…ôkway Ňčga Bay *Davit.¬Ľ
22.43: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęTa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, Davit ta z…ôla K…ôriste he la, ‚ÄúBay Mahura.‚ÄĚ Kaa a z…ôla anda ke…óe saya na, kwara? Davit e, ta l…ôvey la:
22.44: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay a l…ôvar a Bay a…óaw Mahura: Sawa, njey a har-z…ômay a…óaw amba ya wakwa da ray nd…ôhay haa ta pas masa yah ma da pata masa-g…ôra akah hay asi salay akah.‚ÄĚ
22.45: Yaw, da Davit a z…ôla K…ôriste ‚ÄúBay Mahura‚ÄĚ na, kaa wara K…ôriste he ara b…ôzey da hwa…ó Davit saya na, kwara?¬Ľ
22.46: Kwa ndaw pal da wuzlah ata ta gwa Ňčga mb…ô…ódara kwa mey pal daa ba. D…ôga ta pas Ňčgene, kwa waawa a zlurey Ňčgaa c…ôf…óafar mey.

23.1: Yesu aa guzltar Ňčgada nd…ôhay makustakaya ta Ňčgada gula aŇčga hay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey saya,
23.2: a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz leŇč nd…ôhay *Fariza hay na, mapatakaya aa slam a Ňčga Mawiz Ňčgaa s…ôrkedey kwakwas aŇčga.
23.3: Si ka t…ô…ďmara mey ata, asaya, ka kamara cek masa ata maa s…ôrkadamakwara ha. Ama cek masa ata ma kamara na, ka da kamara ba, maja ata ta ray ata na, fa kamara cek anda ata maa s…ôrkadamakwara ha, daa ba.
23.4: A bamawa kwakwas hay maadakw a maadakw a masa nd…ôhay ma gwamara Ňčga s…ôpa ba. A t…ôkmatar …óay a nd…ôhay Ňčga s…ôpmara kwakwas hay a, ama ata na, a g…ômam Ňčga j…ônmata nd…ôhay Ňčga s…ôpey kwakwas hay a kwa nek…ô…óey ba.
23.5: A kamata sl…ôra ata hay tabiya na, amba nd…ôhay a h…ôtmatar aa h…ômdamata gway. Anda ke…óe, a wuzlalam mey masa daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a t…ôfmara aa ambal anda laya, a l…ôwmara fa daŇčgay, da daa ba, fa har. A t…ôfmata mahura mahura ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay siya hay. Asaya, zana hay masa ata ma pamata fa vaw na, a cam gag…ômay maaz…ôma maaz…ôma fa mey a, ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay mekele.
23.6: ¬ęDa ta z…ôlmata la aa gwagway na, a wu…óam menjey aa slam maaya Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay. Asaya, daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, a wu…óam menjey aa slam maaya fa mey.
23.7: A wu…óam nd…ôhay a camatar har ta meney ray fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay makustakaya, asaya, a wu…óam nd…ôhay a z…ôlmata bay.
23.8: ¬ęAma akwar na, ka da t…ô…ďmara amba a z…ôlmakwar bay ba, maja akwar tabiya na, m…ôlmaŇč hay. Ňägada akwar, ndaw ma s…ôra cek na, aŇčga pal.
23.9: Asaya, ka da z…ôlam ndaw da b…ôla ke…óe PapaŇč ba, maja Papakw akwar na, aŇčga pal masa da va…ó.
23.10: Ka da t…ô…ďmara amba a z…ôlmakwar Bay Mahura ba, maja Bay akwar Mahura na, ara *K…ôriste pal taava aŇčga.
23.11: ¬ęNdaw mahura da wuzlah akwar na, ara ndaw ma kakwar sl…ôra.
23.12: Kwa waawa ma pa ray aŇčga Ňčga ndaw mahura na, Gazlavay a da pa Ňčga mec…ôhe. Kwa waawa ma nada ray aŇčga na, Gazlavay a da pa Ňčga mahura.¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ótar ray a nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta a Fariza hay (Mark 12.40; Luk 11.39-42, 44, 52; Luk 20.47)
23.13: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta *Fariza hay. Akwar na, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew. Akwar fa t…ôkmata nd…ôhay Ňčga mb…ôzey a wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata. Akwar ta ray akwar, ta mb…ôzam daa ba, asaya, ka ta t…ôkmata nd…ôhay ma wu…óam Ňčga mb…ôzam sem. [
23.14: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta Fariza hay. Akwar na, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew. Akwar fa t…ô…ďmatara cek hay Ňčga Ňčgwas-vagay hay tabiya, asaya, akwar faa guzlam ga daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay amba nd…ôhay aa zaramakwar. Maja Ňčgene Gazlavay a s…ôrdakwar banay la ma f…ôna nd…ôhay siya.]
23.15: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta Fariza hay. Akwar na, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew. Akwar fa p…ôkam aa wura aa wura c…ôpa amba ka h…ôtam kwa ndaw pal letek Ňčga s…ôpey kwakwas akwar ni, ama da akwar ma h…ôtam la na, ka t…ôrdamara ndaw a, Ňčga ndaw Ňčga awaw magaza ma f…ônkwar haa dey cew.
23.16: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar nd…ôhay ma wuzmatar c…ôve…ó Ňčgada nd…ôhay, ama akwar na, wulaf hay. Ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúKwa waawa ma mbe…óey Ňčga key cek ta *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, ara Ňčga tede, ama kwa waawa ma mbe…óey Ňčga key cek ta …ď…ôrey magaza mewe…óey p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó daa Way-mekey-kwakwas a na, si c…ôma a ka cek aha anda aa ma l…ôvey.‚ÄĚ
23.17: Akwar na, nd…ôhay manjar-leŇčgesl, asaya, akwar wulaf hay! Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta …ď…ôrey magaza na, mahura dasi ata na, wura? Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, aŇčga mahura da ray …ď…ôrey magaza, maja ara Way a ma t…ôrda …ď…ôrey magaza aha Ňčga cek maaya Ňčgada Gazlavay.
23.18: Akwar fa l…ôvam saya: ‚ÄúKwa waawa ma mbe…óey Ňčga key cek ta slam-mef…ôkey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay na, *membe…óey a, ara Ňčga tede. Ama kwa waawa ma mbe…óey Ňčga key cek ta cek mav…ôldakaya Ňčgada Gazlavay masa mapakaya da ray slam aha na, si a ka cek aha anda aa ma l…ôvey.‚ÄĚ
23.19: Akwar na, wulaf hay! Cek mahura na, cek mev…ôley a Gazlavay daw? Da daa ba, slam-mef…ôkey cek a Gazlavay ma t…ôrda cek aha maaya fa Gazlavay daw?
23.20: Anda ke…óe, kwa waawa ma mbe…óey ta slam-mef…ôkey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay na, a key Ňčgene, a mbe…óey ta slam aha leŇč ta cek da ray a tabiya.
23.21: Kwa waawa ma mbe…óey ta Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, a key Ňčgene, a mbe…óey ta Way a leŇč ta Gazlavay manjakaya daa Way a.
23.22: Kwa waawa ma mbe…óey ta slam da va…ó na, a key Ňčgene, a mbe…óey ta slam-menjey Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč ta Gazlavay a manjakaya da ray a.
23.23: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta Fariza hay. Akwar na, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew. Akwar fa wunkamata cek akwar hay tabiya slam kuraw, ka v…ôldamara slam pal a Gazlavay, kwa cek hay mec…ôhe mec…ôhe ma c…ôrda lar na, akwar fa wunkamara k…ône may. Ama Ňčga s…ôpey mewey hay maaya na, ka s…ôrfadamara ba. Anda mel…ôvey mekey cek ta c…ôve…ó e, mes…ôrey dey-ceceh, asaya, menjey mandaw mandaw daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay. Sas…ôkar jak, cek hay a Ňčgene na, ara cek hay maaya Ňčga key. Ka da mb…ôkdamara Ňčga key cek hay siya hay ba may.
23.24: Akwar fa wuzmatar c…ôve…ó Ňčgada nd…ôhay, ama akwar na, wulaf hay. Akwar fa jaj…ôrmara cek akwar mesey maja jaj…ôway mec…ôhe da hwa…ó a, anja Ňčgene, akwar fa ndam slagwama a hwa…ó daa yam maaj…ôrkaya heyey c…ôŇčga gway.
23.25: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta Fariza hay. Akwar na, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew. Akwar fa p…ôrmata d…ô…ďa Ňčga v…ôley akwar hay mesey cek ta v…ôley akwar hay Ňčga …óaf, anja Ňčgene, ta da hwa…ó a na, v…ôley hay a madakalatakaya tep! tep! ta cek hay Ňčga mayal akwar hay leŇč ta cek hay maaya ba masa akwar ma wu…óam kalah daa mevel akwar.
23.26: Akwar Fariza hay na, wulaf hay! P…ôram teese…ó na, hwa…ó a …óagay, anda ke…óe, d…ô…ďa ha na, a p…ôrey la.
23.27: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta Fariza hay. Akwar na, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew. Akwar na, anda c…ôvay hay makul…ďatakaya mabara ma mbam. Ama ta da hwa…ó a na, mazakaya, asaya, mar…ôhtakaya ta tetesl hay.
23.28: Akwar na, k…ône may. Fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay na, akwar anda nd…ôhay maaya. Anja daa mevel akwar na, cek hay malamba hay ga, akwar nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew. (Luk 11.47-51)
23.29: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta *Fariza hay. Akwar na, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew. Akwar fa l…ômamata c…ôvay hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay ma k…ô…ómata vagay zleezle Ňčga mbey, akwar fa kam banjay fa c…ôvay hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e zleezle.
23.30: Asaya, akwar fa l…ôvam: ‚ÄúDaa masa papaŇč Ňčga papa ala hay, ata ta dey, da daa Ňčgene ala daha na, anja ala fa da c…ômam ta ata Ňčga k…ô…óey nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay a vagay na, daa ba.‚ÄĚ
23.31: Anda ke…óe, akwar, ta ray akwar, fa wuzdamara, akwar na, b…ôza hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
23.32: Yaw, maaya na, ka nd…ôvdamara sl…ôra Ňčga papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay zleezle la gway.
23.33: Akwar zezekw hay, s…ôkway Ňčga kucesl hay! Akwar fa da l…ôham fa awaw magaza na, daa ba!
23.34: Maja Ňčgene, j…ôkam sl…ômay! Yah na, ya da sl…ôrkwar nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, nd…ôhay ta leŇčgesl ma s…ôra cek, leŇč nd…ôhay ma daa s…ôrkadamakwara mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Da wuzlah nd…ôhay a na, siya hay ka da k…ô…ómata vagay, siya hay ka da d…ôrmata fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya, siya hay ka da sl…ô…ómata daa way akwar hay mewuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay, siya hay may ka da s…ôpmatar wurzay aa berney hay mekele mekele amba ka s…ôrdamata banay.
23.35: Maja Ňčgene, mambaz Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e c…ôpa masa nd…ôhay ma k…ô…ómata vagay na, a hufkwar la. A k…ô…óam teese…ó na, Abel. Asaya, ta k…ô…óam nd…ôhay mekele mekele la haa kasl fa Zakari, b…ôzey Ňčga Baraki, masa akwar ma k…ô…ómara daa walaŇč Ňčga slam-mef…ôkey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay ta *Way Ňčga Gazlavay.
23.36: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, mambaz Ňčga nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, a huftar la a ray nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley da ray Jeruzelem (Luk 13.34, 35)
23.37: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a l…ôvey: ¬ęHaya! Akwar nd…ôhay da *Jeruzelem, akwar nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem, Gazlavay a sl…ôrkwar nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga hay na, ka k…ô…ómata vagay! Asaya, a sl…ôrkwar maslaŇč aŇčga hay na, kaa zakamata ta aŇčgwa! Ama mandaw mandaw ya wu…óey amba ya …ď…ôckwar tabiya akwar anda gwagwar ma …ď…ôcta b…ôz aŇčga hay asi k…ôrpasl, ama ka wu…óam ba.
23.38: C…ôndamara, Gazlavay a da la har aŇčga da ray akwar, Way-mekey-kwakwas akwar a da t…ôrey yideŇč.
23.39: Yah fa l…ôvkwar d…ôga wure ke…óe, akwar fa da h…ôtmaya fa dey daa saba haa ta pas masa akwar ma da l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAnja Bay Gazlavay Ňčga p…ôsar mey Ňčgada ndaw masa aa ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa ta mez…ôley aŇčga.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ

24.1: Yesu a bawa daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Masa aŇčga fa daw na, gula aŇčga hay a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a amba a wuzdamara Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a, aŇčga mal…ômkaya na, kwara.
24.2: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar fa h…ôtmar way a ke…óe c…ôpa, ba diya? Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, way a ke…óe na, a b…ôzlmara la, kwa aŇčgwa pal fa da mb…ôkey da ray c…ôla daa ba.¬Ľ Mey da ray b…ôla ma da nd…ôvey (Mark 13.3-13; Luk 21.7-19)
24.3: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a daw aa AŇčgwa Ňčga *Awliviye, c…ôkwam! a njey fete…óe. Gula aŇčga hay ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, ata taava ata, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęWuzdandara cey, cek aha a da key na, ta vara? Yaw, ya da s…ôrmara gweegwe cay ka v…ôhwa, asaya, gweegwe cay b…ôla a nd…ôvey na, fa me?¬Ľ
24.4: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWam vaw fa nd…ôhay ma da f…ôcmakwar.
24.5: Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe, maja nd…ôhay ga a samawa la ta mez…ôley a…óaw, kwa waawa a da l…ôvey aŇčga na, *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay. Anda ke…óe, a f…ôcam nd…ôhay la ga.
24.6: Ka da c…ônam v…ôram hay gweegwe ta akwar leŇč mey da ray v…ôram hay masa d…ôreŇč ta akwar. Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa na, ka da zluram ba, maja si cek hay a Ňčgene a kam la teese…ó …óagay. Ama ara mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla ba araŇč.
24.7: Hwayak laŇčgar a da key v…ôram ta hwayak laŇčgar, bay laŇčgar a da key h…ôma a ray bay laŇčgar. Daa hwayak hay mekele mekele, may a key la, asaya, hwiyak a wusey la.
24.8: Cek hay a tabiya a da kam na, anda hwa…ó ma zlar Ňčga car Ňčgada Ňčgwas ma da yey. Mey da ray banay ma da h…ôtfatar nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu
24.9: ¬ęDaa Ňčgene, a da v…ôldamakwar a har nd…ôhay Ňčga s…ôrdamakwar banay, a k…ô…ómakwar la vagay. Nd…ôhay tabiya da b…ôla a da Ňčg…ôldamakwar ba, maja yah.
24.10: Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay ga a da mb…ôkdamara Ňčga t…ô…ďey mey a…óaw. A da Ňčg…ôlam vaw ba da wuzlah ata, asaya, siya hay a da v…ôldamata siya hay asi har Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga s…ôrdamata banay.
24.11: Nd…ôhay ga a samawa la, a da mb…ôrzlam, a l…ôvam ata na, nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, a da n…ôsam nd…ôhay ga.
24.12: Nd…ôhay a da kam cek hay malamba ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, maja Ňčgene nd…ôhay ga fa da wu…óam vaw ta maaya daa saba.
24.13: Ama ndaw ma …ď…ôsa banay a la haa mend…ôvey a na, Gazlavay a l…ôhda la.
24.14: Si a wuzdamara *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray *mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay a nd…ôhay tabiya da b…ôla la …óagay, amba nd…ôhay tabiya a c…ôndamara mey da ray a…óaw. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, b…ôla a nd…ôvey d…ô…ďa.¬Ľ Mey da ray banay ma da sawa a ray nd…ôhay da Jude (Mark 13.14-23; Luk 21.20-24)
24.15: ¬ęCay na, ka da h…ôtmar ndaw malamba ma n…ôsa cek, ara ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey Ňčga h…ôtar fa dey ba. Ka da h…ôtmar ndaw aha manjakaya daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Ndaw a na, *Daniyel, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta wuzleley mey la zleezle da ray a. (Akwar masa ma jaŇčgamara mey a ke…óe na, si ka pam leŇčgesl fa mey a.)
24.16: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene na, si nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude a hwam Ňčga …ďawa a aŇčgwa.
24.17: Kwa ndaw masa fa m…ôskey vaw daa ambaw na, fa da mb…ôzey a way Ňčga lawa cek aŇčga hay daa ba.
24.18: Kwa ndaw aŇčga da ley na, a da v…ôhwa a way Ňčga ley zana ba.
24.19: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, banay a sawa la a ray Ňčgusay ta hwa…ó ta a ray Ňčgusay masa ta b…ôza hay da har.
24.20: D…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay amba banay a, a sawa ta piya ba, kwa ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw ba may,
24.21: maja daa …óar hay a Ňčgene na, banay a sawa la ga a ray nd…ôhay. D…ôga mezley Ňčga b…ôla haa wure ke…óe ndaw ta s…ôrey banay anda Ňčgene daa ba araŇč. Asaya, banay fa da sawa ma f…ôna Ňčgene daa saba.
24.22: Da Gazlavay ta Ňčg…ôwa siya Ňčga …óar Ňčga banay a daa ba na, anja kwa ndaw pal fa da mb…ôkey ta dey daa ba. Ama a Ňčg…ôwa siya Ňčga …óar a na, maja nd…ôhay masa aŇčga ma walata Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
24.23: ¬ęDa ray Ňčgene, da ndaw a l…ôvkwar: ‚Äú*K…ôriste, aŇčga ke…óe‚ÄĚ, da daa ba ‚ÄúaŇčga katay‚ÄĚ na, ka da t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ba.
24.24: Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe na, maja nd…ôhay ma pamara ray ata Ňčga K…ôriste, asaya, nd…ôhay ma pamara ray ata Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay na, a samawa la. A kam maazla hay ma r…ôzla ndaw la Ňčga wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč ata amba a t…ôknam nd…ôhay. Da a gwamara na, a t…ôknam kwa nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma walata sem Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay may.
24.25: J…ôkam sl…ômay, c…ôndamara maaya maaya, fa cek hay a ke…óe ma da kam na, ya ta pakwar leŇčgesl cay.¬Ľ Mey da ray ma v…ôhwa Ňčga B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw (Mark 13.24-27; Luk 17.23-24; Luk 21.25-28)
24.26: ¬ęDa ndaw aa guzlkwar, a l…ôvkwar: ‚Äú*K…ôriste aŇčga katay da wuzlah-ley‚ÄĚ na, ka da diyam ba. Da a l…ôvkwar saya ‚ÄúaŇčga ma…ďakaya fe…óe‚ÄĚ na, ka da t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga ndaw a ba.
24.27: Yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya da v…ôhwa na, anda var ma z…ômey ma we…óey d…ôga da wurza haa kasl a mey-aŇčgwa.
24.28: Daa slam masa cek mam…ôckaya daha na, kwakucah hay makustakaya fete…óe .
24.29: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa Ňčga banay a masa daa …óar hay a Ňčgene na, wure Ňčgene pas a t…ô…ďzley la, kiya fa da we…óey daa saba, wurzla hay a k…ôzlamawa la da va…ó a hwayak, cek hay c…ôpa da gazlavay da va…ó, a wusam la.
24.30: Daa Ňčgene, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya da wuzwa vaw da gazlavay da va…ó. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay da b…ôla c…ôpa a da wudam ta mat…ôway. A da h…ôtmaya, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya fa sawa da ray mekwtene ta g…ôdaŇč mahura leŇč ta mewe…óey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay.
24.31: ∆äay Ňčga taalam mahura a c…ônwa la, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya da sl…ôrdat…ôrwa maslaŇč hay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó amba a diyam aa slam hay tabiya da b…ôla, a kusmat…ôrwa nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma walata Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta gudav (Mark 13.28-31; Luk 21.29-33)
24.32: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya fa mey masa yah ma da wakwara ta gudav. Da masa ka h…ôtmar gudav fa …óe…óey, gwaslaf a gu…óaf! gu…óaf! na, ka s…ôrmara kiya madaw a ley gweegwe cay.
24.33: AŇčga letek k…ône, da ka h…ôtmatar cek hay a tabiya fa kam anda yah ma l…ôvkwar ke…óe na, Ňčgene s…ôrmara, Yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, gweegwe cay ya v…ôhwa.
24.34: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, cek hay a ke…óe tabiya a da kam na, nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe ta m…ôcam tabiya daa ba araŇč.
24.35: Slam da va…ó ta slam da hwayak a nd…ôvey la, ama mey a…óaw na, fa da nd…ôvey daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ Ma s…ôra pas Ňčga mav…ôhwa Ňčga B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, wa? (Mark 13.32-37; Luk 17.26-30, 34-36)
24.36: ¬ęFara fara, cek hay a ke…óe tabiya a da kam na, ndaw ma s…ôra kwa …óar a, kwa ler e, daa ba. Kwa maslaŇč hay ma njam da cakay Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a s…ôrmara ba, kwa Yah, B…ôzey aŇčga, ya s…ôra ba, ama si Papay, pal taava aŇčga, ma s…ôra …óar a.
24.37: Ta pas masa yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw ma da v…ôhwa na, a da key anda cek ma key daa masa N…ôwe aŇčga da b…ôla.
24.38: Daa masa Bay Gazlavay ta paslata cek hay da b…ôla ta yam daa ba araŇč, haa a wusey kasl fa …óar masa N…ôwe ma mb…ôzey aa kwambiwal na, nd…ôhay fa z…ômam cek, fa sam cek, fa lam Ňčgusay, asaya, fa v…ôldamata dam ata hay a way zel.
24.39: Ama daa Ňčgene na, kwa nd…ôhay ta s…ôrmara masa cek fa da h…ôtfatar na, daa ba, haa yam a sawa aa z…ô…ódata c…ôpa. Yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw ma da v…ôhwa na, a da key k…ône.
24.40: Daa Ňčgene, da nd…ôhay cew fa kam sl…ôra da ley na, ya da Ňčg…ôla pal, ya da mb…ôkda laŇčgar.
24.41: Da Ňčgusay cew fa k…ôram fa lavar pal na, ya da Ňčg…ôla pal, ya da mb…ôkda laŇčgar.
24.42: Anda ke…óe, wam vaw, ka da nam ba, maja ka s…ôrmara pas Ňčga Bay akwar Mahura ma da v…ôhwa ba.
24.43: J…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya, da bay Ňčga way a s…ôra …óar masa ndaw-mayal ma da daw a way aŇčga Ňčga leley ta tava…ó na, a ney aa …óar dasi tava…ó a Ňčgene la daw? Fa da ney daa ba s…ôlak, fa da mb…ôkda ndaw-mayal Ňčga sl…ôna way aŇčga daa ba.
24.44: Maja Ňčgene, akwar may, wam vaw maaya maaya, maja yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya da v…ôhwa na, kwa ka s…ôrmara …óar a ba.¬Ľ Mey da ray ndaw ma ka sl…ôra maaya ta maaya ba (Luk 12.41-48)
24.45: ¬ęNdaw ma ka sl…ôra maaya ta leŇčgesl na, wura? Ndaw ma ka sl…ôra maaya ta leŇčgesl na, ara ndaw masa bay aŇčga ma v…ôldata ma ka sl…ôra hay c…ôpa asi har aŇčga amba a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey daa masa may fa catar.
24.46: Da masa bay aŇčga ha, a sawa a h…ôtfar aŇčga fa ka sl…ôra ha na, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra ha aa s…ômey la.
24.47: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, bay aŇčga ha, a da v…ôldara zleley aŇčga hay c…ôpa a har aŇčga amba a n…ôkfar dey.
24.48: Ama da ndaw ma ka sl…ôra ha aŇčga maaya ba na, a da ley mewulkey wal, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw aha, fa da v…ôhwa gweegwe daa ba.‚ÄĚ
24.49: Anda ke…óe, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra ha, a zlar Ňčga k…ô…óta mandala aŇčga hay masa ata ma kam sl…ôra bama. A da z…ômey cek, a da sey wuzam ta nd…ôhay ma wam mandaw mandaw.
24.50: Yaw, bay aŇčga ha na, a da v…ôhwa ta pas masa ndaw ma ka sl…ôra fa wulkey da ray a daa ba, asaya, kwa fa da s…ôra ler e daa ba.
