24.51: Bay aŇčga ha, a da …ď…ôla da way aŇčga, a da s…ôrda banay anda nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew ma da s…ôram banay ta pas mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla, fete…óe a da t…ôway, asaya, a daa p…ô…óey sler.¬Ľ

25.1: Yesu a Ňčgatar mey a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa gwa Ňčga wa pas masa yah ma da v…ôhwa Ňčga wey da ray nd…ôhay na, ta me? Yaw, ya gwa Ňčga wa ta sa…ďara hay kuraw daha ma diyam ta pas meley kwakwa. A diyam Ňčga cawa ray ta zel Ňčga dam a ta tava…ó, ta pet…ôrla ata hay da har.
25.2: Sa…ďara hay zlam da wuzlah ata na, manjar leŇčgesl hay. Siya hay zlam na, ata ta leŇčgesl.
25.3: Sa…ďara hay manjar leŇčgesl hay heyey na, a lamata pet…ôrla ata hay, ama ta lam mal a har Ňčga zl…ôrey aa pet…ôrla ata hay a saya na, daa ba gway.
25.4: Ama sa…ďara hay zlam masa ta leŇčgesl heyey na, a lamata pet…ôrla ata hay, asaya, a zl…ôram mal aa kwalaba hay.
25.5: Zel Ňčga dam aha ta wuswa fiyaw daa ba. Anda ke…óe, sa…ďara hay heyey a g…ôram Ňčga s…ôkwmara haa …óar a katar, a nam.
25.6: ¬ęTa wuzlah-tava…ó na, …óay a c…ônwa ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúZel Ňčga dam ta wuswa cay, diyam ta cadam…ôrwa ray.‚ÄĚ
25.7: Da ray Ňčgene, sa…ďara hay kaa heyey a sl…ôk…óam daa …óar, a …óiymata pet…ôrla ata hay.
25.8: Sa…ďara hay manjar leŇčgesl hay heyey na, a l…ôvmatar a sa…ďara hay masa ta leŇčgesl hay: ‚ÄúAmbahw, v…ôlmandar mal may taw. Pet…ôrla ala hay fa m…ôcam maja mal daa saba.‚ÄĚ
25.9: Sa…ďara hay a, a mb…ô…ódamatara, a l…ôvmatar: ‚ÄúKay! ya v…ôldamara ba, maja mal ala fa da wusndakwar al…ôkwa c…ôpa daa ba. Diyam ta h…ô…ókamawa fa nd…ôhay ma h…ô…ókada mal.‚ÄĚ
25.10: ¬ęMasa ata ma diyam sem Ňčga s…ôpwa mal heyey na, zel Ňčga dam heyey, a wuswa d…ô…ďa. Sa…ďara hay siya zlam masa ma…óiytakaya vaw heyey na, a mb…ôzam bama Ňčga key gwagway. Ta‚Äô, a g…ôrcamara mey-slam.
25.11: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha, sa…ďara hay zlam manjar leŇčgesl heyey, a wusmawa, a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúBay ala, Bay ala, wurndara mey-mbew may taw!‚ÄĚ
25.12: Ama zel Ňčga dam heyey, a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ya s…ôrkwar ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
25.13: Yaw, Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, wam vaw, maja yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ma da v…ôhwa na, ka s…ôrmara kwa …óar a ba, kwa ler e ba.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey da ray nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra maaya ta maaya ba (Luk 19.11-27)
25.14: Yesu aa guzltar mey-meŇčgey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMa da v…ôhwa a…óaw a b…ôla na, aŇčga letek anda ndaw masa-zleley ma daw a m…ôlak. Masa fa da daw na, a z…ôlta nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay, a v…ôldatara zleley aŇčga amba a n…ôkfamar dey.
25.15: A v…ôlar gabal temere zlam a ndaw pal, a v…ôlar gabal temere cew a ndaw laŇčgar, a v…ôlar gabal temere pal a ndaw laŇčgar saya. A v…ôldatara na, t…ô…óe ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga ndaw a, Ňčga ndaw a. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a daw a m…ôlak.
25.16: Ndaw masa ma h…ôtey gabal temere zlam heyey na, a daw wure wure Ňčgene, a kada filaw ta dala ha. A h…ôtey gabal temere zlam mekele a dey a.
25.17: Ndaw masa ma h…ôtey gabal temere cew heyey na, a ka k…ône may. A h…ôtey gabal temere cew a dey a.
25.18: Ama ndaw masa ma h…ôtey gabal temere pal na, a daw ta‚Äô, a zl…ô…óey v…ôge…ó, a …ďada dala Ňčga bay aŇčga ha a hwa…ó a.
25.19: ¬ęMenjey ga fa d…ô…ďa ha, bay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra ha, a v…ôhwa da m…ôlak a, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata da ray dala ha heyey.
25.20: Ndaw masa ma h…ôtey gabal temere zlam heyey, a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a, ta gabal temere zlam mekele da dey a, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw, kah ta v…ôlya gabal temere zlam la. N…ôka, yah ma h…ôtey gabal temere zlam mekele la a dey a.‚ÄĚ
25.21: Bay aŇčga, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúMaaya, kah ndaw ma ka sl…ôra maaya ta c…ôve…ó e. Kah ma key sl…ôra ta c…ôve…ó e la ta cek mec…ôhe. Ya da v…ôldatakawa cek a…óaw hay maaya ga asi har akah. Sawa, njakwa cew e, sas…ômkwa.‚ÄĚ
25.22: ¬ęNdaw masa ma h…ôtey gabal temere cew, a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a may, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw, ka ta v…ôlya gabal temere cew la, n…ôka, ya ta h…ôtey gabal temere cew mekele la a dey a.‚ÄĚ
25.23: Bay aŇčga ha, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúMaaya, kah ndaw ma ka sl…ôra maaya ta c…ôve…ó e. Ka ta key sl…ôra la ta c…ôve…ó e ta cek mec…ôhe. Ya da v…ôldatakawa cek a…óaw hay maaya ga asi har akah. Sawa, njakwa cew e, sas…ômkwa.‚ÄĚ
25.24: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw masa ma h…ôtey gabal temere pal heyey, a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw, ya s…ôra, kah ndaw ma s…ôrey dey-ceceh fa ndaw ba, ka Ňčg…ômey daw daa slam masa kah ma sl…ôka ba, asaya, ka kawa cek da ley daa slam masa kah ma r…ôva ba.
25.25: Ya ta zlurey la ta kah, anda ke…óe, ta‚Äô, ya daw ya …ďada dala akah aa v…ôge…ó. Dala ha aŇčga ke…óe, ehe t…ô…ďa cek akah.‚ÄĚ
25.26: Bay aŇčga ha, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúKah ndaw ma ka sl…ôra maaya ba, masa-maya…ó! Ka s…ôra yah ndaw ma Ňčg…ômey daw daa slam masa yah ma sl…ôka ba, asaya, ya kawa cek da ley daa slam masa yah ma r…ôva ba,
25.27: anda ke…óe, ka gwa ka v…ôlda dala a…óaw a har nd…ôhay amba daa mav…ôhwa a…óaw ke…óe na, a v…ôhdamiwa dala ha ta yam a, ba daw?‚ÄĚ
25.28: ¬ęDa ray Ňčgene, ndaw masa-zleley a, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay mekele: ‚ÄúT…ô…ďmara gabal temere he, v…ôldamara a ndaw masa ma h…ôtey gabal temere zlam a dey a heyey.
25.29: S…ôrmara, ndaw masa cek aŇčga daha, a da v…ôlmar a dey a, ama ndaw masa cek aŇčga kuset k…ô…óey na, a da t…ô…ďmara kwa masa kuset k…ô…óey a Ňčgene.
25.30: Ndaw ma ka sl…ôra ke…óe na, aŇčga ndaw masa maya…ó Ňčga tede, hazakadamara aa ambaw, aa l…ôvaŇč. Fete…óe, a da t…ôway, asaya, a daa p…ô…óey sler.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Mey da ray mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla
25.31: Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay saya a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMasa yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ma da v…ôhwa daa mewe…óey a…óaw na, ya da samawa ta maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya da va…ó. Ya da njey aa slam a…óaw menjey maaya Ňčga key sariya.
25.32: S…ôkway hay tabiya da b…ôla, a da kusam fa mey a…óaw. Ya da Ňčg…ôwta nd…ôhay maaya ta maaya ba hay wal wal anda ndaw-mec…ôkwer ma Ňčg…ôwey t…ô…ďaŇč hay ta …óahway.
25.33: Ya da pata nd…ôhay maaya ta har-z…ômay, nd…ôhay maaya ba ta har-gula.
25.34: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha, yah bay, ya da l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ta har-z…ômay: ‚ÄúAkwar nd…ôhay masa Papay ma p…ôskwar mey, slam ma…óiykaya Ňčgada akwar daha d…ôga mezley Ňčga b…ôla, samawa, njakwa bama ta Gazlavay Ňčga s…ôrmataw,
25.35: maja may ta caya la, akwar ta v…ôlmaya cek mez…ômey la, yam ta kaya la, akwar ta v…ôlmaya yam Ňčga sey la, ya ta daw la fa akwar anda ndaw-m…ôlak, akwar ta t…ô…ďmaya la a way akwar hay,
25.36: zana fa vaw a…óaw daa ba, akwar ta v…ôlmaya zana la. Vaw ta caya la, akwar ta samawa la Ňčga n…ôkmaya. Yah daa f…ôrs…ône, akwar ta samawa la Ňčga n…ôkmaya.‚ÄĚ
25.37: ¬ęDa ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay maaya heyey, a da mb…ô…ódamiwa, a l…ôvmaya: ‚ÄúBay mahura, ya h…ôtmaka may fa caka, ta‚Äô, ya v…ôlmaka cek mez…ômey na, Ňčga vara? Ya h…ôtmaka yam fa kaka, ta‚Äô, ya v…ôlmaka yam Ňčga sey na, Ňčga vara?
25.38: Ya h…ôtmaka kah ndaw-m…ôlak, ta‚Äô, ya t…ô…ďmaka a way ala hay na, Ňčga vara? Da daa ba, ya h…ôtmaka zana fa vaw daa ba, ta‚Äô, ya v…ôlmaka zana na, Ňčga vara?
25.39: Asaya, ya h…ôtmaka vaw fa caka, da daa ba, kah daa f…ôrs…ône, ta‚Äô, ya n…ôkmakawa na, Ňčga vara?‚ÄĚ
25.40: ¬ęYah, bay, ya da mb…ô…ódatara, ya l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, cek hay tabiya masa akwar ma kamara Ňčgada kwa waawa, kwa Ňčgada nd…ôhay mec…ôhe hay dasi nd…ôhay a…óaw hay ke…óe, ka kamara Ňčgene na, Ňčgada yah may.‚ÄĚ
25.41: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha, ya daa guzltar a nd…ôhay ta har-gula, ya l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúAkwar masa Bay Gazlavay ta n…ôskwar sem, Ňčg…ôcham la da cakay a…óaw. Diyam aa awaw mend…ôvey ba ma…óiykaya Ňčgada bay-malula ta maslaŇč aŇčga hay.
25.42: Maja may ta caya la, ama akwar ta v…ôlmaya cek mez…ômey daa ba. Yam ta kaya la, ama akwar ta v…ôlmaya yam Ňčga sey daa ba.
25.43: Ya ta daw la fa akwar anda ndaw-m…ôlak, ama akwar ta t…ô…ďmaya a way akwar hay daa ba. Zana fa vaw a…óaw daa ba, ama akwar ta v…ôlmaya zana daa ba. Vaw ta caya la, asaya, yah daa f…ôrs…ône, ama akwar ta samawa Ňčga n…ôkmaya daa ba.‚ÄĚ
25.44: ¬ęDa ray Ňčgene, a da mb…ô…ódamiwa, a l…ôvmaya: ‚ÄúBay mahura, ya h…ôtmaka may fa caka, da daa ba, yam fa kaka na, Ňčga vara? Ya h…ôtmaka kah ndaw-m…ôlak, da daa ba, zana fa vaw akah daa ba na, Ňčga vara? Asaya, ya h…ôtmaka vaw fa caka, da daa ba, kah daa f…ôrs…ône masa ala ta j…ônmaka daa ba na, Ňčga vara?‚ÄĚ
25.45: ¬ęDa ray Ňčgene, ya da mb…ô…ódatara, ya l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, cek hay masa akwar ma g…ômam Ňčga kamara Ňčgada kwa waawa, kwa Ňčgada nd…ôhay mec…ôhe hay dasi nd…ôhay a…óaw hay ke…óe ba na, ka g…ômam Ňčga kamara ba Ňčgene na, ara Ňčgada yah may.‚ÄĚ
25.46: ¬ęYaw, nd…ôhay maaya ba hay anda Ňčgene na, a da s…ôram banay Ňčga s…ôrmataw, ama nd…ôhay masa maaya fa Gazlavay na, a da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba.¬Ľ

26.1: Masa Yesu ma nd…ôvda mees…ôrkedey hay a ke…óe tabiya cay na, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar:
26.2: ¬ęKa s…ôrmara, mend…ôrey …óar cew Ňčga wusey fa gwagway Ňčga *Pak, ba diya? Ta pas a Ňčgene, a da k…ôrzamaya yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a da d…ôrmaya fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya.¬Ľ
26.3: Ta pas a Ňčgene, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay a kusam a way Kayif, *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay c…ôpa.
26.4: A slam yawa da wuzlah ata amba a k…ôrzamara Yesu ta mayal a Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay.
26.5: Aa guzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa gwakwa Ňčga k…ôrzakwa daa gwagway ke…óe ba, maja nd…ôhay a da yam mey.¬Ľ Ňägwas a mb…ô…óar …ď…ôrdey fa ray Ňčga Yesu (Mark 14.3-9; JaŇč 12.1-8)
26.6: Daa Ňčgene, Yesu aa da Betani da way *SimaŇčw, ndaw masa aa ma mb…ôlda daa maas…ôkula.
26.7: Masa Yesu a, fa z…ômey …óaf na, Ňčgwas daha a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a ta kwalaba Ňčga aŇčgwa maav…ôrkwakaya mez…ôley ¬ę*albaat…ôra¬Ľ. Kwalaba ha mar…ôhkaya ta …ď…ôrdey mezey maaya ma h…ô…ókey ba. Ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódara …ď…ôrdey a fa ray Ňčga Yesu.
26.8: Masa *gula hay Ňčga Yesu ma h…ôtmar na, a cam mevel, a l…ôvam da wuzlah ata: ¬ęA n…ôsa …ď…ôrdey a ke…óe Ňčga tede na, maja me?
26.9: Anja a h…ô…ókada na, a gwa Ňčga h…ôtey dala ga. Fa d…ô…ďa ha a wunkatara dala ha a masa-viya hay, ba daw?¬Ľ
26.10: Yesu a s…ôra mewulkey ata ha, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa h…ô…ďmar ray a Ňčgwas aha na, maja me? Sl…ôra masa aŇčga ma kayawa ke…óe na, aŇčga maaya,
26.11: maja nd…ôhay masa-viya hay na, mandaw mandaw akwar bama. Ama yah na, akwar fa da h…ôtmaya Ňčga njey mandaw mandaw ta akwar daa ba.
26.12: Ňägwas aha, a mb…ô…óda …ď…ôrdey fa vaw a…óaw na, a key Ňčgene, a …óiyawa vaw a…óaw Ňčgadaa c…ôvay.
26.13: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, kwa daa wura daa wura da b…ôla tabiya, nd…ôhay ma da wuzdamara *Mey-maaya-mawiya na, a kadamara cek masa Ňčgwas a ma ka ke…óe la may, amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrfadamara Ňčgwas aha.¬Ľ Juda a v…ôlda Yesu a har masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay (Mark 14.10, 11; Luk 22.3-6)
26.14: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw pal da wuzlah *gula hay Ňčga Yesu kuraw a ray a cew mez…ôley Juda Iskariyawt, a daw fa *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay.
26.15: Ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa ya ta v…ôldakwara Yesu a har akwar la na, ka da v…ôlmaya me?¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a m…ôslmar …ď…ôrey hay kwakwar maakar Ňčga dala, a v…ôldamara.
26.16: D…ôga ta pas a Ňčgene, Juda a daw a s…ôpey c…ôve…ó amba a k…ôrzatara Yesu, a v…ôldatara. Yesu a z…ômam …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak ta gula aŇčga hay (Mark 14.12-21; Luk 22.7-13, 21-23; JaŇč 13.21-30)
26.17: Ta …óar Ňčgeeme Ňčga *gwagway Ňčga peŇč manjar cek ma h…ôsla da hwa…ó a na, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu, a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKa wu…óey ya diyam, ya …óiym…ôrwa slam amba ya z…ômkwa …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga *Pak na, dama?¬Ľ
26.18: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem fa ndaw daha. Ka l…ôvmar na, ‚ÄúBay ala a l…ôvey: ∆äar a…óaw gweegwe cay a wuswa. Ya wu…óey Ňčga key gwagway Ňčga Pak ta gula a…óaw hay na, da way akah.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
26.19: Gula hay Ňčga Yesu heyey a kamara anda Yesu ma l…ôvtar. Anda ke…óe, a …óiymara cek Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak a d…ô…ďa.
26.20: Taa kwa…ó a Ňčgene, Yesu a njam ta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew Ňčga z…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway a.
26.21: Daa masa ata fa z…ômamara …óaf a na, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar a v…ôldaya la a har nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…ómaya vagay.¬Ľ
26.22: Mey a ke…óe a m…ôctar vaw kwa ara mey ba a gula aŇčga hay a. Da ray Ňčgene, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu pal pal, a l…ôvam: ¬ęBay Mahura, ara yah ma da v…ôldaka ba, ba diya?¬Ľ
26.23: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMa da v…ôldaya a har nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…ómaya vagay na, ara ndaw masa al…ôkwa fa z…ômkwa …óaf bama daa slam a ke…óe.
26.24: Ahaw, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, ya m…ôcey la anda mey mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey. Ama banay a sawa la a ray ndaw ma da v…ôldaya a har nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…ómaya vagay a. Ňägada ndaw aha na, Ňčgama ta yam…ôrwa daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
26.25: Juda, ndaw ma da v…ôlda Yesu a har nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…ómara vagay heyey aa c…ôf…óa Yesu may, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ara yah ma da v…ôldaka daw?¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa fa kada ta mey akah Ňčgene na, kwariya?¬Ľ Mey da ray mez…ômey cek Ňčga madagway-dakw Ňčga Bay Mahura (Mark 14.22-26; Luk 22.14-20; 1 Kwarinti hay 11.23-25)
26.26: Masa ata fa z…ômam …óaf Ňčga gwagway a na, Yesu leŇč! a ley peŇč. A kar suse a Gazlavay, a wunka, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldatara a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęEhe, t…ô…ďmara, z…ômamara. Ke…óe he, ara vaw a…óaw.¬Ľ
26.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, leŇč! a ley v…ôley ta cek mesey da hwa…ó a, a kar suse a Gazlavay saya. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôldatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęEhe, samara akwar c…ôpa.
26.28: Ke…óe he, ara mambaz a…óaw. Ta fa mambaz a, Gazlavay a j…ôwey mey mawiya ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. Mambaz a, a da mb…ô…ówa maja nd…ôhay ga amba Gazlavay a mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey ata hay.
26.29: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, d…ôga wure ke…óe ya fa da sey yam Ňčga bab…ôza Ňčga wudez ma…ó…ôckaya anda ke…óe daa saba s…ôlak. Ya da sey na, si cek mawiya mekele ta pas masa al…ôkwa bama daa slam masa Papay fa wey da ray nd…ôhay da va…ó.¬Ľ
26.30: Ta‚Äô, a zlam walay Ňčga gwagway daa *P…ôsam hay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a sl…ôk…óam, a diyam aa AŇčgwa Ňčga *Awliviye. Piyer a l…ôvey fa da mb…ôkda Yesu daa ba s…ôlak (Mark 14.27-31; Luk 22.31-34; JaŇč 13.36-38)
26.31: Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDasi tava…ó ke…óe akwar c…ôpa ka da mb…ôkdamaya anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, ma l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa k…ô…óa ndaw-mec…ôkwer la vagay. T…ô…ďaŇč hay masa ma s…ôk…ôram daa slam a may, aa kwacam ray la pal pal.‚ÄĚ
26.32: Ama da yah ta sl…ôk…óawa cay daa mem…ôcey na, ya daw la teese…ó da ray akwar aa hwayak Ňčga *Galile. Ka da h…ôtfamaya fete…óe.¬Ľ
26.33: *Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKwa nd…ôhay c…ôpa a mb…ôkdamaka, ama yah na, ya fa da mb…ôkdaka daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
26.34: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvka fara fara, dasi tava…ó ke…óe, wuskwaa gwagwalak a da cey …óay na, ka ta l…ôvey cay dey maakar, ka s…ôrya ba, ka s…ôrya ba.¬Ľ
26.35: Ama Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKwa da fa da k…ô…ómaka vagay na, Ňčga k…ô…ómandakwar cew e, ya fa da l…ôvey ya s…ôrka ba na, daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ Gula hay Ňčga Yesu siya a l…ôvam k…ône may. Yesu a d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay da Gecemene (Mark 14.32-42; Luk 22.39-46)
26.36: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a wusam ta gula aŇčga hay aa slam daha mez…ôley Gecemene. Ta‚Äô, aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNjam fe…óe, yah na, ya daw la fata…óay Ňčga d…ôrwa daŇčgay a Gazlavay.¬Ľ
26.37: Ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlta ata *Piyer ta b…ôza hay Ňčga Zebede cewete. Wure Ňčgene, mevel aŇčga a …ó…ôsley, aa l…ôkey maja banay ma da sawa a ray a.
26.38: Anda ke…óe, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMewulkey fa da k…ô…óya vagay. Njam fe…óe, zaz…ôkakwa, ka da nam ba.¬Ľ
26.39: Ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôchey nek…ô…óey fa mey, a ney ta hwa…ó ta hwa…ó, ray dar! a hwayak, a d…ôrey daŇčgay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęPapay, da a key ta key na, Ňčg…ôchada banay ma da sawa a ray a…óaw ke…óe la. Ta k…ône he c…ôpa na, key anda kah ma wu…óey, ba na, anda yah ma wu…óey ba.¬Ľ
26.40: Cay, ta‚Äô, a v…ôhwa fa gula aŇčga hay maakar heyey, a h…ôtfatar manatakaya daa …óar. Aa guzlar a Piyer, a l…ôvar: ¬ęHaya! Ka gwamara Ňčgaa z…ôkam ta yah kwa ler pal ba gway daw?
26.41: Zaz…ôkam, ka da nam ba, d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay Ňčga j…ônkwar amba cek a batakwar Ňčga key meb…ôrey ba. Mevel akwar na, a wu…óey Ňčga key cek maaya, ama vaw akwar na, aŇčga ta b…ôle.¬Ľ
26.42: Yesu a Ňčg…ôchey Ňčga dey cew saya, ta‚Äô, a d…ôrey daŇčgay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęPapay, da ka wu…óey Ňčga Ňčg…ôchada banay a ke…óe d…ôreŇč ta yah ba, si a sawa a ray a…óaw c…ôma na, ka anda kah ma wu…óey.¬Ľ
26.43: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a v…ôhwa fa gula aŇčga hay maakar heyey saya, a h…ôtfatar manatakaya c…ôŇčga maja …óar fa latar mey kalah.
26.44: Anda ke…óe, Yesu ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkdata, a Ňčg…ôchey saya, a d…ôrey daŇčgay Ňčga dey maakar, aa guzley mey letek anda aa ma d…ôrey daŇčgay Ňčga dey cew heyey.
26.45: Fa d…ô…ďa ha ta‚Äô, a v…ôhwa fa gula aŇčga hay heyey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęHaa wure ke…óe, akwar fa nam, fa m…ôskam vaw c…ôŇčga daw? Ehe …óar a ta wuswa cay amba a v…ôldamaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a har nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey.
26.46: N…ôkmara ndaw ma da v…ôldaya a har nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay fa sawa katay. Lacam, nakwa ta cadakwa ray.¬Ľ A k…ôrzamara Yesu (Mark 14.43-50; Luk 22.47-53; JaŇč 18.3-12)
26.47: Masa Yesu ta nd…ôvda meeguzley daa ba araŇč na, Juda, ndaw pal dasi gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew heyey, a wuswa. Juda ha a samawa na, ta nd…ôhay ga ta d…ôlaw hay da cakay, ta zlanday hay da har. Ma sl…ôrdamat…ôrwa nd…ôhay a na, ara bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas ta mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay.
26.48: Juda, ndaw masa ma da v…ôlda Yesu a har nd…ôhay, ta wuswa fa Yesu daa ba araŇč na, aa guzltar a nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw masa yah ma da car har anda mandala a…óaw fara fara na, ara aŇčga, k…ôrzamara.¬Ľ
26.49: Masa Juda ma wusey la gweegwe ta Yesu na, wure wure Ňčgene, a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, zay daw?¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a car har anda aa ma l…ôvey heyey.
26.50: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęJam a…óaw, ka sl…ôra masa kah ma wu…óey Ňčga ka.¬Ľ Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay ma samawa ta ata Juda heyey a Ňčg…ôcham fa Yesu a, ta‚Äô, a k…ôrzamara.
26.51: Ndaw pal da wuzlah gula aŇčga hay masa da cakay a, a m…ô…ó…ôrwa d…ôlaw aŇčga, a Ňčg…ôma, c…ôrah! a c…ôrha sl…ômay Ňčga mad…ôrlam Ňčga ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas.
26.52: Maja Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMada d…ôlaw akah aa way a maja nd…ôhay ma k…ô…óam vaw ta d…ôlaw na, ara d…ôlaw a ma da k…ô…óta vagay.
26.53: Ka s…ôra, da ya wu…óey na, ya gwa Ňčgaa c…ôf…óa Papay Ňčga sl…ôrya maslaŇč aŇčga hay ga a f…ôna gabal kuraw a ray a cew Ňčga j…ônya, ba daw?
26.54: Ama da ya ka k…ône na, mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya a da key fara fara na, kwara d…ô…ďa wura? Maja mey a mawuzlalakaya, a l…ôvey si cek aha a key k…ône.¬Ľ
26.55: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu aa guzltar a nd…ôhay makustakaya fete…óe, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa samawa Ňčga k…ôrzamaya ta d…ôlaw, ta zlanday faa har faa har anda yah ndaw-mayal na, maja me? Mandaw mandaw yah manjakaya daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ya faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay, ama ka ta k…ôrzamaya daa ba.
26.56: Ama daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya na, nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay taa guzlam la da ray cek ma da key da ray a…óaw. Ara maja Ňčgene si cek aha a key c…ôpa.¬Ľ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, gula aŇčga hay c…ôpa a zluram, a mb…ôkdamara Yesu, a hwam. Yesu fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay (Mark 14.53-65; Luk 22.54, 55, 63-71; JaŇč 18.13, 14, 19-24)
26.57: Nd…ôhay ma k…ôrzamara Yesu heyey, ta‚Äô, a handamara a way Kayif, *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. *Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay makustakaya fete…óe.
26.58: *Piyer na, fa s…ôpa Yesu ta meed…ôreŇč e. A daw haa a mb…ôzey a palah-way Ňčga ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey. Ta‚Äô, a njam ta nd…ôhay ma j…ô…óa way a, amba a n…ôka cek masa ata ma da kamar a Yesu.
26.59: *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay mahura hay mekele masa ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay tabiya, a s…ôpam dabaray Ňčga mb…ôrzlafamar a ray Yesu amba a k…ô…ómara vagay.
26.60: Kwa nd…ôhay ga ta mb…ôrzlafamar la a ray Yesu, ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ta h…ôtam mey t…ô…óe Ňčga k…ô…ómara vagay daa ba. Fa d…ô…ďa ha na, nd…ôhay cew daha a samawa fa mey ata, a mb…ôrzlafamar a ray a, a l…ôvam:
26.61: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa gwa Ňčga b…ôzla *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, …óar maakar na, ya l…ôma la aa slam a.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
26.62: *Ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a sl…ôk…óey, aa guzlar a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa mb…ô…ódatara a nd…ôhay maa guzlam da ray akah kaa ba gway daw?¬Ľ
26.63: Ama Yesu manjakaya teete. Ta‚Äô, ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey a l…ôvar saya: ¬ęYa faa c…ôf…óaka ta mez…ôley Ňčga Gazlavay masa aa ta dey, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay heyey na, ara kah daw? Wuzdiwa! Kah na, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay daw? Mbe…óey amba ka kadiwa fara fara.¬Ľ
26.64: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa fa kada ta mey akah Ňčgene na, kwariya? Ama ya fa l…ôvkwar, d…ôga wure ke…óe, ka da h…ôtmaya yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, manjakaya ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay Mawaca-waca. Asaya, ka h…ôtmaya la ya fa sawa da ray mekwtene da va…ó.¬Ľ
26.65: Maja Ňčgene, ndaw mahura ha Ňčgar! Ňčgar! a Ňčg…ôrta zana aŇčga hay, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ę‚ÄôAs! ‚ÄôAs! Ta pa ray aŇčga sem Ňčga Gazlavay, akwar ta c…ôndamara la, ba diya? Wure ke…óe, kwa ya s…ôpkwa ndaw Ňčgaa guzlndakwar da ray a saba.
26.66: Kaa wure ke…óe, ka wulkam kwara?¬Ľ Nd…ôhay da cakay a, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAŇčga ta key meb…ôrey sem, si mek…ô…óey aŇčga vagay.¬Ľ
26.67: Nd…ôhay siya a c…ôrmar meesle…ď aa dey, a d…ôvmar mek…ô…óey, siya hay may, a v…ôlmar matapa-har ,
26.68: a l…ôvmar: ¬ęDa kah *K…ôriste na, s…ôra ma k…ô…óka ke…óe na, wa? Wuzdandara cey!¬Ľ Piyer a l…ôvey a s…ôra Yesu ba (Mark 14.66-72; Luk 22.56-62; JaŇč 18.15-18, 25-27)
26.69: Daa Ňčgene, *Piyer manjakaya da palah-way Ňčga ndaw mahura ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey. Dam ma ka sl…ôra fete…óe daha, a Ňčg…ôchawa a cakay a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, gula Ňčga Yesu, ndaw *Galile may, ba diya?¬Ľ
26.70: Ama Piyer a cada mey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKay! Ya s…ôra mey masa kah ma wu…óey Ňčgaa guzley ba!¬Ľ
26.71: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a daw fa mey-mbew Ňčga way a. Dam ma ka sl…ôra mekele daha saya, a h…ôtar Piyer, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar a nd…ôhay fete…óe, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe ara ndaw Ňčga Yesu, ndaw *Nezeret.¬Ľ
26.72: Piyer a cada mey saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa mbe…óey, fara fara, ya s…ôra ndaw a ba.¬Ľ
26.73: Fa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey saya, nd…ôhay masa fete…óe a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay Piyer, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęFara fara kah na, kah ndaw da wuzlah nd…ôhay aŇčga hay maja meeguzley akah kaa na, anda ndaw daa hwayak aŇčga.¬Ľ
26.74: Da ray Ňčgene, Piyer ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa mbe…óey, fara fara ya s…ôra ndaw a ba. Da ya mb…ôrzley na, Gazlavay Ňčga mb…ô…óya ray!¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene, gwagwalak ta‚Äô, a cey …óay.
26.75: Piyer a s…ôrfada mey masa Yesu maa guzlar zleezle heyey d…ô…ďa. Mey a, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWuskwaa gwagwalak a da cey …óay na, ka ta l…ôvey cay dey maakar ka s…ôrya ba, ka s…ôrya ba.¬Ľ Piyer ta‚Äô, a bawa aa ambaw, a t…ôway ga, a z…ôley marava.

27.1: P…ôrek p…ôrek, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya, leŇč mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay a slam yawa daa slam a Ňčga k…ô…óey Yesu vagay.
27.2: A j…ôwmara, a handamara fa Pilat, ndaw Rawma ma wa hwayak ata. Mey da ray mem…ôcey Ňčga Juda (SNM 1.18, 19)
27.3: Juda, ndaw ma v…ôlda Yesu asi har Ňčga masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay heyey, a c…ônda fa da k…ô…ómara Yesu vagay na, a z…ôley marava. Da ray Ňčgene, a handatara …ď…ôrey hay kwakwar maakar Ňčga dala heyey a *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay.
27.4: A l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa ta key meb…ôrey la maja yah ma v…ôlda ndaw masa ta zay da mey Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay.¬Ľ Ama nd…ôhay a, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęŇägene na, ara mey akah ba na! Ma h…ôtfandar me?¬Ľ
27.5: Da ray Ňčgene, aa kwacada dala heyey aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Ta‚Äô, a daw a l…ôwa ray aŇčga, pam! a m…ôcey.
27.6: *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, a g…ô…ómamara dala ha. Aa guzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKwakwas al…ôkwa, a v…ôlndakwar c…ôve…ó amba dala ke…óe, a c…ômey ta zleley mav…ôldakaya Ňčga key sl…ôra daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ba, maja ara dala Ňčga mek…ô…óey ndaw vagay.¬Ľ
27.7: A slam yawa da wuzlah ata da ray dala ha. Ta‚Äô, a h…ô…ókam ley Ňčga ndaw mel…ômey maŇčgayak daha ta dala ha. A t…ôrdamara ley a Ňčga c…ôvay Ňčga m…ôlak hay ma m…ôcam fete…óe.
27.8: Ara maja ata ma h…ô…ókamara ley a Ňčgene ta dala Ňčga ray Ňčga ndaw na, haa wure ke…óe, nd…ôhay fa z…ôlmara ley a: ¬ęley Ňčga mambaz.¬Ľ
27.9: Cek aha, ta key la anda Jeremey, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley zleezle, a l…ôvey: ¬ęA lam …ď…ôrey hay kwakwar maakar Ňčga dala masa nd…ôhay da wuzlah nd…ôhay *Israyel hay ma pamara t…ô…óe fa ray Ňčga ndaw.
27.10: A v…ôldamara dala ha Ňčga h…ô…ókey ley Ňčga ndaw mel…ômey maŇčgayak anda Bay Gazlavay ma l…ôvya.¬Ľ Yesu fa mey Ňčga Bay Pilat (Mark 15.2-15; Luk 23.2-5, 13-25; JaŇč 18.28‚Äď19.16)
27.11: A lacadamara Yesu fa mey Ňčga Bay Pilat. Bay a, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, bay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay fara daw?¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAnda kah ma l…ôvey.¬Ľ
27.12: Daa masa *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay heyey faa d…ô…ófamar mey na, kwa Yesu ta mb…ô…ódatara daa ba.
27.13: Da ray Ňčgene, Pilat aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa fa c…ônda mey hay maaya ba c…ôpa masa ata maa guzldamara da ray akah ke…óe, ba diya?¬Ľ
27.14: Kwa Yesu a mb…ô…ódara ba s…ôlak. Anda ke…óe, Bay Pilat a r…ôzley ga maja.
27.15: Fa mevey a, fa mevey a, ta gwagway Ňčga *Pak na, bay daa hwayak a, fa p…ôskey ndaw pal daa f…ôrs…ône. A p…ôskey na, ndaw masa nd…ôhay makustakaya ma wu…óam.
27.16: Daa Ňčgene, ndaw daa f…ôrs…ône daha, nd…ôhay tabiya a s…ôrmara ara ndaw maaya ba. Mez…ôley Ňčga ndaw a na, Yesu Barabas.
27.17: Pilat aa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay makustakaya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wu…óam ya p…ôskakwar na, Yesu Barabas daw, da daa ba, Yesu, ndaw masa ata ma z…ôlmara *K…ôriste heyey daw?¬Ľ
27.18: Pilat a s…ôra a handam…ôrwa Yesu fa mey aŇčga na, maja s…ôleŇč fa katar da ray Yesu a.
27.19: Daa masa Bay Pilat manjakaya daa slam mekey sariya na, Ňčgwas aŇčga, a sl…ôrwa fa aŇčga, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da kar cek a ndaw Ňčgene ba, maja ara ndaw masa ta zay da mey. Ya s…ôra maja dasi tava…ó ke…óe, mes…ôfney ta kaya la ta ndaw aha. Mes…ôfney a, ta laya mey la.¬Ľ
27.20: *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay heyey, a h…ôldamata nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey Ňčgaa c…ôf…óamara Bay Pilat amba a p…ôskatara Barabas, ama Yesu na, a k…ô…ómara vagay.
27.21: Bay Pilat aa c…ôf…óata saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDasi nd…ôhay cew ke…óe na, ka wu…óam ya p…ôskakwar na, wa?¬Ľ Nd…ôhay makustakaya ha, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBarabas! Barabas!¬Ľ
27.22: Pilat aa c…ôf…óata saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKaa Yesu ndaw ma z…ôlmara K…ôriste na, ya da kada na, kwara?¬Ľ Nd…ôhay tabiya a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęD…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya!¬Ľ
27.23: Pilat aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek maaya ba masa aŇčga ma key na, wura?¬Ľ Ama a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč saya, a l…ôvam: ¬ęD…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya!¬Ľ
27.24: Masa Pilat ma n…ôka kwa a gwa Ňčga key meeme da ray mey a ba, asaya, masa aŇčga ma n…ôka nd…ôhay fa kam baazlam ta g…ôdaŇč, ta g…ôdaŇč na, ta‚Äô, a kawa yam, a p…ôra har aŇčga fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay makustakaya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa akwar ta k…ô…ómara ndaw ke…óe la vagay na, mey a…óaw da hwa…ó a daa ba. Ara mey akwar!¬Ľ
27.25: Nd…ôhay makustakaya tabiya a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAnja ndaw a Ňčga m…ôcey. Mey a Ňčga sawa a ray ala ta b…ôz ala hay tabiya!¬Ľ
27.26: Anda ke…óe, ta‚Äô, Pilat a p…ôskatara Barabas daa f…ôrs…ône. Ama Yesu na, Pilat a l…ôvtar a sewje hay Ňčga sl…ô…ómara ta laway, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldatara amba a d…ôrmara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya. Sewje hay aa saŇčg…ôram a ray Yesu (Mark 15.16-20; JaŇč 19.2-3)
27.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, sewje hay Ňčga Bay Pilat, a handamara Yesu a palah-way Ňčga Bay aha. Ta‚Äô, a z…ôlmat…ôrwa sewje hay siya fete…óe tabiya a cakay a.
27.28: A c…ôkwmata zana aŇčga hay fa vaw, ta‚Äô, a k…ôzlmar zana Ňčga bay hay magaza.
27.29: Ta‚Äô, a cam hatak, a pa…óamar ray ta aŇčga anda gursaw Ňčga bay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a v…ôlmar daŇčgwar Ňčga bay hay a har-z…ômay. A ragadam fa mey aŇčga, aa saŇčg…ôram a ray a, a l…ôvam: ¬ęZay daw, bay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay?¬Ľ
27.30: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a t…ôfmar meesle…ď fa vaw, ta‚Äô, a t…ô…ďmara daŇčgwar heyey, a k…ô…ómara aa ray ta aŇčga.
27.31: Masa ata maa saŇčg…ôram cay a ray a na, a c…ôkwmara zana magaza heyey fa vaw, a k…ôzlmar zana aŇčga hay. Ta‚Äô, a badamara daa berney a, a handamara Ňčga d…ôrey fa hwadam. A d…ôrmara Yesu fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya (Mark 15.21-32; Luk 23.26-43; JaŇč 19.17-27)
27.32: Masa sewje hay a, fa handamara Yesu na, a cam ray ta ndaw daa berney Ňčga Siren daha, mez…ôley *SimaŇčw. A t…ôkmar …óay a SimaŇčw heyey Ňčga la hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya Ňčga Yesu a.
27.33: A wusam aa slam mez…ôley Gwalgwata, anda mel…ôvey, ¬ęslam anda tetesl Ňčga ray Ňčga ndaw.¬Ľ
27.34: Fete…óe, a v…ôlmar wuzam majaha…óakaya ta slalak mee…ó…ôwek e. Yesu aa c…ôka, ama a g…ômey Ňčga sa ba.
27.35: Ta‚Äô, a d…ôrmara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya heyey. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a k…ô…óam caca Ňčga wunkey zana aŇčga hay.
27.36: Ta‚Äô, a njam fete…óe Ňčga j…ô…ómara.
27.37: A wuzlalam mey fa hwadam, a sl…ôpmara ta da ray Yesu fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya. Ara mey masa ata ma k…ô…ómara vagay maja. Mey a, a l…ôvey: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe na, ara Yesu, bay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay.¬Ľ
27.38: Daa slam masa ata ma d…ôrmara Yesu a na, ta d…ôram mayal hay cew la a cakay a, pal ta har-z…ômay, laŇčgar ta har-gula.
27.39: Nd…ôhay ma diyam taa slam a Ňčgene, aa saŇčg…ôram a ray a, a wusam ray, a c…ô…ómara,
27.40: a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKah na, ndaw ma wu…óey Ňčga b…ôzla *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay amba ka l…ôma mekele daa …óar maakar heyey, ba diya? Da kah B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay na, b…ôrŇčgawa fa hwadam a Ňčgene a hwayak, l…ôhda ray akah, d…ô…ďa taw!¬Ľ
27.41: Asaya, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz leŇč mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay aa saŇčg…ôrfamar, a l…ôvam:
27.42: ¬ęA l…ôhdata nd…ôhay siya hay na, kaa ray aŇčga na, a gwa Ňčga l…ôhda, ba daw? Da aŇčga Bay Ňčga *Israyel hay na, anja Ňčga b…ôrŇčgawa fa hwadam a wure ke…óe d…ô…ďa taw! Da ta b…ôrŇčgawa sem na, Ňčgene, ya t…ô…ďkwa mey aŇčga.
27.43: A pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara, asaya, taa guzley la, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYah na, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.‚ÄĚ Yaw, da Gazlavay fa wu…óa na, Ňčga l…ôhda wure ke…óe d…ô…ďa taw!¬Ľ
27.44: Mayal hay cew masa mad…ôrtakaya da cakay a heyey na, a c…ô…ómara k…ône may. Mem…ôcey Ňčga Yesu (Mark 15.33-41; Luk 23.44-49; JaŇč 19.28-30)
27.45: Ta wuzlah-pas, l…ôvaŇč a key daa hwayak c…ôpa. L…ôvaŇč a, a njey haa …ď…ôrey maakar Ňčga pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó.
27.46: Ta …ď…ôrey maakar a na, Yesu a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey ta mey ata: ¬ę Eli, Eli, lema sabaktani? ¬Ľ Anda mel…ôvey: ¬ęGazlavay a…óaw, Gazlavay a…óaw, ka mb…ôkdaya na, maja me?¬Ľ
27.47: Nd…ôhay siya fete…óe, a c…ôndamara mewudey Ňčga Yesu a na, a l…ôvam: ¬ęN…ôka, aŇčga fa z…ôla *Eli, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle!¬Ľ
27.48: Ndaw pal da wuzlah ata, ta‚Äô, a hway Ňčga j…ôhw…ďey cek anda gag…ômay aa yam Ňčga bab…ôza Ňčga wudez meekwerek e, ta‚Äô, a pa fa mey Ňčga zlanday. A t…ôldara a Yesu a amba a sas…ô…ďa.
27.49: Ama nd…ôhay mekele a l…ôvam: ¬ęS…ôkwakwa, amba ya n…ôkakwa da wara cay Eli a, a sawa Ňčga l…ôhda kwa.¬Ľ
27.50: Yesu a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč saya, pam! a m…ôcey.
27.51: Daa *Way Ňčga Gazlavay na, zana ma g…ôrca *Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a daha. Masa Yesu ma m…ôcey la na, zana ha, a Ňčg…ôrey cew d…ôga da va…ó kasl a hwayak. Hwiyak a wusey, b…ôler hay a b…ôzlam,
27.52: c…ôvay hay a wuram, nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay mam…ôctakaya ga, a sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey.
27.53: A bamawa daa c…ôvay. Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga Yesu na, nd…ôhay a, a diyam aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem, berney Ňčga Gazlavay. Fete…óe, nd…ôhay ga a h…ôtmatar.
27.54: Mahura Ňčga sewje hay Ňčga Rawma hay ta sewje aŇčga hay ma j…ô…ómara Yesu heyey, a h…ôtmar hwiyak ma wusey ta cek hay mekele ma kam heyey na, a zluram ga, a l…ôvam: ¬ęFara fara ndaw ke…óe na, ara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
27.55: Ňägusay ga fete…óe daha, ata fa n…ôkam dey da d…ôreŇč, da d…ôreŇč. Ňägusay a ta s…ôpmar wurzay Ňčga Yesu la d…ôga da *Galile fa j…ônmara.
27.56: Da wuzlah Ňčgusay a na, *Mari da Magdala, Mari mamaŇč Ňčga ata *Jak ta *Jawzef, leŇč mamaŇč Ňčga b…ôza hay Ňčga Zebede. A j…ôhmara vagay Ňčga Yesu (Mark 15.42-47; Luk 23.50-56; JaŇč 19.38-42)
27.57: Ta pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó a Ňčgene, ndaw masa-zleley da slala Arimate daha, mez…ôley *Jawzef, aŇčga may, ara *ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu. A wusey a *Jeruzelem.
27.58: Ta‚Äô, a daw a h…ôtfar Bay Pilat, aa c…ôf…óa vagay Ňčga Yesu. Da ray Ňčgene, Bay Pilat a, a p…ôskatar mey a sewje aŇčga hay Ňčga v…ôldamara vagay a, a Jawzef e.
27.59: A la vagay a, a zl…ôŇčga ta zana mawiya mezl…ôŇčgey vagay.
27.60: A handa vagay a, aa c…ôvay mawiya masa aŇčga maa v…ôrkwa daa aŇčgwa daa …óar hay a Ňčgene. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a g…ôdbalawa beeler mahura gazl! fa mey Ňčga c…ôvay a, ta‚Äô, a daw.
27.61: Ata *Mari da Magdala ta Mari laŇčgar daha, manjatakaya fete…óe, dey p…ôla! a mey c…ôvay a. Sewje hay Ňčga Bay Pilat a j…ô…ómara c…ôvay Ňčga Yesu
27.62: Pep…ôrek e, anda mel…ôvey ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta *Fariza hay a kusam, a diyam a way Bay Pilat,
27.63: a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Mahura, ala fa s…ôrfadamara daa masa ndaw memb…ôrzley ke…óe aŇčga ta dey na, taa guzley la, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúFa d…ô…ďa Ňčga …óar maakar na, ya sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey.‚ÄĚ
27.64: Anda ke…óe, p…ôskatar mey a sewje akah hay amba a j…ô…ómara c…ôvay a haa …óar maakar, daa ba na, gula aŇčga hay a da samawa Ňčga lalamara vagay a. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a da mb…ôrzlam, a da l…ôvam: ‚ÄúYesu ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey.‚ÄĚ Memb…ôrzley ata Ňčgene na, a da f…ôna memb…ôrzley Ňčga ndaw aha masa Ňčgeeme heyey.¬Ľ
27.65: Pilat ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódatara a nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęEhe, Ňčg…ôlmata sewje hay ke…óe, diyam j…ô…ómara c…ôvay a maaya maaya anda akwar ma wu…óam.¬Ľ
27.66: Ta‚Äô, a diyam Ňčga j…ô…ómara c…ôvay a maaya maaya. Anda ke…óe, a sl…ôr…ďamara mey Ňčga c…ôvay a maaya maaya. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a pam sewje hay Ňčga j…ô…ómara.

28.1: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, ta pas luma Ňčga Gudal, *Mari da Magdala ta Mari laŇčgar daha a diyam ta slam b…ôŇč-beŇč Ňčga n…ôkm…ôrwa c…ôvay Ňčga Yesu.
28.2: Wure wure Ňčgene hwiyak a wusey g…ô…ó-ge…ó ta g…ôdaŇč. Daa Ňčgene maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó a pawa salay, a g…ôdbala beeler mahura da mey c…ôvay heyey, a njey a ray a.
28.3: MaslaŇč a, dey aŇčga a we…óey anda var ma z…ômey, zana fa vaw aŇčga a we…óey mabara nd…ô…ó-nde…ó anda gag…ômay.
28.4: Sewje hay ma j…ô…óa c…ôvay heyey ma h…ôtmar cek aha na, a zluram ga, aa wasam p…ôr-par! a t…ô…óam a hwayak, ata anda nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya.
28.5: Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay heyey aa guzltar a Ňčgusay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar na, ka da zluram ba, ya s…ôra ka s…ôpam na, Yesu, ndaw masa ata ma d…ôrmara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya heyey.
28.6: AŇčga fe…óe daa saba, ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey anda aŇčga maa guzley heyey. Samawa n…ôkmara slam masa ata ma pamara vagay aŇčga ha a hwa…ó a tiya!
28.7: Cay na, diyam fiyaw fiyaw, l…ôvmatar a gula aŇčga hay: ‚ÄúYesu ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey. AŇčga sem teese…ó fa mey akwar Ňčgada *Galile, ka da h…ôtfamar fete…óe.‚ÄĚ Mey a…óaw Ňčgada akwar na, ara ke…óe.¬Ľ
28.8: Ňägusay a, a mb…ôkdam…ôrwa c…ôvay a, a hwam fiyaw fiyaw Ňčga kadamatara mey a, a gula aŇčga hay heyey. Daa Ňčgene mand…ôrzay fa katar, ama faa s…ômam ga.
28.9: Ta‚Äô, Yesu heyey a daw a cadata ray, a catar har. Masa Ňčgusay a ma h…ôtmar Yesu la na, a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, a ragadamar, a k…ôrzamara fa salay.
28.10: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa zluram ba, diyam ta wuzdamatara a m…ôlma a…óaw hay siya na, Ňčga diyam a Galile. A da h…ôtmaya fete…óe.¬Ľ Mey Ňčga sewje hay ma j…ô…ómara c…ôvay
28.11: Daa masa Ňčgusay heyey ata daa c…ôve…ó araŇč na, sewje hay siya da wuzlah sewje hay ma j…ô…óa c…ôvay heyey, a v…ôham aa berney. A kadamatara cek ma key c…ôpa da mey c…ôvay heyey Ňčgada *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay.
28.12: *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas kaa heyey, ta‚Äô, a kusam ta mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, a slam yawa da wuzlah ata. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmatar dala ga Ňčgada sewje hay a,
28.13: a k…ôtmata, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęDiyam, wuzdamara a nd…ôhay, l…ôvmatar: ‚ÄúGula hay Ňčga Yesu a, ta samawa sem ta tava…ó, ta lalamara vagay a sem daa masa ala manatakaya daa …óar.‚ÄĚ
28.14: Da bay Ňčga hwayak ta c…ônda la na, ya s…ôpam c…ôve…ó la Ňčga wuzdamara mey a maaya maaya amba a t…ô…ďa. Anda ke…óe, kwa mey fa da h…ôtfakwar daa ba.¬Ľ
28.15: Ta‚Äô, sewje hay heyey d…ô…ďa, a t…ô…ďmara dala ha, a diyam a kamara anda ata ma k…ôtmata heyey. Ara maja Ňčgene haa wure ke…óe fa kadamara mey a da wuzlah J…ôwif hay c…ôŇčga. Yesu, a wuztar vaw a gula aŇčga hay (Mark 16.14-18; Luk 24.36-49; JaŇč 20.19-23; SNM 1.6-8)
28.16: Gula hay Ňčga Yesu kuraw a ray a letek a diyam a *Galile, a t…ôpam aa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa masa Yesu ma l…ôvtar Ňčga diyam a hwa…ó a heyey.
28.17: Daa masa gula hay a ma h…ôtmar Yesu la na, ta‚Äô, a ragadamar. Ama siya hay da wuzlah ata na, ta s…ôrmara ara Yesu fara fara na, daa ba.
28.18: Yesu ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay ata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęGazlavay ta v…ôldiwa g…ôdaŇč sem Ňčga wa slam da va…ó ta slam da hwayak c…ôpa.
28.19: Maja Ňčgene, diyam fa s…ôkway hay da b…ôla c…ôpa, t…ôrdamata Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay. Kamatar *baptem ta mez…ôley Ňčga Papay, ta mez…ôley a…óaw, yah B…ôzey aŇčga, leŇč ta mez…ôley Ňčga Mes…ôfney aŇčga.
28.20: Asaya, sas…ôrkadamata amba a t…ô…ďmara mey hay tabiya masa yah maa s…ôrkadakwara. Yaw, s…ôrmara, yah na, yah ta akwar mandaw mandaw haa mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla.¬Ľ

1.1: Ke…óe ara mezley Ňčga *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray *Yesu *K…ôriste, B…ôzey Ňčga *Gazlavay. JaŇč-Baptis a wuzey mey da ray masawa Ňčga Yesu (Matiye 3.1-12; Luk 3.1-18; JaŇč 1.19-28)
1.2: *Mey-maaya-mawiya ha a zley anda *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle, ma wuzlala daa …óerewel aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ¬ęGazlavay a l…ôvar a B…ôzey aŇčga, ‚ÄúEhe, ya fa sl…ôrey maslaŇč-c…ôve…ó a…óaw fa mey akah, Ňčga …óiya c…ôve…ó akah.
1.3: Ndaw fa wudey da wuzlah-ley, a l…ôvey: ∆äiymar c…ôve…ó Ňčgada Bay Mahura, …óiymara c…ôve…ó e maaya maaya d…ôr e.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
1.4: Ndaw ma t…ôla mey a na, ara *JaŇč-Baptis. Anda ke…óe, ta daw la a wuzlah-ley. Fete…óe ta katar *baptem la a nd…ôhay, ta wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay la, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, s…ôpmara Gazlavay ta mevel pal, h…ôtam baptem, amba Gazlavay a mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar.¬Ľ
1.5: Nd…ôhay ga daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem leŇč da slala hay mekele mekele masa daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude a diyam fa *JaŇč a, a wuzdamara meb…ôrey ata hay. JaŇč ta‚Äô, a katar baptem daa wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč.
1.6: JaŇč a pey fa vaw na, zana Ňčga eŇčgwec Ňčga slagwama , vaw maj…ôwkaya ta hute…ó. A z…ômey na, ayakw ta amam da ley.
1.7: Fa wuztar mey Ňčga Gazlavay a nd…ôhay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa a…óaw na, ndaw ma f…ônya a sawa la. Ya wusa Ňčga regedey fa mey aŇčga amba ya p…ôska zewe…ó Ňčga tarak aŇčga ba.
1.8: Yah na, ya kakwar baptem ta yam, ama ndaw aha na, a da kakwar baptem ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ JaŇč-Baptis a kar baptem a Yesu (Matiye 3.13‚Äď4.11; Luk 3.21, 22; 4.1-13)
1.9: Daa masa *JaŇč-Baptis fa wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta masa aŇčga fa katar *baptem a nd…ôhay na, Yesu a sl…ôk…óawa da slala *Nezeret, daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile. A wusey fa *JaŇč daa wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč heyey. JaŇč ta‚Äô, a kar baptem daa wayam a.
1.10: Masa Yesu fa bawa daa yam a na, wure Ňčgene a h…ôtar slam da va…ó fa wurey, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a pawa salay a ray a anda makurgwadakw.
1.11: A c…ônda …óay maa guzlwa da va…ó, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęKah na, B…ôzey a…óaw masa yah ma wu…óa kalah. Ya faa s…ômey ga da ray akah.¬Ľ
1.12: Wure wure Ňčgene, Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, ta‚Äô, a t…ôkar …óay a Yesu Ňčga daw a wuzlah-ley.
1.13: A njey fete…óe …óar kwakwar m…ôfa…ó, aŇčga manjakaya da wuzlah cek Ňčga ley hay. Fete…óe, *SataŇč, bay-malula, a wu…óey Ňčga bata, ama ta gwa daa ba. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč hay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a samawa Ňčga j…ônmara. Yesu a z…ôlwa gula hay m…ôfa…ó Ňčgeeme (Matiye 4.12-22; Luk 4.14, 15; 5.1-11)
1.14: Pas pal daha, Bay *Herawt a sl…ôrey sewje aŇčga hay Ňčga k…ôrzawa *JaŇč-Baptis. A k…ôrzam…ôrwa, a j…ôwmara, a k…ôzlamara aa f…ôrs…ône. Masa ata ma k…ôzlamara JaŇč-Baptis a la aa f…ôrs…ône na, Yesu ta‚Äô, a daw aa hwayak Ňčga Galile. AŇčga fa p…ôkey fete…óe, fa wuzda Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga Gazlavay a nd…ôhay,
1.15: a l…ôvtar: ¬ę∆äar masa Bay Gazlavay ma wala ta wuswa cay. Anda mel…ôvey, gweegwe cay, Gazlavay a wuzd…ôrwa bay aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, t…ô…ďmara *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga Gazlavay!¬Ľ
1.16: Yesu fa daw da mey d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile . A da n…ôkey dey na, a ray nd…ôhay cew ma k…ôrza ewet daha, ara ata SimaŇčw ta m…ôlmaha And…ôre. Ata fa k…ôrzam ewet ta tabaw daa d…ôhwa ha.
1.17: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay ata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSamawa asi a…óaw. Akwar na, nd…ôhay ma k…ôrza ewet, ama d…ôga wure ke…óe ya da t…ôrdakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay ma z…ôlwa nd…ôhay aa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Bay Gazlavay.¬Ľ
1.18: Wure Ňčgene, ata *SimaŇčw ta *And…ôre mbak! a mb…ôkdamata *tabaw ata hay, ta‚Äô, a diyam asi Yesu.
1.19: Yesu a Ňčg…ôchey daa slam aha Ňčgene nek…ô…óey na, a h…ôtatar ata *Jak ta m…ôlmaha *JaŇč, b…ôza hay Ňčga Zebede. Ata daa kwambiwal ata, fa …óiymata tabaw ata hay.
1.20: Wure Ňčgene, Yesu a z…ôlt…ôrwa. B…ôza hay a, a mb…ôkdamara papa ata Zebede manjakaya daa kwambiwal a ta nd…ôhay ma kam sl…ôra ta ata. Ta‚Äô, ata Jak ta JaŇč a diyam asi Yesu. Yesu a …ď…ôley malula da ray ndaw (Luk 4.31-37)
1.21: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a diyam a slala Kapernayum. Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, Yesu a daw aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe. Aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay, a wuztar mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa way a.
1.22: Nd…ôhay a, a r…ôzlam da ray mees…ôrkedey aŇčga ha, maja aŇčga faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay anda *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ba, ama aa s…ôrkadata ta g…ôdaŇč masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldara.
1.23: Wure wure Ňčgene, ndaw ta malula da ray daha, a mb…ôzey aa way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay a, a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey:
1.24: ¬ęYesu, ndaw *Nezeret, walay akah ta ala malula hay me? Ka sawa Ňčgaa z…ô…ódandar daw? Ya s…ôra fara fara, kah na, ndaw Ňčga Gazlavay, masa aa ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa Ňčga key sl…ôra aŇčga.¬Ľ
1.25: Yesu a bab…ôcar a malula da ray ndaw aha, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNjey teete. Bey da ray ndaw ke…óe.¬Ľ
1.26: Malula da ray ndaw a heyey, aa wasada ta g…ôdaŇč, a wudey, ta‚Äô, a bey da ray ndaw aha.
1.27: Nd…ôhay makustakaya daa way a c…ôpa, a r…ôzlam, aa c…ôf…óam vaw da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęHaya! Ara cek e me? Ara mees…ôrkey mawiya daw? Ndaw a, aa ta g…ôdaŇč, kwa aa guzltar a malula hay da ray nd…ôhay na, malula hay a, a c…ônmar mey.¬Ľ
1.28: Wure wure Ňčgene, sl…ômay Ňčga Yesu fa z…ôley kwa daa wura daa wura c…ôpa daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile a. Yesu a mb…ôley masa-macay hay ga (Matiye 8.14-17; Luk 4.38-41)
1.29: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a bey daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay da Kapernayum heyey, wure Ňčgene, a daw a way ata *SimaŇčw ta *And…ôre. Ata *Jak ta *JaŇč a l…ôgdamara .
1.30: MamaŇč Ňčga Ňčgwas Ňčga SimaŇčw, vaw fa car, manakaya, awaw fa vaw ga. Masa Yesu ma wusey la a way a na, wure Ňčgene, a kadamara macay Ňčga Ňčgwas kaa heyey a Yesu.
1.31: Yesu a mb…ôzey fa Ňčgwas aha, a k…ôrza fa har, a sl…ôk…óada. Awaw fa vaw heyey daa saba. Ňägwas aha, ta‚Äô, a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey.
1.32: Masa hakwa…ó ma key la na, nd…ôhay a handamawa masa-macay hay ga fa Yesu, asaya, a handamawa nd…ôhay ga masa ta malula da ray.
1.33: Nd…ôhay tabiya da slala ha, a kusam fa mey-mbew Ňčga way Ňčga ata SimaŇčw ta And…ôre heyey.
1.34: Yesu a mb…ôley nd…ôhay ga daa macay hay mekele mekele. Asaya, a …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay ga. A mb…ôkdata malula hay a Ňčgaa guzlam ba, maja malula hay a, a s…ôrmara Yesu na, ara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay. Yesu a wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay da slala hay mekele mekele daa hwayak Ňčga Galile (Luk 4.42-44)
1.35: Pep…ôrek e, Yesu a wuley taa p…ôrek e, a daw aa slam masa nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a daa ba, aŇčga fa d…ôrar daŇčgay a Gazlavay fete…óe.
1.36: Masa ata *SimaŇčw ta mandala aŇčga hay ta sl…ôk…óam cay daa …óar na, a h…ôtmar Yesu saba, ta‚Äô, a diyam a s…ôpmara.
1.37: Masa ata ma h…ôtfamar la na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęNd…ôhay tabiya fa s…ôpmaka.¬Ľ
1.38: Ama Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAhaw, ya s…ôra, ama nakwa la a slala hay mekele mekele masa gweegwe ta slala ha ke…óe amba ya wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay da slala hay a may, maja ma handiwa fe…óe na, ara sl…ôra ha ke…óe.¬Ľ
1.39: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a daw a slala hay c…ôpa masa daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile. A wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa way-mewuzey-mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay mekele mekele fete…óe, a …ď…ôley malula hay da ray nd…ôhay saya. Yesu a p…ôrey ndaw daa maas…ôkula (Matiye 8.1-4; Luk 5.12-16)
1.40: Yaw, ndaw-maas…ôkula daha a sawa fa Yesu. Ta‚Äô, a regedey fa mey aŇčga, a kar ambahw, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa ka wu…óey na, ka gwa Ňčga p…ôrya daa maas…ôkula a…óaw ke…óe.¬Ľ
1.41: Yesu, a s…ôrfar dey-ceceh, tal! a t…ôlda har aŇčga, a g…ôsfar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa wu…óey amba maas…ôkula akah a p…ôrey. T…ôrey ndaw map…ôrkaya d…ô…ďa!¬Ľ
1.42: Wure wure Ňčgene, maas…ôkula fa ndaw a heyey daa saba. Ndaw aha ta s…ô…óey cay.
1.43: Yesu a l…ôvar Ňčga daw a way, ama masa aŇčga ma da l…ôvar Ňčga daw a way na, ta‚Äô, a k…ôta la …óagay,
1.44: a l…ôvar: ¬ęPey leŇčgesl, ka da wuzda cek masa yah ma kakawa ke…óe kwa a ndaw ba. Ama daw fa *ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, amba a n…ôkaka. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, v…ôlar cek a Gazlavay anda *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma l…ôvey, Ňčga wuzey a nd…ôhay, maas…ôkula fa vaw akah daa saba.¬Ľ
1.45: Ama, ndaw aha ta t…ô…ďa mek…ôtey Ňčga Yesu a daa ba, ta‚Äô, a daw, a wuzdatara cek masa Yesu ma kara heyey Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa hwayak a c…ôpa. Masa aŇčga ma wuzda mey a, a nd…ôhay ga la na, maja Ňčgene, Yesu a gwa Ňčga mb…ôzey aa berney meedey nd…ôhay saba, maja nd…ôhay a da kusmawa a cakay a ga kalah. Anda ke…óe, Yesu a daw a njey da wuzlah-ley. Nd…ôhay kwa daa wura daa wura c…ôpa fa diyam fa v…ô…óa c…ôŇčga.

2.1: Masa Yesu ma lawa da wuzlah-ley heyey na, …óar nek…ô…óey fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a v…ôhwa a Kapernayum. Nd…ôhay a c…ôndamara masa aŇčga da way na,
2.2: a kusmawa ga aa way masa aŇčga da hwa…ó a, slam Ňčga njey daa way a daa ba, asaya, kwa slam Ňčga njey fa mey-mbew Ňčga way a daa ba. Fete…óe, Yesu fa wuztar mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
2.3: Nd…ôhay daha, ta‚Äô, a samawa fa aŇčga. A samawa na, a handamawa ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya, nd…ôhay m…ôfa…ó da wuzlah ata ma lam…ôrwa ndaw aha manakaya da ray …ďe…ďele.
2.4: A h…ôtam slam Ňčga handamara fa mey Ňčga Yesu ba, maja nd…ôhay ga kalah. Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a t…ôpam aa ray Ňčga way a, a wuram slam d…ôr e ta Yesu manjakaya. Ta‚Äô, a nd…ôkwdamara ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya heyey taa slam masa ata ma wurmara ha. A t…ôldamara aa way a na, ndaw aha manakaya da ray geg…ôde…ó aŇčga.
2.5: Masa Yesu ma n…ôka nd…ôhay a, fa t…ô…ďmara aŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga mb…ôlda ndaw ata na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya heyey: ¬ęB…ôz a…óaw, meb…ôrey da ray akah daa saba.¬Ľ
2.6: *Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz nek…ô…óey daha fete…óe. Ta‚Äô, a wulkam daa ray ata, a l…ôvam:
2.7: ¬ęNdaw kaa aa guzley anda ke…óe na, maja me? A pa ray aŇčga Ňčga Gazlavay na, kwara! Ma gwa Ňčga mb…ôkda meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw na, wa? Si Gazlavay pal taava aŇčga.¬Ľ
2.8: Wure Ňčgene Yesu a s…ôra mewulkey ata. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wulkam daa ray akwar anda ke…óe na, maja me?
2.9: Ya gwa ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúMeb…ôrey akah daa saba‚ÄĚ da daa ba, ya gwa ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúSl…ôk…óey, la geg…ôde…ó akah, daw ta salay akah.‚ÄĚ Dasi mey hay cewete ke…óe na, masa ta banay Ňčga l…ôvey Ňčgada yah na, wura?
2.10: Yaw, ya wu…óey ka s…ôrmara yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, yah ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga mb…ôkey meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay da b…ôla.¬Ľ Anda ke…óe, Yesu, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya heyey:
2.11: ¬ęEhe, ya fa l…ôvka: ‚ÄúSl…ôk…óey, la geg…ôde…ó akah, daw a way.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
2.12: Wure Ňčgene, ndaw aha a lecey fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, ta‚Äô, a la geg…ôde…ó aŇčga, a bey da wuzlah nd…ôhay a, a daw. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey a r…ôzlam, a h…ôlmamara Gazlavay, a l…ôvam: ¬ęD…ôga Ňčga menjey al…ôkwa, al…ôkwa ta h…ôtkwa cek anda ke…óe na, daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ Yesu a z…ôla Levi amba a s…ôpa (Matiye 9.9-13; Luk 5.27-32)
2.13: Yesu a sl…ôk…óey da slala ha, a daw Ňčgada mey d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile saya. Nd…ôhay ga a samawa fa aŇčga, ta‚Äô, Yesu aa s…ôrkadata ta mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
2.14: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a sl…ôk…óey daa slam aha, a daw a p…ôkey. Masa aŇčga fa p…ôkey na, a h…ôtar *Levi, b…ôzey Ňčga Alfe, aŇčga manjakaya fa key sl…ôra daa slam mecekeley budaw. (*J…ôwif hay fa r…ôsmata nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway ata masa ma cakala budaw Ňčga nd…ôhay Rawma.) Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęSawa, s…ôpya.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, Levi p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, a daw asiya.
2.15: Fa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey, Yesu a daw Ňčga z…ômey …óaf da way Levi a. Daa way a, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a z…ômamara …óaf a na, ta nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw ga leŇč ta nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. A z…ômam …óaf bama na, maja nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a ga fa s…ôpmar wurzay Ňčga Yesu.
2.16: Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz masa da wuzlah *Fariza hay a h…ôtmar Yesu fa z…ômam …óaf ta nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz leŇč ta nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a, a l…ôvmatar a *gula hay Ňčga Yesu: ¬ęHaya! Yesu a z…ômam …óaf ta nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw leŇč ta nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, kwara!¬Ľ
2.17: Yesu ma c…ônda mey a la na, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay masa wurwer na, mey ata ta ndaw ma v…ôlda slalak daa ba. Ama ma wu…óey mey Ňčga ndaw ma v…ôlda slalak na, si nd…ôhay masa-macay hay gway. Yaw, nd…ôhay ma wulkam ata nd…ôhay maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay ta sl…ôrdiwa Ňčga z…ôlta daa ba, ama a sl…ôrdiwa na, Ňčga z…ôley nd…ôhay masa ta meb…ôrey.¬Ľ Mey da ray mekey daliyam (Matiye 9.14-17; Luk 5.33-39)
2.18: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, gula hay Ňčga *JaŇč-Baptis leŇč *Fariza hay fa kam *daliyam. Nd…ôhay mekele, ta‚Äô, a samawa, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęGula hay Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis leŇč nd…ôhay ma s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga Fariza hay fa kam daliyam, ama gula akah hay na, a kam daliyam ba na, maja me?¬Ľ
2.19: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ndaw a z…ôlwa nd…ôhay aa mekey m…ôlak Ňčga kwakwa Ňčga z…ômey cek na, a kam daliyam ta pas Ňčgene daw? A kam daliyam ba s…ôlak maja zel-kwakwa, aŇčga da wuzlah ata. Ta pas masa zel-kwakwa aa manjakaya ta ata na, a kam daliyam ba.
2.20: Ama pas a, a sawa la masa nd…ôhay ma da k…ôrzamara zel-kwakwa ha, a h…ôtmar da wuzlah ata saba. Ta pas a Ňčgene na, a kam daliyam la.
2.21: ¬ęYaw, ndaw a …ó…ôpa zana mawiya ta zana magurma ba, maja zana mawiya ma…ó…ôpkaya na, a n…ôsa zana magurma ha la, zana ha a Ňčg…ôrey la a dey a.
2.22: Asaya, ndaw a gwa Ňčga zl…ôrey wuzam meede…óek e aa kwene-kwene magurma ba. Da a zl…ôra a hwa…ó a na, wuzam a, a m…ôsley, a Ňčg…ôra kwene-kwene he la. Anda ke…óe, wuzam a leŇč kwene-kwene he a n…ôsam la cewete. Maaya na, si ndaw a zl…ôra wuzam meede…óek e na, aa kwene-kwene mawiya.¬Ľ Yesu, aŇčga bay ma wey da ray pas mem…ôskey-vaw (Matiye 12.1-8; Luk 6.1-5)
2.23: Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw daha, Yesu a diyam ta gula aŇčga hay, ata fa diyam taa ley Ňčga cek anda daw. Masa ata fa diyam na, gula aŇčga hay a h…ô…ďam cek aha Ňčgaa mb…ô…óey.
2.24: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay *Fariza hay aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęN…ôkta gula akah hay fa kam sl…ôra ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw. Ata fa kam cek mat…ôkakaya daa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, maja me?¬Ľ
2.25: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ta jaŇčgamara daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay cek masa *Davit ma ka zleezle na, daa ba s…ôlak daw? Yaw, ta pas laŇčgar daha, Davit ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay, ata daa banay maja may fa catar, ama cek mez…ômey fa ata daa ba.
2.26: Maja Ňčgene Davit e, daa masa Abiyatar, aŇčga *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, a mb…ôzey aa way Ňčga Gazlavay, a la peŇč masa mav…ôldakaya Ňčgada Gazlavay, a z…ôma. Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a v…ôley c…ôve…ó a nd…ôhay tabiya Ňčga z…ômey peŇč e ba, si nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas gway. Ama Davit ta z…ôma peŇč e la, ta v…ôltar la Ňčgada nd…ôhay aŇčga hay may.¬Ľ
2.27: Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęGazlavay a pa pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, Ňčga key maaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay. Gazlavay a l…ômta nd…ôhay na, amba pas mem…ôskey-vaw a s…ôrdata banay ba.
2.28: Anda ke…óe, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, yah na, ndaw ma wey kwa da ray pas mem…ôskey-vaw.¬Ľ

3.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu, ta‚Äô, a v…ôhey aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay saya. Fete…óe na, ndaw har mam…ôckaya daha.
3.2: *Fariza hay a wu…óam aa d…ô…ófamar mey a ray Yesu. Da ray Ňčgene, a j…ô…ómara da a da mb…ôlda ndaw aha ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw kwa.
3.3: Yesu a l…ôvar a ndaw masa har mam…ôckaya heyey: ¬ęLecey fe…óe, fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya.¬Ľ
3.4: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwakwas al…ôkwa a l…ôvey na, kwara? Ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, al…ôkwa ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga key maaya a ndaw daw, da daa ba, Ňčga key maaya ba daw? Al…ôkwa ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga l…ôhey ndaw daa mem…ôcey daw, da daa ba, Ňčga k…ô…óey ndaw vagay daw?¬Ľ Ama nd…ôhay a, a g…ômam Ňčga mb…ô…ódamara ba.
3.5: Yesu a n…ôkta tabiya ta dey magaza. Mevel a car ga maja mevel ata maaya ba. Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a ndaw aha heyey: ¬ęT…ôld…ôrwa har a.¬Ľ Tal! a t…ôldara har a. Har a, ta‚Äô, a …óiyey aa slam a.
3.6: Masa Fariza hay ma h…ôtmar har Ňčga ndaw aha ta …óiyey sem na, a bam daa way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey. Wure wure Ňčgene, a kusam ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Bay *Herawt, a c…ômdamara …óay ata Ňčga k…ô…óey Yesu vagay. Nd…ôhay ga a diyam asi Yesu
3.7: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay, a mb…ôkdamata nd…ôhay daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, a diyam a mey d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile. Nd…ôhay ga a diyam asi Yesu a. Nd…ôhay ma diyam asiya na, a samawa daa hwayak Ňčga Galile,
3.8: daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem, daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude, daa hwayak Ňčga Idume, daa hwayak masa ta dey laŇčgar Ňčga wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč, asaya, daa hwayak hay gweegwe ta berney Ňčga Tir leŇč ta berney Ňčga SidaŇčw. Nd…ôhay a, a samawa ga na, maja ata fa c…ôndamara sl…ôra masa Yesu ma ka.
3.9: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa c…ôf…óata gula aŇčga hay Ňčga s…ôpmar kwambiwal amba da nd…ôhay makustakaya ha fa Ňčgacamara kalah na, a gwa a t…ôpey aa kwambiwal a.
3.10: Nd…ôhay masa macay hay c…ôpa fa wusam vaw Ňčgada fa Yesu amba a g…ôsfamar, maja aŇčga fa mb…ôley nd…ôhay ga.
3.11: Nd…ôhay ta malula da ray daha a h…ôtmar Yesu na, a t…ô…óam asi salay aŇčga, a wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKah, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay!¬Ľ
3.12: Ama Yesu a k…ôtata, a katar mey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvtar a da wuzdamara aŇčga na, wa ba. Yesu a weley nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew (Matiye 10.1-4; Luk 6.12-16)
3.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa Yesu fa da t…ôpey a aŇčgwa na, a z…ôlta nd…ôhay masa aŇčga ma wu…óey. Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a diyam fa v…ô…óa.
3.14: A weley nd…ôhay kuraw a ray a cew Ňčga t…ôrey nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mesl…ôrey. A walata na, amba a p…ôkam bama mandaw mandaw, amba a sl…ôrdata Ňčga wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay,
3.15: asaya, amba a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga …ď…ôley malula hay da ray nd…ôhay.
3.16: Nd…ôhay mawalatakaya kuraw a ray a cew e na, ara *SimaŇčw ndaw masa Yesu ma par mez…ôley *Piyer,
3.17: ata *Jak ta m…ôlmaha *JaŇč, b…ôza hay Ňčga Zebede masa Yesu ma patar mez…ôley Bawanerges, anda mel…ôvey, ¬ęnd…ôhay ma kam baazlam anda var maa b…ôcey¬Ľ,
3.18: *And…ôre, *F…ôlep, *Bartelemey, *Matiye, *Tuma, Jak b…ôzey Ňčga Alfe, Taade, SimaŇčw, ndaw da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma wu…óam Ňčga l…ôhdamata nd…ôhay ata hay dasi har Ňčga masa-g…ôra ata hay,
3.19: leŇč Juda Iskariyawt, ndaw ma v…ôlda Yesu a har masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay. Nd…ôhay a l…ôvam Yesu na, aŇčga ta malula da ray (Matiye 12.22-32; Luk 11.14-23; 12.10)
3.20: Masa Yesu ma walata nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mesl…ôrey cay na, ta‚Äô, a b…ôrŇčgawa da aŇčgwa ha, a daw a way. Nd…ôhay ga a diyam fa aŇčga saya. Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay kwa ta h…ôtam har Ňčga z…ômey …óaf daa ba, maja nd…ôhay makustakaya ga kalah.
3.21: Masa mamaha ta m…ôlmaha hay ma c…ôndamara nd…ôhay makustakaya kalah da cakay a na, ta‚Äô, a samawa amba a Ňčg…ôlmara maja nd…ôhay a, a wulkam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęMalula fa kar a Yesu!¬Ľ
3.22: *Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma samawa da *Jeruzelem, aa guzlam da ray a, a l…ôvam: ¬ę*Beyelzebul, bay Ňčga mes…ôfney maaya ba hay da ray aŇčga daha. Ara aŇčga ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
3.23: Maja nd…ôhay maa guzlam anda Ňčgene na, Yesu, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa, a Ňčgatar mey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*SataŇč, bay-malula, a gwa a …ď…ôla malula da ray nd…ôhay daw? A gwa ba s…ôlak.
3.24: Anda mel…ôvey, da nd…ôhay daa hwayak pal a kam v…ôram da wuzlah ata na, hwayak a Ňčgene a p…ôlhey la.
3.25: Asaya, da nd…ôhay da way pal a k…ô…óam vaw da wuzlah ata na, way a Ňčgene a p…ôlhey la.
3.26: Anda ke…óe, da SataŇč, bay-malula, a k…ô…óta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay na, a key Ňčgene, a k…ô…óey ray aŇčga, aŇčga fa da key bay ata daa saba.
3.27: Yaw, kwa ndaw-mayal ma gwa Ňčga mb…ôzey a way ndaw masa-g…ôdaŇč amba a lalat…ôrwa cek aŇčga hay meedey aŇčga na, daa ba. Si ndaw-mayal a, a key g…ôdaŇč teese…ó, a j…ôwa ndaw masa-g…ôdaŇč a …óagay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a gwa a h…ôlt…ôrwa cek hay da way a.¬Ľ
3.28: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, Bay Gazlavay a gwa a mb…ôkdata meb…ôrey tabiya masa nd…ôhay ma kamara. Asaya, a gwa a mb…ôkdata mey hay maaya ba tabiya masa nd…ôhay maa guzlam da ray a.
3.29: Ama, kwa waawa maa guzley mey maaya ba da ray *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay fa da mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw aha daa ba. Yaw, ndaw ma c…ô…óa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, meb…ôrey aŇčga a da njey Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ
3.30: Yesu a l…ôvey anda Ňčgene na, maja ata faa guzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęMalula fa kar a Yesu.¬Ľ MamaŇč Ňčga Yesu ta m…ôlmaha hay na, ara wa hay wa? (Matiye 12.46-50; Luk 8.19-21)
3.31: Ata mamaŇč Ňčga Yesu ta m…ôlmaha hay a wusmawa aa way masa Yesu aa da hwa…ó a, a lacam aa ambahw, a sl…ôram ndaw Ňčga z…ôl…ôrwa Yesu.
3.32: Nd…ôhay makustakaya ga da cakay a manjatakaya, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęHaya, ata mamakw ta m…ôlmakw hay faa c…ôf…óamaka daa ambahw.¬Ľ
3.33: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMamay na, wa? M…ôlma a…óaw hay na, wa hay wa?¬Ľ
3.34: Ta‚Äô, a n…ôkfata nd…ôhay manjatakaya ma zl…ôrmar ray heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMamay ta m…ôlma a…óaw hay na, ara nd…ôhay ke…óe,
3.35: maja m…ôlma a…óaw, dam-mama a…óaw, da daa ba, mamay na, ara ndaw ma key cek masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey.¬Ľ

4.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a daw a mey d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile saya, aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay fete…óe. Nd…ôhay ga a diyam a cakay a, maja Ňčgene, Yesu a t…ôpey aa kwambiwal, a njey a hwa…ó a. Kwambiwal a, aa da ray yam, ama nd…ôhay na, ata da mey d…ôhwa ha.
4.2: Daa mees…ôrkey aŇčga na, a kadatar cek hay ga ta mey-meŇčgey. Daa mees…ôrkey aŇčga ha na, a l…ôvtar:
4.3: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay! Ndaw meh…ôvey daha, a daw Ňčgaa kwecey hulfa…ó a ley aŇčga.
4.4: Masa aŇčga faa kwacada hulfa…ó a ley a na, hulfa…ó laŇčgar a k…ôzley aa c…ôve…ó. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, …óiyaŇč hay a samawa, a ndamara.
4.5: Hulfa…ó laŇčgar, a k…ôzley aa slam masa p…ôra…ó, hwiyak da ray a ga daa ba. Hulfa…ó a, a p…ôcey fiyaw, maja hwiyak da ray a ga daa ba.
4.6: Ama menjey nek…ô…óey, da masa pas fa tey na, a …ďata. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a kweley, maja slaslalay a daa v…ôge…ó ga daa ba.
4.7: Hulfa…ó laŇčgar a k…ôzley a wuzlah hatak. Hatak a, a g…ôley, aa nj…ôr…óa hulfa…ó map…ôckaya ha. Da ray Ňčgene, hulfa…ó map…ôckaya ha a gwa a g…ôley Ňčga yey ba.
4.8: Ama, hulfa…ó laŇčgar a k…ôzley aa slam masa maaya, a p…ôcey, a g…ôley, a yey ga. Hulfa…ó map…ôckaya pal bab…ôza fa v…ô…óa a key kwakwar maakar, laŇčgar kwakwar maakwaw, da daa ba, temere.¬Ľ
4.9: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ndaw, aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, Ňčga c…ônda mey a maaya maaya.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzltar a nd…ôhay ta mey-meŇčgey hay na, maja me? (Matiye 13.10-15; Luk 8.9, 10)
4.10: Masa Yesu ma Ňčg…ôchey sem da cakay nd…ôhay ga heyey na, gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew ta nd…ôhay mekele da cakay a, aa c…ôf…óamara da ray mey-meŇčgey hay masa aŇčga maa guzldatara heyey.
4.11: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar na, Gazlavay ta v…ôlkwar c…ôve…ó la Ňčga s…ôrey mey da ray mewey aŇčga da ray nd…ôhay. Mey a na, ma…ďadakaya fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay siya. A c…ôndamara mey a anda mey-meŇčgey gway.
4.12: Anda ke…óe, ‚ÄúNd…ôhay a, fa n…ôkam dey maaya maaya, ama a h…ôtmar dey ba, asaya, fa j…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya, ama a c…ôndamara ba, da daa ba na, a mb…ô…óam dey la Ňčgada fa Gazlavay, amba Gazlavay a mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey ata.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Mabara Ňčga mey-meŇčgey da ray meekwecey hulfa…ó (Matiye 13.18-23; Luk 8.11-15)
4.13: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa s…ôrmara mabara Ňčga mey-meŇčgey da ray meekwecey hulfa…ó ke…óe ba daw? Kaa, ka s…ôrmara mabara Ňčga mey-meŇčgey hay siya na, kwara?
4.14: Ndaw maa kwecey hulfa…ó a ley na, aŇčga anda ndaw ma wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
4.15: Nd…ôhay siya, ata anda c…ôve…ó masa hulfa…ó ma k…ôzley a hwa…ó a. A c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ama *SataŇč, bay-malula, a sawa, a la mey a la daa mevel ata.
4.16: Nd…ôhay siya may, ata anda slam masa p…ôra…ó masa hulfa…ó ma k…ôzley a hwa…ó a. A c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, a t…ô…ďmara fiyaw ta mees…ômey.
4.17: Ama nd…ôhay a, a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga …óar nek…ô…óey anda hulfa…ó ma p…ôcwa masa ta slaslalay daa v…ôge…ó ga daa ba. Ta pas masa banay mekele mekele ma da sawa a ray ata maja mey a na, a da mb…ôkdamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay fiyaw fiyaw.
4.18: Nd…ôhay mekele a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay anda hulfa…ó ma k…ôzley a wuzlah hatak. A t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay,
4.19: ama mey a, aa z…ô…óey anda hulfa…ó map…ôckaya maa nj…ôr…óey daa hatak maja ata fa wulkam kalah da ray menjey maaya da b…ôla, maja a wu…óam zleley kalah, asaya maja a s…ôpam cek hay mekele mekele. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a taa z…ô…ódamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa mevel ata sem. Ata anda cek ma yey bab…ôza ba, maja mewulkey ata ha Ňčgene.
4.20: Nd…ôhay mekele saya, a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay anda hulfa…ó ma p…ôcwa daa slam maaya. A c…ôndamara mey a, a t…ô…ďmara, a kadamara sl…ôra ta aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, mey a, a yey daa mevel ata anda hulfa…ó ma p…ôcwa ma yey ga, bab…ôza fa v…ô…óa a key kwakwar maakar, mekele a key kwakwar maakwaw, da daa ba, temere.¬Ľ Yesu a Ňčgey mey ta pet…ôrla (Luk 8.16-18)
4.21: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw a gwa a pa pet…ôrla mag…ô…ókaya asi maŇčgayak daw? Da daa ba, asi harŇčgawaw daw? K…ône ba. Si a pa na, aa slam mepey pet…ôrla masa ma gwa ma wa…óa slam da way.
4.22: Cek hay tabiya masa ma…ďadatakaya na, a wuzwa la a palah, a da h…ôtmar fa dey. Anda mel…ôvey, cek masa daa l…ôvaŇč na, a wuzwa la aa slam mawa…óakaya amba nd…ôhay tabiya a h…ôtmar.
4.23: Da ndaw, aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, Ňčga c…ônda mey a maaya maaya.¬Ľ
4.24: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęPam leŇčgesl fa mey masa akwar ma c…ôndamara ke…óe. Anda akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay a wakwara maaya aŇčga la k…ône, fara fara, a da wakwara ma f…ôna.
4.25: Da ndaw a t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay a j…ôna la Ňčga t…ô…ďa mey a ma f…ôna ma f…ôna. Da ndaw a t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba na, kwa mey a masa nek…ô…óey daa mevel aŇčga na, Gazlavay a bad…ôrwa la tabiya.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta cek masa ndaw ma sl…ôka
4.26: Yesu a kadatara saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ę*Mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, ya gwa Ňčga wa na, ta me? Ehe, ya Ňčgakwar mey da ray a. ¬ęNdaw a sl…ôkey cek a ley.
4.27: Cek a, a p…ôcwa. Taa va…ó, taa pas cek aha fa g…ôley. Kwa ndaw a, aa daa …óar, kwa aa ta dey, cek aha fa g…ôley c…ôŇčga, ama ndaw aha a s…ôra cek aha a g…ôley na, kwara ba.
4.28: Cek aha, a p…ôcwa na, taava aŇčga, ara hwiyak ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga p…ôc…ôrwa. Ňägeeme cek aha, a bawa anda kwakwas. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a g…ôley. A t…ôlwa ray, a n…ôhey.
4.29: Da cek aha ta n…ôhey cay na, ndaw aha a Ňčg…ôma maja kiya mekey cek da ley ta wuswa cay.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta bab…ôza Ňčga bazlawar (Matiye 13.31, 32, 34; Luk 13.18, 19)
4.30: Yesu a kadatara saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa da wakwa *mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, ta me? Ya da wuzdakwara mewey Ňčga Gazlavay kaa na, ta mey-meŇčgey wura?
4.31: Yaw, ya da wakwa mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, ta bab…ôza Ňčga bazlawar masa ndaw ma r…ô…ďa aa ley aŇčga. AŇčga kuset k…ô…óey dasi bab…ôza Ňčga cek hay tabiya da b…ôla.
4.32: Ama da mar…ô…ďkaya cay na, a p…ôcwa, a g…ôley mahura a f…ônta cek hay mekele tabiya ma yey bab…ôza mez…ômey. A pey har hay mahura mahura, kwa …óiyaŇč hay a gwamara a …óiyam way da hwa…ó a.¬Ľ
4.33: Yaw, Yesu a wuzdatara mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ta mey-meŇčgey hay anda ke…óe. Aa s…ôrkadatar mey Ňčga Gazlavay a nd…ôhay t…ô…óe ta g…ôdaŇč ata amba a c…ôndamara.
4.34: Aa s…ôrkadata na, si ta mey-meŇčgey hay gway. Ama da masa ata ta gula aŇčga hay daada na, a wuzdatara mabara Ňčga mey a maaya maaya. Yesu a lacada b…ôrgadaŇč da wuzlah d…ôhwa (Matiye 8.23-27; Luk 8.22-25)
4.35: Taa kwa…ó aha Ňčgene, masa Yesu manjakaya daa kwambiwal heyey na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęT…ôŇčgkwa a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa.¬Ľ
4.36: Da ray Ňčgene, a mb…ôkdamata nd…ôhay makustakaya da mey d…ôhwa ha, gula hay a, a t…ôŇčgdamara Yesu ta kwambiwal masa aa manjakaya da hwa…ó a heyey. Kwambiwal hay mekele malacatakaya da cakay a daha.
4.37: Ta‚Äô, b…ôrgadaŇč a zlar mekey bew! bew!, a cawaslada yam aa kwambiwal a, haa kwambiwal a, a r…ôhey.
4.38: Yesu, aŇčga fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga kwambiwal a, aa daa …óar, ray mab…ôckaya fa cek. Gula aŇčga hay a sl…ôk…óadamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Mahura, al…ôkwa fa da m…ôckwa ke…óe na, a kaka da ray ba gway daw?¬Ľ
4.39: Yesu ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a bab…ôcar a b…ôrgadaŇč, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa key saba!¬Ľ A l…ôvar a yam a: ¬ęKa wusey saba!¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene, b…ôrgadaŇč a, a key saba, yam a, a wusey saba. Meme…ó te‚Äô te‚Äô, a key saba.
4.40: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęKa zluram na, maja me? Akwar fa pamaya Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara daa ba daw?¬Ľ
4.41: Da ray Ňčgene, gula aŇčga hay a, a zluram ga, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw a ke…óe na, ara na, wa? Masa kwa meme…ó ta yam a c…ônmar mey ke…óe na!¬Ľ

5.1: Masa Yesu ma lacada b…ôrgadaŇč a la na, a wusam ta gula aŇčga hay a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa ha, masa daa hwayak Ňčga nd…ôhay G…ôraza hay.
5.2: Yesu, ta‚Äô, a b…ôrŇčgawa daa kwambiwal, wure Ňčgene, ndaw daha a bawa daa aŇčgwa masa c…ôvay hay da hwa…ó a, a sawa a cada ray ta aŇčga. Ndaw aha, aa ta malula da ray.
5.3: A njey da wuzlah c…ôvay hay a. Ndaw a gwa a j…ôwa, kwa ta calalaw ba.
5.4: A j…ôwmata salay aŇčga hay ta har aŇčga hay ta calalaw dey weewe, ama a …ó…ôslta calalaw hay a. Ndaw ma f…ôna ta g…ôdaŇč daa ba.
5.5: Mandaw mandaw, taa va…ó, taa pas, fa p…ôkey daa c…ôvay hay, fa p…ôkey da aŇčgwa. Daa mep…ôkey aŇčga ha na, fa wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, fa p…ô…óka vaw aŇčga ta aŇčgwa.
5.6: Masa ndaw aha ma h…ôtar Yesu da d…ôreŇč na, a hway Ňčgada fa v…ô…óa, a regedey fa mey aŇčga.
5.7: -8 Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęMalula, bey da ray ndaw ke…óe!¬Ľ Ama ndaw a, a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYesu, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó, ka wu…óey fa yah me? Ya fa kaka ambahw, ta mez…ôley Ňčga Bay Gazlavay, ka da s…ôrdaya banay ba.¬Ľ
5.9: Yesu aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMez…ôley akah na, me?¬Ľ Ndaw aha a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMez…ôley a…óaw na, ‚Äúga,‚ÄĚ maja ala malula hay ga.¬Ľ
5.10: Malula hay da ray ndaw aha a b…ôrkwamara Yesu, amba Yesu a, a …ď…ôlta daa hwayak a ba.
5.11: Daa slam aha Ňčgene, Ňčga…ďa Ňčga vetem hay ga daha da mec…ôkwer, fa s…ôpam cek mez…ômey da rav-aŇčgwa.
5.12: Malula hay da ray ndaw heyey a b…ôrkwamara Yesu, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęV…ôlndar c…ôve…ó amba ya mb…ôzam a ray vetem hay katay, may taw.¬Ľ
5.13: Yesu, ta‚Äô, a v…ôltar c…ôve…ó. Da ray Ňčgene, malula hay a, a bam da ray ndaw aha, a diyam a mb…ôzam a ray vetem hay a. Vetem hay fete…óe na, a key gweegwe gabal cew. Vetem hay a, a hwam ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčgadaa heeleŇč, a tataram, a kwiyam saf! aa d…ôhwa, a …ďa…ď…ôtam c…ôpa.
5.14: Masa mec…ôkwer hay Ňčga vetem hay kaa heyey ma h…ôtmatar vetem hay a ta …ďa…ď…ôtam sem na, a hwam, a diyam, a wuzdamatara a nd…ôhay da slala ha leŇč a nd…ôhay gweegwe ta slala ha. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a, a samawa Ňčga n…ôkey cek ma key fete…óe he.
5.15: Nd…ôhay a wusmawa a cakay Yesu, a h…ôtfamar ndaw masa Yesu ma …ď…ôlta malula hay ga da ray a heyey. Ndaw aha manjakaya fete…óe ta zana fa vaw, a s…ôra leŇčgesl d…ô…ďa. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay ma samawa heyey, mand…ôrzay a katar.
5.16: Nd…ôhay fete…óe ma h…ôtmar cek ma key da ray ndaw ta malula da ray, leŇč da ray vetem hay a na, a kadamatara a nd…ôhay siya ma samawa.
5.17: Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a b…ôrkwamara Yesu Ňčga daw daa hwayak ata la.
5.18: Masa Yesu fa t…ôpey aa kwambiwal Ňčga daw na, ndaw masa aa ma …ď…ôlra malula hay da ray aŇčga heyey, a b…ôrkwa Yesu amba a v…ôlar c…ôve…ó Ňčga diyam cew e.
5.19: Yesu a v…ôlar c…ôve…ó a ndaw aha ba, ama a l…ôvar: ¬ęV…ôhey a way, kadatara a nd…ôhay akah hay cek mahura masa Bay Gazlavay ma kakawa tabiya, kadatara masa aŇčga ma s…ôrey dey-ceceh da ray akah ke…óe.¬Ľ
5.20: Ta‚Äô, ndaw aha, a daw, a wuzda cek masa Yesu ma ka tabiya da ray a heyey a nd…ôhay daa hwayak daha mez…ôley Berney-Hay-Kuraw. Nd…ôhay c…ôpa masa ma c…ôndamara mey a na, a r…ôzlam. Yesu a f…ôna g…ôdaŇč Ňčga macay ta Ňčga mem…ôcey (Matiye 9.18-26; Luk 8.40-56)
5.21: Yesu a v…ôhwa ta kwambiwal da dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile heyey. Nd…ôhay makustakaya da cakay a ga da mey d…ôhwa ha.
5.22: Ndaw daha mez…ôley Jayirus, ara ndaw pal da wuzlah *bay-ray hay daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe. A sawa a cakay ata, a h…ôtar Yesu, ta‚Äô, a t…ô…óey asi salay aŇčga,
5.23: aa c…ôf…óa ta mat…ôway daa dey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDam a…óaw fa da m…ôcey. Ambahw, sawa, pa har akah a ray a amba a mb…ôley, a njey ta dey, may taw.¬Ľ
5.24: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a diyam cew e. Nd…ôhay makustakaya ga fa diyam asiya, fa Ňčgacamara.
5.25: Da wuzlah ata na, Ňčgwas daha, mambaz fa mb…ô…ówa da hwa…ó d…ôga mevey kuraw a ray a cew.
5.26: Ta s…ôrda banay la ga. Ta daw la fa dakwter hay ga, ta nd…ôvda zleley aŇčga sem tabiya, ama kwa ta key Ňčgama daa ba, macay a, fa lar mey ta g…ôdaŇč c…ôŇčga.
5.27: Ňägwas aha fa c…ônda Yesu fa mb…ôley nd…ôhay, maja Ňčgene, a sawa a wuzlah nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey ta fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga Yesu. Ta‚Äô, a g…ôsfar har fa zana aŇčga.
5.28: A ka anda ke…óe maja aŇčga fa wulkey daa mevel aŇčga: ¬ęDa ya gwa Ňčga g…ôsfar har kwa fa zana aŇčga na, ya mb…ôley la.¬Ľ
5.29: Masa Ňčgwas aha ma g…ôsfar har fa zana aŇčga la na, wure wure Ňčgene mambaz aŇčga heyey taŇč! a …ó…ôsley mey. A s…ôra aŇčga ta mb…ôley sem.
5.30: Wure Ňčgene Yesu a s…ôra g…ôdaŇč ta bey la daa vaw aŇčga. Maja Ňčgene, a mb…ô…ówa dey fa d…ô…ďa, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ga heyey: ¬ęMeg…ôsey har fa zana a…óaw na, wa?¬Ľ
5.31: Gula aŇčga hay a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKa fa n…ôkta nd…ôhay fa Ňčgacamaka ta dey wura wura tabiya kaa na, kaa c…ôf…óandar ‚ÄúMag…ôsfaya har wa‚ÄĚ na, kwara?¬Ľ
5.32: Ama Yesu fa n…ôkey dey ta cakay c…ôŇčga, amba a h…ôtar ndaw ma g…ôsfar har a.
5.33: Ňägwas aha mand…ôrzay fa kar ga, faa wesey, a s…ôra Yesu ta mb…ôlda sem. Da ray Ňčgene, a sawa, a t…ô…óey asi salay Ňčga Yesu, a wuzdara mabara Ňčga mey a.
5.34: Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęDam a…óaw, ka ta mb…ôley cay maja kah ma paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara. Daw ta zazay, macay akah daa saba.¬Ľ
5.35: Masa Yesu faa guzlar Ňčgada Ňčgwas aha araŇč na, nd…ôhay a samawa ta mesl…ôrey da way Jayirus, bay-ray Ňčga way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, a l…ôvmar Ňčgada Jayirus a: ¬ęDam akah heyey, ta m…ôcey sem. Ka g…ôrda vaw ta Bay Mahura keme seme?¬Ľ
5.36: Ama Yesu kwa ta j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey ata daa ba, a l…ôvar a Jayirus: ¬ęMevel akah a da t…ô…óey ba. Paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara gway na, cay.¬Ľ
5.37: Yaw, kwa Yesu ta v…ôley c…ôve…ó Ňčgada ndaw Ňčga daw asiya daa ba, si a Ňčg…ôley na, *Piyer, *Jak, leŇč *JaŇč, m…ôlmaŇč Ňčga Jak.
5.38: A wusam a way Jayirus heyey, a h…ôtfamatar nd…ôhay makustakaya. Nd…ôhay a, leŇčgesl ata ta mb…ô…óey sem, fa t…ôwam, fa wudam ta g…ôdaŇč.
5.39: Yesu a mb…ôzey a way a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęLeŇčgesl akwar a mb…ô…óey, akwar fa t…ôwam na, maja me? B…ôzey a, ta m…ôcey daa ba, ama a key a ney aa …óar.¬Ľ
5.40: Nd…ôhay a, aa saŇčg…ôram a ray a. Yesu a badat…ôrwa c…ôpa aa ambaw. A Ňčg…ôlta ata papaŇč Ňčga dam aha ta mamaŇč Ňčga dam aha leŇč gula aŇčga hay maakar heyey. A mb…ôzam aa way masa dam aha manakaya da hwa…ó a heyey.
5.41: Yesu ta‚Äô, a k…ôrza dam aha fa har, a l…ôvar: ¬ę Talita kum! ,¬Ľ anda mel…ôvey, ¬ęDam a…óaw, ya fa l…ôvka, lecey.¬Ľ
5.42: Dam ke…óe deŇč! a lecey, ta‚Äô, a daw. (Mevey Ňčga dam aha kuraw a ray a cew.) Wure Ňčgene, ata masa daa way a na, a r…ôzlam ga.
5.43: Ama Yesu a k…ôtata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek masa ma key ke…óe na, ka da kadamara Ňčgada ndaw ba.¬Ľ A l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęV…ôlmar cek Ňčga z…ômey.¬Ľ

6.1: Yesu a sl…ôk…óey da slala ata Jayirus heyey, a daw a *Nezeret, slala masa aa ma g…ôley da hwa…ó a. Gula aŇčga hay a diyam asiya.
6.2: Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, Yesu a daw aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe, aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay. Nd…ôhay ga a j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey aŇčga. A r…ôzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAa s…ôrkad…ôrwa mey Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya ke…óe na, dama? A h…ôt…ôrwa leŇčgesl Ňčga s…ôrey cek hay a ke…óe na, dama? Ma v…ôldara g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key maazla anda ke…óe na, wa?
6.3: AŇčga na, ndaw ma sla hwadam, ba diya? AŇčga b…ôzey Ňčga *Mari, ba diya? AŇčga m…ôlmaŇč Ňčga *Jak, Ňčga Jawz, Ňčga Jud, leŇč Ňčga *SimaŇčw, ba diya? Dam-mamaha hay ata da wuzlah al…ôkwa fe…óe, ba diya?¬Ľ Ara maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay fete…óe ma g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu ba.
6.4: Maja mewulkey ata Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*Ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, nd…ôhay a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga kwa dama dama, ama ma t…ô…ďmara ba na, si nd…ôhay daa hwayak aŇčga, nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway aŇčga, asaya, nd…ôhay da way ata.¬Ľ
6.5: Yesu a gwa mekey maazla da wuzlah ata ba, si a pey har a ray nd…ôhay masa-macay hay nek…ô…óey gway, a mb…ôldata.
6.6: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a r…ôzley da ray ata maja ata ma t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ba. Ta‚Äô, Yesu a daw a slala hay mekele daa hwayak a, aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay. Yesu a sl…ôrdata gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew (Matiye 10.5-15; Luk 9.1-6)
6.7: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a z…ôlt…ôrwa gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew, amba a sl…ôrdata cew cew aa slam hay mekele mekele. Da ray Ňčgene, a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga …ď…ôley malula hay da ray nd…ôhay.
6.8: Ta‚Äô, a k…ôtata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam, ama ka da lam cek a har ba. Ka da lam cek mez…ômey ba, ka da lam gabal ba, ka da lam dala aa jiba ba, lam a har na, si daŇčgwar gway.
6.9: Yaw, pamata tarak akwar hay a salay, ka diyam na, si ta zana akwar hay masa fa vaw gway. Ka da lam zana cew cew ba.¬Ľ
6.10: Yesu a k…ôtata saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa akwar ta wusam la aa slam na, njam da way nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmakwar haa kasl pas masa akwar ma da diyam aa slam mekele.
6.11: Da nd…ôhay daa slam aha a t…ô…ďmakwar ba, a j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey akwar ba na, mb…ôkdamata nd…ôhay a. Raramatara lagwada fa salay akwar hay amba ka wuzdamatara ata nd…ôhay masa ta meb…ôrey.¬Ľ
6.12: Gula hay Ňčga Yesu heyey a diyam, a wuzdamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay a nd…ôhay. A l…ôvmatar: ¬ęSi ka mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, ka s…ôpmara Gazlavay ta mevel pal.¬Ľ
6.13: Asaya, a …ď…ôlam malula hay ga da ray nd…ôhay, a takwa…óamatar mal fa nd…ôhay masa-macay hay ga, a mb…ôldamata. Mey da ray mem…ôcey Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis
6.14: Bay *Herawt fa c…ônda mey da ray Yesu maja nd…ôhay faa guzlam ga da ray a. Nd…ôhay siya a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra *JaŇč-Baptis ma sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey. Maja Ňčgene, aŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key maazla.¬Ľ
6.15: Mekele hay a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra *Eli .¬Ľ Mekele hay saya a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra ndaw anda nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle.¬Ľ
6.16: Masa Herawt ma c…ônda mey hay a ke…óe la na, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAra JaŇč-Baptis! Ya ta …ó…ôslra ray aŇčga sem, ama ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey!¬Ľ
6.17: -18 Herawt aa guzley anda ke…óe na, maja ara aŇčga ta ray aŇčga ma k…ô…óa JaŇč-Baptis a vagay. Ehe mey da ray JaŇč-Baptis a: Herawt a la Herawdiyat, Ňčgwas Ňčga m…ôlmaha *F…ôlep Ňčga Ňčgwas aŇčga, daa masa F…ôlep aa ta dey …óagay. Maja Ňčgene, *JaŇč a l…ôvar a Herawt: ¬ęKah ma la Ňčgwas Ňčga m…ôlmakw Ňčgene na, ara cek mat…ôkakaya daa kwakwas al…ôkwa.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, Herawt a l…ôvtar a sewje aŇčga hay Ňčga k…ôrzamara JaŇč-Baptis a. Ta‚Äô, sewje aŇčga hay a, a k…ôrzamara, a j…ôwmara, a k…ôzlamara aa f…ôrs…ône.
6.19: Masa Herawdiyat ma c…ônda mey Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis ke…óe la na, mevel a car, a wu…óey Ňčga k…ô…óa vagay, ama a gwa ba maja Herawt a t…ô…ďa ba.
6.20: Herawt na, fa zlurey Ňčga k…ô…óa JaŇč-Baptis a vagay, fa n…ôkfar dey maja a s…ôra JaŇč-Baptis ara ndaw ma key cek ta c…ôve…ó e, ara ndaw ma j…ôkey sl…ômay fa Gazlavay. Masa aŇčga ma c…ônda mey masa JaŇč-Baptis maa guzlda la na, ray aŇčga a h…ô…ďey ga. Ama Herawt a wu…óey Ňčga j…ôkfar sl…ômay c…ôŇčga.
6.21: Yaw, …óar masa Herawdiyat ma h…ôtey c…ôve…ó amba a k…ô…ómara JaŇč-Baptis na, ta wuswa cay. Ara pas Ňčga gwagway masa Herawt ma s…ôrfada …óar aŇčga Ňčga mayawa. Herawt ta z…ôlwa nd…ôhay la ga Ňčga z…ômey …óaf. A z…ôlwa gula aŇčga hay, bay hay Ňčga sewje hay, leŇč mahura hay daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile.
6.22: Daa masa nd…ôhay fa kamara gwagway a na, dam Ňčga Herawdiyat a nd…ôkwey a wuzlah ata, a g…ôrvey. Meg…ôrvey a, a mbafar a Herawt ta Ňčgada nd…ôhay maz…ôltakaya heyey. Ta‚Äô, Herawt a l…ôvar a sa…ďara ha: ¬ęCac…ôf…óafaya cek masa kah ma wu…óey amba ya v…ôldakawa.¬Ľ
6.23: Herawt ta‚Äô, a mbe…óey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęTa Gazlavay tabiya, cek masa kah maa c…ôf…óafaya na, ya v…ôldakawa la, kwa Ňčga wunkey hwayak a…óaw cew e, ya wunkakwa la.¬Ľ
6.24: Ta‚Äô, sa…ďara ha, a bawa, a daw a l…ôvar a mamaha: ¬ęYa daa c…ôf…óafar na, me?¬Ľ
6.25: Mamaha a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęCac…ôf…óafar ray Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis.¬Ľ Sa…ďara ha, a wusey vaw, a v…ôhey fa bay a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa wu…óey ka v…ôldiwa ray Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis wure ke…óe aa v…ôley.¬Ľ
6.26: Da ray Ňčgene, Herawt aa ta mees…ômey daa saba. Ama a gwa Ňčga mb…ô…óda mey aŇčga ha saba, maja ta mbe…óey sem fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay maz…ôltakaya heyey.
6.27: Anda ke…óe, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey sewje wure wure Ňčgene Ňčga hand…ôrwa ray Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis. Ta‚Äô, sewje he a daw aa f…ôrs…ône, a …ó…ôsl…ôrwa ray Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis a.
6.28: A parawa aa v…ôley, a hand…ôrwa, a v…ôldara a sa…ďara heyey, ta‚Äô, sa…ďara ha a handara a mamaha.
6.29: Masa gula hay Ňčga JaŇč ma c…ôndamara ta k…ô…ómara JaŇč sem na, a diyam a lamara vagay a, a p…ôshamara aa c…ôvay. Yesu a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma f…ôna gabal zlam (Matiye 14.13-21; Luk 9.10-17; JaŇč 6.1-14)
6.30: Gula hay kuraw a ray a cew masa Yesu ma sl…ôrdata cew cew Ňčga wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey a v…ôhmawa, a kusam a cakay Yesu a, a kadamara cek hay masa ata ma kam…ôrwa, ta masa ata maa s…ôrkadamat…ôrwa a nd…ôhay.
6.31: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNakwa aa slam masa ndaw da hwa…ó a daa ba, amba ya njakwa taava al…ôkwa, amba ka gwamara ka m…ôskam vaw.¬Ľ A l…ôvtar anda ke…óe na, maja mandaw mandaw nd…ôhay ga fa samawa, fa v…ôham, mekele hay fa samawa saya, kwa ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a, a h…ôtam har Ňčga z…ômey …óaf ba.
6.32: Da ray Ňčgene, a t…ôpam aa kwambiwal, a diyam aa slam masa ndaw da hwa…ó a daa ba, amba a njam taava ata.
6.33: Masa ata fa diyam na, nd…ôhay ga ta h…ôtmatar la, ta s…ôrmara slam masa ata ma diyam a hwa…ó a sem. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay da slala hay tabiya daa hwayak a, a hwam ta salay, aa slam masa ata ma s…ôrmara ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay ma da diyam a hwa…ó a. A wusam aa slam aha teese…ó da ray ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay.
6.34: Masa Yesu ma wusey la aa slam meb…ôrŇčgey na, a b…ôrŇčgawa daa kwambiwal a, a h…ôtatar nd…ôhay makustakaya ga. Dey-ceceh a kar, maja a n…ôkta nd…ôhay a, ata anda t…ô…ďaŇč hay masa manjar mec…ôkwer. Ta‚Äô, aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay a da ray cek hay mekele mekele ga.
6.35: Mamba pas a k…ôzley, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a Ňčg…ôcham fa v…ô…óa, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęWure ke…óe hakwa…ó cay, al…ôkwa da wuzlah-ley.
6.36: L…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ke…óe Ňčga diyam a wuzlah-way, da daa ba, a slala hay ta cakay, amba a h…ô…ókamawa cek mez…ômey.¬Ľ
6.37: Ama Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ta ray akwar, v…ôlmatar cek mez…ômey a nd…ôhay a!¬Ľ A l…ôvmar: ¬ęKa wu…óey ya diyam Ňčga h…ô…ókawa cek mez…ômey ta dala ga kalah amba ya v…ôldamatara a nd…ôhay ke…óe daw?¬Ľ
6.38: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa har nd…ôhay makustakaya fe…óe na, peŇč we? Diyam, n…ôkm…ôrwa.¬Ľ Masa ata ma n…ôkm…ôrwa la na, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęYa h…ôtmawa na, peŇč zlam ta ewet cew.¬Ľ
6.39: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay Ňčga njadamata nd…ôhay njakw! njakw! a ray kwakwas meend…ô…ďek e.
