6.40: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a, a njam ta njey. Daa slam pal na, nd…ôhay temere, temere, daa ba, nd…ôhay kwakwar zlam, kwakwar zlam.
6.41: Yesu hal! a h…ôlta peŇč zlam ta ewet hay cew heyey, ta‚Äô, a baŇčga…óa dey a va…ó, a kar suse a Gazlavay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a pap…ôsa peŇč e, a v…ôldatara a gula aŇčga hay amba a wunkamatara a nd…ôhay heyey. Asaya, Yesu a pap…ôsta ewet hay cew heyey, a v…ôldatara a gula aŇčga hay amba a wunkamatara a nd…ôhay a.
6.42: Kwa waawa a z…ômey haa a r…ôhey.
6.43: Ta‚Äô, gula aŇčga hay a cakalamara peŇč ta ewet masa nd…ôhay ma mb…ôkdamara. A cakalamara aa gadakar hay. Macakalakaya ha a r…ôhey gadakar kuraw a ray a cew.
6.44: Nd…ôhay ma z…ômam peŇč e na, zel hay a key gabal zlam . Yesu a daw ta salay da ray d…ôhwa Ňčga Galile (Matiye 14.13-21; Luk 9.10-17; JaŇč 6.1-14)
6.45: Masa nd…ôhay ma z…ômam cek cay na, wure Ňčgene, Yesu ta‚Äô, a t…ôktar …óay a gula aŇčga hay Ňčga t…ôpam aa kwambiwal amba ata na, a zl…ôŇčgam teese…ó a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa ha gweegwe ta slala Betsayda. Yesu na, a njey fa d…ô…ďa …óagay amba a mb…ô…ótar mey a nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey Ňčga diyam a way.
6.46: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa ata ma wunkam la na, ta‚Äô, a daw aa aŇčgwa Ňčga d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay.
6.47: Masa tava…ó ta key sem na, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu ata da wuzlah d…ôhwa daa kwambiwal. Ama Yesu na, aŇčga pal taava aŇčga da aŇčgwa heyey.
6.48: A n…ôkta gula aŇčga hay na, fa s…ôram banay ga Ňčga t…ôŇčgey d…ôhwa ha, maja meme…ó fa key ga Ňčgada ray ata. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, gweegwe slam Ňčgaa p…ôrek na, Yesu ta‚Äô, a daw ta salay da ray yam Ňčgada fa ata. Aa ma Ňčg…ôchey la gweegwe ta kwambiwal a na, a wu…óey Ňčga mb…ôkdata fa d…ô…ďa.
6.49: Ama ata ma h…ôtmar Yesu fa daw da ray yam a na, a wulkam ara mamayam. Ta‚Äô, a wudam,
6.50: maja ata c…ôpa fa h…ôtmar aŇčga fa daw da ray yam a, anda ke…óe, a zluram ga. Ama wure Ňčgene, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęD…ôkmara mevel! Ara yah, ka da zluram ba!¬Ľ
6.51: Yesu, ta‚Äô, a t…ôpey aa kwambiwal fa gula aŇčga hay a. Masa aa ma t…ôpey la aa kwambiwal a na, meme…ó a key saba. Da ray Ňčgene, gula aŇčga hay a, a r…ôzlam ga,
6.52: maja kwa ata ma h…ôtmar maazla masa Yesu ma ka ta peŇč heyey na, daa Ňčgene ta gwamara Ňčga s…ôrmara g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Yesu a daa ba, maja ray ata maŇčg…ôr…óakaya. Yesu a mb…ôley masa-macay hay daa hwayak Ňčga Genezeret (Matiye 14.34-36)
6.53: Masa ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay ma t…ôŇčgam la a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa heyey na, a wusam aa hwayak daha mez…ôley Genezeret. A j…ôwmara kwambiwal a mey d…ôhwa ha fete…óe.
6.54: A b…ôrŇčgamawa daa kwambiwal a, wure Ňčgene nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara ara Yesu ma b…ôrŇčgawa.
6.55: A hwam a slala hay mekele mekele c…ôpa Ňčga wuzey a nd…ôhay siya Yesu ta sawa la. Da ray Ňčgene, a handamat…ôrwa masa-macay hay manatakaya fa geg…ôde…ó aa slam masa Yesu aa da hwa…ó a.
6.56: Aa slam masa Yesu ma daw, kwa a slala hay, kwa aa berney hay, kwa a wuzlah-ley na, nd…ôhay ga fa handamawa masa-macay hay aa slam masa nd…ôhay makustakaya da hwa…ó a. A b…ôrkwamara amba masa-macay hay a g…ôsam har kwa fa mey Ňčga zana aŇčga gway. Nd…ôhay ma g…ôsfamar har c…ôpa na, ta mb…ôlam sem.

7.1: *Fariza hay ta nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a samawa da *Jeruzelem, a kusam a cakay Yesu.
7.2: A h…ôtmatar *gula hay Ňčga Yesu siya fa z…ômam …óaf ta har manjar Ňčga p…ôrey. Anda mel…ôvey, gula hay a ta kamara anda kwakwas ata ma l…ôvey na, daa ba.
7.3: Yaw, Fariza hay a ta nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay mekele tabiya fa kamara kwakwas a. A da z…ômam …óaf na, si a p…ôrmara har maaya maaya la.
7.4: Da ta v…ôhmawa daa luma cay, fa da z…ômam …óaf na, si a p…ôram la …óagay. A nam ray a cek hay mekele mekele anda kwakwas ata ma l…ôvey. Anda mel…ôvey, a p…ôrmata v…ôley hay, kwakulam hay, leŇč maŇčgayak hay amba a t…ôram nd…ôhay mazl…ô…ďtakaya ba.
7.5: Da ray Ňčgene, Fariza hay ta nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz heyey, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęGula akah hay a kam cek hay anda kwakwas Ňčga papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay ma wuzdamandakwara ba na, maja me? Ata fa z…ômam …óaf ta har manjar Ňčga p…ôrey.¬Ľ
7.6: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew! Zleezle *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley da ray akwar na, anja fara. A wuzlala daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúGazlavay a l…ôvey: Nd…ôhay ke…óe fa h…ôslmaya ray ta mey Ňčga tede, ama mevel ata na, aa d…ôreŇč ta yah.
7.7: Ata fa h…ôlmamaya, ama meh…ôlmey a, ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga cek Ňčga tede, maja kwakwas masa ata maa s…ôrkadamara Ňčgene na, ara kwakwas Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč daada gway.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
7.8: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęAkwar, Fariza hay ta nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, ka mb…ôkdamara *mewey hay Ňčga Gazlavay, ama ka kam kwakwas ma sawa ta fa nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
7.9: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar saya: ¬ęHaya! Mewey hay Ňčga Gazlavay na, ka wu…óam saba, ka mb…ôkdamara amba ka s…ôpam kwakwas akwar jak daw?
7.10: Yaw, Mawiz a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNatar ray Ňčgada ata papakw ta mamakw.‚ÄĚ Mawiz a l…ôvey saya: ‚ÄúNdaw ma c…ô…óa papaha, da daa ba, mamaha na, si a k…ô…ómara ndaw aha vagay.‚ÄĚ
7.11: Ama akwar na, akwar faa s…ôrkadam nd…ôhay, ka l…ôvam, ndaw a gwa Ňčga l…ôvar a papaha, da daa ba, a mamaha: ‚ÄúCek masa yah ma da v…ôldakawa Ňčga j…ônka heyey na, ya v…ôldakawa daa saba, maja cek aha na, KwarbaŇč .‚ÄĚ (‚Äú KwarbaŇč ‚ÄĚ a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ‚Äúcek mav…ôldakaya Ňčgada Gazlavay.‚ÄĚ)
7.12: Da ray Ňčgene, ka l…ôvmatar a nd…ôhay Ňčga j…ônmata papa ata hay ta mama ata hay saba.
7.13: Anda ke…óe, akwar fa n…ôsmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta mees…ôrkedey akwar, maja ka pamara kwakwas akwar Ňčga mahura da ray mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Asaya, akwar fa kam cek hay mekele mekele maaya ba letek anda cek aha ke…óe.¬Ľ (Matiye 15.10-20)
7.14: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a z…ôlta nd…ôhay makustakaya tabiya saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęJ…ôkfamaya sl…ômay, akwar tabiya, c…ôndamara mey ke…óe.
7.15: Cek masa ndaw ma z…ôma na, a gwa Ňčga kar meb…ôrey a ndaw aha ba, ama si mewulkey masa ma bawa daa mevel aŇčga. [
7.16: Wure ke…óe anja akwar ta sl…ômay na, c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe maaya maaya.]¬Ľ
7.17: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a mb…ôkdata nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey, a mb…ôzey aa way. Gula aŇčga hay ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara da ray mey-meŇčgey masa aa ma kada ha.
7.18: Yesu ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar may, haa wure ke…óe, ka c…ôndamara ba c…ôŇčga daw? Ya wu…óey ka s…ôrmara fara fara cek mez…ômey ma mb…ôzey a hwa…ó ndaw na, a gwa Ňčga kar meb…ôrey a ndaw aha ba,
7.19: maja cek aha a mb…ôzey aa mevel aŇčga ba, ama a mb…ôzey aa zakwataf aŇčga, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a bawa a palah.¬Ľ Anda ke…óe, Yesu fa wuzda cek hay mez…ômey c…ôpa na, ndaw a gwa a z…ôma, a kar meb…ôrey ba.
7.20: Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęCek ma kar meb…ôrey a ndaw na, ara mewulkey ma bawa daa mevel aŇčga.
7.21: Ahaw, ara daa mevel Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč mewulkey maaya ba ma bawa. Mewulkey a, a h…ôlda ndaw Ňčga key cek hay malamba, anda meleley, mek…ô…óey ndaw vagay,
7.22: meley-vaw saw da palah, mekey dey fa cek Ňčga nd…ôhay, mekey cek ta maagway, memb…ôrzley, mekey cek ma ka hwaray, mekey s…ôleŇč, mekey mba…óa fa nd…ôhay, mezlepey, leŇč mepey leŇčgesl ba.
7.23: Yaw, cek hay maaya ba tabiya ke…óe na, a bamawa daa mevel Ňčga ndaw, a kamar meb…ôrey a ndaw a.¬Ľ Ňägwas masa J…ôwif ba a pa Yesu Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara (Matiye 15.21-28)
7.24: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a sl…ôk…óey daa slam a Ňčgene, a daw aa hwayak mekele gweegwe ta berney Ňčga Tir. A mb…ôzey aa way. A wu…óey amba ndaw a s…ôra aŇčga fete…óe ba, ama a gwa Ňčga …ďey ba.
7.25: -26 Fete…óe, Ňčgwas daha aŇčga dam *J…ôwif ba, a yawa da Fenisi daa hwayak Ňčga Siri. Dam aŇčga daha, aŇčga ta malula da ray. Masa aa ma c…ônda mey da ray Yesu na, wure Ňčgene, a daw fa v…ô…óa, a t…ô…óey fa mey aŇčga. Ta‚Äô, a kar ambahw a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ę∆Ā…ôla malula da ray dam a…óaw ke…óe may taw.¬Ľ
7.27: Ama Yesu aa guzlar ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMb…ôkdata b…ôza hay Ňčga r…ôham …óagay, maja mev…ôley …óaf Ňčga b…ôza hay Ňčgada g…ôdey hay na, maaya ba.¬Ľ
7.28: Ňägwas aha a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAhaw, Bay a…óaw. Ama kwa g…ôdey hay daa slam masa nd…ôhay fa z…ômam …óaf na, ata fa z…ômam meep…ôsey Ňčga …óaf masa b…ôza hay ma k…ôzlamata a hwayak may, ba diya?¬Ľ
7.29: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah ma mb…ô…ód…ôrwa mey a la maaya. Maja Ňčgene, malula ta bey sem da ray dam akah, ka gwa Ňčga daw a way.¬Ľ
7.30: Anda ke…óe, Ňčgwas aha, a daw a way, a h…ôtfar dam aŇčga manakaya da ray harŇčgawaw ta mees…ômey, malula ta bey sem da ray aŇčga. Yesu a wurey sl…ômay Ňčga ndaw madagazlam
7.31: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a sl…ôk…óey daa slam masa gweegwe ta berney Ňčga Tir heyey. A daw ta daa berney Ňčga SidaŇčw, a v…ôhwa ta mey d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile gweegwe ta hwayak Ňčga Berney-Hay-Kuraw.
7.32: Nd…ôhay a handamawa ndaw daha madagazlam, maada. A b…ôrkwamara Yesu amba a par har a ray Ňčga wurara sl…ômay aŇčga ta Ňčga t…ôrda neneh aŇčga dadakw saba.
7.33: Anda ke…óe, Yesu ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôla ndaw aha aa slam masa d…ôreŇč ta nd…ôhay makustakaya. A pata b…ôz-mey-har aŇčga hay aa sl…ômay Ňčga ndaw aha. Ta‚Äô, a t…ôfey meesle…ď fa b…ôz-mey-har aŇčga, a wusa neneh Ňčga ndaw aha ta b…ôz-mey-har a.
7.34: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a baŇčga…óa dey a va…ó, a s…ôfney ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvar a ndaw aha: ¬ę Efata ¬Ľ anda mel…ôvey, ¬ęWurey!¬Ľ
7.35: Wure Ňčgene, sl…ômay Ňčga ndaw aha ta‚Äô, a wurey. Neneh aŇčga, dadakw saba.
7.36: Yesu a k…ôtata tabiya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa da wuzdamara a ndaw ba.¬Ľ Ama kwa Yesu a t…ôkta Ňčga wuzda mey a na, ata ta wuzdamara sem c…ôŇčga.
7.37: Nd…ôhay a r…ôzlam ga, a l…ôvam: ¬ęA key cek hay c…ôpa maaya. Kwa sl…ômay Ňčga ndaw madagazlam na, a wura. Kwa neneh Ňčga ndaw maada na, a t…ôrda dadakw saba.¬Ľ

8.1: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene masa Yesu fa p…ôkey daa hwayak Ňčga Berney-Hay-Kuraw heyey na, nd…ôhay ga a samawa, a kusam a cakay a saya. Cek fa ata Ňčga z…ômey daa ba. Yesu a z…ôlt…ôrwa gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar:
8.2: ¬ęDey-ceceh fa kaya fa nd…ôhay makustakaya ke…óe, maja aŇčga kaa …óar maakar ata da cakay a…óaw. Wure ke…óe cek mez…ômey da har ata daa saba.
8.3: Da ya mb…ôkdata Ňčga diyam a way ata hay ta may na, fa da h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč daa c…ôve…ó daa ba, maja nd…ôhay siya hay da wuzlah ata, a samawa da d…ôreŇč.¬Ľ
8.4: Gula aŇčga hay a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAl…ôkwa daa wuzlah-ley ke…óe na, ya da h…ôtkurwa peŇč Ňčga r…ôhey nd…ôhay tabiya ke…óe na, dama?¬Ľ
8.5: Yesu aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa har akwar fe…óe kaa na, peŇč we?¬Ľ A l…ôvam: ¬ęDa fe…óe na, peŇč maasala daha.¬Ľ
8.6: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey Ňčga njam a hwayak. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a h…ôla peŇč maasala heyey, a kar suse a Gazlavay. A pap…ôsa, a v…ôldatara a gula aŇčga hay amba a wunkamatara a nd…ôhay a. Ta‚Äô, a wunkamatara.
8.7: Da har ata, ewet mec…ôhe mec…ôhe nek…ô…óey daha saya. Yesu a kar suse a Gazlavay. Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay Ňčga wunkamatara saya.
8.8: Kwa waawa ta h…ôtey cek mez…ômey la, haa a r…ôhey. Ta‚Äô, gula aŇčga hay a cakalamara siya ma mb…ôkdakaya. Macakalakaya ha a r…ôhey gadakar mahura mahura maasala.
8.9: Nd…ôhay ma z…ômam cek fete…óe he na, a f…ôna nd…ôhay gabal m…ôfa…ó. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay a Ňčga v…ôham a way ata hay d…ô…ďa.
8.10: Wure wure Ňčgene, a t…ôpam ta gula aŇčga hay aa kwambiwal, a diyam aa hwayak Ňčga Dalmanuta. Fariza hay aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu Ňčga key maazla (Matiye 16.1-4)
8.11: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *Fariza hay a wusmawa fa Yesu, a zlamar mekey yawa ta aŇčga. A wu…óam a jadamara. Da ray Ňčgene, aa c…ôf…óamara amba a key maazla Ňčga wuzda g…ôdaŇč aŇčga a sawa ta fa Bay Gazlavay.
8.12: Yesu a s…ôfney ta g…ôdaŇč, a g…ôrey maja a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ba, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe aa c…ôf…óam maazla Ňčga wuzd…ôrwa ara Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdiwa na, maja me? Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ya fa da key maazla ha daa ba.¬Ľ
8.13: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ôkdata Fariza hay a, a daw a mb…ôzey aa kwambiwal Ňčga t…ôŇčgey a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile. Mey-meŇčgey da ray mees…ôrkedey Ňčga Fariza hay (Matiye 16.5-12)
8.14: Daa kwambiwal a na, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu ata ta peŇč pal gway. A s…ôrfadamara Ňčga handawa peŇč a dey a saba.
8.15: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a k…ôtata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWam vaw fa cek ma h…ôsla peŇč Ňčga *Fariza hay, leŇč fa cek ma h…ôsla peŇč Ňčga Bay *Herawt.¬Ľ
8.16: Gula aŇčga hay a wulkam, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAa guzley anda ke…óe na, maja al…ôkwa ma sakurwa ta peŇč daa ba daw?¬Ľ
8.17: Yesu a s…ôra cek masa ata maa guzlam da wuzlah ata. Da ray Ňčgene, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wulkam da ray peŇč masa akwar ma handamawa daa ba na, maja me? Haa wure ke…óe akwar na, ka c…ôndamara mey a ba c…ôŇčga daw? Akwar na, ray maŇčg…ôr…óakaya.
8.18: -19 Akwar fa n…ôkam dey, ama ka h…ôtmar dey ba daw? Akwar fa j…ôkam sl…ômay, ama ka c…ônam sl…ômay ba daw? Daa masa yah ma wunkata peŇč zlam Ňčgada nd…ôhay gabal zlam heyey na, mamb…ôkakaya na, a r…ôhey gadakar we? Akwar fa s…ôrfadamara, ba diya?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęGadakar hay kuraw a ray a cew.¬Ľ
8.20: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęDaa masa yah ma wunkatara peŇč maasala Ňčgada nd…ôhay gabal m…ôfa…ó heyey na, ka r…ôham gadakar mahura hay ta peŇč mamb…ôkakaya na, we?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęGadakar mahura mahura maasala.¬Ľ
8.21: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa s…ôrfadamara cek masa yah ma ka, ama haa wure ke…óe ka c…ôndamara mey masa yah maa guzlda da ray cek ma h…ôsla peŇč ke…óe ba c…ôŇčga daw?¬Ľ Yesu a wurey dey Ňčga ndaw-wulaf
8.22: Ta‚Äô, Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a wusam a Betsayda. Fete…óe a handamawa ndaw-wulaf fa v…ô…óa, a kamar ambahw Ňčga g…ôsfar har fa ndaw aha amba dey aŇčga a wurey.
8.23: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu ta‚Äô, a k…ôrza ndaw aha fa har, a …óa…óa d…ôreŇč ta slala ha. Ta‚Äô, a kar meesle…ď fa dey Ňčga ndaw aha, a par har fa dey, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa fa h…ôtar dey d…ô…ďa daw?¬Ľ
8.24: Ndaw-wulaf a, a baŇčga…óa dey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa h…ôtatar nd…ôhay, ama ata anda wudez hay ma diyam.¬Ľ
8.25: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a g…ôsfar har fa dey saya. Ndaw aha, dey aŇčga a wurey, a h…ôtatar cek hay maaya maaya d…ô…ďa.
8.26: Yesu aa guzlar Ňčga daw a way, a k…ôta, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da daw ta Betsayda ke…óe ba, daw a way …óagay.¬Ľ Piyer a wuzda, Yesu na, ara K…ôriste (Matiye 16.13-20; Luk 9.18-21)
8.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a diyam a slala hay masa gweegwe ta slala mahura mez…ôley Sezere-F…ôlep. Masa ata fa diyam daa c…ôve…ó na, Yesu aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYah na, nd…ôhay a padamaya na, Ňčga wa?¬Ľ
8.28: A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęNd…ôhay siya a l…ôvam kah na, *JaŇč-Baptis. Mekele hay a l…ôvam kah na, *Eli, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle. Mekele hay saya a l…ôvam kah na, ndaw pal dasi nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle.¬Ľ
8.29: Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKaa akwar may, ka l…ôvam yah na, wa?¬Ľ Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
8.30: Ta‚Äô, a k…ôtata gula aŇčga hay, a katar mey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa da wuzdamara mey a ke…óe a ndaw ba.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley da ray mem…ôcey aŇčga ta masl…ôk…óawa aŇčga (Matiye 16.21-28; Luk 9.22-27)
8.31: Yesu, ta‚Äô, aa s…ôrkadata gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSi yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya s…ôrey banay la ga …óagay. Mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, leŇč *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a r…ôsmaya la, fa da t…ô…ďmara ara Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdiwa na, daa ba. A da k…ô…ómaya vagay, Ňčga …óar maakar a na, ya sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
8.32: A wuzdatara mey a ke…óe, …ďa‚Äô a palah ta …ďada daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, *Piyer ta‚Äô, a z…ôla ta cakay, a mb…ô…óar ray.
8.33: Yesu p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey dey, a n…ôkta gula aŇčga hay siya. Ta‚Äô, a kar mey a Piyer, a l…ôvar: ¬ęHway la da cakay a…óaw, kah, *SataŇč. Maja mewulkey akah Ňčgene na, ara mewulkey Ňčga Gazlavay ba, ama ara mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč gway.¬Ľ
8.34: Ta‚Äô, a z…ôlta nd…ôhay makustakaya Ňčga Ňčg…ôchamawa a cakay ata ta gula aŇčga hay. A l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga s…ôpya na, si a mb…ôkda mewulkey da ray ray aŇčga, a s…ôpya ta mevel pal, si a …ď…ôsa banay ma da sawa a ray a maja yah, anda yah ma da m…ôcey fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya.
8.35: S…ôrmara, kwa waawa ma wu…óey Ňčga l…ôhda heter aŇčga na, a key Ňčgene, aa z…ô…óda. Ama kwa waawa maa z…ô…óda heter aŇčga maja aŇčga fa s…ôpya, asaya, maja aŇčga fa wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay na, a key Ňčgene, a l…ôhda heter aŇčga ha.
8.36: Da ndaw a h…ôtey cek hay tabiya masa aŇčga ma wu…óey da b…ôla ke…óe, ama taa z…ô…óda heter aŇčga sem na, cek hay a tabiya Ňčgene, ta l…ôhdamara ndaw a la daw?
8.37: Yaw, ndaw a gwa Ňčga mb…ô…óa heter aŇčga ta cek ba.
8.38: Kwa waawa ma paya hwaray, da daa ba, ma key hwaray Ňčga t…ô…ďa mey a…óaw fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay da b…ôla wure ke…óe masa ma mb…ôkdamara Bay Gazlavay sem ta masa ma kam meb…ôrey ke…óe na, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya par hwaray la ta pas masa yah ma da v…ôhwa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Papay leŇč ta maslaŇč aŇčga hay.¬Ľ

9.1: Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah akwar fe…óe, fa da m…ôcam daa ba, si ata ma h…ôtmar Bay Gazlavay fa wey ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga la …óagay.¬Ľ Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a h…ôtmatar ata Eli ta Mawiz faa guzlam ta Yesu (Matiye 17.1-13; Luk 9.28-36)
9.2: ∆äar maakwaw fa d…ô…ďa ha na, Yesu ta‚Äô, a z…ôlta ata *Piyer, *Jak, leŇč *JaŇč, a Ňčg…ôlta aa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa maaz…ôma daa slam aha, a njam taava ata fete…óe. Yesu p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey fa dey ata.
9.3: Zana aŇčga a t…ôrey mabara, a we…óey nd…ô…ó-nde…ó. Mewe…óey Ňčga zana ha Ňčgene na, kwa ndaw da b…ôla ke…óe ma gwa Ňčga p…ôra zana ha Ňčga we…óey k…ône daa ba.
9.4: Wure wure Ňčgene, gula aŇčga hay maakar heyey, a h…ôtmatar ata *Eli ta *Mawiz, nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle, faa guzlam ta Yesu.
9.5: Da ray Ňčgene, Piyer aa guzlar a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay ala, maaya na, ya njakwa fe…óe. Ya da k…ôrcam slam hay maakar, pal Ňčgada kah, pal Ňčgada Mawiz, pal Ňčgada Eli.¬Ľ
9.6: Piyer aa guzley anda ke…óe na, maja mand…ôrzay fa katar kalah, a s…ôra mey masa aa maa guzlda ba.
9.7: Ta‚Äô, mekwtene a s…ôrtata. Daa mekwtene he na, a c…ônam …óay ma l…ôvey: ¬ęKe…óe he ara B…ôzey a…óaw masa yah ma wu…óa kalah. J…ôkfamar sl…ômay!¬Ľ
9.8: Wure wure Ňčgene, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a, a n…ôkam dey ta cakay, ama a h…ôtmatar nd…ôhay a saba, si a h…ôtam na, Yesu pal taava aŇčga da cakay ata.
9.9: Masa ata fa b…ôrŇčgamawa da aŇčgwa ha na, Yesu a k…ôtata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek masa akwar ma h…ôtm…ôrwa ke…óe na, ka da wuzdamara a ndaw ba s…ôlak, haa kasl pas masa yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ma da sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
9.10: Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a, a t…ô…ďmara mek…ôtey a ke…óe, ama aa c…ôf…óam vaw da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęMasl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey na, mey a, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey na, kwara?¬Ľ
9.11: Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęNd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, a l…ôvam si Eli a sawa la teese…ó da ray *K…ôriste na, maja me?¬Ľ
9.12: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAhaw, fara fara Eli a sawa la teese…ó Ňčga …óiyta cek hay c…ôpa maaya maaya. Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a s…ôrey banay la ga, nd…ôhay a r…ôsmara la. Akwar fa s…ôrfadamara mey a ke…óe daw?
9.13: Yaw, ya fa l…ôvkwar Eli na, ta sawa cay. Anda …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey da ray a zleezle na, nd…ôhay ta kamar cek maaya ba la anda ata ma wu…óam.¬Ľ Yesu a bada cek da ray b…ôzey (Matiye 17.14-21; Luk 9.37-43a)
9.14: Ata Yesu ta ata *Piyer, *Jak, leŇč *JaŇč a Ňčg…ôcham gweegwe ta *gula hay Ňčga Yesu siya zlam-letek. Fete…óe a h…ôtam nd…ôhay ga da cakay gula hay a. *Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daha fete…óe, fa kam yawa ta gula hay zlam-letek e.
9.15: Masa nd…ôhay heyey ma h…ôtmar Yesu la na, wure Ňčgene ata c…ôpa a r…ôzlam, a wusam vaw Ňčgada fa aŇčga amba a camar har.
9.16: Yesu aa c…ôf…óata gula aŇčga hay fete…óe, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa kam yawa ta nd…ôhay ke…óe na, da ray me?¬Ľ
9.17: Ndaw pal da wuzlah nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ya ta handakawa b…ôzey a…óaw la. AŇčga ta cek da ray, fa t…ôka Ňčgaa guzley.
9.18: Kwa daa wura daa wura masa cek aha ta zlar la na, a t…ô…óda a hwayak, maŇčgwafakw a bawa da mey, aa p…ô…óey sler, vaw aŇčga a mberey. Ya ta cac…ôf…óata gula akah hay la amba a badamara cek aha na, ama ta gwamara daa ba.¬Ľ
9.19: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara a nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar s…ôkway Ňčga nd…ôhay ma pamaya Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara ba ke…óe. Ya da njey ta akwar na, haa ta vara? Ya da …ď…ôskwar na, haa ta vara? Yaw, handamiwa b…ôzey a.¬Ľ
9.20: Ta‚Äô, a handamara b…ôzey a fa Yesu. Masa b…ôzey a ma h…ôtar Yesu na, wure Ňčgene, cek aha aa wasada. Ta‚Äô, b…ôzey a, a t…ô…óey a hwayak, a p…ôtkweley da hwayak, maŇčgwafakw a bawa da mey.
9.21: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa c…ôf…óa papaŇč Ňčga b…ôzey a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęCek aha a zlar anda ke…óe na, d…ôga Ňčga vara?¬Ľ Papaha a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęA zlar d…ôga daa b…ôzey.
9.22: Ta pas mekele cek aha, a t…ô…óda aa awaw, da daa ba, a t…ô…óda aa yam amba a k…ô…óa vagay. Da ka gwa Ňčga …ď…ôla cek da ray b…ôzey a na, ambahw, s…ôrfandar dey-ceceh, j…ônndar may taw!¬Ľ
9.23: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa l…ôvey da ya gwa Ňčga …ď…ôla na, maja me? Ya gwa ya key cek hay c…ôpa Ňčgada ndaw ma paya Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara.¬Ľ
9.24: Wure Ňčgene, papaŇč Ňčga b…ôzey a, a wudey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa paka Ňčga ndaw a…óaw fara fara, ama aŇčga ta banay Ňčgada yah, si ka j…ônya Ňčga paka Ňčga ndaw a…óaw ma f…ôna.¬Ľ
9.25: Masa Yesu ma n…ôkta nd…ôhay ga fa hwamawa Ňčga n…ôkey cek masa aa ma ka na, a bab…ôcar a cek da ray b…ôzey a heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah, cek ma t…ôka b…ôzey ke…óe Ňčgaa guzley, ma t…ôka Ňčga j…ôkey sl…ômay, ya fa l…ôvka, bey, daw! Ka da v…ôhwa a ray a saba!¬Ľ
9.26: Ta‚Äô, cek aha, a zlar saya, a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč. Aa wasada b…ôzey a ta g…ôdaŇč, a t…ô…óda a hwayak. Cek aha, a bey da ray b…ôzey a. Nd…ôhay ga da cakay a, a l…ôvam: ¬ęB…ôzey a ta m…ôcey sem.¬Ľ Aa guzlam anda ke…óe na, maja b…ôzey a, ta …ď…ôrzley sem.
9.27: Ama Yesu a k…ôrza fa har, a sl…ôk…óada. Ta‚Äô, b…ôzey a, a lecey.
9.28: Yesu ta‚Äô, a daw a way. Masa ata taava ata ta gula aŇčga hay da way na, gula aŇčga hay a, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAla ta gwamara Ňčga badamara cek da ray b…ôzey a daa ba na, maja me?¬Ľ
9.29: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęŇäga bey cek anda ke…óe da ray ndaw na, si ta med…ôrey-daŇčgay a Bay Gazlavay gway.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley saya da ray mem…ôcey aŇčga ta masl…ôk…óawa aŇčga (Matiye 17.22, 23; Luk 9.43b-45)
9.30: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a sl…ôk…óam daa slam aha Ňčgene, a diyam taa hwayak Ňčga *Galile a Kapernayum. Yesu a wu…óey nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara a lawa dama ba,
9.31: maja aŇčga faa s…ôrkadata gula aŇčga hay. Daa mees…ôrkey a na, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęA da k…ôrzamaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw. A da v…ôldamaya a har nd…ôhay. Nd…ôhay a, a da k…ô…ómaya vagay, ama Ňčga …óar maakar a na, ya sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
9.32: Ama gula aŇčga hay ta c…ôndamara mey masa Yesu maa guzldatara Ňčgene daa ba. Asaya, a zluram Ňčgaa c…ôf…óamara mey a. Mahura dasi gula hay Ňčga Yesu na, wa? (Matiye 18.1-5; Luk 9.46-48)
9.33: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a wusam a Kapernayum, a mb…ôzam a way. Masa ata da way a na, Yesu aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęŇäga fene, ka kam yawa daa c…ôve…ó na, da ray me?¬Ľ
9.34: Ama a njam teete, maja daa masa ata daa c…ôve…ó na, ta kam yawa la da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęMahura dasi al…ôkwa na, wa?¬Ľ
9.35: Yesu, ta‚Äô, a njey ta njey, a z…ôlta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa ndaw a wu…óey a key mahura da ray nd…ôhay na, si a pa ray aŇčga Ňčga mec…ôhe, a j…ônta nd…ôhay tabiya.¬Ľ
9.36: A ley b…ôzey mec…ôhe, a lacada a wuzlah ata. A k…ôrza b…ôzey a fa har, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay:
9.37: ¬ęN…ôkmara b…ôzey masa yah ma k…ôrza ke…óe. Yaw, kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďey b…ôzey anda b…ôzey mec…ôhe ke…óe maja a wu…óya na, ndaw aha a key Ňčgene, a t…ô…ďey yah, ray a…óaw. Asaya, kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďya na, a t…ô…ďey Ňčgene, yah pal taava a…óaw ba, ama a key a t…ô…ďey Bay Gazlavay ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa may.¬Ľ Ndaw masa-g…ôra al…ôkwa ba na, ara jam al…ôkwa (Luk 9.49-50)
9.38: *JaŇč aa guzlar a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay ala, ala ta h…ôtam ndaw daha la fa …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay ta mez…ôley akah. Ya wu…óam Ňčga t…ôkmara maja ara ndaw da wuzlah al…ôkwa ba.¬Ľ
9.39: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa da t…ôkmara ba, maja da ndaw a gwa mekey maazla maaya ta g…ôdaŇč ma sawa ta mez…ôley a…óaw na, ndaw aha fa daa guzley mey maaya ba da ray a…óaw na, daa ba.
9.40: Anda ke…óe, ndaw masa aŇčga masa-g…ôra al…ôkwa ba na, ara jam al…ôkwa.
9.41: Yaw, ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ndaw ma j…ônkwar ta cek nek…ô…óey, kwa a v…ôlkwar yam Ňčga sey maja akwar nd…ôhay a…óaw hay na, Bay Gazlavay a p…ôlra mawur…ďay aŇčga la.¬Ľ Pam leŇčgesl fa cek ma hendey ndaw aa meb…ôrey (Matiye 18.6-9; Luk 17.1-2)
9.42: ¬ęKwa waawa ma betey ndaw pal dasi nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey a…óaw hay ke…óe Ňčga key meb…ôrey na, Ňčgada aŇčga na, Ňčgama ata ma j…ôwmar aŇčgwa mahura a …óay, ma k…ôzlamara aa b…ôlay.
9.43: Anja da har akah, fa h…ôldaka Ňčga key meb…ôrey na, …ó…ôsla har a. Ňägama kah ma h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba ta har pal, da ray kah ma da mb…ôzey aa awaw mend…ôvey ba masa daa v…ôge…ó Ňčga awaw magaza ta har akah hay cewete. [
9.44: Fete…óe, ‚Äúm…ôtal ma z…ômey ndaw fa da nd…ôvey daa ba, awaw fa da m…ôcey daa ba.‚ÄĚ]
9.45: Da salay akah, fa h…ôldaka Ňčga key meb…ôrey na, …ó…ôsla salay a. Ňägama kah ma h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba ta salay pal, da ray kah ma da mb…ôzey aa v…ôge…ó Ňčga awaw magaza ta salay akah hay cewete. [
9.46: Fete…óe, ‚Äúm…ôtal ma z…ômey ndaw fa da nd…ôvey daa ba, awaw fa da m…ôcey daa ba.‚ÄĚ]
9.47: Da dey akah, fa h…ôldaka Ňčga key meb…ôrey na, wuzlka dey a. Ňägama kah ma mb…ôzey ta dey pal aa slam masa Gazlavay ma wey da ray nd…ôhay aŇčga hay da va…ó, da ray kah ma da mb…ôzey aa v…ôge…ó Ňčga awaw magaza ta dey akah hay cewete.
9.48: Fete…óe, ‚Äúm…ôtal ma z…ômey ndaw fa da nd…ôvey daa ba, awaw fa da m…ôcey daa ba.‚ÄĚ
9.49: ¬ęS…ôrmara, Gazlavay a jada ndaw aŇčga maaya, da daa ba, maaya ba na, ta awaw leŇč ta manda .
9.50: Manda na, ara cek maaya. Ama da manda ha a c…ôrey saba na, ya da kadakwa amba a c…ôrey saya na, kwara? Akwar na, kam maaya a nd…ôhay anda manda ma c…ôrda cek. Njam ta zazay da wuzlah akwar, ka da t…ôram vaw ba.¬Ľ

10.1: Yesu a sl…ôk…óey da slala Kapernayum, a daw aa hwayak Ňčga *Jude da dey laŇčgar Ňčga wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč. Nd…ôhay a kusam ga a cakay a saya. Aa faa s…ôrkadata anda aa ma ka mandaw mandaw.
10.2: *Fariza hay a diyam fa v…ô…óa, amba a jadamara. Aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKwakwas al…ôkwa a v…ôley c…ôve…ó a ndaw Ňčga …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga daw?¬Ľ
10.3: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę*Mawiz a l…ôvkwar Ňčga key na, kwariya?¬Ľ
10.4: Fariza hay a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęMawiz a l…ôvey da ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga na, si a wuzlalar …óerewel Ňčga …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga ha …óagay, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a …ď…ôla.¬Ľ
10.5: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęS…ôrmara, Mawiz a wuzlala *mewey a Ňčgene na, maja mevel akwar maaya ba, ka g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba.
10.6: Daa mezley Ňčga b…ôla, ‚ÄúGazlavay a l…ômwa na, zel ta Ňčgwas‚ÄĚ, ba diya?
10.7: ‚ÄúMaja Ňčgene, ndaw-mez…ôle a mb…ôkda papaha ta mamaha, amba a c…ômam ta Ňčgwas aŇčga.
10.8: Ata cewete, a t…ôram anda ndaw pal.‚ÄĚ Anda ke…óe, ata nd…ôhay cew saba, ama ata anda ndaw pal.
10.9: Yaw, cek masa Gazlavay ma c…ôma sem anda ke…óe na, ndaw a da wunka ba.¬Ľ
10.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay ma v…ôham cay a way na, gula aŇčga hay aa c…ôf…óamara saya da ray me…ď…ôley Ňčgwas.
10.11: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwa waawa ma …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a ley mekele na, ndaw aha a key Ňčgene, a ley vaw saw da palah, a key a kar cek maaya ba Ňčgada Ňčgwas aŇčga mahura.
10.12: Ňägada Ňčgusay may, da Ňčgwas a mb…ôkda zel e, a daw asi ndaw mekele na, Ňčgwas aha a key Ňčgene, a ley vaw saw da palah.¬Ľ Yesu a p…ôstar mey a b…ôza hay (Matiye 19.13-15; Luk 18.15-17)
10.13: Nd…ôhay a handamata b…ôza hay fa Yesu amba a patar har a ray, a p…ôstar mey. Ama gula aŇčga hay a kamatar mey a nd…ôhay a.
10.14: Masa Yesu ma n…ôka cek masa gula aŇčga hay ma kamara ha na, a mbafar ba, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMb…ôkdamat…ôrwa b…ôza hay Ňčga samawa fa yah! Ka da t…ôkmata ba, maja Gazlavay fa wey da ray nd…ôhay masa anda b…ôza hay a.
10.15: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da ndaw fa t…ô…ďa Bay Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray a anda b…ôzey mec…ôhe ma t…ô…ďa daa ba na, ndaw aha fa da mb…ôzey a wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wey da ray ata na, daa ba.¬Ľ
10.16: Ta‚Äô, a lata b…ôza hay a, a har aŇčga, a patar har a ray, a p…ôstar mey. Ndaw masa-zleley aa c…ôf…óa Yesu da ray meh…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba (Matiye 19.16-30; Luk 18.18-30)
10.17: Masa Yesu fa da daw aa slam mekele na, gula daha a hawa fa aŇčga, a regedey fa mey aŇčga, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ndaw masa maaya, ya da key amba ya h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba na, me?¬Ľ
10.18: Yesu, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa z…ôlya ndaw maaya na, maja me? Ndaw maaya na, Gazlavay pal taava aŇčga.
10.19: Yaw, ka s…ôra *mewey hay Ňčga Gazlavay, ba diya? Ara mey ma l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKa da k…ô…óey ndaw vagay ba, ka da ley vaw saw da palah ba, ka da leley ba, ka da mb…ôrzley a ray ndaw ba, ka da t…ôkney cek Ňčga ndaw ba, natar ray Ňčgada ata papakw ta mamakw.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
10.20: Ndaw a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, d…ôga yah daa zariya a…óaw, ya ta zl…ô…ďta mewey hay a Ňčgene daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
10.21: Yesu a n…ôka ndaw aha, a wu…óa, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęCek pal ma mb…ôkaka daha Ňčga key. Anda ke…óe, daw, h…ô…ókadata cek akah hay tabiya, wunkatara dala ha a masa-viya hay. Da ka ta ka la k…ône na, ka da h…ôtey zleley fa Gazlavay da va…ó. Masa kah ma v…ôldatara dala ha cay a masa-viya hay na, sawa, s…ôpya.¬Ľ
10.22: Masa ndaw a ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe la na, a nd…ôr…ďa dey, a daw, aŇčga ta mees…ômey daa ba, maja aŇčga ta zleley ga, a wu…óey a v…ôlda a nd…ôhay mekele ba.
10.23: Yesu a n…ôkta gula aŇčga hay da cakay a, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAŇčga ta banay ga Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa-zleley amba a t…ô…ďmara Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray ata.¬Ľ
10.24: Gula aŇčga hay a r…ôzlam ga da ray mey a. Ama Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęB…ôz a…óaw hay, aŇčga ta banay Ňčgada ndaw amba a t…ô…ďa Bay Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray a .
10.25: Ahaw, aŇčga ta banay Ňčgada slagwama Ňčga mb…ôzey taa v…ôge…ó Ňčga baatal. Ama aŇčga ta banay ga ma f…ôna saya Ňčgada ndaw masa-zleley Ňčga t…ô…ďa Bay Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray a.¬Ľ
10.26: Gula aŇčga hay a r…ôzlam ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč, aa c…ôf…óam vaw da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęDa anda ke…óe na, ma da l…ôhey daa meb…ôrey na, wa?¬Ľ
10.27: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a n…ôkta, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMel…ôhey daa meb…ôrey na, ara cek masa ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma gwa Ňčga ka ba. Ama Gazlavay a gwa Ňčga l…ôhda ndaw maja aŇčga na, a gwa a kata cek hay tabiya.¬Ľ
10.28: *Piyer a l…ôvar a Yesu: ¬ęYaw, ala na, ya ta mb…ôkdamat…ôrwa cek ala hay sem c…ôpa, amba ya s…ôpmaka.¬Ľ
10.29: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da ndaw a mb…ôkd…ôrwa way aŇčga, da daa ba, a mb…ôkdat…ôrwa m…ôlmaha hay, dam-mamaha hay, mamaha, papaha, b…ôz aŇčga hay, da daa ba, a mb…ôkdat…ôrwa ley aŇčga hay, amba a s…ôpya, asaya amba a wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya na,
10.30: ndaw aha, daa masa aŇčga da b…ôla na, a h…ôtey cek hay a la ma f…ôna, a key dey temere a ray cek hay masa aŇčga ma mb…ôkdat…ôrwa ha. Anda mel…ôvey, a da h…ôtey way hay, m…ôlmaŇč hay, dam-mamaŇč hay, mamaŇč hay, b…ôza hay, ta ley hay mekele mekele saya. Asaya, nd…ôhay a s…ôrdamara banay la ga maja mey a…óaw. Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla na, a h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba la saya.
10.31: Yaw, nd…ôhay ga ma t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw Ňčgeeme, a da v…ôham fa d…ô…ďa. Asaya, nd…ôhay masa fa d…ô…ďa, a da diyam fa mey.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley Ňčga dey maakar da ray mem…ôcey aŇčga ta masl…ôk…óawa aŇčga (Matiye 20.17-19; Luk 18.31-34)
10.32: Ata Yesu ta nd…ôhay mekele, ata daa c…ôve…ó ma daw a *Jeruzelem. Yesu fa daw fa mey Ňčga gula aŇčga hay. Gula aŇčga hay a, ray ata fa h…ô…ďey maja a s…ôrmara Yesu a da s…ôrey banay da Jeruzelem, ama aŇčga fa daw a Jeruzelem e c…ôŇčga. Asaya, nd…ôhay mekele masa ma s…ôpmatar wurzay na, fa diyam ta mand…ôrzay daa dey. Yesu a Ňčg…ôlta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew saya ta cakay, aa guzltar da ray cek masa ma da h…ôtfar.
10.33: A l…ôvtar: ¬ęEhe, al…ôkwa fa nakwa a Jeruzelem. Fete…óe na, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a da v…ôldamaya a har *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. A da kamaya sariya Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay, a da v…ôldamaya a har nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba.
10.34: Nd…ôhay a na, aa saŇčg…ôram la a ray a…óaw, a t…ôfmaya meesle…ď la aa dey, a sl…ô…ómaya la ta laway. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a k…ô…ómaya la vagay. Ňäga …óar maakar a na, ya sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ Ata Jak ta JaŇč a s…ôpam Ňčga key mahura (Matiye 20.20-28)
10.35: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu masa b…ôza hay Ňčga Zebede, ata *Jak ta *JaŇč, a samawa fa Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, ya wu…óam ka kandar cek masa ala ma daa c…ôf…óamaka.¬Ľ
10.36: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wu…óam ya kakwar na, me?¬Ľ
10.37: A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęYa wu…óam ta pas masa kah ma da z…ôma bay akah na, p…ôskandar mey amba ndaw pal a njey ta har-z…ômay akah, ndaw laŇčgar a njey ta har-gula akah.¬Ľ
10.38: Maja Ňčgene, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa s…ôrmara cek masa akwar maa c…ôf…óam ba. Ka gwamara Ňčga s…ôram banay la anda yah ma da s…ôra daw? Da daa ba, ka gwamara Ňčga …ď…ôsmara banay la anda yah ma da …ď…ôsa daw?¬Ľ
10.39: A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAhaw, ya gwamara.¬Ľ Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAhaw, ka s…ôram banay la anda yah ma da s…ôra. Ka …ď…ôsmara banay la anda yah ma da …ď…ôsa.
10.40: Ama Ňčga njey ta har-z…ômay a…óaw, da daa ba, ta har-gula a…óaw na, ara yah ma da …ó…ôsla mey a Ňčgene ba. Ara Gazlavay ma da …óiyta slam hay a Ňčgene Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa aa ma walata.¬Ľ
10.41: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa gula aŇčga hay siya kuraw ma c…ôndamara mey a na, a cam mevel a ray ata Jak ta JaŇč.
10.42: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a z…ôlta tabiya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa s…ôrmara da wuzlah nd…ôhay da b…ôla ke…óe na, bay hay daha. Bay hay a na, fa wam da ray nd…ôhay ta g…ôdaŇč, asaya, mahura hay mekele fa wam da ray nd…ôhay ta c…ôve…ó e ba.
10.43: Ama da wuzlah akwar na, a da key k…ône ba. Yaw, da ndaw da wuzlah akwar a wu…óey Ňčga key mahura na, si a t…ôrey ndaw ma ka sl…ôra akwar.
10.44: Asaya, da ndaw da wuzlah akwar a wu…óey Ňčga key *bay-ray na, si a t…ôrey anda beke Ňčga nd…ôhay c…ôpa.
10.45: Maja, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya sawa a b…ôla na, amba nd…ôhay a kamaya sl…ôra ba. Ama ya sawa na, amba ya katar sl…ôra a nd…ôhay, ya v…ôlda heter a…óaw Ňčga l…ôhey nd…ôhay ga daa meb…ôrey.¬Ľ Yesu a wurey dey Ňčga ndaw-wulaf (Matiye 20.29-34; Luk 18.35-43)
10.46: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a wusam a Jerikwaw, a mb…ôzam a slala ha. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa Yesu fa bam da slala ha ta gula aŇčga hay leŇč nd…ôhay ga heyey na, ndaw-wulaf daha mez…ôley Bartime, ara b…ôzey Ňčga ndaw mez…ôley Time. Ndaw-wulaf a na, manjakaya fete…óe, fa r…ôkey da mey-c…ôve…ó.
10.47: Masa aŇčga ma c…ônda ara Yesu, ndaw *Nezeret, ma daw taa c…ôve…ó e na, a wudey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYesu, *B…ôzey Ňčga Davit, ambahw s…ôrfaya dey-ceceh, may taw!¬Ľ
10.48: Nd…ôhay ga heyey a kamar mey, a l…ôvmar Ňčga njey teete, ama ndaw-wulaf a, a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč c…ôŇčga, a l…ôvey: ¬ęB…ôzey Ňčga Davit, ambahw s…ôrfaya dey-ceceh, may taw!¬Ľ
10.49: Yesu ta‚Äô, a lecey, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay da cakay a: ¬ęZ…ôlm…ôrwa ndaw aha.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a z…ôlm…ôrwa, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęD…ôka mevel, lecey, Yesu fa z…ôlka.¬Ľ
10.50: Anda ke…óe, aa zakada gwedeere aŇčga, p…ôrta! a lecey, a daw fa Yesu.
10.51: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa wu…óey ya kaka na, me?¬Ľ Ndaw-wulaf a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ya wu…óey ka wuryawa dey a…óaw amba ya h…ôtar dey c…ôŇčga.¬Ľ
10.52: Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęDey akah ta wurey cay, maja kah ma paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara. Wure ke…óe, daw.¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene, dey aŇčga ta‚Äô, a wurey, a h…ôtar dey d…ô…ďa. Ta‚Äô, a s…ôpa Yesu daa madaw aŇčga.

11.1: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay fa diyam aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem. Masa ata gweegwe ta berney a na, a wusam gweegwe ta slala Betfaje leŇč ta slala Betani da rav AŇčgwa Ňčga *Awliviye. Ta‚Äô, Yesu, a sl…ôrey gula aŇčga hay cew teese…ó Ňčgada slala ha.
11.2: A l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam a slala fa mey akwar katay. Da akwar ma wusam la a slala ha na, ka h…ôtfam b…ôz-z…ôŇčgwaw maj…ôwkaya la fete…óe masa kwa ndaw ta t…ôpey a ray a daa ba araŇč. P…ôskam…ôrwa, handam…ôrwa fe…óe.
11.3: Da ndaw aa c…ôf…óakwar, a l…ôvey ka p…ôskamara z…ôŇčgwaw a Ňčga key me na, ka mb…ô…ódamara, ka l…ôvmar: ‚ÄúBay Mahura a wu…óey. A da v…ôhdakawa wure ke…óe.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
11.4: Da ray Ňčgene, a diyam, a h…ôtfamar b…ôz-z…ôŇčgwaw a, maj…ôwkaya da mey-c…ôve…ó gweegwe ta mey-mbew. A p…ôskam…ôrwa.
11.5: Nd…ôhay nek…ô…óey da wuzlah nd…ôhay fete…óe daha aa c…ôf…óamata, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęKa p…ôskamara z…ôŇčgwaw a na, keme?¬Ľ
11.6: A mb…ô…ódamatara, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęBay Mahura a wu…óey. A da v…ôhdakwara wure ke…óe.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a mb…ôkdamata Ňčga diyam ta z…ôŇčgwaw a.
11.7: A handam…ôrwa z…ôŇčgwaw a heyey a Yesu. A ciymata zana ata hay a ray z…ôŇčgwaw a. Ta‚Äô, Yesu a t…ôpey a ray a.
11.8: Nd…ôhay ga malacatakaya daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga cey ray ta Yesu, a ciyam zana ata hay aa c…ôve…ó e Ňčga h…ôslmar ray. Nd…ôhay mekele a diyam a b…ôzlhamawa mey-har Ňčga wudez hay da ley, a pamata aa c…ôve…ó e may.
11.9: Nd…ôhay fa diyam fa mey aŇčga, nd…ôhay mekele hay fa diyam fa d…ô…ďa aŇčga. Ata tabiya fa wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ę*Hawzana! H…ôlmakwa Bay Gazlavay! Anja Bay Gazlavay Ňčga p…ôsar mey a ndaw masa aa ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa ta mez…ôley aŇčga.
11.10: Anja Bay Gazlavay Ňčga p…ôsar mey a bay ma da wey aa slam a Ňčga Bay *Davit, papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa zleezle. H…ôlmakwa Bay Gazlavay da va…ó!¬Ľ
11.11: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ôzey aa berney Ňčga Jeruzelem. A daw aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. A saŇčgalata cek hay c…ôpa da hwa…ó a. Ta‚Äô, a diyam ta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew a Betani maja gweegwe tava…ó cay. Mey da ray wudez manjar bab…ôza (Matiye 21.18-19)
11.12: Pep…ôrek e, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a sl…ôk…óam da Betani heyey. Daa Ňčgene, may fa car a Yesu.
11.13: Masa ata fa diyam daa c…ôve…ó na, Yesu a h…ôtey wudez da d…ôreŇč, wudez e ma…óa…óakaya. Ta‚Äô, a daw a cakay a amba a n…ôka da bab…ôza fa wudez e daha kwa. Ama, a h…ôtfey fa wudez e na, si gwaslaf gway, bab…ôza fa v…ô…óa daa ba, maja ara kiya meyey bab…ôza ba.
11.14: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a n…ôsa wudez e, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAnja wudez ke…óe Ňčga yey bab…ôza saba Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ Masa aŇčga maa guzley anda ke…óe na, gula aŇčga hay ta c…ôndamara mey a la. Yesu a …ď…ôlta nd…ôhay daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay (Matiye 21.12-17; Luk 19.45-48; JaŇč 2.13-22)
11.15: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay, a wusmawa a *Jeruzelem. Yesu a mb…ôzey aa papalah Ňčga *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Fete…óe na, nd…ôhay fa kam luma. Maja Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a …ď…ôlta nd…ôhay ma h…ô…ókadam cek hay leŇč nd…ôhay ma h…ô…ókam cek hay. A b…ôzlta slam hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma mb…ô…óa dala ta jaŇčga hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma h…ô…ókadam makurgwadakw hay.
11.16: Asaya, Yesu a v…ôley c…ôve…ó kwa Ňčgada waawa Ňčga daw ta cek hay wura wura taa papalah Ňčga Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a ba.
11.17: Da ray Ňčgene, a sas…ôrkadata nd…ôhay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúWay a…óaw na, ara way amba nd…ôhay da b…ôla tabiya a d…ôrmaya daŇčgay da hwa…ó a.‚ÄĚ Ama akwar na, ka t…ôrdamara way a ke…óe Ňčga slam Ňčga mayal hay!¬Ľ
11.18: Masa *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma c…ôndamara mey masa Yesu ma kada ke…óe na, a s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga k…ô…ómara vagay maja ata fa zluram ta aŇčga. A zluram na, maja nd…ôhay ga fa r…ôzlam da ray mey masa aŇčga maa s…ôrkadatara.
11.19: Masa tava…ó ta key cay na, ta‚Äô, Yesu a bamawa ta gula aŇčga hay daa berney Ňčga Jeruzelem e. Mey da ray wudez masa Yesu ma n…ôsa heyey (Matiye 21.20-22)
11.20: Pep…ôrek e, masa ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay fa diyam taa c…ôve…ó ma daw a *Jeruzelem na, a h…ôtmar wudez manjar bab…ôza heyey ta kweley sem haa kasl fa slaslalay a.
11.21: *Piyer a s…ôrfada masa Yesu ma n…ôsa wudez e heyey, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a Yesu: ¬ęBay Mahura, n…ôka wudez masa kah ma l…ôvey Ňčga yey bab…ôza saba heyey na, ta kweley sem.¬Ľ
11.22: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęPamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara mandaw mandaw.
11.23: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ndaw a gwa a l…ôvar a aŇčgwa mahura: ‚ÄúSl…ôk…óey la fe…óe, k…ôzley aa b…ôlay.‚ÄĚ Da ndaw aha aŇčga ta mewulkey cew cew daa ba, asaya, da aŇčga fa wulkey fara fara daa mevel aŇčga Gazlavay a da kara cek masa aŇčga maa c…ôf…óa na, Gazlavay a kara la.
11.24: Maja Ňčgene, ya fa l…ôvkwar, da akwar fa d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay Ňčgaa c…ôf…óey cek, asaya, da akwar fa wulkam daa mevel akwar Gazlavay a v…ôldakwara cek aha la na, Gazlavay a v…ôldakwara cek aha la, kwa kaa c…ôf…óam meeme daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay akwar.
11.25: Yaw, da akwar fa d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay, mevel akwar fa cey a ray ndaw na, mb…ôkdamara meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw aha, amba Papakw akwar masa da va…ó a mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar may. [
11.26: Ama da ka mb…ôkdamatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay ba na, Papakw akwar masa da va…ó a mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar daa ba may.]¬Ľ Ma v…ôldara g…ôdaŇč a Yesu na, wa? (Matiye 21.23-27; Luk 20.1-8)
11.27: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a v…ôhmawa a *Jeruzelem saya. Masa Yesu fa p…ôkey daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas, ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, leŇč mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay a diyam fa aŇčga.
11.28: Aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęMa l…ôvka Ňčga kata cek hay a ke…óe na, wa? Ma v…ôlka c…ôve…ó Ňčga kata na, wa?¬Ľ
11.29: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAmba yaa c…ôf…óakwar mey pal. Da akwar ta mb…ô…ódamiwa mey a la na, ya kadakwara ndaw ma v…ôldiwa c…ôve…ó Ňčga kata cek hay a ke…óe la may.
11.30: Yaw, ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa *JaŇč-Baptis Ňčga katar *baptem a nd…ôhay na, wa? Gazlavay daw, da daa ba, nd…ôhay daw? Mb…ô…ódamiwa cey!¬Ľ
11.31: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a, a slam yawa da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa da mb…ô…ódakwa aa mey aŇčga ha na, kwara? Da ya l…ôvkwa: ‚ÄúAra Gazlavay ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa‚ÄĚ na, a da mb…ô…ódandakwara, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKaa ka t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis a ba na, maja me?‚ÄĚ
11.32: Ama da ya l…ôvkwa: ‚ÄúAra nd…ôhay ma sl…ôrdam…ôrwa‚ÄĚ na, nd…ôhay makustakaya da cakay al…ôkwa fa da t…ô…ďmara daa ba.¬Ľ Yaw, mahura hay a na, fa zluram ta nd…ôhay, maja ata c…ôpa a wulkam JaŇč-Baptis ara *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay fara fara.
11.33: Da ray Ňčgene, a mb…ô…ódamara a Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęYa s…ôrmara ba.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYaw, da anda ke…óe na, ya fa da kadakwara ndaw ma v…ôlya c…ôve…ó Ňčga kata cek hay a ke…óe na, daa ba may.¬Ľ

12.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a Ňčgatar mey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw daha a key jerne Ňčga wudez mez…ômey. Ta‚Äô, a zl…ô…ďa jerne he tabiya. A …óiyey slam Ňčga …ó…ôcey bab…ôza Ňčga wudez e. A l…ômey way mag…ôlkaya maaz…ôma Ňčgada ndaw ma j…ô…óa jerne he. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a h…ôley nd…ôhay aa jerne aŇčga ha Ňčga key sl…ôra da hwa…ó a. Ta‚Äô, a daw aa slam d…ôreŇč.
12.2: Masa kiya meŇčg…ôley bab…ôza Ňčga wudez e ta wuswa cay na, a sl…ôrey gula aŇčga pal da wuzlah mad…ôrlam aŇčga hay aa jerne he amba a t…ô…ďra bab…ôza maala Ňčga aŇčga.
12.3: Ama nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra daa jerne he a k…ôrzamara mad…ôrlam a, a sl…ô…ómara, a …ď…ôlmara a way, ta har …ďa‚Äô k…ône.
12.4: Ta‚Äô, bay Ňčga jerne he, a sl…ôrey mad…ôrlam aŇčga mekele fa ata. Nd…ôhay a, ta‚Äô, a sl…ônmar ray, a c…ô…ómara. Ta‚Äô, a …ď…ôlmara.
12.5: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, bay Ňčga jerne he, a sl…ôrey mad…ôrlam aŇčga mekele saya. Nd…ôhay a, a k…ô…ómara vagay. Anda ke…óe, a sl…ôrey mad…ôrlam aŇčga hay mekele mekele, ama nd…ôhay a, a sl…ô…ómata siya hay, asaya, a k…ô…ómata siya hay vagay.
12.6: Ndaw pal mamb…ôkakaya Ňčga sl…ôrey na, ara b…ôzey aŇčga mawu…ókaya kalah. A sl…ôrey Ňčga madagway-dakw na, b…ôzey aŇčga ha. A wulkey daa ray aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúFara fara a namar ray la a b…ôzey a…óaw.‚ÄĚ
12.7: Ama, masa b…ôzey a fa daw gweegwe ta jerne he na, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra ha a h…ôtmar, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúEhe, ndaw ma sawa katay na, ara b…ôzey ma da wa jerne he. Nakwa, k…ô…ókwa vagay, amba jerne he a njey Ňčgada al…ôkwa.‚ÄĚ
12.8: Da ray Ňčgene, a diyam, kaw! a k…ôrzamara b…ôzey a, a k…ô…ómara vagay, …ďa! a k…ôzlamara vagay a, a d…ô…ďa jerne he.¬Ľ
12.9: Yesu aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAkwar na, ka wulkam bay Ňčga jerne he, a da key na, kwara? Ehe, ya fa l…ôvkwar, bay Ňčga jerne he, a sawa la, a k…ô…óta nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra ha la vagay, a v…ôlda jerne he la, a har nd…ôhay mekele.
12.10: Akwar ta jaŇčgamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay la, ba diya? Mey masa ma l…ôvey: ‚ÄúAŇčgwa mel…ômey way masa nd…ôhay ma l…ôma way ma k…ôzlamara ta cakay na, aŇčgwa ha na, ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga aŇčgwa maaya mel…ômey way ma f…ônta siya hay jak.
12.11: Ňägene na, ara Bay Gazlavay ma ka cek aha, ara cek maaya fa dey al…ôkwa.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
12.12: Mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay a heyey a s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga k…ôrzamara Yesu, maja a s…ôrmara Yesu aa guzley mey-meŇčgey na, da ray ata. Ama ata fa zluram ta nd…ôhay fete…óe. Da ray Ňčgene, mahura hay a, a mb…ôkdamara, ta‚Äô, a diyam. Nd…ôhay mahura hay a jadamara Yesu da ray mep…ôley budaw (Matiye 22.15-22; Luk 20.20-26)
12.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mahura Ňčga *J…ôwif hay a sl…ôram *Fariza hay ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Bay *Herawt fa Yesu. A wu…óam a jadamara amba aa guzley mey maaya ba.
12.14: A diyam, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, ya s…ôrmara kah na, ndaw ma mb…ôrzley ba. Masa kah faa guzley na, ka zlurey ta ndaw ba, asaya, ka n…ôkta nd…ôhay c…ôpa letek fa mey akah. Ka faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay Ňčga njam anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey fara fara. Yaw, kwakwas al…ôkwa a v…ôley c…ôve…ó Ňčga p…ôley budaw a bay mahura *Sezere daw? Maaya na, ya p…ôlmara budaw a daw, ya p…ôlmara ba daw?¬Ľ
12.15: Ama Yesu a s…ôra, nd…ôhay a, aa guzlam ta neneh cew. Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wu…óam Ňčga jadamaya na, maja me? Lamaya dala ha pal amba ya n…ôka.¬Ľ
12.16: Ta‚Äô, a lamar dala ha. Yesu aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęFa dala ha ke…óe na, ara dey Ňčga wa? Ara mez…ôley Ňčga wa?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAra Ňčga Sezere, bay mahura Ňčga Rawm.¬Ľ
12.17: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek masa Ňčga Sezere na, v…ôldamara a Sezere he. Cek masa Ňčga Gazlavay na, v…ôldamara a Gazlavay a.¬Ľ Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay a, a r…ôzlam ga da ray mey Ňčga Yesu a. Saduse hay a jadamara Yesu da ray masl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey (Matiye 22.23-33; Luk 20.27-40)
12.18: Nd…ôhay *Saduse hay na, ara nd…ôhay ma wulkam, ma l…ôvam da ndaw ta m…ôcey sem na, fa da sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey daa ba. Nd…ôhay da wuzlah Saduse hay a, a diyam fa Yesu, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar:
12.19: ¬ęBay ala, zleezle *Mawiz ta wuzlalandakwar kwakwas la, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúDa ndaw m…ôlmaha ta m…ôcey sem na, da Ňčgwas Ňčga ndaw ma m…ôcey a, ta yawa b…ôza hay daa ba na, si m…ôlmaha a la Ňčgwas-vagay a, amba a yamawa b…ôza hay Ňčgada m…ôlmaha mam…ôckaya ha.‚ÄĚ
12.20: Yaw, m…ôlmaŇč hay maasala daha, ata Ňčgaa maŇč, Ňčgaa paŇč. M…ôlma ata mahura, leŇč! a ley Ňčgwas. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw aha pam! a m…ôcey ta h…ôtey b…ôzey daa ba.
12.21: Da ray Ňčgene, mambaray a, leŇč! a la Ňčgwas-vagay a, aŇčga pam! a m…ôcey saya ta h…ôtey b…ôzey daa ba may. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, m…ôlma ata mamaakar a, a la Ňčgwas-vagay a, ama pam! a m…ôcey ta h…ôtey b…ôzey ta Ňčgwas aha daa ba c…ôŇčga.
12.22: Anda ke…óe, ata maasala ata c…ôpa, ta lamara Ňčgwas aha la, ta m…ôcam sem c…ôpa, ta mb…ôkam b…ôza hay daa ba. Fa d…ô…ďa ha ata ma m…ôcam la c…ôpa ata na, Ňčgwas aha pam! a m…ôcey may.
12.23: Anda ke…óe, ta pas masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey na, Ňčgwas aha, a da key na, Ňčgwas Ňčga wa? Maja ata maasala ata c…ôpa ta lamara la Ňčga Ňčgwas ata.¬Ľ
12.24: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar faa z…ô…ódamara ray akwar anda ke…óe na, maja me? Ara maja ka s…ôrmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba ta maja ka s…ôrmara g…ôdaŇč aŇčga ba.
12.25: Yaw, daa masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey na, zel hay fa da lam Ňčgusay daa saba, Ňčgusay fa da njam ta zel hay daa saba, ama a da njam anda maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó.
12.26: Ya wu…óey yaa s…ôrkadakwar da ray masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey. Ka ta jaŇčgamara daa …óerewel masa Mawiz ma wuzlala la, ba diya? ∆äerewel e na, aa guzley da ray kusaf masa awaw meg…ô…óey da ray a. Fete…óe na, Gazlavay a l…ôvar a Mawiz: ‚ÄúYah, Gazlavay masa *Ab…ôraham, *Izak, leŇč *Jakwap ma namar ray.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
12.27: Yesu aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęGazlavay na, ara Gazlavay Ňčga nd…ôhay ta dey, ba na, ara Gazlavay Ňčga nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya ba. Akwar Saduse hay, ka ta zl…ô…ďmara mey a sem kalah!¬Ľ Mewey Ňčga Gazlavay masa mahura na, wura? (Matiye 22.34-40; Luk 10.25-28)
12.28: Masa nd…ôhay *Saduse hay heyey fa kam yawa ta Yesu na, ndaw da wuzlah *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daha, a wusey a cakay ata, a c…ônda yawa ata ha. A n…ôka na, Yesu ta mb…ô…ódatara mey a maaya maaya la. Da ray Ňčgene, aa c…ôf…óa Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ę*Mewey mahura ma f…ônta siya hay na, wura?¬Ľ
12.29: -30 Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMewey mahura ma f…ônta siya hay a na, ara mey ma l…ôvey: ‚ÄúJ…ôkam sl…ômay, akwar nd…ôhay *Israyel hay, Bay Gazlavay masa al…ôkwa ma nakwar ray na, aŇčga pal, Bay al…ôkwa mahura. Wu…ómara Gazlavay, Bay akwar, ta mevel akwar c…ôpa, ta mes…ôfney akwar c…ôpa, ta leŇčgesl akwar c…ôpa, ta g…ôdaŇč akwar c…ôpa.‚ÄĚ Mewey masa mahura na, ara mey ke…óe.
12.31: Yaw, *mewey mahura Ňčga dey cew e daha saya, mewey a, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúWu…óa meseembew akah anda kah ma wu…óa ray akah.‚ÄĚ Mewey hay masa ma f…ônmata cew hay ke…óe na, daa ba.¬Ľ
12.32: Ndaw maa s…ôrkada kwakwas heyey a l…ôvar: ¬ęMey akah maaya, Bay a…óaw! Mey masa kah maa guzlda ke…óe na, ara mey fara fara. Gazlavay, aŇčga pal taava aŇčga, Gazlavay mekele daa ba.
12.33: Si ndaw a wu…óa Gazlavay ta mevel aŇčga c…ôpa, ta leŇčgesl aŇčga c…ôpa, ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga c…ôpa. Asaya, si a wu…óa meseembew aŇčga anda aŇčga ma wu…óa ray aŇčga. Ndaw ma s…ôpta mewey hay a ke…óe na, a mbafar a Gazlavay a f…ôna mev…ôley cek hay ta meh…ôrey cek hay Ňčgada aŇčga.¬Ľ
12.34: Masa Yesu ma n…ôka ndaw aha ta mb…ô…ódara mey a la ta leŇčgesl maaya na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMewulkey akah Ňčgene maaya, gweegwe ka t…ô…ďa amba Gazlavay a wey da ray akah.¬Ľ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, kwa waawa ta g…ômey Ňčgaa c…ôf…óey mey fa Yesu a daa saba, maja a zluram fa mey aŇčga masa aŇčga ma da mb…ô…ódatara. K…ôriste, aŇčga bay Ňčga Davit na, kwara? (Matiye 22.41-46; Luk 20.41-44)
12.35: Masa Yesu faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvey: ¬ę*Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a l…ôvam *K…ôriste *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay na, ara b…ôzey da hwa…ó Bay *Davit na, kwara?
12.36: Ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, Davit ta l…ôvey la: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay a l…ôvar a Bay a…óaw Mahura: Sawa, njey ta har-z…ômay a…óaw amba ya wakwa da ray nd…ôhay haa ta pas masa yah ma da pata masa-g…ôra akah hay asi salay akah.‚ÄĚ
12.37: Davit ta ray aŇčga, a z…ôla K…ôriste ‚ÄúBay Mahura‚ÄĚ na, kaa wara K…ôriste he ara b…ôzey da hwa…ó Davit saya na, kwara?¬Ľ (Matiye 23.1-36; Luk 20.45-47) Nd…ôhay ga fa j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mees…ôrkey Ňčga Yesu ta mees…ômey.
12.38: Daa mees…ôrkey a na, Yesu a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay makustakaya ha: ¬ęWam vaw fa *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. A wu…óam mep…ôkey ta dawura hay fa vaw Ňčga zlepey. A wu…óam nd…ôhay a camatar har ta meney ray fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya.
12.39: Daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, a s…ôpam slam-menjey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay amba nd…ôhay tabiya a h…ôtmatar. Ta pas gwagway na, a s…ôpam slam-menjey maaya.
12.40: Asaya, fa t…ô…ďmatara cek hay Ňčga Ňčgwas-vagay hay tabiya. A njam daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay ga, aa guzlam ga amba nd…ôhay a l…ôvam ata maaya. Ya fa l…ôvkwar, ata na, Gazlavay a s…ôrdata banay la, ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay mekele!¬Ľ Mey da ray Ňčgwas-vagay masa-viya ma v…ôley cek a Gazlavay (Luk 21.1-4)
12.41: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a daw, a njey a cakay slam mecekeley dala daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. AŇčga fa n…ôkta nd…ôhay fete…óe ma pamara dala aa cek mecekeley dala. Nd…ôhay masa-zleley hay fa v…ôlam dala ga.
12.42: Ňägwas-vagay masa-viya daha, a sawa, a kwiyey sisey sisey cew aa cek aha may. Dala aŇčga ha, mekele daa ba.
12.43: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a z…ôlta gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, Ňčgwas-vagay masa-viya ke…óe na, ta pey dala la aa cek mecekeley dala ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay c…ôpa.
12.44: Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe na, maja nd…ôhay siya hay, a v…ôlam dala nek…ô…óey daa dey zleley ata hay da way ga. Ama Ňčgwas-vagay ke…óe, ta m…ôrga aŇčga c…ôpa, a v…ôlda zleley aŇčga tabiya, masa aŇčga ma da h…ô…ókey cek mez…ômey ta aŇčga.¬Ľ

13.1: Daa masa Yesu fa bawa daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, gula aŇčga pal aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, n…ôka Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ke…óe cey! S…ôkway Ňčga way wura, mal…ômkaya maaya ta aŇčgwa ma mbey anda ke…óe!¬Ľ
13.2: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa fa h…ôtar way a mal…ômkaya maaya masa mahura ke…óe, ba diya? Way a c…ôpa na, a b…ôzlmara la, kwa aŇčgwa pal fa da mb…ôkey da ray c…ôla daa ba.¬Ľ (Matiye 24.3-14; Luk 21.7-19)
13.3: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a daw aa AŇčgwa Ňčga *Awliviye, c…ôkwam! a njey dey p…ôla! Ňčgada fa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey. Ata *Piyer, *Jak, *JaŇč, leŇč *And…ôre, ata taava ata da cakay Yesu a. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar:
13.4: ¬ęWuzdandara cey, cek aha a da key na, ta vara? Ya da s…ôrmara …óar a ta wuswa cay na, fa me?¬Ľ
13.5: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a k…ôtata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWam vaw fa nd…ôhay ma da f…ôcmakwar.
13.6: S…ôrmara, nd…ôhay ga a samawa la ta mez…ôley a…óaw, kwa waawa a da l…ôvey aŇčga na, *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay. A t…ôknam nd…ôhay la ga.
13.7: Ta pas masa akwar ma da c…ônam v…ôram hay gweegwe ta akwar, asaya, ta pas masa akwar ma da c…ônam labara Ňčga v…ôram hay masa da d…ôreŇč na, ka da zluram ba, maja si cek hay a Ňčgene, a kam la teese…ó …óagay. Ama ara mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla ba araŇč.
13.8: Hwayak laŇčgar a da key v…ôram ta hwayak laŇčgar, bay laŇčgar a da key h…ôma a ray bay laŇčgar. Daa hwayak hay mekele mekele, hwiyak a wusey la. May a key la da b…ôla. Cek hay a na, a kam la anda hwa…ó ma zlar Ňčga car Ňčgada Ňčgwas ma da yey, anda mel…ôvey, ara mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla ba araŇč, ama ara mezley a.¬Ľ
13.9: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęAma akwar na, wam vaw! Nd…ôhay a handamakwar la fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sariya, a sl…ô…ómakwar la daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay. A handamakwar la fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay leŇč fa mey Ňčga bay hay, maja akwar nd…ôhay a…óaw hay. Anda ke…óe, ka da kam sede da ray a…óaw fa mey ata.
13.10: Yaw, Ňčgeeme na, si nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey a…óaw a wuzdamara *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray a…óaw a nd…ôhay da b…ôla c…ôpa la …óagay, wara cay b…ôla a nd…ôvey.
13.11: Pas masa ata ma da k…ôrzamakwar Ňčga hendey aa sariya na, ka da zluram da ray mey masa akwar ma daa guzlam ba. Ama, gwaguzlam mey masa Gazlavay ma da v…ôldakwara ta pas a Ňčgene, maja mey a na, a da sawa ta fa akwar ba, ama ta fa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay.
13.12: Ndaw a da v…ôlda m…ôlmaha amba a k…ô…ómara vagay. PapaŇč hay a kamara la k…ône Ňčgada b…ôza ata hay may. B…ôza hay a mb…ô…ómatar d…ô…ďa la a papa ata hay leŇč a mama ata hay, a v…ôldamata a nd…ôhay amba a k…ô…ómata vagay may.
13.13: Nd…ôhay tabiya a da Ňčg…ôldamakwar ba, maja yah. Ama ndaw ma …ď…ôsa banay a haa mend…ôvey a na, Gazlavay a l…ôhda la.¬Ľ Mey da ray banay ma da sawa a ray nd…ôhay da Jude (Matiye 24.15-28; Luk 21.20-24)
13.14: Yesu aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa …óar a ta wuswa cay na, ka h…ôtmar ndaw malamba ma n…ôsa cek la. Ara ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey Ňčga h…ôtar fa dey ba. Ndaw aha, a da njey na, aa slam aŇčga menjey ba. (Akwar masa ma jaŇčgamara mey a ke…óe na, si ka pam leŇčgesl fa mey a.) Ta pas Ňčgene, si nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude a hwam Ňčga …ďawa a aŇčgwa.
13.15: Kwa ndaw masa fa m…ôskey vaw daa ambaw na, fa da mb…ôzey a way Ňčga lawa cek daa ba.
13.16: Kwa ndaw aŇčga da ley na, fa da v…ôhwa a way Ňčga ley zana daa ba.
13.17: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, banay a sawa la a ray Ňčgusay ta hwa…ó ta a ray Ňčgusay masa ta b…ôza hay da har.
13.18: D…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay, cac…ôf…óamara amba cek hay a, a wusmawa ta piya ba .
13.19: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, banay a sawa la ga a ray nd…ôhay. D…ôga Gazlavay ma l…ôma b…ôla haa wure ke…óe ndaw ta s…ôrey banay anda Ňčgene daa ba araŇč. Asaya, banay fa da sawa ma f…ôna Ňčgene daa saba.
13.20: Da Bay Gazlavay ta Ňčg…ôwa siya Ňčga …óar Ňčga banay a daa ba na, anja kwa ndaw pal fa da mb…ôkey ta dey daa ba. Ama a Ňčg…ôwa siya Ňčga …óar a na, maja nd…ôhay masa aŇčga ma walata Ňčgada aŇčga.
13.21: Da ray Ňčgene, da ndaw a l…ôvkwar: ‚Äú*K…ôriste, aŇčga ke…óe‚ÄĚ, da daa ba ‚ÄúN…ôkmara, aŇčga katay‚ÄĚ na, ka da t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ba.
13.22: Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe na, maja nd…ôhay ma pamara ray ata Ňčga K…ôriste, asaya, nd…ôhay ma pamara ray ata Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay na, a samawa la. A kam maazla hay la Ňčga wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč ata amba a t…ôknam nd…ôhay. Da a gwamara na, a t…ôknam kwa nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma walata sem Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay may.
13.23: Akwar na, wam vaw, maja ya ta pakwar leŇčgesl cay da ray cek hay a c…ôpa.¬Ľ Mey da ray ma v…ôhwa Ňčga B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw (Matiye 24.29-31; Luk 21.25-28)
13.24: Yesu a l…ôvey saya: ¬ęAma daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga mes…ôrey banay Ňčga nd…ôhay na, pas a t…ô…ďzley la, kiya fa da we…óey daa saba,
13.25: wurzla hay a k…ôzlmawa la da va…ó a hwayak, cek hay c…ôpa da gazlavay da va…ó a wusam la.
13.26: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay a da h…ôtmaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, fa sawa daa mekwtene ta g…ôdaŇč mahura leŇč ta mewe…óey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay.
13.27: Yaw, Gazlavay a da sl…ôrdat…ôrwa maslaŇč aŇčga hay amba a diyam aa slam hay tabiya da b…ôla, a kusmat…ôrwa nd…ôhay masa aŇčga ma walata Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. (Matiye 24.32-35; Luk 21.29-33)
13.28: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya fa mey masa yah ma da wakwara ta gudav. Da masa ka h…ôtmar gudav fa …óe…óey, gwaslaf a gu…óaf! gu…óaf! na, ka s…ôrmara kiya madaw a ley gweegwe cay.
13.29: AŇčga letek k…ône, da ka h…ôtmatar cek hay a fa kam anda yah ma l…ôvkwar ke…óe na, Ňčgene s…ôrmara Yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, gweegwe cay ya v…ôhwa.
13.30: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, cek hay a ke…óe tabiya a da kam na, nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe ta m…ôcam tabiya daa ba araŇč.
13.31: Slam da va…ó ta slam da b…ôla a nd…ôvey la, ama mey a…óaw na, fa da nd…ôvey daa ba s…ôlak. (Matiye 24.36-44)
13.32: ¬ęFara fara, cek hay ke…óe tabiya a da kam na, ndaw ma s…ôra kwa …óar a, kwa ler e, daa ba. Kwa maslaŇč hay ma njam da cakay Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a s…ôrmara ba, kwa Yah, B…ôzey aŇčga, ya s…ôra ba, ama si Papay, pal taava aŇčga, ma s…ôra …óar a.
13.33: Wam vaw! Ka da nam ba, maja ka s…ôrmara …óar a, a da wuswa ta vara ba.
13.34: Ya da v…ôhwa a b…ôla na, anda ndaw ma daw a m…ôlak. Ndaw aha, a da mb…ôkda way aŇčga na, a mb…ô…ótar mey a ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay, a v…ôltar sl…ôra pal pal. A l…ôvar a ndaw ma j…ô…óa mey-slam Ňčga way a: ‚ÄúNjey ta dey, ka da ney ba.‚ÄĚ
13.35: ¬ęYaw, anda ke…óe, wam vaw, ka da nam ba, maja ka s…ôrmara …óar masa bay Ňčga way ma da v…ôhwa ba. Da taa kwa…ó, da ta wuzlah-tava…ó, da gwagwalak fa cey …óay, da taa p…ôrek na, ka s…ôrmara ba.
13.36: Da ya v…ôhwa d…ôrfafay na, ya wu…óey ya h…ôtfakwar daa …óar ba.
13.37: Mey masa yah ma l…ôvkwar ke…óe na, ara Ňčgada nd…ôhay tabiya: Ka da nam ba.¬Ľ

14.1: Ma lawa …óar cew Ňčga wusey fa gwagway Ňčga *Pak ta *gwagway Ňčga peŇč manjar cek ma h…ôsla da hwa…ó a. *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga k…ôrzey Yesu ta mayal a, amba a k…ô…ómara vagay.
14.2: A da k…ôrzamara ta mayal a na, maja mahura hay a, a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa gwakwa Ňčga k…ôrzakwa daa gwagway ke…óe ba, maja nd…ôhay a da yam mey.¬Ľ Ňägwas a mb…ô…óar …ď…ôrdey fa ray Ňčga Yesu (Matiye 26.6-13; JaŇč 12.1-8)
14.3: Yesu aa da Betani, fa z…ômey …óaf da way *SimaŇčw, ndaw masa aa ma mb…ôlda daa maas…ôkula heyey. Masa aŇčga fa z…ômey …óaf na, Ňčgwas daha, a mb…ôzey fa ata ta kwalaba da har, kwalaba ha Ňčga aŇčgwa maav…ôrkwakaya mez…ôley ¬ę*albaat…ôra¬Ľ. Kwalaba ha na, mar…ôhkaya ta …ď…ôrdey mezey maaya masa ma h…ô…ókey ba, mez…ôley ¬ę*nar¬Ľ. A wura mey Ňčga kwalaba ha, a mb…ô…óda …ď…ôrdey a, fa ray Ňčga Yesu.
14.4: Nd…ôhay mekele fete…óe a cam mevel a ray Ňčgwas aha. Aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęA n…ôsa …ď…ôrdey a ke…óe na, maja me?
14.5: Anja a h…ô…ókada na, a gwa Ňčga h…ôtey dala ga, h…ôma dala Ňčga ndaw ma key sl…ôra Ňčga mevey pal, ba daw? Da ray memb…ô…óey …ď…ôrdey a, a ray ndaw na, Ňčgama a wunkatara dala ha a masa-viya hay, ba daw?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ómar ray ga Ňčgada Ňčgwas aha.
14.6: Ama Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMb…ôkdamara! Ka mb…ô…ómar ray na, maja me? Cek masa aa ma ka Ňčgada yah ke…óe na, ara cek maaya.
14.7: Masa-viya hay na, akwar mandaw mandaw bama. Ta pas wura wura masa akwar ma wu…óam na, ka gwamara Ňčga j…ônmata. Ama yah na, akwar fa da h…ôtmaya Ňčga njey ta akwar mandaw mandaw daa ba.
14.8: Ňägwas aha ta key cek masa aa ma gwa Ňčga ka la. Kwa ya ta m…ôcey daa ba araŇč kaa na, ta mb…ô…óda …ď…ôrdey cay fa ray a…óaw Ňčga …óiya vaw a…óaw Ňčgadaa c…ôvay.
14.9: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, kwa daa wura daa wura da b…ôla tabiya na, nd…ôhay ma da wuzdamara *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga Gazlavay, a kadamara cek masa Ňčgwas aha ma ka ke…óe la may, amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrfadamara Ňčgwas aha.¬Ľ Juda a v…ôlda Yesu a har masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay (Matiye 26.14-16; Luk 22.3-6)
14.10: Juda Iskariyawt, gula pal da wuzlah *gula hay Ňčga Yesu kuraw a ray a cew, a daw fa *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas. A l…ôvtar a wu…óey Ňčga v…ôldatara Yesu a har ata.
14.11: Ata ma c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe la na, aa s…ômam ga. A l…ôvmar da ta v…ôldatara Yesu la na, a v…ôlmar dala. Anda ke…óe, Juda ha, a daw a s…ôpey c…ôve…ó amba a v…ôldatara Yesu. Yesu a z…ômam …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak ta gula aŇčga hay (Matiye 26.17-25; Luk 22.7-14, 21-23; JaŇč 13.21-30)
14.12: Ara …óar Ňčgeeme Ňčga *gwagway Ňčga peŇč manjar cek ma h…ôsla da hwa…ó a. Ta pas a Ňčgene, *J…ôwif hay a h…ôram b…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč hay Ňčga gwagway Ňčga *Pak. Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a diyam fa v…ô…óa, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKa wu…óey ya diyam, ya …óiym…ôrwa slam amba ya z…ômkwa …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak na, dama?¬Ľ
14.13: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a z…ôley gula aŇčga hay cew, a sl…ôrdata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem. Fete…óe na, ka da cam ray ta ndaw fa daw ta yam daa kwakulam. Diyam asiya.
14.14: Aa way masa aa ma da mb…ôzey na, l…ôvmar a bay Ňčga way a: ‚ÄúBay ala a l…ôvey: Way mapakaya Ňčgada yah amba ya z…ômam …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak ta gula a…óaw hay na, aa daa wura?‚ÄĚ
14.15: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a wuzkwar way mahura da ray way la. Way a ma…óiykaya maaya maaya, cek hay c…ôpa Ňčga gwagway da hwa…ó a daha. Ka da …óiymandakwara cek mez…ômey amba ya z…ômkwa …óaf Ňčga gwagway a fete…óe.¬Ľ
14.16: Gula aŇčga hay cew heyey, a mb…ôkdamata, a diyam aa berney a. Fete…óe, a h…ôtfamatar cek hay tabiya anda Yesu ma l…ôvtar heyey. Ta‚Äô, a …óiymata cek hay Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak a.
14.17: Taa kwa…ó a Ňčgene na, Yesu a wusam ta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew aa slam mez…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway a.
14.18: Masa ata fa z…ômamara …óaf a na, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar, masa fa z…ômey …óaf ta yah wure ke…óe, a v…ôldaya la a har nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…ómaya vagay.¬Ľ
14.19: Mey a ke…óe a m…ôctar vaw a gula aŇčga hay a, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu pal pal, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra yah ma da v…ôldaka ba, ba diya?¬Ľ
14.20: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAra ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar, gula a…óaw hay kuraw a ray a cew. Ara ndaw masa al…ôkwa fa z…ômkwa …óaf bama daa slam a ke…óe.
14.21: Fara fara, si yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya m…ôcey anda mey mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey. Ama banay a sawa la a ray ndaw ma da v…ôldaya a har nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…ómaya vagay a. Ňägada ndaw aha na, Ňčgama ta yam…ôrwa daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ Yesu a z…ômam …óaf Ňčga madagway-dakw ta gula aŇčga hay (Matiye 26.26-30; Luk 22.14-20; 1 Kwarinti hay 11.23-25)
14.22: Masa ata fa z…ômam …óaf Ňčga gwagway a na, Yesu leŇč! a ley peŇč. A kar suse a Gazlavay, a wunka, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldatara a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęEhe, t…ô…ďmara. Ke…óe he, ara vaw a…óaw.¬Ľ
14.23: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, leŇč! a ley v…ôley ta cek mesey da hwa…ó a, a kar suse a Gazlavay saya, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldatara a gula aŇčga hay. Gula aŇčga hay c…ôpa ta‚Äô, a samara.
14.24: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKe…óe na, ara mambaz a…óaw. Mambaz a, a da mb…ô…ówa maja nd…ôhay ga. Ta fa mambaz a, Gazlavay a j…ôwey mey mawiya ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
14.25: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, kwa ya fa da sey yam Ňčga bab…ôza Ňčga wudez ma…ó…ôckaya daa saba s…ôlak. Ya da sey na, si cek mawiya mekele daa slam masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray nd…ôhay da va…ó.¬Ľ
14.26: Ta‚Äô, a zlam walay Ňčga gwagway daa *P…ôsam hay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a sl…ôk…óam, a diyam aa AŇčgwa Ňčga *Awliviye. Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a l…ôvam fa da mb…ôkdamara Yesu daa ba (Matiye 26.31-35; Luk 22.31-34; JaŇč 13.36-38)
14.27: Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęAkwar c…ôpa ka da mb…ôkdamaya daa masa fa da k…ôrzamaya Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa k…ô…óa ndaw-mec…ôkwer la vagay. T…ô…ďaŇč aŇčga hay a kwakwacam ray la pal pal.‚ÄĚ
14.28: Ama da yah ta sl…ôk…óawa cay daa mem…ôcey na, ya daw la teese…ó da ray akwar aa hwayak Ňčga *Galile. Ka da h…ôtfamaya fete…óe.¬Ľ
14.29: *Piyer a l…ôvar: ¬ęKwa nd…ôhay c…ôpa a mb…ôkdamaka, ama yah na, ya fa da mb…ôkdaka daa ba.¬Ľ
14.30: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvka fara fara, dasi tava…ó ke…óe, wuskwaa gwagwalak a da cey …óay Ňčga dey cew na, ka ta l…ôvey cay dey maakar, ka s…ôrya ba, ka s…ôrya ba.¬Ľ
14.31: Ama Piyer a mb…ô…ódara ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKay! Kwa da fa da k…ô…ómaka vagay na, Ňčga k…ô…ómandakwar cew e, ya fa da l…ôvey ya s…ôrka ba na, daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ Gula hay Ňčga Yesu siya a l…ôvam k…ône may. Yesu a d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay da Gecemene (Matiye 26.36-46; Luk 22.39-46)
14.32: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a wusam aa slam daha mez…ôley Gecemene. A l…ôvtar: ¬ęNjam fe…óe, yah na, ya daw la Ňčga d…ôrwa daŇčgay a Gazlavay.¬Ľ
14.33: Ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlta ata *Piyer, *Jak, leŇč *JaŇč, a diyam bama. Daa Ňčgene, mand…ôrzay a kar a Yesu, mevel aŇčga a t…ô…óey, maja banay ma da sawa a ray a.
14.34: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay maakar heyey: ¬ęMewulkey fa da k…ô…óya vagay. Njam fe…óe, ka da nam ba.¬Ľ
14.35: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a Ňčg…ôchey nek…ô…óey fa mey, a regedey a hwayak, a d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay. Aa c…ôf…óa Gazlavay amba da Gazlavay a t…ô…ďa na, banay masa aŇčga ma da s…ôra na, a wusfar ba.
14.36: A l…ôvey: ¬ęPapay, Papay, cek hay c…ôpa ka gwa Ňčga kata. L…ôhdaya daa banay a ke…óe. Ta k…ône he c…ôpa na, key anda kah ma wu…óey, ba na, anda yah ma wu…óey ba.¬Ľ
14.37: Ta‚Äô, a v…ôhwa fa gula aŇčga hay maakar heyey, a h…ôtfatar manatakaya daa …óar. A l…ôvar a *SimaŇčw Piyer: ¬ęSimaŇčw, ka fa ney daw? Ka ta gwa Ňčga zez…ôkey nek…ô…óey, kwa ler pal daa ba gway daw?
14.38: Zaz…ôkam, ka da nam ba, d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay Ňčga j…ônkwar amba cek a batakwar Ňčga key meb…ôrey ba. Mevel akwar a wu…óey Ňčga key cek maaya, ama vaw akwar na, aŇčga ta b…ôle.¬Ľ
14.39: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a Ňčg…ôchey saya, a d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay anda Ňčgeeme heyey saya.
14.40: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a v…ôhwa fa gula aŇčga hay maakar heyey saya, a h…ôtfatar manatakaya c…ôŇčga maja …óar fa latar mey kalah. Masa Yesu ma h…ôtfatar manatakaya na, a sl…ôk…óam, a s…ôrmara ata ma daa guzlmar Ňčgada Yesu ba.
14.41: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ôkdata, a daw Ňčga d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay Ňčga dey maakar. Cay, a v…ôhwa fa gula aŇčga hay heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęHaa wure ke…óe akwar fa nam, fa m…ôskam vaw c…ôŇčga daw? Cay d…ô…ďa. Pas a ta wuswa cay, amba a v…ôldamaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a har nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey.
14.42: Lacam! N…ôkmara, ndaw ma da v…ôldaya a har nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay fa sawa katay. Nakwa la, ta cadakwa ray.¬Ľ (Matiye 26.47-56; Luk 22.47-53; JaŇč 18.3-12)
14.43: Masa Yesu faa guzley na, wure Ňčgene, Juda, ndaw pal dasi gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew heyey, fa sawa fa v…ô…óa. Juda ha a samawa na, ta nd…ôhay ga ta d…ôlaw hay da cakay, ta zlanday hay da har. Ma sl…ôrdamat…ôrwa nd…ôhay a na, ara bay-ray hay da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas, ta nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, leŇč mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay.
14.44: Juda, ndaw masa ma da v…ôlda Yesu a har nd…ôhay, ta wuswa fa Yesu daa ba araŇč na, aa guzltar a nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw masa yah ma da car har anda mandala a…óaw fara fara na, ara aŇčga. K…ôrzamara, handamara, j…ô…ómara maaya maaya.¬Ľ
14.45: Masa Juda ma wusey cay gweegwe a cakay Yesu na, a Ňčg…ôchey fa v…ô…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw!¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a car har anda aa ma l…ôvey heyey.
14.46: Nd…ôhay ma samawa ta ata Juda heyey, ta‚Äô, a k…ôrzamara Yesu.
14.47: Ama ndaw pal da wuzlah gula aŇčga hay fete…óe, a m…ô…ó…ôrwa d…ôlaw aŇčga, a Ňčg…ôma, c…ôrah! a c…ôrha sl…ômay Ňčga mad…ôrlam Ňčga ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas.
14.48: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa samawa Ňčga k…ôrzamaya ta d…ôlaw, ta zlanday faa har faa har anda yah ndaw-mayal na, maja me?
14.49: Mandaw mandaw yah da wuzlah akwar, ya faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ama ka ta k…ôrzamaya daa ba. Cek hay a, a da kam wure ke…óe na, amba a key anda …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle ma l…ôvey da ray cek ma da key da ray a…óaw.¬Ľ
14.50: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, gula aŇčga hay c…ôpa a zluram, a mb…ôkdamara Yesu, a hwam.
14.51: B…ôz-gula daha fa s…ôpar wurzay Ňčga Yesu. AŇčga fete…óe ta gwedeere masl…ôlhakaya fa vaw. Nd…ôhay ma k…ôrzamara Yesu heyey, a k…ôrzamara b…ôz-gula ha may.
14.52: Ama, ta‚Äô, a p…ôrsley da har ata, a mb…ôkda gwedeere aŇčga, a hway vaw …ďa‚Äô k…ône. Yesu fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay (Matiye 26.57-68; Luk 22.54, 55, 63-71; JaŇč 18.13, 14, 19-24)
14.53: Nd…ôhay ma k…ôrzamara Yesu heyey, a handamara a way *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, leŇč *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ata makustakaya fete…óe.
14.54: *Piyer na, fa s…ôpa Yesu ta meed…ôreŇč e. A mb…ôzey a palah-way Ňčga ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas heyey. Fete…óe, a njam ta nd…ôhay ma j…ô…óa way a, aŇčga fa s…ôtey awaw.
14.55: Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay mahura hay mekele masa ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay tabiya, ata na, a s…ôpam cek malamba masa Yesu ma ka amba a kamar sariya, a k…ô…ómara vagay. Ama ta h…ôtam daa ba.
14.56: Nd…ôhay ga a samawa Ňčga mb…ôrzley a ray Yesu. Ama ata na, taa guzlam mey letek daa ba.
14.57: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay mekele da wuzlah ata, a sl…ôk…óam ta meyey-mey, a mb…ôrzlam, a l…ôvam:
14.58: ¬ęYa c…ôndamara ndaw aha a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa b…ôzla *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay masa nd…ôhay ma l…ômamara ke…óe la, ya l…ôma la mekele …óar maakar masa kwa har Ňčga ndaw fa da g…ôsfar Ňčga l…ômey way a daa ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
14.59: Ama kwa ta memb…ôrzley ata ha ke…óe na, aa guzlam mey wal wal c…ôŇčga.
14.60: Da ray Ňčgene, ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas heyey a lecey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay c…ôpa, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa mb…ô…ódatara a nd…ôhay maa guzlam da ray akah ke…óe ba gway daw?¬Ľ
14.61: Ama Yesu manjakaya teete, kwa ta mb…ô…ódatara daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, ndaw mahura heyey aa c…ôf…óa Yesu saya, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay heyey daw? Gazlavay masa ala ma h…ôlmamara na, kah na, B…ôzey aŇčga daw?¬Ľ
14.62: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAhaw, ara yah. Akwar, ka da h…ôtmaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, manjakaya ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay Mawaca-waca. Asaya, ka h…ôtmaya la, ya fa sawa daa mekwtene da va…ó.¬Ľ
14.63: -64 Maja Ňčgene, ndaw mahura heyey, Ňčgar! Ňčgar! a Ňčg…ôrta zana aŇčga hay. Mevel a car ga maja Yesu ma l…ôvar a sawa ta fa Bay Gazlavay. Ta‚Äô, ndaw mahura ha, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ma sla yawa makustakaya heyey: ¬ęWure ke…óe, kwa ya s…ôpkwa ndaw Ňčgaa guzlndakwar da ray a saba. Ta pa ray aŇčga sem Ňčga Gazlavay, akwar ta c…ôndamara la, ba diya? Wure ke…óe ka wulkam da ray a na, kwara?¬Ľ Nd…ôhay c…ôpa a l…ôvam aŇčga ta meb…ôrey, si mek…ô…óey aŇčga vagay.
14.65: Nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah ata a c…ôram meesle…ď a ray Yesu a. A …ó…ôpmara dey aŇčga ta zana, a d…ôvmar mek…ô…óey, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęS…ôra ma k…ô…óka ke…óe na, wa? Wuzdandara cey!¬Ľ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldamara a har nd…ôhay ma j…ô…ómara heyey, nd…ôhay ma j…ô…ómara ha a v…ôlmar matapa-har. Piyer a l…ôvey a s…ôra Yesu ba (Matiye 26.69-75; Luk 22.56-62; JaŇč 18.15-18, 25-27)
14.66: *Piyer, aŇčga da palah-way Ňčga ndaw mahura ma ka sariya heyey, sa…ďara dasi d…ômay ma ka sl…ôra da way ndaw mahura ha, a sawa,
14.67: a h…ôtar Piyer fa s…ôtey awaw. A saŇčgala Piyer heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah may, gula Ňčga Yesu, ndaw *Nezeret ke…óe, ba diya?¬Ľ
14.68: Ama Piyer a cada mey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKay! Ya s…ôra cek masa kah ma wu…óey Ňčgaa guzley ba!¬Ľ A daw fa mey-slam Ňčga way heyey. [Ta‚Äô, gwagwalak a cey …óay.]
14.69: Ta‚Äô, sa…ďara heyey, a h…ôtar Piyer saya, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay makustakaya fete…óe: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe aŇčga da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu a!¬Ľ
14.70: Ama Piyer a cada mey saya. Menjey nek…ô…óey, nd…ôhay fete…óe heyey a l…ôvmar a Piyer saya: ¬ęFara fara, kah ndaw da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, maja kah na, ndaw *Galile.¬Ľ
14.71: Da ray Ňčgene, Piyer ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa mbe…óey, fara fara, ya s…ôra ndaw masa akwar maa guzlam da ray a ke…óe ba s…ôlak! Da ya mb…ôrzley na, Gazlavay Ňčga mb…ô…óya ray!¬Ľ
14.72: Wure wure Ňčgene, gwagwalak a cey …óay Ňčga dey cew. Piyer a s…ôrfada mey masa Yesu ma l…ôvar zleezle heyey: ¬ęWuskwaa gwagwalak a da cey …óay Ňčga dey cew na, ka ta l…ôvey cay dey maakar, ka s…ôrya ba, ka s…ôrya ba.¬Ľ Masa Piyer ma s…ôrfada mey a la na, pat! a bawa ta mat…ôway.

15.1: P…ôrek p…ôrek, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, leŇč nd…ôhay mahura hay mekele ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay, a kusam amba a slam yawa da ray Yesu. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a j…ôwmara Yesu, a handamara fa Pilat, bay fete…óe.
15.2: Bay Pilat a, aa c…ôf…óa Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, bay Ňčga J…ôwif hay fara daw?¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAnda kah ma l…ôvey.¬Ľ
15.3: *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey a dad…ô…ófamar mey hay mekele mekele a ray Yesu.
15.4: Da ray Ňčgene, Pilat aa c…ôf…óa saya, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa mb…ô…ódatara a nd…ôhay maa guzlam da ray kah ke…óe ba gway daw? Ka fa c…ônda mey hay c…ôpa masa ata maa guzldamara da ray akah ke…óe, ba diya?¬Ľ
15.5: Ama Yesu a mb…ô…ódara ba s…ôlak. Anda ke…óe, Pilat a r…ôzley ga maja. A kamar sariya a Yesu Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay (Matiye 27.15-26; Luk 23.13-25; JaŇč 18.39‚Äď19.16)
15.6: Fa mevey a, fa mevey a, ta gwagway Ňčga *Pak na, Bay Pilat fa p…ôskey ndaw pal daa f…ôrs…ône. A p…ôskey na, ndaw masa nd…ôhay makustakaya maa c…ôf…óafamara.
15.7: Yaw, ndaw daha mez…ôley Barabas. AŇčga daa f…ôrs…ône maja aŇčga da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa ma namatar ray a nd…ôhay ma wa hwayak ba. Daa mek…ô…óey-vaw daha na, ata Barabas a ta k…ô…óam ndaw la vagay.
15.8: Nd…ôhay makustakaya ha a diyam aa ambaw Bay Pilat, Ňčgaa c…ôf…óam…ôrwa amba a p…ôskatar ndaw pal daa f…ôrs…ône anda aŇčga ma katara fa mevey a, fa mevey a.
15.9: Pilat a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wu…óam na, ya p…ôskakwar bay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay daw?¬Ľ
15.10: A l…ôvey anda ke…óe na, maja a s…ôra *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey a handam…ôrwa Yesu na, maja s…ôleŇč fa katar da ray a.
15.11: Ama bay-ray hay a, a h…ôldamata nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey Ňčgaa c…ôf…óamara Bay Pilat amba a p…ôskatara Barabas jak.
15.12: Pilat aa c…ôf…óata saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw masa akwar ma z…ôlmara ‚ÄúBay Ňčga J…ôwif hay‚ÄĚ na, ka wu…óam ya kada na, kwara?¬Ľ
15.13: A wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęD…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya! D…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya!¬Ľ
15.14: Pilat aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek maaya ba masa aŇčga ma key na, wura?¬Ľ Ama a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč saya, a l…ôvam: ¬ęD…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya! D…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya!¬Ľ
15.15: Pilat a wu…óey amba aa s…ômdata nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey. Anda ke…óe, ta‚Äô, a p…ôskatara Barabas daa f…ôrs…ône. A l…ôvtar a sewje hay Ňčga sl…ô…ómara Yesu ta laway. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a v…ôldatara amba a d…ôrmara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya. Sewje hay aa saŇčg…ôram a ray Yesu (Matiye 27.27-31; JaŇč 19.2-3)
15.16: Sewje hay a handamara Yesu a palah-way Ňčga Bay Pilat. Ta‚Äô, a z…ôlmat…ôrwa sewje hay siya fete…óe tabiya.
15.17: A k…ôzlmar zana magaza Ňčga bay hay fa vaw. A cam hatak, a pa…óamar ray anda gursaw Ňčga bay.
15.18: Ta‚Äô, a camar har, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęZay daw, bay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay?¬Ľ
15.19: A k…ô…ómara ta zlanday a wuzlah-ray, a t…ôfmar meesle…ď fa vaw. A ragadam fa mey aŇčga.
15.20: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa ata maa saŇčg…ôram cay a ray a na, a c…ôkwmara zana magaza heyey fa vaw, a k…ôzlmar zana aŇčga hay. Ta‚Äô, a badamara daa berney a, a handamara Ňčga d…ôrey fa hwadam. A d…ôrmara Yesu fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya (Matiye 27.32-44; Luk 23.26-43; JaŇč 19.17-27)
15.21: Ndaw daa berney Ňčga Siren daha, mez…ôley *SimaŇčw, aŇčga papaŇč Ňčga ata Alekzand…ôre ta Rufus. A sawa da ley, aŇčga fa daw ta Ňčgene. Masa sewje hay heyey, fa handamara Yesu na, a t…ôkmar …óay a SimaŇčw heyey Ňčga la hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya Ňčga Yesu a.
15.22: A handamara Yesu aa slam mez…ôley ta mey ata Gwalgwata, anda mel…ôvey, ¬ęslam anda tetesl Ňčga ray Ňčga ndaw.¬Ľ
15.23: A wu…óam Ňčga v…ôlmar wuzam majaha…óakaya ta slalak mez…ôley ¬ę*mir¬Ľ, ama Yesu a g…ômey Ňčga sa ba .
15.24: Ta‚Äô, a d…ôrmara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a k…ô…óam caca Ňčga wunkey zana aŇčga hay amba a s…ôrmara kwa waawa a da h…ôtey na, zana wura.
15.25: A d…ôrmara Yesu fa hwadam na, taa p…ôrek, pas t…ô…óe meh…ôley maaca.
15.26: Mey masa ata ma k…ô…ómara vagay maja ha na, mawuzlalakaya fa hwadam, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAra bay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay.¬Ľ
15.27: Daa slam masa ata ma d…ôrmara Yesu a na, ta d…ôram mayal hay cew la a cakay a, pal ta har-z…ômay, laŇčgar ta har-gula. [
15.28: Cek aha ta key la anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle ma l…ôvey: ¬ęNd…ôhay a da sl…ôfmara a dey nd…ôhay malamba.¬Ľ]
15.29: Nd…ôhay ma diyam taa slam a Ňčgene aa saŇčg…ôram a ray a, a wusam ray, a c…ô…ómara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęHey! Kah na, ndaw ma wu…óey Ňčga b…ôzla *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay amba ka l…ôma mekele daa …óar maakar heyey, ba diya?
15.30: B…ôrŇčgawa fa hwadam a Ňčgene a hwayak, l…ôhda ray akah d…ô…ďa taw!¬Ľ
15.31: Asaya, *bay-ray hay Ňčga *nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz aa saŇčg…ôram da ray a, a l…ôvam da wuzlah ata: ¬ęA l…ôhdata nd…ôhay siya hay na, kaa ray aŇčga na, a gwa Ňčga l…ôhda, ba daw?
15.32: Ndaw ke…óe, da aŇčga ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga key Bay Ňčga *Israyel hay na, Ňčga b…ôrŇčgawa fa hwadam a wure ke…óe d…ô…ďa taw. Da ya n…ôkakwa ta b…ôrŇčgawa sem na, Ňčgene, ya t…ô…ďkwa mey aŇčga la.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay mad…ôrtakaya da cakay Yesu heyey na, a c…ô…ómara may. Mem…ôcey Ňčga Yesu (Matiye 27.45-56; Luk 23.44-49; JaŇč 19.28-30)
15.33: Ta wuzlah-pas, l…ôvaŇč a key daa hwayak c…ôpa. L…ôvaŇč a, a njey haa …ď…ôrey maakar Ňčga pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó.
15.34: Ta …ď…ôrey maakar a na, Yesu a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey ta mey ata: ¬ę Elawi, Elawi, lema sabaktani? ¬Ľ Anda mel…ôvey: ¬ęGazlavay a…óaw, Gazlavay a…óaw, ka mb…ôkdaya na, maja me?¬Ľ
15.35: Nd…ôhay siya fete…óe, a c…ôndamara mewudey Ňčga Yesu a na, a l…ôvam: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay, aŇčga fa z…ôla *Eli, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle!¬Ľ
15.36: Ndaw pal da wuzlah ata, ta‚Äô, a hway Ňčga j…ôhw…ďey cek anda gag…ômay aa yam Ňčga bab…ôza Ňčga wudez meekwerek e, ta‚Äô, a pa fa mey Ňčga zlanday. A t…ôldara a Yesu a amba a sas…ô…ďa. Ndaw a, a l…ôvey: ¬ęS…ôkwakwa, amba ya n…ôkakwa da wara cay Eli a, a sawa Ňčga b…ôrŇčgad…ôrwa la kwa.¬Ľ
15.37: Ama Yesu a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, pam! a m…ôcey.
15.38: Daa *Way Ňčga Gazlavay na, zana ma g…ôrca *Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a daha. Masa Yesu ma m…ôcey la na, zana ha, a Ňčg…ôrey cew d…ôga da va…ó kasl a hwayak.
15.39: Mahura Ňčga sewje hay Ňčga Rawma hay manjakaya fa mey Ňčga Yesu, masa aŇčga ma h…ôtar Yesu ma m…ôcey meedey aŇčga na, bay Ňčga sewje hay a, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęFara fara ndaw ke…óe na, ara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
15.40: Ňägusay fete…óe daha may, ata fa n…ôkam dey ta meed…ôreŇč e. Da wuzlah ata na, *Mari da Magdala, Salawme, leŇč Mari mamaŇč Ňčga ata Jawz ta *Jak, b…ôz-gula.
15.41: 0Ňägusay a ta p…ôkam la ta ata Yesu daa masa aŇčga daa *Galile, ta kamar sl…ôra la. Da cakay hwadam mezleŇčgeley Yesu a na, Ňčgusay ga mekele daha may. Ňägusay a na, ta diyam la ta Yesu a *Jeruzelem. A j…ôhmara vagay Ňčga Yesu (Matiye 27.57-61; Luk 23.50-56; JaŇč 19.38-42)
