15.42: Ta pas Ňčgene na, ara …óar masa nd…ôhay ma …óiyam vaw Ňčga *pas mem…ôskey-vaw. Ta pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó a Ňčgene, mem…ôskey-vaw Ňčga *J…ôwif hay a, a zley.
15.43: Ndaw da slala Arimate daha, mez…ôley *Jawzef, aŇčga, ndaw da wuzlah nd…ôhay mahura ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay. Nd…ôhay ga fa namar ray. AŇčga may, fa s…ôkwa mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay. Ndaw aha na, a k…ôrza mevel, a daw fa Bay Pilat amba aa c…ôf…óa Ňčga v…ôlar c…ôve…ó Ňčga la vagay Ňčga Yesu amba a j…ôha.
15.44: Pilat a r…ôzley ga maja Yesu ta m…ôcey sem fiyaw fiyaw gway. Da ray Ňčgene, a z…ôl…ôrwa mahura Ňčga sewje hay, aa c…ôf…óa da Yesu a m…ôcey na, menjey ga kwa.
15.45: Masa Pilat maa c…ôf…óa mahura Ňčga sewje hay heyey la na, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlar c…ôve…ó a Jawzef Ňčga la vagay a.
15.46: Jawzef, ta‚Äô, a h…ô…ókey zana maaya mabara. A b…ôrŇčgad…ôrwa vagay a da ray hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya heyey a hwayak. Ta‚Äô, a zl…ôŇčga ta zana ha, a handa aa c…ôvay. C…ôvay a, maav…ôrkwakaya daa aŇčgwa anda b…ôdam. Ta‚Äô, a g…ôdbalawa beeler mahura, gazl! a mey c…ôvay a.
15.47: Ata *Mari da Magdala, ta Mari, mamaŇč Ňčga Jawz heyey, ata fete…óe, fa n…ôkam dey aa c…ôvay masa ata ma pamara vagay Ňčga Yesu a hwa…ó a heyey.

16.1: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga *pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, *Mari da Magdala, Mari mamaŇč Ňčga *Jak, leŇč Salawme, a h…ô…ókam …ď…ôrdey hay ma zam maaya amba a diyam a wucm…ôrwa fa vagay Ňčga Yesu.
16.2: P…ôrek p…ôrek ta luma Ňčga Gudal, masa pas fa bawa na, Ňčgusay a, a diyam a mey c…ôvay Ňčga Yesu a.
16.3: Ata daa c…ôve…ó na, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęMa da g…ôdbalandakwara beeler mahura da mey c…ôvay a na, wa?¬Ľ
16.4: A da n…ôkam dey na, a h…ôtmar beeler heyey, mag…ôdbalakaya ta cakay.
16.5: Masa ata fa mb…ôzam aa c…ôvay a na, a h…ôtam gula manjakaya ta har-z…ômay. AŇčga ta zana mahura mabara fa vaw. Anda ke…óe, mand…ôrzay a katar a Ňčgusay a.
16.6: Ama gula ha a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa zluram ba! Ka s…ôpam na, Yesu, ndaw *Nezeret, masa ata ma d…ôrmara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya heyey daw? Ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey, aŇčga fe…óe daa saba. N…ôkmara slam masa ata ma pamara a hwa…ó a.
16.7: Wure ke…óe na, diyam, l…ôvmatar Ňčgada ata *Piyer ta *gula hay Ňčga Yesu mekele na, Yesu aŇčga sem teese…ó a *Galile fa mey akwar. Ka da h…ôtfamar fete…óe anda aa ma l…ôvkwar.¬Ľ
16.8: A bamawa, a hwam, a mb…ôkdamara c…ôvay a, ata faa wasam maja mand…ôrzay fa katar, leŇčgesl ata ta mb…ô…óey sem. Ta kadamara kwa Ňčgada waawa daa ba, maja ata fa zluram ga. Yesu a wuztar vaw a gula aŇčga hay (Matiye 28.9-10; JaŇč 20.11-18) [
16.9: P…ôrek p…ôrek ta pas luma Ňčga Gudal, Yesu a sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey. Masa ta sl…ôk…óawa cay na, Ňčgeeme a wuzar vaw a *Mari da Magdala, Ňčgwas masa aa ma …ď…ôley malula maasala da ray a heyey.
16.10: Ta‚Äô, Ňčgwas aha, a daw, a kadatara a nd…ôhay masa ma p…ôkam ta Yesu zleezle. A h…ôtfatar ata daa mat…ôway.
16.11: Ňägwas aha, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYesu aa ta dey! Yah ma h…ôtar la.¬Ľ Ama masa ata ma c…ôndamara mey masa Ňčgwas a ma kada na, a t…ô…ďmara mey a ba. (Luk 24.13-35)
16.12: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a wuztar vaw Ňčgada gula aŇčga hay cew ma diyam ta daa c…ôve…ó ma bawa da *Jeruzelem. A wuztar vaw a na, wal ta masa aŇčga ma wuzar vaw Ňčgada *Mari da Magdala heyey.
16.13: Gula hay a, a v…ôhmawa, a kadamatara a *gula hay Ňčga Yesu siya. Gula hay a, a t…ô…ďmara mey ata ha ba saya na, gway.] Yesu a wuztar vaw a gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a letek (Matiye 28.16-20; Luk 24.36-49; JaŇč 20.19-23; SNM 1.6-8) [
16.14: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a letek fa z…ômam …óaf na, Yesu a wuztar vaw. A mb…ô…ótar ray maja a t…ô…ďmara mey da ray a ba, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey, ama nd…ôhay ma h…ôtmaya ta dey ata na, ka t…ô…ďmara mey ata ba na, kwara? Anda ke…óe, akwar na, nd…ôhay masa ray maŇčg…ôr…óakaya.¬Ľ
16.15: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęDiyam aa hwayak hay c…ôpa, wuzdamatara *Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay tabiya.
16.16: Ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey a la, ta ma h…ôtey *baptem la na, a l…ôhey la daa meb…ôrey. Ama ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey a daa ba na, sariya a k…ôrza la.
16.17: Gazlavay a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key maazla hay la a nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara Mey-maaya-mawiya ha. Anda mel…ôvey, a da …ď…ôlam malula da ray nd…ôhay ta mez…ôley a…óaw. A daa guzlam mey hay mekele mekele masa ata ma s…ôrmara ba.
16.18: Kwa a k…ôrzam zezekw ta har, kwa a l…ôgwmata ta slalak ma k…ô…óey ndaw vagay na, cek fa da katar daa ba. A da pam har a ray masa-macay hay. Anda ke…óe, masa-macay hay a, a mb…ôlam la.]¬Ľ Bay Gazlavay a la Yesu a va…ó (Luk 24.50-53; SNM 1.9-11) [
16.19: Masa Bay Mahura Yesu ma kadatara cek hay la c…ôpa a gula aŇčga hay na, ta‚Äô, Gazlavay a la a va…ó. Fete…óe, aŇčga manjakaya ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Gazlavay.
16.20: Gula aŇčga hay, ta‚Äô, a diyam aa wura aa wura c…ôpa, a wuzdamara *Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay. Yesu, Bay Mahura, fa j…ônta daa sl…ôra ata ha. Nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara mey Ňčga *gula hay Ňčga Yesu ara mey fara fara na, maja aŇčga fa v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key maazla hay.]

1.1: Waa *Teyewfil, Nd…ôhay ga ta k…ô…óam vaw la Ňčga wuzleley da ray cek hay ma kam da wuzlah ala.
1.2: A wuzlalam na, mey masa ala ma c…ôndam…ôrwa fa nd…ôhay masa ma h…ôtm…ôrwa ta dey ata d…ôga Ňčga mezley Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga *Yesu. Nd…ôhay a, ara nd…ôhay ma wuzdamara mey Ňčga *Gazlavay.
1.3: Ya taa c…ôf…óey nd…ôhay la ta d…ôk-vaw da ray cek hay tabiya ma key d…ôga Ňčga mezley Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga Yesu a. Yah may, a mbafaya Ňčga wuzlalatakawa cek hay a Ňčgada kah Teyewfil, ndaw mahura.
1.4: Ya wuzlalakawa amba ka s…ôra mey masa ata maa s…ôrkadamakawa na, ara mey fara fara. MaslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó a wuzda Elizabet a da key hwa…ó
1.5: Daa masa *Herawt aŇčga bay daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude na, *ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay daha mez…ôley *Zakari. AŇčga da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay masa ata ma z…ôlmata nd…ôhay Ňčga Abiyah. Ňägwas Ňčga Zakari a, mez…ôley Elizabet, aŇčga s…ôkway Ňčga *AraŇčw, *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle.
1.6: Zakari a, ata cewete ta Ňčgwas aŇčga, nd…ôhay maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, fa t…ô…ďmara *mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay maaya maaya, asaya, fa namar ray a kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta c…ôve…ó e.
1.7: Ama b…ôzey ata daa ba, maja Elizabet a yey ba. Ata cewete maraw hay.
1.8: Pas pal daha, Zakari fa key sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay maja sl…ôra ha ta pas Ňčgene a ray ata ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Abiyah heyey.
1.9: AŇčga fa key sl…ôra fete…óe maja ta k…ô…óam caca la amba a walamara anda kwakwas ata ma l…ôvey. Sl…ôra aŇčga ha na, ara Ňčga mb…ôzey aa *Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a daa *Way Ňčga Gazlavay amba aa wurey cek mezey maaya Ňčgada Gazlavay.
1.10: Daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay tabiya makustakaya daa ambaw fa d…ôram daŇčgay.
1.11: Ta‚Äô, *maslaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a wuzar vaw a Zakari. A lecey ta har-z…ômay da cakay slam-meewurey cek mezey maaya Ňčgada Gazlavay heyey.
1.12: Masa Zakari ma h…ôtar na, leŇčgesl aŇčga a mb…ô…óey, a zlurey.
1.13: Ama maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa zlurey ba, Zakari, maja Bay Gazlavay ta c…ônda med…ôrey-daŇčgay akah la. Elizabet, Ňčgwas akah, a yaka b…ôzey mez…ôle la, ka da z…ôla b…ôzey a, *JaŇč.
1.14: Kaa s…ômey la ga. Nd…ôhay ga aa s…ômam la fa mayawa aŇčga ha may,
1.15: maja a da key ndaw ma ka sl…ôra mahura Ňčga Gazlavay. Fa da sey wuzam daa ba, kwa fa da sey cek mam…ôslkaya daa ba s…ôlak. *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa la a ray a, d…ôga aŇčga da hwa…ó mamaha.
1.16: A da j…ônta nd…ôhay *Israyel hay ga amba a v…ôhmawa fa Bay Gazlavay ata.
1.17: A da daw fa mey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay Ňčga …óiyra c…ôve…ó. AŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč leŇč ta mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay da ray a anda *Eli, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle. A da c…ômtar …óay Ňčgada papaŇč hay ta b…ôz ata hay. A da t…ôrdata nd…ôhay mak…ôwtakaya Ňčga nd…ôhay ma wulkam maaya anda nd…ôhay ma kam cek ta c…ôve…ó e. Anda ke…óe, a da …óiyta nd…ôhay Ňčga t…ô…ďey Bay Mahura ma da sawa.¬Ľ
1.18: Ama Zakari aa c…ôf…óa maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa da s…ôra masa cek aha a key la fara fara na, fa me? Maja wure ke…óe na, yah maraw, Ňčgwas a…óaw may, madaŇčgwas.¬Ľ
1.19: MaslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAra yah, Gab…ôriyel, yah masa ma lecey fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga kar sl…ôra. Ara aŇčga ma sl…ôrdiwa amba ya wuzdakawa mey maaya ke…óe.
1.20: Mey a…óaw masa yah ma kadakawa ke…óe na, a key la fara fara ta pas masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey anda yah ma l…ôvka, ama kah ta t…ô…ďa daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, wure ke…óe, ka da t…ôrey madagazlam, ka fa da gwa Ňčgaa guzley daa ba, haa kasl cek aha ma key la.¬Ľ
1.21: Daa masa Zakari a lawa daa Slam maaya daa *Way Ňčga Gazlavay heyey na, nd…ôhay makustakaya daa ambaw heyey fa s…ôkwmara, a r…ôzlam maja ta njawa sem ga kalah daa slam aha.
1.22: Zakari a bawa aa ambaw, a gwa Ňčgaa guzltar saba. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a, a s…ôrmara Gazlavay ta wuzar cek la daa slam aha. A gwa aa guzley ba, aa guzltar na, si ta har gway.
1.23: Masa Zakari ta nd…ôvda sl…ôra aŇčga cay na, ta‚Äô, a daw a way.
1.24: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Elizabet, Ňčgwas aŇčga, a key hwa…ó. Kiya zlam aa manjakaya da way da way, a …ďada hwa…ó a. Aa guzley daa ray aŇčga, a l…ôvey:
1.25: ¬ęN…ôka, cek masa Bay Gazlavay ma kayawa. A wu…óey Ňčga …ď…ôlyawa hwaray daa dey a…óaw fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay.¬Ľ MaslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó a wuzda mayawa Ňčga Yesu
1.26: Masa Elizabet aa ta hwa…ó kiya maakwaw na, Gazlavay a sl…ôrwa maslaŇč aŇčga, Gab…ôriyel, a *Nezeret daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile,
1.27: fa dam-sa…ďara, kwakwa Ňčga ndaw mez…ôley *Jawzef. Jawzef e na, ara s…ôkway Ňčga Bay *Davit zleezle. Mez…ôley Ňčga sa…ďara ha, *Mari.
1.28: MaslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay heyey kula! a mb…ôzey fa v…ô…óa, a car har, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa caka har, Mari. Bay Gazlavay a wu…óka kalah. Bay Gazlavay aa ta kah.¬Ľ
1.29: Mari ma c…ônda mey a na, mey a, a h…ô…ďar ray. A wulkey daa ray aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMecey-har a, ke…óe na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey na, kwara?¬Ľ
1.30: Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da zlurey ba Mari, maja ara Gazlavay ma p…ôska mey.
1.31: Ka da key hwa…ó, ka da yawa b…ôzey mez…ôle, ka da z…ôla b…ôzey a, Yesu.
1.32: A da key ndaw mahura, asaya, aŇčga B…ôzey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó. Bay Gazlavay a da t…ôrda Ňčga bay aa slam a Ňčga Bay Davit, ndaw daa s…ôkway aŇčga zleezle.
1.33: A da wa s…ôkway Ňčga *Israyel Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Bay aŇčga fa da nd…ôvey daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
1.34: Mari aa guzlar a maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęCek aha, a da key na, kwara? Maja ya s…ôra zel ba.¬Ľ
1.35: MaslaŇč a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMes…ôfney Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a sawa la a ray akah ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga, a b…ôr…óaka la anda meeze…ó. Da ray Ňčgene, b…ôzey a ma da yawa na, ara b…ôzey masa mapakaya wal Ňčgada Gazlavay. Nd…ôhay a da z…ôlmara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.
1.36: N…ôka, Elizabet, s…ôkway akah, kwa aŇčga madaŇčgwas na, aŇčga ta hwa…ó wure ke…óe may. A da yawa b…ôzey mez…ôle. Nd…ôhay a l…ôvam aŇčga d…ôrlay, ama wure ke…óe aa ta hwa…ó kiya maakwaw,
1.37: maja cek masa ta banay fa Gazlavay na, daa ba.¬Ľ
1.38: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Mari a l…ôvar: ¬ęYah ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Bay Gazlavay. Cek aha Ňčga key anda kah ma l…ôvey.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay a, a mb…ôkda, a daw. Mari a daw fa Elizabet
1.39: Daa …óar a Ňčgene, *Mari a sl…ôk…óey, a wusey vaw, a daw a slala daa aŇčgwa Ňčga *Jude.
1.40: A wusey a slala ha, kula! a mb…ôzey a way *Zakari, ta‚Äô, a car har a Elizabet.
1.41: Daa masa Elizabet ma c…ônda mecey-har Ňčga Mari na, b…ôzey da hwa…ó Elizabet a, a wusey. Wure Ňčgene, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa a ray Elizabet.
1.42: Da ray Ňčgene, aa guzley ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvar a Mari: ¬ęMaaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akah, a f…ôna da ray Ňčgusay siya tabiya. Asaya, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray b…ôzey masa kah ma da yarawa!
1.43: Yah na, wa may wa, amba mamaŇč Ňčga Bay a…óaw Mahura a sawa a way a…óaw anda ke…óe na!

3.7: Daa masa nd…ôhay ga fa samawa fa JaŇč-Baptis, amba a katar baptem na, JaŇč-Baptis a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęHey! akwar b…ôza hay Ňčga kucesl hay! Ma l…ôvkwar ka l…ôham la daa banay masa Gazlavay ma da hand…ôrwa a ray akwar na, wa?
3.8: Kam cek maaya, amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara akwar ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar sem, akwar fa s…ôpmara Gazlavay ta mevel pal. Ka da wulkam daa mevel akwar, ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúPapa al…ôkwa na, ara *Ab…ôraham, maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay a da s…ôrfandakwar dey-ceceh.‚ÄĚ Ka da l…ôvam k…ône ba, maja ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, Gazlavay a gwa Ňčga t…ôrdata aŇčgwa hay ke…óe Ňčga s…ôkway Ňčga Ab…ôraham may.
3.9: Wure ke…óe, zlamba maŇčgakaya cay Ňčga Ňčg…ômey wudez hay ta slaslalay a c…ôpa. Kwa wudez wura wura ma yey bab…ôza maaya ba na, a da Ňčg…ômamara, a pamar awaw fa v…ô…óa.¬Ľ
3.10: Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay makustakaya aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKaa, ya da kam na, kwara?¬Ľ
3.11: A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw masa zana aŇčga hay cew daha na, Ňčga v…ôlar pal a ndaw masa zana aŇčga daa ba. Asaya, ndaw masa cek mez…ômey daha na, Ňčga wunkamara ta nd…ôhay masa cek mez…ômey daa ba.¬Ľ
3.12: Nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw a samawa Ňčga key baptem may, aa c…ôf…óamara JaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęBay ala, kaa ala na, ya da kam kwara?¬Ľ
3.13: A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa daa c…ôf…óam dala Ňčga budaw ma f…ôna masa Ňčgwamna maa c…ôf…óa ba.¬Ľ
3.14: Sewje hay may, a samawa, aa c…ôf…óamara k…ône, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKaa, ala na, ya da kam kwara?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa da t…ô…ďam dala Ňčga ndaw ta g…ôdaŇč ba. Ka daa d…ô…ófamatar mey a ray nd…ôhay ba. Sas…ômam da ray dala masa ata ma v…ôldamakwara fa mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra akwar gway.¬Ľ
3.15: Nd…ôhay na, fa s…ôkwmara cek maaya ma da key. Da ray Ňčgene, kwa waawa da wuzlah ata fa wulkey daa ray aŇčga, da JaŇč a na, ara *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay heyey kwa.
3.16: Anda ke…óe, JaŇč a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay tabiya: ¬ęYah na, ya kakwar baptem ta yam daada gway, ama ndaw mekele ma f…ônya a sawa la. Kwa ya wusa Ňčga p…ôska zewe…ó Ňčga tarak aŇčga ba. AŇčga na, a da kakwar baptem ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč ta awaw.
3.17: AŇčga da g…ôdak ta v…ôley mek…ôfey daw da har Ňčga wunkey b…ôz-daw ta cekwesl e. B…ôz-daw na, a da h…ôla a wude…ó aŇčga. Ama cekwesl e na, a da par awaw fa v…ô…óa, awaw masa ma m…ôcey ba Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ
3.18: Anda ke…óe, JaŇč a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay ta mey hay mekele mekele saya, a wuztar *Mey-maaya-mawiya.
3.19: Ama JaŇč a mb…ô…óar ray a Bay Herawt maja aa ma la Herawdiyat, Ňčgwas Ňčga m…ôlmaha, Ňčga Ňčgwas aŇčga, asaya, maja aa ma key cek hay mekele mekele maaya ba.
3.20: Da ray Ňčgene, Bay Herawt heyey a key cek maaya ba ma f…ôna saya, a k…ôzla JaŇč aa f…ôrs…ône. JaŇč-Baptis a kar baptem a Yesu (Matiye 3.1-12; Mark 1.1-8; JaŇč 1.19-28)
3.21: Masa *JaŇč-Baptis fa katar *baptem Ňčgada nd…ôhay tabiya heyey na, Yesu a sawa amba a h…ôtey baptem may. Ta‚Äô, JaŇč-Baptis a kar baptem e. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a d…ôrey daŇčgay. Masa aa fa d…ôrey daŇčgay na, slam da va…ó b…ô…óaŇč! a wurey.
3.22: *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a pawa salay a ray a, a n…ôkey anda makurgwadakw. ∆äay a c…ônwa da va…ó, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKah na, B…ôzey a…óaw masa yah ma wu…óa kalah. Ya faa s…ômey ga da ray akah.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga Yesu (Matiye 1.1-17)
3.23: Masa Yesu ma da zlar sl…ôra aŇčga na, aŇčga ta mevey kwakwar maakar. Nd…ôhay a wulkam Yesu na, ara b…ôzey Ňčga *Jawzef. Jawzef na, b…ôzey Ňčga Heley,
3.24: Heley na, b…ôzey Ňčga Matat, Matat na, b…ôzey Ňčga Levi, Levi na, b…ôzey Ňčga Melki, Melki na, b…ôzey Ňčga Janay, Janay na, b…ôzey Ňčga Jawzef,
3.25: Jawzef na, b…ôzey Ňčga Matatiyas, Matatiyas na, b…ôzey Ňčga Amus, Amus na, b…ôzey Ňčga Nahum, Nahum na, b…ôzey Ňčga Es…ôli, Es…ôli na, b…ôzey Ňčga Nagay,
3.26: Nagay na, b…ôzey Ňčga Mat, Mat na, b…ôzey Ňčga Matatiyas, Matatiyas na, b…ôzey Ňčga SemeyiŇč, SemeyiŇč na, b…ôzey Ňčga Jawzek, Jawzek na, b…ôzey Ňčga Jawda,
3.27: Jawda na, b…ôzey Ňčga J…ôwanaŇč, J…ôwanaŇč na, b…ôzey Ňčga Reza, Reza na, b…ôzey Ňčga Zarubaabel, Zarubaabel na, b…ôzey Ňčga Salatiyel, Salatiyel na, b…ôzey Ňčga Neri,
3.28: Neri na, b…ôzey Ňčga Melki, Melki na, b…ôzey Ňčga Adi, Adi na, b…ôzey Ňčga Kwazam, Kwazam na, b…ôzey Ňčga Elmadam, Elmadam na, b…ôzey Ňčga Er,
3.29: Er na, b…ôzey Ňčga Yesu, Yesu na, b…ôzey Ňčga Eliyezer, Eliyezer na, b…ôzey Ňčga J…ôwarim, J…ôwarim na, b…ôzey Ňčga Matat, Matat na, b…ôzey Ňčga Levi,
3.30: *Levi na, b…ôzey Ňčga SimeyaŇčw, SimeyaŇčw na, b…ôzey Ňčga Juda, Juda na, b…ôzey Ňčga Jawzef, Jawzef na, b…ôzey Ňčga Jawnam, Jawnam na, b…ôzey Ňčga Eliyakim,
3.31: Eliyakim na, b…ôzey Ňčga Meleya, Meleya na, b…ôzey Ňčga Mena, Mena na, b…ôzey Ňčga Matata, Matata na, b…ôzey Ňčga NataŇč, NataŇč na, b…ôzey Ňčga Davit,
3.32: *Davit na, b…ôzey Ňčga Jese, Jese na, b…ôzey Ňčga Awbet, Awbet na, b…ôzey Ňčga B…ôwaz, B…ôwaz na, b…ôzey Ňčga Sala, Sala na, b…ôzey Ňčga NaasaŇčw,
3.33: NaasaŇčw na, b…ôzey Ňčga Aminadap, Aminadap na, b…ôzey Ňčga Ad…ômiŇč, Ad…ômiŇč na, b…ôzey Ňčga Arni, Arni na, b…ôzey Ňčga EsraŇčw, EsraŇčw na, b…ôzey Ňčga Fares, Fares na, b…ôzey Ňčga Juda,
3.34: Juda na, b…ôzey Ňčga *Jakwap, Jakwap na, b…ôzey Ňčga Izak, Izak na, b…ôzey Ňčga Ab…ôraham, Ab…ôraham na, b…ôzey Ňčga Tara, Tara na, b…ôzey Ňčga Nahwar,
3.35: Nahwar na, b…ôzey Ňčga Seruk, Seruk na, b…ôzey Ňčga Ragaw, Ragaw na, b…ôzey Ňčga Pelek, Pelek na, b…ôzey Ňčga Eber, Eber na, b…ôzey Ňčga Sala,
3.36: Sala na, b…ôzey Ňčga Kaynam, Kaynam na, b…ôzey Ňčga Arfazat, Arfazat na, b…ôzey Ňčga Sem, Sem na, b…ôzey Ňčga N…ôwe, N…ôwe na, b…ôzey Ňčga Lemek,
3.37: Lemek na, b…ôzey Ňčga Matuzala, Matuzala na, b…ôzey Ňčga Henakw, Henakw na, b…ôzey Ňčga Jaret, Jaret na, b…ôzey Ňčga Meleliyel, Meleliyel na, b…ôzey Ňčga Kaynam,
3.38: Kaynam na, b…ôzey Ňčga Enaws, Enaws na, b…ôzey Ňčga Set, Set na, b…ôzey Ňčga Adam, Adam a na, b…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.

4.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa *JaŇč-Baptis ma kar *baptem la a Yesu na, Yesu a v…ôhwa daa wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč heyey. *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray a, ta‚Äô, a handa a wuzlah-ley.
4.2: Aa manjakaya fete…óe …óar kwakwar m…ôfa…ó. Bay-malula a sawa a cakay a, a jada Ňčga bata amba a key cek maaya ba. Daa masa Yesu aa da wuzlah-ley a na, aŇčga fa z…ômey cek daa ba. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, may a car d…ô…ďa.
4.3: Ta‚Äô, bay-malula heyey aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa kah B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay na, t…ôrda aŇčgwa ke…óe Ňčga …óaf taw!¬Ľ
4.4: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNdaw na, a njey ta cek mez…ômey daada ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
4.5: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, bay-malula heyey a t…ôpda aa slam mag…ôlkaya a va…ó, wure Ňčgene ta‚Äô, a wuzdara hwayak hay masa bay hay ma wamata da b…ôla c…ôpa.
4.6: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa v…ôldakawa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga wey da ray hwayak hay a ke…óe, ta zleley hay da hwa…ó a c…ôpa. Maja cek hay a ke…óe c…ôpa mav…ôldatakaya a har a…óaw, ya gwa Ňčga v…ôldata kwa Ňčgada waawa masa yah ma wu…óey.
4.7: Anda ke…óe, da kah ma regedey fa mey a…óaw la na, cek hay a c…ôpa ya v…ôldatakawa la.¬Ľ
4.8: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKa da ragadar na, si Ňčgada Bay Gazlavay akah gway. D…ôrar daŇčgay Ňčgada Bay Gazlavay pal taava aŇčga.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
4.9: Asaya, bay-malula a handa aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem, a t…ôpda aa ray Ňčga *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa kah B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay na, j…ôvey daa ray Ňčga way ke…óe a hwayak,
4.10: maja mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúGazlavay a l…ôvtar la a maslaŇč aŇčga hay Ňčga j…ô…ómaka.‚ÄĚ
4.11: Mawuzlalakaya saya, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúA sl…ôwmaka la a har ata amba salay akah a gurzey fa aŇčgwa ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
4.12: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKa da jada Bay Gazlavay akah ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
4.13: Masa bay-malula ta h…ôtey mey Ňčga jada Yesu daa saba na, ta‚Äô, a daw, a mb…ôkda Ňčga pas mekele. Yesu a zlar sl…ôra aŇčga daa hwayak Ňčga Galile (Matiye 4.12-17; Mark 1.14, 15)
4.14: Yesu a v…ôhwa aa hwayak Ňčga *Galile, ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay da ray a. Daa hwayak a c…ôpa, nd…ôhay a zlamar Ňčgaa guzley da ray a.
4.15: Yesu fa wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa way-mewuzey-mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay. Nd…ôhay tabiya faa h…ômdamara. Nd…ôhay da Nezeret a r…ôsmara Yesu (Matiye 13.53-58; Mark 6.1-6)
4.16: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a daw a *Nezeret, slala masa aa ma g…ôley da hwa…ó a. Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, a mb…ôzey aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay anda aa ma daw maamandaw. A lecey, a daw fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay amba a jeŇčgey …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay.
4.17: Ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmar …óerewel mapa…óakaya, masa *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ma wuzlala zleezle. A p…ôska …óerewel e, a h…ôtfey slam mawuzlalakaya ma l…ôvey:
4.18: ¬ęMes…ôfney Ňčga Bay Gazlavay aa da ray a…óaw, Bay Gazlavay ta walaya la amba ya wuzdatara *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčgada masa-viya hay. A sl…ôrdiwa amba ya l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay maj…ôwtakaya dasi har Ňčga bay-malula na, Gazlavay ta p…ôskata sem. A sl…ôrdiwa Ňčga wurey dey Ňčga wulaf hay, Ňčga l…ôhey nd…ôhay dasi har Ňčga masa-g…ôra ata hay.
4.19: A sl…ôrdiwa amba ya l…ôvtar …óar masa Bay Gazlavay ma da wuzd…ôrwa maaya aŇčga a ray nd…ôhay na, ta wuswa cay.¬Ľ
4.20: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, pa…ó! pa…ó! a pa…óa …óerewel e heyey, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldara a ndaw ma ka sl…ôra daa way a. A njey fa mey ata Ňčga wuzey mey a. Nd…ôhay c…ôpa daa way a, fa n…ôkmara.
4.21: Yesu a zlar Ňčgaa guzltar d…ô…ďa, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMey mawuzlalakaya masa tasana akwar ma c…ôndamara ke…óe na, mey a ta key cay wure ke…óe Ňčgada akwar.¬Ľ
4.22: Nd…ôhay c…ôpa a l…ôvam da wuzlah ata: ¬ęMey masa al…ôkwa ma c…ôndakwa fa Yesu ke…óe na, maaya.¬Ľ A r…ôzlam da ray mey aŇčga hay maaya masa aŇčga maa guzldata, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvam: ¬ęHaya, ara na, b…ôzey Ňčga *Jawzef, ba diya?¬Ľ
4.23: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęFara fara ka daa guzlam mey-meŇčgey da ray a…óaw, ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúNdaw ma s…ôra ray Ňčga slalak, mb…ôlda ray akah!‚ÄĚ Anda mel…ôvey ka da l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAla ma c…ôndamara sl…ôra akah hay masa kah ma kata da Kapernayum la c…ôpa. Yaw, ka k…ône da slala akah fe…óe may.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
4.24: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, kwa ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay wura wura na, fa t…ô…ďmara maaya maaya daa hwayak masa aa ma yawa da hwa…ó a na, daa ba.
4.25: Wulkam da ray *Eli, ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle. Daa masa aŇčga da b…ôla na, mevey maakar ta kiya maakwaw, var ta pawa daa ba. May mahura ta key la daa hwayak Ňčga *Israyel c…ôpa. Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, daa Ňčgene, Ňčgwas-vagay hay ga daha daa hwayak a,
4.26: ama Gazlavay ta sl…ôrda Eli fa Ňčgwas-vagay hay daa hwayak Ňčga Israyel Ňčga j…ônta daa ba s…ôlak. A sl…ôrda na, si fa Ňčgwas-vagay masa *J…ôwif ba ma njey da slala Sar…ôpta daa hwayak Ňčga SidaŇčw.
4.27: Asaya, wulkam da ray Elize, ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle. Daa masa aŇčga da b…ôla na, maas…ôkula hay ga daa hwayak Ňčga Israyel daha, ama kwa ta p…ôrey ndaw pal dasi ata Ňčga mb…ôley daa maas…ôkula ha daa ba. A p…ôrey na, si NaamaŇč, ndaw Siri gway.¬Ľ
4.28: Masa nd…ôhay daa way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey ma c…ôndamara mey a na, ata tabiya, mevel a catar ga da ray Yesu.
4.29: Ta‚Äô, a lacam, a …óa…óamara, a badamara da wuzlah-way. A handamara aa mey-zeleŇč, amba a t…ôvdamara Ňčgada hwayak.
4.30: Ama Yesu pat! a bey la da wuzlah ata, ndal! madaw aŇčga. Yesu a …ď…ôley malula da ray ndaw (Mark 1.21-28)
4.31: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a daw a Kapernayum daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile. Fete…óe faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw.
4.32: Nd…ôhay a, a r…ôzlam da ray mees…ôrkedey aŇčga ha, maja aa guzley na, ta g…ôdaŇč masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldara.
4.33: Daa way-mewuzey-mey a Ňčgene, ndaw daha, aa ta malula da ray. A zlar mewudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey:
4.34: ¬ęHaya, Yesu, ndaw *Nezeret, walay akah ta ala malula hay me? Ka sawa Ňčgaa z…ô…ódandar daw? Ya s…ôra fara fara, kah na, ndaw Ňčga Gazlavay, masa aa ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa Ňčga key sl…ôra aŇčga.¬Ľ
4.35: Yesu aa b…ôcar a malula da ray ndaw aha, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNjey teete. Bey da ray ndaw ke…óe.¬Ľ Malula da ray ndaw a heyey dac! a t…ô…óda ndaw a, a hwayak fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, a bey da ray ndaw aha, kwa ta kar cek daa ba.
4.36: Nd…ôhay c…ôpa fete…óe heyey a r…ôzlam, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęHaya! mey ke…óe na, ara s…ôkway Ňčga mey wura, masa ndaw aha a t…ôktar …óay a malula hay Ňčga bam da ray nd…ôhay ke…óe na!¬Ľ
4.37: Da ray Ňčgene, sl…ômay Ňčga Yesu fa z…ôley kwa daa wura daa wura c…ôpa daa hwayak a. Yesu a mb…ôley masa-macay hay ga (Matiye 8.14-17; Mark 1.29-34)
4.38: Yesu a bey daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay, a daw a way *SimaŇčw. MamaŇč Ňčga Ňčgwas Ňčga SimaŇčw a, vaw fa car, awaw fa vaw ga. Da ray Ňčgene, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu Ňčga mb…ôlda.
4.39: A daw a g…ô…ďey a ray a, ta‚Äô, aa b…ôcey amba macay a, a mb…ôkda Ňčgwas aha. Macay a, mbak! a mb…ôkda, awaw fa vaw heyey daa saba. Wure Ňčgene, Ňčgwas aha p…ôrta! a lecey, ta‚Äô, a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey.
4.40: Fa d…ô…ďa ha pas ma k…ôzley la na, nd…ôhay tabiya da slala ha masa nd…ôhay ta macay hay da way ata hay daha, kwa macay hay wura wura, a handamat…ôrwa fa Yesu. A patar har pal pal tabiya a ray, a mb…ôldata.
4.41: Malula hay ga a bam da ray masa-macay hay a, a wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKah B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ Ama Yesu aa b…ôctar a malula hay a, a t…ôkta Ňčgaa guzley maja a s…ôrmara aŇčga *K…ôriste. Yesu a wuzey mey daa hwayak Ňčga Jude (Mark 1.35-39)
4.42: Slam ma wurey la na, Yesu a bey da wuzlah-way, a daw aa slam masa nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a daa ba. Nd…ôhay ga fa s…ôpmara, ta‚Äô, a h…ôtmar. Masa ata ma h…ôtmar la na, a wu…óam amba Yesu a njey ta ata, a mb…ôkdata ba.
4.43: Ama Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSi ya daw a slala hay mekele may Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay, maja Bay Gazlavay a sl…ôrdiwa na, Ňčga key sl…ôra ha k…ône.¬Ľ
4.44: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a daw a p…ôkta slala hay a, a wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa way-mewuzey-mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay mekele mekele daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude.

5.1: Pas laŇčgar daha, Yesu, aŇčga da mey d…ôhwa Ňčga Genezeret. Nd…ôhay ga makustakaya, fa njanj…ôr…óam vaw Ňčgada cakay a, maja a wu…óam a c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
5.2: Kwambiwal hay cew daha da mey d…ôhwa ha. Nd…ôhay ma k…ôrza ewet, ata da hwa…ó a daa saba, fa p…ôrmata *tabaw ata hay. Yesu a h…ôtatar kwambiwal hay a.
5.3: Ta‚Äô, a t…ôpey aa kwambiwal Ňčga ndaw mez…ôley *SimaŇčw. Aa c…ôf…óa SimaŇčw ha Ňčga Ňčg…ôchada kwambiwal a nek…ô…óey Ňčgada wuzlah yam. Masa SimaŇčw ma Ňčg…ôchada kwambiwal a la na, Yesu ta‚Äô, a njey ta njey a hwa…ó a, fa wuzdatara mey Ňčga Gazlavay a nd…ôhay da mey d…ôhwa ha.
5.4: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa aŇčga ma wuzdatara mey Ňčga Gazlavay la na, a l…ôvar a SimaŇčw: ¬ęŇäg…ôchada kwambiwal akah aa slam masa yam da hwa…ó a seleleŇč. Fete…óe, akwar ta mandala akah hay, k…ôzlamata tabaw akwar hay aa yam a, ka h…ôtam ewet la.¬Ľ
5.5: SimaŇčw a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay ala, tava…ó tava…ó ke…óe, ala ta g…ôram la daa ewet e, ama kwa ya ta h…ôtam daa ba s…ôlak. Yaw, da ara kah ma l…ôvya na, ya k…ôzlamata tabaw hay a, aa yam a c…ôŇčga.¬Ľ
5.6: Ta‚Äô, a k…ôzlamata tabaw ata hay aa yam, wure Ňčgene, a k…ôrzamawa ewet ga daa yam a. Tabaw hay a, a zlamar Ňčga Ňčg…ôrey maja ewet ga kalah.
5.7: Anda ke…óe, a g…ôvcamat…ôrwa mandala ata hay daa kwambiwal mekele Ňčga j…ônmata. Mandala ata hay a, a samawa, a r…ôhdamata kwambiwal hay cewete ta ewet, haa kwambiwal hay a, a wu…óam Ňčga nd…ôkwam asi yam.
5.8: -9 Ata SimaŇčw *Piyer ta mandala aŇčga hay tabiya, mand…ôrzay a katar maja ewet ga masa ata ma k…ôrzamara ha. Masa SimaŇčw aha ma h…ôtar maazla ke…óe na, a regedey fa mey Ňčga Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, maaya na, ya Ňčg…ôchey la da cakay akah, maja yah na, ndaw ta meb…ôrey.¬Ľ
5.10: Ata *Jak ta *JaŇč, b…ôza hay Ňčga Zebede, ma kam sl…ôra bama ta ata SimaŇčw, mand…ôrzay a katar may. Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a l…ôvar a SimaŇčw: ¬ęKa zlurey ba, d…ôga tasana ka da z…ôlwa nd…ôhay aa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Bay Gazlavay anda kah ma k…ôrzey ewet ke…óe.¬Ľ
5.11: Ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôchadamata kwambiwal ata hay a rav-zazay, mbak! a mb…ôkdamata cek ata hay tabiya, a diyam asi Yesu. Yesu a p…ôrey ndaw daa maas…ôkula (Matiye 8.1-4; Mark 1.40-45)
5.12: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu aa da slala laŇčgar daha. Ndaw daha maas…ôkula fa vaw zlap zlap. Ndaw aha a h…ôtar Yesu na, ta‚Äô, a daw a regedey fa mey aŇčga. A kar ambahw, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, da ka wu…óey na, ka gwa Ňčga p…ôrya daa maas…ôkula a…óaw ke…óe.¬Ľ
5.13: Yesu tal! a t…ôlda har aŇčga, a g…ôsfar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa wu…óey amba maas…ôkula akah a p…ôrey. T…ôrey ndaw map…ôrkaya d…ô…ďa!¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene, maas…ôkula fa ndaw aha daa saba.
5.14: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a k…ôta, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da wuzda cek masa yah ma kakawa ke…óe kwa a ndaw ba. Ama daw fa *ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, amba a n…ôkaka. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, v…ôlar cek a Gazlavay anda *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma l…ôvey, Ňčga wuzey a nd…ôhay, maas…ôkula fa vaw akah daa saba.¬Ľ
5.15: Ama nd…ôhay na, fa kadamara mey da ray Yesu ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč c…ôŇčga. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay ga a samawa fa v…ô…óa, a kusam, amba a j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey masa aa maa guzley, asaya, amba a mb…ôldata masa-macay hay.
5.16: Kwa nd…ôhay fa samawa ga na, Yesu a njey da cakay ata mandaw mandaw ba, ama a bey la da wuzlah ata, a daw aa slam masa nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a daa ba, amba a d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay. Yesu a mb…ôley ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya (Matiye 9.1-8; Mark 2.1-12)
5.17: Pas pal daha, Yesu faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay. *Fariza hay ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz manjatakaya fete…óe may. A samawa da slala hay mekele mekele da *Galile ta da *Jude, leŇč daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem. Bay Gazlavay a v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč a Yesu Ňčga mb…ôldata masa-macay hay.
5.18: Nd…ôhay daha, a samawa, a handamawa ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya manakaya da ray …ďe…ďele. A s…ôpam c…ôve…ó amba a mb…ôzdamara aa way masa Yesu aa da hwa…ó a, amba a pamara fa mey aŇčga,
5.19: ama a h…ôtam c…ôve…ó ba maja nd…ôhay ga kalah. Anda ke…óe, a t…ôpam aa ray Ňčga way a, a wuram slam daa ray Ňčga way a, a t…ôldamara ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya kaa heyey da ray …ďe…ďele aŇčga ha ta laza, a wuzlah nd…ôhay makustakaya ga fa mey Ňčga Yesu daa way a.
5.20: Masa Yesu ma n…ôka nd…ôhay a, fa t…ô…ďmara aŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga mb…ôlda ndaw ata na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya heyey: ¬ęJam a…óaw, ya fa l…ôvka meb…ôrey da ray akah daa saba.¬Ľ
5.21: Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta Fariza hay heyey a c…ôndamara mey ke…óe na, a wulkam daa ray ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra s…ôkway Ňčga ndaw wura ma pa ray aŇčga Ňčga Gazlavay ke…óe, na! Ma gwa ma mb…ôkda meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw na, wa? Si Gazlavay pal taava aŇčga ma gwa ma mb…ôkda meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw, ba diya?¬Ľ
5.22: Ama Yesu ta s…ôra mewulkey ata sem, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wulkam anda ke…óe, maja me?
5.23: Ya gwa ya l…ôvar: ‚ÄúMeb…ôrey akah daa saba‚ÄĚ, da daa ba, ya gwa ya l…ôvar: ‚ÄúSl…ôk…óey, daw ta salay akah.‚ÄĚ Dasi mey hay cewete ke…óe na, masa ta banay Ňčga l…ôvey Ňčgada yah na, wura?
5.24: Yaw, ya wu…óey amba ka s…ôrmara yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, yah ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga mb…ôkey meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay da b…ôla.¬Ľ Anda ke…óe, Yesu ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya heyey: ¬ęEhe, ya fa l…ôvka: ‚ÄúSl…ôk…óey, la …ďe…ďele akah, daw a way.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
5.25: Wure wure Ňčgene, ndaw aha a sl…ôk…óey, a lecey fa dey ata tabiya, a la …ďe…ďele aŇčga heyey, ta‚Äô, a daw a way ta meh…ôlmey Gazlavay.
5.26: Nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe a r…ôzlam. A h…ôlmamara Gazlavay ta meney ray. A l…ôvam: ¬ęCek masa Ňčga menjey al…ôkwa, ya ta h…ôtkwa daa ba na, ya ta h…ôtkwar la tasana d…ô…ďa.¬Ľ Yesu a z…ôla Levi Ňčga s…ôpa (Matiye 9.9-13; Mark 2.13-17)
5.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa Yesu ma ka maazla ke…óe la, a bawa daa way a, a daw, a da n…ôkey dey na, a ray *ndaw ma cakala budaw mez…ôley *Levi. AŇčga manjakaya fa key sl…ôra daa slam mecekeley budaw. Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSawa, s…ôpya.¬Ľ
5.28: Da ray Ňčgene, Levi a, p…ôrta! a sl…ôk…óey, a mb…ôkdata cek aŇčga hay tabiya, a daw asiya.
5.29: Fa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey, Levi a kar gwagway mahura Ňčgada Yesu da way aŇčga. Nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw ta nd…ôhay mekele makustakaya ga fete…óe, a z…ômamara …óaf Ňčga gwagway a bama.
5.30: *Fariza hay ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz da wuzlah ata, aa Ňčguram mey, a l…ôvmatar a *gula hay Ňčga Yesu: ¬ęKa z…ômam …óaf ta nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw leŇč ta nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, kwara?¬Ľ
5.31: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay masa ata wurwer na, mey ata ta ndaw ma v…ôlda slalak daa ba. Ama ma wu…óey mey Ňčga ndaw ma v…ôlda slalak na, si nd…ôhay masa-macay hay gway.
5.32: Yaw, nd…ôhay ma wulkam ata nd…ôhay maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay ta sl…ôrdiwa Ňčga z…ôlta daa ba, ama a sl…ôrdiwa na, Ňčga z…ôley nd…ôhay masa ta meb…ôrey amba a mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata, a s…ôpmara Gazlavay ta mevel pal.¬Ľ Mey da ray mekey daliyam (Matiye 9.14-17; Mark 2.18-22)
5.33: *Fariza hay heyey a l…ôvmar a Yesu: ¬ęGula hay Ňčga *JaŇč-Baptis ta pas laŇčgar fa kam *daliyam, fa d…ôram daŇčgay, asaya, gula ala hay fa kamara k…ône may. Ama gula akah hay na, a z…ômam cek, a sam cek mandaw mandaw na, maja me?¬Ľ
5.34: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ndaw a z…ôlwa nd…ôhay aa mekey m…ôlak Ňčga kwakwa Ňčga z…ômey cek na, nd…ôhay a, a gwamara a kam daliyam daa masa zel-kwakwa ha aa da cakay ata daw? A kam daliyam ba s…ôlak.
5.35: Ama pas a, a sawa la, masa ata ma da k…ôrzamara zel-kwakwa ha. Daa Ňčgene d…ô…ďa na, a kam daliyam la.¬Ľ
5.36: Fa d…ô…ďa ha Yesu a Ňčgatara mey a saya ta zana, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKwa ndaw ma Ňčg…ôrey zana mawiya Ňčga …ó…ôpey zana magurma na, daa ba. Da a ka k…ône na, ta n…ôsa zana mawiya sem, zana ha fa da c…ômam ta magurma daa ba.
5.37: Asaya, ndaw a gwa Ňčga zl…ôrey wuzam meede…óek e aa kwene-kwene magurma ba. Da a zl…ôra a hwa…ó a na, wuzam a, a m…ôsley, a Ňčg…ôra kwene-kwene he la. Wuzam a, a mb…ô…óey la, asaya, kwene-kwene he a n…ôsey la.
5.38: Si ka zl…ôra wuzam meede…óek e aa kwene-kwene mawiya.
5.39: Da ndaw fa sey wuzam mam…ôslkaya na, a wu…óey Ňčga sey meede…óek e saba, maja a wulkey wuzam mam…ôslkaya na, a f…ôna meede…óek e.¬Ľ

6.1: Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw daha, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a diyam taa ley Ňčga cek anda daw . Gula aŇčga hay heyey a h…ô…ďam cek aha, a bab…ôrmara, aa mb…ô…ómara.
6.2: Maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay da wuzlah *Fariza hay a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęAkwar fa kam cek mat…ôkakaya daa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, maja me?¬Ľ
6.3: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ta jaŇčgamara daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay cek masa *Davit ma ka zleezle na, daa ba daw? Ta pas laŇčgar daha, ata Davit ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay, may fa catar, ama cek mez…ômey fa ata daa ba.
6.4: Maja Ňčgene Davit e a mb…ôzey aa way Ňčga Gazlavay, a t…ô…ďwa peŇč masa mav…ôldakaya Ňčgada Gazlavay, ta‚Äô a z…ômey, asaya, a v…ôltar a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay may. Ama, peŇč e na, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a v…ôley c…ôve…ó a nd…ôhay tabiya Ňčga z…ômamara ba, si nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay gway.¬Ľ
6.5: Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMa wey da ray pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, ara yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw.¬Ľ Yesu a …óiyra har mam…ôckaya Ňčga ndaw ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw (Matiye 12.9-14; Mark 3.1-6)
6.6: Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw daha saya, Yesu a daw aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Ta‚Äô, aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa way a. Ndaw daha fete…óe, har-z…ômay mam…ôckaya.
6.7: *Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta *Fariza hay, ata fete…óe may. Fa j…ô…ómara Yesu da a da mb…ôley ndaw ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw kwa. A j…ô…ómara anda ke…óe na, amba a h…ôtam mey Ňčga k…ôrza Yesu.
6.8: Ama Yesu a s…ôra mewulkey ata. Da ray Ňčgene, aa guzlar a ndaw masa har mam…ôckaya heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, lecey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya.¬Ľ Ndaw aha, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a lecey.
6.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu aa guzltar a nd…ôhay ma j…ô…ómara heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYaw, ya wu…óey yaa c…ôf…óakwar, kwakwas al…ôkwa a l…ôvey na, kwara? Ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, al…ôkwa ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga key maaya a ndaw daw, da daa ba, Ňčga key maaya ba daw? Al…ôkwa ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga l…ôhey ndaw daa mem…ôcey daw, da daa ba, Ňčga mb…ôkey ndaw Ňčga m…ôcey daw?¬Ľ
6.10: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a n…ôkta tabiya pal pal …óagay, fa d…ô…ďa ha, aa guzlar a ndaw heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęT…ôld…ôrwa har a.¬Ľ Tal! a t…ôldara har a. Har a, ta‚Äô, a …óiyey aa slam a.
6.11: Ama Fariza hay ta nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz heyey na, mevel a catar ga. A zlamar mesley yawa da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa da kadakwa ndaw Yesu kaa na, kwara?¬Ľ Yesu a weley nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew (Matiye 10.1-4; Mark 3.13-19)
6.12: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, Yesu a daw a aŇčgwa Ňčga d…ôrwa daŇčgay. Fete…óe tava…ó tava…ó aŇčga fa d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay.
6.13: Masa slam ma wurey cay na, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlta gula aŇčga hay a cakay a. A weley nd…ôhay kuraw a ray a cew da wuzlah ata, a pata Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mesl…ôrey.
6.14: A pey Ňčga nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey a na, *SimaŇčw, ndaw masa aa ma par mez…ôley *Piyer heyey, ta m…ôlmaha *And…ôre, *Jak, *JaŇč, *F…ôlep, *Bartelemey,
6.15: *Matiye, *Tuma, Jak b…ôzey Ňčga Alfe, SimaŇčw, ndaw da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma wu…óam Ňčga l…ôhdamata nd…ôhay ata hay dasi har Ňčga masa-g…ôra ata hay,
6.16: Jud b…ôzey Ňčga Jak, ta Juda Iskariyawt ndaw ma v…ôlda Yesu a har masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay. Yesu a mb…ôley masa-macay hay (Matiye 4.23-25)
6.17: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a pawa salay daa aŇčgwa ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mesl…ôrey. A lacam aa papalah aa slam masa nd…ôhay aŇčga hay siya hay ga da hwa…ó a. Nd…ôhay mekele ga fete…óe daha a samawa daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude. Kwa daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem ta samawa la may. Asaya, nd…ôhay siya a samawa daa berney Ňčga Tir ta Ňčga SidaŇčw, berney hay masa da mey-b…ôlay.
6.18: Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene a samawa Ňčga c…ôney mey Ňčga Yesu, asaya, a samawa amba Yesu a mb…ôldata daa macay ata hay. Da wuzlah nd…ôhay a Ňčgene na, nd…ôhay ta malula da ray daha fa s…ôram banay. Yesu ta‚Äô, a …ď…ôlta malula da ray nd…ôhay a.
6.19: Nd…ôhay tabiya a s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga g…ôsey fa Yesu maja g…ôdaŇč daa vaw aŇčga fa bawa Ňčga mb…ôldata nd…ôhay tabiya. Mey da ray maaya Ňčga Gazlavay ta banay ma da sawa a ray nd…ôhay (Matiye 5.1-12)
6.20: Masa Yesu ma mb…ôldata masa-macay hay cay na, a mb…ô…óey dey Ňčgada fa nd…ôhay aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar masa-viya hay, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akwar maja Bay Gazlavay fa wey da ray akwar fara fara.
6.21: Akwar masa may fa cakwar wure ke…óe, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akwar maja Gazlavay a r…ôhdakwar la. Akwar masa fa t…ôwam wure ke…óe, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akwar maja kaa saŇčg…ôram la.
6.22: ¬ęDa nd…ôhay fa r…ôsmakwar, fa mb…ô…ómakwar d…ô…ďa, fa c…ô…ómakwar, asaya, faa guzlam mey hay maaya ba a ray akwar, maja akwar gula a…óaw hay, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akwar.
6.23: Da masa nd…ôhay a fa kamakwar anda ke…óe na, sas…ômam, j…ôvam ta meem…ôlkey maja Gazlavay a p…ôlkwara mawur…ďay akwar la maaya maaya da gazlavay da va…ó. PapaŇč Ňčga papa ata hay a s…ôrdamata banay ta nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle na, k…ône.
6.24: Ama akwar masa-zleley hay na, banay a sawa la a ray akwar maja akwar ta z…ômamara wiya akwar cay wure ke…óe.
6.25: Akwar masa ma r…ôham sem wure ke…óe, banay a sawa la a ray akwar, maja may a cakwar la. Akwar masa faa saŇčg…ôram wure ke…óe, ka da njam daa banay, ka t…ôwam la.
6.26: ¬ęAkwar masa nd…ôhay faa h…ômdamakwar wure ke…óe, banay a sawa la a ray akwar. Ara anda ke…óe papaŇč Ňčga papa ata hay zleezle maa h…ômdamata nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey ta memb…ôrzley.¬Ľ Mey da ray mewu…óey masa-g…ôra hay (Matiye 5.38-48; 7.12a)
6.27: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęWure ke…óe ya fa l…ôvkwar, akwar nd…ôhay masa ma j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey a…óaw: Wu…ómata masa-g…ôra akwar hay, kamatar maaya a nd…ôhay masa ma Ňčg…ôldamakwar ba,
6.28: p…ôsmatar mey a nd…ôhay masa ma n…ôsmakwar, d…ôram daŇčgay maja nd…ôhay ma s…ôrdamakwar banay.
6.29: Da ndaw a k…ô…óka a cakay baazlam na, mb…ô…ódara cakay laŇčgar saya. Da ndaw a lakawa dawura akah na, mb…ôkda Ňčga la, v…ôldara …óeŇč-kece saya.
6.30: Kwa waawa maa c…ôf…óafaka cek na, v…ôlar. Da ndaw ta ley cek la fa kah na, ka daa c…ôf…óa h…ôz-hez ba.
6.31: Wure ke…óe, kamatar cek maaya a nd…ôhay, anda akwar ma wu…óam Ňčga kamakwara maaya k…ône may.
6.32: ¬ęDa ka wu…óam nd…ôhay ma wu…ómakwar daada gway na, ka wulkam Gazlavay a kakwar maaya la maja daw? Maja kwa nd…ôhay masa ta meb…ôrey na, fa wu…ómata nd…ôhay masa ma wu…ómata k…ône.
6.33: Da ka kam cek maaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa ma kamakwar maaya gway na, ka wulkam Gazlavay a kakwar maaya la maja daw? Maja kwa nd…ôhay masa ta meb…ôrey na, fa kamara k…ône may.
6.34: Yaw, da ka v…ôlam cek hay a nd…ôhay masa ka wulkam wara a v…ôhdamakwara gway na, Gazlavay a v…ôlkwar cek maaya la maja daw? Maja kwa nd…ôhay masa ta meb…ôrey na, fa v…ôlmatar cek hay a nd…ôhay masa wara a v…ôhdamatara k…ône.
6.35: Ama akwar na, wu…ómata masa-g…ôra akwar hay, kamatar maaya, v…ôlmatar cek a nd…ôhay masa ma gwamara Ňčga v…ôhdamakwara ba. Da akwar fa kamara anda ke…óe na, Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a p…ôlkwara mawur…ďay akwar la ga, a t…ôrdakwar la Ňčga b…ôz aŇčga hay, maja aŇčga na, fa s…ôrey dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay masa ma kam suse ba, leŇč fa nd…ôhay malamba hay.
6.36: Kam maaya a nd…ôhay anda Papa al…ôkwa Bay Gazlavay ma key maaya a nd…ôhay.¬Ľ Mey da ray memb…ôkey meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay (Matiye 7.1-5)
6.37: Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa da wulkam daa mevel akwar, ka l…ôvam,‚ÄúAnja manaŇč Ňčgaa z…ô…óey maja meb…ôrey aŇčga na‚ÄĚ k…ône ba, maja Bay Gazlavay a daa z…ô…ódakwar maja meb…ôrey akwar k…ône may. Ka da mb…ô…ómatar ray a nd…ôhay ba, anda ke…óe Bay Gazlavay a mb…ô…ókwar ray daa ba may. Mb…ôkdamatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay, Gazlavay a mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar la k…ône may.
6.38: V…ôlam cek a nd…ôhay, Gazlavay a v…ôlkwar la k…ône. A da kwiykwar ga aa gabal akwar mahura, a r…ô…ókwara, aa j…ôkakwara haa a r…ôhey, siya mbak. Bay Gazlavay a da wakwara cek ta daram masa akwar ma wamatara a nd…ôhay mekele may.¬Ľ
6.39: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw-wulaf a gwa Ňčga …óa…óa ndaw-wulaf c…ôla daw? Da ndaw-wulaf a …óa…óa wulaf c…ôla na, ata cewete a t…ô…óam la aa v…ôge…ó.
6.40: Yaw, ndaw maa s…ôrkey na, a s…ôra cek a f…ôna ndaw maa s…ôrkada ba. Ama da ndaw a taa s…ôrkey la maaya maaya na, aŇčga anda ndaw maa s…ôrkada ha gway.¬Ľ
6.41: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a Ňčgey mey mekele saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa n…ôkey dey fa guzer daa dey Ňčga m…ôlmakw, ama hwadam mahura masa daa dey akah na, ka wulkey da ray a ba na, kwara?
6.42: Ka gwa Ňčga l…ôvar Ňčgada m…ôlmakw, ‚ÄúM…ôlma a…óaw, …óagay ya lakawa guzer daa dey akah la‚ÄĚ. Anja kah na, hwadam mahura daa dey akah daha, ama ka h…ôtar ba na, kwara? Kah, ndaw masa ta neneh cew! La hwadam daa dey akah la …óagay, amba ka h…ôtar dey nj…ô…ó-nje…ó Ňčga ley guzer daa dey Ňčga m…ôlmakw.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta wudez meyey bab…ôza maaya ta maaya ba (Matiye 7.16-20; 12.33-35)
6.43: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęFara fara, wudez masa maaya na, a yey bab…ôza maaya ba na, daa ba. Yaw, wudez masa fa …ďetey ta …ďetey na, a yey bab…ôza maaya na, daa ba may.
6.44: Kwa wudez wura wura a da s…ôrey na, fa bab…ôza ha. Anda ke…óe, ka gwa Ňčga Ňčg…ôley s…ôke…ó fa manjaraf ba. Ka gwa Ňčga Ňčg…ôley gudav fa b…ôz-tak ba.
6.45: Ndaw maaya na, fa wuzd…ôrwa cek masa maaya daa mevel aŇčga maaya. Ndaw malamba may, fa wuzd…ôrwa cek maaya ba daa mevel aŇčga maaya ba. Fara fara, mey masa ndaw maa guzlda na, fa wuzd…ôrwa cek masa ma…ďadakaya daa mevel aŇčga.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta way hay cew (Matiye 7.24-27)
6.46: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa z…ôlmaya ‚ÄúBay Mahura, Bay Mahura‚ÄĚ ama ka kamara cek anda yah ma l…ôvkwar ba na, maja me?
6.47: Wure ke…óe amba ya wuzdakwara kwa waawa ma sawa fa yah, ma j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey a…óaw, ma ka cek anda mey a la na,
6.48: ya wa ndaw aha ta ndaw ma wu…óey Ňčga l…ômey way, ma zl…ô…óa salay Ňčga way a maaya maaya kasl fa p…ôra…ó. A pa salay a, a ray a. Pas masa var ta pawa la, wayam a lawa, a zl…ôra way a, ama a gwa Ňčga b…ôzla ba maja salay Ňčga way a mapakaya maaya da ray p…ôra…ó.
6.49: Ama ndaw ma c…ônda mey a…óaw, ma ka cek anda mey a daa ba na, ya wa ta ndaw ma pey salay Ňčga way manjar Ňčga zl…ô…óey. Pas masa var ta pawa la, wayam a lawa, a zl…ôra way a, way a k…ôrep! a b…ôzley c…ôpa.¬Ľ

7.1: Masa Yesu ma wuzdatara mey aŇčga cay tabiya a nd…ôhay na, ta‚Äô, a daw a Kapernayum.
7.2: Fete…óe, ndaw Rawma daha, aŇčga mahura Ňčga sewje hay temere. Ndaw a Ňčgene, a wu…óa mad…ôrlam aŇčga daha kalah. Ama mad…ôrlam a, vaw fa car ga, fa da m…ôcey.
7.3: Masa ndaw a ma c…ônda mey da ray Yesu na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey nd…ôhay mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay da slala ha Ňčgene fa Yesu Ňčgaa c…ôf…óam…ôrwa Ňčga sawa amba a mb…ôlda mad…ôrlam aŇčga ha.
7.4: -5 Nd…ôhay mahura hay a, a wusam fa Yesu, a kamar ambahw, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęMaaya na, ka j…ôna mahura Ňčga sewje hay a. Ara ndaw maaya Ňčga j…ôney, maja a wu…óndakwar al…ôkwa J…ôwif hay kalah, ara aŇčga ma l…ômndakwara *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fe…óe.¬Ľ
7.6: Masa Yesu ma c…ônda mey a la na, ta‚Äô, a diyam bama. A wusam gweegwe ta way Ňčga mahura Ňčga sewje hay heyey na, mahura Ňčga sewje hay a, a sl…ôrey jam aŇčga hay fa Yesu Ňčga l…ôvmar: ¬ęMahura Ňčga sewje hay a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw, ka da g…ôrwa vaw Ňčga sawa saba, maja ya wusa amba ka mb…ôzey a way a…óaw ba.
7.7: Maja Ňčgene, ya n…ôka na, ya wusa Ňčga wusey fa mey akah ba. Ama, da ka ta l…ôvey mey pal la na, mad…ôrlam a…óaw a mb…ôley la.
7.8: Ya l…ôvka anda ke…óe maja yah na, sewje hay mahura da ray a…óaw daha, asaya, yah mahura da ray sewje hay mekele may. Da ya l…ôvar Ňčgada sewje laŇčgar ‚Äúdaw‚ÄĚ, a daw. Da ya l…ôvar Ňčgada ndaw laŇčgar ‚Äúsawa‚ÄĚ, a sawa. Da ya l…ôvar Ňčgada beke a…óaw ‚Äúka sl…ôra ke…óe‚ÄĚ, a ka.¬Ľ
7.9: Masa Yesu ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe la na, a mbafar ara mey ba. A mb…ô…óey dey fa d…ô…ďa Ňčgada fa nd…ôhay ma diyam asiya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar, fara fara kwa ya ta h…ôtey ndaw ma paya Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara anda ndaw ke…óe daa ba s…ôlak, kwa da wuzlah s…ôkway a…óaw hay *Israyel hay, ya ta h…ôtey daa ba.¬Ľ
7.10: Nd…ôhay masa mahura Ňčga sewje hay ma sl…ôrdata heyey na, a v…ôhmawa a way, a h…ôtfamar mad…ôrlam a, vaw fa car daa saba. Yesu a sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa b…ôzey Ňčga Ňčgwas-vagay daa mem…ôcey
7.11: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a diyam ta gula aŇčga hay leŇč ta nd…ôhay mekele mekele ga a slala NayiŇč.
7.12: Masa gweegwe fa da mb…ôzam a slala ha na, a cam ray ta nd…ôhay fa lamawa vagay Ňčga b…ôzey Ňčgadaa c…ôvay. Ara b…ôzey Ňčga Ňčgwas-vagay daha. B…ôzey aŇčga ha pal Ňčgene. Nd…ôhay ga da slala ha fa diyam asi vagay a.
7.13: Masa Bay Mahura ma h…ôtar Ňčgwas aha na, a kar dey-ceceh, a l…ôvar: ¬ęD…ôka mevel, ka t…ôway ba!¬Ľ
7.14: AŇčga ma l…ôvar la anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôchey, a g…ôsfar har fa …ďe…ďele masa vagay da ray a heyey. Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay ma lamara vagay kaa, a lacam. Yesu aa guzlar a vagay a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęB…ôz-gula, ya fa l…ôvka: ‚ÄúSl…ôk…óey!‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
7.15: Vagay kaa, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a njey ta njey, a zlar meeguzley. Yesu a l…ôvar a mamaha: ¬ęEhe, b…ôzey akah!¬Ľ
7.16: Nd…ôhay tabiya a r…ôzlam, a zluram, a h…ôlmamara Gazlavay, a l…ôvam: ¬ęTasana, ndaw mahura ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta sawa la a wuzlah al…ôkwa.¬Ľ A l…ôvam saya: ¬ęGazlavay ta sawa la Ňčga j…ôney nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.¬Ľ
7.17: Nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude tabiya ta daa hwayak hay masa ta cakay tabiya ta c…ôndamara cek masa Yesu ma ka ke…óe la. JaŇč-Baptis a sl…ôrdata gula aŇčga hay cew fa Yesu (Matiye 11.2-19)
7.18: Daa masa *JaŇč-Baptis aŇčga daa f…ôrs…ône na, gula aŇčga hay aa guzlmar da ray cek hay tabiya masa Yesu ma kata. Ta‚Äô, JaŇč-Baptis a z…ôlwa gula aŇčga hay cew,
7.19: a sl…ôrdata fa Bay Mahura amba aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKah na, *K…ôriste, ndaw ma da sawa Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay heyey daw? Da daa ba, ya s…ôkwam ndaw mekele ma da sawa daw?¬Ľ
7.20: Ta‚Äô, a diyam. Masa ata ma wusam fa Yesu la na, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęJaŇč-Baptis a sl…ôrdand…ôrwa Ňčgaa c…ôf…óaka, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKah na, K…ôriste, ndaw ma da sawa Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay heyey daw? Da daa ba, ya s…ôkwam ndaw mekele ma da sawa daw?‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
7.21: Ta pas Ňčgene, Yesu fa mb…ôley masa-macay hay ga, kwa cek mecey wura wura c…ôpa, fa …ď…ôley malula hay da ray nd…ôhay ga, asaya, fa wurey dey Ňčga wulaf hay ga.
7.22: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a mb…ô…ódatara a nd…ôhay masa *JaŇč ma sl…ôrdata heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam, kadamara cek masa akwar ma h…ôtmar ta dey akwar, ta akwar ma c…ôndamara ta sl…ômay akwar a JaŇč-Baptis a. L…ôvmar na, wulaf hay fa h…ôtmar dey d…ô…ďa, jegwer hay fa diyam maaya maaya ta salay ata, maas…ôkula hay ta s…ô…óam sem, madagazlam hay fa c…ônam sl…ômay, nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya fa sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey, nd…ôhay masa-viya hay fa c…ôndamara Mey-maaya-mawiya d…ô…ďa.
7.23: Ndaw ma mb…ôkda met…ô…ďey-mey a…óaw ba maja sl…ôra masa yah ma ka na, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray a.¬Ľ Mey da ray JaŇč-Baptis
7.24: Nd…ôhay masa *JaŇč-Baptis ma sl…ôrdata heyey ma diyam la na, Yesu a zlar maa guzltar da ray JaŇč-Baptis a, a nd…ôhay ga da cakay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ma diyam a wuzlah-ley na, Ňčga n…ôkwa me? Ka n…ôkmawa na, guzer masa meme…ó ma wusa daw? Ara aŇčga ba, ba diya?
7.25: Kaa, akwar ma diyam Ňčga n…ôkwa na, me? Ka n…ôkmawa na, ndaw masa ma pey zana maaya fa vaw daw? Anja nd…ôhay masa ma pam zana maaya fa vaw na, ara nd…ôhay ma njam daa wiya da way bay hay, ba diya?
7.26: Wuzdamiwa, ka diyam Ňčga n…ôkwa na, wa? Ka n…ôkmawa na, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ba diya? Ya fa l…ôvkwar, fara fara ara aŇčga. Ama a f…ôna ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay la saya,
7.27: maja *JaŇč a na, ara ndaw masa mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya maa guzley da ray a, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay a l…ôvar a B…ôzey aŇčga: Ehe, ya fa sl…ôrey maslaŇč-c…ôve…ó a…óaw fa mey akah, amba a …óiykawa c…ôve…ó akah.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
7.28: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da wuzlah nd…ôhay da b…ôla na, kwa ndaw ma f…ôna JaŇč-Baptis daa ba. Ama ndaw mec…ôhe da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Bay Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata na, ndaw aha a f…ôna JaŇč-Baptis.
7.29: ¬ęNd…ôhay c…ôpa fete…óe ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga JaŇč na, ta t…ô…ďmara mey a la, a s…ôrmara Gazlavay fa key cek ta c…ôve…ó e. Kwa ma cakala budaw hay ta t…ô…ďmara la may. Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene ta t…ô…ďmara la amba JaŇč-Baptis a katar *baptem.
7.30: Ama *Fariza hay ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta t…ô…ďmara cek masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey Ňčgada ata na, daa ba, maja a wu…óam JaŇč-Baptis a katar baptem ba.¬Ľ
7.31: Yesu aa guzltar mey mekele saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa da wa s…ôkway Ňčga nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe kaa na, ta me? Ata anda me?
7.32: Ata anda b…ôza hay masa manjatakaya fa yam mey da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAla ta famakwar sl…ôlam la, ama akwar ta g…ôrvam daa ba. Ala ta zlamakwar walay vagay la, ama akwar ta t…ôwam daa ba.‚ÄĚ
7.33: Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe na, maja JaŇč-Baptis ta sawa la Ňčga wuzkwar mey. A z…ômey …óaf anda nd…ôhay mekele ba, a sey wuzam ba, ama ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAŇčga ta malula da ray.‚ÄĚ
7.34: Yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya sawa, ya fa z…ômey cek, ya fa sey cek anda nd…ôhay mekele. Ama ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúN…ôkmara, ndaw a ke…óe, a wulkey si Ňčga z…ômey cek ta Ňčga sey wuzam Ňčgada hwa…ó aŇčga gway. Asaya, aŇčga na, ara jam Ňčga nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw ta Ňčga nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz.‚ÄĚ
7.35: Ama yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar, nd…ôhay a da s…ôrmara leŇčgesl Ňčga Gazlavay, aŇčga maaya na, ta fa nd…ôhay aŇčga hay tabiya ma t…ô…ďmara leŇčgesl e.¬Ľ Ňägwas ta meb…ôrey a mb…ô…óar …ď…ôrdey fa salay Ňčga Yesu
7.36: Ndaw Fariza daha, a z…ôla Yesu a way aŇčga Ňčga z…ômey …óaf. Yesu a daw a way ndaw aha, ta‚Äô, a njam Ňčga z…ômey …óaf.
7.37: Da slala ha Ňčgene Ňčgwas daha, aa fa key meb…ôrey kalah. A c…ônda masa Yesu fa z…ômey …óaf da way ndaw Fariza ha na, ta‚Äô, a daw ta kwalaba mar…ôhkaya ta …ď…ôrdey da har a way ndaw aha. Kwalaba ha Ňčga aŇčgwa maav…ôrkwakaya mez…ôley ¬ę*albaat…ôra¬Ľ.
7.38: A regedey gweegwe ta salay Ňčga Yesu. A t…ôway haa mat…ôway a, a g…ôcey fa salay Ňčga Yesu, a takwa…óa salay a ta eŇčgwec Ňčga ray aŇčga, a k…ôrza salay a, a s…ôm…óa, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódara …ď…ôrdey heyey fa v…ô…óa.
7.39: Ndaw Fariza ma z…ôla Yesu Ňčga z…ômey …óaf heyey, ma h…ôtar Ňčgwas aha fa takwa…óa salay Ňčga Yesu na, a wulkey daa ray aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ndaw ke…óe fara fara ara *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, anja a s…ôra Ňčgwas ma g…ôsfar fa salay ke…óe na, ara Ňčgwas ta meb…ôrey kalah.¬Ľ
7.40: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzlar a ndaw Fariza ha, a l…ôvar: ¬ę*SimaŇčw, ya wu…óey Ňčgaa guzlka mey pal.¬Ľ SimaŇčw a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęGweguzley taw, Bay a…óaw.¬Ľ
7.41: Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęNd…ôhay cew daha, a lam d…ôvaz fa ndaw. Ndaw pal a ley gabal temere zlam. Ndaw laŇčgar a ley gabal kwakwar zlam .
7.42: Ama ata cewete ta gwamara Ňčga p…ôlmara d…ôvaz a daa ba. Anda ke…óe, ndaw ma v…ôldatara d…ôvaz a heyey, a mb…ôkdatara d…ôvaz a. Yaw, dasi ata cewete ke…óe na, ma da wu…óa ndaw ma mb…ôkdatara d…ôvaz a kalah na, wa?¬Ľ
7.43: SimaŇčw a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa wulkey ma da wu…óa kalah na, ndaw masa aa ma mb…ôkdara d…ôvaz ga da ray a heyey.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęAhaw fara, ka taa guzley la, ara aŇčga.¬Ľ
7.44: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…óey dey fa Ňčgwas kaa heyey, a l…ôvar a SimaŇčw: ¬ęKa fa h…ôtar Ňčgwas ke…óe, ba diya? Ya sawa na, a way akah, ama ka ta v…ôlya yam Ňčga p…ôrey salay daa ba. AŇčga na, ta p…ôryawa salay la ta mat…ôway, ta takwa…óayawa la ta eŇčgwec Ňčga ray aŇčga.
7.45: Ya sawa a way akah, ka ta t…ô…ďya maaya maaya daa ba, ama aŇčga na, d…ôga aŇčga ma mb…ôzwa a way akah ke…óe haa wure ke…óe ta mb…ôkda Ňčga s…ôm…óayawa salay daa ba.
7.46: Ka ta takwa…óaya mal fa ray daa ba, ama aŇčga ta mb…ô…óya …ď…ôrdey la fa salay a…óaw.
7.47: Da ray Ňčgene, ya fa l…ôvka masa aŇčga ma wu…óya ke…óe na, fa wuzd…ôrwa kwa aŇčga ta meb…ôrey ga kalah na, meb…ôrey a daa saba. Ama ndaw ma wulkey aŇčga ta meb…ôrey ga daa ba, amba Bay Gazlavay a mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey a na, Ňčgene ara ndaw ma wu…óa Gazlavay nek…ô…óey gway.¬Ľ
7.48: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a l…ôvar a Ňčgwas heyey: ¬ęMeb…ôrey akah daa saba.¬Ľ
7.49: Nd…ôhay masa manjatakaya Ňčga z…ômey …óaf bama heyey, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKe…óe na, ara wa masa ma gwa Ňčga mb…ôkey meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw ke…óe na!¬Ľ
7.50: Ama Yesu a l…ôvar a Ňčgwas a heyey: ¬ęBay Gazlavay ta l…ôhdaka cay daa meb…ôrey, maja kah ma paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara. Daw ta zazay.¬Ľ

8.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a daw aa berney hay leŇč a slala hay Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay. Nd…ôhay masa ma p…ôkam ta Yesu na, ara gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew
8.2: ta Ňčgusay masa aŇčga ma …ď…ôley malula da ray ata, ta masa aŇčga ma mb…ôldata daa macay. Ňägusay a na, ara *Mari da Magdala, Ňčgwas masa Yesu ma …ď…ôley malula maasala da ray a heyey,
8.3: Zaan, Ňčgwas Ňčga Kuza ndaw ma n…ôkey dey fa zleley Ňčga Bay *Herawt, leŇč Suzan, ta Ňčgusay mekele mekele. Ňägusay a na, a j…ônmata ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew ta zleley ata hay. Mey-meŇčgey ta ndaw maa kwecey hulfa…ó a ley (Matiye 13.1-23; Mark 4.1-20)
8.4: Daa berney hay mekele mekele nd…ôhay fa samawa fa Yesu. Masa nd…ôhay ga ata da cakay a na, Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvey:
8.5: ¬ęNdaw meh…ôvey daha, a daw Ňčgaa kwecey hulfa…ó a ley aŇčga. Daa masa aŇčga faa kwacada hulfa…ó a na, hulfa…ó laŇčgar a k…ôzley aa c…ôve…ó. Nd…ôhay a diyam ta ray a. ∆äiyaŇč hay a ndamara.
8.6: Siya a k…ôzley aa slam masa p…ôra…ó, a p…ôcwa nek…ô…óey na, a kweley maja yam daa slam aha daa ba.
8.7: Siya a k…ôzley a wuzlah hatak. A p…ôcwa da wuzlah hatak a. Hatak a njanj…ôr…óa, a t…ôka Ňčga g…ôley.
8.8: Ama siya a k…ôzley aa slam maaya, a p…ôcwa, a g…ôley, a yey bab…ôza ga, a key temere.¬Ľ Yesu a l…ôvtar ta g…ôdaŇč: ¬ęDa ndaw, aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, Ňčga c…ônda mey a maaya maaya.¬Ľ
8.9: Gula hay Ňčga Yesu aa c…ôf…óamara amba a s…ôrmara mabara Ňčga mey-meŇčgey ke…óe.
8.10: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęGazlavay ta v…ôlkwar c…ôve…ó la Ňčga s…ôrey mey hay ma…ďadatakaya da ray mewey aŇčga da ray nd…ôhay. Ama nd…ôhay siya hay na, ya wuzdatara ta mey-meŇčgey. Anda ke…óe, ‚ÄúFa n…ôkam dey, ama a h…ôtmar dey ba. Fa j…ôkam sl…ômay, ama a c…ôndamara ba.‚ÄĚ
8.11: ¬ęEhe, ya wuzdakwara mabara Ňčga mey-meŇčgey a. Hulfa…ó na, ara mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
8.12: Nd…ôhay siya ata anda mey-c…ôve…ó masa hulfa…ó ma k…ôzley a hwa…ó a. Nd…ôhay a fa j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ama bay-malula a sawa, a la mey a la daa mevel ata, amba a t…ôkta Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey a maja Gazlavay a da l…ôhdata.
8.13: Nd…ôhay mekele ata anda slam masa p…ôra…ó. A c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, a t…ô…ďmara ta mees…ômey. Ama a hway slaslalay ba. A t…ô…ďmara Ňčga menjey nek…ô…óey gway. Anda ke…óe, ta pas masa cek maaya ba fa batata na, a mb…ôkdamara mey a.
8.14: Hulfa…ó ma k…ôzley a wuzlah hatak na, aŇčga anda nd…ôhay mekele ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay ama a mb…ôkdamara mey a daa walaŇč maja mewulkey ata aa da ray cek hay mekele mekele, ta da ray zleley leŇč da ray menjey daa wiya da b…ôla. Anda ke…óe, sl…ôra masa ata ma kamara na, aŇčga anda daw, bab…ôza fa v…ô…óa daa ba, s…ôfteker.
8.15: Hulfa…ó ma k…ôzley aa slam maaya na, aŇčga anda nd…ôhay siya ma j…ôkam sl…ômay, ma t…ô…ďmara mey a aa mevel ata maaya maaya, a kam cek anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey. A t…ô…ďmara mey a, a mb…ôkdamara ba. Anda ke…óe, mey a, a yey daa mevel ata anda hulfa…ó ma p…ôcwa ma yey ga.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta pet…ôrla (Mark 4.21-25)
8.16: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęDa ndaw ta g…ô…óey awaw la aa pet…ôrla na, a …ó…ôpa ta maŇčgayak ba, a pa asi harŇčgawaw ba. Ama a pa aa slam mepey pet…ôrla Ňčga wa…óa slam daa way a, amba nd…ôhay ma mb…ôzam a hwa…ó a na, a h…ôtmar dey.
8.17: Cek hay tabiya ma…ďadakaya, a wuzwa la a palah. Cek masa nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara ba na, a s…ôrmara la, asaya, a wuzwa la aa slam-mewe…óey.
8.18: Pam leŇčgesl amba ka j…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya. Da ndaw ta t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay la na, Gazlavay a j…ôna la Ňčga t…ô…ďa mey a ma f…ôna ma f…ôna. Da ndaw ta t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba na, kwa mey a nek…ô…óey masa aŇčga ma wulkey daa mevel aŇčga daha na, Gazlavay a bad…ôrwa la tabiya.¬Ľ MamaŇč Ňčga Yesu ta m…ôlmaha hay na, ara wa hay wa? (Matiye 12.46-50; Mark 3.31-35)
8.19: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ata mamaŇč Ňčga Yesu ta m…ôlmaha hay a diyam fa Yesu, ama ta gwamara Ňčga wusey a cakay a daa ba, maja nd…ôhay ga kalah.
8.20: Nd…ôhay fete…óe aa guzlmar a Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAta mamakw ta m…ôlmakw hay malacatakaya daa ambaw, a samawa fa akah, faa c…ôf…óamaka.¬Ľ
8.21: Ama Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay tabiya: ¬ęMamay ta m…ôlma a…óaw hay na, ara nd…ôhay masa ma j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ma kam cek anda mey a ma l…ôvey.¬Ľ Yesu a lacada b…ôrgadaŇč da wuzlah d…ôhwa (Matiye 8.23-27; Mark 4.35-41)
8.22: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, Yesu a t…ôpam ta gula aŇčga hay, aa kwambiwal, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęT…ôŇčgkwa a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a diyam.
8.23: Daa masa ata fa t…ôŇčgam na, Yesu aa daa …óar. Wure Ňčgene, b…ôrgadaŇč a zlar mekey da ray yam. Kwambiwal heyey, a r…ôhey ta yam, nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a fa daa z…ô…óam.
8.24: Da ray Ňčgene, gula aŇčga hay, a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, a sl…ôk…óadamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Mahura! Bay Mahura! Al…ôkwa fa da m…ôckwa!¬Ľ Yesu ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, aa b…ôcey ta g…ôdaŇč, a t…ôka b…ôrgadaŇč ta yam ma wusey heyey. B…ôrgadaŇč heyey a key saba, yam a wusey saba.
8.25: Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa pamaya Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara ba na, maja me?¬Ľ Ama gula aŇčga hay a, a zluram, a r…ôzlam, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw a kaa na, ara wa? Masa aa guzlar kwa Ňčgada b…ôrgadaŇč, kwa Ňčgada yam, a c…ônar mey ke…óe na!¬Ľ Yesu a …ď…ôley malula hay da ray ndaw (Matiye 8.28-34; Mark 5.1-20)
8.26: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a wusam aa hwayak Ňčga nd…ôhay G…ôraza hay ta dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa, dey ta‚Äô Ňčgada *Galile.
8.27: Ata ma wusam la na, Yesu a pawa salay daa kwambiwal a. Ndaw daa berney fete…óe daha a sawa a cada ray. Ndaw aha, aa ta malula da ray. Menjey ga, ta k…ôzley zana fa vaw daa ba. A njey na, da way ba, ama daa c…ôvay hay.
8.28: Daa masa aŇčga ma h…ôtar Yesu na, a zlar mewudey, a t…ô…óey asi salay aŇčga, aa guzlar ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYesu, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó, ka wu…óey fa yah na, me? Ambahw, ka da s…ôrdaya banay ba!¬Ľ
8.29: Aa guzley anda ke…óe, maja Yesu ma l…ôvar a malula ha Ňčga bey da ray aŇčga. Malula ha fa kar mandaw mandaw. Nd…ôhay aŇčga hay a j…ôwmata har ta salay hay ta calalaw amba a njey da way, ama ndaw a, a key g…ôdaŇč, a …ó…ôsla calalaw a. Malula ha fa hwada a ley.
8.30: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMez…ôley akah na, me?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMez…ôley a…óaw na, ‚Äúga‚ÄĚ.¬Ľ A l…ôvey anda ke…óe maja malula hay ga da ray a daha.
8.31: Malula hay heyey na, a kamar ambahw a Yesu amba a …ď…ôlta aa v…ôge…ó meseleleŇč e ba.
8.32: Daa slam aha Ňčgene, Ňčga…ďa Ňčga vetem hay ga daha da mec…ôkwer da aŇčgwa. Malula hay da ray ndaw heyey a b…ôrkwamara Yesu Ňčga v…ôltar c…ôve…ó amba a mb…ôzam a ray vetem hay a. Yesu ta‚Äô, a v…ôltar c…ôve…ó.
8.33: Ta‚Äô, malula hay a, a bam da ray ndaw aha, a diyam a mb…ôzam a ray vetem hay a. Wure Ňčgene, vetem hay a tabiya a bam ray, a hwam ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčgadaa heeleŇč, a tataram, a kwiyam saf! aa yam, a …ďa…ď…ôtam c…ôpa.
8.34: Masa mec…ôkwer hay Ňčga vetem hay kaa heyey ma h…ôtmar cek ma key la anda ke…óe na, a hwam a wuzdamara mey a, a nd…ôhay daa berney a, leŇč a nd…ôhay da slala hay masa ta cakay.
8.35: Nd…ôhay a, a samawa Ňčga n…ôkey cek mekey fete…óe he. A wusmawa a cakay Yesu na, a h…ôtfamar ndaw masa Yesu ma …ď…ôlta malula hay da ray aŇčga heyey. Ndaw aha manjakaya da cakay Yesu, aŇčga ta zana fa vaw. A s…ôra leŇčgesl d…ô…ďa. Nd…ôhay ma samawa Ňčga n…ôkey cek ma key heyey na, mand…ôrzay a katar.
8.36: Nd…ôhay fete…óe ma h…ôtmar Yesu ma …ď…ôlta malula hay da ray ndaw heyey, a kadamatara a nd…ôhay ma samawa Ňčga n…ôkey cek ma key heyey.
8.37: Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay tabiya daa hwayak Ňčga G…ôraza hay a l…ôvmar a Yesu Ňčga daw la daa hwayak ata, maja fa zluram ga. Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a t…ôpey aa kwambiwal Ňčga daw.
8.38: Ndaw masa Yesu ma …ď…ôlta malula hay da ray aŇčga heyey, a kar ambahw a Yesu Ňčga v…ôlar c…ôve…ó amba a diyam cew e. Ama Yesu ta v…ôlar c…ôve…ó Ňčga diyam cew e daa ba, a v…ôhda, a l…ôvar:
8.39: ¬ęDaw a way akah, ta kadatara cek mahura masa Gazlavay ma kakawa ke…óe tabiya a nd…ôhay.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, ndaw aha a daw, a wuzda mey da ray cek masa Yesu ma ka tabiya da ray a heyey Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa berney a tabiya. Yesu a mb…ôley Ňčgwas ta a sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa dam Ňčga Jayirus daa mem…ôcey (Matiye 9.18-26; Mark 5.21-43)
8.40: Nd…ôhay ga fa s…ôkwmara Yesu da dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile. AŇčga ma v…ôhwa la na, nd…ôhay a t…ô…ďmara ta mees…ômey.
8.41: Ndaw daha mez…ôley Jayirus. AŇčga *bay-ray Ňčga *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe. A wusey fa Yesu, a t…ô…óey asi salay aŇčga. A kar ambahw Ňčga daw a way aŇčga,
8.42: maja dam aŇčga daha, aŇčga pal, mekele daa ba, vaw fa car, fa da m…ôcey. Dam aha, mamba mevey kuraw a ray a cew. Masa Yesu fa daw a way Jayirus a na, nd…ôhay fa Ňčgacamara ta ke…óe ta ke…óe.
8.43: Da wuzlah nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, Ňčgwas daha mambaz fa mb…ô…ówa da hwa…ó, d…ôga mevey kuraw a ray a cew. Ta nd…ôvda zleley aŇčga sem c…ôpa fa dakwter hay, ama kwa ndaw ma gwa a ray macay a daa ba.
8.44: Ňägwas aha a Ňčg…ôchey Ňčgada fa Yesu ta fa d…ô…ďa, a g…ôsfar har fa mey Ňčga zana aŇčga. Wure wure Ňčgene, mambaz aŇčga heyey taŇč! a …ó…ôsley mey.
8.45: Yesu aa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMa g…ôsfaya na, wa?¬Ľ Kwa waawa a l…ôvey: ¬ęAra yah ba, ara yah ba.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, *Piyer a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ray akah tabiya mazl…ôrkaya ta nd…ôhay fa Ňčgacamaka kaa na, ka l…ôvey ma g…ôsfaya wa na, kwara?¬Ľ
8.46: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNdaw ta g…ôsfaya la, maja ya s…ôra g…ôdaŇč daa vaw a…óaw ta bey la.¬Ľ
8.47: Ňägwas aha, a n…ôka na, Yesu ta s…ôra sem, a gwa a …ďada ray aŇčga saba. Ta‚Äô, a daw fa Yesu, aa faa wesey maja fa zlurey. A t…ô…óey asi salay aŇčga. Ta‚Äô, a kada fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya a g…ôsfar har fa zana Ňčga Yesu na, maja me, asaya, a kada Yesu a mb…ôlda wure wure Ňčgene na, kwara.
8.48: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęDam a…óaw, ka ta mb…ôley cay maja kah ma paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara. Daw ta zazay.¬Ľ
8.49: Masa Yesu faa guzlar Ňčgada Ňčgwas aha araŇč na, ndaw a sawa ta mesl…ôrey da way Jayirus, bay-ray Ňčga way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDam akah heyey, ta m…ôcey sem. Ka da g…ôrda vaw ta Bay Mahura saba.¬Ľ
8.50: Ama Yesu ma c…ônda mey a na, a l…ôvar a Jayirus: ¬ęMevel akah a da t…ô…óey ba. Paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara gway na, dam akah a mb…ôley la.¬Ľ
8.51: Masa Yesu ma wusey la a way Jayirus na, kwa a v…ôley c…ôve…ó a ndaw Ňčga mb…ôzey asiya ba, si ma mb…ôzam asiya na, ata Piyer, *JaŇč, *Jak, leŇč papaŇč Ňčga dam aha ta mamaha gway.
8.52: Nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe fa t…ôwam, fa wudam maja dam aha. Ama Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa t…ôwam ba. Dam aha ta m…ôcey daa ba, ama a key a ney aa …óar.¬Ľ
8.53: Nd…ôhay a, aa saŇčg…ôram a ray Yesu maja a s…ôrmara dam aha ta m…ôcey sem.
8.54: Yesu a Ňčg…ôchey fa dam aha heyey, ta‚Äô, a k…ôrza fa har, aa guzlar ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvar: ¬ęB…ôzey, sl…ôk…óey!¬Ľ
8.55: Mes…ôfney aŇčga a v…ôhwa aa slam a, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey wure Ňčgene. Yesu a l…ôvtar Ňčga v…ôlmar cek mez…ômey.
8.56: PapaŇč Ňčga dam aha ta mamaha a r…ôzlam ga, ama Yesu a k…ôtata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek masa ma key ke…óe na, ka da kadamara Ňčgada ndaw ba.¬Ľ

9.1: Yesu a kusta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew, a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key maazla amba a …ď…ôlam malula hay wura wura tabiya da ray nd…ôhay, asaya, amba a mb…ôlam masa-macay hay.
9.2: AŇčga ma v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč la na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrdata Ňčga wuzey mey da ray mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay, asaya, Ňčga mb…ôley masa-macay hay.
9.3: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam, ama daa madaw akwar na, ka da lam cek a har ba, ka da lam zlanday ba, ka da lam gabal ba, ka da lam cek mez…ômey ba, ka da lam dala ba. Ndaw a da ley zana cew ba.
9.4: Kwa daa slam wura wura ndaw ma t…ô…ďkwar la a way aŇčga na, njam a way a Ňčgene kasl pas masa akwar ma da diyam.
9.5: Kwa daa slam wura wura nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmakwar daa ba na, raramatara lagwada fa salay akwar hay amba ka wuzdamatara ata nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey, diyam la da slala ha.¬Ľ
9.6: Ta‚Äô, gula aŇčga hay heyey a p…ôkam da slala hay mekele mekele daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile, a wuzam *Mey-maaya-mawiya, a mb…ôlam masa-macay hay, kwa daa wura daa wura c…ôpa. Ray a h…ô…ďar a Bay Herawt (Matiye 14.1-12; Mark 6.14-29)
9.7: *Herawt, ndaw ma wa hwayak Ňčga *Galile Ňčgene, a c…ônda mey da ray ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay. Mey a, a h…ô…ďar ray maja nd…ôhay faa guzlam mey hay mekele mekele. Nd…ôhay a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw aha na, ara *JaŇč-Baptis ma sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
9.8: Siya hay a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra *Eli ma wuzwa vaw.¬Ľ Mekele hay a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra ndaw pal dasi nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle ma sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
9.9: Ama Herawt a l…ôvey: ¬ęJaŇč-Baptis na, ya ta …ó…ôslra ray sem. Kaa ndaw masa yah ma c…ônda mey da ray a ke…óe na, ara wa d…ô…ďa wa?¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, a s…ôpey c…ôve…ó Ňčga h…ôtar Yesu. Yesu a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey a nd…ôhay ma f…ôna gabal zlam (Matiye 14.13-21; Mark 6.30-44; JaŇč 6.1-14)
9.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu kuraw a ray a cew heyey a v…ôhmawa fa Yesu, a kadamara cek hay tabiya masa ata ma kam…ôrwa daa mep…ôkey ata. Yesu ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlta taava ata, a diyam aa slam gweegwe ta slala Betsayda.
9.11: Ama nd…ôhay ga ma c…ôndamara ata sem na, a diyam asi ata. Yesu a t…ô…ďta ta mees…ômey. A wuztar mey da ray mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay, asaya, a mb…ôldata masa-macay hay.
9.12: Yaw, mamba pas a k…ôzley na, gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew heyey a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęL…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ke…óe Ňčga diyam a wuzlah-way, da daa ba, a slala hay ta cakay, amba a s…ôpam slam-meney ta cek mez…ômey, maja al…ôkwa da wuzlah-ley.¬Ľ
9.13: Ama Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ta ray akwar, v…ôlmatar cek mez…ômey!¬Ľ Gula hay a, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęDa har ala na, peŇč zlam ta ewet cew gway. Da ka wu…óey amba nd…ôhay tabiya ke…óe a z…ômam cek na, si ya diyam ya h…ô…ókamawa kwa.¬Ľ
9.14: Da wuzlah nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, zel hay a key gabal zlam. Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay a: ¬ęNjadamata njakw! njakw! kwakwar zlam, kwakwar zlam.¬Ľ
9.15: Gula aŇčga hay ta‚Äô, a njadamata tabiya anda Yesu ma l…ôvtar.
9.16: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu hal! a h…ôlta peŇč zlam ta ewet cew heyey, ta‚Äô, a baŇčga…óa dey a va…ó, a kar suse a Gazlavay maja cek mez…ômey a. Ta‚Äô, a pap…ôsa, a v…ôldatara a gula aŇčga hay amba a wunkamatara a nd…ôhay a.
9.17: Kwa waawa a z…ômey haa a r…ôhey. Ta‚Äô, gula aŇčga hay a cakalamara siya Ňčga cek hay a ma mb…ôkey. Macakalakaya ha, gadakar kuraw a ray a cew. Nd…ôhay a padamara Yesu na, Ňčga wa? (Matiye 16.13-28; Mark 8.27‚Äď9.1)
9.18: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, Yesu fa d…ôrey daŇčgay pal taava aŇčga. Gula aŇčga hay ata da cakay a. Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYah na, nd…ôhay a padamaya na, Ňčga wa?¬Ľ
9.19: Gula aŇčga hay a, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęNd…ôhay siya a l…ôvam kah na, *JaŇč-Baptis. Mekele hay a l…ôvam kah na, *Eli, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle. Mekele hay saya a l…ôvam kah na, ndaw pal dasi nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle ma sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
9.20: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa c…ôf…óata saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKaa akwar may, ka l…ôvam yah na, wa?¬Ľ *Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
9.21: Yesu a k…ôtata gula aŇčga hay, a katar mey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa da wuzdamara mey a ke…óe a ndaw ba.¬Ľ
9.22: A l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęSi yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya s…ôrey banay la ga …óagay. Mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, leŇč *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, a r…ôsmaya la, fa da t…ô…ďmara ara Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdiwa na, daa ba. A da k…ô…ómaya vagay. Ama Ňčga …óar maakar a na, ya sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ Mey da ray mes…ôpey Yesu
9.23: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay tabiya: ¬ęDa ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga s…ôpya na, si a mb…ôkda mewulkey da ray ray aŇčga, a s…ôpya ta mevel pal, si a …ď…ôsa banay ma da sawa a ray aŇčga mandaw mandaw maja yah, anda yah ma da m…ôcey fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya.
9.24: S…ôrmara, kwa waawa ma wu…óey Ňčga l…ôhda heter aŇčga na, a key Ňčgene, aa z…ô…óda. Ama kwa waawa maa z…ô…óda heter aŇčga maja yah na, a key Ňčgene, a l…ôhda heter aŇčga ha.
9.25: Da ndaw a h…ôtey cek hay tabiya masa aŇčga ma wu…óey da b…ôla ke…óe, ama aa z…ô…óda heter aŇčga, da daa ba, a n…ôsa ray aŇčga na, meh…ôtey cek hay a tabiya Ňčgene, a j…ôna la daw?
9.26: Kwa waawa ma paya hwaray fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay, da daa ba, ma key hwaray Ňčga t…ô…ďa mey a…óaw na, Ňčgene, ta pas masa yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, yah ma da v…ôhwa ta mewe…óey a…óaw , ta g…ôdaŇč mahura Ňčga Papay, leŇč ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga maslaŇč aŇčga hay da va…ó na, ya par hwaray la fa mey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay may.
9.27: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah akwar fe…óe, fa da m…ôcam daa ba, si ata ma h…ôtmar mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay la …óagay.¬Ľ Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a h…ôtmar mewe…óey Ňčga Yesu (Matiye 17.1-8; Mark 9.2-8)
9.28: Fa d…ô…ďa ha luma pal na, Yesu, ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlta ata *Piyer, *JaŇč, leŇč *Jak. A t…ôpam a aŇčgwa amba Yesu a d…ôrwa daŇčgay fete…óe.
9.29: Masa aŇčga fa d…ôrey daŇčgay na, dey aŇčga p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey, zana aŇčga a we…óey mabara nd…ô…ó-nde…ó.
9.30: Wure wure Ňčgene, nd…ôhay daha cew faa guzlam ta Yesu a. Ara ata *Mawiz ta *Eli.
9.31: A wuzmawa vaw daa mewe…óey Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó. Ata faa guzlam ta ata Yesu da ray sl…ôra aŇčga masa aŇčga ma da nd…ôvda ta fa mem…ôcey aŇčga da *Jeruzelem.
9.32: Ata Piyer ta gula hay cew heyey manatakaya c…ôkw-cakw daa …óar. Ama a sl…ôk…óam daa …óar, a h…ôtmar mewe…óey Ňčga Yesu ta nd…ôhay cew heyey.
9.33: Daa masa nd…ôhay a fa diyam la da cakay Yesu na, Piyer aa guzlar a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay ala, maaya na, ya njakwa fe…óe, amba ya k…ôrcam slam hay maakar, pal Ňčgada kah, pal Ňčgada Mawiz, pal Ňčgada Eli.¬Ľ Ama Piyer a s…ôra mey masa aŇčga maa guzlda ba.
9.34: Masa Piyer faa guzley na, mekwtene a sawa, a s…ôrtata. Mekwtene ma s…ôrtata la na, gula aŇčga hay heyey a zluram.
9.35: Daa mekwtene he na, …óay a c…ônwa, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKe…óe he ara B…ôzey a…óaw, masa yah ma wala, j…ôkfamar sl…ômay.¬Ľ
9.36: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga …óay ma c…ônwa ha na, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a da n…ôkam dey na, mbak! Yesu pal taava aŇčga. Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a, a njam teete, kwa cek masa ata ma h…ôtmar na, ta kadamara Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa ba. Yesu a bada cek da ray b…ôzey (Matiye 17.14-18; Mark 9.14-27)
9.37: Pep…ôrek e, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay maakar heyey a pamawa salay da aŇčgwa heyey, nd…ôhay ga a diyam Ňčga cadam…ôrwa ray ta Yesu a.
9.38: Da wuzlah nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, ndaw daha a zlar mewudey, a l…ôvar a Yesu: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ya kaka ambahw. N…ôka b…ôzey a…óaw ke…óe, aŇčga pal, mekele daa ba, j…ôna cey.
9.39: AŇčga ta cek da ray, ta zlar la na, a wudey, a gucey, maŇčgwafakw a bawa da mey. A s…ôrda banay kalah, a mb…ôkda gweegwe ba.
9.40: Ya ta katar ambahw la a gula akah hay amba a badamara cek da ray b…ôzey a, ama ta gwamara daa ba.¬Ľ
9.41: Yesu aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęHey! Akwar nd…ôhay mar…ôzltakaya masa ma pamaya Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara ba ke…óe. Ya da njey ta akwar na, haa ta vara? Ya da …ď…ôskwar na, haa ta vara?¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a ndaw aha: ¬ęHandiwa b…ôzey akah ha fe…óe.¬Ľ
9.42: Masa b…ôzey a gweegwe a wusey a cakay Yesu na, cek da ray a c…ôkw! a la b…ôzey a, …ďa! a k…ôzla a hwayak, a gucey. Ama Yesu aa b…ôcar a cek da ray b…ôzey a, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôley. Yesu a l…ôvar a papaha: ¬ęEhe, b…ôzey akah.¬Ľ
9.43: Nd…ôhay tabiya a r…ôzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęFara fara Gazlavay na, aa ta g…ôdaŇč.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley saya da ray mem…ôcey aŇčga ta masl…ôk…óawa aŇčga (Matiye 17.22-23; Mark 9.30-32) Daa masa nd…ôhay tabiya fa r…ôzlam da ray cek hay tabiya masa Yesu ma kata na, a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay:
9.44: ¬ęWure ke…óe j…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya, pamara mey ke…óe aa ray: A da k…ôrzamaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a da v…ôldamaya a har nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
9.45: Ama gula aŇčga hay ta c…ôndamara mey masa Yesu maa guzldatara Ňčgene daa ba. Mabara Ňčga mey a ma…ďadakaya fa ata, a gwamara Ňčga c…ôndamara ba …óagay. A zluram Ňčgaa c…ôf…óamara Yesu da ray mey a. Mahura na, wa? (Matiye 18.1-5; Mark 9.33-37)
9.46: Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a kam yawa da wuzlah ata, a wu…óam amba a s…ôrmara mahura dasi ata na, wa.
9.47: Ama Yesu a s…ôra mewulkey ata. Ta‚Äô, a ley b…ôzey mec…ôhe deŇč! a lacada a cakay a,
9.48: a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwa waawa ma t…ô…ďa b…ôzey mec…ôhe ke…óe la maja a wu…óya na, a key Ňčgene na, a t…ô…ďey yah, ray a…óaw. Asaya, kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďya la, a t…ô…ďey Ňčgene na, Bay Gazlavay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa may. Ndaw masa mec…ôhe da wuzlah akwar tabiya na, mahura na, aŇčga.¬Ľ Ndaw masa-g…ôra al…ôkwa ba na, ara jam al…ôkwa (Mark 9.38-40)
9.49: Ta‚Äô, *JaŇč a mb…ô…ódara a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay ala, ala ta h…ôtam ndaw daha la fa …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay ta mez…ôley akah. Ya wu…óam Ňčga t…ôkmara maja ara ndaw da wuzlah al…ôkwa ba.¬Ľ
9.50: Ama Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da t…ôkmara ba. Ndaw masa-g…ôra akwar ba na, ara jam akwar.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay Samari a wu…óam Ňčga t…ô…ďmara Yesu ba na, maja me?
9.51: Masa gweegwe cay Gazlavay a la Yesu fa v…ô…óa a va…ó na, Yesu a k…ôrza mevel Ňčga daw aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem.
9.52: Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey nd…ôhay teese…ó fa mey. A diyam a slala daha daa hwayak Ňčga *Samari Ňčga …óiymar slam-meney.
9.53: Ama nd…ôhay daa slala ha, a g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmata ba, maja a s…ôrmara Yesu a wu…óey Ňčga daw a Jeruzelem .
9.54: Masa gula aŇčga hay ata *Jak ta *JaŇč ma n…ôkmara nd…ôhay daa slala ha a g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmata ba na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Mahura, ka wu…óey yaa c…ôf…óamawa awaw Ňčga pawa salay da va…ó Ňčga z…ôma slala ha ke…óe tabiya daw?¬Ľ
9.55: Yesu p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey dey Ňčgada fa ata, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ótar ray, a katar mey. [A l…ôvtar: ¬ęMa h…ôldakwar Ňčgaa guzley anda ke…óe na, mes…ôfney wura? Yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya sawa na, Ňčgaa z…ô…óey nd…ôhay ba, ama Ňčga l…ôhdata.]¬Ľ
9.56: Ta‚Äô, a diyam aa slala mekele. Mey da ray mes…ôpey Yesu (Matiye 8.19-22)
9.57: Ata fa diyam daa c…ôve…ó, ndaw daha a l…ôvar a Yesu: ¬ęKwa aa slam wura wura masa kah ma da daw na, ya daw la asi akah.¬Ľ
9.58: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMbiga hay, ata ta v…ôge…ó ata hay, …óiyaŇč hay, ata ta way ata hay. Ama yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, kwa slam Ňčga ney nek…ô…óey amba ya m…ôskey vaw da hwa…ó a na, daa ba.¬Ľ
9.59: A l…ôvar a ndaw laŇčgar: ¬ęSawa asi a…óaw.¬Ľ Ama ndaw aha a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, v…ôlya c…ôve…ó amba ya daw ya j…ôh…ôrwa papay la …óagay.¬Ľ
9.60: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMb…ôkdata nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya Ňčga j…ôhmata nd…ôhay ata hay mam…ôctakaya. Kah na, daw ta wuzey mey da ray mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
9.61: Ndaw laŇčgar daha saya a l…ôvar: ¬ęYah na, ya daw la asi kah Bay a…óaw, ama v…ôlya c…ôve…ó amba ya da cat…ôrwa har a nd…ôhay da way ala hay la …óagay.¬Ľ
9.62: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNdaw masa fa h…ôvey ta sla hay, a mb…ô…óey dey fa d…ô…ďa na, aŇčga letek ta ndaw ma wu…óey Ňčga daw taa c…ôve…ó a…óaw, ama a n…ôkey dey fa d…ô…ďa aa c…ôve…ó aŇčga magurma. Ndaw anda Ňčgene na, a gwa mekey sl…ôra Ňčga Bay Gazlavay ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ

10.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Bay Mahura a weley gula hay mekele kwakwar maasala a ray a cew, amba a sl…ôrdata tabiya cew cew teese…ó fa mey aŇčga aa berney hay c…ôpa ta a slala hay tabiya masa aŇčga ta ray aŇčga ma da daw a hwa…ó a.
10.2: A Ňčgatar mey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek ta key la ga da ley, ama nd…ôhay Ňčga kam…ôrwa a way na, p…ôreh. Anda ke…óe, kamar ambahw a bay Ňčga ley a, Ňčga sl…ôrwa nd…ôhay mekele saya a dey a Ňčga kawa cek hay da ley a.
10.3: Yaw, anda ke…óe diyam, ya sl…ôrdakwar anda b…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč hay Ňčgada wuzlah g…ôdey-ley hay.
10.4: Ka da lam dala ba, ka da lam gabal ba, kwa ka da lam tarak hay ba. Ka da lacam daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga cey har a nd…ôhay ba.
10.5: Da ka mb…ôzam a way ndaw Ňčga njey, teese…ó na, l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAnja way ke…óe Ňčga njey daa zazay.‚ÄĚ
10.6: Da ndaw ma wu…óey zazay Ňčga njey da way aŇčga daha na, mep…ôsey-mey akwar a, a wusfar la. Da ndaw ma wu…óey zazay da way a daa ba na, mep…ôsey-mey akwar a, a v…ôhwa la fa akwar.
10.7: Da nd…ôhay da way a ta t…ô…ďmakwar la, njam da way a Ňčgene, z…ômam cek, sam cek, masa nd…ôhay a ma v…ôldamakwara, maja ndaw ma ka sl…ôra na, aa t…ô…óe Ňčga h…ôtey mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga. Ka da s…ôpmata fa way a fa way a ba.
10.8: Masa akwar ma wusam la aa berney wura wura, da nd…ôhay fete…óe a t…ô…ďmakwar na, cek masa nd…ôhay a ma da v…ôldamakwara, z…ômamara.
10.9: Mb…ôldamata masa-macay hay daa berney a, l…ôvmatar a nd…ôhay daa berney a: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay ta wuswa la gweegwe ta akwar Ňčga wey da ray akwar.‚ÄĚ
10.10: Ama da ka wusam aa berney wura wura masa nd…ôhay a g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmakwar ba na, diyam aa slam masa nd…ôhay ga da hwa…ó a, l…ôvam:
10.11: ‚ÄúKwa lagwada daa berney akwar fa salay ala, ya raramakwara amba ya wuzdamakwara akwar ta kam cek maaya ba la. Asaya, si ka s…ôrmara Bay Gazlavay ta wuswa la gweegwe ta akwar Ňčga wey da ray akwar!‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
10.12: Yaw, Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ta pas Ňčga sariya na, Gazlavay a da s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay daa berney a Ňčgene ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga *Sadawm.¬Ľ Yesu a wuzda banay ma da sawa a ray nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ba (Matiye 11.20-24)
10.13: ¬ęHaya! nd…ôhay da slala KwaraziŇč, banay a sawa la a ray akwar. Haya! nd…ôhay da slala Betsayda, banay a sawa la a ray akwar. Ya ta key maazla hay la da wuzlah akwar. Da nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Tir ta Ňčga SidaŇčw ta h…ôtmatar maazla hay a la na, anja ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata sem d…ôga zleezle, anja ta k…ôzlam zana Ňčga sak meef…ôrey vaw sem fa vaw, asaya, anja ta p…ôtkwalam sem daa beb…ô…óes Ňčga wuzwa na, ata ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata da b…ôla cay.
10.14: Da ray Ňčgene, ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da ka sariya da ray b…ôla na, Gazlavay a da s…ôrdakwar banay ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Tir ta Ňčga SidaŇčw.
10.15: Akwar, nd…ôhay da Kapernayum may, ka wulkam na, Gazlavay a Ňčg…ôlkwar la a va…ó daw? Ara k…ône ba. Sas…ôkar jak, a da k…ôzlakwar aa slam Ňčga nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya.¬Ľ
10.16: Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęNdaw masa fa c…ônkwar mey na, a key Ňčgene, a c…ônya mey may. Ndaw masa ma t…ô…ďa mey akwar ba na, a key a t…ô…ďey mey a…óaw ba may. Asaya, ndaw ma r…ôsya na, a key Ňčgene a r…ôsa ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay kwakwar maasala a ray a cew heyey a v…ôhmawa da p…ôkey
10.17: Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey hay kwakwar maasala a ray a cew heyey, a v…ôhmawa ta mees…ômey ga, a l…ôvmar a Yesu: ¬ęBay Mahura, daa masa ala faa guzlam ta mez…ôley akah na, kwa malula hay may a c…ônmandar mey.¬Ľ
10.18: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYah, ya ta h…ôtar *SataŇč la fa t…ô…ówa anda mez…ômey Ňčga var ma kawa da va…ó Ňčgada hwayak.
10.19: Yaw, j…ôkam sl…ômay, ya ta v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč la Ňčga pey salay a ray zezekw hay ta arac hay, asaya, ya ta v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč la Ňčga f…ôna g…ôdaŇč Ňčga masa-g…ôra hay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay tabiya. Kwa cek fa da h…ôtfakwar daa ba.
