10.20: Ama ka da sas…ôsam maja malula hay ma c…ônmakwar mey ba. Sas…ôsam na, maja mez…ôley akwar hay mawuzlalatakaya da gazlavay da va…ó.¬Ľ Yesu a kar suse a Gazlavay ta mees…ômey (Matiye 11.25-27; 13.16-17)
10.21: Wure wure Ňčgene, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a v…ôlar mees…ômey a Yesu. Ta‚Äô, Yesu a h…ôlma Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWaa Papay Bay Gazlavay, ndaw ma wa slam da va…ó ta da hwayak, ya fa kaka suse, maja ka ta wuzd…ôrwa maaya akah la a nd…ôhay ma s…ôra cek ba anda b…ôza hay mec…ôhe hay. Ama Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa ta leŇčgesl ma s…ôra cek na, ka ta …ďada maaya ha sem fa ata. Ahaw Papay, maja ta mbafaka sem Ňčga ka k…ône.¬Ľ
10.22: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay: ¬ęPapay ta v…ôldatiwa cek hay tabiya sem asi har a…óaw. Kwa ndaw pal ma s…ôrya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, daa ba, si Papay. Asaya, kwa ndaw pal ma s…ôra Papay daa ba may, si yah, B…ôz aŇčga, leŇč nd…ôhay masa yah ma wu…óey Ňčga wuzdatara.¬Ľ
10.23: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…óey dey Ňčgada fa gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar Ňčgada ata taava ata: ¬ęMaaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akwar maja akwar ma h…ôtmar cek masa Gazlavay ma ka ke…óe ta dey akwar.
10.24: Ama ya fa l…ôvkwar, nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle ta bay hay ga, ta wu…óam la Ňčga h…ôtmar cek masa akwar ma h…ôtmar ke…óe, ama ta h…ôtmar daa ba. Ta wu…óam la Ňčga c…ôndamara cek masa akwar ma c…ôndamara ke…óe, ama ta c…ôndamara daa ba.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta ndaw Samari
10.25: Fete…óe na, *ndaw maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daha, a wu…óey Ňčga jada Yesu. Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ya da key amba ya h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba na, me?¬Ľ
10.26: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMawuzlalakaya daa kwakwas al…ôkwa na, kwariya? Masa kah ma jaŇčga na, ka c…ônda na, kwara?¬Ľ
10.27: Ndaw aha, a mb…ô…ódara a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMey a, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúSi ka wu…óa Bay Gazlavay akah ta mevel akah c…ôpa, ta mes…ôfney akah c…ôpa, ta g…ôdaŇč akah c…ôpa, ta leŇčgesl akah c…ôpa. Si ka wu…óa meseembew akah anda kah ma wu…óa ray akah.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
10.28: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYawa, ka ta mb…ô…ódiwa la maaya kalah. Daw ta ka k…ône, ka h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba la.¬Ľ
10.29: Ama ndaw aha a wu…óey amba a …ď…ôla hwaray daa dey aŇčga. Da ray Ňčgene, aa c…ôf…óa Yesu saya, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMeseembew a…óaw na, wa?¬Ľ
10.30: Yesu aa guzlar saya, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNdaw *J…ôwif daha a sl…ôk…óey da *Jeruzelem, a daw a Jerikwaw. A da daw na, a har mayal hay. Mayal hay a, a k…ôrzamara, a k…ô…ómara, a mb…ôkdamara h…ô…óek h…ô…óek Ňčga m…ôcey.
10.31: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay daha, a daw taa c…ôve…ó e Ňčgene. A h…ôtar ndaw masa mayal hay ma k…ô…ómara heyey. Ta‚Äô, a zleŇčge…óey, a daw d…ôreŇč ta aŇčga.
10.32: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay mekele daha masa da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčga *Levi, a daw taa slam aha Ňčgene may. A h…ôtar ndaw masa mayal hay ma k…ô…ómara heyey na, ta‚Äô, a zleŇčge…óey a daw d…ôreŇč ta aŇčga, anda ndaw Ňčgeeme heyey saya na, gway.
10.33: Ama, ndaw-m…ôlak daha, ara ndaw *Samari, fa daw taa c…ôve…ó e Ňčgene may. A wusey a cakay ndaw masa mayal hay ma k…ô…ómara ke…óe na, a n…ôka na, a kar dey-ceceh.
10.34: Ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a, a kar mal ta slalak fa mb…ôlek e, a mb…ôzra. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a la a ray z…ôŇčgwaw aŇčga, ta‚Äô, a handa aa way meney Ňčga m…ôlak hay, a n…ôkfar dey.
10.35: Pep…ôrek e, masa fa da daw aa mep…ôkey aŇčga na, ta‚Äô a v…ôlar dala a bay Ňčga way a, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúN…ôkfayawa dey fa ndaw ke…óe. Pas masa ya ta v…ôhwa cay daa mep…ôkey a…óaw na, yah ta ray a…óaw, ya p…ôlkawa cek tabiya masa ka maa z…ô…óda maja aŇčga fa d…ô…ďa a…óaw la.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
10.36: Masa Yesu ma nd…ôvda mey-meŇčgey ke…óe cay na, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa *ndaw maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa wuzlah nd…ôhay maakar ke…óe na, meseembew Ňčga ndaw masa mayal hay ma k…ô…ómara kaa na, wa?¬Ľ
10.37: *Ndaw maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMeseembew aŇčga na, ara ndaw masa ma s…ôrfar dey-ceceh.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęDaw, ta ka k…ône.¬Ľ Mey da ray ata Marta ta Mari
10.38: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay fa diyam daa c…ôve…ó. Masa ata ma wusam la a slala daha na, fete…óe, Ňčgwas daha mez…ôley Marta, a Ňčg…ôla Yesu a way aŇčga.
10.39: Dam-mamaha daha, mez…ôley *Mari, c…ôkwam! a njey a cakay Bay Mahura, fa j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey aŇčga masa aa ma kada.
10.40: Marta fa key sl…ôra hay mekele mekele ga daa hejek. Ta‚Äô, a sawa fa Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, dam-mama a…óaw a mb…ôkdatiwa sl…ôra hay tabiya a ray a…óaw anda ke…óe na, a mbafaka gway daw? L…ôvar Ňčga sawa Ňčga j…ônya.¬Ľ
10.41: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMarta, Marta, ka fa h…ô…ďa ray akah maja ka fa key cek hay mekele mekele ga.
10.42: Ama cek pal mahura Ňčga key daha. Ara cek masa Mari ma ka ke…óe. Ndaw ma gwa Ňčga t…ôka daa ba.¬Ľ

11.1: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, Yesu fa d…ôrey daŇčgay daa slam daha. Masa aa ma nd…ôvda cay na, ndaw pal dasi gula aŇčga hay, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, sas…ôrkadandar med…ôrey daŇčgay anda *JaŇč maa s…ôrkadata gula aŇčga hay cey.¬Ľ
11.2: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa akwar fa d…ôram daŇčgay na, l…ôvam: PapaŇč Bay Gazlavay, anja nd…ôhay tabiya Ňčga namaka ray maja kah na, Bay Gazlavay pal. Maaya na, ka wa b…ôla tabiya.
11.3: V…ôlndar cek mez…ômey Ňčga wusndar fa …óar a, fa …óar a.
11.4: Mb…ôkdandara meb…ôrey ala, maja ala may, ala fa mb…ôkdamatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma kamandar cek maaya ba. J…ô…óndar amba cek a batandar Ňčga key meb…ôrey ba.¬Ľ
11.5: Yesu aa guzltar mey-meŇčgey da ray med…ôrey-daŇčgay a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa ndaw da wuzlah akwar, jam aŇčga daha na, a daw fa aŇčga ta wuzlah-tava…ó amba aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúJam a…óaw, v…ôlya peŇč maakar yaa d…ô…óey cey,
11.6: maja mandala a…óaw ta sawa la da p…ôkey ta way a…óaw, ama cek mez…ômey amba ya v…ôlar daa ba.‚ÄĚ
11.7: Jam aŇčga ha a mb…ô…ódara da way da way, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúKa s…ôrdaya banay ba. Ya ta g…ôrca mey-mbew cay, ala manatakaya ta b…ôz a…óaw hay. Ya gwa ya sl…ôk…óey amba ya v…ôlka peŇč ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
11.8: Yesu a l…ôvey saya: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar kwa ndaw aha, a wu…óey Ňčga sl…ôk…óey ba na, a sl…ôk…óey la. A da sl…ôk…óey na, maja ata jam ba, ama maja da ta v…ôlar daa ba na, jam aŇčga ha a daa c…ôf…óa dey ga, hwaray fa da kar daa ba. Anda ke…óe, a v…ôlar cek tabiya masa jam aŇčga ha ma wu…óey la.
11.9: ¬ęYah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar: Cac…ôf…óam cek fa Bay Gazlavay, a v…ôldakwara la. S…ôpam cek fa Gazlavay, ka h…ôtam la. Z…ôlam fa mey-mbew, a wurkwara la,
11.10: maja kwa waawa maa c…ôf…óafar cek na, a v…ôlar la. Kwa waawa ma s…ôpey cek fa v…ô…óa na, a h…ôtey la. Kwa waawa ma z…ôley fa mey-mbew na, a wurara la.
11.11: ¬ęAkwar papaŇč Ňčga b…ôza hay, da b…ôzey akah aa c…ôf…óafaka ewet na, ka v…ôlar zezekw la daw?
11.12: Yaw, da aa c…ôf…óafaka slesle…ó na, ka v…ôlar arac la daw?
11.13: Akwar nd…ôhay malamba hay ma!, ka s…ôrmara Ňčga v…ôley cek maaya Ňčgada b…ôz akwar hay. Da k…ône na, kaa wara Papakw akwar Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a v…ôltar Mes…ôfney aŇčga Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa maa c…ôf…óafamara ba na, kwara?¬Ľ G…ôdaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay a f…ôna g…ôdaŇč Ňčga SataŇč (Matiye 12.22-30; Mark 3.20-27)
11.14: Pas pal daha Yesu a …ď…ôley malula da ray ndaw ma gwa meeguzley ba daha. Masa aŇčga ma …ď…ôla malula ha cay na, ndaw a, aa guzley d…ô…ďa. Nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe a r…ôzlam.
11.15: Ama nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah ata a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra *Beyelzebul, bay Ňčga mes…ôfney maaya ba hay ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
11.16: Siya hay a s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga jadamara, a l…ôvmar Ňčga key maazla Ňčga wuzda g…ôdaŇč aŇčga a sawa ta fa Bay Gazlavay.
11.17: Ama Yesu a s…ôra mewulkey ata, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa nd…ôhay daa hwayak pal a kam v…ôram da wuzlah ata na, hwayak a Ňčgene a n…ôsey la. Daa v…ôram a Ňčgene, way hay a b…ôzlam la.
11.18: Da gula hay Ňčga *SataŇč, a kam v…ôram da wuzlah ata na, kaa wara SataŇč a, a da c…ômtar ray Ňčga wey da ray ata na, kwara d…ô…ďa wura? Yaw, ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe na, maja ka l…ôvam ya …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Beyelzebul.
11.19: Da k…ône na, kaa gula akwar hay a …ď…ôlam malula ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga wa? Ka l…ôvam ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay, ba diya? Da ray Ňčgene, gula akwar hay a, a wuzdamakwara la mey akwar Ňčgene ara aŇčga ba.
11.20: Fara fara, ya …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay na, ara ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay. A wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey, Gazlavay fa wey da ray akwar cay.¬Ľ
11.21: Yesu a Ňčgey mey saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ndaw masa-g…ôdaŇč fa j…ô…óa zleley aŇčga ta cek ma ka v…ôram na, zleley aŇčga ha mapakaya maaya maaya, cek a wusfar ba.
11.22: Ama da ndaw mekele ma f…ôna ta g…ôdaŇč a sawa, a k…ôrza ndaw aha, a p…ôrslara cek mekey v…ôram aŇčga hay tabiya masa aŇčga ma j…ô…óa zleley aŇčga ta aŇčga. A h…ôlra zleley aŇčga tabiya, a wunkatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
11.23: ¬ęYaw, da ndaw aa ta yah daa ba na, Ňčgene ndaw a ara masa-g…ôra a…óaw. Asaya, da ndaw a g…ômey Ňčga j…ônya Ňčga …ď…ôcwa nd…ôhay aa c…ôve…ó a…óaw ba na, a key Ňčgene, aa wa…óatar ray.¬Ľ Mey da ray malula ma v…ôhwa a ray ndaw saya (Matiye 12.43-45)
11.24: Yesu aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa masa malula ta bey sem da ray ndaw na, a daw a p…ôkey da ley saw, a s…ôpey slam Ňčga m…ôskey vaw. Da ta h…ôtey daa ba na, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúŇägama ya v…ôhey aa slam a…óaw masa yah ma bawa da hwa…ó a heyey.‚ÄĚ
11.25: Ta‚Äô, a v…ôhey a ray ndaw aha aa slam aŇčga heyey, a h…ôtfar slam aha ma…óiykaya maaya maaya.
11.26: Da ray Ňčgene, malula ha a daw a Ňčg…ôlwa malula hay mekele maasala ma f…ônmara ta h…ôma. A samawa a ray ndaw a heyey. Anda ke…óe, ndaw aha a da s…ôrey banay ma f…ôna masa Ňčgeeme.¬Ľ Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay na, aa da ray wa hay wa?
11.27: Masa Yesu ma kada mey ke…óe la na, Ňčgwas daha da wuzlah nd…ôhay makustakaya kaa heyey, aa guzlar a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMaaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray Ňčgwas masa kah ma yawa da hwa…ó aŇčga, kah ma sa …ó…ôwa aŇčga!¬Ľ
11.28: Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęAhaw, ama maaya Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga sawa jak na, a ray nd…ôhay ma j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ma kadamara sl…ôra ta mey a.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu Ňčga key maazla (Matiye 12.38-42)
11.29: Nd…ôhay ga fa kusmawa ma f…ôna ma f…ôna a cakay Yesu. Yesu a zlar Ňčgaa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęNd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe kaa na, maaya ba hay. Aa c…ôf…óam maazla masa da gazlavay da va…ó ma wuzda ara Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdiwa. Ama a h…ôtmar maazla ha daa ba, si maazla anda ma key ta *Jawnas, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle.
11.30: Anda Gazlavay ma ka maazla ta Jawnas zleezle Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Niniwe, ara k…ône may ta yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ma da t…ôrey Ňčga maazla Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe.
11.31: Yaw, ta pas sariya masa Gazlavay ma da ka na, Ňčgwas ma key bay daa hwayak Ňčga Saba zleezle, a lacawa ray la Ňčga mb…ô…ókwar ray, akwar nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe, maja aŇčga na, a sawa da d…ôreŇč Ňčga c…ôney mey maaya Ňčga Bay *SalamaŇčw, ndaw ta leŇčgesl. N…ôkmara, da wuzlah akwar fe…óe, ndaw ma f…ôna Bay SalamaŇčw daha!
11.32: Ta pas sariya na, nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Niniwe heyey, a lacamawa ray la Ňčga mb…ô…ómakwar ray, akwar nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe, maja daa masa ata ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa Jawnas ma wuzdatara na, ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata sem. N…ôkmara, da wuzlah akwar fe…óe, ndaw ma f…ôna Jawnas daha!¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta slam-mewe…óey (Matiye 5.15; 6.22-23)
11.33: Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey: ¬ęDa ndaw ta g…ô…óey awaw la aa pet…ôrla Ňčga we…óey slam na, a …ó…ôpa ba. Ama a pa aa slam mepey pet…ôrla Ňčga wa…óa slam daa way a, amba nd…ôhay ma mb…ôzam a hwa…ó a na, a h…ôtmar dey.
11.34: B…ôz Ňčga dey akah na, fa wa…óa vaw akah anda pet…ôrla ma wa…óa slam. Da b…ôz Ňčga dey akah aŇčga maaya maaya na, kah daa slam-mewe…óey. Ama da dey akah aa maaya ba na, Ňčgene, kah daa l…ôvaŇč.
11.35: Anda ke…óe, wey vaw anja slam-mewe…óey daa kah Ňčgene na, Ňčga t…ôrey Ňčga l…ôvaŇč ba.
11.36: Ama da vaw akah c…ôpa aa daa slam-mewe…óey, l…ôvaŇč da hwa…ó a kwa kuset k…ô…óey daa ba na, Ňčgene, vaw akah a da we…óey anda pet…ôrla ma wa…óa slam.¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ótar ray a Fariza hay ta nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz (Matiye 23.1-36; Mark 12.38-40)
11.37: Masa Yesu ma nd…ôvda meeguzley cay na, ndaw Fariza daha a z…ôla a way aŇčga Ňčga z…ômey …óaf. Ta‚Äô, a diyam, a mb…ôzam a way a, a njam Ňčga z…ômey …óaf.
11.38: Ndaw Fariza heyey a r…ôzley, maja Yesu ta p…ôra har Ňčga z…ômey …óaf anda kwakwas Ňčga *Fariza hay a ma l…ôvey na, daa ba.
11.39: Bay Mahura a l…ôvar: ¬ęAkwar Fariza hay, akwar fa p…ôrmara d…ô…ďa Ňčga v…ôley Ňčga …óaf ta v…ôley Ňčga yam akwar hay maaya maaya Ňčga s…ôpey kwakwas akwar, ama mevel akwar na, mar…ôhkaya ta mewulkey Ňčga leley, ta Ňčga key maagway.
11.40: Akwar nd…ôhay mar…ôzltakaya hay! Gazlavay ma karawa d…ô…ďa Ňčga cek hay a na, ta karawa hwa…ó a daa ba daw?
11.41: Ama da ka wu…óam mevel akwar Ňčga t…ôrey maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, maaya na, ka v…ôlmatar cek masa daa v…ôley akwar hay a masa-viya hay.
11.42: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar Fariza hay. Akwar fa wunkamata cek akwar hay tabiya slam kuraw, akwar fa v…ôldamara slam pal a Gazlavay, kwa cek hay mec…ôhe mec…ôhe ma c…ôrda lar, ta gwaslaf Ňčga lar mekele mekele daa jerne akwar hay na, akwar fa wunkamara k…ône may. Ama ka s…ôrfadamara Ňčga key cek maaya ta c…ôve…ó e a nd…ôhay ba. Asaya, ka wu…ómara Gazlavay ba. Sas…ôkar jak, cek hay a Ňčgene na, ara cek hay maaya Ňčga key. Ka da mb…ôkdamara Ňčga key cek hay siya hay ba may.
11.43: ¬ęBanay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar Fariza hay, maja daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ka wu…óam menjey aa slam maaya masa fa mey. Ka wu…óam nd…ôhay a camakwar har ta meney ray fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay makustakaya ga.
11.44: Banay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar Fariza hay, maja akwar anda c…ôvay hay ma h…ôtey ba masa ma katar hezey a nd…ôhay ma diyam ta ray a, kwa a s…ôrmara ba.¬Ľ
11.45: Ndaw pal da wuzlah *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęWaa bay ala, kaa guzley anda ke…óe na, a key ka c…ô…óndar ala nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas may.¬Ľ
11.46: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz may, banay a sawa la a ray akwar, maja akwar fa bamawa kwakwas hay maadakw a maadakw a masa nd…ôhay a gwamara Ňčga s…ôpmara ba. Ama ka g…ômam Ňčga j…ônmata Ňčga s…ôpey kwakwas hay a, kwa nek…ô…óey ba.
11.47: Banay a sawa la a ray akwar, akwar masa ma l…ômamata c…ôvay hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle Ňčga mbey, anja ara papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay ma k…ô…ómata jak.
11.48: Anda ke…óe, akwar fa wuzdamara a nd…ôhay sl…ôra Ňčga papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay Ňčgene na, a mbafakwar. Ata na, ta k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle sem, akwar kwa ka l…ômamata c…ôvay ata hay maaya maaya.
11.49: Maja Ňčgene, Bay Gazlavay ma s…ôra cek tabiya, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa da sl…ôrwa nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey a…óaw, ta nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey. A da s…ôrdamata banay ta siya hay da wuzlah ata, siya hay may, a da k…ô…ómata vagay.‚ÄĚ
11.50: Da ray Ňčgene, mambaz Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya masa ma m…ôcam d…ôga Ňčga mezley Ňčga b…ôla na, a hufey la a ray nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe.
11.51: A k…ô…óam teese…ó na, *Abel. Asaya, ta k…ô…óam nd…ôhay mekele mekele la haa kasl fa *Zakari masa ata ma k…ô…ómara daa walaŇč Ňčga slam-mef…ôkey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay ta *Way Ňčga Gazlavay. Fara fara, ya fa l…ôvkwar, Gazlavay a katar sariya la a nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe maja ata.
11.52: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, banay a sawa la a ray akwar maja akwar ta …ďadamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay sem fa nd…ôhay anda ndaw ma …ďey lek…ôle Ňčga mey-slam.¬Ľ
11.53: Masa Yesu ma bawa la da way ndaw Fariza heyey na, nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta Fariza hay, mevel a catar ga. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara da ray mey hay mekele mekele,
11.54: amba da ta h…ôtam mey maaya ba la na, a dad…ô…ófamar mey.

12.1: Daa masa Yesu fa kam yawa ta *Fariza hay leŇč ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz heyey na, nd…ôhay ga ta kusam la, a key gabal weewe, kwa slam Ňčga lecey daa ba. Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay …óagay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWam vaw fa cek ma h…ôsla peŇč Ňčga Fariza hay. Anda mel…ôvey, wam vaw fa Fariza hay, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew.
12.2: Cek tabiya masa nd…ôhay ma …ďadamara, a wuzwa la a palah, cek hay masa nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara ba na, a s…ôrmara la.
12.3: Maja Ňčgene, cek tabiya masa akwar ma kadamara ta tava…ó daa l…ôvaŇč na, nd…ôhay tabiya a c…ôndamara la taa pas. Mey tabiya masa akwar maa s…ôkdamara taa s…ôkey da ver na, a wuzdamara la ta g…ôdaŇč daa slam met…ôley mey.¬Ľ Maaya Ňčga zlurey na, ta wa? (Matiye 10.28-31)
12.4: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar, jam a…óaw hay, ka da zluram ta nd…ôhay ma da k…ô…ómakwar vagay ba, maja a da k…ô…óam na, vaw akwar daada gway. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, fa da gwamara Ňčga kamakwar cek mekele daa saba.
12.5: Amba ya wuzdakwara ndaw masa akwar ma da zluram ta aŇčga. Zluram na, ta Gazlavay gway, maja ta k…ô…ókwar vagay la na, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a gwa Ňčga k…ôzlakwar aa v…ôge…ó Ňčga awaw magaza saya. Fara fara, ya fa l…ôvkwar, zluram ta aŇčga.
12.6: ¬ę∆äiyaŇč mec…ôhe mec…ôhe zlam na, a gwa Ňčga h…ô…ókedey dala cew daada, ba daw? Ama Gazlavay a s…ôrta …óiyaŇč hay a pal pal tabiya.
12.7: Akwar may, kwa eŇčgwec Ňčga ray akwar hay na, masl…ôftakaya pal pal tabiya. Ka da zluram ba! Akwar na, Gazlavay a wu…ókwar a f…ôna …óiyaŇč hay mec…ôhe mec…ôhe ga Ňčgene, ba daw?¬Ľ Mey da ray mekey sede da ray Yesu (Matiye 10.32-33; 12.32; 10.19-20)
12.8: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęEhe, ya fa l…ôvkwar saya, kwa waawa ma l…ôvey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay, aŇčga ndaw a…óaw na, Ňčgene, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya da l…ôvey fa mey Ňčga maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó ta pas sariya, aŇčga ndaw a…óaw may.
12.9: Ama ndaw ma l…ôvey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay a s…ôrya ba na, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya da l…ôvey fa mey Ňčga maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay ta pas sariya, ya s…ôra ba may.
12.10: ¬ęKwa waawa maa guzley mey maaya ba da ray a…óaw, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, Gazlavay a mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga la. Ama ndaw ma c…ô…óa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay fa da mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga daa ba s…ôlak.
12.11: ¬ęDa a handamakwar aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga key sariya, da daa ba, fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay ta bay hay amba a kamakwar sariya na, ka da zluram ba, ray akwar a da h…ô…ďey da ray mey masa akwar ma da mb…ô…ódamatara Ňčga l…ôhey ray akwar ba.
12.12: Mey masa akwar ma da mb…ô…ódamatara na, Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a wuzdakwara la ta pas Ňčgene.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta ndaw masa-zleley mar…ôzlkaya
12.13: Ndaw pal da wuzlah nd…ôhay ga da cakay Yesu heyey a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, l…ôvar a m…ôlma a…óaw mahura Ňčga wunkandara zleley Ňčga papa ala ma mb…ôkdandara cey!¬Ľ
12.14: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęJam a…óaw, ma paya Ňčga …ó…ôsley mey da wuzlah akwar ta Ňčga wunkakwara zleley akwar na, wa?¬Ľ
12.15: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, aa guzltar a nd…ôhay tabiya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWam vaw, ka da s…ôpam Ňčga key zleley ta har akwar ba. Kwa ndaw, aŇčga ta zleley ga na, heter aŇčga fa da njey maja zleley a na, daa ba.¬Ľ
12.16: Ta‚Äô, aa guzltar mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw daha, aŇčga ta zleley ga. Ley aŇčga hay ta kam cek la maaya maaya.
12.17: Anda ke…óe, ndaw aha, a wulkey, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúSlam Ňčga pata cek a…óaw hay daa saba. Ya da key na, kwara?‚ÄĚ
12.18: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúAha! Ya s…ôra cek masa yah ma da ka. Ňägama ya h…ô…ďta wude…ó a…óaw hay c…ôpa, ya l…ômta mahura mahura, ya …ď…ôcta daw a…óaw ta zleley a…óaw hay tabiya a hwa…ó a.
12.19: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya da l…ôvey: Zleley a…óaw fa da nd…ôvey daa ba, a key mevey weewe la. Ya da m…ôskey vaw, ya da z…ômey cek, ya da sey cek, ya da njey daa wiya.‚ÄĚ
12.20: ¬ęAma Gazlavay a l…ôvar a ndaw aha: ‚ÄúKah na, ndaw mar…ôzlkaya, dasi tava…ó ke…óe, ya da la mes…ôfney akah. Zleley masa kah ma …ď…ôca Ňčgene na, Ňčgada wa?‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
12.21: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a wuzdatara mey a, a nd…ôhay da cakay a heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay masa ma …ď…ôcam zleley da b…ôla ke…óe Ňčgada ata ray ata na, a key Ňčgene, a kam cek ma mbafar a Gazlavay ba. Ata letek ta ndaw a ke…óe.¬Ľ Mey da ray mepey Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw fara fara (Matiye 6.25-34)
12.22: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMaja Ňčgene, ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, daa menjey akwar na, ray akwar a da h…ô…ďey da ray cek mez…ômey ta cek mesey ba. Asaya, ray akwar a da h…ô…ďey da ray zana Ňčga k…ôzley fa vaw akwar ba.
12.23: Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe na, maja cek mez…ômey a f…ôna heter akwar ba, zana may, a f…ôna vaw akwar ba.
12.24: ¬ęYaw, wulkam da ray …óiyaŇč hay cey! Fa sl…ôkam daa ba, fa Ňčg…ômam daw daa ba, kwa wude…ó ata hay daa ba, ama Gazlavay fa v…ôltar cek mez…ômey c…ôŇčga. Akwar na, ka f…ônmata …óiyaŇč hay ba daw?
12.25: Da wuzlah akwar ndaw ma gwa Ňčga pey kwa …óar pal a ray …óar aŇčga da b…ôla ta mewulkey aŇčga na, wa?
12.26: Da ka gwamara mekey cek mec…ôhe ba na, ka h…ô…ďam ray da ray cek hay mekele na, maja me?
12.27: ¬ęN…ôkmara meefekwey hay da ley cey! Aa fakwam na, kwara? A kam sl…ôra ba, a cam zana ba, ama ya fa l…ôvkwar, kwa Bay *SalamaŇčw zleezle ta zleley ga ta gwa Ňčga k…ôzley zana ma mbey anda meefekwey pal na, daa ba.
12.28: Gazlavay a ka amba kusaf aa fekwey tasana, ama mandaw na, kusaf a, a wewurey. Da Gazlavay fa key cek maaya Ňčgada kusaf masa awaw ma da wawura anda ke…óe na, Gazlavay a n…ôkfakwar dey ma f…ôna kusaf a Ňčgene daa ba daw? Akwar masa ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara ba Ňčgene, s…ôrmara Gazlavay a k…ôzlkwar zana la ma f…ôna meefekwey hay a.
12.29: Anda ke…óe, ray akwar a da h…ô…ďey mandaw mandaw da ray cek mez…ômey ta da ray cek mesey ba. Ka da zluram maja cek hay a ba.
12.30: Ma h…ô…ďam ray maja cek hay a Ňčgene na, nd…ôhay da b…ôla ke…óe masa ma s…ôrmara Gazlavay ba. Ama akwar na, Papakw akwar, Bay Gazlavay, a s…ôra cek masa akwar ma wu…óam.
12.31: Anda ke…óe, s…ôpam na, Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray akwar. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Bay Gazlavay a v…ôldakwara cek hay siya la may.¬Ľ Mey da ray me…ď…ôcey zleley da gazlavay da va…ó (Matiye 6.19-21)
12.32: Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęAkwar na, ga daa ba anda t…ô…ďaŇč hay masa Ňčguyer k…ô…óey, ama ka da zluram ba, maja ta mbafar la a Papakw akwar amba a v…ôlkwar cek hay maaya masa aŇčga ma …óiytara Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa aŇčga fa wey da ray ata.
12.33: H…ô…ókadamata cek akwar hay, wunkamatara dala ha a masa-viya hay. S…ôpam Ňčga …ď…ôcey zleley na, aa slam masa menjey Ňčga s…ôrmataw da va…ó. Fete…óe zleley akwar a fa da nd…ôvey daa ba. Anda ke…óe, mayal hay a gwamara Ňčga lalamara daa ba, kwa maaca a gwa Ňčga n…ôsa ba.
12.34: S…ôrmara, daa slam masa zleley akwar aa da hwa…ó a na, mevel akwar may aa fete…óe.¬Ľ Mey da ray mewey vaw Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay
12.35: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNjam vaw ma…óiykaya mandaw mandaw Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay. Ka da m…ôcmata pet…ôrla akwar hay ba,
12.36: anda nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra ma s…ôkwmara bay Ňčga way ma lawa daa gwagway Ňčga kwakwa ta tava…ó. A s…ôkwmara amba a wurmara mey-mbew fiyaw da masa ta v…ôhwa cay, fa z…ôley fa mey-mbew.
12.37: Da bay Ňčga way a sawa, a h…ôtfatar ata ta dey na, mees…ômey daha Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra hay a. Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, bay Ňčga way a, a pa zana Ňčga sl…ôra fa vaw, a z…ôlt…ôrwa, a njadata, a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey.
12.38: Kwa a v…ôhwa ta wuzlah-tava…ó, kwa ta slam Ňčgaa p…ôrek, a h…ôtfatar ata ta dey na, mees…ômey daha Ňčgada nd…ôhay a.
12.39: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya, da bay Ňčga way a s…ôra …óar masa ndaw-mayal ma da daw a way aŇčga na, a mb…ôkda ndaw-mayal a Ňčga sl…ôna way aŇčga ha la daw?
12.40: Yaw, akwar may, wam vaw maaya maaya maja yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya da v…ôhwa na, kwa ka s…ôrmara …óar a ba.¬Ľ Mey da ray ndaw ma ka sl…ôra maaya ta maaya ba (Matiye 24.45-51)
12.41: *Piyer aa c…ôf…óa Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, kaa guzley ta mey-meŇčgey ke…óe na, Ňčgada ala daw, Ňčgada nd…ôhay tabiya daw?¬Ľ
12.42: Bay Mahura a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNdaw ma ka sl…ôra maaya ta leŇčgesl na, wura? Ndaw ma ka sl…ôra maaya ta leŇčgesl na, ara ndaw masa bay aŇčga ma da pa Ňčga mahura da ray ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay c…ôpa, amba a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey daa masa may fa catar.
12.43: Da masa bay aŇčga ha a sawa a h…ôtfar aŇčga fa ka sl…ôra ha na, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra ha aa s…ômey la.
12.44: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, bay aŇčga ha, a da v…ôldara zleley aŇčga hay c…ôpa a har aŇčga amba a n…ôkfar dey.
12.45: Ama ndaw ma ka sl…ôra masa ma ley mewulkey aŇčga wal na, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw fa da v…ôhwa gweegwe daa ba.‚ÄĚ Ta‚Äô, a k…ô…óta nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra hay mez…ôle hay ta maŇčgusa hay. A z…ômey cek, a sey wuzam, a wey.
12.46: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, bay aŇčga ha na, a da v…ôhwa ta pas masa ndaw ma ka sl…ôra ha fa wulkey da ray a daa ba, asaya, kwa fa da s…ôra ler e daa ba. Bay aŇčga ha a da …ď…ôla da way aŇčga, a da s…ôrda banay anda aŇčga ma da s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba.¬Ľ
12.47: Yesu a l…ôvar saya: ¬ęNdaw ma ka sl…ôra masa ma s…ôra cek masa bay aŇčga ma wu…óey, ama a wey vaw fa sl…ôra aŇčga ba, asaya, a key cek masa aŇčga ma l…ôvar ba na, ndaw aha, a h…ôtey mek…ô…óey ga la.
12.48: Da ndaw ma ka sl…ôra laŇčgar a s…ôra cek masa bay aŇčga ma wu…óey ba, ama ta key cek maaya ba la t…ô…óe Ňčga k…ô…óey na, a da h…ôtey mek…ô…óey nek…ô…óey gway. Ndaw masa Gazlavay ta v…ôlar cek la ga a har aŇčga na, a daa c…ôf…óafar ga k…ône may. Ndaw masa Gazlavay ta v…ôlar sl…ôra mahura la Ňčga key na, a daa c…ôf…óafar Ňčga ka sl…ôra ha maaya maaya ma f…ôna.¬Ľ Mey da ray nd…ôhay ma da wunkam …óay maja Yesu (Matiye 10.34-36)
12.49: Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęYa sawa na, Ňčga pey awaw fa b…ôla ke…óe. Ya wu…óey na, awaw a, a g…ô…óey d…ôga wure ke…óe.
12.50: Si a s…ôrdamaya banay ga kasl fa mem…ôcey . Ray a…óaw fa h…ô…ďey kasl pas masa banay a ma da nd…ôvey.
12.51: Ka wulkam ya sawa na, ya handawa zazay a b…ôla daw? Kay! K…ône ba. Ya fa l…ôvkwar, ya sawa Ňčga wunkey nd…ôhay.
12.52: D…ôga wure ke…óe, nd…ôhay zlam da way, a wunkam la, maakar a c…ômam la a ray cew, cew a c…ômam la a ray maakar.
12.53: Yaw, bay Ňčga way a wu…ókam …óay la ta b…ôzey aŇčga, b…ôzey a wu…ókam …óay la ta papaha, Ňčgwas a wu…ókam …óay la ta dam aŇčga, dam a wu…ókam …óay la ta mamaha, mamaŇč Ňčga b…ôzey a wu…ókam …óay la ta Ňčgwas Ňčga b…ôzey aŇčga, Ňčgwas Ňčga b…ôzey a wu…ókam …óay la ta mamaŇč Ňčga zel e.¬Ľ Mey da ray mes…ôrey cek ma da key wure ke…óe (Matiye 16.2-3)
12.54: Yesu a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ga da cakay a: ¬ęAnja ka h…ôtmar gazlavay Ňčga var fa lawa ta mey-aŇčgwa , wure Ňčgene ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúVar fa sawa.‚ÄĚ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, var a, a pey fara.
12.55: Da ka h…ôtmar meme…ó fa kawa ta dey Ňčga M…ôzam na, ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúMawur…ďay a key la.‚ÄĚ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mawur…ďay a, a key fara.
12.56: Akwar nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew, ka gwamara Ňčga wunkamara cek ma key da b…ôla ta cek ma key da gazlavay da va…ó, ama ka s…ôrmara cek ma key wure ke…óe ba na, maja me?¬Ľ Si ndaw a …óiya mey ta ndaw ma wuda (Matiye 5.25, 26)
12.57: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęAkwar ta ray akwar ka s…ôrmara cek masa maaya Ňčga key ba na, kwara?
12.58: Da ndaw a wudka, akwar fa diyam cew e aa sariya na, …óiymara mey a d…ôga daa c…ôve…ó. Da daa ba na, a da handaka fa ndaw ma ka sariya, ndaw ma ka sariya ha a da v…ôldaka a har sewje hay. Sewje hay may, a da k…ôzlamaka aa f…ôrs…ône.
12.59: Ya fa l…ôvka, ka fa da bawa daa f…ôrs…ône he daa ba s…ôlak, si kah ma p…ôla d…ôvaz a la tabiya ndav.¬Ľ

13.1: Daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay fete…óe daha, aa guzlmar a Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Pilat ta k…ô…óey nd…ôhay *Galile la vagay daa masa ata fa h…ôram g…ônaw hay Ňčgada Gazlavay. A c…ôma mambaz ata ta mambaz Ňčga g…ônaw hay a.¬Ľ
13.2: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa wulkam meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay Galile hay a Ňčgene a f…ôna Ňčga Galile hay siya, maja ata ma m…ôcam anda Ňčgene daw?
13.3: Ya fa l…ôvkwar a f…ôna ba s…ôlak! Ama da akwar ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar daa ba na, akwar c…ôpa ka daa z…ô…óam k…ône may.
13.4: Yaw, wulkam da ray nd…ôhay kuraw a ray a daaŇčgafa…ó masa way mag…ôlkaya maaz…ôma da slala Sil…ôwe ma b…ôzlwa a ray ata heyey. Ka wulkam na, a f…ônmata nd…ôhay siya da *Jeruzelem ta meb…ôrey daw?
13.5: Ya fa l…ôvkwar a f…ônmata ba s…ôlak! Ama da akwar ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar daa ba na, akwar c…ôpa ka daa z…ô…óam k…ône.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta wudez ma yey ba
13.6: Yesu ta‚Äô, a Ňčgatar mey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw daha a r…ôvey wudez aa ley aŇčga. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a sawa amba a Ňčg…ôley bab…ôza Ňčga wudez e, ama wudez e, ta yey bab…ôza daa ba.
13.7: Bay Ňčga wudez e, a l…ôvar a ndaw ma j…ô…óa ley aŇčga ha: ‚ÄúN…ôka wudez ke…óe, mevey maakar ya fa sawa amba ya Ňčg…ôley bab…ôza fa v…ô…óa, ama bab…ôza fa v…ô…óa daa ba. ∆ä…ôsla wudez e, maja fa t…ôka slam Ňčga maaya.‚ÄĚ
13.8: Ama ndaw ma j…ô…óa ley a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw, mb…ôkda ta l…ômla ke…óe …óagay, amba ya gudha si-wurza, ya h…ôlar g…ôraŇč asiya.
13.9: Da s…ôfe…ó na, a yey la kwa. Da ta yey daa ba c…ôŇčga na, ka …ó…ôsla.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ôley Ňčgwas ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw
13.10: Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw daha, Yesu faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
13.11: Ňägwas daha, aa ta malula da ray mevey kuraw a ray a daaŇčgafa…ó. Malula ha ta hurma sem. A gwa Ňčga lecey der e ba.
13.12: Masa Yesu ma h…ôtar Ňčgwas aha na, ta‚Äô, a z…ôla, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMamay, malula masa ma hurmaka Ňčgene na, daa saba.¬Ľ
13.13: Ta‚Äô, a par har a ray. Wure wure Ňčgene, Ňčgwas aha deŇč! a lecey. A h…ôlma Gazlavay.
13.14: Ama *bay-ray Ňčga way-mewuzey-mey a, mevel a car maja Yesu ma mb…ôley ndaw ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw Ňčgene. Da ray Ňčgene, aa guzltar a nd…ôhay makustakaya daa way a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę∆äar maakwaw daha Ňčga key sl…ôra, da ka wu…óam memb…ôley na, samawa ta pas hay a Ňčgene, ama ka da samawa ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw ba!¬Ľ
13.15: Bay Mahura a mb…ô…ódara a ndaw a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAkwar, nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew! Ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, akwar fa p…ôskamata sla akwar hay ta z…ôŇčgwaw akwar hay da gezleŇč, ka handamata Ňčga samawa yam, ba diya?
13.16: Yaw, Ňčgwas daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Ab…ôraham ke…óe, aŇčga maj…ôwkaya da har *SataŇč, bay-malula, mevey kuraw a ray a daaŇčgafa…ó. AŇčga na, ya p…ôska ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw ba na, maja me?¬Ľ
13.17: Masa Yesu ma mb…ô…ódatara anda ke…óe la na, hwaray a katar a masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay tabiya. Ama nd…ôhay makustakaya na, aa s…ômam da ray sl…ôra hay mekele mekele maaya masa Yesu ma kata. Mey-meŇčgey ta bab…ôza Ňčga bazlawar leŇč ta cek ma h…ôsla makala (Matiye 13.31-33; Mark 4.30-32)
13.18: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, aŇčga anda me? Ya da wa na, ta me?
13.19: Ya wa ta bab…ôza Ňčga bazlawar masa ndaw ma la, ma r…ô…ďa aa ley aŇčga. Bab…ôza Ňčga bazlawar aha, ta‚Äô, a p…ôcwa, a g…ôley mahura. ∆äiyaŇč hay a …óiyam way fa mey-har hay a.¬Ľ
13.20: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęYa da wa mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay na, ta me?
13.21: Ya wa ta cek ma h…ôsla makala masa Ňčgwas ma h…ôley kuset k…ô…óey, ma jaha…óa ta hapa Ňčga makala ga, amba a h…ôsl…ôrwa tabiya.¬Ľ Bay Gazlavay a wey na, da ray wa hay wa? (Matiye 7.13, 14, 21-23)
13.22: Yesu fa daw Ňčgada *Jeruzelem, a daw taa berney hay leŇč ta slala hay, faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay.
13.23: Daa Ňčgene ndaw daha, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, Gazlavay a da l…ôhey daa meb…ôrey na, nd…ôhay nek…ô…óey gway daw?¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar a nd…ôhay fete…óe, a l…ôvtar:
13.24: ¬ęKam g…ôdaŇč amba ka mb…ôzam taa mey-mbew meeŇčg…ôlez e aa slam masa Bay Gazlavay fa wey da ray nd…ôhay. Ya fa l…ôvkwar, nd…ôhay ga a jadamara la, amba a mb…ôzam, ama fa da gwamara daa ba.
13.25: ¬ęYaw, pas pal bay Ňčga slam aha a da sl…ôk…óey Ňčga g…ôrca mey-mbew. Ňägene, ka da lacam aa ambaw, ka da z…ôlam fa mey-mbew, ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúBay ala, wurndara mey-mbew may taw!‚ÄĚ Ama a da mb…ô…ódakwara, a l…ôvkwar: ‚ÄúYa s…ôrkwar ba! Ka samawa na, dama?‚ÄĚ
13.26: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ka da zlamar Ňčgaa guzlmar, ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAl…ôkwa ta z…ômkwa cek la bama, al…ôkwa ta sakwa cek la bama, ka taa s…ôrkadandar la daa c…ôve…ó ala hay mep…ôkey.‚ÄĚ
13.27: A da l…ôvkwar saya: ‚ÄúYa s…ôrkwar ba! Ka samawa na, dama? Akwar nd…ôhay tabiya masa ma ka cek maaya ba hay, Ňčg…ôcham la da cakay a…óaw.‚ÄĚ
13.28: Ta pas masa akwar ma da h…ôtmatar ata *Ab…ôraham, *Izak, *Jakwap, leŇč nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle tabiya, manjatakaya da cakay Bay Gazlavay na, Ňčgene, ka da t…ôwam, ka daa p…ô…óam sler maja akwar mamb…ôkdatakaya daa ambaw.
13.29: Ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da wuzd…ôrwa bay aŇčga na, nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway hay mekele mekele a samawa la daa slam hay tabiya da b…ôla, Ňčga key gwagway da va…ó.
13.30: Yaw, da wuzlah nd…ôhay madagway-dakw na, siya a da t…ôram nd…ôhay Ňčgeeme, asaya, da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčgeeme na, siya a da t…ôram Ňčga madagway-dakw.¬Ľ Yesu a t…ôway maja nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Jeruzelem (Matiye 23.37-39)
13.31: Ta pas Ňčgene, nd…ôhay da wuzlah *Fariza hay daha a Ňčg…ôchamawa fa Yesu amba a wuzmar mey, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęDaw la fe…óe aa slam mekele maja Bay *Herawt a wu…óey Ňčga k…ô…óka vagay.¬Ľ
13.32: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam l…ôvmar a mbiga ha: ‚ÄúEhe, ya fa …ď…ôley malula hay da ray nd…ôhay, ya fa mb…ôley masa-macay hay, tasana, mandaw, Ňčga …óar maakar a ya da nd…ôvda sl…ôra a…óaw.‚ÄĚ
13.33: Anda mel…ôvey si ya ley c…ôve…ó, ya daw tasana, mandaw, mandaw laŇčgar saya, maja nd…ôhay a gwamara Ňčga k…ô…ómara *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay d…ôreŇč ta *Jeruzelem ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
13.34: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a l…ôvey: ¬ęHaya! Akwar nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem , akwar nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem, Gazlavay a sl…ôrkwar nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga hay na, ka k…ô…ómata vagay. Asaya, a sl…ôrkwar maslaŇč aŇčga hay na, kaa zakamata ta aŇčgwa. Ama mandaw mandaw ya wu…óey amba ya …ď…ôckwar tabiya akwar anda gwagwar ma …ď…ôcta b…ôz aŇčga hay asi k…ôrpasl, ama ka wu…óam ba.
13.35: C…ôndamara, Gazlavay a da la har aŇčga da ray akwar, Way-mekey-kwakwas akwar a da t…ôrey yideŇč. Yah fa l…ôvkwar, akwar fa da h…ôtmaya fa dey daa saba haa ta pas masa akwar ma da l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAnja Bay Gazlavay Ňčga p…ôsar mey Ňčgada ndaw masa aa ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa ta mez…ôley aŇčga.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ

14.1: Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, Yesu ta‚Äô, a daw a way ndaw pal da wuzlah mahura hay Ňčga *Fariza hay Ňčga z…ômey …óaf. Nd…ôhay manjatakaya fete…óe, fa saŇčgalamara Yesu ta d…ôk-vaw da ray cek masa aa ma da ka.
14.2: Ndaw da wuzlah ata daha, mambakaya ta mbey. Ndaw a malacakaya fa mey aŇčga.
14.3: Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzltar Ňčgada *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta Ňčgada Fariza hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwakwas al…ôkwa a l…ôvey na, kwara? Memb…ôley ndaw masa-macay ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, maaya daw, maaya ba daw?¬Ľ
14.4: Ama nd…ôhay a, a g…ômam Ňčga mb…ô…ódamara ba. Ta‚Äô, Yesu a g…ôsfar har fa ndaw masa-macay heyey, mbal! a mb…ôlda, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkda Ňčga daw.
14.5: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa ndaw da wuzlah akwar aŇčga ta b…ôzey, da daa ba, aŇčga ta sla, yaw, da b…ôzey a, da daa ba, sla ha a t…ô…óey aa …ď…ôlndaw na, ndaw aha a bad…ôrwa fiyaw fiyaw, kwa ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw, daa ba daw?¬Ľ
14.6: Kwa nd…ôhay a, ta gwamara Ňčga mb…ô…ódamara aa mey Ňčga Yesu a daa ba. Ndaw a da pa ray aŇčga Ňčga mahura ba
14.7: Yesu fa n…ôkta nd…ôhay ma samawa Ňčga z…ômey …óaf da way ndaw Fariza heyey. A s…ôpam slam-menjey na, si Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay. Maja Ňčgene, Yesu a Ňčgatar mey, a l…ôvtar:
14.8: ¬ęDa ndaw a z…ôlkwar Ňčga z…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga meley kwakwa na, ka da s…ôpey Ňčga njey aa slam Ňčga ndaw mahura ba. Da kaa t…ô…óe ta z…ôlwa ndaw mahura da ray akah la aa gwagway a kwa.
14.9: Anda ke…óe, bay Ňčga way a, a sawa, a da l…ôvka: ‚ÄúMb…ôkda slam ke…óe a ndaw ke…óe.‚ÄĚ Maja Ňčgene, ka da mb…ôkda slam aha, ka da njey fa d…ô…ďa ta hwaray a.
14.10: Ama da ta z…ôlmaka la Ňčga z…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway na, daw ta njey fa d…ô…ďa, amba bay Ňčga way a, a sawa, a l…ôvka: ‚ÄúJam a…óaw, sawa aa slam Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay ke…óe.‚ÄĚ Anda ke…óe, a h…ôslka ray fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya daa gwagway a.
14.11: Yaw, fara fara kwa waawa ma pa ray aŇčga Ňčga mahura na, Gazlavay a da pa Ňčga mec…ôhe, asaya, ndaw masa ma nada ray aŇčga na, Gazlavay a da pa Ňčga mahura.¬Ľ
14.12: Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzlar a ndaw ma z…ôla Ňčga z…ômey …óaf heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa ka key gwagway na, ka da z…ôlt…ôrwa jam akah hay ba. Asaya, ka da z…ôlt…ôrwa m…ôlmakw hay ba, ka da z…ôlt…ôrwa s…ôkway akah hay ba, kwa meseembew akah hay masa-zleley hay ka da z…ôlt…ôrwa ba. Ka da z…ôlt…ôrwa ba maja ata may, a da z…ôlmaka k…ône. A da p…ôlmakawa cek masa kah ma v…ôldatara la.
14.13: Ama da ka key gwagway na, z…ôlwa masa-viya hay, nd…ôhay masa maah…ôl…ďatakaya hay, nd…ôhay jegwer hay, leŇč wulaf hay.
14.14: Da ka z…ôlwa nd…ôhay anda ke…óe hay Ňčga z…ômey …óaf na, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa la a ray akah maja nd…ôhay a na, a gwamara Ňčga v…ôhdamakawa cek aha ba. Ama Bay Gazlavay a da v…ôhdakawa ta pas masa nd…ôhay masa maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ma da sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta nd…ôhay maz…ôltakaya aa gwagway (Matiye 22.1-10)
14.15: Masa ndaw pal da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma z…ômam …óaf ta ata Yesu heyey ma c…ônda mey a la na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a Yesu: ¬ęMees…ômey daha Ňčgada ndaw ma da z…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway daa bay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó.¬Ľ
14.16: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ô…ódara ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNdaw daha a key gwagway, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlwa nd…ôhay ga.
14.17: Pas t…ô…óe Ňčga z…ômey cek na, a sl…ôrey mad…ôrlam aŇčga fa nd…ôhay a Ňčga l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúSamawa, maja cek tabiya ma…óiykaya cay!‚ÄĚ
14.18: Ama ata tabiya a kam ambahw pal pal. Ndaw Ňčgeeme a l…ôvar a mad…ôrlam a: ‚ÄúAmbahw, mb…ôkdaya maja ya ta h…ô…ókey ley la, ya daw ya da n…ôk…ôrwa.‚ÄĚ
14.19: Ndaw laŇčgar a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúAmbahw, mb…ôkdaya maja ya ta h…ô…ókawa sla hay kuraw la Ňčga key sl…ôra, ya daw la ya jadat…ôrwa!‚ÄĚ
14.20: Mekele a l…ôvar saya: ‚ÄúYa gwa ya daw ba maja ya ta kwakwa da ver.‚ÄĚ
14.21: Mad…ôrlam a, a v…ôhey a cakay bay aŇčga, a kadara mey masa nd…ôhay a ma l…ôvmar ke…óe. Bay Ňčga way a, mevel a car, a l…ôvar a mad…ôrlam aŇčga: ‚ÄúDaw fiyaw aa slam masa nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a daha ta aa walaŇč-way hay. Ňäg…ôlwa masa-viya hay, nd…ôhay masa maah…ôl…ďatakaya hay, masa wulaf hay, leŇč nd…ôhay jegwer hay.‚ÄĚ
14.22: Fa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey, mad…ôrlam a, a v…ôhwa, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw, ya ta z…ôlwa nd…ôhay la anda kah ma l…ôvey, ama slam daa way a daha c…ôŇčga.‚ÄĚ
14.23: Ta‚Äô, bay a, a l…ôvar a mad…ôrlam a: ‚ÄúDaw a mey-c…ôve…ó daa zl…ôr…óay-aŇčgwa hay, t…ôkt…ôrwa …óay a nd…ôhay Ňčga samawa amba way a…óaw a r…ôhey.
14.24: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, kwa ndaw pal dasi nd…ôhay masa yah ma z…ôlt…ôrwa Ňčgeeme heyey, fa da z…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway a…óaw ke…óe daa saba s…ôlak!‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Ňäga t…ôrey gula Ňčga Yesu na, kwara? (Matiye 10.37, 38)
14.25: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu fa diyam ta nd…ôhay ga daa c…ôve…ó. Yesu p…ôla! a mb…ô…ówa dey Ňčgada fa ata, a l…ôvtar:
14.26: ¬ęDa ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga key gula a…óaw na, si a wu…óya a f…ôna papaha ta mamaha, Ňčgwas aŇčga ta b…ôz aŇčga hay, m…ôlmaha hay ta dam-mamaha hay, kwa heter aŇčga. Da daa ba na, a gwa Ňčga key gula a…óaw ba.
14.27: Kwa waawa ma …ď…ôsa banay ma da sawa a ray a maja aŇčga ma s…ôpya daa ba na, fa da gwa Ňčga key gula a…óaw daa ba.
14.28: Da ndaw da wuzlah akwar a wu…óey a l…ômey way mahura, teese…ó na, si a wulkey la …óagay, way a, a key dala we. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a n…ôka da dala aŇčga a wusa Ňčga kara sl…ôra aŇčga ha tabiya la kwa.
14.29: Da dala a wusa ba, ama da a zlar ma pa salay a c…ôŇčga na, a gwa Ňčga nd…ôvda sl…ôra Ňčga way a daa ba. Ňägene, nd…ôhay tabiya masa ma h…ôtmar way a, a daa saŇčg…ôrfamar,
14.30: a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúNdaw ke…óe a zlar mel…ômey way, ama a gwa Ňčga nd…ôvda ba!‚ÄĚ
14.31: ¬ęYaw, da bay a wu…óey Ňčga key v…ôram ta bay mekele, si a wulkey da ray nd…ôhay aŇčga hay gabal kuraw …óagay. A wulkey da a gwa ma k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay Ňčga bay laŇčgar ma sawa ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay gabal kwakwar cew Ňčgene la kwa.
14.32: Da a wulkey fa da gwamara daa ba na, a sl…ôrey maslaŇč aŇčga hay fa bay laŇčgar heyey amba a njam ta zazay, daa masa bay a, a lawa d…ôreŇč …óagay.¬Ľ
14.33: Yesu a wuzdatara: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, da kwa waawa da wuzlah akwar ta mb…ôkd…ôrwa zleley aŇčga leŇč nd…ôhay aŇčga hay daa ba na, a gwa Ňčga key gula a…óaw ba.¬Ľ Mey da ray manda (Matiye 5.13; Mark 9.50)
14.34: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęManda na, ara cek maaya. Ama da manda ha a c…ôrey saba na, ya da kadakwa amba a c…ôrey saya na, kwara?
14.35: Manda ha aŇčga maaya saba. Kwa Ňčga kwiyey aa ley, kwa Ňčga kwiyey anda g…ôraŇč, maaya saba. A da h…ôlmara, a kwiydamara aa papalah saw. Da ndaw aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, Ňčga c…ônda mey a maaya maaya.¬Ľ

15.1: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw ta nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, a Ňčg…ôcham tabiya fa Yesu amba a j…ôkfamar sl…ômay.
15.2: *Fariza hay ta nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz aa Ňčguram mey da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe a t…ô…ďta nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, asaya, a z…ômam …óaf bama na, kwara?¬Ľ
15.3: Anda ke…óe, Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvtar:
15.4: ¬ęDa ndaw da wuzlah akwar, aŇčga ta t…ô…ďaŇč hay temere, da pal taa z…ô…óey sem na, ndaw aha, a mb…ôkdata t…ô…ďaŇč hay kwakwar zlam-letek a ray a zlam-letek da wuzlah-ley, a daw a s…ôp…ôrwa pal meez…ô…óey a, haa aŇčga ma h…ôt…ôrwa daa ba daw?
15.5: Masa aŇčga ma h…ôt…ôrwa la na, aa s…ômey ga. A c…ôp…ôrwa t…ô…ďaŇč aŇčga ha fa pepesl ,
15.6: a sawa a way. Masa aŇčga ma wuswa la na, a z…ôlt…ôrwa jam aŇčga hay ta meseembew aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúSamawa, sas…ômkwa bama maja t…ô…ďaŇč a…óaw taa z…ô…óey la, ya ta h…ôt…ôrwa cay.‚ÄĚ
15.7: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar aŇčga letek k…ône, da gazlavay da va…ó na, mees…ômey daha da ray ndaw pal ta meb…ôrey ma mb…ô…óda menjey aŇčga. Mees…ômey a, a f…ôna mees…ômey da ray nd…ôhay kwakwar zlam-letek a ray a zlam-letek masa menjey ata maaya, ma wu…óam Ňčga mb…ô…óey menjey ata ba.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta dala meez…ô…óey
15.8: Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYaw, dala Ňčga Ňčgwas daha sisey sisey kuraw, ama pal zaza…ó! aa z…ô…óey. Ta‚Äô, a g…ô…óey awaw aa pet…ôrla, a faca way, a s…ôpa ta d…ôk-vaw kasl aa ma h…ôtar dala ha.
15.9: Masa aŇčga ma h…ôtar la na, a z…ôlt…ôrwa jam aŇčga hay ta meseembew aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúSamawa, sas…ômkwa bama maja dala a…óaw taa z…ô…óey la, ya ta h…ôtar cay.‚ÄĚ
15.10: Yaw, ya fa l…ôvkwar ara letek k…ône da wuzlah maslaŇč hay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó na, mees…ômey daha maja ndaw pal ta meb…ôrey ma mb…ô…óda menjey aŇčga.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey da ray papaŇč ta b…ôza hay cew
15.11: Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw daha, b…ôz aŇčga hay cew.
15.12: Masa matab…ôwa a l…ôvar a papaha: ‚ÄúPapay, wure ke…óe, wunkandara cek akah hay masa ala ma da wamara fa d…ô…ďa akah. Yaw, masa Ňčgada yah na, v…ôldiwa.‚ÄĚ Ta‚Äô, papa ata ha a wunkatara.
15.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha …óar nek…ô…óey na, b…ôzey matab…ôwa ha, ta‚Äô, a h…ô…ókadata cek hay maala Ňčga aŇčga tabiya. A daw ta dala ha aa hwayak d…ôreŇč. Daa hwayak a Ňčgene, a zlar Ňčga key cek hay malamba, maja Ňčgene, aa kwacada dala aŇčga heyey tabiya.
15.14: Masa aŇčga ma nd…ôvda dala aŇčga sem tabiya na, may mahura a key daa hwayak a, a h…ôtey cek Ňčga z…ômey saba.
15.15: Ta‚Äô, a daw a key sl…ôra da way ndaw fete…óe daha. Ndaw aha a sl…ôrda a ley Ňčga j…ô…óey vetem hay amba a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey.
15.16: B…ôzey a, a wu…óey Ňčga z…ômey bab…ôza Ňčga wudez masa vetem hay ma z…ômamara, ama ndaw ma v…ôlar c…ôve…ó daa ba.
15.17: A zlar mewulkey da ray cek masa aa ma ka, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga papay fa z…ômam cek, fa r…ôham, fa mb…ôkdamara siya, ama yah na, may fa k…ô…óya fe…óe!
15.18: Ňägama ya mb…ôkda hwayak ke…óe, ya daw fa papay, ya l…ôvar: Papay, ya ta key meb…ôrey la fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ta fa mey akah.
15.19: Wure ke…óe, ya wusa amba ka z…ôlya b…ôzey akah saba. N…ôkya anda ndaw ma ka sl…ôra akah gway.‚ÄĚ
15.20: Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óawa, a sawa fa papaha. ¬ęAma masa a lawa d…ôreŇč ta way Ňčga papaha …óagay na, papaha a h…ôtar, a kar dey-ceceh. A hway a da cad…ôrwa ray, slaslap! a slasl…ôpa.
15.21: Ta‚Äô, b…ôz aŇčga ha a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúPapay, ya ta key meb…ôrey la fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ta fa mey akah. Wure ke…óe, ya wusa amba ka z…ôlya b…ôzey akah saba.‚ÄĚ
15.22: Ama, papaha a l…ôvtar a ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay: ‚ÄúWusmawa vaw, lamawa zana maaya, k…ôzlamara fa vaw Ňčga b…ôzey a…óaw ke…óe. Lamawa daŇčgwa Ňčga b…ôz-mey-har, pamara a har. Lamawa tarak, nd…ôkwdamara a salay.
15.23: ∆äa…óam…ôrwa b…ôz-sla maa…ď…ôlkaya masa al…ôkwa ma r…ôfkwa Ňčgene. H…ôrmara, kakwa gwagway, sas…ômkwa,
15.24: maja b…ôzey a…óaw ke…óe aŇčga anda b…ôzey mam…ôckaya, ama ta sl…ôk…óawa sem, aŇčga anda b…ôzey maaz…ô…ókaya, ama yah ta h…ôtar sem.‚ÄĚ Ta‚Äô, ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay a kamara anda bay ata ma l…ôvtar. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay a zlamar mekey gwagway ta mees…ômey.
15.25: ¬ęDaa masa ata fa kamara gwagway a na, b…ôzey mahura a lawa da ley. Masa aŇčga fa sawa da ley na, a c…ônda baazlam ta gaaŇčgaŇč Ňčga meg…ôrvey.
15.26: Ta‚Äô, a z…ôley ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga papaha pal, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúMekey da way a, me?‚ÄĚ
15.27: Ndaw ma ka sl…ôra ha, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúM…ôlmakw ta sawa cay, papakw ta h…ôra b…ôz-sla masa al…ôkwa ma r…ôfkwa heyey sem, maja m…ôlmakw a ta v…ôhwa sem, aa daha zay.‚ÄĚ
15.28: B…ôzey mahura heyey a key mevel, a g…ômey Ňčga mb…ôzey a way saba. Ama, papaha, ta‚Äô, a daw fa aŇčga, a b…ôrkwa Ňčga mb…ôzey a way.
15.29: Ama b…ôzey a, a mb…ô…ódara a papaha, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúPapay, j…ôkey sl…ômay: mevey weewe ya fa kaka sl…ôra, ya fa t…ô…ďkawa mey akah mandaw mandaw, ama ka ta v…ôlya kwa b…ôz-…óakw pal Ňčga key gwagway ta mandala a…óaw hay daa ba.
15.30: Ama b…ôzey akah ke…óe a v…ôhwa, ta nd…ôvdat…ôrwa cek akah hay sem tabiya Ňčga mes…ôpey Ňčgwas-barlaw hay, ama Ňčgada aŇčga na, ka h…ôrara b…ôz-sla masa al…ôkwa ma r…ôfkwa heyey jak!‚ÄĚ
15.31: Papaha a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúB…ôz a…óaw, kah na, mandaw mandaw al…ôkwa cew e, cek tabiya masa yah ma wa na, ara Ňčga akah.
15.32: Si ya kakwa gwagway ta mees…ômey, maja m…ôlmakw ke…óe, aŇčga na, anda b…ôzey mam…ôckaya, ama ta sl…ôk…óawa sem, aŇčga anda b…ôzey maaz…ô…ókaya, ama yah ma h…ôtar sem!‚ÄĚ¬Ľ

16.1: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, Yesu a Ňčgatar mey a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw daha aa ta zleley ga. Gula aŇčga mahura ma j…ô…óra zleley a daha. Ndaw daha a sawa, a l…ôvar a ndaw masa-zleley a: ‚ÄúGula akah faa kwacadakawa zleley akah la.‚ÄĚ
16.2: Bay Ňčga gula heyey ta‚Äô, a z…ôl…ôrwa, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúYa ta c…ôney mey maaya ba la da ray akah. Wuzdiwa sl…ôra masa kah ma ka tabiya, maja wure ke…óe ka fa da key gula a…óaw daa saba!‚ÄĚ
16.3: Gula aŇčga kaa heyey a wulkey daa ray aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa da key kwara? Bay a…óaw a da badaya daa sl…ôra aŇčga. G…ôdaŇč a…óaw Ňčga h…ôvey daa ba. Ňäga r…ôkey na, hwaray a kaya la.
16.4: Aha! Wure ke…óe ya s…ôra cek masa yah ma da ka! Ňägama ya k…ôrzey jam hay. Anda ke…óe, ta pas masa ta badaya sem daa sl…ôra aŇčga na, jam a…óaw hay a, a Ňčg…ôlmaya a way ata hay.‚ÄĚ
16.5: Masa aa ma wulkey la anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa nd…ôhay masa ma lam d…ôvaz Ňčga bay aŇčga pal pal tabiya. A l…ôvar a ndaw Ňčgeeme: ‚ÄúD…ôvaz Ňčga bay a…óaw da har kah na, we?‚ÄĚ
16.6: Ndaw aha a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúMal gwajakwa…ó temere.‚ÄĚ A l…ôvar: ‚ÄúLarawa …óerewel Ňčga d…ôvaz akah fiyaw, njey, wuzlala fa v…ô…óa kwakwar zlam.‚ÄĚ
16.7: Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa ndaw laŇčgar saya, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúD…ôvaz Ňčga bay a…óaw da har akah na, we?‚ÄĚ Ndaw aha a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúDaw sak temere.‚ÄĚ A l…ôvar a ndaw aha: ‚ÄúLarawa …óerewel Ňčga d…ôvaz akah fiyaw, wuzlala fa v…ô…óa kwakwar daaŇčgafa…ó.‚ÄĚ
16.8: Kwa gula ha a key cek ta c…ôve…ó e ba na, ndaw masa-zleley a, aa h…ômda maja a ka sl…ôra aha ta dabaray. Fara fara, nd…ôhay da b…ôla ke…óe a kam cek ta dabaray da wuzlah ata ma f…ôna nd…ôhay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay.¬Ľ
16.9: Yesu a l…ôvey saya: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar, zleley da b…ôla ke…óe na, k…ôrzadamara jam. Anda ke…óe, da zleley a ta nd…ôvey sem na, ka da h…ôtam slam menjey maaya ma nd…ôvey ba da va…ó.
16.10: Ndaw masa ma key sl…ôra maaya ta cek mec…ôhe na, a key sl…ôra maaya ta cek mahura la may. Ndaw ma key sl…ôra ta c…ôve…ó e ba ta cek mec…ôhe na, a key sl…ôra ta c…ôve…ó e ba ta cek mahura la may.
16.11: Da ray Ňčgene, da ka kam sl…ôra maaya ba ta zleley masa ma v…ôldamakwara a har akwar da b…ôla ke…óe na, kaa wara zleley masa fara fara na, ma da v…ôldakwara na, wa?
16.12: Ama da wure ke…óe ka kam cek hay maaya ba ta zleley masa ndaw ma v…ôldakwara da b…ôla ke…óe na, fa d…ô…ďa ha, Gazlavay a v…ôlkwar zleley la amba ka wamara daw? (Matiye 6.24)
16.13: ¬ęNdaw ma gwa Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčgada bay hay cew daa ba, maja a da wu…óa bay laŇčgar a f…ôna bay laŇčgar, da daa ba, a da nar ray a bay laŇčgar, a r…ôsa bay laŇčgar. Ka gwamara Ňčga s…ôpmara Gazlavay leŇč zleley cewete daa slam a ba.¬Ľ
16.14: Masa *Fariza hay ma c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe na, aa saŇčg…ôram a ray Yesu maja a wu…óam dala kalah.
16.15: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar fa kam cek maaya fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay, amba a l…ôvam akwar nd…ôhay maaya hay. Ama Gazlavay na, a s…ôra mevel akwar. Cek masa nd…ôhay a n…ôkmara mahura fa mey ata na, ara cek Ňčga tede fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ Mey hay mekele mekele Ňčga Yesu (Matiye 11.13, 12; 5.18; 5.32; 19.9; Mark 10.11-12)
16.16: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwakwas Ňčga *Mawiz ta nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay fa wuzdamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay haa kasl *JaŇč-Baptis. D…ôga daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay fa c…ôndamara *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray *mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay. Kwa waawa fa key g…ôdaŇč amba a mb…ôzey a wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma da wey da ray ata fara fara.
16.17: ¬ęSlam da va…ó ta slam da hwayak, aŇčga ta g…ôra amba a nd…ôvey, ama cek mec…ôhe mawuzlalakaya daa mey Ňčga kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ke…óe Ňčgaa v…ôsey na, aŇčga ta g…ôra ma f…ôna saya.
16.18: ¬ęYaw, kwa waawa ma …ď…ôla Ňčgwas aŇčga, a lawa mekele na, a key Ňčgene, a ley vaw saw da palah. Asaya, kwa waawa ma la Ňčgwas masa zel e ma …ď…ôla sem na, a key Ňčgene, a ley vaw saw da palah may.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey da ray ndaw masa-zleley ta ndaw masa-viya
16.19: Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw daha, aŇčga ta zleley ga, a pey zana fa vaw na, maaya masa ndaw ma gwa Ňčga h…ô…óka ba. Aa daa wiya mandaw mandaw, fa z…ômey cek maaya.
16.20: Ndaw mekele daha, aŇčga masa-viya, mez…ôley aŇčga Lazar, mb…ôlek fa vaw nja…ďa-nja…ďa. Manakaya fa mey-mbew Ňčga ndaw masa-zleley kaa heyey.
16.21: Aa fa wu…óey Ňčga g…ô…ómey meep…ôsey Ňčga …óaf da hwayak daa slam mez…ômey …óaf Ňčga ndaw masa-zleley heyey, ama ndaw ma v…ôlar daa ba. Asaya, g…ôdey hay fa samawa, fa nd…ôf…óamara mb…ôlek fa vaw aŇčga.
16.22: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey, ndaw masa-viya heyey, pam! a m…ôcey. MaslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó ta‚Äô, a samawa, leŇč! a lamara a va…ó a cakay *Ab…ôraham. Ndaw masa-zleley heyey, pam! a m…ôcey may. Nd…ôhay ta‚Äô, a j…ôhmara.
16.23: Ndaw masa-zleley kaa fa s…ôrey banay ga da wuzlah nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya. A da baŇčga…óa dey a va…ó na, a h…ôtar Ab…ôraham manjakaya d…ôreŇč, Lazar manjakaya da cakay a.
16.24: Da ray Ňčgene, a wudey, a t…ôlar mey, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúPapay Ab…ôraham, s…ôrfaya dey-ceceh, sl…ôrd…ôrwa Lazar amba a j…ôhw…ďa b…ôz-mey-har aŇčga aa yam na, a g…ôciwa fa neneh a…óaw, maja ya fa s…ôrey banay kalah daa awaw ke…óe.‚ÄĚ
16.25: ¬ęAma Ab…ôraham a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúB…ôz a…óaw, wulkada, daa masa kah da b…ôla, ka ta h…ôtey zleley la ga, daa Ňčgene, Lazar fa s…ôrey banay. Wure ke…óe, fe…óe, ala fa d…ôkmar mevel, ama kah, ka fa s…ôrey banay may.
16.26: Asaya, daa walaŇč ala ta akwar na, v…ôge…ó seleleŇč daha, c…ôve…ó Ňčga daw daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, da nd…ôhay fe…óe a wu…óam Ňčga diyam fete…óe na, a gwamara Ňčga diyam ba. Asaya, da nd…ôhay fete…óe a wu…óam Ňčga samawa fe…óe na, a gwamara ba may.‚ÄĚ
16.27: ¬ęNdaw masa-zleley kaa heyey a l…ôvar a Ab…ôraham: ‚ÄúNa, ya kaka ambahw papay Ab…ôraham, sl…ôrda Lazar a way papay.
16.28: M…ôlma a…óaw hay zlam daha, Ňčga daw Ňčga wuztar, amba a samawa aa slam Ňčga banay ke…óe saba.‚ÄĚ
16.29: Ab…ôraham a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúM…ôlmakw hay na, si a j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey Ňčga *Mawiz leŇč fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay.‚ÄĚ
16.30: ¬ęNdaw aha a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúK…ône ba, papay Ab…ôraham. Maaya na, si ndaw ma sl…ôk…óey daa mem…ôcey, a daw fa ata, Ňčgene, a mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata la.‚ÄĚ
16.31: ¬ęAma Ab…ôraham a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúDa a j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey Ňčga Mawiz ba, asaya, da a c…ôndamara mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle ba na, Ňčgene kwa mey Ňčga ndaw ma sl…ôk…óey daa mem…ôcey na, fa da t…ô…ďmara daa ba may.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ

17.1: Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęFara fara nd…ôhay ma h…ôldamata nd…ôhay mandaw mandaw Ňčga key meb…ôrey na, daha. Ama banay a sawa la a ray ndaw masa ma h…ôldata nd…ôhay Ňčga key meb…ôrey.
17.2: Ňägada aŇčga na, Ňčgama ata ma j…ôwmar aŇčgwa mahura a …óay, a k…ôzlamara aa b…ôlay, da ray masa aŇčga ma da h…ôlda ndaw pal da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey a…óaw hay ke…óe Ňčga key meb…ôrey.
17.3: Wam vaw maaya maaya fa ray akwar! ¬ęDa m…ôlmakw ta key meb…ôrey la na, k…ôta. Da ta mb…ô…óda leŇčgesl aŇčga ha la na, mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga ha.
17.4: Kwa da a kaka meb…ôrey dey maasala fa pas pal na, ama da fa v…ôhwa fa kah dey maasala ha, a l…ôvka: ‚ÄúAmbahw, ara meb…ôrey a…óaw, ambahw, ara meb…ôrey a…óaw,‚ÄĚ na, mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga ha.¬Ľ Mey da ray met…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Gazlavay
17.5: Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu a l…ôvmar a Bay Mahura: ¬ęV…ôlndar g…ôdaŇč saya amba ya t…ô…ďmara mey akah ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.¬Ľ
17.6: Bay Mahura a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay kwa kuset k…ô…óey h…ôma bab…ôza Ňčga bazlawar na, Ňčgene ka gwamara Ňčga l…ôvmar a wudez mahura ke…óe, ‚ÄúM…ô…óey la fe…óe, daw ta k…ôzley aa b…ôlay‚ÄĚ na, a c…ônkwar mey la.¬Ľ Mey da ray ndaw ma ka sl…ôra
17.7: Yesu a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ndaw da wuzlah akwar gula aŇčga fa h…ôvar da ley, da daa ba, fa s…ôk…ôrar …óahway, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a sawa da ley na, bay aŇčga a l…ôvar la Ňčga sawa fiyaw fiyaw, amba a z…ômey cek daw? Fa da l…ôvar k…ône daa ba!
17.8: Sas…ôkar jak, a da l…ôvar: ‚ÄúMb…ô…ódata zana akah hay amba ka …óiyawa cek a…óaw mez…ômey, h…ôlyawa cek mez…ômey ta cek mesey. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ka z…ôma Ňčga kah may, ka sa Ňčga kah may.‚ÄĚ
17.9: Da gula ha a kara cek anda bay aŇčga ha ma l…ôvar na, a kar suse la daw?
17.10: Akwar kwa k…ône, da ka kamara sl…ôra tabiya masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvkwar na, si ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAla na, gula hay Ňčga tede gway, ya kam sl…ôra masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvndar Ňčga key gway.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ôley nd…ôhay kuraw daa maas…ôkula
17.11: Yesu fa daw a *Jeruzelem, a daw taa kwakway Ňčga hwayak Ňčga *Samari ta hwayak Ňčga *Galile.
17.12: A wusey gweegwe ta slala daha na, maas…ôkula hay kuraw a samawa Ňčgada fa v…ô…óa. A lacam d…ôreŇč ta aŇčga.
17.13: A wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęYesu, Bay Mahura, s…ôrfandar dey-ceceh!¬Ľ
17.14: Masa Yesu ma h…ôtatar na, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam, wuzdamatara vaw akwar a nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ Masa ata fa diyam, a n…ôkmara na, vaw ata ta s…ô…óey sem.
17.15: Ndaw pal da wuzlah ata daha aŇčga ma h…ôtar vaw aŇčga ta s…ô…óey sem na, a mb…ô…ówa dey, a v…ôhwa fa Yesu, a h…ôlma Gazlavay ta g…ôdaŇč.
17.16: A wuswa, a regedey fa mey Ňčga Yesu, a kar suse. Ndaw aha Ňčgene ara ndaw Samari.
17.17: Yesu ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay da cakay aŇčga, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMaas…ôkula hay ma s…ô…óam na, kuraw ba diya? Kaa si ndaw pal ma v…ôhwa fe…óe, siya hay na, ata dama?
17.18: Ndaw ma wulkawa Ňčga v…ôhwa amba a h…ôlma Gazlavay daa ba, si ndaw-m…ôlak ke…óe gway daw?¬Ľ
17.19: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a l…ôvar a ndaw aha: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, daw, ka ta l…ôhey cay maja kah ma paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara.¬Ľ Mey da ray pas masa B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw ma da v…ôhwa (Matiye 24.23-28, 37-41)
17.20: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *Fariza hay aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęGazlavay a da wuzd…ôrwa aŇčga bay na, ta vara?¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęGazlavay ma da wuzd…ôrwa aŇčga bay na, ara cek masa ndaw ma gwa Ňčga h…ôtar ta dey ba.
17.21: Ndaw a gwa a l…ôvey ‚ÄúEhe, a ke…óe,‚ÄĚ da daa ba ‚ÄúA katay,‚ÄĚ na, a gwa a l…ôvey k…ône ba. S…ôrmara, mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay aa da wuzlah akwar wure ke…óe.
17.22: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęPas a, a sawa la masa akwar ma da wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtmaya yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, fa dey kwa …óar pal, ama ka h…ôtmaya daa ba.
17.23: A da l…ôvmakwar: ‚ÄúAŇčga fe…óe,‚ÄĚ da daa ba ‚ÄúAŇčga fata…óay,‚ÄĚ ama ka da diyam ba. Ka da hwam aa slam aha ba.
17.24: Anda nd…ôhay ma h…ôtmar var ma z…ômey ma wa…óa slam da va…ó ta slam da hwayak tabiya na, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw ya da v…ôhwa na, k…ône.
17.25: Ama teese…ó na, si ya s…ôrey banay la ga …óagay. Asaya, nd…ôhay da b…ôla wure ke…óe a r…ôsmaya la.
17.26: Ta pas masa yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw ma da v…ôhwa na, a da key anda cek ma key daa masa N…ôwe aŇčga da b…ôla.
17.27: Daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay fa z…ômam cek, fa sam cek, fa lam Ňčgusay, fa v…ôldamata dam ata hay a way zel, haa kasl pas masa N…ôwe ma mb…ôzey la aa kwambiwal mahura. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, var a pawa ga, a r…ôhda slam da b…ôla, aa z…ô…ódata nd…ôhay c…ôpa.
17.28: Asaya, pas a, a da key anda cek ma key daa masa *Lut aŇčga da b…ôla. Daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay fa z…ômam cek, fa sam cek, fa h…ô…ókam cek, fa h…ô…ókadamara cek ata hay, fa sl…ôkam, fa l…ômam way.
17.29: Ama daa masa Lut ma bawa daa berney Ňčga *Sadawm la na, awaw t…ôs! t…ôs! a k…ôzlwa da gazlavay da va…ó ta cek ma t…ô…ďey awaw, a paslata tabiya.
17.30: A da key k…ône ta pas masa yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ma da wuzwa vaw.
17.31: ¬ęTa pas a Ňčgene, ndaw masa manjakaya daa ambaw, masa cek aŇčga hay a lamawa ta da way na, a da mb…ôzey Ňčga lat…ôrwa ba. Da ndaw aŇčga da ley na, a da v…ôhwa a way ba.
17.32: S…ôrfadamara cek ma key ta Ňčgwas Ňčga Lut!
17.33: Kwa waawa ma wu…óey Ňčga l…ôhda heter aŇčga na, a key Ňčgene, aa z…ô…óda. Kwa waawa maa z…ô…óda heter aŇčga na, a key Ňčgene, a …ďada.
17.34: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, dasi tava…ó Ňčgene, da nd…ôhay cew manatakaya daa slam a na, a da Ňčg…ôlam pal, a da mb…ôkdamara laŇčgar.
17.35: Da Ňčgusay cew fa k…ôram fa lavar pal na, a da Ňčg…ôlam pal, a da mb…ôkdamara laŇčgar. [
17.36: Da nd…ôhay cew fa h…ôvam da ley na, a da Ňčg…ôlam pal, a da mb…ôkdamara laŇčgar.]¬Ľ
17.37: Gula aŇčga hay aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęA da key dama, Bay Mahura?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDaa slam masa cek mam…ôckaya daha na, kwakucah hay makustakaya fete…óe.¬Ľ

18.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a Ňčgatar mey a gula aŇčga hay amba a wuzdatara si a d…ôram daŇčgay mandaw mandaw, a da g…ôram ba s…ôlak.
18.2: A l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw ma ka sariya daa berney daha, a zlurey ta Gazlavay ba, a c…ôney mey Ňčga ndaw ba.
18.3: Ňägwas-vagay daa berney a daha, fa daw fa v…ô…óa mandaw mandaw, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúWunkandar ta masa-g…ôra a…óaw.‚ÄĚ
18.4: Ňägwas a fa daw mandaw mandaw, ama ndaw aha a g…ômey Ňčga wunkata ba menjey ga. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw aha, a wulkey daa mevel aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKwa ya fa zlurey ta Gazlavay daa ba, asaya, kwa ya c…ôney mey Ňčga ndaw ba na,
18.5: ama maja Ňčgwas-vagay ke…óe, fa g…ôrdaya, Ňčgama ya kara sariya aŇčga, ba na, a da h…ô…ďya ray mandaw mandaw.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
18.6: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Bay Mahura aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWulkam da ray mey Ňčga ndaw ma ka sariya maaya ba maa guzley ke…óe.
18.7: Da ndaw maaya ba ke…óe ta j…ôna Ňčgwas ke…óe la na, kaa wara Gazlavay na, a j…ônta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mawalatakaya masa fa d…ôrmar daŇčgay taa va…ó, taa pas daa ba daw? A z…ôney vaw Ňčga j…ônta la daw?
18.8: Yaw, ya fa l…ôvkwar, a j…ônta la fiyaw fiyaw. Ama daa masa yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, fa v…ôhwa a b…ôla na, ya h…ôtfey nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw da b…ôla la daw?¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta ndaw Fariza leŇč ta ndaw ma cakala budaw
18.9: Nd…ôhay siya fa wulkam, ata na, maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. A n…ôkmata nd…ôhay mekele anda nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey. Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzley mey-meŇčgey da ray ata,
18.10: a l…ôvey: ¬ęNd…ôhay cew daha, a diyam Ňčga d…ôrmawa daŇčgay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Ndaw pal, ara ndaw Fariza, ndaw laŇčgar, ara *ndaw ma cakala budaw.
18.11: Masa ata daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a na, ndaw Fariza kaa heyey deŇč! a lecey, a d…ôrey daŇčgay da hwa…ó da hwa…ó, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúWaa Bay Gazlavay, ya fa kaka suse, maja yah anda nd…ôhay mekele ba. Ata na, mayal hay, ata nd…ôhay ma kam cek maaya ba hay mekele mekele, ata nd…ôhay ma lam vaw saw da palah. Asaya, ya fa kaka suse, maja yah anda ndaw ma cakala budaw ke…óe ba.
18.12: Fa luma pal na, ya fa key *daliyam dey cew. Daa cek tabiya masa yah ma h…ôtey na, ya fa wunka slam kuraw, ya fa la slam pal, ya fa v…ôldakawa.‚ÄĚ
18.13: Ama ndaw ma cakala budaw ke…óe a lecey d…ôreŇč, a wu…óey Ňčga baŇčga…óa dey a va…ó ba, ta‚Äô, a k…ô…óa rav maja meb…ôrey aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay, s…ôrfaya dey-ceceh. Yah ndaw ta meb…ôrey!‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
18.14: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar, ndaw ma cakala budaw a, a daw a way na, Gazlavay ta pa sem Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga. Ama ndaw Fariza heyey na, Gazlavay ta pa Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga daa ba. S…ôrmara, kwa waawa ma g…ôlda ray aŇčga na, Gazlavay a da pa Ňčga mec…ôhe, ama ndaw masa ma nada ray aŇčga na, Gazlavay a da pa Ňčga mahura.¬Ľ Yesu a p…ôstar mey a b…ôza hay (Matiye 19.13-15; Mark 10.13-16)
18.15: Nd…ôhay a handamata b…ôzey ata hay fa Yesu, kwa masa da d…ô…ďa hay amba a patar har a ray, a p…ôstar mey. Masa gula aŇčga hay ma h…ôtmatar na, a kamatar mey a nd…ôhay a.
18.16: Ama Yesu a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay masa ta b…ôza hay a, Ňčga Ňčg…ôchadamat…ôrwa. Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęMb…ôkdamat…ôrwa b…ôza hay Ňčga samawa fa yah! Ka da t…ôkmata ba, maja Gazlavay fa wey da ray nd…ôhay masa anda b…ôza hay.
18.17: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, si ka t…ô…ďa Bay Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray akah anda b…ôzey mec…ôhe ma t…ô…ďa, da daa ba na, ka fa da mb…ôzey a wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wey da ray ata na, daa ba.¬Ľ Ndaw masa-zleley aa c…ôf…óa Yesu da ray meh…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba (Matiye 19.16-30; Mark 10.17-31)
18.18: Ndaw mahura Ňčga *J…ôwif hay daha, aa c…ôf…óa Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ndaw masa maaya, ya da key amba ya h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba na, me?¬Ľ
18.19: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa z…ôlya ndaw maaya na, maja me? Ndaw maaya na, Gazlavay pal taava aŇčga.
18.20: Yaw, ka s…ôrta mewey hay Ňčga Gazlavay, ba diya? Ara mey hay masa ma l…ôvam: ‚ÄúKa da ley vaw saw da palah ba, ka da k…ô…óey ndaw vagay ba, ka da leley ba, ka mb…ôrzley a ray ndaw ba, natar ray Ňčgada ata papakw ta mamakw.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
18.21: Ndaw aha, a mb…ô…ódara a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęD…ôga yah daa zariya a…óaw na, ya ta zl…ô…ďta mewey hay a Ňčgene daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
18.22: Masa Yesu ma c…ônda mey aŇčga la na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęCek pal ma mb…ôkaka daha Ňčga key saya. H…ô…ókadata cek akah hay tabiya, wunkatara dala ha a masa-viya hay. Da ka ta ka la anda ke…óe na, ka da h…ôtey zleley fa Gazlavay da va…ó. Masa kah ma v…ôldatara dala ha cay a masa-viya hay na, sawa, s…ôpya.¬Ľ
18.23: Masa ndaw aha ma c…ônda mey Ňčga Yesu a la na, aŇčga ta mees…ômey daa ba, maja zleley aŇčga ga kalah.
18.24: Masa Yesu ma h…ôtar ndaw aha aŇčga ta mees…ômey daa ba na, ta‚Äô, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAŇčga ta banay ga Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa-zleley amba a t…ô…ďmara Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray ata.
18.25: Ahaw, aŇčga ta banay Ňčgada slagwama Ňčga mb…ôzey taa v…ôge…ó Ňčga baatal. Ama aŇčga ta banay ga ma f…ôna saya Ňčgada ndaw masa-zleley Ňčga t…ô…ďa Bay Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray a.¬Ľ
18.26: Nd…ôhay ma c…ôndamara mey a na, a l…ôvam: ¬ęDa anda ke…óe na, ma da l…ôhey daa meb…ôrey na, wa?¬Ľ
18.27: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek masa ta banay fa nd…ôhay na, aŇčga ta banay fa Gazlavay ba.¬Ľ
18.28: *Piyer a l…ôvar: ¬ęEhe wure ke…óe, ala ta mb…ôkdamat…ôrwa cek ala hay sem, amba ya s…ôpmaka.¬Ľ
18.29: Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da ndaw a mb…ôkd…ôrwa way aŇčga ta nd…ôhay da way aŇčga c…ôpa, anda mel…ôvey Ňčgwas aŇčga, m…ôlmaha hay, papaha ta mamaha, leŇč b…ôz aŇčga hay, amba Bay Gazlavay a wey da ray a na,
18.30: daa masa aŇčga da b…ôla ke…óe, a h…ôtey cek hay la ga ma f…ôna. Asaya, fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla na, a h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba la.¬Ľ Yesu aa guzley Ňčga dey maakar da ray mem…ôcey aŇčga ta masl…ôk…óawa aŇčga (Matiye 20.17-19; Mark 10.32-34)
18.31: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a Ňčg…ôlta gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęJ…ôkam sl…ômay, ehe, wure ke…óe al…ôkwa fa nakwa a *Jeruzelem. Cek hay tabiya masa nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle ma wuzlalamara da ray a…óaw, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw na, a da key.
18.32: Anda mel…ôvey, a da v…ôldamaya a har nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba, a daa saŇčg…ôram a ray a…óaw, a da c…ô…ómaya, a da t…ôfmaya meesle…ď aa dey,
18.33: a da sl…ô…ómaya ta laway. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a da k…ô…ómaya vagay. Ňäga …óar maakar a, ya sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
18.34: Ama gula aŇčga hay, kwa ta c…ôndamara mey a daa ba, maja mey a ma…ďadakaya fa ata. Anda ke…óe, a s…ôrmara cek masa Yesu ma wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ba. Yesu a wurey dey Ňčga ndaw-wulaf (Matiye 20.29-34; Mark 10.46-52)
18.35: Yesu a wusey gweegwe ta Jerikwaw. Fete…óe, ndaw-wulaf daha manjakaya da mey-c…ôve…ó fa r…ôkey.
18.36: Masa aa ma c…ônda nd…ôhay ga fa yam mey, fa diyam taa c…ôve…ó e na, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMekey me?¬Ľ
18.37: A l…ôvmar: ¬ęYesu ndaw *Nezeret, fa sawa ta ke…óe.¬Ľ
18.38: Aa ma c…ônda la anda ke…óe na, a zlar mewudey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYesu, B…ôzey Ňčga *Davit, ambahw s…ôrfaya dey-ceceh!¬Ľ
18.39: Nd…ôhay ma diyam fa mey, a kamar mey, a l…ôvmar Ňčga njey teete. Ama ndaw-wulaf a, a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč c…ôŇčga, a l…ôvey: ¬ęB…ôzey Ňčga Davit, ambahw s…ôrfaya dey-ceceh!¬Ľ
18.40: Yesu ta‚Äô, a lecey, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay da cakay aŇčga Ňčga Ňčg…ôlm…ôrwa ndaw-wulaf a. Masa wulaf a, ma wusey a cakay a na, Yesu, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar:
18.41: ¬ęKa wu…óey ya kaka na, me?¬Ľ Wulaf a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay mahura, ya wu…óey ka wuryawa dey a…óaw amba ya h…ôtar dey c…ôŇčga.¬Ľ
18.42: Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęDey akah Ňčga wurey. Ka ta mb…ôley cay maja kah ma paya Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara.¬Ľ
18.43: Wure wure Ňčgene, dey aŇčga ta‚Äô, a wurey, a h…ôtar dey d…ô…ďa. Ta‚Äô, a daw asi Yesu, a h…ôlma Gazlavay. Masa nd…ôhay tabiya ma h…ôtmar cek a na, a h…ôlmamara Gazlavay may.

19.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a wusey a slala Jerikwaw. A daw ta da slala ha.
19.2: Fete…óe ndaw daha mez…ôley Zase. AŇčga bay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma cakala budaw, aŇčga ndaw ta zleley ga.
19.3: Fa s…ôpey c…ôve…ó amba a h…ôtar Yesu, ama a gwa Ňčga h…ôtar ba, maja aŇčga medekwele, nd…ôhay ga fa t…ôhmar dey.
19.4: Ta‚Äô, a hway fa mey, a daw a t…ôpey a ray bazlawar da mey-c…ôve…ó masa Yesu ma da daw ta hwa…ó a amba a h…ôtar Yesu a.
19.5: Masa Yesu ma wusey la aa slam aha na, a baŇčga…óa dey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęZase, wuswa vaw, pawa salay, tasana ya da ney da way akah.¬Ľ
19.6: Maja Ňčgene, Zase a wuswa vaw, a pawa salay, a t…ô…ďa Yesu ta mees…ômey.
19.7: Ama nd…ôhay ma h…ôtmar na, aa Ňčguram mey, a l…ôvam: ¬ęHaya! Ndaw aha ke…óe a da daw Ňčga ney a way ndaw ta meb…ôrey na, kwara!¬Ľ
19.8: Zase ta‚Äô, a lecey fa mey Ňčga Bay Mahura, a l…ôvar: ¬ęN…ôka, Bay Mahura, wure ke…óe ya da wunka cek a…óaw hay slam cew, ya da v…ôlda slam pal a masa-viya hay. Ňägada nd…ôhay masa yah ma t…ôktar …óay Ňčga p…ôley dala Ňčga budaw ma f…ôna na, ya da v…ôhdatara dala ha h…ôma h…ôma Ňčgene dey m…ôfa…ó.¬Ľ
19.9: Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęTasana Gazlavay ta l…ôhdata nd…ôhay da way ke…óe cay daa meb…ôrey, maja kah Zase, kah ndaw ma pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara anda papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa *Ab…ôraham zleezle may.
19.10: Fara fara yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya sawa na, Ňčga s…ôpey nd…ôhay maaz…ô…ótakaya ta Ňčga l…ôhdata.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta dala (Matiye 25.14-30)
19.11: Nd…ôhay ga fa j…ôkfamar sl…ômay fa Yesu, a wulkam Gazlavay a da wuzd…ôrwa aŇčga bay wure wure Ňčgene, maja aŇčga gweegwe ta *Jeruzelem. Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzltar ta mey-meŇčgey saya,
19.12: a l…ôvey: ¬ęNdaw daha, ata Ňčga way ata ta bay. Aa fa da daw aa hwayak d…ôreŇč, amba a pam…ôrwa aa bay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a v…ôhwa aa hwayak aŇčga.
19.13: Masa aa fa da daw na, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa mad…ôrlam aŇčga hay kuraw, a v…ôltar dala gabal temere temere. Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúMb…ô…óam har ta dala ke…óe, kasl pas masa yah ma da v…ôhwa.‚ÄĚ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a daw.
19.14: ¬ęAma nd…ôhay daa hwayak aŇčga, a wu…ómara ba. Da ray Ňčgene, a sl…ôram nd…ôhay fa d…ô…ďa aŇčga, a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúYa wu…óam ndaw ke…óe Ňčga key bay ala ba.‚ÄĚ
19.15: ¬ęTa Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ta pam…ôrwa sem aa bay c…ôŇčga. Ndaw a, ta‚Äô a v…ôhwa aa hwayak aŇčga. Masa aŇčga ma v…ôhwa cay na, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa mad…ôrlam aŇčga hay masa aa ma v…ôltar dala heyey amba a s…ôra dala masa ata ma h…ôtam a ray a.
19.16: ¬ęMad…ôrlam Ňčgeeme, a sawa fa mey aŇčga, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw, ya ta h…ôtwa gabal temere temere kuraw la ta dala masa kah ma v…ôldiwa heyey.‚ÄĚ
19.17: ¬ęBay a, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúMaaya, ara mey ba. Kah, mad…ôrlam maaya. Maja ka ta key sl…ôra ta c…ôve…ó e la ta cek mec…ôhe. Anda ke…óe, ya paka Ňčga wey da ray berney hay kuraw.‚ÄĚ
19.18: ¬ęMad…ôrlam Ňčga dey cew e, ta‚Äô, a sawa, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw, ya ta h…ôtwa gabal temere temere zlam la ta dala masa kah ma v…ôldiwa heyey.‚ÄĚ
19.19: ¬ęBay a, a l…ôvar a ndaw aha: ‚ÄúKah na, ya paka Ňčga wey da ray berney hay zlam.‚ÄĚ
19.20: ¬ęTa‚Äô, mad…ôrlam mekele a sawa fa aŇčga saya, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay a…óaw, t…ô…ďa dala akah. Ya ta …ďada la mah…ôrzlakakaya daa b…ôrtete,
19.21: maja ya fa zlurey ta akah. Kah na, ndaw ma s…ôrey dey-ceceh fa ndaw ba, ka ley cek daa slam masa kah ma pa ba. Ka Ňčg…ômey daw daa slam masa kah ma sl…ôka ba.‚ÄĚ
19.22: ¬ęBay a, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúKah, mad…ôrlam maaya ba. Mey akah masa kah maa guzlda ke…óe na, ya da kaka sariya maja. Da ka s…ôrya, yah, ya s…ôrey dey-ceceh fa ndaw ba, ya ley cek daa slam masa yah ma pa ba, ya Ňčg…ômey daw daa slam masa yah ma sl…ôka ba na,
19.23: anja ka v…ôlda dala ha a har ndaw amba daa mav…ôhwa a…óaw ke…óe, ya t…ô…ď…ôrwa dala ha ta yam a ba daw?‚ÄĚ
19.24: ¬ęTa‚Äô, bay a, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay da cakay aŇčga: ‚ÄúT…ô…ďmara dala da har aŇčga, v…ôldamara a ndaw masa ma h…ôtey gabal temere temere kuraw heyey.‚ÄĚ
19.25: Nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvmar: ‚ÄúBay ala, Ňčga aŇčga gabal temere temere kuraw daha cay, ba diya?‚ÄĚ
19.26: Bay a, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúYa fa l…ôvkwar, ndaw masa cek aŇčga daha, a da v…ôlmar a dey a. Ama ndaw masa cek aŇčga kuset k…ô…óey na, a da t…ô…ďmara cek aha kuset k…ô…óey a Ňčgene.
19.27: Yaw, masa-g…ôra a…óaw hay masa ma wu…óam ya key bay ata ba heyey na, k…ôrzamat…ôrwa, handamat…ôrwa, k…ô…ómata vagay fa mey a…óaw fe…óe.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Yesu a daw a Jeruzelem anda bay (Matiye 21.1-11; Mark 11.1-11; JaŇč 12.12-19)
19.28: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu maa guzley la na, ta‚Äô, a daw Ňčgadaa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem, nd…ôhay ga fa s…ôpmar wurzay.
19.29: A wusey a AŇčgwa Ňčga *Awliviye, gweegwe ta slala Betfaje leŇč ta slala Betani. Masa aŇčga ma wusey la fete…óe na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey gula aŇčga hay cew teese…ó Ňčgada slala ha, a l…ôvtar:
19.30: ¬ęDiyam a slala fa mey al…ôkwa katay. Da akwar ta wusam a slala ha la na, ka h…ôtfam b…ôz-z…ôŇčgwaw maj…ôwkaya la fete…óe, masa kwa ndaw ta t…ôpey a ray a daa ba araŇč. P…ôskam…ôrwa, handam…ôrwa fe…óe.
19.31: Da ndaw aa c…ôf…óakwar, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKa p…ôskamara ka me?‚ÄĚ na, ka mb…ô…ódamara, ka l…ôvmar: ‚ÄúBay Mahura a wu…óey.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
19.32: Gula hay cew heyey, ta‚Äô, a diyam, a h…ôtfamar cek aha anda Yesu ma l…ôvtar.
19.33: Masa ata fa p…ôskamara b…ôz-z…ôŇčgwaw a na, nd…ôhay Ňčga z…ôŇčgwaw a, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęKa p…ôskamara b…ôz-z…ôŇčgwaw a, keme?¬Ľ
19.34: A mb…ô…ódamatara, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęBay Mahura a wu…óey.¬Ľ
19.35: Ta‚Äô, a handam…ôrwa fa Yesu, a ciyam zana ata hay a ray a. A t…ôpdamara Yesu a ray b…ôz-z…ôŇčgwaw a.
19.36: Masa aŇčga fa daw na, nd…ôhay a h…ôslmar ray, a ciyam zana ata hay aa c…ôve…ó amba a daw ta ray a.
19.37: Daa Ňčgene, Yesu aŇčga gweegwe ta berney Ňčga Jeruzelem. Masa aŇčga fa daw taa c…ôve…ó ma b…ôrŇčgawa daa AŇčgwa Ňčga Awliviye na, nd…ôhay aŇčga hay tabiya fete…óe faa s…ômam, a zlamar Ňčga h…ôlmamara Gazlavay ta g…ôdaŇč maja maazla hay tabiya masa ata ma h…ôtmar.
19.38: A l…ôvam: ¬ęAnja Bay Gazlavay Ňčga p…ôsar mey a Bay masa aa ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa ta mez…ôley aŇčga. Anja Bay Gazlavay a, Ňčga hand…ôrwa zazay aŇčga a wuzlah nd…ôhay. Anja nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôlmamara Gazlavay da va…ó!¬Ľ
19.39: *Fariza hay da wuzlah nd…ôhay a daha, a l…ôvmar a Yesu: ¬ęBay, l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay akah hay Ňčga njam teete.¬Ľ
19.40: Yesu, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar, da ta njam teete la na, kwa aŇčgwa hay a wudam la.¬Ľ Yesu a t…ôway maja nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Jeruzelem
19.41: Masa Yesu ma wusey la gweegwe ta berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem na, a n…ôka berney a, ta‚Äô, a t…ôway maja cek ma da h…ôtfatar nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a.
19.42: A l…ôvey: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem, ya wu…óey anja tasana ke…óe na, ka s…ôrmara cek ma da njadakwar daa zazay ta Gazlavay. Ama wure ke…óe, cek aha ta …ďey sem fa dey akwar, ka gwamara Ňčga h…ôtmar saba.
19.43: Pas a, a sawa la, masa masa-g…ôra akwar hay ma da zl…ôrmakwar ray ta cek hay Ňčga v…ôram. A g…ôrcamakwar la aa berney a, kwa akwar fa da gwamara Ňčga bawa daa saba.
19.44: A da b…ôzlmara berney akwar c…ôpa. Kwa fa da mb…ôkam aŇčgwa pal da ray c…ôla daa ba. Akwar ta b…ôz akwar hay na, a da k…ô…ómakwar c…ôpa vagay, maja akwar ta pam leŇčgesl fa pas masa Gazlavay ma sawa Ňčga l…ôhdakwar na, daa ba!¬Ľ Yesu a …ď…ôlt…ôrwa nd…ôhay daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay (Matiye 21.12-17; Mark 11.15-19; JaŇč 2.13-22)
19.45: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a mb…ôzey aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Fete…óe na, nd…ôhay daha fa kam luma. A …ď…ôlta nd…ôhay ma h…ô…ókadam cek hay a,
19.46: a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúWay a…óaw na, ara way amba nd…ôhay a d…ôrmaya daŇčgay da hwa…ó a.‚ÄĚ Ama akwar na, ka t…ôrdamara way a ke…óe Ňčga slam Ňčga mayal hay!¬Ľ
19.47: Mandaw mandaw Yesu faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, leŇč mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, fa s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga k…ô…ómara vagay.
19.48: Ama ta h…ôtam c…ôve…ó Ňčga k…ôrzamara daa ba, maja nd…ôhay tabiya fa j…ôkfamar sl…ômay maaya maaya.

20.1: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, Yesu faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, fa wuztar *Mey-maaya-mawiya. *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, leŇč mahura hay mekele Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, a samawa fa aŇčga.
20.2: Aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęWuzdandara, ma l…ôvka Ňčga kata cek hay a ke…óe na, wa? Asaya, ma v…ôlka c…ôve…ó Ňčga kata na, wa?¬Ľ
20.3: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYah may, amba yaa c…ôf…óakwar mey pal. Wuzdamiwa cey.
20.4: Ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa *JaŇč-Baptis Ňčga katar *baptem a nd…ôhay na, wa? Gazlavay daw, da daa ba, nd…ôhay daw?¬Ľ
20.5: Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a slam yawa da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa da mb…ô…ódakwa aa mey aŇčga ha na, kwara? Da ya l…ôvkwa: ‚ÄúAra Gazlavay, ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa,‚ÄĚ na, a da mb…ô…ódandakwara, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKaa ka t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis a ba na, maja me?‚ÄĚ
20.6: Ama, da ya l…ôvkwa: ‚ÄúAra nd…ôhay ma sl…ôrdam…ôrwa‚ÄĚ na, nd…ôhay tabiya a daa zakamandakwar ta aŇčgwa amba a k…ô…ómandakwar vagay, maja a wulkam JaŇč-Baptis a, ara *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
20.7: Da ray Ňčgene, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęYa s…ôrmara ba.¬Ľ
20.8: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYaw, da anda ke…óe na, ya fa da kadakwara ndaw ma v…ôlya c…ôve…ó Ňčga kata cek hay a ke…óe na, daa ba may.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey da ray nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay ba (Matiye 21.33-46; Mark 12.1-12)
20.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar a nd…ôhay ta mey-meŇčgey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw daha a key jerne Ňčga wudez hay mez…ômey. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôlda jerne he a har nd…ôhay Ňčga kam sl…ôra da hwa…ó a. Cay, ta‚Äô, a daw aa slam d…ôreŇč, a njawa ga fete…óe.
20.10: A wa t…ô…óe aa kiya meŇčg…ôley bab…ôza Ňčga wudez hay a na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey gula aŇčga pal fa nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra daa jerne he, amba a t…ô…ďar bab…ôza Ňčga wudez hay a maala Ňčga aŇčga may. Gula ha, ta‚Äô, a daw, a wusey aa jerne he. Ama nd…ôhay a, a k…ô…óm…ôrwa, a …ď…ôlm…ôrwa ta har …ďa‚Äô k…ône.
20.11: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, bay Ňčga jerne he, a sl…ôrey gula aŇčga mekele saya. AŇčga may, a k…ô…óm…ôrwa anda ndaw Ňčgeeme heyey c…ôŇčga, a c…ô…óm…ôrwa, ta‚Äô, a …ď…ôlm…ôrwa ta har …ďa‚Äô k…ône.
20.12: Bay a, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey gula aŇčga mekele Ňčga dey maakar saya. AŇčga na, a k…ô…ómara haa a kamar mb…ôlek fa vaw, aa zakadamara a palah.
20.13: Da ray Ňčgene, bay Ňčga jerne he, a wulkey, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúWure ke…óe, ya da key na, kwara? Ňägama ya sl…ôrey b…ôzey da hwa…ó a…óaw masa yah ma wu…óa kalah ke…óe, da a c…ônmar mey la kwa.‚ÄĚ Ta‚Äô a sl…ôrda.
20.14: Ama masa nd…ôhay ma kam sl…ôra daa jerne heyey, ma h…ôtmar b…ôzey a fa sawa na, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúN…ôkmara, ndaw ma sawa katay, ara b…ôzey ma da wa jerne ke…óe fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga papaha. Da ta wuswa la na, ya k…ô…ókwa vagay, amba jerne he a njey Ňčgada al…ôkwa.‚ÄĚ
20.15: Masa aŇčga ma wuswa la na, ta‚Äô aa zakadamara daa jerne he a palah, a k…ô…ómara vagay.¬Ľ Yesu aa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay fete…óe, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWure ke…óe, ka wulkam bay Ňčga jerne he a da kadata nd…ôhay a na, kwara?
20.16: Yaw, ya fa l…ôvkwar bay Ňčga jerne he, a da sawa Ňčga k…ô…óta nd…ôhay a c…ôpa vagay, a da v…ôlda jerne he a har nd…ôhay mekele.¬Ľ Masa nd…ôhay a ma c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe na, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAnja Gazlavay Ňčga ka k…ône ba!¬Ľ
20.17: Yesu a n…ôkta, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ka wu…óam cek aha Ňčga key k…ône ba na, mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya ma l…ôvey: ‚ÄúAŇčgwa mel…ômey way masa nd…ôhay ma l…ôma way ma k…ôzlamara ta cakay na, anja ara aŇčgwa maaya, ma f…ônta siya hay jak.‚ÄĚ Mey a ke…óe na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey me?
20.18: Yaw, kwa waawa ta t…ô…óey la a ray aŇčgwa ha na, a Ňčg…ôrfey. Da aŇčgwa ha ta k…ôzley la a ray ndaw na, a …ó…ôga kw…ô…ó-kwa…ó.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay mahura hay a jadamara Yesu da ray mep…ôley budaw (Matiye 22.15-22; Mark 12.13-17)
20.19: *Nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, ta *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, a s…ôrmara Yesu aa guzley mey-meŇčgey ke…óe da ray ata. A wu…óam Ňčga k…ôrzamara Yesu ta pas a Ňčgene, ama a zluram ta nd…ôhay.
20.20: Da ray Ňčgene, a zlamar Ňčga j…ô…ómara. Ta‚Äô, a walam nd…ôhay, a sl…ôrdamata fa Yesu amba a j…ô…óam mey da mey aŇčga. Nd…ôhay a, a pamata ray ata hay anda nd…ôhay maaya. A wu…óam Ňčga c…ônam mey maaya ba fa aŇčga, amba a k…ôrzamara, a handamara fa nd…ôhay Ňčga Ňčgwamna amba a kamar sariya.
20.21: Aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, ya s…ôrmara mey masa kah maa guzlda, ta cek masa kah maa s…ôrkadandara na, ara mey fara fara. Ka n…ôkta nd…ôhay c…ôpa letek fa mey akah. Ka faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay Ňčga njam anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey fara fara.
20.22: Anda ke…óe, ya wu…óam Ňčgaa c…ôf…óamaka, kwakwas al…ôkwa na, a v…ôley c…ôve…ó Ňčga p…ôley budaw a bay mahura *Sezere daw? A v…ôley c…ôve…ó ba daw?¬Ľ
20.23: Ama Yesu a s…ôra wewer ata, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar:
20.24: ¬ęWuzmaya dala ha pal cey.¬Ľ Masa ata ma wuzmar dala ha la na, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęFa dala ha ke…óe, ara dey Ňčga wa? Ara mez…ôley Ňčga wa?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAra Ňčga Sezere, bay mahura Ňčga *Rawm.¬Ľ
20.25: Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, cek masa Ňčga Sezere na, v…ôldamara a Sezere he. Cek masa Ňčga Gazlavay na, v…ôldamara a Gazlavay a.¬Ľ
20.26: A j…ô…óam mey da mey aŇčga fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, ama ta h…ôtam mey da hwa…ó aŇčga Ňčga k…ôrza daa ba. Sas…ôkar mey masa Yesu ma mb…ô…ódatara na, a r…ôzlam ga da ray a jak, a njam teete. Mey da ray masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey (Matiye 22.23-33; Mark 12.18-27)
20.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay *Saduse hay a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay Yesu. Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene ara nd…ôhay ma wulkam, ma l…ôvam da ndaw ta m…ôcey sem na, fa da sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey daa ba. Aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu, a l…ôvmar:
20.28: ¬ęBay ala, zleezle *Mawiz ta wuzlalandakwar kwakwas la, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúDa ndaw m…ôlmaha ta m…ôcey sem na, da Ňčgwas Ňčga ndaw ma m…ôcey a, ta yawa b…ôza hay daa ba na, si m…ôlmaha a la Ňčgwas-vagay a, amba a yamawa b…ôza hay Ňčgada m…ôlmaha mam…ôckaya ha.‚ÄĚ
20.29: Yaw, m…ôlmaŇč hay maasala daha, ata Ňčgaa maŇč, Ňčgaa paŇč. M…ôlma ata mahura, leŇč! a ley Ňčgwas. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw aha pam! a m…ôcey, ta h…ôtey b…ôzey daa ba.
20.30: Mambaray a, leŇč! a la Ňčgwas-vagay a, aa pam! a m…ôcey, ta h…ôtey b…ôzey daa ba may.
20.31: Ma s…ôpa Ňčga maakar a, leŇč! a la Ňčgwas-vagay a saya, a m…ôcey, ta h…ôtey b…ôzey daa ba c…ôŇčga. Anda ke…óe, ata maasala ata tabiya, ta lamara Ňčgwas aha la, a m…ôcam, ta h…ôtam b…ôzey ta Ňčgwas aha daa ba.
20.32: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa ta m…ôcam sem na, Ňčgwas aha pam! a m…ôcey may.
20.33: Anda ke…óe, ta pas masa nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya ma da sl…ôk…óamawa na, Ňčgwas aha a da key na, Ňčgwas Ňčga wa? Maja ata maasala ata c…ôpa, ta lamara la Ňčga Ňčgwas ata.¬Ľ
20.34: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa b…ôla ke…óe, zel fa ley Ňčgwas, Ňčgwas fa ley zel.
20.35: Ama fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga mem…ôcey, zel hay ta Ňčgusay masa Gazlavay ma n…ôkta maaya Ňčga sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey amba a njam da cakay aŇčga na, Ňčgene zel a ley Ňčgwas daa saba, Ňčgwas a ley zel daa saba.
