20.36: Daa masa ata da cakay Gazlavay na, ata anda maslaŇč aŇčga hay da va…ó, fa da m…ôcam daa saba. Ta t…ôram sem b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay maja ta sl…ôk…óamawa sem daa mem…ôcey.
20.37: Kwa Mawiz zleezle na, ta wuzleley mey la Ňčga wuzey, nd…ôhay a sl…ôk…óamawa la daa mem…ôcey. Yaw, daa masa aŇčga maa guzley da ray awaw meg…ô…óey da ray kusaf na, a z…ôla Bay Gazlavay, ‚ÄúGazlavay masa *Ab…ôraham, *Izak, leŇč *Jakwap ma namar ray.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
20.38: Yesu aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęFa Gazlavay na, nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya ta nd…ôhay ta dey na, ata c…ôpa ta dey, maja Bay Gazlavay, ara Gazlavay Ňčga nd…ôhay ta dey, ba na, ara Gazlavay Ňčga nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya ba.¬Ľ
20.39: Siya hay da wuzlah nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a l…ôvam: ¬ęBay ala, ka taa guzley la maaya.¬Ľ
20.40: Da ray Ňčgene nd…ôhay a zluram Ňčgaa c…ôf…óafamar mey mekele. K…ôriste, aŇčga bay Ňčga Davit na, kwara? (Matiye 22.41-46; Mark 12.35-37)
20.41: Yesu aa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay fete…óe, a l…ôvey: ¬ęNd…ôhay a l…ôvam *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay na, ara b…ôzey da hwa…ó Bay *Davit na, kwara?
20.42: Maja Davit ta ray aŇčga, a wuzlala daa …óerewel Ňčga *P…ôsam, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay a l…ôvar a Bay a…óaw Mahura: Sawa, njey a har-z…ômay a…óaw amba ya wakwa da ray nd…ôhay
20.43: haa ta pas masa yah ma da pata masa-g…ôra akah hay asi salay akah.‚ÄĚ
20.44: Yaw, da Davit a z…ôla K…ôriste ‚ÄúBay Mahura‚ÄĚ na, kaa wara K…ôriste he ara b…ôzey da hwa…ó Davit saya na, kwara?¬Ľ Yesu a k…ôtata gula aŇčga hay fa nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz (Matiye 23.1-36; Mark 12.38-40)
20.45: Yesu a patar leŇčgesl a gula aŇčga hay fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya da cakay a, fa j…ôkfamar sl…ômay. Aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay a, a l…ôvtar:
20.46: ¬ęWam vaw fa *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. A wu…óam mep…ôkey ta dawura hay fa vaw Ňčga zlepey. A wu…óam nd…ôhay a camatar har ta meney ray fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay. Daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, a s…ôpam slam-menjey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay amba nd…ôhay tabiya a h…ôtmatar. Ta pas gwagway na, a s…ôpam slam-menjey maaya.
20.47: Asaya, fa t…ô…ďmatara cek hay Ňčga Ňčgwas-vagay hay tabiya, ama da ata fa d…ôram daŇčgay na, a njam daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay a ga, amba nd…ôhay a l…ôvam ata maaya. Ya fa l…ôvkwar, Gazlavay a s…ôrdata banay la, ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay mekele!¬Ľ

21.1: Yesu aŇčga daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. A n…ôkey dey ta cakay, a h…ôtatar nd…ôhay masa-zleley hay, fa kwiyam dala aa cek mecekeley dala.
21.2: A h…ôtey Ňčgwas-vagay masa-viya daha, fa kwiyey sisey sisey cew aa cek aha may.
21.3: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, Ňčgwas-vagay masa-viya ke…óe, ta v…ôley dala la ma f…ôna Ňčga nd…ôhay siya tabiya.
21.4: Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe na, maja nd…ôhay siya, a v…ôlam dala nek…ô…óey daa dey zleley ata hay da way ga. Ama Ňčgwas-vagay ke…óe, ta m…ôrga aŇčga ha c…ôpa, a v…ôlda zleley aŇčga tabiya, masa aŇčga ma da h…ô…ókey cek mez…ômey ta aŇčga.¬Ľ Mey da ray mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla (Matiye 24.1-14; Matiye 10.17-22; Mark 13.1-13)
21.5: Nd…ôhay siya aa guzlam da ray *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvam: ¬ęWay ke…óe, ma…óiykaya ta aŇčgwa ma mbey kalah, ta cek hay maaya ma h…ô…ókam ba masa nd…ôhay ma v…ôldamata a Gazlavay.¬Ľ Yesu a l…ôvtar:
21.6: ¬ęPas a, a sawa la, cek hay masa akwar ma h…ôtmatar ke…óe na, a da b…ôzlam c…ôpa, kwa aŇčgwa pal fa da mb…ôkey da ray c…ôla daa ba.¬Ľ
21.7: Aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, cek aha a da key na, ta vara? Ya da s…ôrmara …óar a ta wuswa cay na, fa me?¬Ľ
21.8: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWam vaw, ka da v…ôlmatar c…ôve…ó a nd…ôhay Ňčga f…ôcmakwar ba. Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe, maja nd…ôhay ga a samawa la, ta mez…ôley a…óaw, a da l…ôvam ara Gazlavay ma walata Ňčga l…ôhey nd…ôhay daa banay. Asaya, a l…ôvam pas masa Gazlavay ma da l…ôhdata nd…ôhay ta wuswa cay. Ka da diyam asi nd…ôhay a Ňčgene ba!
21.9: Ta pas masa akwar ma da c…ônam labara Ňčga v…ôram hay, ta labara Ňčga nd…ôhay ma cakalam mey ta bay ata hay na, ka da zluram ba, maja si cek hay ke…óe a kam la teese…ó …óagay. Ama ara mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla wure wure Ňčgene ba.¬Ľ
21.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęHwayak laŇčgar a da key v…ôram ta hwayak laŇčgar, bay laŇčgar a da key h…ôma a ray bay laŇčgar.
21.11: Hwiyak a wusey la ga. May a key la daa hwayak hay mekele mekele, asaya, macay hay a k…ô…óam nd…ôhay la ga. Cek hay ma zlurey ndaw a kam la, asaya, cek hay ma r…ôzley ndaw a wuzmawa la da gazlavay da va…ó.
21.12: ¬ęAma wuskwaa cek hay a, a da kam na, a k…ôrzamakwar la, a s…ôrdamakwar banay la, a v…ôldamakwar la amba a kamakwar sariya daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay hay. A nd…ôkwdamakwar la aa f…ôrs…ône, a handamakwar la fa mey Ňčga bay hay, ta fa mey Ňčga mahura hay Ňčga hwayak hay, maja yah.
21.13: Ka da s…ôram banay a Ňčgene na, amba ka h…ôtam c…ôve…ó Ňčga key sede da ray a…óaw.
21.14: Da ray Ňčgene, s…ôrmara maaya maaya ka da zluram da ray mey masa akwar ma daa guzlam ba,
21.15: maja ya v…ôlkwar leŇčgesl la Ňčgaa guzley mey maaya. Anda ke…óe, kwa masa-g…ôra akwar hay, fa da gwamara Ňčga t…ô…ódamakwar daa ba.
21.16: Kwa papakw akwar hay, kwa mamakw akwar hay, kwa m…ôlmakw akwar hay, kwa s…ôkway akwar hay, kwa jam akwar hay, a wudmakwar la a way bay. Nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah akwar na, a k…ô…ómata la vagay.
21.17: Nd…ôhay tabiya a da Ňčg…ôldamakwar ba, maja yah.
21.18: Ama, kwa eŇčgwec Ňčga ray akwar pal fa daa z…ô…óey daa ba.
21.19: ∆Ā…ôsmara banay a, anda ke…óe, ka h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba la.¬Ľ Mey da ray hwayak Ňčga Jeruzelem ma da p…ôlhey (Matiye 24.15-21; Mark 13.14-19)
21.20: Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa ka h…ôtmatar sewje hay ta zl…ôrmara berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem sem Ňčga key v…ôram na, daa Ňčgene, s…ôrmara berney a gweegwe cay a p…ôlhey.
21.21: Anda ke…óe, si nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude a hwam Ňčga …ďawa a aŇčgwa, si nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem a bam, asaya, nd…ôhay da slala ta cakay a da mb…ôzam aa berney a saba.
21.22: Daa Ňčgene, Bay Gazlavay a da s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay daa hwayak a, amba cek hay tabiya mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay d…ôga zleezle na, a kam fara fara.
21.23: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, banay a sawa la a ray Ňčgusay ta hwa…ó ta a ray Ňčgusay masa ta b…ôza hay da har, maja banay mahura a sawa la aa hwayak a. Fara fara, Bay Gazlavay a cey mevel la a ray nd…ôhay daa hwayak a.
21.24: Masa-g…ôra hay a da k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay siya vagay ta d…ôlaw, siya, a da t…ôrdamata Ňčga beke hay, a da handamata aa hwayak hay mekele mekele da b…ôla. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba, a da wam da ray Jeruzelem, a da s…ôrdamata banay haa kasl pas masa mewey ata ha ma nd…ôvey.¬Ľ Mey da ray ma v…ôhwa Ňčga B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw (Matiye 24.29-31; Mark 13.24-27)
21.25: Yesu aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDaa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a da zluram, a wulkam cek maaya ba a key la maja pas fa mb…ô…óey, kiya fa mb…ô…óey, wurzla hay fa mb…ô…óam. Da b…ôla na, s…ôkway hay tabiya mand…ôrzay a da katar maja membey mey Ňčga yam ta vaŇčgwala Ňčga yam daa b…ôlay.
21.26: Nd…ôhay a da wulkam kalah fa cek hay ma da kam da b…ôla, anda ke…óe mand…ôrzay a da k…ô…óta vagay maja cek hay c…ôpa da gazlavay da va…ó, a wusam la.
21.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a da h…ôtmaya yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya fa sawa daa mekwtene ta g…ôdaŇč mahura, ta mewe…óey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay.
21.28: Ama da cek hay a ke…óe fa zlamar mekey na, akwar na, lacam maaya maaya, baŇčga…óamata dey akwar hay, maja yah, ndaw ma da l…ôhdakwar daa banay, gweegwe cay ya wuswa.¬Ľ Mey-meŇčgey ta gudav (Matiye 24.32-35; Mark 13.28-31)
21.29: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a Ňčgatar mey a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęN…ôkmara gudav ke…óe ta wudez hay siya.
21.30: Da masa akwar fa h…ôtmatar gwaslaf hay a fa zlamar Ňčga …óe…óey na, ka s…ôrmara kiya madaw a ley gweegwe cay.
21.31: AŇčga letek k…ône, da ka h…ôtmatar cek hay a fa kam anda yah ma l…ôvkwar kaa na, ka s…ôrmara gweegwe cay, Gazlavay a wuzd…ôrwa bay aŇčga.
21.32: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, cek hay a ke…óe tabiya, a da kam na, nd…ôhay masa wure ke…óe ta m…ôcam tabiya daa ba araŇč.
21.33: Slam da va…ó ta slam da hwayak a nd…ôvey la, ama mey a…óaw na, fa da nd…ôvey daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ Yesu a k…ôtata nd…ôhay da ray ma v…ôhwa aŇčga
21.34: ¬ęWam vaw fa menjey akwar. Wam vaw, ka da mb…ôkdamara ray akwar Ňčga sey cek haa ka wam ba leŇč Ňčga s…ôpey cek mez…ômey ta cek mesey kalah ba, asaya, ka da mb…ôkdamara ray akwar Ňčga wulkey kalah da ray menjey da b…ôla ba. Ray akwar a da h…ô…ďey fa cek hay a ke…óe ba, maja pas masa yah ma da v…ôhwa na, kwa ka s…ôrmara …óar a ba, ya da h…ôtfakwar d…ôrfafay,
21.35: anda ndaw ma k…ôrzey cek ta gadaŇč. Ta pas Ňčgene, ya da katar sariya a nd…ôhay da b…ôla tabiya.
21.36: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, wam vaw, d…ôram daŇčgay mandaw mandaw, amba ka h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč Ňčga l…ôhey fa cek hay ma da kam tabiya, asaya, Ňčga lecey fa mey a…óaw, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ta mand…ôrzay ba.¬Ľ
21.37: Mandaw mandaw Yesu a v…ôrndey daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, fa wuzey mey. Ama taa kwa…ó na, a daw a nawa daa aŇčgwa Ňčga *Awliviye.
21.38: Mandaw mandaw taa p…ôrek na, nd…ôhay ga a diyam fa v…ô…óa aa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, amba a j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey aŇčga.

22.1: Gwagway Ňčga peŇč manjar cek ma h…ôsla da hwa…ó a mez…ôley gwagway Ňčga *Pak, gweegwe cay.
22.2: *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, a s…ôpam c…ôve…ó amba a k…ô…ómara Yesu vagay, ama a zluram ta zagaba.
22.3: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *SataŇč kula! a mb…ôzey aa mevel Ňčga Juda, ndaw mez…ôley Iskariyawt. Ara gula pal da wuzlah gula hay kuraw a ray a cew Ňčga Yesu.
22.4: Juda ta‚Äô, a daw a kamawa ma…óay ta *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč ta mahura hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma j…ô…óa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay amba a v…ôldatara Yesu.
22.5: Bay-ray hay ta mahura hay a, aa s…ômam ga. A l…ôvmar da ta v…ôldatara Yesu la na, a v…ôlmar dala.
22.6: Juda a t…ô…ďa Ňčga v…ôldatara. A daw a s…ôpey c…ôve…ó, amba a v…ôldatara Yesu, kwa nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara ba. Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a s…ôpam slam Ňčga key gwagway Ňčga Pak (Matiye 26.17-25; Mark 14.12-21; JaŇč 13.21-30)
22.7: Gwagway Ňčga peŇč manjar cek ma h…ôsla da hwa…ó a, ta wuswa cay. Pas a Ňčgene ara pas ma h…ôrey b…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč hay Ňčga key gwagway Ňčga *Pak.
22.8: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu a sl…ôrdata ata *Piyer ta *JaŇč, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam ta …óiymandakwar slam ta cek mez…ômey amba ya z…ômkwa …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak!¬Ľ
22.9: Ata Piyer ta JaŇč aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKa wu…óey ya diyam Ňčga …óiywa slam aha na, dama?¬Ľ
22.10: A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęEhe, j…ôkam sl…ômay. Diyam aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem. Masa akwar fa da mb…ôzam aa berney a na, ka cam ray la ta ndaw daha fa daw ta yam daa kwakulam. Diyam asiya. Aa way masa aŇčga ma da mb…ôzey na,
22.11: l…ôvmar a bay Ňčga way a: ‚ÄúBay ala a l…ôvey: Way masa yah ma da z…ômam …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak ta gula a…óaw hay na, aa daa wura?‚ÄĚ
22.12: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a wuzkwar way mahura da ray way la. Daa way a na, cek hay tabiya daha Ňčga key gwagway a. Ka da …óiymandakwara cek mez…ômey amba ya z…ômkwa …óaf Ňčga gwagway a fete…óe.¬Ľ
22.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a diyam, a h…ôtfamatar cek hay tabiya anda Yesu ma l…ôvtar heyey. Ta‚Äô, a …óiymata cek hay Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak a. Yesu a z…ômey …óaf ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mesl…ôrey Ňčga madagway-dakw (Matiye 26.26-30; Mark 14.22-26; 1 Kwarinti hay 11.23-25)
22.14: Masa pas t…ô…óe Ňčga z…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga *Pak heyey na, ta‚Äô, Yesu a diyam aa way heyey, a njam ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mesl…ôrey Ňčga z…ômey …óaf.
22.15: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa ta wu…óey la fara fara Ňčga z…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak ke…óe ta akwar, wara a s…ôrdamaya banay.
22.16: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, kwa ya fa da z…ômey …óaf Ňčga gwagway Ňčga Pak a daa saba, si ta pas masa Bay Gazlavay ma da wey da ray nd…ôhay tabiya da va…ó. Ta pas Ňčgene, mabara Ňčga mey da ray gwagway Ňčga Pak a, a wuzwa la fara fara.¬Ľ
22.17: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu leŇč! a la v…ôley ta cek mesey da hwa…ó a, ta‚Äô, a kar suse a Bay Gazlavay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęT…ô…ďmara cek ke…óe, samara akwar c…ôpa.
22.18: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, d…ôga wure ke…óe, ya fa da sey cek aha ta akwar daa saba haa kasl pas masa Gazlavay ma da wuzd…ôrwa bay aŇčga fara fara.¬Ľ
22.19: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, leŇč! a ley peŇč, a kar suse a Bay Gazlavay, ta‚Äô, a wunka, a v…ôldatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKe…óe he na, ara vaw a…óaw mav…ôldakaya Ňčgada akwar. Kamara anda ke…óe amba ka s…ôrfadamaya.¬Ľ
22.20: Ata ma z…ômamara …óaf cay na, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldatara v…ôley ta cek mesey da hwa…ó a heyey saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKe…óe he na, ara mambaz a…óaw. Mambaz a, a da mb…ô…ówa maja akwar. Ta fa mambaz a, Gazlavay a j…ôwey mey mawiya ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
22.21: Ama n…ôka, ndaw masa ma daa z…ô…ódaya na, aŇčga fa z…ômey …óaf fe…óe ta yah.
22.22: Fara fara, si yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya m…ôcey anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey, ama banay a sawa la a ray ndaw masa ma daa z…ô…ódaya!¬Ľ
22.23: Aa c…ôf…óam vaw da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęMa da ka cek aha ke…óe na, ara wa?¬Ľ Mahura na, wa?
22.24: Fa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a kam yawa ga da wuzlah ata, a wu…óam amba a s…ôrmara mahura da wuzlah ata na, wa.
22.25: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęBay hay da b…ôla ke…óe fa wam da ray nd…ôhay ta g…ôdaŇč. Ata na, a wu…óam nd…ôhay ata hay aa h…ômdamata, a z…ôlmata bay hay ma ka sl…ôra maaya.
22.26: Ama Ňčga akwar na, k…ône ba. Ndaw masa mahura da wuzlah akwar na, si a t…ôrey anda matab…ôwa akwar. Ndaw masa ma wakwar na, si a t…ôrey ndaw ma kakwar sl…ôra.
22.27: Da wuzlah ndaw ma h…ôlrawa …óaf ta ndaw ma z…ôma na, mahura na, wa? Mahura na, ara ndaw ma z…ôma, ba diya? Ama yah na, yah da wuzlah akwar, anda ndaw ma kakwar sl…ôra.
22.28: ¬ęAkwar na, nd…ôhay masa dasi a…óaw mandaw mandaw daa masa ya fa s…ôrey banay, akwar ta mb…ôkdamaya daa ba.
22.29: Yah may, ya v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč amba ka wam da ray nd…ôhay anda Papay ma v…ôlya g…ôdaŇč Ňčga wey da ray nd…ôhay.
22.30: Da ray Ňčgene, pas masa yah ma da wey da ray nd…ôhay na, akwar may, ka da njam aa slam maaya da cakay a…óaw, ya da z…ômkwa cek, ya da sakwa cek bama. Ka da njam aa slam-menjey Ňčga bay hay, amba ka kamatar sariya Ňčgada s…ôkway Ňčga *Israyel hay kuraw a ray a cew.¬Ľ Mey da ray ata Yesu ta SimaŇčw Piyer (Matiye 26.31-35; Mark 14.27-31; JaŇč 13.36-38)
22.31: Yesu a l…ôvar a *SimaŇčw *Piyer: ¬ęSimaŇčw, SimaŇčw, j…ôkey sl…ômay, *SataŇč ta h…ôtey c…ôve…ó la amba a k…ôfkwar anda ndaw ma k…ôfey daw Ňčga wunkey b…ôz-daw ta cekwesl e.
22.32: Ama ya ta d…ôrar daŇčgay la a Gazlavay maja kah, amba ka mb…ôkda Ňčga t…ô…ďa mey a…óaw ba. Pas masa ka ta v…ôhwa sem a fa yah c…ôŇčga na, v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč a m…ôlmakw hay may.¬Ľ
22.33: Piyer a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, kwa a handamaka aa f…ôrs…ône na, ya s…ôpka la, amba ya njakwa cew e, asaya, kwa a k…ô…ómaka vagay na, ya m…ôckwa la cew e.¬Ľ
22.34: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvka, Piyer, tasana wuskwaa gwagwalak a da cey …óay na, ka ta l…ôvey cay dey maakar, ka s…ôrya ba, ka s…ôrya ba.¬Ľ Mey da ray mewey vaw maja banay
22.35: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a l…ôvtar a gula aŇčga hay: ¬ęTa pas masa yah ma sl…ôrdakwar, dala da har daa ba, gabal daa ba, tarak daa ba heyey na, ka ta huram cek daa slam aha la daw?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęYa ta huram cek daa ba.¬Ľ
22.36: A l…ôvtar: ¬ęAma wure ke…óe na, ndaw masa dala aŇčga daha, Ňčga la a har, ndaw masa gabal aŇčga daha, Ňčga la. Ndaw masa d…ôlaw aŇčga daa ba, Ňčga h…ô…ókada zana aŇčga, Ňčga h…ô…ókawa d…ôlaw d…ô…ďa.
22.37: Daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, mey mawuzlalakaya da ray a…óaw a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúAŇčga masl…ôfkaya da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma k…ô…óa nd…ôhay vagay!‚ÄĚ Fara fara, si cek a kaya la anda mey mawuzlalakaya da ray a…óaw a c…ôma.¬Ľ
22.38: Gula aŇčga hay a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Mahura, d…ôlaw hay cew ke…óe daha.¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMey a ke…óe mak.¬Ľ Yesu a d…ôrey daŇčgay daa AŇčgwa Ňčga Awliviye (Matiye 26.36-46; Mark 14.32-42)
22.39: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu ta‚Äô, a bey daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem, a daw Ňčgadaa AŇčgwa Ňčga *Awliviye anda aŇčga ma daw mandaw mandaw taa kwa…ó. Gula aŇčga hay ta‚Äô, a diyam asiya.
22.40: AŇčga ma wusey la fete…óe na, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęD…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay Ňčga j…ônkwar amba cek a batakwar Ňčga key meb…ôrey ba.¬Ľ
22.41: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a daw ta cakay, d…ôreŇč nek…ô…óey. Da ndaw aa zekey aŇčgwa na, a wusey aa slam aha. Ta‚Äô, a regedey, a d…ôrey daŇčgay,
22.42: a l…ôvey: ¬ęPapay, da ka wu…óey na, ka gwa ka Ňčg…ôchada banay ke…óe d…ôreŇč ta yah. Ta k…ône he c…ôpa na, ka da ka anda yah ma wu…óey ba, ama ka anda kah ma wu…óey.¬Ľ [
22.43: Daa slam aha Ňčgene, *maslaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó, ta‚Äô, a pawa salay Ňčga v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč.
22.44: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a d…ôrey daŇčgay ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga c…ôpa maja mevel aŇčga fa t…ô…óey kalah. Mawur…ďay fa vaw aŇčga fa vavawa, fa g…ôcey anda mambaz ma g…ôcey a hwayak.]
22.45: AŇčga ma d…ôrey daŇčgay cay na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a v…ôhwa fa gula aŇčga hay. A h…ôtfatar na, ata c…ôkw-cakw daa …óar maja ta wulkam la ga, a g…ôram.
22.46: A l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa nam maja me? Sl…ôk…óam, d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay Ňčga j…ônkwar amba cek a batakwar Ňčga key meb…ôrey ba.¬Ľ A k…ôrzamara Yesu (Matiye 26.47-56; Mark 14.43-50; JaŇč 18.3-11)
22.47: Masa Yesu ta nd…ôvda meeguzley daa ba araŇč na, nd…ôhay ga fa samawa ta ata Juda, ndaw pal dasi gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew heyey. Juda ha, aa fa mey ata. A Ňčg…ôchey fa Yesu amba a car har anda mandala aŇčga fara fara.
22.48: Ama Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęJuda, ka caya har amba kaa z…ô…ódaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw daw?¬Ľ
22.49: Masa nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu ma h…ôtmar cek aha na, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Mahura, ka wu…óey ya k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay a ta d…ôlaw hay daw?¬Ľ
22.50: Ndaw pal da wuzlah ata, a Ňčg…ôma mad…ôrlam Ňčga *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta d…ôlaw, c…ôrah! a c…ôrha sl…ômay ta dey Ňčga z…ômay.
22.51: Ama Yesu a l…ôvey: ¬ęCay, mak! Mb…ôkdamata Ňčga wam Ňčga ata.¬Ľ A g…ôsfar har fa sl…ômay Ňčga ndaw aha, sl…ômay a, ta‚Äô, a k…ôfey aa slam a.
22.52: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar Ňčgada *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta Ňčgada mahura hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma j…ô…óa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, leŇč Ňčgada mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay masa ma samawa Ňčga k…ôrzamara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa samawa Ňčga k…ôrzamaya ta d…ôlaw, ta zlanday faa har faa har anda yah ndaw-mayal na, maja me?
22.53: Mandaw mandaw yah da wuzlah akwar daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, akwar ta s…ôpmaya Ňčga k…ôrzey daa ba. Ama pas a ke…óe ara pas akwar, amba ka kam cek anda akwar ma wu…óam da ray a…óaw, asaya, ara pas Ňčga *SataŇč, bay Ňčga l…ôvaŇč, ma da ka sl…ôra aŇčga da ray a…óaw.¬Ľ Piyer a l…ôvey a s…ôra Yesu ba (Matiye 26.57, 58, 69-75; Mark 14.53, 54, 66-72; JaŇč 18.12-18, 25-27)
22.54: Masa ata ma k…ôrzamara Yesu cay na, ta‚Äô, a handamara a way *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. *Piyer fa s…ôpta ta meed…ôreŇč e.
22.55: Da way ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas a na, awaw mag…ô…ókaya da palah-way daha. Piyer a daw c…ôkwam! a njey a cakay nd…ôhay manjatakaya da mey awaw a.
22.56: Dam ma ka sl…ôra da way a daha, a h…ôtar Piyer manjakaya da mey awaw a. Ta‚Äô, a n…ôkfa, a l…ôvey: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe na, ara gula Ňčga Yesu.¬Ľ
22.57: Ama Piyer ma c…ônda anda ke…óe na, a cada mey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKay! Ňčgwas ke…óe, ya s…ôra ndaw a ba.¬Ľ
22.58: Menjey nek…ô…óey, ndaw mekele a h…ôtar Piyer saya, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, ndaw pal dasi gula aŇčga hay.¬Ľ Ama Piyer a mb…ô…ódara a ndaw aha, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKay! yah dasi ata ba.¬Ľ
22.59: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, menjey z…ô…ďat a saya na, ndaw mekele aa guzley ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey: ¬ęFara fara, ndaw ke…óe na, ara gula aŇčga, maja aŇčga ndaw *Galile.¬Ľ
22.60: Ama Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe! ya s…ôra mey masa kah ma wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ke…óe ba.¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene, masa ta nd…ôvda maa guzley daa ba araŇč na, gwagwalak a cey …óay.
22.61: Bay Mahura Yesu p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey dey fa Piyer, a n…ôkfa. Piyer a s…ôrfada mey masa Bay Mahura ma l…ôvar: ¬ęWuskwaa gwagwalak a da cey …óay tasana na, ka ta l…ôvey cay dey maakar ka s…ôrya ba, ka s…ôrya ba.¬Ľ
22.62: Piyer ta‚Äô, a bawa aa ambaw, a t…ôway ga, a z…ôley marava. Nd…ôhay aa saŇčg…ôram da ray Yesu (Matiye 26.67, 68; Mark 14.65)
22.63: -64 Nd…ôhay ma j…ô…ómara Yesu a, aa saŇčg…ôrfamar. A s…ôrtamara dey aŇčga ta zana, a k…ô…ómara, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęS…ôra ma k…ô…óka ke…óe na, wa? Wuzdandara cey!¬Ľ
22.65: Aa guzlmar mey hay mekele mekele, a c…ô…ómara. Yesu fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay (Matiye 26.59-66; Mark 14.55-64; JaŇč 18.19-24)
22.66: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, slam ma wurey cay na, mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, leŇč *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, a kusam. A l…ôvmatar a nd…ôhay ma j…ô…ómara Yesu Ňčga handam…ôrwa Yesu a fa mey ata, Ňčga key sariya. Ta‚Äô, a handam…ôrwa Yesu a, fa mey ata.
22.67: Nd…ôhay mahura hay heyey ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęDa kah *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay heyey na, kadandara.¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwa ya kadakwara yah K…ôriste na, akwar fa da t…ô…ďmara daa ba.
22.68: Da yaa c…ôf…óakwar mey pal na, akwar fa da mb…ô…ódamiwa daa ba.
22.69: D…ôga wure ke…óe, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, ya da njey ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay Mawaca-waca.¬Ľ
22.70: Ata tabiya a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKaa kah na, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay d…ô…ďa daw?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAhaw, anda akwar ma l…ôvam, yah, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
22.71: Da ray Ňčgene, aa guzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAl…ôkwa ta ray al…ôkwa, ta c…ôndakwa cay da mey aŇčga, ya s…ôpkwa ndaw Ňčgaa guzlndakwar da ray a na, keme seme!¬Ľ

23.1: Mahura Ňčga *J…ôwif hay makustakaya heyey tabiya, a sl…ôk…óam, a handamara Yesu fa mey Ňčga Bay Pilat.
23.2: Fete…óe, a zlamar Ňčga mb…ôrzlafamar, a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa h…ôtfamar ndaw ke…óe fa n…ôsa hwayak ala, fa h…ôldata nd…ôhay Ňčga v…ôldamara budaw a bay Rawma ba! A l…ôvey aŇčga *K…ôriste, bay mahura.¬Ľ
23.3: Pilat aa c…ôf…óa Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, bay Ňčga J…ôwif hay fara daw?¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAnda kah ma l…ôvey.¬Ľ
23.4: Pilat aa guzltar a *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč a nd…ôhay makustakaya fete…óe, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa ta h…ôtey meb…ôrey fa ndaw ke…óe t…ô…óe Ňčga k…ôrza daa ba.¬Ľ
23.5: Ama nd…ôhay a, a mb…ôrzlam c…ôŇčga, a l…ôvam: ¬ęFa caradata nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay tabiya Ňčga key cek maaya ba ta fa mewuzey mey aŇčga hay mekele mekele. A zlarawa da *Galile, haa a wuswa fe…óe.¬Ľ Yesu fa mey Ňčga Bay Herawt
23.6: Ama masa Pilat ma c…ônda Yesu a sawa da *Galile na, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay da cakay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe ara ndaw Galile fara daw?¬Ľ
23.7: Masa Pilat ma c…ônda Yesu a sawa da Galile, hwayak masa *Herawt ma wa na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrdara a Bay Herawt, maja daa …óar a Ňčgene Bay Herawt a, aŇčga da *Jeruzelem fete…óe may.
23.8: Masa Bay Herawt a ma h…ôtar Yesu na, aa s…ômey ga maja d…ôga zleezle, aŇčga fa wu…óey Ňčga h…ôtar, maja aŇčga fa c…ôney mey da ray a. A wulkey daa mevel aŇčga na, da Yesu a key maazla meedey aŇčga la kwa.
23.9: Bay Herawt a, aa c…ôf…óafar mey hay mekele mekele, ama kwa Yesu a mb…ô…ódara ba.
23.10: *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ata fete…óe. A dad…ô…ófamar mey masa maadakw a.
23.11: Bay Herawt a, ta sewje aŇčga hay aa saŇčg…ôrfamar, a c…ô…ómara. Ta‚Äô, a pamar zana maaya membey fa vaw, a v…ôhdamara fa Bay Pilat saya.
23.12: Daa ba na, ata Bay Herawt ta Bay Pilat a c…ômam ba, ama mezley d…ôga ta pas Ňčgene ata jam. A …ó…ôslmara sariya Ňčga Yesu (Matiye 27.15-26; Mark 15.6-15; JaŇč 18.39‚Äď19.16)
23.13: Masa Bay *Herawt ma v…ôhda Yesu sem fa Pilat saya na, ta‚Äô, Pilat a kusta *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, leŇč zagaba,
23.14: a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ta handam…ôrwa ndaw ke…óe la fa yah, ka l…ôvam fa n…ôsa hwayak ala. Ama ya taa c…ôf…óa la meedey akwar, kwa ya ta h…ôtey meb…ôrey anda akwar ma l…ôvam na, daa ba.
23.15: Bay Herawt may, ta h…ôtey meb…ôrey a daa ba k…ône. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôhd…ôrwa fa al…ôkwa c…ôŇčga. Fara fara ndaw ke…óe ta key meb…ôrey t…ô…óe Ňčgaa z…ô…óey heter aŇčga na, daa ba.
23.16: Yaw, ya sl…ô…óa gway na, ya mb…ôkda.¬Ľ [
23.17: Fa mevey a, fa mevey a, gweegwe gwagway Ňčga *Pak na, Pilat a p…ôskatar ndaw pal daa f…ôrs…ône Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa hwayak a.]
23.18: Ama nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe a zlamar mewudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęK…ô…óndara ndaw ke…óe vagay! P…ôskandar Barabas!¬Ľ
23.19: A k…ôzlamara Barabas aa f…ôrs…ône na, maja aŇčga ma h…ôldata nd…ôhay Ňčga kam baazlam a ray bay Ňčga berney a ta aŇčga ma k…ô…óey ndaw vagay.
23.20: Pilat ta‚Äô, aa guzltar Ňčgada zagaba saya maja a wu…óey Ňčga mb…ôkda Yesu.
23.21: Ama nd…ôhay a, a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęD…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya! D…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya!¬Ľ
23.22: Pilat ta‚Äô, aa guzley Ňčga dey maakar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek maaya ba masa aŇčga ma key na, wura? Maja kwa ya ta h…ôtey meb…ôrey fa aŇčga t…ô…óe Ňčgaa z…ô…óey mes…ôfney aŇčga na, daa ba. Ya da sl…ô…óa gway na, ya mb…ôkda.¬Ľ
23.23: Ama a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa wu…óam Yesu na, ka d…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya.¬Ľ Mewudey ata ha a f…ônar ray a Pilat.
23.24: Ta‚Äô, a t…ô…ďa Ňčga key anda ata maa c…ôf…óamara.
23.25: A p…ôskatara ndaw masa ata ma wu…óam Ňčga p…ôskey heyey. Ndaw a na, a k…ôzlamara aa f…ôrs…ône, maja aŇčga ma h…ôldata nd…ôhay Ňčga key baazlam a ray bay Ňčga berney a ta aŇčga ma k…ô…óey ndaw vagay heyey. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôldatara Yesu amba a kamar cek anda ata ma wu…óam. A d…ôrmara Yesu fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya (Matiye 27.32-44; Mark 15.21-32; JaŇč 19.17-27)
23.26: Daa masa fa handamara Yesu Ňčga d…ôrey na, a cadamara ray ta *SimaŇčw, ndaw da Siren fa sawa da ley. Sewje hay kaw! a k…ôrzamara SimaŇčw a, a pamara hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya heyey a ray aŇčga, a handa fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga Yesu.
23.27: Nd…ôhay ga fa diyam asiya, asaya, Ňčgusay fa diyam asiya ta mat…ôway.
23.28: Ama Yesu p…ôla! a mb…ô…ówa dey fa Ňčgusay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęŇägusay da *Jeruzelem, ka t…ôwam maja yah ba, ama t…ôwam maja ray akwar, ta maja b…ôz akwar hay!
23.29: Maja pas Ňčga banay a sawa la masa nd…ôhay a da l…ôvam: ‚ÄúMees…ômey daha Ňčgada Ňčgusay d…ôrlay hay, masa ta yam b…ôza hay daa ba, masa ta v…ôlam …ó…ôwa a b…ôza hay daa ba s…ôlak!‚ÄĚ
23.30: Nd…ôhay a da zlamar Ňčgaa guzley Ňčgada aŇčgwa hay, a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúB…ôzlmawa a ray ala!‚ÄĚ ta Ňčgadaa heeleŇč hay, ‚ÄúP…ôshamandar!‚ÄĚ
23.31: Da fa g…ô…ómar awaw fa hwadam meend…ô…ďek e Ňčgaa wurey na, kaa wara hwadam makwalakaya na, a g…ô…ómara k…ôlme…óek! daa ba daw?¬Ľ
23.32: Ta‚Äô, a handamawa nd…ôhay mekele cew, nd…ôhay a, ara mayal hay, amba a k…ô…ómata ta ata Yesu daa slam a vagay.

24.1: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, p…ôrek p…ôrek ta pas luma Ňčga Gudal, Ňčgusay ma wam vaw ta cek hay mezey maaya heyey a lamata cek hay a, a diyam a mey c…ôvay Ňčga Yesu.

24.5: Ňägusay a, mand…ôrzay a katar, a j…ôkwdamara ray a hwayak. Nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęKa s…ôpmara ndaw masa ta dey da wuzlah nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya na, kwara?

24.7: ‚ÄúSi a v…ôldamaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a har nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey amba a d…ôrmaya fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya. Ňäga …óar maakar a, ya sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ

Ta‚Äô, a v…ôhwa a way aŇčga, ray a h…ô…ďar da ray cek masa aa ma h…ôt…ôrwa. Yesu a wuztar vaw a gula aŇčga hay cew daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Emayus (Mark 16.12, 13)

24.18: Ndaw dasi ata pal, mez…ôley K…ôliyawpas, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNdaw a…óaw, kah, ndaw-m…ôlak da Jeruzelem ke…óe daw? Ka ta c…ônda mey masa ma key daa …óar hay a ke…óe daa ba daw?¬Ľ

A v…ôhmawa, a l…ôvmandar: ‚ÄúMaslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó a wuzmandar vaw, a l…ôvmandar: Yesu ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey, aŇčga ta dey.‚ÄĚ Mey Ňčga Ňčgusay a ma c…ôndam…ôrwa ke…óe na, a h…ô…ďndar ray.

24.29: Ama a kamar ambahw, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęNjakwa fe…óe bama maja pas fa da k…ôzley, gweegwe tava…ó cay.¬Ľ AŇčga ta‚Äô, a v…ôhwa, a diyam, a mb…ôzam aa way.
24.30: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a njam bama Ňčga z…ômey …óaf. Yesu leŇč! a ley peŇč, a kar suse a Gazlavay, ta‚Äô, a wunka, a v…ôldatara.

24.50: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu ta‚Äô, a badata gula aŇčga hay daa berney a, a diyam gweegwe ta Betani. Fete…óe, ta‚Äô, a baŇčga…óa har, a p…ôstar mey.

24.53: Mandaw mandaw ata daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, fa h…ôlmamara Gazlavay.

1.1: Masa *Gazlavay ta l…ôma b…ôla daa ba araŇč na, ndaw ma z…ôlmara Mey Ňčga Gazlavay aa daha cay. Mey a manjakaya ta Gazlavay . Mey a na, ara Gazlavay a ray aŇčga.
1.2: Masa Gazlavay ta zlar Ňčga l…ômt…ôrwa cek hay tabiya daa ba araŇč na, Mey a manjakaya ta Gazlavay.
1.3: Gazlavay a kat…ôrwa cek hay tabiya ta fa ndaw aha. Kwa Gazlavay ta key cek manjar aŇčga na, daa ba.
1.4: Ara aŇčga ma v…ôltar heter a cek hay tabiya. AŇčga fa wa…óatar dey a nd…ôhay amba a njam aa slam-mewe…óey, a s…ôrmara cek masa fara fara.
1.5: AŇčga na, slam-mewe…óey, aŇčga fa we…óey daa l…ôvaŇč. L…ôvaŇč a, ta gwa Ňčga s…ôrta daa ba s…ôlak.
1.6: Zleezle, ndaw daha mez…ôley *JaŇč . Gazlavay ta sl…ôrd…ôrwa la fa nd…ôhay.
1.7: A sawa Ňčga wuzdatara a nd…ôhay mey da ray slam-mewe…óey a, amba kwa waawa a t…ô…ďa mey aŇčga da ray slam-mewe…óey a.
1.8: Fara fara, JaŇč na, ara slam-mewe…óey a ba. Ama a sawa na, amba a wuzey mey da ray a gway.
1.9: Ndaw ma z…ôlmara Mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey na, ara slam-mewe…óey fara fara. Masa aŇčga ma sawa a b…ôla na, a wa…óatar dey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya.
1.10: Ndaw ma z…ôlmara Mey heyey ta sawa la a b…ôla. Gazlavay a l…ôma b…ôla na, ta fa aŇčga. Ama nd…ôhay da b…ôla ta s…ôrmara ara aŇčga na, daa ba.
1.11: AŇčga ta sawa la aa hwayak aŇčga, ama nd…ôhay daa hwayak aŇčga ha ta t…ô…ďmara daa ba.

1.13: A t…ôram b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay na, anda b…ôzey ma yawa da hwa…ó Ňčgwas ba, asaya, anda mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma wu…óey Ňčga yey b…ôzey ba. Ama a t…ôram b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay na, maja ara Gazlavay a, ray aŇčga ma wu…óey amba a t…ôram b…ôz aŇčga hay.
1.14: Yaw, Mey aha, ta t…ôrey la Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč, ndaw a ta njey la da wuzlah ala. Maaya aŇčga a nd…ôvey ba, ta wuzd…ôrwa mey masa fara fara la da ray Gazlavay. Ala ta h…ôtmar g…ôdaŇč aŇčga la. G…ôdaŇč a na, ara g…ôdaŇč Ňčga B…ôzey-menduleŇč masa Papaha ma v…ôldara.
1.15: Daa masa JaŇč ma h…ôtar na, a wuzey mey da ray a saya, a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKe…óe ara ndaw masa yah maa guzley zleezle da ray a heyey, ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNdaw a sawa la fa d…ô…ďa a…óaw. AŇčga na, a f…ônya ta g…ôdaŇč, maja daa masa ya ta yawa daa ba araŇč na, ndaw aha aa daha cay.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
1.16: Ndaw aha, aa maaya kalah. Maaya aŇčga a nd…ôvey ba. Maaya aŇčga ha aa da ray al…ôkwa tabiya. Maja Ňčgene, aa fa p…ôsndakwar mey kalah ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
1.17: Gazlavay a v…ôldandakwara *mewey aŇčga na, ta har *Mawiz. Ama maaya aŇčga ta mey masa fara fara da ray a na, a sawa ta fa *Yesu *K…ôriste.
1.18: Kwa ndaw pal ta h…ôtar Gazlavay ta dey aŇčga daa ba s…ôlak. Ama B…ôzey-menduleŇč masa aa letek ta Gazlavay, manjakaya ta Papaha Bay Gazlavay na, ta wuzdandakwara Gazlavay a la. Mey da ray JaŇč-Baptis (Matiye 3.1-12; Mark 1.1-8; Luk 3.1-18)
1.19: -20 Pas pal daha, mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay da *Jeruzelem a sl…ôram nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay *Levi hay ta fa JaŇč. A sl…ôram Ňčgaa c…ôf…óam…ôrwa, aŇčga na, wa? JaŇč ta …ďey mey ta …ďey daa ba. Ta zlurey Ňčga mb…ô…ódatara daa ba, a wuzdatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęK…ôriste, ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay na, ara yah ba.¬Ľ
1.21: Aa c…ôf…óamara saya, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKaa kah na, wa? Kah na, *Eli daw?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKay! yah na, Eli ba.¬Ľ Aa c…ôf…óamara saya, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKah na, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa ala fa s…ôkwmara heyey daw?¬Ľ JaŇč a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKay! yah na, ndaw a ba.¬Ľ
1.22: Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara saya, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKaa kah na, wa d…ô…ďa wa? Wuzdandara amba ya diyam, ya kadamatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma sl…ôrdamand…ôrwa. Ka pada ray akah na, Ňčga wa?¬Ľ
1.23: *JaŇč a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYah na, ‚Äúndaw ma wudey da wuzlah-ley, ma l…ôvey: Bay al…ôkwa mahura fa sawa, …óiymara c…ôve…ó aŇčga d…ôr e.‚ÄĚ Mey a ke…óe na, ara anda Izay, ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley zleezle da ray a…óaw.¬Ľ
1.24: Da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma sl…ôrdamata fa JaŇč heyey na, *Fariza hay daha may.
1.25: Aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęDa kah, *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay ba, da kah, Eli ba, asaya, da kah ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey ba na, kaa ka katar *baptem a nd…ôhay na, kwara?¬Ľ
1.26: JaŇč a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYah na, ya kakwar baptem ta yam, ama ndaw da wuzlah akwar daha, masa ka s…ôrmara ba.
1.27: AŇčga na, a da sawa fa d…ô…ďa a…óaw, kwa ya fa da wusa Ňčga p…ôska zewe…ó Ňčga tarak aŇčga daa ba.¬Ľ
1.28: Mey a ke…óe tabiya, a key da slala Betani masa da dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa Ňčga JurdeŇč, slam masa JaŇč ma katar baptem a nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a. JaŇč-Baptis a wuzey mey da ray Yesu
1.29: Pep…ôrek e, *JaŇč a h…ôtar Yesu fa sawa Ňčgada fa v…ô…óa, ta‚Äô, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęN…ôkmara, B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay , ma da la meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay da b…ôla.
1.30: Ara ndaw masa yah maa guzley zleezle da ray a heyey, ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNdaw a sawa la fa d…ô…ďa a…óaw. AŇčga na, a f…ônya ta g…ôdaŇč, maja daa masa ya ta yawa daa ba araŇč na, ndaw aha aa daha cay.‚ÄĚ
1.31: Zleezle na, yah ta ray a…óaw, ya s…ôra ara wa ba. Ama ya sawa Ňčga wuzdatara ndaw aha a *Israyel hay ta *baptem masa yah ma ka ta yam.¬Ľ
1.32: JaŇč a wuzey mey da ray ndaw aha, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYah ma h…ôtar *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay la ta dey a…óaw fa pawa salay da gazlavay da va…ó anda makurgwadakw, a njey a ray a.
1.33: Daa masa yah ma h…ôtar na, kwa ya ta s…ôra daa ba araŇč, ama Bay Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdiwa Ňčga katar baptem a nd…ôhay ta yam ta wuzdiwa la, a l…ôvya: ‚ÄúNdaw masa kah ma da h…ôtar Mes…ôfney a…óaw ma da pawa salay a ray a na, ara aŇčga ma da katar baptem a nd…ôhay ta Mes…ôfney a…óaw.‚ÄĚ
1.34: Fara fara, yah, JaŇč, ya ta h…ôtar la ta dey a…óaw. Ya gwa Ňčga key sede da ray a, ya l…ôvey ndaw aha ara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ Gula hay Ňčga Yesu Ňčgeeme na, wa hay wa?
1.35: Pep…ôrek e, ata *JaŇč-Baptis ta gula aŇčga hay cew, ata daa slam mekey *baptem heyey saya.
1.36: Masa *JaŇč ma h…ôtar Yesu fa daw na, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęN…ôkmara, kata…óay na, *B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
1.37: Gula hay Ňčga JaŇč heyey a c…ôndamara mey a na, ta‚Äô, a diyam asi Yesu.
1.38: Yesu a mb…ô…óey dey fa d…ô…ďa na, a h…ôtatar gula hay Ňčga JaŇč heyey fa s…ôpmar wurzay, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa s…ôpam fa yah na, me?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ę Raabi , slam akah menjey na, dama?¬Ľ ( Raabi na, anda mel…ôvey ndaw maa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay.)
1.39: A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSamawa taw, ka h…ôtmar la.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, a diyam, a s…ôrmara slam aŇčga menjey heyey, a njam bama fete…óe haa pas a k…ôzley. (Daa masa ata ma cam ray ta Yesu na, gweegwe pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó.)
1.40: Ndaw pal dasi nd…ôhay cew masa ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis ma diyam asi Yesu heyey na, ara *And…ôre, m…ôlmaŇč Ňčga *SimaŇčw *Piyer.
1.41: Ata ma mb…ôkdamara Yesu la na, And…ôre a cam ray teese…ó na, ta m…ôlmaha SimaŇčw. A l…ôvar: ¬ęYa ta h…ôtmar *K…ôriste la.¬Ľ (K…ôriste anda mel…ôvey *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.)
1.42: Ta‚Äô, a handa SimaŇčw fa Yesu. Yesu a n…ôka SimaŇčw na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, SimaŇčw, b…ôzey Ňčga JaŇč, ama d…ôga wure ke…óe, a da z…ôlmaka Sefas.¬Ľ (Yaw, Sefas na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ¬ęP…ôra…ó¬Ľ .) Yesu a z…ôlta ata F…ôlep ta Nataniyel Ňčga key gula aŇčga hay
1.43: Pep…ôrek e, Yesu a wu…óey Ňčga daw aa hwayak Ňčga *Galile. A daw a h…ôtfar *F…ôlep, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSawa, s…ôpya.¬Ľ
1.44: (F…ôlep ara ndaw daa berney Ňčga Betsayda, berney masa ata *And…ôre ta *Piyer ma njam da hwa…ó a.)
1.45: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, F…ôlep a cam ray ta Nataniyel, a l…ôvar: ¬ęS…ôrfada zleezle na, *Mawiz ta wuzleley la daa …óerewel Ňčga kwakwas aŇčga da ray ndaw ma da sawa, ba diya? Asaya, nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta wuzlalam la da ray a may, ba diya? Ala ta h…ôtmar ndaw aha la. Ara Yesu, b…ôzey Ňčga *Jawzef. Ndaw aha, a sawa da *Nezeret.¬Ľ
1.46: Nataniyel a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęCek maaya a gwa a bawa da Nezeret may daw?¬Ľ F…ôlep a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSawa taw, ka h…ôtar la.¬Ľ
1.47: Masa Yesu ma h…ôtar Nataniyel fa sawa fa v…ô…óa na, aa guzley da ray a, a l…ôvey: ¬ęN…ôka, ndaw ke…óe na, ara ndaw *Israyel fara fara. Mevel aŇčga maaya, a mb…ôrzley ba.¬Ľ
1.48: Nataniyel aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa s…ôrya fa me?¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęD…ôga F…ôlep ta z…ôlkawa daa ba araŇč na, ya ta h…ôtka sem dasi wudez.¬Ľ
1.49: Nataniyel a mb…ô…ódara d…ô…ďa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, kah na, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay, kah bay Ňčga Israyel hay!¬Ľ
1.50: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa t…ô…ďa mey a…óaw maja yah ma l…ôvka yah ma h…ôtka la dasi wudez heyey daw? Yaw, ka h…ôtey maazla hay ma f…ôna Ňčgene la saya.¬Ľ
1.51: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ka da h…ôtmar slam da va…ó mawurkaya. MaslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay fa t…ôpam a va…ó, fa b…ôrŇčgamawa a hwayak, maja yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw.¬Ľ

2.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha …óar cew na, gwagway Ňčga meley kwakwa da Kana daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile daha. MamaŇč Ňčga Yesu, aŇčga fete…óe daa gwagway a.
2.2: Ta z…ôlmata ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay la aa gwagway a may.
2.3: Yaw, masa gwagway a ta nd…ôvey daa ba araŇč na, wuzam daa saba. MamaŇč Ňčga Yesu, ta‚Äô, aa guzlar a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęWuzam daa saba kaa na, kwara?¬Ľ
2.4: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMamay, walay al…ôkwa da hwa…ó a me? Pas masa yah ma da wuzda vaw a…óaw Ňčgada nd…ôhay, yah na, wa na, ta wuswa daa ba araŇč.¬Ľ
2.5: Ta‚Äô, mamaŇč Ňčga Yesu aa guzltar Ňčgada ma ka sl…ôra hay daa gwagway a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek masa aŇčga ma da l…ôvkwar tabiya Ňčga key na, kamara.¬Ľ
2.6: Fete…óe g…ôzla hay daha maakwaw, g…ôzla pal na, a key liter temere. Ara g…ôzla hay masa *J…ôwif hay ma pam yam a hwa…ó a Ňčga p…ôrey har ta Ňčga p…ôrey cek ata hay anda kwakwas ata ma l…ôvey.
2.7: Yesu aa guzltar Ňčgada ma ka sl…ôra hay heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęR…ôhdamata g…ôzla hay ke…óe ta yam.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, ma ka sl…ôra hay a, a r…ôhdamata pece pece.
2.8: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWure ke…óe kam yam a nek…ô…óey, handamara Ňčgada bay-ray Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga gwagway a.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a kamar, a handamar.
2.9: Bay-ray a, aa c…ôkda yam a, ama ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga wuzam. A s…ôra wuzam a, a sawa ta wura ba. Ama nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra hay heyey na, a s…ôrmara. Bay-ray Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga gwagway a, ta‚Äô, a z…ôl…ôrwa zel-kwakwa ha,
2.10: aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKwa waawa ma key gwagway Ňčga meley kwakwa na, a v…ôltar teese…ó a nd…ôhay maz…ôltakaya na, wuzam mec…ôrey kalah. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, da masa nd…ôhay maz…ôltakaya ha ta sam wuzam la ga na, a v…ôltar masa ma c…ôrey p…ôreh, ba diya? Ama Ňčga kah na, wuzam masa ma c…ôrey kalah na, ka …ďada haa wure ke…óe daw?¬Ľ
2.11: Yesu a ka maazla aŇčga Ňčgeeme ke…óe na, da Kana daa hwayak Ňčga Galile. Ta fa maazla ha ke…óe a wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč aŇčga. Da ray Ňčgene, gula aŇčga hay a pamara Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara.
2.12: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óam, a diyam a Kapernayum ta ata mamaha, m…ôlmaha hay, leŇč gula aŇčga hay. A njamawa fete…óe …óar nek…ô…óey. Yesu a …ď…ôlt…ôrwa nd…ôhay ma ka filaw daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay (Matiye 21.12, 13; Mark 11.15-17; Luk 19.45, 46)
2.13: Gwagway Ňčga *J…ôwif hay masa ata ma z…ôlmara *Pak gweegwe cay. Ta‚Äô, Yesu a sl…ôk…óey, a daw a *Jeruzelem Ňčga kawa gwagway a.
2.14: Masa aŇčga ma wusey la na, a mb…ôzey aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Fete…óe, a h…ôtfey nd…ôhay ma ka filaw Ňčga sla hay, Ňčga t…ô…ďaŇč hay leŇč Ňčga makurgwadakw hay. Asaya, a h…ôtfey nd…ôhay manjatakaya daa slam ata hay memb…ô…óey dala.
2.15: Ta‚Äô, a c…ômey laza Ňčga key laway, a …ď…ôlt…ôrwa nd…ôhay ma ka filaw tabiya ta t…ô…ďaŇč ata hay, leŇč sla ata hay daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a palah. A b…ôzlta taabal hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma mb…ô…óam dala heyey. Dala kwakwac! kwakwac! aa kwecey.
2.16: Aa guzltar Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma h…ô…ókadam makurgwadakw hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęBadamata cek hay a ke…óe la tabiya fe…óe! Ka da t…ôrdamara way Ňčga Papay, Bay Gazlavay, Ňčga way ma ka filaw ba.¬Ľ
2.17: Daa masa *gula hay Ňčga Yesu ma h…ôtmar cek masa Yesu ma ka na, a s…ôrfadamara mey mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey: ¬ęBay Gazlavay, way akah na, ya wu…óa kalah, haa ya v…ôlda ray a…óaw maja way a.¬Ľ
2.18: Mahura hay daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, aa guzlmar a Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKey maazla Ňčga wuzdandara kah ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga kata cek hay a ke…óe.¬Ľ
2.19: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęB…ôzlmara Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ke…óe, …óar maakar ya l…ôma la aa slam a.¬Ľ
2.20: Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęHaya! Mevey kwakwar m…ôfa…ó a ray a maakwaw, fa l…ômamara way a ke…óe. Ama kah, ka l…ôvey ka l…ôma la aa slam a …óar maakar na, kwara!¬Ľ
2.21: Yaw, Yesu maa guzley da ray Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, a key a Ňčgey mey da ray ray aŇčga.
2.22: Masa Yesu ma sl…ôk…óawa la daa mem…ôcey na, gula aŇčga hay a s…ôrfadamara mey da ray Way-mekey-kwakwas masa Yesu maa guzlda heyey. Da ray Ňčgene, a t…ô…ďmara mey daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya zleezle, asaya, a t…ô…ďmara mey masa Yesu maa guzlda. Yesu na, a s…ôra cek daa mevel Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč
2.23: Masa Yesu aa da *Jeruzelem Ňčga key gwagway Ňčga *Pak heyey na, ta key maazla hay la fete…óe. Nd…ôhay ga a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga maja ata ma h…ôtmar maazla hay masa aa ma kata.
2.24: Ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, Yesu ta pata Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay fara fara na, daa ba, maja a s…ôra mewulkey Ňčga nd…ôhay a tabiya.
2.25: Asaya, a wu…óey kwa ndaw a kadar mey da ray nd…ôhay ba, maja a s…ôra cek daa mevel Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč.

3.1: Ndaw daha, mez…ôley Nikwedem. Ara ndaw Fariza masa da wuzlah mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay.
3.2: Dasi tava…ó pal daha, ndaw aha a daw a h…ôtfar Yesu, aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, ya s…ôrmara ara Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdakawa Ňčgaa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay. Ya s…ôrmara, ma gwa Ňčga key maazla hay anda kah ma kata ke…óe na, si ndaw ma sawa ta fa Gazlavay.¬Ľ
3.3: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęEhe, ya fa l…ôvka fara fara, da ndaw ta yawa Ňčga dey cew daa ba na, aa da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata na, daa ba.¬Ľ
3.4: Nikwedem aa c…ôf…óa saya, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNdaw ta key mahura cay na, a gwa Ňčga yawa Ňčga dey cew saya daw? A gwa Ňčga v…ôhey a hwa…ó mamaha Ňčga yawa Ňčga dey cew daw?¬Ľ
3.5: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęFara fara, ya fa l…ôvka saya, da ndaw ta yawa ta fa yam, leŇč ta fa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba na, aa da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata na, daa ba.
3.6: Ndaw ma yawa da hwa…ó ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč na, ara ndaw gway, ama ndaw ma yawa ta fa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a, aa da ray a.
3.7: Ya ta l…ôvka la, si akwar nd…ôhay tabiya ka yamawa Ňčga dey cew. Yaw, ka da r…ôzley da ray mey a ba.
3.8: Wulkey da ray meme…ó mekey cey. Kwa daa wura daa wura na, fa key anda aa ma wu…óey. Ka fa c…ônda meeb…ôrey a, ama ka s…ôra a sawa dama ba, ka s…ôra a daw ama ba. Ndaw ma yawa ta fa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, aa k…ône may.¬Ľ
3.9: Ta‚Äô, Nikwedem a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęCek aha a da key na, kwara?¬Ľ
3.10: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah, ndaw mahura maa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay da *Israyel, ba diya? Kaa ka s…ôra cek aha ba, kwara?
3.11: Yaw, ya fa l…ôvka fara fara, yaa guzlam na, da ray cek masa ala ma s…ôrmara. Ya wuzam mey na, da ray cek masa ala ma h…ôtmar ta dey ala. Ama akwar na, ka wu…óam Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey ala ha ba.
3.12: N…ôka, da ya faa guzlkwar da ray cek hay ma kam da b…ôla ke…óe na, ka g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw ba. Kaa wara yaa guzlkwar da ray cek hay masa da gazlavay da va…ó na, ka da t…ô…ďmara kwara?
3.13: Kwa ndaw pal da b…ôla ta t…ôpey a gazlavay a va…ó na, daa ba. Si yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw ma b…ôrŇčgawa da va…ó a.
3.14: Zleezle masa *Mawiz aa da wuzlah-ley na, ta v…ô…óey zezekw Ňčga …ď…ôrey magaza la. A j…ôwa fa hwadam, ta‚Äô, a baŇčga…óa a va…ó. Yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, a da d…ôrmaya fa hwadam, a da baŇčga…óamaya a va…ó anda Ňčgene may,
3.15: amba kwa waawa ma paya Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara na, a h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba.¬Ľ
3.16: Yaw, Gazlavay a wu…óta nd…ôhay da b…ôla kalah, haa a sl…ôrd…ôrwa B…ôzey aŇčga menduleŇč amba kwa waawa ma pa Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara na, aa z…ô…óey ba, ama a h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba.
3.17: Gazlavay a sl…ôrd…ôrwa B…ôzey aŇčga a b…ôla na, Ňčga katar sariya a nd…ôhay Ňčgaa z…ô…óam ba, ama Ňčga l…ôham daa meb…ôrey ta fa aŇčga.
3.18: Ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga B…ôzey aŇčga na, Gazlavay fa da kar sariya amba aa z…ô…óey na, daa ba. Ama ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey aŇčga ba na, Gazlavay ta kar sariya cay la, maja aa ma pa B…ôzey-menduleŇč Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara ba.
3.19: Ahaw, Gazlavay ta sl…ôrd…ôrwa Mewe…óey aŇčga la a b…ôla, ama nd…ôhay a wu…óam mewe…óey a ba. A wu…óam na, l…ôvaŇč jak, maja ata fa kam cek hay malamba. Yaw, Gazlavay a da katar sariya Ňčgaa z…ô…ódata na, maja.
3.20: Kwa waawa ma key cek malamba na, a key a r…ôsa mewe…óey a, kwa fa da daw aa mewe…óey a daa ba. A zlurey maja cek hay malamba masa aŇčga ma kata ha, a da wuzmawa.
3.21: Ama ndaw masa fa key cek hay maaya na, a mb…ôzey aa mewe…óey a la, amba nd…ôhay a h…ôtmatar cek hay maaya masa aŇčga ma kata na, ara cek hay masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey. JaŇč-Baptis a wuzey mey da ray Yesu saya
3.22: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay a sl…ôk…óam da *Jeruzelem, a diyam aa slam mekele daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude he, a njam fete…óe ta gula aŇčga hay a, a katar *baptem a nd…ôhay.
3.23: *JaŇč-Baptis may, fa katar baptem a nd…ôhay. A katar baptem a na, da EnaŇčw gweegwe ta slala mez…ôley Salim, maja yam ga fete…óe daha. Nd…ôhay fa diyam fa ata, fa kamatar baptem.
3.24: Daa Ňčgene, ta k…ôrzamara JaŇč-Baptis aa f…ôrs…ône daa ba araŇč.
3.25: Gula hay Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis siya fa kam yawa ta ndaw *J…ôwif daha da ray mep…ôrey ta mep…ôrey cek hay Ňčga t…ôrey maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay anda kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay ma l…ôvey.
3.26: Gula hay Ňčga JaŇč-Baptis heyey a diyam fa *JaŇč a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, ka fa s…ôrfada ndaw masa akwar cew e da dey laŇčgar Ňčga wayam Ňčga JurdeŇč heyey, ba diya? N…ôka, nd…ôhay ga fa diyam la Ňčgada fa v…ô…óa, aa fa katar baptem kaa na, kwara?¬Ľ
3.27: JaŇč-Baptis e, a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMa gwa Ňčga key cek anda Ňčgene na, si ndaw masa Gazlavay ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč.
3.28: Akwar ray akwar ta c…ôndamara la ta sl…ômay akwar, yah ma l…ôvkwar: ‚ÄúYah na, *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay ba. Ama yah na, ndaw masa Gazlavay ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa teese…ó da ray a Ňčga …óiyey c…ôve…ó aŇčga.‚ÄĚ
3.29: Akwar fa s…ôrmara, da ndaw a ley Ňčgwas na, Ňčgwas aha ara Ňčgada ndaw aha. Ama gula-maŇčgasl manjakaya da cakay a Ňčga j…ôna, a c…ônda …óay aŇčga na, aa s…ômey. Ara anda ke…óe, wure ke…óe yah daa mees…ômey masa fara fara.
3.30: Anja sl…ômay Ňčga ndaw aha Ňčga z…ôley ma f…ôna Ňčga yah.¬Ľ Mey da ray Yesu, ndaw ma sawa ta da va…ó
3.31: Ndaw ma sawa ta da gazlavay da va…ó na, a f…ônta nd…ôhay tabiya. Ndaw masa da b…ôla na, ara ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč gway. Anda ke…óe, aa guzley na, si da ray cek hay masa ma kam da b…ôla gway. Ndaw ma sawa ta da gazlavay da va…ó na, [a f…ônta nd…ôhay tabiya.]
3.32: Anda ke…óe, aa guzley da ray cek masa aŇčga ma h…ôtar ta dey aŇčga, ta masa aŇčga ma c…ônda ta sl…ômay aŇčga, ama nd…ôhay a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ha ba c…ôŇčga.
3.33: Ndaw masa ma t…ô…ďa mey aŇčga ha la na, a key a wuzdatara a nd…ôhay na, Gazlavay ara ndaw ma mb…ôrzley ba fara fara.
3.34: Ndaw masa Gazlavay ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa na, aa guzley mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay, maja Gazlavay ta v…ôlda Mes…ôfney aŇčga tabiya sem a ray a.
3.35: Gazlavay PapaŇč, a wu…óa B…ôzey aŇčga, ta v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč la amba a wey da ray cek hay c…ôpa.
3.36: Kwa waawa ma pa B…ôzey a Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara na, a h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba la. Ama kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďra mey aŇčga ba na, fa da h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba daa ba. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay fa cey mevel da ray a mandaw mandaw.

4.1: -3 Nd…ôhay *Fariza hay a c…ôndamara na, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu ga, a f…ôna Ňčga *JaŇč-Baptis, asaya, Yesu fa katar *baptem a nd…ôhay ga, a f…ôna JaŇč-Baptis a. (Fara fara na, Yesu, ta ray aŇčga ta key baptem kwa Ňčgada ndaw pal daa ba. Ama ara gula aŇčga hay ma kamara gway.) Masa Yesu ma c…ônda mey masa Fariza hay maa guzldamara heyey na, a sl…ôk…óey daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude, a v…ôhey a *Galile.
4.4: Ňäga wusey a Galile he na, si a daw ta da *Samari.
4.5: Daa madaw aŇčga ha na, a wusey aa hwayak Ňčga Samari, a slala Sikar gweegwe ta ley daha. Ara ley masa *Jakwap ma v…ôldara zleezle Ňčgada b…ôzey aŇčga *Jawzef.
4.6: ∆Ā…ôlndaw Ňčga Jakwap a fete…óe daha. Yesu a g…ôrey Ňčga madaw. Ta‚Äô, a m…ôskey vaw da mey …ď…ôlndaw a. Ara gweegwe da wuzlah-pas.
4.7: Wure Ňčgene, Ňčgwas Samari daha, a daw Ňčga t…ô…ókawa yam daa …ď…ôlndaw a. Ta‚Äô, Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęV…ôlya yam Ňčga sey cey.¬Ľ
4.8: Daa Ňčgene, gula hay Ňčga Yesu ata sem a slala Ňčga h…ô…ókawa cek mez…ômey.
4.9: Ňägwas Samari kaa, a mb…ô…ódara a Yesu, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, ndaw *J…ôwif, ba diya? Kaa, kaa c…ôf…óey yam Ňčga sey fa yah, Ňčgwas Samari na, kwara?¬Ľ (Ňägwas aha aa guzley anda ke…óe na, maja nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay a zl…ôram ta nd…ôhay Samari hay ba s…ôlak.)
4.10: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa ka s…ôra maaya masa Gazlavay ma ka Ňčgada ndaw, asaya, da ka s…ôrya, yah, ndaw maa c…ôf…óafaka yam Ňčga sey ke…óe na, anja ara kah ma daa c…ôf…óafaya yam jak. Anda ke…óe, ya da v…ôlka yam masa ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba.¬Ľ
4.11: Ňägwas a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęPapay a…óaw, cek met…ô…ókey yam fa kah daa ba, asaya, …ď…ôlndaw a, aa seleleŇč. Kaa ka da h…ôt…ôrwa yam ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba ha na, dama?
4.12: ∆Ā…ôlndaw a ke…óe na, ara papaŇč Ňčga papa ala Jakwap ma zl…ô…óndara. AŇčga ta b…ôz aŇčga hay leŇč g…ônaw aŇčga hay ta sam yam a la may. Kaa kah na, ka f…ôna Jakwap daw?¬Ľ
4.13: Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęKwa waawa ma sey yam a ke…óe, yam a kar la c…ôŇčga.
4.14: Ama ndaw ma da sey yam masa yah ma da v…ôldara na, kwa yam fa da kar daa saba s…ôlak. Yam a, a da njey daa aŇčga, a nd…ôvey ba, asaya, a da v…ôlar heter mend…ôvey ba.¬Ľ
4.15: Ňägwas a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęPapay a…óaw, v…ôlya yam a may taw, amba yam a kaya saba, asaya, amba ya sawa Ňčga t…ô…ókey yam fe…óe saba na!¬Ľ
4.16: Yesu aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDaw, z…ôl…ôrwa zel akah, samawa fe…óe.¬Ľ
4.17: Ňägwas a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYah na, zel a…óaw daa ba.¬Ľ Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah maa guzley la, ara aŇčga. Ahaw, zel akah daa ba,
4.18: maja ka ta ley zel hay la zlam, asaya, ndaw masa akwar cew e wure ke…óe na, ara zel akah ba fara. Ka taa guzley la ara aŇčga.¬Ľ
4.19: Ňägwas a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęPapay a…óaw, ya n…ôkaka ke…óe na, kah, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
4.20: PapaŇč Ňčga papa ala hay a d…ôram daŇčgay Ňčgada Gazlavay na, daa aŇčgwa ke…óe. Ama akwar J…ôwif hay, ka l…ôvam slam med…ôrey-daŇčgay Ňčgada Gazlavay na, si da *Jeruzelem gway.¬Ľ
4.21: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKwakwa, j…ôkfaya sl…ômay. Pas a, a wuswa la masa nd…ôhay a da d…ôrmar daŇčgay a Papay, Bay Gazlavay, kwa daa wura daa wura. Fa da diyam Ňčga d…ôrwa daŇčgay daa aŇčgwa ke…óe ta da Jeruzelem daada na, daa ba.
4.22: Akwar Samari hay, akwar fa d…ôram daŇčgay, ama ka s…ôrmara ndaw masa akwar ma d…ôrmar daŇčgay a ba. Ala J…ôwif hay na, ya s…ôrmara ndaw masa ala ma d…ôrmar daŇčgay, maja ndaw ma da l…ôhdata nd…ôhay na, a bawa daa s…ôkway ala J…ôwif hay.
4.23: Pas a fa sawa, ta wuswa cay, masa nd…ôhay ma nam ray a Bay Gazlavay PapaŇč fara fara na, a namar ray la ta mevel pal ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Mes…ôfney aŇčga. Bay Gazlavay PapaŇč a wu…óta nd…ôhay ma namar ray anda Ňčgene.
4.24: Gazlavay na, ara Mes…ôfney, ndaw a gwa Ňčga h…ôtar ta dey ba. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay ma namar ray na, si a namar ray ta mevel pal, ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Mes…ôfney aŇčga.¬Ľ
4.25: Ňägwas a, a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa s…ôra *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay na, a sawa la. Da masa ta sawa cay na, a wuzdandara cek hay tabiya maaya maaya la.¬Ľ
4.26: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęK…ôriste he na, ara yah, ndaw masa maa guzlka ke…óe.¬Ľ
4.27: Daa masa Yesu faa guzlam ta Ňčgwas Samari ke…óe heyey na, gula aŇčga hay a v…ôhmawa, a r…ôzlam ga maja aa faa guzley ta Ňčgwas. Ama kwa ndaw pal taa c…ôf…óa Ňčgwas aha: ¬ęKa wu…óey fa ndaw a me?¬Ľ na, daa ba. Asaya, kwa ndaw pal taa c…ôf…óa Yesu: ¬ęKaa guzlam ta Ňčgwas aha maja me?¬Ľ na, daa ba.
4.28: Ňägwas aha, mbak! a mb…ôkda kwakulam aŇčga da mey yam a, ta‚Äô, a v…ôhey a slala. A daw a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay:
4.29: ¬ęSamawa ta n…ôkmara ndaw katay cey, aa guzlya da ray cek masa yah ma kata tabiya! Da ara K…ôriste, ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay heyey kwa!¬Ľ
4.30: Nd…ôhay a, a bamawa daa berney a, ta‚Äô, a diyam Ňčgada fa Yesu a.
4.31: Masa Ňčgwas aha ta v…ôhey sem a slala heyey na, gula hay Ňčga Yesu aa guzlmar a Yesu a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, z…ômey cek d…ô…ďa.¬Ľ
4.32: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek a…óaw mez…ômey daha masa akwar ma s…ôrmara ba.¬Ľ
4.33: Gula aŇčga hay aa c…ôf…óam vaw da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęHaya! Ndaw mekele ta handar cek Ňčga z…ômey la daw?¬Ľ
4.34: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek a…óaw mez…ômey na, ara mekey cek ma mbafar a ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa, asaya, ara Ňčga nd…ôvda sl…ôra masa aa ma v…ôldiwa Ňčga key.
4.35: Ka wulkam, ka l…ôvam: ‚ÄúWure ke…óe mend…ôrey kiya m…ôfa…ó Ňčga kawa cek da ley.‚ÄĚ Yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar, n…ôkam dey, cek da ley ta key cay, mend…ôrey Ňčga kawa.
4.36: Ndaw ma karawa cek da ley a na, ta h…ôtey mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga cay. Da ray Ňčgene, ndaw ma sl…ôka cek aha ta ndaw ma karawa cek aha da ley aa s…ômam daa slam a. Ara k…ône may, Ňčgada ndaw ma z…ôlwa nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba.
4.37: Mey a daha a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNdaw a sl…ôka daw, ama ma da karawa a way na, ndaw mekele.‚ÄĚ Mey a ke…óe ara aŇčga fara.
4.38: Ya ta sl…ôrdakwar la Ňčga kawa cek da ley masa akwar ma h…ôvmara ba. Ma h…ôvmara na, nd…ôhay mekele, ama ara akwar ma da z…ômam wiya da ray cek ata ha.¬Ľ
4.39: Nd…ôhay Samari hay ga da slala ha, a pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara maja Ňčgwas aha ma l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw aha aa guzlya da ray cek hay masa yah ma kata tabiya.¬Ľ
4.40: Maja Ňčgene, ata ma wusmawa fa Yesu heyey na, a kamar ambahw Ňčga njey ta ata. Yesu, ta‚Äô, a njey ta ata …óar cew, aŇčga faa s…ôrkadata.
4.41: Masa ata ma c…ôndamara mey aŇčga ha la na, nd…ôhay ga mekele saya a t…ô…ďmara mey a.
4.42: Ta‚Äô, aa guzlmar a Ňčgwas a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęYa pamara Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara na, ara maja kah ma l…ôvndar heyey daada ba, ama maja ala ma c…ôndamara mey aŇčga ta sl…ômay ala. Wure ke…óe, ya ta s…ôrmara cay, fara fara ara aŇčga ndaw ma da l…ôhdata nd…ôhay da b…ôla.¬Ľ Yesu a mb…ôlda b…ôzey Ňčga ndaw mahura Ňčga Ňčgwamna
4.43: Yesu ma key la …óar cew da *Samari na, ta‚Äô, a daw aa hwayak Ňčga *Galile heyey d…ô…ďa.
4.44: Yesu ta ray aŇčga taa guzley la, a l…ôvey: ¬ę*Ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, nd…ôhay daa hwayak aŇčga a r…ôsmara.¬Ľ
4.45: Ama masa Yesu ma wusey la a Galile na, nd…ôhay fete…óe, a t…ô…ďmara maaya maaya, maja ata ma h…ôtmar maazla hay masa aŇčga ma kata la tabiya daa masa ata ma diyam aa gwagway Ňčga *Pak da *Jeruzelem.
4.46: Yesu ta‚Äô, a daw a Kana saya, daa hwayak Ňčga Galile he, a slala masa aa ma t…ôrda yam Ňčga wuzam heyey. Fete…óe, ndaw mahura Ňčga Ňčgwamna daha, b…ôzey aŇčga vaw fa car. B…ôzey a, a lawa da Kapernayum.
4.47: Masa ndaw aha ma c…ônda Yesu ta sl…ôk…óey sem da *Jude Ňčgada Galile na, aŇčga may, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey a daw fa Yesu a, a kar ambahw amba a diyam cew e, Ňčga mb…ôld…ôrwa b…ôzey aŇčga da Kapernayum, maja b…ôzey aŇčga ha fa da m…ôcey.
4.48: Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęAkwar siya hay, da ka ta h…ôtam maazla hay ma r…ôzla ndaw daa ba na, anja akwar fa da t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw daa ba, ba diya?¬Ľ
4.49: Ndaw mahura Ňčga Ňčgwamna heyey a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, nakwa la fiyaw fiyaw maja b…ôzey a…óaw a fa …ď…ôrzley.¬Ľ
4.50: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęDaw a way, b…ôzey akah a mb…ôley la.¬Ľ Ndaw aha, a t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu heyey, ta‚Äô, a daw.
4.51: Masa aŇčga fa daw Ňčgada way na, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay a cadamara ray daa c…ôve…ó, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęB…ôzey akah ta mb…ôley cay.¬Ľ
4.52: Ndaw aha aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęB…ôzey a, a key Ňčgama ha na, d…ôga Ňčga vara?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęA kar Ňčgama, awaw fa vaw daa saba na, d…ôga Ňčgaa kwana ta …ď…ôrey pal Ňčgaa pas.¬Ľ
4.53: Anda ke…óe, ndaw aha, a s…ôra b…ôzey aŇčga a key Ňčgama na, daa masa Yesu maa guzlar, ma l…ôvar: ¬ęB…ôzey akah a mb…ôley la¬Ľ heyey. Da ray Ňčgene, aŇčga ta nd…ôhay da way aŇčga tabiya a pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara.
4.54: Ke…óe he, ara maazla Ňčga dey cew e masa Yesu ma ka daa masa aŇčga ma sl…ôk…óey da Jude Ňčgada Galile.

5.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *J…ôwif hay a kam gwagway da *Jeruzelem. Yesu, ta‚Äô, a daw aa gwagway a may.
5.2: Daa berney Ňčga Jeruzelem e, gweegwe ta mey-mbew mahura memb…ôzey aa berney a, mez…ôley Slam-memb…ôzey Ňčga t…ô…ďaŇč hay, wurak Ňčga yam daha. Wurak a na, a z…ôlmara ta mey *Heb…ôre ¬ęBetzata¬Ľ. Ray a mazl…ôrkaya ta balak hay zlam.
5.3: Dasi balak hay a na, masa-b…ôle hay ga manatakaya: wulaf hay daha, jegwer hay daha, maah…ôl…ďatakaya hay daha. [Ata manjatakaya fa s…ôkwmara amba yam a wusey,
5.4: maja *maslaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay fa pawa salay aa wurak aha, fa wusa yam a. Ndaw ma mb…ôzey teese…ó aa yam ma wusey a na, a mb…ôley kwa daa macay wura wura c…ôpa.]
5.5: Fete…óe, ndaw daha aŇčga maah…ôl…ďakaya d…ôga mevey kwakwar maakar a ray a daaŇčgafa…ó.
5.6: Masa Yesu ma h…ôtar ndaw aha manakaya na, a s…ôra aŇčga maah…ôl…ďakaya menjey ga. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa wu…óey Ňčga mb…ôley daw?¬Ľ
5.7: Ndaw aha a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, masa yam fa wusey daa wurak na, kwa ndaw Ňčga mb…ôzdaya aa yam a daa ba. Da ya l…ôvey, ya daw may na, ndaw mekele ta mb…ôzey sem teese…ó da ray a…óaw.¬Ľ
5.8: Yesu aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, la geg…ôde…ó akah, daw ta salay akah.¬Ľ
5.9: Wure wure Ňčgene, ndaw aha ta mb…ôley sem, ta‚Äô, a la geg…ôde…ó aŇčga, a daw. Yesu a mb…ôlda ndaw a na, ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw.
5.10: Masa mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay ma h…ôtmar ndaw aha fa la geg…ôde…ó aŇčga na, aa guzlmar, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęTasana na, *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, ba diya? Kaa kwakwas al…ôkwa a v…ôlka c…ôve…ó Ňčga la geg…ôde…ó akah gway daw?¬Ľ
5.11: A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNdaw ma mb…ôldaya na, a l…ôvya ‚ÄúLa geg…ôde…ó akah, daw ta salay akah.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
5.12: Mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay aa c…ôf…óamara saya, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAra ndaw a wura, ma l…ôvka ‚Äúla geg…ôde…ó akah, daw‚ÄĚ ke…óe na!¬Ľ
5.13: Ama ndaw aha na, a s…ôra ndaw masa ma mb…ôlda ha saba, maja Yesu taa z…ô…ófar sem da wuzlah nd…ôhay ga fete…óe.
5.14: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a cam ray ta ndaw aha daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęN…ôka, wure ke…óe, ka ta mb…ôley cay. Ka da key meb…ôrey saba, daa ba na, banay mahura ma f…ôna ke…óe, a h…ôtfaka la.¬Ľ
5.15: Ndaw aha ta‚Äô, a daw fa mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAra Yesu ma mb…ôldaya.¬Ľ
5.16: Da ray Ňčgene, a zlamar Ňčga cekeley mey fa Yesu, maja aa ma mb…ôlda ndaw aha ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw.
5.17: Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęPapay Bay Gazlavay fa key sl…ôra mandaw mandaw, yah may, ya key sl…ôra mandaw mandaw anda aŇčga.¬Ľ
5.18: Mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay heyey a s…ôpam dabaray ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga k…ô…ómara Yesu vagay maja aa maa guzltar a. Ma catar mevel na, mey da ray pas mem…ôskey-vaw daada saba, ama maja aa ma z…ôla Gazlavay Papaha. Ňägene, a key a pa ray aŇčga Ňčga Gazlavay. Mey da ray g…ôdaŇč masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldara a Yesu
5.19: Yesu aa guzltar a mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay ma cakalafamar mey heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, yah B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay, ya gwa Ňčga key cek taava a…óaw ba. Ya n…ôkey dey na, fa cek masa Papay ma ka, fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya ka anda aŇčga.
5.20: Fara fara, Papay na, a wu…óya, yah B…ôzey aŇčga, asaya, aa fa wuzdatiwa cek hay tabiya masa aŇčga ray aŇčga ma kata. A da wuzya cek hay ga ma r…ôzlam ndaw ma f…ôna masa akwar ma h…ôtmar ke…óe. Ka r…ôzlam la ga maja.
5.21: Yaw, Papay fa sl…ôk…óadat…ôrwa nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey, fa v…ôltar heter. Yah, B…ôzey aŇčga may, ya da v…ôltar heter a nd…ôhay masa yah ma wu…óey Ňčga v…ôldatara.
5.22: Yaw, ma da katar sariya a nd…ôhay na, ara Papay ba, ama ara yah, maja ta v…ôlya c…ôve…ó la Ňčga katar sariya a nd…ôhay,
5.23: amba nd…ôhay a namaya ray anda ata ma namar ray a Papay. Da ndaw a naya ray, yah, B…ôzey aŇčga ba na, fa da nar ray a Papay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa daa ba may.
5.24: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da ndaw fa j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey a…óaw, asaya, da ndaw fa t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Papay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa na, ndaw aha ta h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba cay. Sariya Ňčgaa z…ô…óda daa ba, ama ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey.
5.25: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, pas a, a sawa la, ta wuswa cay, masa nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya a da c…ôndamara …óay a…óaw, yah, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay. Nd…ôhay ma c…ôndamara, ma t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw na, a da njam ta dey.
5.26: Papay aa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga v…ôley heter. Anda ke…óe, ta v…ôldiwa g…ôdaŇč a la Ňčgada yah, B…ôzey aŇčga may, amba ya v…ôltar heter a nd…ôhay.
5.27: Asaya, ta v…ôlya c…ôve…ó la Ňčga katar sariya a nd…ôhay, maja yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw.
5.28: -29 Pas a, a wuswa la masa nd…ôhay da v…ôge…ó a da c…ôndamara …óay a…óaw, asaya, a da bamawa daa c…ôvay ata hay. Ka da r…ôzlam fa cek hay a Ňčgene ba. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay manjar meb…ôrey na, a da sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey, a da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba, ama nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey na, yah, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay, ya da katar sariya Ňčgaa z…ô…ódata.
5.30: ¬ęYah na, ya gwa Ňčga key cek taava a…óaw ba, ama si ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay. Da ya fa key sariya a ndaw na, ya ka anda Gazlavay ma l…ôvya. Sariya masa yah ma da ka na, aa fara fara, maja ya ka ta c…ôve…ó e anda Gazlavay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa, ma l…ôvya Ňčga ka.¬Ľ Mey da ray nd…ôhay ma kam sede da ray Yesu
5.31: Yesu aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ya key sede da ray a…óaw na, kaa wara nd…ôhay a da s…ôrmara mey masa yah maa guzlda, ara mey fara fara na, kwara?
5.32: Ama ara ndaw mekele ma key sede da ray a…óaw. Ya s…ôra, sede masa aa ma ka da ray a…óaw a na, aa fara fara.
5.33: Akwar na, ka ta sl…ôram nd…ôhay fa *JaŇč-Baptis la. AŇčga taa guzlkwar la da ray mey masa fara fara.
5.34: Ama yah na, walay a…óaw ta ndaw amba a key sede da ray a…óaw na, daa ba. Yaa guzlkwar da ray JaŇč-Baptis na, ya wu…óey amba ka t…ô…ďmara Gazlavay a l…ôhdakwar daa meb…ôrey.
5.35: JaŇč-Baptis a na, aŇčga anda pet…ôrla mag…ô…ókaya Ňčga wa…óa slam kwe…óek! kwe…óek! Pas pal daha akwar taa s…ômam la daa mewe…óey aŇčga ha.
5.36: Cek ma f…ôna mey masa JaŇč-Baptis maa guzley da ray a…óaw na, daha. Cek aha na, ara sl…ôra masa Papay ma v…ôldiwa Ňčga key. Sl…ôra masa yah ma ka ha na, fa wuzda fara fara ara Papay ma sl…ôrdiwa.
5.37: Papay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa may, aŇčga ray aŇčga taa guzley la da ray a…óaw, yah, B…ôzey aŇčga. Ama akwar ma c…ôndamara …óay aŇčga daa ba, akwar ma h…ôtmar ta dey akwar daa ba may.
5.38: Akwar fa r…ôsmara mey aŇčga, maja akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw, yah, B…ôzey aŇčga masa aŇčga ma sl…ôrdiwa na, daa ba.
5.39: ¬ęAkwar faa s…ôrkam mey Ňčga Gazlavay maaya maaya amba ka h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba ta fa v…ô…óa. Ahaw, fara fara mey Ňčga Gazlavay a na, aa guzley da ray a…óaw.
5.40: Ama Ňčga h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba ha na, ka wu…óam Ňčga samawa fa yah ba.
5.41: ¬ęYah na, ya fa s…ôpey amba nd…ôhay aa h…ômdamaya daa ba.
5.42: Ama akwar na, ya s…ôra mewulkey akwar. Akwar fa wu…ómara Gazlavay daa ba.
5.43: Yah na, ara Papay Bay Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdiwa, ka g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmaya ba. Ama da ndaw mekele a sawa saw Ňčga ray aŇčga gway na, ka t…ô…ďmara jak.
5.44: Ka wu…óam amba nd…ôhay aa h…ômdamakwar. Ama ka wu…óam amba Gazlavay masa fara fara aa h…ômdakwar ba jak. Kaa wara ka da t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw na, kwara?
5.45: ¬ęKa wulkam ara yah ma da wudkwar fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay daw? Ara yah ba, ara *Mawiz ma da wudkwar, ndaw masa akwar ma wulkam a l…ôhdakwar la.
5.46: Da fara fara akwar ta t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Mawiz la na, ka t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw la may, maja Mawiz a, a wuzleley na, da ray a…óaw.
5.47: Da ka t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Mawiz ma wuzlala da ray a…óaw a ba na, kaa wara ka da t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw na, kwara?¬Ľ

6.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a sl…ôk…óey, a zl…ôŇčgey a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa Ňčga *Galile. A z…ôlmara d…ôhwa ha saya, d…ôhwa Ňčga Tiberiyat.
6.2: Nd…ôhay ga fa s…ôpmar wurzay, maja ata ma h…ôtam maazla hay masa Yesu ma kata Ňčga mb…ôley masa-macay hay.
6.3: Ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay, ta‚Äô, a t…ôpam aa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa, a njam fete…óe.
6.4: Daa Ňčgene, gwagway Ňčga *J…ôwif hay mez…ôley *Pak gweegwe cay.
6.5: Yesu a baŇčga…óa dey na, a h…ôtey nd…ôhay ga fa samawa Ňčgada fa v…ô…óa. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa *F…ôlep, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa da h…ô…ókakurwa cek mez…ômey Ňčgada nd…ôhay tabiya ke…óe na, dama?¬Ľ
6.6: Yesu aa guzlar anda Ňčgene na, a key a jada F…ôlep maja aŇčga na, ta s…ôra cek masa aa ma da ka sem.
6.7: F…ôlep a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKwa gabal temere cew na, fa da wusa Ňčga h…ô…ókawa cek mez…ômey amba kwa waawa a h…ôtey nek…ô…óey nek…ô…óey na, daa ba.¬Ľ
6.8: Gula mekele da wuzlah gula aŇčga hay mez…ôley *And…ôre, masa m…ôlmaŇč Ňčga *SimaŇčw *Piyer, aa guzlar, a l…ôvar:
6.9: ¬ęB…ôz-gula fe…óe daha, aŇčga ta peŇč zlam leŇč ewet cew. Kaa Ňčgada nd…ôhay ga ke…óe na, a da wusey wa?¬Ľ
6.10: Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęL…ôvmatar a nd…ôhay Ňčga njam a hwayak.¬Ľ Daa slam a Ňčgene kwakwas map…ôckaya daha, ta‚Äô, a njam fete…óe. Zel hay daa slam aha, a key gabal zlam.
6.11: Yesu hal! a h…ôlta peŇč hay a, a kar suse a Gazlavay, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a wunkatara a nd…ôhay a. A h…ôla ewet, a ka k…ône saya. A z…ômamara, a r…ôham, siya mbak!
6.12: Masa ata ma r…ôham cay na, Yesu aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCakalamara siya masa mamb…ôkakaya, kwa kuset ke…óe a da n…ôsey Ňčga tede ba.¬Ľ
6.13: Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a cakalamara siya Ňčga peŇč zlam masa ata ma z…ômamara heyey na, a r…ôhey gadakar kuraw a ray a cew.
6.14: Masa nd…ôhay ma h…ôtmar maazla masa Yesu ma ka na, aa guzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęFara fara, ndaw ke…óe ara *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa ma l…ôvam zleezle a da sawa a b…ôla heyey.¬Ľ
6.15: Ama Yesu a s…ôra a da samawa Ňčga pamara aa bay Ňčga g…ôdaŇč. Maja Ňčgene, a mb…ôkdata, a t…ôpey Ňčgada aŇčgwa saya, a njey taava aŇčga fete…óe. Yesu a daw ta salay da ray d…ôhwa Ňčga Galile (Matiye 14.22-33; Mark 6.45-52)
6.16: Taa kwa…ó a Ňčgene, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a b…ôrŇčgamawa daa aŇčgwa Ňčgada mey d…ôhwa.
6.17: Ta‚Äô, a t…ôpam aa kwambiwal, a diyam a Kapernayum a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa ha. Tava…ó a k…ôrzata daa masa ata fa t…ôŇčgam. Ama Yesu ta wusey a cakay ata daa ba araŇč.
6.18: Meme…ó fa key ga. Yam fa cewesley.
6.19: Masa gula hay Ňčga Yesu a, fa diyam ta kwambiwal, a key k…ôlemeeter zlam da daa ba maakwaw na, a h…ôtmar Yesu gweegwe ta ata, fa daw ta salay da ray yam a. Da ray Ňčgene, mand…ôrzay a katar.
6.20: Ama Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAra yah, ka da zluram ba!¬Ľ
6.21: Da ray Ňčgene, a wu…óam Ňčga lamara aa kwambiwal a, ama wure wure Ňčgene, kwambiwal a ta wusey sem a rav-zazay aa slam masa ata ma diyam aha. Nd…ôhay ga a s…ôpmara Yesu
6.22: Pep…ôrek e, nd…ôhay ga ma lamawa ta dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa heyey, a n…ôkmara na, ara kwambiwal pal daa slam aha daada. Asaya, a s…ôrmara Yesu ta t…ôpey aa kwambiwal a ta gula aŇčga hay daa ba, ama ara gula aŇčga hay taava ata ma t…ôpam aa kwambiwal a Ňčga t…ôŇčgey a dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa.
6.23: Ama fa d…ô…ďa ha, kwambiwal hay mekele a samawa da Tiberiyat, aa slam masa nd…ôhay ga ma z…ômam peŇč masa Bay Mahura ma kar suse a Gazlavay maja heyey.
6.24: Yaw, nd…ôhay ga heyey, a n…ôkmara na, ata Yesu ta gula aŇčga hay, ata fete…óe daa saba. Da ray Ňčgene, a t…ôpam kwambiwal hay ma samawa da Tiberiyat heyey, a diyam Ňčgada Kapernayum, a s…ôpmara Yesu. Yesu, aŇčga …óaf ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba
6.25: Nd…ôhay ga heyey a t…ôŇčgam ta kwambiwal hay a h…ôtfamar Yesu aa ta dey laŇčgar Ňčga d…ôhwa. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, ka sawa fe…óe kaa na, kwara? Ka wuswa Ňčga vara?¬Ľ
6.26: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ka s…ôpmaya na, maja akwar ma h…ôtam maazla masa yah ma ka ba. Ama ka s…ôpmaya na, maja akwar ma z…ômam cek haa ka r…ôham.
6.27: Ka da s…ôpam Ňčga h…ôtey …óaf ma da n…ôsey da b…ôla ke…óe ba. Ama s…ôpam Ňčga h…ôtey …óaf mev…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba. ∆äaf mev…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba ha na, ara yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw ma da v…ôldakwara, maja Papay, Bay Gazlavay, ta wuzda la ara aŇčga ma v…ôldiwa g…ôdaŇč a.¬Ľ
6.28: Nd…ôhay a, aa c…ôf…óamara Yesu saya, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, kaa ya da kam sl…ôra ma mbafar a Gazlavay na, wura?¬Ľ
6.29: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSl…ôra ma mbafar a Gazlavay na, ara mepey ndaw masa aŇčga ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara.¬Ľ
6.30: Aa guzlmar a Yesu, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKandar maazla masa ala ma da h…ôtmar ta dey ala, amba ya s…ôrmara ara Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdakawa, asaya, ya pamaka Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara. Kaa ka da kandar maazla ha na, wura?
6.31: Zleezle, papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay ta z…ômam cek mez…ôley ‚Äúman‚ÄĚ la da wuzlah-ley. Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúTa v…ôltar cek mez…ômey la ma kwiywa ta da va…ó.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
6.32: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ma v…ôlkwar cek mez…ômey ma kwiywa ta da va…ó na, ara *Mawiz ba, ama ara Gazlavay Papay ma v…ôlkwar cek mez…ômey masa fara fara ma kwiywa ta da va…ó.
6.33: Ahaw, cek mez…ômey masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldakwara na, ara ndaw ma pawa salay ta da va…ó. Ara aŇčga ma da v…ôltar heter mend…ôvey ba a nd…ôhay da b…ôla.¬Ľ
6.34: A mb…ô…ódamara a Yesu d…ô…ďa, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala, na v…ôlndar cek mez…ômey a Ňčgene mandaw mandaw taw!¬Ľ
6.35: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYah na, …óaf mev…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba. Da ndaw ta sawa la asi a…óaw na, may fa da car daa saba, asaya, da ndaw ma paya la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara na, yam fa da kar daa saba may.
6.36: Ya taa guzlkwar la, ya l…ôvkwar: ‚ÄúAkwar ma h…ôtmaya la ta dey akwar, ama ka t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw ba c…ôŇčga.‚ÄĚ
6.37: Nd…ôhay tabiya masa Papay ma v…ôldatiwa na, a samawa la asi a…óaw. Ndaw ma sawa asi a…óaw na, ya fa da …ď…ôla daa ba,
6.38: maja ya pawa salay da va…ó na, Ňčga key cek anda yah ma wu…óey ba, ama Ňčga key cek anda Gazlavay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa, ma wu…óey.
6.39: Gazlavay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa, a wu…óey nd…ôhay masa aa ma v…ôldatiwa na, yaa z…ô…óey kwa pal da wuzlah ata ba. Ama ya da sl…ôk…óadat…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey ta pas masa b…ôla ma da nd…ôvey.
6.40: Cek ma mbafar a Papay na, anja nd…ôhay tabiya ma s…ôrmaya, yah, B…ôzey aŇčga, ta ma pamaya Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara na, Ňčga h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba. Ya da sl…ôk…óadat…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey ta pas masa b…ôla ma da nd…ôvey.¬Ľ
6.41: Masa Yesu ma l…ôvey ¬ęYah na, …óaf ma pawa salay ta da va…ó¬Ľ heyey na, *J…ôwif hay aa Ňčguram mey da ray a,
6.42: a l…ôvam: ¬ęAŇčga na, Yesu, b…ôzey Ňčga *Jawzef, ba diya? Al…ôkwa fa s…ôrmatakwa ata papaha ta mamaha kaa gway na! Kaa aa guzley, a l…ôvey aŇčga …óaf ma pawa salay ta da va…ó na, kwara?¬Ľ
6.43: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMb…ôkdamara meeŇčgurey-mey.
6.44: Kwa ndaw ma gwa Ňčga sawa asi a…óaw ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga na, daa ba. Si Papay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa, ma hand…ôrwa. Yaw, ya da sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey ta pas masa b…ôla ma da nd…ôvey.
6.45: Nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta wuzlalam la, a l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAra Gazlavay ma daa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay tabiya.‚ÄĚ Yaw, kwa waawa ma j…ôkey sl…ômay fa Papay, ma t…ô…ďa mees…ôrkedey aŇčga na, a sawa la asi a…óaw.
6.46: S…ôrmara na, kwa ndaw pal ma h…ôtar Papay daa ba, si yah, ndaw ma sawa ta fa aŇčga gway.
6.47: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ndaw ma paya Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara la na, ta h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba cay.
6.48: Yah na, …óaf mev…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba.
6.49: Zleezle papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay ta z…ômam cek mez…ômey la da wuzlah-ley, ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa ta m…ôcam sem c…ôŇčga.
6.50: Ama ndaw ma z…ôma …óaf ma pawa salay ta da va…ó na, fa da m…ôcey daa ba.
6.51: Yah na, …óaf mev…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba ma pawa salay ta da va…ó. Da ndaw ma z…ômey …óaf a la na, a da njey Ňčga s…ôrmataw. ∆äaf masa yah ma da v…ôldakwara ha na, ara aslaw Ňčga vaw a…óaw. Ya v…ôlda amba nd…ôhay da b…ôla a h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba.¬Ľ
6.52: J…ôwif hay a kam yawa ta g…ôdaŇč da ray mey a ke…óe, aa c…ôf…óam vaw da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw aha ke…óe a da v…ôldandakwara aslaw Ňčga vaw aŇčga Ňčga z…ômey na, kwara?¬Ľ
6.53: Da ray Ňčgene, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, da akwar ma z…ômam aslaw Ňčga vaw a…óaw daa ba, asaya, da akwar ma sam mambaz a…óaw, yah, B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, daa ba na, Ňčgene, akwar fa da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba daa ba.
6.54: Ndaw masa fa z…ômey aslaw Ňčga vaw a…óaw ta masa fa sey mambaz a…óaw na, ta h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba cay. Yaw, ya da sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey ta pas masa b…ôla ma da nd…ôvey.
6.55: Maja aslaw Ňčga vaw a…óaw na, ara cek mez…ômey masa fara fara, asaya, mambaz a…óaw na, ara cek mesey masa fara fara.
6.56: Ndaw ma z…ômey aslaw Ňčga vaw a…óaw ta ma sey mambaz a…óaw na, a da njey mac…ômkaya ta yah, yah may, ya da njey mac…ômkaya ta aŇčga.
6.57: Papay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa, aa ta dey, ya njey dasi har aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, ndaw masa fa z…ômey aslaw Ňčga vaw a…óaw na, a da njey dasi har a…óaw may.
6.58: Yah na, …óaf ma pawa salay ta da va…ó. ∆äaf a ara anda cek mez…ômey masa papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay ma z…ômamara zleezle ba, maja ta z…ômamara cek aha la, ta m…ôcam sem c…ôŇčga. Ama ndaw ma z…ôma …óaf masa yah ma da v…ôldara ke…óe na, a da njey ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ
6.59: Ke…óe he, ara mees…ôrkedey Ňčga Yesu daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay da Kapernayum. Mey da ray heter mend…ôvey ba
6.60: Masa nd…ôhay a ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Yesu la na, nd…ôhay ga da wuzlah ata masa ma diyam asiya heyey a l…ôvam: ¬ęMey aŇčga ha ke…óe na, aa ta banay Ňčga c…ôney. Ma da gwa Ňčga j…ôkfar sl…ômay na, wa?¬Ľ
6.61: Ama Yesu ta s…ôra sem nd…ôhay a faa Ňčguram mey da ray mey aŇčga ha. Ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMey a…óaw a ke…óe na, fa h…ô…ďkwar ray daw?
6.62: Yaw, kaa da wara akwar ma da h…ôtmaya, yah, *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw, fa t…ôpey aa slam masa yah ma pawa salay da hwa…ó a na, ka da l…ôvam kwara?
6.63: Ara *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôltar heter a nd…ôhay. Ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč taava aŇčga na, a gwa Ňčga njey ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga daada ba. Mey masa yah maa guzldakwara ke…óe na, a sawa ta fa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, a v…ôltar heter a nd…ôhay.
6.64: Ama nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah akwar, a t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw a ba.¬Ľ D…ôga zleezle, Yesu a s…ôrta nd…ôhay masa ma da t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ba, asaya, a s…ôra ndaw ma da v…ôlda a har masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay.
6.65: Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAra maja Ňčgene, yah ma l…ôvkwar kwa ndaw ma gwa Ňčga sawa asi a…óaw ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga na, daa ba, si Papay ma v…ôlar c…ôve…ó Ňčga sawa gway.¬Ľ
6.66: D…ôga aŇčga maa guzley Ňčgene na, nd…ôhay ga dasi nd…ôhay ma diyam asi Yesu a, a mb…ôkdamara, a diyam asiya saba.
6.67: Yesu, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar a gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKaa akwar may, ka wu…óam Ňčga diyam na, gway daw?¬Ľ
6.68: *SimaŇčw *Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay ala, ya diyam na, fa wa d…ô…ďa wa? Mey akah na, a v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba a nd…ôhay, ba diya?
6.69: Wure ke…óe, ala ta s…ôrmara cay, ya t…ô…ďmara, kah na, ndaw Ňčga Gazlavay masa aa ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa Ňčga key sl…ôra aŇčga.¬Ľ
6.70: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMa walakwar, akwar kuraw a ray a cew ke…óe na, ara yah, ba diya? Ama ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar daha na, aŇčga gula Ňčga *SataŇč, bay-malula.¬Ľ
6.71: Yesu aa guzley na, da ray Juda, b…ôzey Ňčga SimaŇčw Iskariyawt. Juda ha na, kwa aŇčga da wuzlah gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew heyey na, ara aŇčga ma da v…ôlda Yesu a har masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay.

7.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a p…ôkey daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile. A wu…óey Ňčga daw Ňčga p…ôkey daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude ba, maja mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay fete…óe fa s…ôpmara Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay.
7.2: Daa Ňčgene *gwagway Ňčga Way-mek…ôrcey gweegwe cay.
7.3: Ta‚Äô, m…ôlmaha hay aa guzlmar, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey la da Galile fe…óe, daw aa hwayak Ňčga Jude amba nd…ôhay ma s…ôpmaka a h…ôtmar sl…ôra masa kah ma ka ta dey ata.
7.4: Maja kwa waawa, da a wu…óey nd…ôhay tabiya Ňčga s…ôrmara na, a …ďey cek masa aa ma ka fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay ba. Ka fa key maazla hay mekele mekele anda ke…óe, kata fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya amba a s…ôrmaka.¬Ľ
7.5: Kwa m…ôlmaŇč Ňčga Yesu hay a ta ray ata na, fa pamara Yesu a Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara daa ba.
7.6: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęPas masa maaya Ňčgada yah na, ta wuswa daa ba araŇč, ama Ňčgada akwar na, kwa pas wura wura na, aŇčga maaya.
7.7: Akwar na, nd…ôhay da b…ôla fa da h…ôtam c…ôve…ó Ňčga r…ôsmakwar daa ba, ama yah na, fa r…ôsmaya, maja ya fa wuzdat…ôrwa cek hay malamba masa ata ma kamata.
7.8: Akwar na, diyam aa gwagway a. Yah na, ya fa da daw daa ba, maja pas a…óaw ta wuswa daa ba araŇč.¬Ľ
7.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa Yesu maa guzley la anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, a njey da Galile he c…ôŇčga. Yesu aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa gwagway Ňčga Way-mek…ôrcey
7.10: Masa m…ôlmaŇč Ňčga Yesu hay ata sem la aa gwagway heyey na, Yesu ta‚Äô, a daw aa gwagway a may, ama a s…ôhwey ta s…ôhwey, kwa ndaw ma h…ôtar daa ba.
7.11: Mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay a s…ôpmara daa gwagway a, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw a heyey aa dama?¬Ľ
7.12: Nd…ôhay ga daa gwagway a faa s…ôkam mey da ray Yesu a, siya hay a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra ndaw maaya.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay siya may, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKay! Ara ndaw maaya ba, fa betey nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
7.13: Kwa ndaw ta gwa Ňčgaa guzley da ray Yesu fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay daa ba, maja a zluram ta mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay.
7.14: Masa gwagway a heyey ta key cay …óar m…ôfa…ó na, Yesu ta‚Äô, a daw aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay.
7.15: Mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Yesu a na, a r…ôzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęHaya! Ndaw a kaa meeme, taa s…ôrkey Ňčga s…ôrey mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba, ama a s…ôrta mey hay a maaya maaya na, kwara?¬Ľ
7.16: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMey masa yah maa s…ôrkadatara a nd…ôhay ke…óe na, ara mey a…óaw ba, ama ara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa.
7.17: Mey masa yah maa s…ôrkadatara a nd…ôhay, da ara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, da daa ba, da ara mey a…óaw na, ndaw ma wu…óey Ňčga key cek ma mbafar a Gazlavay na, a s…ôra la.
7.18: Ndaw maa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga gway na, a key Ňčgene, a s…ôpey amba nd…ôhay aa h…ômdamara. Ama ndaw maa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay amba nd…ôhay aa h…ômdamara ndaw ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa na, Ňčgene ara ndaw maaya ma mb…ôrzley ba.
7.19: Zleezle *Mawiz ta wuzkwar kwakwas hay la Ňčga s…ôpey, ba diya? Ama kwa ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar ta s…ôpa kwakwas a ta c…ôve…ó e daa ba. Kaa ka s…ôpmaya Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay na, maja me?¬Ľ
7.20: Nd…ôhay a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKah na, ta malula da ray. Ma wu…óey Ňčga k…ô…óka vagay na, wa?¬Ľ
7.21: Yesu a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęPas pal daha, ya ta mb…ôley ndaw la ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw. Akwar ta r…ôzlam la ga maja.
7.22: Wulkam cey, Mawiz ta wuzkwar kwakwas la Ňčga *mesley mandawal. Kwakwas Ňčga mesley mandawal a, a zley na, fa Mawiz ba, ama d…ôga fa papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay zleezle. Kwa ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, akwar fa slam mandawal Ňčga b…ôza hay.
7.23: Akwar fa slam mandawal Ňčga b…ôzey kwa ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw amba kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a zl…ô…ďey ba. Kaa ka cam mevel a ray a…óaw maja yah ma mb…ôley ndaw ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, kwara?
7.24: Ka da wulkam da ray ndaw, ka l…ôvam aŇčga maaya, da daa ba, aŇčga maaya ba maja akwar ma h…ôtmar ta dey gway na, k…ône ba. Ama wulkam maaya maaya da ray cek masa ndaw aha ma ka amba kaa guzlam fara fara ta c…ôve…ó e.¬Ľ Mey da ray nd…ôhay maa guzlam da ray K…ôriste
7.25: Nd…ôhay siya da *Jeruzelem aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKe…óe na, ara ndaw masa ata ma s…ôpmara Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay heyey, ba diya?
7.26: N…ôkmara, aŇčga faa guzley fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay. Kaa aa guzlmar saba kwara? Mahura al…ôkwa hay ta s…ôrmara la fara fara ara *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay heyey fara daw?
7.27: Yaw, K…ôriste ma da sawa na, ya s…ôrkwa slam masa aŇčga ma sawa da hwa…ó a ba. Ama ndaw ke…óe na, ya s…ôrkwa slam masa aŇčga ma sawa, ba diya?¬Ľ
7.28: Daa masa Yesu faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, aa guzley ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAkwar na, ka s…ôrmaya fara daw? Asaya, ka s…ôrmara slam masa yah ma sawa da hwa…ó a fara fara daw? Ya sawa na, Ňčga ray a…óaw ba, ama ara ndaw ma sl…ôrdiwa. Ndaw a, aa maaya fara fara. Akwar na, ka s…ôrmara ndaw aha ba.
7.29: Yah na, ya s…ôra ndaw aha, maja ya sawa da cakay a, asaya, ara aŇčga ma sl…ôrdiwa.¬Ľ
7.30: A s…ôpam c…ôve…ó amba a k…ôrzamara Yesu, ama kwa ndaw pal ta pafar har daa ba, maja pas aŇčga ta wuswa daa ba araŇč.
