18.38: Bay Pilat a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMey masa fara fara na, mey wura?¬Ľ A kamar sariya a Yesu (Matiye 27.15-31; Mark 15.6-20; Luk 23.13-25) Masa Bay Pilat maa guzley la anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, a bawa aa ambaw saya fa mey Ňčga J…ôwif hay. A l…ôvtar: ¬ęYah na, yah ma h…ôtey cek t…ô…óe Ňčga k…ô…óey ndaw ke…óe vagay na, daa ba.
18.39: Yaw, anda kwakwas akwar ma wu…óey na, si ya p…ôskakwar ndaw pal daa f…ôrs…ône ta gwagway Ňčga *Pak. Anda ke…óe, ka wu…óam na, ya p…ôskakwar bay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay daw?¬Ľ
18.40: A wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKay! ka mb…ôkda ndaw ke…óe ba. Ama p…ôskandar na, Barabas.¬Ľ Barabas a na, ara ndaw-mayal ma sla …óay Ňčga ndaw.

19.1: Ta‚Äô, Bay Pilat a l…ôvtar a sewje hay Ňčga sl…ô…ómara Yesu ta laway.
19.2: Sewje hay a cam hatak, a pa…óamar ray anda gursaw Ňčga bay. Asaya, a k…ôzlmar zana magaza Ňčga bay hay fa vaw.
19.3: Ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôcham a cakay a, a sasaŇčg…ôram a ray a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęZay daw, bay Ňčga J…ôwif hay?¬Ľ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, kaŇč! kaŇč! a v…ôlmar matapa-har.
19.4: Ta‚Äô, Bay Pilat a bawa aa ambaw saya, aa guzltar a J…ôwif hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ę∆äagay, j…ôkam sl…ômay! Ya da badakwara ndaw aha aa ambaw amba ka s…ôrmara kwa ya ta h…ôtey cek maaya ba masa aŇčga ma ka na, daa ba.¬Ľ
19.5: Yesu ta‚Äô, a bawa aa ambaw d…ô…ďa. AŇčga ta gursaw Ňčga hatak heyey da ray, leŇč zana magaza heyey fa vaw. Pilat aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęEhe ndaw aha!¬Ľ
19.6: Ama masa *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay ata hay ma h…ôtmar na, a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęD…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya! D…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya!¬Ľ Pilat aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęEhe, Ňčg…ôlmara ndaw aha, d…ôrmara ta har akwar fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya ha, maja yah na, kwa yah ma h…ôtey cek maaya ba masa aŇčga ma ka na, daa ba.¬Ľ
19.7: J…ôwif hay a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKwakwas ala daha, anda kwakwas a ma l…ôvey na, si mek…ô…óey ndaw aha ke…óe vagay maja taa guzley la, a l…ôvey aŇčga B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
19.8: Masa Bay Pilat ma c…ônda aŇčga ma l…ôvey aŇčga B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay na, mand…ôrzay a kar ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč.
19.9: A mb…ôzey a way saya, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa Yesu a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, ka sawa dama?¬Ľ Ama kwa Yesu ta mb…ô…ódara daa ba.
19.10: Da ray Ňčgene, Bay Pilat aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKaa guzley ba ke…óe na, Ňčgada yah, ba diya? Ka s…ôra, yah na, ya gwa Ňčga mb…ôkdaka, da daa ba, ya gwa Ňčga d…ôrka fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya, ba diya?¬Ľ
19.11: Yesu a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa gwa Ňčga wey da ray a…óaw ba, si Bay Gazlavay ma v…ôlka c…ôve…ó. Anda ke…óe, ndaw ma v…ôldaya asi har akah ke…óe ta key meb…ôrey sem ma f…ônka.¬Ľ
19.12: Masa Bay Pilat ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe na, a s…ôpey c…ôve…ó amba a mb…ôkda Yesu. Ama J…ôwif hay a, a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęDa kah ma mb…ôkda ndaw ke…óe sem na, Ňčgene, kah jam Ňčga bay mahura *Sezere saba. Kwa waawa ma pa ray aŇčga Ňčga bay na, ara masa-g…ôra Ňčga bay mahura Sezere, ba diya?¬Ľ
19.13: Masa Bay Pilat ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe saya na, ta‚Äô, a bad…ôrwa Yesu aa ambaw saya. A njey a ray jaŇčga aŇčga mekey sariya mapakaya da ray slam macac…ôlkaya ta aŇčgwa mez…ôley ta mey *Heb…ôre ¬ęGabata¬Ľ.
19.14: Ara ta pas me…óiyey vaw Ňčga key gwagway Ňčga Pak. Ta wuzlah-pas na, Bay Pilat a l…ôvtar a J…ôwif hay a: ¬ęEhe bay akwar.¬Ľ
19.15: Ama a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęK…ô…óa vagay! K…ô…óa vagay! D…ôra fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya.¬Ľ Bay Pilat a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęBay akwar gway na, ka wu…óam ya d…ôrkwara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya gway daw?¬Ľ *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay ala mahura mekele na, daa ba, si bay Sezere gway.¬Ľ
19.16: Anda ke…óe, Bay Pilat a v…ôldatara Yesu amba a d…ôrmara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya. Ta‚Äô, a k…ôrzamara Yesu d…ô…ďa. A d…ôrmara Yesu fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya (Matiye 27.32-44; Mark 15.21-32; Luk 23.26-43)
19.17: A badam…ôrwa Yesu daa berney. Daa masa fa badam…ôrwa ha na, Yesu fa la hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya masa ata ma da d…ôrmara fa v…ô…óa. A handamara Ňčgadaa slam mez…ôley ta mey *Heb…ôre ¬ęGwalgwata¬Ľ, anda mel…ôvey, ¬ęslam anda tetesl Ňčga ray Ňčga ndaw.¬Ľ
19.18: Fete…óe, sewje hay ta‚Äô, a d…ôrmara Yesu fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya ha. A d…ôram nd…ôhay cew saya a cakay a, pal ta har-z…ômay, laŇčgar ta har-gula, Yesu na, aa da wuzlah.
19.19: Bay Pilat ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay Ňčga wuzlalam mey ma l…ôvey: ¬ęYesu ndaw *Nezeret, bay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay.¬Ľ Asaya, a l…ôvtar Ňčga sl…ôpmara fa hwadam masa Yesu mazlaŇčgalakaya fa v…ô…óa heyey.
19.20: J…ôwif hay ga ta jaŇčgamara mey mawuzlalakaya ha la maja slam masa ata ma d…ôrmara Yesu a na, aŇčga gweegwe ta berney a. Asaya, nd…ôhay ga ta jaŇčgamara mey a la maja mey a mawuzlalakaya na, ta mey Heb…ôre ta mey LeteŇč leŇč ta mey G…ôrek .
19.21: Maja Ňčgene, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay aa guzlmar, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKa da mb…ôkda mey a mawuzlalakaya ‚ÄúBay Ňčga J…ôwif hay‚ÄĚ anda Ňčgene ba. Ama mb…ô…óda, wuzlala: ‚ÄúNdaw aha ta l…ôvey la: Yah na, yah bay Ňčga J…ôwif hay‚ÄĚ.¬Ľ
19.22: Bay Pilat a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęCek masa yah ma wuzlala sem na, a da njey mawuzlalakaya anda Ňčgene.¬Ľ
19.23: Masa sewje hay ma d…ôrmara Yesu fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya cay na, ta‚Äô, a h…ôlmata zana aŇčga hay, a wunkamara slam m…ôfa…ó, fa sewje he fa sewje he. Mamb…ôkakaya zana aŇčga maaz…ôma masa mez…ôvey a daa ba d…ôga da va…ó haa kasl a hwayak.
19.24: Sewje hay a, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa da Ňčg…ôrkwa zana ha ta Ňčg…ôrey ba, ama k…ô…ókwa caca amba ndaw pal a la.¬Ľ Cek aha a key anda mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya zleezle ma l…ôvey: ¬ęTa wunkamara zana a…óaw hay sem da wuzlah ata, zana maaz…ôma na, a k…ô…óam caca amba ndaw pal a la.¬Ľ Yaw, ke…óe he ara cek masa sewje hay ma kamara.
19.25: Ata mamaŇč Ňčga Yesu, ta dam-mamaha, ta *Mari Ňčgwas Ňčga K…ôlawpas, leŇč Mari da Magdala, malacatakaya da cakay hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya masa ata ma d…ôrmara Yesu fa v…ô…óa heyey.
19.26: Yesu a n…ôka mamaha. Gula aŇčga masa aa ma wu…óa kalah heyey may, aa da cakay mamaha ha. Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzlar a mamaha, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMamay, Ňčgene na, b…ôzey akah.¬Ľ
19.27: Ta‚Äô, aa guzlar a gula aŇčga ha, a l…ôvar: ¬ęŇägene na, mamakw.¬Ľ D…ôga ta pas a Ňčgene gula Ňčga Yesu a ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôla Mari a way aŇčga. (Matiye 27.45-56; Mark 15.33-41; Luk 23.44-49)
19.28: Daa Ňčgene, Yesu a s…ôra ta nd…ôvda sl…ôra aŇčga cay. Ta‚Äô, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYam fa kaya.¬Ľ Aa guzley anda ke…óe na, amba mey mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle heyey na, a key.
19.29: Fete…óe, kwakulam daha mar…ôhkaya ta yam Ňčga bab…ôza Ňčga wudez meekwerek e. Sewje hay a j…ôhw…ďam cek anda gag…ômay aa yam a heyey, a t…ôrva…óamara fa mey Ňčga zlanday, a t…ôldamara a mey Yesu.
19.30: Yesu maa s…ô…ďa yam Ňčga bab…ôza Ňčga wudez meekwerek e heyey cay na, ta‚Äô, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęSl…ôra a…óaw tabiya, ta nd…ôvey cay.¬Ľ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a j…ôkwda ray, pam! a m…ôcey. Sewje a sl…ôka Yesu aa cakay
19.31: Yesu a m…ôcey na, ta pas masa *J…ôwif hay fa …óiyam vaw Ňčgadaa *pas mem…ôskey-vaw. Ta pas a Ňčgene, mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay a wu…óam vagay hay a njam fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya hay heyey saba, asaya, maja pas mem…ôskey-vaw a Ňčgene a f…ônta pas hay mem…ôskey-vaw siya. Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óamara Bay Pilat Ňčga Ňčg…ôrfey salay hay Ňčga nd…ôhay fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya, asaya, Ňčga padamat…ôrwa salay da ray hwadam hay a.
19.32: Anda ke…óe, sewje hay a Ňčg…ôrfamara salay hay Ňčga ndaw Ňčgeeme ta Ňčga ndaw Ňčga dey cew e masa mad…ôrtakaya da cakay Yesu heyey d…ô…ďa.
19.33: A wusam Ňčga Ňčg…ôrfamara salay hay Ňčga Yesu may na, a h…ôtfamar ta m…ôcey sem. Anda ke…óe, kwa ta Ňčg…ôrfamara salay aŇčga hay daa saba.
19.34: Ama sewje pal da wuzlah ata, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôka ta z…ôwet aa cakay. Wure Ňčgene, mambaz ta yam a mb…ô…ówa.
19.35: Ndaw ma kada mey a ke…óe na, ta h…ôtar la ta dey aŇčga . Mey masa aa ma kada na, ara mey fara fara. Yaw, aŇčga na, a s…ôra ara mey fara fara. Anda ke…óe, a kada mey a na, amba akwar may, ka t…ô…ďmara mey a.
19.36: Cek hay a tabiya ma kam ke…óe na, anda mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya zleezle, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęKwa fa da Ňčg…ôrfamar tetesl pal daa ba.¬Ľ
19.37: Asaya, mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya mekele daha, a l…ôvey: ¬ęA h…ôtmar ndaw masa ata ma sl…ôkmara la.¬Ľ A j…ôhmara vagay Ňčga Yesu (Matiye 27.57-61; Mark 15.42-47; Luk 23.50-56)
19.38: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw da slala Arimate daha, mez…ôley *Jawzef. Ta‚Äô, a daw fa Bay Pilat Ňčgaa c…ôf…óarawa vagay Ňčga Yesu amba a j…ôha. Jawzef e na, ara ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu, ama ta wuzda vaw aŇčga daa ba maja a zlurey ta mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay. Bay Pilat ta v…ôlar c…ôve…ó la. AŇčga ta‚Äô, a daw a la vagay a.
19.39: Nikwedem, ndaw masa ma h…ôtfar Yesu a ta tava…ó heyey, ta‚Äô, a diyam cew e ta Jawzef Ňčga j…ôhey vagay a. Nikwedem ta ley mal mezey maaya Ňčga cek mez…ôley ¬ę*mir¬Ľ majaha…óakaya ta cek mez…ôley ¬ęal…ôwes¬Ľ la a har, a f…ôna k…ôlew kwakwar maakar.
19.40: Ata cewete ta‚Äô, a lamara vagay Ňčga Yesu a, a zl…ôŇčgmara ta maslaga, a takwa…óamar mal heyey anda J…ôwif hay ma kamara daa masa ata fa da zl…ôŇčgam vagay.
19.41: Daa slam masa ata ma d…ôrmara Yesu a na, jerne daha. Daa jerne he c…ôvay mawiya daha, kwa ta pam vagay a hwa…ó a daa ba araŇč.
19.42: A j…ôhmara Yesu aa c…ôvay a na, maja ara hakwa…ó, *pas mem…ôskey-vaw gweegwe cay, asaya, maja c…ôvay a gweegwe fete…óe.

20.1: Taa p…ôrek ta luma Ňčga Gudal, slam beŇč! beŇč! *Mari da Magdala, a daw Ňčga n…ôk…ôrwa c…ôvay Ňčga Yesu. A wusey a mey c…ôvay a, a da n…ôkey dey na, beeler mahura ma g…ôrca mey Ňčga c…ôvay a maŇčg…ôchadakaya ta cakay.
20.2: Anda ke…óe, takw! a h…ôla mahway Ňčgada fa ata *SimaŇčw *Piyer ta gula laŇčgar masa Yesu ma wu…óa kalah heyey. Ta‚Äô, aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęTa lamara vagay Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu sem daa c…ôvay, ya s…ôrmara a pamara aa wura ba.¬Ľ
20.3: Da ray Ňčgene, ata Piyer ta gula laŇčgar heyey, a sl…ôk…óam, a diyam a mey c…ôvay a.
20.4: Ata cewete, a hwam ta hway, ama gula laŇčgar heyey a hway a f…ôna Piyer, a wusey teese…ó a mey c…ôvay a.
20.5: Ta‚Äô, a wuze…óey dey aa c…ôvay a, a h…ôtey da hwa…ó a na, maslaga hay makwiydatakaya, ama ta mb…ôzey aa c…ôvay a daa ba.
20.6: SimaŇčw Piyer a wusey fa d…ô…ďa aŇčga, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôzey aa c…ôvay a. A h…ôtatar maslaga hay makwiydatakaya,
20.7: asaya, a h…ôtar zana masa ata ma sl…ôw…óamara ray Ňčga Yesu ta aŇčga heyey. Zana ha na, mac…ômkaya ta maslaga hay heyey ba, ama mapa…óakaya wal ta cakay.
20.8: Gula laŇčgar ma wusey teese…ó heyey, a mb…ôzey aa c…ôvay a may, a h…ôtatar cek hay a, anda ke…óe, a t…ô…ďa ma sl…ôk…óawa Ňčga Yesu daa mem…ôcey.
20.9: Ama *gula hay Ňčga Yesu ta c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa ma l…ôvey Yesu a da sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey na, daa ba araŇč.
20.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, gula hay cew heyey a v…ôham a way ata hay. Yesu a wuzar vaw a Mari da Magdala (Matiye 28.9, 10; Mark 16.9-11)
20.11: Daa Ňčgene, *Mari da Magdala ta‚Äô, a v…ôhey a mey c…ôvay a. DeŇč! a lecey a mey c…ôvay a, fa t…ôway. Masa aŇčga fa t…ôway a na, ta‚Äô, a wuze…óey dey aa c…ôvay a.
20.12: A da n…ôkey dey na, a ray maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay cew ta zana hay mabara fa vaw. Ata manjatakaya c…ôma daa slam masa ata ma pamara vagay Ňčga Yesu heyey, pal manjakaya daa slam-ray, pal daa slam-salay.
20.13: MaslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay heyey aa c…ôf…óamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKwakwa, ka t…ôway me?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęTa lamara vagay Ňčga Bay a…óaw Mahura sem, ya s…ôra a pamara aa wura ba.¬Ľ
20.14: Masa Ňčgwas aha maa guzley la anda ke…óe, a da mb…ô…óey dey na, a ray Yesu malacakaya fete…óe, ama kwa ta s…ôra ara aŇčga na, daa ba.
20.15: Yesu a, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKwakwa, ka t…ôway me? Ka s…ôpey na, wa?¬Ľ Ňägwas aha, a wulkey na, ara ndaw ma j…ô…óa jerne he, ta‚Äô, aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęPapay a…óaw, da ara kah ma la na, wuzdiwa slam masa kah ma pa amba ya larawa aa slam a taw?¬Ľ
20.16: Yesu ta‚Äô, a z…ôla, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMari!¬Ľ Masa Mari ma c…ônda mez…ôley aŇčga la na, p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey dey Ňčgada fa Yesu, ta‚Äô, aa guzlar ta mey *Heb…ôre, a l…ôvar: ¬ęRabuni,¬Ľ anda mel…ôvey ¬ębay a…óaw¬Ľ.
20.17: Yesu aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMb…ôkdaya, ka da z…ôndaya vaw ba, maja ya ta t…ôpey fa Papay a va…ó daa ba araŇč. Ama kah na, daw ta l…ôvtar a m…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya t…ôpey la fa Papay masa aŇčga Papakw akwar may, fa Gazlavay masa aŇčga Gazlavay akwar may.¬Ľ
20.18: Ta‚Äô, Mari da Magdala a daw fa *gula hay Ňčga Yesu d…ô…ďa, a kadatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa ta h…ôtar Bay Mahura Yesu la.¬Ľ Asaya, Mari a kadatara mey masa Yesu a ma l…ôvar. Yesu a wuztar vaw a gula aŇčga hay (Matiye 28.16-20; Mark 16.14-18; Luk 24.36-49)
20.19: Taa kwa…ó ta luma Ňčga Gudal a Ňčgene, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu makustakaya daa way daha. Ta g…ôrcamata mey-slam hay sem ta lek…ôle maja ata fa zluram ta mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay. Ta‚Äô, Yesu a daw a lecey a wuzlah ata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAnja Gazlavay Ňčga njadakwar daa zazay.¬Ľ
20.20: Masa aŇčga ma l…ôvtar la anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, a wuzdatara har aŇčga hay ta cakay aŇčga. Gula hay Ňčga Yesu a, taa s…ômam la ga maja ata ma h…ôtmar Bay Mahura ha.
20.21: Yesu aa guzltar saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAnja Gazlavay Ňčga njadakwar daa zazay. Anda Papay, Bay Gazlavay, ma sl…ôrdiwa a b…ôla na, yah may, ya sl…ôrdakwar Ňčga key sl…ôra a…óaw.¬Ľ
20.22: Masa aŇčga maa guzltar anda ke…óe la na, ta‚Äô, a s…ôfney a ray ata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęT…ô…ďam *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a ray akwar.
20.23: Da ka mb…ôkdamara meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw na, Gazlavay a mb…ôkdara la may. Ama da akwar ma mb…ôkdamara meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw daa ba na, Gazlavay fa da mb…ôkdara daa ba may.¬Ľ Tuma a key yawa
20.24: Yaw, daa masa Yesu ma wuztar vaw a gula aŇčga hay na, *Tuma, masa ata ma z…ôlmara Didim , gula pal dasi gula aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew, aŇčga da wuzlah ata daa ba.
20.25: Masa Tuma ma sawa la a wuzlah ata na, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAla ta h…ôtmar Bay Mahura la.¬Ľ Ama Tuma a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa yah ma h…ôtar vevek Ňčga mb…ôlek fa har Ňčga med…ôrey heyey daa ba, da yah ma pa b…ôz-mey-har a…óaw aa vevek Ňčga mb…ôlek e daa ba, asaya, da yah ma pa har a…óaw aa cakay aŇčga daa ba na, Ňčgene, ya fa da t…ô…ďa Yesu ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey na, daa ba.¬Ľ
20.26: Luma pal fa d…ô…ďa ha na, *gula hay Ňčga Yesu a kusam aa way heyey saya. Tuma aŇčga da wuzlah ata d…ô…ďa. Mey-slam hay mag…ôrcatakaya ta lek…ôle, ama Yesu ta‚Äô a sawa, a lecey a wuzlah ata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAnja Gazlavay Ňčga njadakwar daa zazay.¬Ľ
20.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Yesu a l…ôvar a Tuma: ¬ęT…ôld…ôrwa b…ôz-mey-har akah fe…óe, n…ôkta har a…óaw hay. Asaya, t…ôld…ôrwa har akah, pa aa cakay a…óaw. Mb…ôkda mekey yawa, t…ô…ďa ya ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
20.28: Tuma a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, Bay a…óaw Mahura, kah na, Gazlavay a…óaw!¬Ľ
20.29: Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah ma t…ô…ďa mey a ke…óe na, maja kah ma h…ôtya ta dey akah, ba diya? Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara ya ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey, masa kwa ta h…ôtmaya ta dey ata daa ba.¬Ľ Mey da ray Mey-maaya-mawiya masa JaŇč ma wuzlala
20.30: Yesu ta key maazla hay la ga mekele mekele meedey gula aŇčga hay, ama maazla hay a tabiya mawuzlalatakaya daa …óerewel ke…óe daa ba.
20.31: Mey hay tabiya masa mawuzlalatakaya daa …óerewel ke…óe na, ara amba ka t…ô…ďmara, Yesu na, ara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay, ara *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay. Anda ke…óe, da akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga na, ka da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba ta fa aŇčga.

21.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha …óar nek…ô…óey na, Yesu a wuztar vaw a gula aŇčga hay saya. A wuztar vaw na, da mey d…ôhwa Ňčga Tiberiyat. Ehe, mey da ray Yesu ma wuztar vaw a gula aŇčga hay a.
21.2: Ata *SimaŇčw *Piyer, *Tuma masa ata ma z…ôlmara Didim, Nataniyel ndaw da Kana daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile, ta b…ôza hay Ňčga Zebede, leŇč *gula hay Ňčga Yesu cew mekele, ata tabiya daa slam a.
21.3: SimaŇčw Piyer a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa daw la aa ewet.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay siya ke…óe heyey a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAla may, ya diyam asi akah.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a diyam, a t…ôpam aa kwambiwal. Tava…ó tava…ó ata daa ewet e, ama kwa ta k…ôrzam daa ba.
21.4: Taa p…ôrek masa pas fa bawa na, Yesu a daw, a njey a mey d…ôhwa ha. Ama gula aŇčga hay ta s…ôrmara ara aŇčga na, daa ba.
21.5: Ta‚Äô, Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęB…ôz a…óaw hay, akwar ma k…ôrzam ewet e la daw?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAla ma k…ôrzam daa ba.¬Ľ
21.6: Yesu a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęLamara *tabaw akwar, k…ôzlamara ta dey Ňčga z…ômay, ka k…ôrzamawa la.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, a k…ôzlamara tabaw ata anda Yesu ma l…ôvtar. A h…ôtam ewet ga da hwa…ó a. A gwamara Ňčga …óa…óam…ôrwa tabaw a, aa kwambiwal saba, maja ewet ga kalah da hwa…ó a.
21.7: Ta‚Äô, gula masa Yesu ma wu…óa kalah heyey a l…ôvar a Piyer: ¬ęAra Bay Mahura!¬Ľ Masa SimaŇčw Piyer ma c…ônda ara Bay Mahura na, ta‚Äô, a k…ôzla zana fa vaw maja ta c…ôkwa zana sem amba a k…ôrzey ewet. Ta‚Äô, a j…ôvey daa kwambiwal g…ôv! aa yam, a daw Ňčgada fa Yesu.
21.8: Yaw, gula hay Ňčga Yesu siya na, ata gweegwe cay a rav-zazay, mend…ôrey a wusa meeter temere saba. A diyam ta kwambiwal. Daa Ňčgene, fa …óa…óamara tabaw ata mar…ôhkaya ta ewet ga da hwa…ó a heyey.
21.9: A b…ôrŇčgamawa daa kwambiwal. Masa ata ma b…ôrŇčgamawa cay na, a h…ôtam zay-awaw ta ewet da ray a leŇč peŇč.
21.10: Yesu aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęH…ôlmawa ewet masa akwar ma k…ôrzam…ôrwa Ňčgene nek…ô…óey.¬Ľ
21.11: SimaŇčw Piyer a t…ôpey aa kwambiwal a, ta‚Äô, a …óa…óarawa tabaw a mar…ôhkaya kaf! ta ewet hay ga mahura hay da hwa…ó a heyey. Ewet hay a tabiya temere ta kwakwar zlam a ray a maakar. Tabaw a mar…ôhkaya kaf!, ama kwa ta Ňčg…ôrey daa ba.
21.12: Yesu a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSamawa, z…ômam cek.¬Ľ Yaw, kwa gula pal da wuzlah ata ta key g…ôdaŇč Ňčgaa c…ôf…óa kah na, wa na, daa ba gway, maja a s…ôrmara fara fara ara Bay Mahura.
21.13: Yesu a Ňčg…ôchey, a la peŇč heyey, a wunkatara a gula aŇčga hay, asaya, a la ewet da ray zay-awaw, a v…ôldatara.
21.14: D…ôga Ňčga masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga Yesu daa mem…ôcey na, ta pas Ňčgene, ara Ňčga dey maakar a masa aŇčga ma wuztar vaw a gula aŇčga hay. Yesu aa c…ôf…óa Piyer
21.15: Masa ata ma nd…ôvdamara mez…ômey cek cay na, Yesu aa c…ôf…óa *SimaŇčw *Piyer, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSimaŇčw, b…ôzey Ňčga *JaŇč, ka wu…óya a f…ônta nd…ôhay ke…óe daw?¬Ľ Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAhaw, Bay Mahura, ka fa s…ôra ya wu…óka.¬Ľ Yesu a l…ôvar: ¬ęN…ôkfatar dey fa nd…ôhay a…óaw hay, anda ndaw ma n…ôkfatar dey fa b…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč aŇčga hay.¬Ľ

2.34: Ya s…ôrkwa Davit ta ray aŇčga ta t…ôpey a va…ó na, daa ba. Ama aa guzley da ray K…ôriste zleezle, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay a l…ôvar a Bay a…óaw Mahura: Sawa, njey ta har-z…ômay a…óaw
2.35: haa kasl pas masa yah ma da pata masa-g…ôra akah hay asi salay akah.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
2.36: Piyer a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęSi Israyel hay tabiya a s…ôrmara fara fara, ndaw masa Gazlavay ma pa Ňčga Bay Mahura ta Ňčga ndaw masa ma da l…ôhdata nd…ôhay na, ara Yesu, ndaw masa akwar ma d…ôrmara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya heyey.¬Ľ
2.37: Nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey, a c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe na, mevel a t…ô…ótar ga. A l…ôvmar Ňčgada Piyer ta Ňčgada nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey siya hay: ¬ęKaa ya da kam na, kwara, m…ôlma ala hay?¬Ľ
2.38: Piyer a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, s…ôpmara Gazlavay ta mevel pal. Cac…ôf…óam *baptem ta mez…ôley Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste, amba Gazlavay a mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a v…ôlkwar Mes…ôfney aŇčga la.
2.39: Gazlavay a l…ôvey, a v…ôldatara Mes…ôfney aŇčga la a nd…ôhay. A l…ôvey a da v…ôldakwara Ňčgada akwar, Ňčgada b…ôz akwar hay, ta Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa d…ôreŇč, nd…ôhay tabiya masa Gazlavay, Bay al…ôkwa, ma da z…ôlta.¬Ľ
2.40: Ta‚Äô, Piyer aa guzltar mey mekele mekele saya amba a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga Ňčga v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč. A l…ôvtar: ¬ęWu…ókam ta nd…ôhay malamba da b…ôla wure ke…óe, amba Bay Gazlavay a l…ôhdakwar daa sariya ma da k…ôrzata.¬Ľ
2.41: Nd…ôhay ga da wuzlah nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Piyer, ta‚Äô, a h…ôtam baptem. Ta pas Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a key gabal maakar ma samawa a dey nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu. Menjey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu
2.42: Mandaw mandaw nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fa j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mees…ôrkedey Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mesl…ôrey ta mevel pal, a njam mac…ômkaya pal anda m…ôlmaŇč hay, fa wunam peŇč Ňčga s…ôrfedey mem…ôcey Ňčga Yesu, fa d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay daa slam a.
2.43: Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey hay a fa kam maazla hay mekele mekele Ňčga wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay aa ta ata. Nd…ôhay tabiya a r…ôzlam da ray maazla hay a, a namar ray a Bay Gazlavay maja.
2.44: Nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu na, mac…ômkaya …óay letek, a wunkamara zleley ata hay da wuzlah ata.
2.45: Anda mel…ôvey, a h…ô…ókadamata ley ata hay ta cek ata hay, a wunkamara dala ha da wuzlah ata tabiya. Kwa waawa a h…ôtey cek masa t…ô…óe Ňčga wusa.
2.46: Mandaw mandaw fa kusam aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta mevel pal. Da way ata hay na, a z…ômam …óaf daa slam a ta mees…ômey, ta mevel maaya.
2.47: Ata fa h…ôlmamara Gazlavay. Nd…ôhay tabiya aa h…ômdamata. Mandaw mandaw Bay Mahura fa z…ôlwa nd…ôhay mekele mekele masa ma l…ôham sem daa meb…ôrey Ňčgadaa dey ata.

3.1: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, ata *Piyer ta *JaŇč fa diyam aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga d…ôrwa daŇčgay. Ara ta pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó, pas t…ô…óe med…ôrey-daŇčgay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay.
3.2: Gweegwe ta mey-mbew Ňčga Way-mekey-kwakwas a, mey-mbew ma z…ôlmara ¬ęMey-mbew Membey,¬Ľ ndaw daha manjakaya fete…óe. Ndaw aha, maah…ôl…ďakaya d…ôga Ňčga mayawa aŇčga. Mandaw mandaw nd…ôhay fa handam…ôrwa, a njadamara fete…óe, amba a r…ôkey dala fa nd…ôhay ma mb…ôzam aa Way-mekey-kwakwas a.
3.3: Ta pas Ňčgene, ndaw aha a h…ôtatar ata Piyer ta JaŇč fa diyam aa Way-mekey-kwakwas a. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óafatar dala.
3.4: Ata Piyer ta JaŇč a n…ôkfamara, Piyer a l…ôvar: ¬ęN…ôkfandar.¬Ľ
3.5: Ndaw aha a n…ôkfata maaya maaya, a wulkey daa ray aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ¬ęA da v…ôlmaya cek.¬Ľ
3.6: Ama Piyer a l…ôvar: ¬ęDala da har a…óaw na, daa ba s…ôlak, ama cek masa da har a…óaw na, ya v…ôldakawa la. Ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste, ndaw *Nezeret, ya fa l…ôvka, sl…ôk…óey, daw ta salay akah.¬Ľ
3.7: Ta‚Äô, Piyer a k…ôrza fa har-z…ômay, a sl…ôk…óada. Wure wure Ňčgene, salay Ňčga ndaw aha, ta jerey cay.
3.8: Ta‚Äô, a lecey, a j…ôvey, a zlar madaw. A mb…ôzam aa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta ata Piyer ta JaŇč heyey. AŇčga fa daw, fa j…ôvey, fa h…ôlma Gazlavay.
3.9: Nd…ôhay masa daa Way-mekey-kwakwas a tabiya a h…ôtmar aŇčga fa daw, fa h…ôlma Gazlavay.
3.10: A s…ôrmara ara ndaw masa salay maah…ôl…ďakaya ma njey fa Mey-mbew Membey Ňčga r…ôkey heyey. Ata tabiya a r…ôzlam ga da ray cek ma key ta aŇčga, a s…ôrmara cek masa ata ma da kam ba. Piyer a wuzey mey daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay
3.11: Ata *Piyer ta *JaŇč leŇč ndaw masa salay maah…ôl…ďakaya heyey, ata dasi balak Ňčga *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay mez…ôley ¬ęBalak Ňčga *SalamaŇčw.¬Ľ Ndaw aha, a g…ômey Ňčga mb…ôkdata ata Piyer ta JaŇč ba. Nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe a hwamawa Ňčgada fa ata, maja a r…ôzlam ga da ray ndaw masa salay maah…ôl…ďakaya heyey.
3.12: Masa Piyer ma h…ôtatar nd…ôhay fa samawa na, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay *Israyel hay, ka r…ôzlam anda ke…óe na, maja me? Ka n…ôkfamandar me? Ka wulkam ndaw ke…óe salay aŇčga a jerey Ňčga daw kaa na, ara ta g…ôdaŇč ala daw, da daa ba, maja ala ma kam cek maaya ta c…ôve…ó e fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay daw? Kay, k…ône ba!
3.13: Ara Gazlavay ma mb…ôlda ndaw aha, Gazlavay masa *Ab…ôraham, *Izak, leŇč *Jakwap, papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay zleezle, ma namar ray. Ara Gazlavay ma wuzdandakwara aŇčga fa h…ôslar ray a Yesu, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga. Akwar ta ray akwar, ka ta v…ôldamara Yesu a la a har mahura hay, kwa Pilat a wu…óey Ňčga mb…ôkda, ama akwar ta t…ô…ďmara daa ba.
3.14: Yesu na, ara ndaw pal masa maaya ma sawa ta fa Gazlavay. Ama akwar ka wu…ómara ba, ka l…ôvmar a Pilat na, Ňčga p…ôskakwar ndaw ma k…ô…óa ndaw vagay jak.
3.15: Anda ke…óe, ndaw ma v…ôltar heter a nd…ôhay jak na, akwar ta k…ô…ómara sem, ama Gazlavay ta sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa sem daa mem…ôcey. Ala ta ray ala fa kam sede da ray masl…ôk…óawa aŇčga ha.
3.16: Ndaw masa akwar ma h…ôtmar da cakay a…óaw ke…óe na, ka s…ôrmara. Salay aŇčga a jerey na, ara ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Yesu, maja ala ma pamara Yesu a Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara. Maja ala fa pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara na, mbal! a mb…ôley maaya maaya anda akwar tabiya ma h…ôtmar ta dey akwar ke…óe.
3.17: ¬ęAma wure ke…óe, m…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya s…ôra cek masa akwar ta mahura akwar hay ma kamara a Yesu na, a key ka s…ôrmara ba.
3.18: Cek aha ma key ke…óe na, Gazlavay ta wuzda la ta mey nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga hay zleezle, a l…ôvey, si c…ôma *K…ôriste masa aŇčga ma da sl…ôrd…ôrwa na, a s…ôrey banay.
3.19: Maja Ňčgene, ya fa l…ôvkwar: mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, mb…ô…ómawa dey Ňčgada fa Bay Gazlavay, amba a mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar.
3.20: Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a m…ôskadakwar vaw la. A sl…ôrkwar K…ôriste la, anda mel…ôvey, Yesu, ndaw masa aa ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdakwar d…ôga zleezle heyey.
3.21: Wure ke…óe si Yesu a njawa da gazlavay da va…ó …óagay, haa kasl pas masa Gazlavay ma da …óiyta cek hay tabiya mawiya anda aŇčga ma l…ôvey zleezle. Gazlavay taa guzley la da ray mey a ta mey nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga hay.
3.22: Ara anda ke…óe *Mawiz maa guzley zleezle, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay masa akwar ma namar ray, a da sl…ôrkwar *ndaw ma t…ôla mey anda yah. Ndaw a na, ara ndaw daa s…ôkway akwar anda yah may. Mey tabiya masa aŇčga ma daa guzldakwara na, j…ôkam sl…ômay fa v…ô…óa.
3.23: Kwa waawa ma c…ônar mey a ndaw a ba na, Gazlavay a bada la da wuzlah nd…ôhay aŇčga hay, Ňčgaa z…ô…óey.‚ÄĚ
3.24: ¬ęYaw, fara fara, nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay ga, d…ôga fa *Samiyel ta nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay mekele mekele fa d…ô…ďa aŇčga, ata tabiya ta wuzdamara mey da ray cek hay masa ma kam wure ke…óe la.
3.25: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, Gazlavay maa guzley ta mey nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga hay ke…óe na, ara Ňčgada akwar. Gazlavay a j…ôwam mey ta papa al…ôkwa hay zleezle, a l…ôvar a Ab…ôraham: ‚ÄúYa p…ôstar mey la a nd…ôhay da b…ôla tabiya ta fa s…ôkway akah.‚ÄĚ *Mej…ôwey-mey a ke…óe na, ara Ňčgada akwar may.
3.26: Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay ta wuzdakwara Yesu, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga la. A sl…ôrd…ôrwa na, Ňčgada akwar …óagay. A sl…ôrd…ôrwa amba a kakwar maaya, Ňčga mb…ô…ódakwara menjey akwar maaya ba Ňčgene.¬Ľ

4.1: Masa ata *Piyer ta *JaŇč faa guzlmatar a nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey na, nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta *bay-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay ma j…ô…óa Way-mekey-kwakwas, leŇč nd…ôhay *Saduse hay, a samawa a cakay ata.
4.2: Mevel fa catar maja ata Piyer ta JaŇč faa s…ôrkadamata nd…ôhay, a l…ôvmatar nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya a da sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey maja Yesu ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey.
4.3: Mahura hay heyey, ta‚Äô, a k…ôrzamata ata Piyer ta JaŇč a, a handamata, a g…ôrcamata aa f…ôrs…ône. Ama ta kamatar sariya ta pas Ňčgene daa ba, maja pas daa saba.
4.4: Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, nd…ôhay ga da wuzlah nd…ôhay makustakaya ma c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Piyer heyey ta t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu la c…ôŇčga. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu ta s…ôkam la a dey a, a key gabal zlam.
4.5: Pep…ôrek e, bay-ray hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, ta mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay, leŇč *nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, a kusam fete…óe da *Jeruzelem.
4.6: Da wuzlah nd…ôhay makustakaya ha na, ara ata Han, *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, Kayif, JaŇč, Alekzand…ôre leŇč nd…ôhay siya tabiya da way Han.
4.7: Ta‚Äô, a handamat…ôrwa ata Piyer ta JaŇč heyey, a lacadamata fa mey ata, ndaw masa ma h…ôtar salay aŇčga heyey aa da cakay ata. A cac…ôf…óamata ata Piyer ta JaŇč, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęKa mb…ôldamara ndaw masa salay maah…ôl…ďakaya ke…óe na, ta g…ôdaŇč wura? Ma v…ôldakwara g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key maazla ke…óe na, wa?¬Ľ
4.8: Piyer, mar…ôhkaya ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar, bay-ray hay ta mahura ala hay,
4.9: kaa c…ôf…óamandar tasana maja ala ma kam cek maaya Ňčgada ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya ke…óe, daw? Kaa c…ôf…óamandar, ndaw aha a h…ôtar salay aŇčga na, kwara, ba diya?
4.10: Yaw, akwar c…ôpa ta nd…ôhay *Israyel hay tabiya, si ka s…ôrmara ndaw malacakaya fa mey akwar ke…óe na, a h…ôtar salay aŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste, ndaw *Nezeret. Ara aŇčga masa akwar ma d…ôrmara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya Ňčga m…ôcey, ama Gazlavay ta sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa sem daa mem…ôcey.
4.11: Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay da ray Yesu, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúAŇčgwa masa akwar, nd…ôhay ma l…ôma way, ma k…ôzlamara ta cakay na, anja ara aŇčgwa maaya, ma f…ônta siya hay jak.‚ÄĚ
4.12: Ahaw, ya fa l…ôvkwar, Gazlavay a l…ôhdata nd…ôhay daa meb…ôrey na, si ta fa Yesu gway. Ndaw mekele da b…ôla ke…óe masa Gazlavay ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga l…ôhey nd…ôhay daa meb…ôrey na, daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
4.13: Mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay fete…óe heyey na, a n…ôkmara na, ata Piyer ta JaŇč fa zluram daa ba s…ôlak. A r…ôzlam ga, maja a s…ôrmara, ata Piyer ta JaŇč, ara nd…ôhay anda siya hay gway, ta jaŇčgam daa ba. A s…ôrfadamara ata Piyer ta JaŇč ta p…ôkam la ta ata Yesu.
4.14: Masa mahura hay ma sla yawa ha ma h…ôtmar ndaw masa ma h…ôtar salay aŇčga heyey malacakaya da cakay ata Piyer ta JaŇč na, kwa ta gwamara Ňčga mb…ô…ódamatara daa saba.
4.15: Da ray Ňčgene, mahura hay a, a badamat…ôrwa la daa way a, a zlamar mesley yawa da wuzlah ata.
4.16: A l…ôvam: ¬ęYa da kadamatakwa nd…ôhay ke…óe na, kwara? Maja nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem tabiya a s…ôrmara fara fara Gazlavay ta key maazla mahura la ta fa ata. Ya gwakwa ya r…ôskwa maazla ha ke…óe ba.
4.17: Ama amba mey ke…óe a daw fa mey fa mey saba, asaya amba nd…ôhay mekele a c…ôndamara ba na, si ya t…ôktakwa nd…ôhay cew ke…óe. Ya t…ôktakwa a da wuzdamara mey da ray Yesu a nd…ôhay saba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
4.18: Ta‚Äô, a z…ôlmata saya, a t…ôkmata Ňčgaa s…ôrkedey nd…ôhay da ray mey Ňčga Yesu, asaya, a t…ôkmata kwa Ňčga key ma…óay Ňčga maaya ta nd…ôhay da ray Yesu.
4.19: Ama ata Piyer ta JaŇč a mb…ô…ódamatara, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęAkwar ta ray akwar, n…ôkmara mey ke…óe cey. Maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ya t…ô…ďam mey akwar da ray mey Ňčga Gazlavay daw?
4.20: Ala na, si c…ôma yaa guzlam da ray cek hay masa ala ma h…ôtmar ta dey ala ta masa ala ma c…ôndamara ta sl…ômay ala.¬Ľ
4.21: -22 Mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay kaa heyey ta h…ôtam mey Ňčga s…ôrdamata banay daa ba, maja nd…ôhay tabiya fa h…ôlmamara Gazlavay maja maazla ha. Ndaw masa ma h…ôtar salay aŇčga ta maazla heyey, mevey aŇčga a f…ôna kwakwar m…ôfa…ó. Maja mahura hay a ta h…ôtam mey da ray ata daa ba na, a kamatar mey ta g…ôdaŇč saya, ta‚Äô a mb…ôkdamata. Med…ôrey-daŇčgay Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu
4.23: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga *J…ôwif hay heyey ma mb…ôkdamata ata *Piyer ta *JaŇč la na, ta‚Äô, a v…ôham fa nd…ôhay ata hay. A kadamatara mey masa *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay kaa heyey ma l…ôvmatar.
4.24: Nd…ôhay ata hay a, a j…ôkfamatar sl…ômay. Ata tabiya ta‚Äô, a d…ôram daŇčgay Ňčgada Gazlavay ta mevel pal, a l…ôvam: ¬ęBay Gazlavay, Mawaca-waca, ara kah ma l…ôma slam da va…ó ta cek hay da hwa…ó a, ara kah ma l…ôma slam da hwayak ta cek hay da hwa…ó a, ara kah ma ka b…ôlay ta cek hay da hwa…ó a.
4.25: Ara kah maa guzley zleezle ta mey ndaw akah, *Davit, papaŇč Ňčga papa ala. Ka wuzdara ta fa Mes…ôfney akah amba a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba fa yam mey na, maja me? A slam yawa Ňčga tede Ňčga n…ôsey Bay Gazlavay na, maja me?
4.26: Bay hay da b…ôla ke…óe fa cakalam mey, mahura hay fa kusam Ňčga key v…ôram ta Bay Gazlavay leŇč ta ndaw masa aŇčga ma wala.‚ÄĚ
4.27: Ahaw, cek aha ta key la anda ke…óe. Fara fara, Bay *Herawt ta *Pawns Pilat ta nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba, ta *Israyel hay, ata tabiya ta kusam la daa berney a ke…óe, da ray Yesu, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra akah masa kah ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.
4.28: Ata ma kamata cek hay tabiya ke…óe na, a kamara anda kah Bay Gazlavay ma wu…óey Ňčga ka ta g…ôdaŇč akah d…ôga zleezle.
4.29: Wure ke…óe, Bay Gazlavay, n…ôka, ata fa kamandar mey ta g…ôdaŇč. V…ôlndar g…ôdaŇč Ňčgada ala, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra akah hay, Ňčga wuzey mey akah ta mand…ôrzay daa dey ba s…ôlak.
4.30: Wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč akah! Mb…ôldata masa-macay hay, key maazla hay Ňčga wuzwa g…ôdaŇč akah aa ta ala, ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Yesu, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra akah.¬Ľ
4.31: Ata ma nd…ôvdamara med…ôrey-daŇčgay la na, slam masa ata ma kusam da hwa…ó a, a wusey g…ô…ó-ge…ó. Ata tabiya mar…ôhtakaya ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, a wuzdamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta mand…ôrzay daa dey saba. Nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu a j…ônam vaw da wuzlah ata
4.32: Nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu tabiya a njam mewulkey ata letek, mevel ata mac…ômkaya pal. Ndaw masa ma l…ôvey: ¬ęZleley a…óaw na, yah pal ma wa¬Ľ na, daa ba. Ama a wunkamara zleley ata hay da wuzlah ata.
4.33: Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu a kam sede da ray masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu daa mem…ôcey na, ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay. Ata tabiya, Bay Gazlavay ta p…ôstar mey la ga.
4.34: Da wuzlah ata na, kwa ndaw ma hurey cek mez…ômey daa ba. Ndaw masa ley aŇčga daha, da daa ba, way aŇčga daha na, a h…ô…ókada. A hand…ôrwa dala ha
4.35: a har nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey a. Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey a, a wunkamatara dala ha Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu. A v…ôldamara dala ha Ňčgada ndaw a ndaw a t…ô…óe Ňčga wusa.
4.36: Ndaw da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu a daha, mez…ôley *Jawzef. AŇčga ndaw daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Levi, a yawa da Sip…ôre. Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey a, a z…ôlmara na, *Barnabas, anda mel…ôvey ¬ęndaw ma v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
4.37: Ley aŇčga daha. A h…ô…ókada ley a. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a hand…ôrwa dala ha, a v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey hay.

5.1: Ndaw daha mez…ôley *Ananiyas ta Ňčgwas aŇčga Safira, a c…ômdamara …óay ata letek. Ta‚Äô, Ananiyas a h…ô…ókada ley ata.
5.2: A wunka dala ha cew, ta‚Äô, a …ďada siya. Siya may, a handatara a nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey heyey, a v…ôldatara anda ara dala Ňčga ley ata ha c…ôpa. Ňägwas aŇčga a s…ôra cek masa zel e ma ka.
5.3: Ama *Piyer a l…ôvar: ¬ęAnaniyas, ka mb…ôkda *SataŇč amba a mb…ôzey aa mevel akah na, maja me? Ka ta …ďad…ôrwa siya Ňčga dala Ňčga ley akah ha sem. Anda ke…óe, ka ta mb…ôrzla *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay sem.
5.4: Daa masa kah ma h…ô…ókada daa ba na, kah ma wa, ba diya? Kwa kah ma h…ô…ókada la ke…óe, kah ma wa dala ha. Ka wulkey daa ray akah Ňčga key cek ke…óe na, maja me? Ka mb…ôrzley kaa na, nd…ôhay ba, ama ka mb…ôrzley Gazlavay.¬Ľ
5.5: Masa Ananiyas ma c…ônda mey a la anda ke…óe na, a t…ô…óey, pam! a m…ôcey. Mand…ôrzay a katar kwa ara mey ba, a nd…ôhay ma c…ôndamara mey a.
5.6: Ta‚Äô, gula hay a samawa, a mb…ôzmara vagay a, a badam…ôrwa, a diyam a p…ôshamara aa c…ôvay.
5.7: Ler maakar fa d…ô…ďa ha na, Ňčgwas aŇčga, a wuswa. Ama a s…ôra cek masa ma key ta zel e ba.
5.8: Piyer aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKadiwa, ka h…ô…ókadamara ley akwar na, dala ha ke…óe tar daw?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAhaw, ya h…ô…ókadamara k…ône.¬Ľ
5.9: Anda ke…óe, ta‚Äô, Piyer a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa c…ômdamara …óay akwar ta zel akah, Ňčga jedey Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, maja me? Ehe, gula hay ma p…ôshamara zel akah, ata fa mey-slam. A da p…ôshamaka k…ône may.¬Ľ
5.10: Wure wure Ňčgene, Ňčgwas aha a t…ô…óey fa mey aŇčga, pam! a m…ôcey. Gula hay ke…óe heyey a mb…ôzmawa, a h…ôtfamara ta m…ôcey sem. Ta‚Äô, a lamara, a handamara, a p…ôshamara a cakay zel e.
5.11: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mand…ôrzay a katar ga ara mey ba Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz tabiya ta Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma c…ôndamara mey a. Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu a kam maazla hay
5.12: Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu fa kam maazla hay ga da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčga wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay. Fa …óar a, fa …óar a, nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu tabiya fa diyam aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, fa kusam fete…óe ta mevel pal dasi Balak Ňčga *SalamaŇčw heyey.
5.13: Nd…ôhay siya ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu fara fara ba na, a wu…óam Ňčga kusey ta ata ba, maja a zluram, ama nd…ôhay tabiya faa h…ômdamata nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu a c…ôŇčga.
5.14: Mandaw mandaw nd…ôhay fa samawa a dey a, a dey a, zel hay, Ňčgusay, fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Bay Mahura, a c…ômam a dey nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu heyey.
5.15: Maja nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu a fa kam maazla hay ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay na, nd…ôhay a handamawa masa-macay hay a mey-c…ôve…ó. A handamat…ôrwa fete…óe, a nadamata a ray …ďe…ďele hay, da daa ba, a ray geg…ôde…ó hay, amba da masa *Piyer fa daw taa c…ôve…ó e Ňčgene na, meeze…ó aŇčga a wusey a ray siya hay, a mb…ôlam.
5.16: Nd…ôhay ga a samawa da slala hay mekele mekele masa gweegwe ta berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem, a handamawa masa-macay hay, ta nd…ôhay masa ta malula da ray. Nd…ôhay a tabiya ta mb…ôlam sem. A s…ôrdamata banay ta nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu
5.17: Yaw, *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay da cakay a, anda mel…ôvey nd…ôhay masa da wuzlah *Saduse hay, s…ôleŇč a katar ga ta nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu heyey. A slam yawa amba a s…ôrdamata banay.
5.18: Ta‚Äô, a k…ôrzamata meedey nd…ôhay tabiya, a handamata aa f…ôrs…ône.
5.19: Ama dasi tava…ó Ňčgene, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay a pawa salay da va…ó, a wura mey-slam Ňčga f…ôrs…ône he, a badat…ôrwa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey heyey, a l…ôvtar:
5.20: ¬ęDiyam aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, wuzdamatara mey hay tabiya da ray heter mawiya a nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
5.21: Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey heyey a c…ônmar mey a maslaŇč a. Slam b…ôŇč-beŇč na, ta‚Äô, a diyam, a mb…ôzam aa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, a zlamar Ňčgaa s…ôrkadamata nd…ôhay. Daa Ňčgene, ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay da cakay a, a kusmat…ôrwa bay-ray hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay tabiya Ňčga sley yawa. Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôram nd…ôhay Ňčga Ňčg…ôlmat…ôrwa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu kaa heyey daa f…ôrs…ône.
5.22: Nd…ôhay heyey a wusam aa f…ôrs…ône he na, ta h…ôtfamatar nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu daa ba. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôhmawa, a kadamatara a nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa kaa heyey,
5.23: a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęAla ta h…ôtfamatar daa ba. Ya wusam na, mey-slam mag…ôrcakaya maaya maaya, nd…ôhay ma j…ô…ómata ata fa mey-slam a, ama ya wurmara mey-slam a, ya mb…ôzam aa way a na, nd…ôhay a, ata da hwa…ó a daa saba.¬Ľ
5.24: *Bay-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay ma j…ô…óa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay kaa heyey a c…ôndamara na, mey a, a h…ô…ďtar ray, a s…ôrmara cek ma key ta nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey kaa heyey ba.
5.25: Ndaw daha, ta‚Äô, a sawa, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęEhe, j…ôkam sl…ômay, nd…ôhay masa akwar ma nd…ôkwdamata aa f…ôrs…ône heyey na, ata daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, faa s…ôrkadamata nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
5.26: Ta‚Äô, bay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma j…ô…óa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta sewje aŇčga hay a diyam, a Ňčg…ôlmat…ôrwa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey heyey. Sewje hay a, ta kamatar mey ta g…ôdaŇč daa ba, maja a zluram nd…ôhay a daa zakamata ta aŇčgwa.
5.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa sewje hay a ma Ňčg…ôlmat…ôrwa la na, ta‚Äô, a lacadamata fa mey Ňčga mahura hay ma sla yawa ha. *Ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey aa c…ôf…óata,
5.28: a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAla ta t…ôkmakwar sem Ňčga wuzey mey a nd…ôhay da ray ndaw aha, ama akwar fa kamara c…ôŇčga. Fara fara, akwar ta wuzdamara mey a sem a nd…ôhay tabiya da *Jeruzelem. Asaya, ka wu…óam nd…ôhay tabiya a wulkam na, ara ala ma k…ô…ómara ndaw aha, ba diya?¬Ľ
5.29: *Piyer ta nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey siya a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęSi c…ôma ya c…ônmar mey a Gazlavay da ray ala ma da c…ônmatar mey a nd…ôhay.
5.30: Akwar ta k…ô…ómara Yesu la vagay fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya. Ama Gazlavay Ňčga papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay ta sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa sem daa mem…ôcey.
5.31: Yesu a na, ara ndaw masa Gazlavay ma la a va…ó a har-z…ômay aŇčga. A pa Ňčga ndaw mahura, Bay ma l…ôhdata nd…ôhay. A ka k…ône amba a wurey c…ôve…ó Ňčgada nd…ôhay *Israyel hay Ňčga mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata, Ňčga s…ôpam Gazlavay ta mevel pal, amba Gazlavay a mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey ata.
5.32: Ala na, ya fa kam sede da ray cek hay a ke…óe. *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay fa key sede da ray a k…ône may, Mes…ôfney masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay ma c…ônmar mey.¬Ľ
5.33: Nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa heyey a c…ôndamara na, mevel a catar ga ara mey ba, a wu…óam Ňčga k…ô…ómata vagay.
5.34: Ama ndaw Fariza pal da wuzlah ata daha, mez…ôley aŇčga Gamaliyel. AŇčga ndaw mahura maa s…ôrkada *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, nd…ôhay tabiya faa h…ômdamara. Ta‚Äô, a lecey da wuzlah mahura hay ma sla yawa kaa heyey, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay Ňčga badamat…ôrwa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu a …óagay.
5.35: Fa d…ô…ďa ha a l…ôvtar a mahura hay ma sla yawa ha: ¬ęAkwar Israyel hay, wam vaw da ray cek masa akwar ma da kamatara a nd…ôhay ke…óe.
5.36: S…ôrfadamara, zleezle ndaw mez…ôley Tewdas ta sawa la, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYah, ndaw mahura.‚ÄĚ Nd…ôhay ga, a key temere m…ôfa…ó ma s…ôpmara. Ama nd…ôhay mekele hay ta k…ô…ómara sem vagay. Nd…ôhay ma s…ôpmara tabiya heyey, taa kwacam ray sem, mey a daa saba.
5.37: Fa d…ô…ďa aŇčga, ndaw daha mez…ôley Juda, ndaw *Galile. AŇčga ta sawa la daa …óar hay masa nd…ôhay fa sl…ôfam vaw. AŇčga ha na, ta h…ôldata nd…ôhay la Ňčga s…ôpmara, nd…ôhay ga ta diyam la asiya. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a k…ô…ómara vagay saya, nd…ôhay ma diyam asiya heyey taa kwacam ray sem may.
5.38: Da ray Ňčgene, ya fa l…ôvkwar: ka da h…ô…ďam ray maja nd…ôhay a ke…óe saba, mb…ôkdamata Ňčga diyam. Mewulkey ata ta sl…ôra ata ha, da a sawa ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč na, a nd…ôvey la.
5.39: Ama da mewulkey ata ta sl…ôra ata ha a sawa ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay na, Ňčgene ka gwamara Ňčgaa z…ô…ódamara daa ba. Wam vaw, ka da k…ô…óam vaw ta Gazlavay ba.¬Ľ Mahura hay ma sla yawa heyey, ta‚Äô, a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga.
5.40: A z…ôlmat…ôrwa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey heyey. A sl…ô…ómata, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęKa da wuzam mey da ray Yesu saba.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkdamata.
5.41: Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey a, a sl…ôkdam, a mb…ôkdamata nd…ôhay ma sla yawa heyey, ta‚Äô, a diyam ta mees…ômey maja Gazlavay ta n…ôkta la, ata t…ô…óe Ňčga s…ôrey banay maja Yesu.
5.42: Mandaw mandaw ata fa diyam aa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč a way nd…ôhay mekele mekele. Ata faa s…ôrkadamatara *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray Yesu a nd…ôhay fete…óe, kwa a mb…ôkdamara ba. Ata fa wuzdamatara Yesu na, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.

6.1: Daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fa s…ôkmawa, a dey a, a dey a. Da wuzlah ata na, *J…ôwif hay maa guzlam mey G…ôrek daha. A yam mey ta J…ôwif hay mekele daa hwayak a Ňčgene, a l…ôvam: ¬ęŇägwas-vagay hay masa da wuzlah ala, fa h…ôtam cek mez…ômey masa ata ma wunkamatara mandaw mandaw na, daa ba.¬Ľ
6.2: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey kuraw a ray a cew heyey, ta‚Äô, a kusmata nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu tabiya, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęAla na, ya mb…ôkdamara mewuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay, amba ya wunkam …óaf na, a zl…ôrda ba.
6.3: M…ôlma ala hay, maaya na, ka walam *nd…ôhay maasala da wuzlah akwar, masa nd…ôhay faa h…ômdamata, masa mar…ôhtakaya ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, nd…ôhay masa ta leŇčgesl, amba ya v…ôldamatara sl…ôra ha asi har ata.
6.4: Ala na, ya v…ôldamara ray ala Ňčga d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay, ta Ňčga wuzey mey aŇčga.¬Ľ
6.5: Mey a ke…óe a mbafatar a nd…ôhay tabiya. Ta‚Äô, a walam Etiyen, ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu maaya maaya, mar…ôhkaya ta Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, leŇč *F…ôlep, P…ôrakwar, Nikanawr, TimaŇčw, Parmanas, asaya, Nikwala, ndaw Antiyaws masa ma mb…ôkda kwakwas aŇčga zleezle Ňčga s…ôpey kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay.
6.6: Ta‚Äô, a handamat…ôrwa nd…ôhay maasala ha fa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey heyey. Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey a, ta‚Äô, a d…ôram daŇčgay, a pamatar har a ray, amba a kamara sl…ôra ata ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay.
6.7: Yaw, mey Ňčga Gazlavay fa daw fa mey fa mey. Da *Jeruzelem nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fa s…ôkmawa a dey a, a dey a. Nd…ôhay ga ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu may. A k…ôrzamara Etiyen
6.8: Etiyen na, Bay Gazlavay ta p…ôsar mey la ga, a v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč aŇčga. Da ray Ňčgene, aŇčga fa key maazla hay ga ma r…ôzley ndaw da wuzlah nd…ôhay.
6.9: Ama nd…ôhay siya hay a zlamar Ňčga cakalafamar mey. Ara *J…ôwif hay ma samawa daa berney Ňčga Siren leŇč daa berney Ňčga Alekzand…ôri. Ata da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma kusam daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa ata ma z…ôlmara ¬ęWay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma bamawa daa beke.¬Ľ Mekele hay ma cakalafamar mey na, a samawa daa hwayak Ňčga Silisi leŇč daa hwayak Ňčga Azi. A zlamar Ňčga key yawa ta Etiyen e.
6.10: Ama ta gwamara a ray a daa ba, maja aa guzltar ta leŇčgesl masa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôldara.
6.11: Da ray Ňčgene, a diyam, a v…ôlmatar dala a nd…ôhay amba a mb…ôrzlam a ray Etiyen e, a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa c…ôndamara na, ndaw ke…óe fa c…ô…óa *Mawiz, fa c…ô…óa Gazlavay.¬Ľ
6.12: A h…ôldamata nd…ôhay c…ôpa, ta mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay, leŇč nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. Ta‚Äô, a diyam, a k…ôrzamara Etiyen, a handamara fa mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay.
6.13: Ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlmawa nd…ôhay memb…ôrzley, amba a l…ôvam: ¬ęMandaw mandaw, ndaw ke…óe faa guzley mey maaya ba da ray *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta da ray kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz.
6.14: Ya c…ôndamara, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYesu, ndaw *Nezeret, a b…ôzla Way al…ôkwa mekey kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay la, a mb…ô…ódata kwakwas masa Mawiz maa s…ôrkadandakwara la mekele.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
6.15: Nd…ôhay tabiya manjatakaya daa way mesley yawa fete…óe a n…ôkmara Etiyen nd…ôzl a, dey aŇčga fa we…óey anda dey Ňčga maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó.

7.1: *Ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay aa c…ôf…óa Etiyen, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMey masa ata ma kadamara ke…óe na, fara fara daw?¬Ľ
7.2: Etiyen a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvey: ¬ęM…ôlma a…óaw hay, ta papay hay, j…ôkfamaya sl…ômay. Gazlavay masa manjakaya daa slam ma we…óey na, ta wuzar vaw la a *Ab…ôraham, papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa, daa masa aŇčga daa hwayak Ňčga Mezapawtami, ta yiŇčgey aa berney Ňčga *HaraŇč daa ba araŇč.
7.3: Gazlavay a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBey daa hwayak akah, mb…ôkdata s…ôkway akah hay, daw aa hwayak masa yah ma da wuzdakawa.‚ÄĚ
7.4: Da ray Ňčgene, Ab…ôraham a sl…ôk…óey daa hwayak Ňčga nd…ôhay *Kalde, a daw a njey aa berney Ňčga HaraŇč. Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga mem…ôcey Ňčga papaha, Gazlavay, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar Ňčga yiŇčgey da HaraŇč a Ňčgadaa hwayak mekele. Maja Ňčgene, a sawa aa hwayak Ňčga Kana, masa al…ôkwa *J…ôwif hay da hwa…ó a wure ke…óe.
7.5: Ta‚Äô, a njey aa hwayak a, ama daa Ňčgene, Gazlavay ta v…ôldara hwayak a Ňčgada Ab…ôraham daa ba araŇč, kwa slam nek…ô…óey Ňčga pey salay daa hwayak a Ňčgene ta h…ôtey Ňčgada aŇčga daa ba araŇč. Daa Ňčgene, Ab…ôraham b…ôzey aŇčga daa ba araŇč, ama Gazlavay ta l…ôvar la, a da v…ôldara hwayak a Ňčgene amba a wey da ray a, asaya amba b…ôza hay Ňčga b…ôz aŇčga hay a wamara fa d…ô…ďa aŇčga.
7.6: Gazlavay a l…ôvar saya: ‚ÄúB…ôza hay Ňčga b…ôz akah hay a da njam daa hwayak Ňčga nd…ôhay mekele. Nd…ôhay a, a da wamata, a da kam beke Ňčga nd…ôhay a, a da s…ôrdamata banay haa mevey temere m…ôfa…ó.
7.7: Ama fa d…ô…ďa ha ya da katar sariya a nd…ôhay ma kadamata beke he, wara b…ôza hay a, a bamawa daa hwayak a, a v…ôhmawa, a ragadamaya la daa slam aha ke…óe.‚ÄĚ
7.8: Ta‚Äô, Bay Gazlavay a j…ôwam mey ta Ab…ôraham. *Mej…ôwey-mey aha na, ara ta fa *mesley mandawal. Anda ke…óe, Ab…ôraham a yawa *Izak. Fa d…ô…ďa ha luma pal na, a slara mandawal. Izak a slara Ňčga b…ôzey aŇčga, *Jakwap k…ône. Jakwap may, a slatara Ňčga b…ôz aŇčga hay kuraw a ray a cew k…ône. Ma yamat…ôrwa s…ôkway al…ôkwa hay kuraw a ray a cew ke…óe na, ara b…ôza hay Ňčga Jakwap.
7.9: ¬ęPapaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay a, masa b…ôza hay kuraw a ray a cew Ňčga Jakwap heyey, s…ôleŇč a katar da ray *Jawzef, m…ôlma ata. Ta‚Äô, a h…ô…ókadamara Ňčga key beke daa hwayak Ňčga *Ejip. Ama Gazlavay aa ta aŇčga,
7.10: fa j…ô…óa, a l…ôhda daa banay aŇčga hay tabiya. *FarawaŇč, bay daa hwayak Ňčga Ejip, a wulkey maaya da ray Jawzef maja Gazlavay ta v…ôlar leŇčgesl la. FarawaŇč, ta‚Äô, a pa Jawzef Ňčga ndaw mahura daa hwayak aŇčga, ta da way aŇčga tabiya.
7.11: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha, may ta key la ga daa hwayak Ňčga Ejip ta daa hwayak Ňčga Kana tabiya. Banay ga da ray nd…ôhay a daha. PapaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay, b…ôza hay Ňčga Jakwap heyey, a h…ôtam cek mez…ômey saba.
7.12: Ama Jakwap ma c…ônda cek mez…ômey daha da Ejip na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrdata b…ôz aŇčga hay. Ňägene ara mesl…ôrey Ňčgeeme.
7.13: A diyam Ňčga dey cew na, Jawzef ta‚Äô, a wuztar vaw a m…ôlmaha hay. Da ray Ňčgene, FarawaŇč, a s…ôrta s…ôkway Ňčga Jawzef hay.
7.14: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Jawzef ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey m…ôlmaha hay Ňčga Ňčg…ôlm…ôrwa papaha Jakwap ta nd…ôhay da way aŇčga tabiya Ňčga samawa, amba a njam bama. Nd…ôhay a tabiya ata kwakwar maasala a ray a zlam.
7.15: Ta‚Äô, Jakwap a daw a njey a Ejip. A m…ôcwa fete…óe. B…ôz aŇčga hay may, masa papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay tabiya, a m…ôcam fete…óe.
7.16: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a handamata vagay ata hay aa hwayak Ňčga Sikem, amba a p…ôshamat…ôrwa fete…óe aa c…ôvay Ňčga Ab…ôraham. C…ôvay a na, ara c…ôvay masa Ab…ôraham ma h…ô…óka fa b…ôza hay Ňčga Hamawr da Sikem e zleezle, a v…ôltar dala anda ata ma wu…óam.
7.17: ¬ęPas masa Gazlavay ma da ka cek anda aŇčga ma l…ôvar a Ab…ôraham zleezle na, gweegwe cay. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay *Israyel hay masa daa beke daa hwayak Ňčga Ejip heyey fa yam a dey a, a dey a. Ata ga fete…óe.
7.18: Ta‚Äô, a pam bay mekele da Ejip, bay a, a s…ôra Jawzef ba.
7.19: Bay a Ňčgene, ta key wewer sem da ray s…ôkway al…ôkwa hay Israyel hay, a s…ôrdata banay ta papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay heyey. A t…ôktar …óay a nd…ôhay Israyel hay a, Ňčga k…ôzlamata b…ôz ata hay gevew saw, amba a m…ôcam.
7.20: ¬ęDaa …óar a Ňčgene, a yam…ôrwa *Mawiz, aŇčga b…ôzey membey, ma mbafar a Gazlavay. A g…ôley da way papaha kiya maakar.
7.21: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a badam…ôrwa, a k…ôzlamara, ama dam Ňčga Bay FarawaŇč leŇč! a la. Ta‚Äô, a g…ôla anda b…ôzey da hwa…ó aŇčga.
7.22: Da ray Ňčgene, Mawiz aa s…ôrkey cek hay tabiya masa nd…ôhay da Ejip ma s…ôrmara. Mawiz a t…ôrey ndaw masa ta g…ôdaŇč, ta fa mey masa aa ma wuzda, asaya ta fa sl…ôra masa aa ma ka.
7.23: ¬ęMasa Mawiz ma key mevey kwakwar m…ôfa…ó cay na, a j…ôwey vaw Ňčga daw Ňčga n…ôkt…ôrwa m…ôlmaha hay Israyel hay.
7.24: Masa aŇčga ma wusey la na, a h…ôtar ndaw Ejip fa k…ô…óa ndaw ata. Ta‚Äô, a daw a j…ôna ndaw ata ha, a k…ô…óey vaw aa slam a Ňčga aŇčga, a k…ô…óa ndaw Ejip kaa heyey vagay.
7.25: Mawiz a wulkey na, m…ôlmaha hay Israyel hay a s…ôrmara ara ta fa aŇčga Gazlavay ma da badat…ôrwa da Ejip, ama ata na, a s…ôrmara ba.
7.26: ¬ęPep…ôrek e saya, Mawiz a h…ôtfatar Israyel hay cew fa k…ô…óam vaw. A wu…óey Ňčga wunkata amba a njam daa zazay, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúHaya, nd…ôhay ke…óe, akwar na, m…ôlmaŇč hay, ba diya? Kaa ka k…ô…óam vaw na, kwara?‚ÄĚ
7.27: Ama ndaw masa ma cakala mey na, a d…ôkda Mawiz, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúMa paka Ňčga bay Ňčga kandar sariya na, wa?
7.28: Ka wu…óey ka k…ô…óya vagay anda kah ma k…ô…óa ndaw Ejip Ňčgaa kwana heyey daw?‚ÄĚ
7.29: Mawiz a c…ônda ndaw kaa maa guzlar anda ke…óe na, mand…ôrzay a kar, ta‚Äô, a hway aa hwayak Ňčga MadiyaŇč. Manjakaya daa hwayak a na, aŇčga ndaw-m…ôlak. A yawa b…ôza hay mez…ôle hay cew fete…óe.
7.30: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha mevey kwakwar m…ôfa…ó saya, Mawiz aa da wuzlah-ley, gweegwe ta aŇčgwa Ňčga Sinay. MaslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay a pawa salay da va…ó, a wuzar vaw daa awaw, da wuzlah gwaslaf.
7.31: Mawiz a h…ôtar na, a r…ôzley. Masa aŇčga fa Ňčg…ôchey a cakay a amba a n…ôka maaya maaya na, a c…ônda …óay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay maa guzlwa da hwa…ó a, a l…ôvar:
7.32: ‚ÄúYah, Gazlavay masa papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay ma ragadamar. Ahaw yah, Gazlavay masa Ab…ôraham, Izak, leŇč Jakwap ma namar ray.‚ÄĚ Mawiz a zlurey, aa wesey, a wu…óey Ňčga n…ôka saba.
7.33: Bay Gazlavay a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúC…ôkwta tarak da salay la, maja slam masa kah malacakaya da hwa…ó a ke…óe na, slam aha ara slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a.
7.34: Fara fara, ya fa h…ôtar banay Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay da Ejip, ya fa c…ônda mat…ôway ata. Da ray Ňčgene, ya pawa salay na, amba ya l…ôhdata daa beke. Wure ke…óe na, daw, ya sl…ôrdaka a Ejip.‚ÄĚ
7.35: ¬ęYaw, Mawiz aha ara ndaw masa zleezle Israyel hay a ma wu…ómara ba, ma l…ôvmar: ‚ÄúMa paka Ňčga bay Ňčga kandar sariya na, wa?‚ÄĚ heyey. Ama Mawiz a na, ara ndaw masa Gazlavay ma pa Ňčga bay amba a l…ôhdata Israyel hay daa beke. Gazlavay a pa Ňčga bay Ňčga l…ôhdata na, ta fa maslaŇč ma wuzar vaw da wuzlah gwaslaf heyey.
7.36: Ara Mawiz ma badat…ôrwa Israyel hay da Ejip ta maazla hay masa aŇčga ma kata maja Gazlavay aa ta aŇčga. A kata maazla hay a na, daa hwayak Ňčga Ejip, da mey B…ôlay Magaza, leŇč da wuzlah-ley haa a key mevey kwakwar m…ôfa…ó.
7.37: Ara Mawiz a saya ma l…ôvtar a Israyel hay: ‚ÄúGazlavay a sl…ôrkwar *ndaw ma t…ôla mey la mekele daa s…ôkway akwar anda aŇčga ma sl…ôrdiwa ke…óe may.‚ÄĚ
7.38: Daa masa J…ôwif hay makustakaya da wuzlah-ley heyey na, ara Mawiz a, ma handa mey Ňčgada papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay, mey masa maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó maa guzlar daa aŇčgwa Ňčga Sinay. Asaya, ara aŇčga ma t…ô…ď…ôrwa *mewey Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôley heter a nd…ôhay, amba a wuzdandakwara.
7.39: ¬ęAma papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay a, a wu…óam Ňčga c…ônmar mey a Mawiz a ba, a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ba, a wu…óam Ňčga v…ôham a Ejip e c…ôŇčga.
7.40: Da ray Ňčgene, a l…ôvmar a *AraŇčw, ‚ÄúKandakwar kuley hay Ňčga j…ônndakwar daa mep…ôkey al…ôkwa hay. Mawiz ma badandakurwa da Ejip kaa na, ya s…ôrkwa cek ma kar ba.‚ÄĚ
7.41: Ta‚Äô, a v…ô…óam cek anda b…ôz-sla, a ragadamar, a tamara anda kuley ata, a kam gwagway ta mees…ômey maja cek aha masa ata ma kamara ta har ata.
7.42: Ama Gazlavay p…ôla! a mb…ô…ófatar d…ô…ďa, a mb…ôkdata Ňčga ragadam a wurzla hay da va…ó anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle. Daa …óerewel e, Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúAkwar nd…ôhay Israyel hay, daa masa akwar ma njam mevey kwakwar m…ôfa…ó da wuzlah-ley na, akwar ta h…ôrmaya g…ônaw hay la daw? Akwar ta v…ôlmaya cek hay la daw?
7.43: Daa ba s…ôlak! Ama ka tam na, kuley hay mekele mekele. Akwar ta lamara kuley mez…ôley Malakw la ta way a, a har. Asaya, akwar ta lamara kuley mal…ômkaya anda wurzla mez…ôley Refan la. Maja akwar ma l…ômamata kuley hay a ke…óe, ka ragadamatar na, ya handakwar la k…ôleŇč ma f…ôna hwayak Ňčga BabilaŇčw saya.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
7.44: Etiyen a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęPapaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay ta k…ôrcam way la zleezle da wuzlah-ley Ňčga pey *akwatay Ňčga mej…ôwey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay a hwa…ó a, a p…ôkam ta aŇčga. Ara Gazlavay ma wuzdara a Mawiz, a da k…ôrca way aha na, kwara. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Mawiz ta k…ôrca la anda Gazlavay ma wuzdara ha.
7.45: PapaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay ta p…ôkam la ta Way-mek…ôrcey aha, haa kasl Jes…ôwe ma key bay-ray ata. Ta pas masa Jes…ôwe ma key bay-ray ata na, Gazlavay a …ď…ôlta nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba daa hwayak ke…óe fa mey fa mey, amba J…ôwif hay a wamara hwayak a. Way-mek…ôrcey Ňčga Gazlavay ta ambal a na, aa daha haa kasl pas masa *Davit ma z…ôma bay aŇčga.
7.46: Davit ta h…ôtey maaya Ňčga Gazlavay la, aa c…ôf…óa Gazlavay Ňčga v…ôlar c…ôve…ó amba a l…ômar way mawiya Ňčgada Gazlavay masa Jakwap ma ragadar.
7.47: Ama, fa d…ô…ďa ha, ara Bay *SalamaŇčw ma l…ômra way mawiya ha Ňčgada Gazlavay.
7.48: ¬ęAma Bay Gazlavay da va…ó a njey daa way masa nd…ôhay ma l…ômamara ta har ata ba. Anda *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle ma l…ôvey:
7.49: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay a l…ôvey: Slam da va…ó na, ara slam Ňčga bay a…óaw, slam da hwayak may, ara slam-mepey-salay a…óaw. Ka l…ômamaya na, way wura? Slam a…óaw mem…ôskey-vaw na, wura?
7.50: Ara yah ma kata slam hay tabiya, ba diya?‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
7.51: Etiyen a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay ray maŇčg…ôr…óakaya hay! Akwar fa wu…ómara Gazlavay ta mevel akwar pal daa ba, ka c…ônmar mey ba s…ôlak! Mandaw mandaw, ka wu…óam *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a key sl…ôra daa akwar ba. Akwar na, anda papakw akwar hay zleezle.
7.52: *Ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, masa papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay ta s…ôrdamara banay daa ba na, daha daw? Nd…ôhay ma wuzdamara mey da ray ndaw pal masa maaya ma da sawa na, ara papakw akwar hay a ma k…ô…ómata vagay, ba diya? Wure ke…óe, akwar may, ka taa d…ô…ófamar mey la a ndaw masa maaya ha ke…óe, ka ta k…ô…ómara sem vagay.
7.53: Akwar na, Gazlavay ta sl…ôrdakwara kwakwas aŇčga la ta har maslaŇč aŇčga hay da va…ó. Ama akwar ta s…ôpmara kwakwas a daa ba.¬Ľ Aa zakamara Etiyen ta aŇčgwa
7.54: Nd…ôhay ma ka sariya heyey, mevel a catar a ray Etiyen ara mey ba. A zam har maja mevel ta catar la ga da ray mey masa Etiyen ma kada.
7.55: Ama Etiyen, mar…ôhkaya ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, a n…ôkey dey a va…ó, a h…ôtar mewe…óey Ňčga Gazlavay, a h…ôtar Yesu malacakaya ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Gazlavay.
7.56: Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvey: ¬ęEhe, slam da va…ó mawurkaya, ya fa h…ôtar *B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw malacakaya ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
7.57: Masa ata ma c…ôndamara Etiyen ma l…ôvey anda ke…óe la na, a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, a d…ôzlmata sl…ômay ata hay ta har. Ata tabiya a c…ômam a ray a,
7.58: a …óa…óamara, a badamara la daa berney, aa zakamara ta aŇčgwa. Masa ata fa daa zakamara na, a mb…ôkdamat…ôrwa j…ôbe ata hay fa ndaw mez…ôley *Sawl.
7.59: Daa masa ata faa zakamara na, Etiyen e a d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęBay Mahura Yesu, t…ô…ďa mes…ôfney a…óaw.¬Ľ
7.60: Ta‚Äô, a regedey, a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey: ¬ęBay Gazlavay, mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey ata ha ke…óe.¬Ľ AŇčga ma l…ôvey anda ke…óe la na, pam! a m…ôcey.

8.1: a Mem…ôcey Ňčga Etiyen e, a mbafar a Sawl. Sawl a s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu
8.2: 1b-3 Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay ma s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay ta mevel pal a lamara vagay Ňčga Etiyen, a p…ôshamara aa c…ôvay. A t…ôwam ga maja mem…ôcey aŇčga ha. Ta pas a Ňčgene, banay mahura a sawa a ray nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu da *Jeruzelem. *Sawl a, a s…ôpey c…ôve…ó Ňčga n…ôsta nd…ôhay a. A daw a s…ôpta nd…ôhay mez…ôle hay, ta Ňčgusay fa way a, fa way a. A k…ôrzata, a handata aa f…ôrs…ône. Daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu siya aa kwacam ray pal pal aa slam hay mekele mekele daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude leŇč daa hwayak Ňčga *Samari. Nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu masa mamb…ôkakaya da Jeruzelem na, si nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey gway.
8.4: Nd…ôhay maa kwacam ray heyey, fa p…ôkam kwa aa wura aa wura, fa wuzam *Mey-maaya-mawiya. F…ôlep a wuzey Mey-maaya-mawiya daa hwayak Ňčga Samari
8.5: Ňäga *F…ôlep na, ta‚Äô, a daw aa berney mahura daa hwayak Ňčga *Samari. Masa aŇčga ma wusey la fete…óe na, a wuztar mey a nd…ôhay daa berney a da ray *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.
8.6: Nd…ôhay daa berney a, a diyam, a kusam amba a c…ôndamara mey aŇčga, a n…ôkmara maazla hay masa aŇčga ma kata. Maja Ňčgene, a j…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya fa mey masa F…ôlep ma kadatara.
8.7: Malula a bey da ray nd…ôhay ga ta mewudey ta g…ôdaŇč, nd…ôhay masa maah…ôl…ďatakaya ta jegwer hay a h…ôtmatar salay ata hay aa slam a.
8.8: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay daa berney a aa s…ômam ga, ara mey ba.
8.9: Daa berney a Ňčgene, ndaw daha mez…ôley *SimaŇčw. Masa F…ôlep ta daw aa berney a daa ba araŇč na, SimaŇčw fa key maazla hay ga, ama maazla hay a na, a sawa ta fa Gazlavay ba. Ta r…ôzley nd…ôhay ga la da Samari ta maazla hay a. A pa ray aŇčga Ňčga ndaw mahura.
8.10: Maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay tabiya, b…ôza hay ta mahura hay daa hwayak a na, a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga. Aa guzlam da ray a, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAŇčga na, ara ndaw ta g…ôdaŇč masa ma z…ôlmara ‚Äúg…ôdaŇč mahura Ňčga Gazlavay.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
8.11: Nd…ôhay fete…óe a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga SimaŇčw a maaya maaya maja ta njey la ga da wuzlah ata, ta r…ôzlta la ta maazla hay mekele mekele masa aa ma kata.
8.12: Ama ta pas Ňčgene, F…ôlep a sawa, a wuztar *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray Yesu K…ôriste, ta da ray mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay. Nd…ôhay masa ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga F…ôlep e, ta h…ôtam *baptem la, kwa zel hay kwa Ňčgusay.
8.13: SimaŇčw, ndaw ma key maazla heyey, ta‚Äô, a t…ô…ďa mey a may. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a h…ôtey baptem, ta‚Äô a daw asi F…ôlep, a mb…ôkda saba. A r…ôzley maja aa ma h…ôtatar maazla hay mahura masa F…ôlep ma kata ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay.
8.14: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu da *Jeruzelem a c…ôndamara na, nd…ôhay da Samari ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay la. Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrmatar ata *Piyer ta *JaŇč.
8.15: Masa ata Piyer ta JaŇč ma wusam la fete…óe na, ta‚Äô, a d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay maja nd…ôhay a. Aa c…ôf…óamara amba Mes…ôfney aŇčga a sawa a ray ata.
8.16: A d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay a na, maja *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ta sawa kwa a ray ndaw pal dasi ata daa ba araŇč. Cek masa ata ma h…ôtam na, ara baptem ta mez…ôley Ňčga Yesu Bay Mahura gway.
8.17: Da ray Ňčgene, ata Piyer ta JaŇč a pamatar har a ray. Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a h…ôtam Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay d…ô…ďa.
8.18: Masa SimaŇčw ma h…ôtatar nd…ôhay ma h…ôtam Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay maja nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey a ma pamatar har a ray heyey na, ta‚Äô, a v…ôltar dala Ňčgada ata Piyer ta JaŇč heyey,
8.19: a l…ôvtar: ¬ęV…ôlmaya g…ôdaŇč a may, amba da ya ta pey har la a ray kwa waawa na, ndaw a h…ôtey Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay may.¬Ľ
8.20: Ama Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAnja Gazlavay Ňčga z…ô…ódaka ta dala akah ha c…ôpa, maja g…ôdaŇč masa Gazlavay ma v…ôlda a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay na, ka fa wulkey ka gwa Ňčga h…ô…óka ta dala.
8.21: Wure ke…óe mey akah daa sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay ke…óe daa ba, maja mevel akah ta mewulkey akah maaya ba fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
8.22: Mb…ôkda mekey meb…ôrey, cac…ôf…óey ambahw fa Gazlavay maja meb…ôrey akah. Da Gazlavay a mb…ôkdakawa mewulkey maaya ba daa mevel akah la kwa.
8.23: Ya n…ôka mevel akah na, matara. Kah ndaw masa s…ôleŇč, kah beke Ňčga meb…ôrey.¬Ľ
8.24: Ta‚Äô, SimaŇčw heyey a mb…ô…ódatara Ňčgada ata Piyer ta JaŇč heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAmbahw, akwar ta ray akwar, d…ôrmar daŇčgay a Gazlavay maja yah, amba mey masa akwar ma l…ôvam ke…óe na, a h…ôtfaya ba.¬Ľ
8.25: Masa ata Piyer ta JaŇč ma kam sede la da ray mey Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu, ma wuzdamatara la a nd…ôhay da Samari na, ta‚Äô, a v…ôham a Jeruzelem. Ata fa diyam daa c…ôve…ó na, a wuzam Mey-maaya-mawiya da slala hay mekele mekele daa hwayak Ňčga Samari. Ata F…ôlep ta ndaw Etiyawpi
8.26: MaslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay a l…ôvar a *F…ôlep: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, daw ta da wurza taa c…ôve…ó ma daw da *Jeruzelem Ňčgadaa berney Ňčga Gaza. C…ôve…ó e a daw ta wuzlah ley.¬Ľ
8.27: -28 F…ôlep, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a daw. Daa c…ôve…ó Ňčgene, a h…ôtar ndaw Etiyawpi fa daw a way. AŇčga ndaw mahura, *maaŇčgwa…óakaya Ňčga key mad…ôrlam Ňčga Kandas, Ňčgwas, bay ma wa hwayak Ňčga Etiyawpi. Ara aŇčga ma k…ôrza dala Ňčga Kandas a tabiya. Ndaw Etiyawpi a ta daw la a Jeruzelem, Ňčga ragadar a Bay Gazlavay. Fa v…ôhwa Ňčgada way ta seret Ňčga p…ôles. AŇčga fa jeŇčgey …óerewel Ňčga *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle.
8.29: *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a l…ôvar a F…ôlep: ¬ęDaw asi ndaw ta seret katay.¬Ľ
8.30: F…ôlep, ta‚Äô, a hway, a k…ôrza ndaw aha daa c…ôve…ó. Masa aŇčga ma c…ônda ndaw a fa jeŇčgey daa …óerewel Ňčga Izay, ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ta‚Äô, F…ôlep aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa fa c…ônda mey daa …óerewel masa kah ma jaŇčga Ňčgene daw?¬Ľ
8.31: Ndaw Etiyawpi heyey a mb…ô…ódara: ¬ęDa ndaw ta kadiwa daa ba na, ya da c…ônda kwara?¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a F…ôlep heyey Ňčga t…ôpwa aa seret aŇčga ha. F…ôlep, ta‚Äô, a t…ôpey, a njey a cakay a.
8.32: Mey daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay masa aŇčga ma jaŇčga ha na, mey a, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAŇčga na, anda t…ô…ďaŇč ma handamara Ňčga h…ôrey, aŇčga anda b…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč ma t…ôway ba kwa masa fa handamara Ňčga sley eŇčgwec aŇčga, ta wura mey aŇčga Ňčga t…ôway anda Ňčgene daa ba may.
8.33: A pam dey a ray a ba anda cek saw, a kamar sariya ta c…ôve…ó e ba. AŇčga ta mb…ôkey b…ôzey da b…ôla Ňčga z…ôley sl…ômay aŇčga daa ba, maja ta nd…ôvdamara heter aŇčga da b…ôla sem.¬Ľ
8.34: Ndaw Etiyawpi heyey a l…ôvar a F…ôlep: ¬ęAmbahw, kadiwa cey! Ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay kaa na, aa guzley da ray wa? Aa guzley da ray aŇčga ray aŇčga daw, da ray ndaw mekele daw?¬Ľ
8.35: Ta‚Äô, F…ôlep a wuzdara mey daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay a. A zla ta fa mey masa ndaw a ma jaŇčga ke…óe heyey, a wuzar mey da ray *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga Yesu.
8.36: Masa ata fa diyam daa c…ôve…ó, a wusam a mey yam daha. Ta‚Äô, ndaw Etiyawpi a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęEhe, yam ke…óe daha. Ma t…ôkya Ňčga h…ôtey *baptem na, me?¬Ľ [
8.37: F…ôlep a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa ka ta t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu la ta mevel pal na, ka gwa Ňčga h…ôtey baptem.¬Ľ Ndaw Etiyawpi a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYa ta t…ô…ďa Yesu *K…ôriste la, aŇčga B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ]
8.38: Ta‚Äô, ndaw Etiyawpi a, a l…ôvar a ndaw ma k…ôrza ray Ňčga p…ôles Ňčga lacada seret. Ata F…ôlep ta ndaw Etiyawpi a, a pamawa salay, a mb…ôzam aa yam. F…ôlep ta‚Äô, a kar baptem a ndaw aha.
8.39: Masa ata fa bamawa daa yam na, Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč! a la F…ôlep. Ndaw Etiyawpi a, a h…ôtar saba, ama fa daw ta mees…ômey ga.
8.40: Wure Ňčgene, F…ôlep a n…ôkey dey na, aŇčga daa berney Ňčga Azawtus. A daw ta mewuzey Mey-maaya-mawiya da slala hay tabiya daa c…ôve…ó haa kasl a wusey aa berney Ňčga Sezere.

9.1: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, *Sawl heyey fa s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay ma s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu c…ôŇčga. A l…ôvtar a da k…ô…óta vagay. Ta‚Äô, a daw fa *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay da *Jeruzelem.
9.2: Aa c…ôf…óa ndaw aha Ňčga wuzlalar leeter hay amba a handatara a *bay-ray hay daa way-mewuzey-mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay daa berney Ňčga Damas. A ka anda ke…óe, amba da ta h…ôtey nd…ôhay, kwa mez…ôle hay, kwa Ňčgusay, masa ma s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu fete…óe la na, a k…ôrzat…ôrwa, a handat…ôrwa a Jeruzelem.
9.3: AŇčga fa daw daa c…ôve…ó ma daw a Damas a, gweegwe cay a wusey na, wure wure Ňčgene, slam a wa…óawa p…ôray! da gazlavay da va…ó a ray a.
9.4: Ta‚Äô, a t…ô…óey a hwayak, a c…ôney …óay Ňčga ndaw ma z…ôla ta da va…ó, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSawl, Sawl, ka s…ôrdaya banay anda ke…óe na, maja me?¬Ľ
9.5: Sawl heyey aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, kah na, wa?¬Ľ ∆äay Ňčga ndaw ma z…ôla heyey a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAra yah, Yesu, ndaw masa kah ma s…ôrda banay.
9.6: Ama sl…ôk…óey, daw a Damas …óagay. Fete…óe, a wuzdamakawa cek masa kah ma da ka la.¬Ľ
9.7: Nd…ôhay masa ma diyam ta Sawl a, ata malacatakaya kwa ta gwamara Ňčga wurey mey daa ba maja mand…ôrzay fa katar kalah. Ata fa c…ôndamara …óay Ňčga ndaw maa guzley, ama ta h…ôtmar ndaw aha daa ba.
9.8: Sawl a lecey, a wura dey, ama a gwa Ňčga h…ôtar dey saba. Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a k…ôrzamara fa har, a handamara a Damas.
9.9: ∆äar maakar, a h…ôtar dey ba, a z…ômey cek ba, kwa a sey yam ba.
9.10: Daa berney Ňčga Damas a, ndaw ma s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu fete…óe daha mez…ôley *Ananiyas. Bay Mahura a wu…óey Ňčga wuzar cek masa aa ma da ka. Maja Ňčgene a z…ôla, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAnaniyas!¬Ľ Ananiyas a zlar mey: ¬ęAway, Bay Mahura, yah ke…óe!¬Ľ
9.11: Bay Mahura a l…ôvar: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, daw wure wure ke…óe aa C…ôve…ó C…ôr-cer, s…ôpa way Ňčga Juda. Fete…óe, cac…ôf…óa ndaw daha mez…ôley Sawl, ndaw daa berney Ňčga Tars. AŇčga fa d…ôrey daŇčgay.
9.12: Daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay a, cek a wuzar, a h…ôtar ndaw mez…ôley Ananiyas, ma daw fa v…ô…óa Ňčga par har a ray, amba dey aŇčga a wurey, a h…ôtar dey saya.¬Ľ
9.13: Ananiyas a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay Mahura, nd…ôhay ga taa guzlmaya la da ray ndaw aha. A l…ôvmaya aŇčga ta s…ôrdata banay la ga ta nd…ôhay akah hay da Jeruzelem.
9.14: AŇčga ma sawa fe…óe kaa na, ara bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôlm…ôrwa c…ôve…ó Ňčga k…ôrzey nd…ôhay tabiya ma t…ô…ďa mey akah.¬Ľ
9.15: Ta‚Äô, Bay Mahura a l…ôvar a Ananiyas: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, daw, maja ya ta wala ndaw aha sem amba a kaya sl…ôra, a wuzdatara mey da ray a…óaw a nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay, a bay ata hay, leŇč a nd…ôhay *Israyel hay.
9.16: Yah, ta ray a…óaw, ya da wuzdara banay masa aŇčga ma da s…ôra ga daa sl…ôra ha maja yah.¬Ľ
9.17: Ananiyas, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a daw. A nd…ôkwey a way heyey, a h…ôtfar Sawl, ta‚Äô, a par har a ray, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSawl, m…ôlma a…óaw, Bay Mahura Yesu a sl…ôrdiwa fa akah. Ara aŇčga ma wuzka vaw daa c…ôve…ó masa ka fa sawa fe…óe. A sl…ôrdiwa amba ka h…ôtar dey c…ôŇčga, amba Bay Gazlavay a r…ôhdaka ta Mes…ôfney aŇčga.¬Ľ
9.18: Wure Ňčgene, cek hay anda mees…ôftey Ňčga ewet a k…ôzlmawa daa dey Ňčga Sawl a. Dey aŇčga wur! a wurey. A sl…ôk…óey, a kamar *baptem.
9.19: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a z…ômey cek, a h…ôtar g…ôdaŇč aŇčga saya. Sawl a wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay da Damas Sawl ta njawa la …óar nek…ô…óey ta nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu da Damas.
9.20: Wure wure Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a daw aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe, a wuztar mey a nd…ôhay, a l…ôvtar Yesu na, ara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay.
9.21: Nd…ôhay masa ma c…ôndamara mey aŇčga tabiya a r…ôzlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe na, ara ndaw maa z…ô…ódata nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da *Jeruzelem heyey, ba diya? A sawa fe…óe kaa na, Ňčga k…ôrzata amba a handata fa *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, ba diya?¬Ľ
9.22: Ama fa …óar a, fa …óar a, *Sawl fa wuzey mey maaya maaya ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, a l…ôvey Yesu na, ara *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay. Anda ke…óe, *J…ôwif hay daa berney Ňčga Damas a, a s…ôrmara a da mb…ô…ódamara aa mey aŇčga kwara saba.
9.23: Fa d…ô…ďa ha …óar ga, J…ôwif hay a slam yawa amba a k…ô…ómara Sawl a vagay.
9.24: J…ôwif hay a fa j…ô…ómara mey-mbew hay Ňčga berney a taa va…ó, taa pas, amba a k…ôrzamara Sawl a, a k…ô…ómara vagay. Ama wewer masa ata ma kamara na, Sawl a, ta c…ônda sem.
9.25: Da ray Ňčgene, ta tava…ó, gula aŇčga hay, ta‚Äô, a s…ôhwdamara a cakay mahwal Ňčga Damas, a pamara aa cakarak, a t…ôldamara ta laza taa maŇčgalaw Ňčga mahwal a kasl a hwayak a dey laŇčgar Ňčga berney a. Sawl a v…ôhwa a Jeruzelem
9.26: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *Sawl a v…ôhwa a *Jeruzelem , a s…ôpey c…ôve…ó Ňčga c…ômey ta nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu, ama nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu a, a zluram ta aŇčga, a wulkam aŇčga ta t…ôrey ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fara fara daa ba.
9.27: Ama *Barnabas na, ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôla, a handa fa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu. A kadatara mey da ray Sawl ma h…ôtar Bay Mahura daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Damas, ta mey masa Bay Mahura maa guzldara. A wuzdatara mey da ray Sawl a daa masa Sawl fa wuzda mey Ňčga Yesu da Damas ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba.
9.28: D…ôga ta pas Ňčgene, Sawl a njam ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu fete…óe. A p…ôkam ta ata da Jeruzelem. A wuzey mey da ray Bay Mahura Yesu a nd…ôhay ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba.
9.29: Aa guzltar a *J…ôwif hay maa guzlam mey G…ôrek, a kam yawa ta ata. Ama ata na, a s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga k…ô…ómara vagay.
9.30: M…ôlmaŇč hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu a c…ôndamara J…ôwif hay a fa wu…óam Ňčga k…ô…ómara vagay na, a Ňčg…ôlmara aa berney Ňčga Sezere da mey-b…ôlay, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôzdamara aa kwambiwal Ňčga daw aa berney Ňčga Tars .
9.31: Yaw, daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude, daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile, leŇč daa hwayak Ňčga *Samari na, manjatakaya ta zazay. Fa …óar a, fa …óar a, fa h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč daa met…ô…ďey-mey Ňčga Yesu ma f…ôna ma f…ôna. Daa menjey ata na, fa namar ray a Gazlavay. *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay aa ta ata. Maja Ňčgene, mec…ômey-ray hay a fa s…ôkmawa a dey a, a dey a. Ene, ndaw maah…ôl…ďakaya, a h…ôtar salay aŇčga
9.32: *Piyer fa p…ôkey kwa aa wura aa wura. Pas laŇčgar daha a daw Ňčga n…ôkwa nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu daa berney Ňčga Lida.
9.33: Daa berney a Ňčgene, ndaw daha mez…ôley Ene, salay maah…ôl…ďakaya. Aa manakaya mevey daaŇčgafa…ó, a gwa a lecey ba. Piyer a h…ôtar ndaw aha na,
9.34: ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar: ¬ęEne, Yesu *K…ôriste ta mb…ôldaka sem. Lecey, pa…óa geg…ôde…ó akah ta har akah.¬Ľ Wure Ňčgene, ndaw aha a lecey.
9.35: Nd…ôhay tabiya daa berney Ňčga Lida ha ta nd…ôhay da SaraŇčw, a h…ôtmar ndaw aha, maja Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu. Tabita a sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey
9.36: Daa berney Ňčga Jawpe Ňčgwas daha mez…ôley Tabita. Ara Ňčgwas ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu. A z…ôlmara ta mey G…ôrek ¬ęDawurkas,¬Ľ anda mel…ôvey ¬ęmeweney.¬Ľ AŇčga mandaw mandaw fa key sl…ôra maaya, fa j…ônta masa-viya hay.
9.37: Ama vaw, ta‚Äô, a car, pam! a m…ôcey. Masa aŇčga ma m…ôcey la na, ta‚Äô, a p…ôrmara vagay a, a pamara aa way da ray way.
9.38: Nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da Jawpe a c…ôndamara na, *Piyer aa da Lida fete…óe. Berney Ňčga Lida ha gweegwe ta berney Ňčga Jawpe. Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôram nd…ôhay cew fa v…ô…óa, amba aa c…ôf…óam…ôrwa, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAmbahw, nakwa la fa ala fiyaw cey!¬Ľ
9.39: Masa Piyer ma c…ônda anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, a diyam ta nd…ôhay kaa heyey a Jawpe, kwa ta z…ônam vaw daa ba. A wusam, a Ňčg…ôlmara Piyer, a handamara aa way masa da va…ó da ray way heyey. Ňägusay fa yideŇč hay tabiya masa fete…óe, a Ňčg…ôchamawa a cakay Piyer, fa t…ôwam, a wuzdamara zana ata hay masa Tabita ma t…ôftara daa masa aŇčga ta dey.
9.40: Fa d…ô…ďa ha Piyer a badat…ôrwa nd…ôhay tabiya aa ambaw, a regedey, a d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay. Ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…óey dey fa vagay a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęTabita, sl…ôk…óey.¬Ľ Tabita a wura dey. Masa aŇčga ma h…ôtar Piyer na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a njey.
9.41: Piyer a k…ôrza fa har, a j…ôna Ňčga lecey. Ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa Ňčgusay fa yideŇč hay heyey leŇč nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe, a wuzdatara Tabita heyey, a h…ôtmar aŇčga ta dey.
9.42: Mey a, a wusey fa nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Jawpe tabiya. Nd…ôhay ga a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Bay Mahura.
9.43: Piyer ta njey la ga daa berney Ňčga Jawpe da way ndaw ma k…ôf…óa ambal, mez…ôley *SimaŇčw.

10.1: Ndaw daa berney Ňčga Sezere daha mez…ôley Kwerney. AŇčga mahura Ňčga sewje hay temere. Ata da wuzlah sewje hay Ňčga Rawma hay mez…ôley ¬ęSewje hay ma samawa da Itali.¬Ľ
10.2: Ndaw aha fa s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay ta mevel pal. AŇčga ta nd…ôhay da way aŇčga hay ndav fa namar ray a Gazlavay anda *J…ôwif hay. Fa j…ônta masa-viya hay ga da wuzlah J…ôwif hay, fa d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay mandaw mandaw.
10.3: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, ta pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó …ď…ôrey maakar, Gazlavay a wuzar cek a Kwerney a. A h…ôtar *maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay ma sawa da va…ó maaya maaya ta dey aŇčga, maslaŇč a mb…ôzey fa v…ô…óa. Ta‚Äô, a z…ôla: ¬ęKwerney!¬Ľ
10.4: Kwerney a n…ôka maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay a, mand…ôrzay a kar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęBay a…óaw, mekey me?¬Ľ MaslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay kaa a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęGazlavay ta c…ônda med…ôrey-daŇčgay akah la, ta h…ôtka la masa kah fa j…ônta masa-viya hay. Cek hay a ke…óe a mbafar. Da ray Ňčgene, aa fa s…ôrfadaka.
10.5: Wure ke…óe, sl…ôrey nd…ôhay aa berney Ňčga Jawpe Ňčga z…ôlwa ndaw daha mez…ôley *SimaŇčw, masa meh…ôlmey *Piyer.
10.6: AŇčga da way ndaw daha ma k…ôf…óa ambal mez…ôley SimaŇčw, way aŇčga da mey-b…ôlay.¬Ľ
10.7: Masa maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzlar heyey ma v…ôhey la na, Kwerney, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlwa mad…ôrlam aŇčga hay cew ta sewje pal da wuzlah sewje aŇčga hay masa daa sl…ôra aŇčga. Sewje he Ňčgene, ara ndaw ma s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay ta mevel pal.
10.8: Ta‚Äô, a kadatara cek tabiya ma kam. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrdata aa berney Ňčga Jawpe fa Piyer.
10.9: Pep…ôrek e, nd…ôhay masa Kwerney ma sl…ôrdata heyey ata daa c…ôve…ó gweegwe a wusam a Jawpe heyey. Gweegwe ta wuzlah-pas na, Piyer ta‚Äô, a t…ôpey aa papalah da ray way Ňčga d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay.
10.10: Masa aŇčga fa d…ôrey daŇčgay na, may fa car, a wu…óey …óaf Ňčga z…ômey. Daa masa fa tamar …óaf a na, Gazlavay ta‚Äô, a wuzar cek.
10.11: A h…ôtar slam da va…ó mawurkaya, cek anda gwedeere a pawa salay a hwayak, cakay hay m…ôfa…ó mabaŇčga…óatakaya.
10.12: Daa gwedeere he, cek hay Ňčga ley mekele mekele da hwa…ó a, cek hay masa salay m…ôfa…ó, cek hay ma diyam ta hwa…ó ta hwa…ó, leŇč …óiyaŇč hay.
10.13: ∆äay a c…ônwa da va…ó, a l…ôvey: ¬ęPiyer, lecey, sley …óay Ňčga cek hay a ke…óe, z…ômey!¬Ľ
10.14: Ama Piyer a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ę‚ÄôA‚Äôa, Bay Mahura, Ňčga menjey a…óaw, cek masa kwakwas ala ma t…ôka sem na, ya ta z…ômey daa ba araŇč.¬Ľ
10.15: ∆äay heyey, ta‚Äô, a c…ônwa saya, a l…ôvar: ¬ęCek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey maaya Ňčga z…ômey na, ka da pada Ňčga cek maaya ba na, k…ône ba.¬Ľ
10.16: ∆äay a, a c…ônwa dey maakar, fa d…ô…ďa ha, cek aha ta‚Äô, a v…ôhey aa slam a, a va…ó.
10.17: Piyer fa wulkada cek masa Gazlavay ma wuzdara, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvar na, me. Daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay masa Kwerney ma sl…ôrdata heyey faa c…ôf…óam nd…ôhay, a l…ôvam: ¬ęWay Ňčga SimaŇčw na, dama?¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a diyam, a lacam daa ambaw …óagay.
10.18: A z…ôlam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw mez…ôley SimaŇčw, masa meh…ôlmey Piyer daha na, aŇčga fe…óe daw?¬Ľ
10.19: Piyer a lawa daa slam med…ôrey-daŇčgay heyey, fa wulkey da ray cek masa Gazlavay ma wuzdara. Ta‚Äô, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a l…ôvar: ¬ęEhe, nd…ôhay daha maakar fa s…ôpmaka.
10.20: Sl…ôk…óey, b…ôrŇčgey fa ata amba ka diyam bama. Ka da zlurey ba, maja ara Yah ma sl…ôrdat…ôrwa.¬Ľ
10.21: Piyer, ta‚Äô, a b…ôrŇčgawa fa nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAra yah, ndaw masa akwar ma s…ôpmara. Ka samawa na, kwara?¬Ľ
10.22: Nd…ôhay a, a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęYa samawa na, Kwerney, mahura Ňčga sewje hay, ma sl…ôrdand…ôrwa. AŇčga na, ndaw maaya fa Gazlavay, kwa aŇčga ndaw J…ôwif ba, aŇčga fa s…ôpa mey Ňčga Gazlavay anda J…ôwif hay. J…ôwif hay tabiya faa h…ômdamara. Ndaw a na, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó ta sawa la fa v…ô…óa, a l…ôvar Ňčga sawa Ňčga Ňčg…ôlka a way aŇčga, amba a j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey masa kah ma da kadara.¬Ľ
10.23: Piyer, ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlta Ňčgada way, a v…ôltar slam Ňčga ney dasi tava…ó a Ňčgene. Piyer a daw a way Kwerney Pep…ôrek e, a sl…ôk…óam, a diyam ta ata Piyer heyey. M…ôlmaha hay siya daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da Jawpe a l…ôgdamata.
10.24: Pep…ôrek e saya, a wusam aa berney Ňčga Sezere. Daa Ňčgene, Kwerney ta z…ôlt…ôrwa s…ôkway aŇčga hay, ta jam aŇčga hay masa fara fara la, ata makustakaya, fa s…ôkwmata.
10.25: *Piyer a wusey a way Kwerney. Masa aŇčga fa mb…ôzey a way a na, Kwerney, ta‚Äô, a car har, a regedey fa mey aŇčga.
10.26: Ama Piyer, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óada, a l…ôvar: ¬ęLecey, yah na, ndaw anda akah.¬Ľ
10.27: Piyer faa guzlam ta Kwerney haa kasl ata ma wusam a palah-way. Fete…óe Piyer a h…ôtfey nd…ôhay ga makustakaya da way Kwerney a.
10.28: A l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar, ka s…ôrmara kwakwas Ňčga *J…ôwif hay ta t…ôka ndaw J…ôwif sem Ňčga nd…ôkwey a way nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay, asaya, ta t…ôka sem kwa Ňčga p…ôkey ta ata. Ama, Gazlavay ta wuzdiwa la, ya da n…ôka kwa waawa aa mazl…ô…ďkaya, a da kaya hezey na, k…ône ba.
10.29: Da ray Ňčgene, masa kah ma z…ôlyawa na, ya ta zlurey Ňčga sawa daa ba. Ya wu…óey ya s…ôra ka z…ôlyawa na, kwara?¬Ľ

13.1: Daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu daa berney Ňčga Antiyaws masa da Siri na, nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay daha, asaya, nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkadam mey Ňčga Gazlavay daha. Nd…ôhay a na, ara ata *Barnabas, SimeyaŇčw masa ma pamar sl…ômay-wazlay ¬ęMatara¬Ľ, Lusiyus, ndaw Siren, ManayaŇč masa ma g…ôlam ta Bay *Herawt daa slam a, leŇč *Sawl.
13.2: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, ata fa d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay, fa kam *daliyam. Ta‚Äô, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a l…ôvtar: ¬ęPamatiwa ata Barnabas ta Sawl wal Ňčga key sl…ôra masa yah ma z…ôlta maja.¬Ľ
13.3: Anda ke…óe, fa d…ô…ďa ha masa ata ma nd…ôvdamara mekey daliyam ta med…ôrey-daŇčgay cay na, a pamatar har a ray ata Barnabas ta Sawl heyey, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkdamata Ňčga diyam aa sl…ôra ha. Ata Barnabas ta Sawl daa hwayak Ňčga Sip…ôre
13.4: Anda ke…óe, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a sl…ôrdata ata *Barnabas ta *Sawl. A diyam aa berney Ňčga Selesi. Fete…óe, a nd…ôkwam aa kwambiwal Ňčga daw aa hwayak Ňčga Sip…ôre masa da wuzlah b…ôlay.
13.5: A wusam aa berney Ňčga Salamin daa hwayak Ňčga Sip…ôre he. Fete…óe, a wuzdamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay a nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay a. JaŇč-Mark, aa da wuzlah ata Ňčga j…ônta.
13.6: A p…ôkmara hwayak a tabiya haa kasl a wusam aa berney Ňčga Pafaws. Fete…óe, a h…ôtfamar ndaw J…ôwif mez…ôley Bar-Yesu. AŇčga fa key maazla hay ma sawa ta fa Gazlavay ba. A mb…ôrzley, a l…ôvey aŇčga *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
13.7: Bar-Yesu a, aŇčga mad…ôrlam Ňčga bay Ňčga hwayak a. Bay a, mez…ôley Serziyas Pawlas, aŇčga ndaw ta leŇčgesl. A z…ôlt…ôrwa ata Barnabas ta Sawl a way aŇčga, maja a wu…óey Ňčga c…ôney mey Ňčga Gazlavay fa ata.
13.8: Bar-Yesu, ndaw ma ka maazla ha, a z…ôlmara ta mey G…ôrek, Elimas. Ama Elimas na, a wu…óey mey Ňčga ata Barnabas ta Sawl ba. A s…ôpey c…ôve…ó amba a t…ôka bay a Ňčga t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
13.9: Da ray Ňčgene, Sawl, masa ata ma z…ôlmara ta mey G…ôrek Pawl, mar…ôhkaya ta Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, a n…ôkfa ndaw aha,
13.10: a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah ndaw memb…ôrzley! Kah, ndaw ma t…ôknata nd…ôhay tabiya! Kah, b…ôzey Ňčga bay-malula! Kah, masa-g…ôra Ňčga cek hay maaya tabiya! Sl…ôra masa Bay Gazlavay ma ka na, ara sl…ôra maaya ta c…ôve…ó e. Ama kah, ka fa s…ôpey c…ôve…ó mandaw mandaw Ňčga n…ôsa sl…ôra ha!
13.11: Ehe, wure ke…óe, Bay Gazlavay a da n…ôska, ka da wulfey. Haa …óar nek…ô…óey, ka fa da h…ôtar mewe…óey Ňčga pas daa ba.¬Ľ Wure wure Ňčgene, slam tabiya a t…ôrey l…ôvaŇč fa mey aŇčga, a h…ôtar dey saba. A s…ôpey ndaw Ňčga …óa…óa fa har.
13.12: Bay heyey ma h…ôtar cek ma key anda ke…óe la na, a r…ôzley ga da ray mey Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu, ta‚Äô, a t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Ata Pawl ta Barnabas da Antiyaws daa hwayak Ňčga Pisidi
