13.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Pawl ta nd…ôhay ma l…ôgdamara a t…ôpam aa kwambiwal, a sl…ôk…óam daa berney Ňčga Pafaws. A t…ôŇčgam b…ôlay, a diyam a Perze masa daa hwayak Ňčga Pamfili. Fete…óe na, JaŇč-Mark a mb…ôkdata, a v…ôhwa a *Jeruzelem.
13.14: Ata na, a sl…ôk…óam daa berney Ňčga Perze he, a diyam a Antiyaws daa hwayak Ňčga Pisidi. Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, a diyam, a njam aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe.
13.15: Daa way a, nd…ôhay a jaŇčgamara …óerewel Ňčga *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz leŇč Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *bay-ray hay daa way a, a sl…ôram ndaw fa ata Pawl ta *Barnabas Ňčgaa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęM…ôlma ala hay, da akwar ta mey daha Ňčga v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay makustakaya ke…óe na, ka gwamara Ňčgaa guzlam wure ke…óe.¬Ľ
13.16: Pawl, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a lecey, a baŇčga…óa har aŇčga, a zlar meeguzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAkwar, nd…ôhay Israyel hay, ta akwar masa daa s…ôkway Ňčga J…ôwif hay ba ma s…ôpam mey Ňčga Gazlavay, j…ôkfamaya sl…ômay.
13.17: Gazlavay masa nd…ôhay *Israyel hay ma namar ray na, ta walata papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay la zleezle. Ta s…ôkdata la ga daa masa ata daa hwayak Ňčga *Ejip. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta badat…ôrwa la daa hwayak Ňčga Ejip ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga mahura.
13.18: A key mevey kwakwar m…ôfa…ó aŇčga fa n…ôkfatar dey da wuzlah-ley.
13.19: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a paslata s…ôkway hay maasala da *KanaŇč c…ôpa, a v…ôldatara hwayak a, a nd…ôhay Israyel hay Ňčga wamara.
13.20: Mevey masa Israyel hay ata daa beke ta masa ata da wuzlah-ley na, a key mevey temere m…ôfa…ó ta kwakwar zlam. ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha, a patar bay-ray hay Ňčga j…ônta papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay a, haa kasl fa *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay mez…ôley Samiyel ma sawa.
13.21: Daa Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óam bay. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a v…ôltar *Sawl, b…ôzey Ňčga Kis, daa s…ôkway Ňčga BenjameŇč Ňčga key bay ata. A wa hwayak a, mevey kwakwar m…ôfa…ó.
13.22: Ta‚Äô, Gazlavay a bada Sawl daa bay, a patar *Davit Ňčga bay ata. Gazlavay aa guzley da ray a, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa ta h…ôtey ndaw ma mbafaya la, ara Davit, b…ôzey Ňčga Jese. A da key sl…ôra tabiya masa yah ma wu…óey.‚ÄĚ
13.23: Daa s…ôkway Ňčga Davit e na, Gazlavay ta bawa ndaw pal la ma da l…ôhdata Israyel hay anda aa ma l…ôvey zleezle . Ndaw aha na, ara Yesu.
13.24: Wuskwaa Yesu a da zlar sl…ôra aŇčga na, *JaŇč-Baptis ta wuzdatara la a nd…ôhay Israyel hay tabiya, a l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúMb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, mb…ôkdamara mekey meb…ôrey, h…ôtam *baptem.‚ÄĚ
13.25: Mamba JaŇč-Baptis a nd…ôvda sl…ôra aŇčga na, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay: ‚ÄúKa wulkam yah na, wa? Yah na, ndaw masa akwar ma s…ôkwmara heyey ba. Ama j…ôkam sl…ômay, ndaw ma da sawa fa d…ô…ďa a…óaw daha, a f…ônya, kwa ya wusa Ňčga p…ôska zewe…ó Ňčga tarak aŇčga ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
13.26: Pawl a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęM…ôlma a…óaw hay, akwar masa daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Ab…ôraham, ta masa daa s…ôkway Ňčga *J…ôwif hay ba ma namar ray a Gazlavay, Gazlavay ta sl…ôrdandakwara *Mey-maaya-mawiya la Ňčgada al…ôkwa amba a l…ôhdandakwar daa meb…ôrey.
13.27: Fara fara, nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem ta bay-ray ata hay ta s…ôrmara Yesu ara wa na, daa ba. Mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa ata ma jaŇčgamara mandaw mandaw ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw na, ta c…ôndamara daa ba may. Ama ta pas masa ata ma kamar sariya a Yesu Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay na, ta kamara la anda mey a ma l…ôvey.
13.28: Kwa ta h…ôtam mey fa aŇčga t…ô…óe Ňčga kar sariya Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay na, daa ba. Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ta‚Äô, a kamar ambahw a Pilat Ňčga k…ô…óa vagay.
13.29: Masa ata ma kamara cay tabiya anda …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley da ray Yesu a na, ta‚Äô, a b…ôrŇčgadam…ôrwa da ray hwadam, a p…ôshamara aa c…ôvay.
13.30: Ama Gazlavay ta sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa sem daa mem…ôcey.
13.31: Yesu ta wuztar vaw la a nd…ôhay …óar weewe, nd…ôhay masa zleezle ata ma p…ôkam bama daa hwayak Ňčga *Galile haa kasl a Jeruzelem. Wure ke…óe, nd…ôhay a fa kam sede da ray a fa mey Ňčga Israyel hay.
13.32: ¬ęAla may, ya fa wuzdamakwara mey maaya da ray cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvtar zleezle a papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay a katara la heyey.
13.33: Wure ke…óe Gazlavay ta kandakwara cek aha la Ňčgada al…ôkwa, b…ôz ata hay, ta fa masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga Yesu daa mem…ôcey. AŇčga letek ta mey mawuzlalakaya daa *P…ôsam cew ma l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKah na, B…ôzey a…óaw, d…ôga tasana yah Papakw.‚ÄĚ
13.34: Yaw, Gazlavay ta sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa la daa mem…ôcey, amba kwa a zey ba s…ôlak. Zleezle Gazlavay ta l…ôvey la: ‚ÄúYa p…ôskwar mey la, anda yah ma l…ôvar a Davit. Fara fara, ya kakwara cek aha la.‚ÄĚ
13.35: Maja Ňčgene, mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel mekele saya, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúNdaw ma ka sl…ôra akah na, ka fa da mb…ôkda Ňčga zey daa c…ôvay daa ba s…ôlak.‚ÄĚ
13.36: Davit e, daa masa aŇčga ta dey na, fa key sl…ôra anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey. Ta‚Äô, a m…ôcey, a p…ôshamara aa c…ôvay a cakay papaŇč Ňčga papaha hay, vaw aŇčga na, ta zey sem.
13.37: Ama ndaw masa Gazlavay ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey na, ta zey daa ba.
13.38: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, si ka s…ôrmara fara fara, ala fa wuzdamakwara, Gazlavay a mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay na, ta fa Yesu. Gazlavay ta mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar maja akwar ma s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, daa ba.
13.39: Ama kwa waawa ma pa Yesu Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara na, Gazlavay ta mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga sem.
13.40: Maja Ňčgene, wam vaw fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey hay zleezle ma kadamara, amba cek masa ata ma kadamara ha a wusfakwar ba. Nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvam:
13.41: ‚ÄúAkwar nd…ôhay ma r…ôsmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, n…ôkmara! Ka da r…ôzlam, fa d…ô…ďa ha, ka daa z…ô…óam, maja yah, Bay Gazlavay, ya da key sl…ôra mahura ta pas masa akwar ta dey ke…óe. Kwa ndaw ta wuzdakwara mey da ray sl…ôra ha la na, akwar fa da t…ô…ďmara daa ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
13.42: Masa ata Pawl ta Barnabas heyey ma bamawa daa way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay la na, nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvmatar Ňčga v…ôhmawa ta pas mem…ôskey-vaw mekele ma da sawa, amba aa guzlmatar da ray mey a saya.
13.43: Fa d…ô…ďa ha nd…ôhay maa waham ray cay na, nd…ôhay ga ta diyam la asi ata Pawl ta Barnabas. Ma diyam a na, ara J…ôwif hay ta nd…ôhay siya hay ma mb…ôzam Ňčga s…ôpey kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay. Daa ma…óay ata ta nd…ôhay a na, ata Pawl ta Barnabas a v…ôlmatar g…ôdaŇč amba a njam mandaw mandaw daa maaya Ňčga Gazlavay.
13.44: Masa pas mem…ôskey-vaw mekele heyey ma wuswa cay na, har-g…ôdaŇč Ňčga nd…ôhay daa berney a, a kusam Ňčga c…ôney mey da ray Bay Mahura Yesu.
13.45: Ama J…ôwif hay a n…ôkmata nd…ôhay ga makustakaya fete…óe na, s…ôleŇč a katar. A c…ô…ómara Pawl, a wu…óam mey aŇčga ba.
13.46: Ata Pawl ta Barnabas heyey ta‚Äô, aa guzlmatar ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęTeese…ó na, anja si c…ôma ya wuzdamakwara mey Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčgada akwar J…ôwif hay …óagay. Ama, ka t…ô…ďmara mey a ba. Anda ke…óe akwar fa wuzdamara, akwar t…ô…óe Ňčga njam da va…ó ta Gazlavay Ňčga s…ôrmataw ba. Da ray Ňčgene, ya mb…ôkdamakwar, ya diyam fa nd…ôhay mekele masa J…ôwif hay ba.
13.47: Ehe, Bay Gazlavay ta v…ôlndar *mewey aŇčga la, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa ta paka la Ňčga we…óey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay, amba ka wuzdatara a nd…ôhay tabiya da b…ôla ya da l…ôhdata na, kwara.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
13.48: Nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba ma c…ôndamara mey a na, aa s…ômam ga. Aa h…ômdamara mey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay. Nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma walata la Ňčga h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba na, a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu.
13.49: Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay fa wuzdamara mey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay kwa daa wura daa wura daa hwayak a Ňčgene.
13.50: Ama J…ôwif hay da Antiyaws a h…ôldamata Ňčgusay masa-zleley hay ma s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay leŇč nd…ôhay mahura hay daa berney a, Ňčga s…ôrdamata banay ta ata Pawl ta Barnabas. A …ď…ôlmat…ôrwa daa hwayak ata.
13.51: Ata Pawl ta Barnabas, a raramara lagwada fa salay ata hay . Ta‚Äô, a diyam aa berney Ňčga Ikwaniyum.
13.52: Ama nd…ôhay ma s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu da Antiyaws a na, a njam daa mees…ômey fara fara, ata mar…ôhtakaya ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay.

14.1: Ata Pawl ta *Barnabas a wusam aa berney Ňčga Ikwaniyum. A diyam aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe anda ata ma diyam da Antiyaws. A wuzmatar mey da ray Yesu a nd…ôhay maaya maaya haa nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ta nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay ga fete…óe, a t…ô…ďmara mey a.
14.2: Ama J…ôwif hay siya a g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey a ba. Anda ke…óe, a h…ôldamata nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay Ňčga wulkam maaya ba da ray nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu.
14.3: Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ata Pawl ta Barnabas ta njam la ga da Ikwaniyum a c…ôŇčga. A wuzam mey da ray Bay Mahura ta mand…ôrzay daa dey ba. A kam sede da ray Gazlavay, aa guzlam da ray maaya aŇčga. Bay Gazlavay a wuzd…ôrwa mey ata na, ara mey fara fara, a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key maazla hay ma r…ôzla ndaw.
14.4: Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay daa berney a, a wunkam cew maja mey a. Siya hay a t…ô…ďam mewulkey Ňčga J…ôwif hay, siya hay may a t…ô…ďam mewulkey Ňčga nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey a.
14.5: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ta nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay leŇč bay ata hay na, a c…ômdamara …óay ata pal. A wu…óam Ňčga s…ôrdamata banay ta ata Pawl ta Barnabas, a wu…óam Ňčgaa zakamata ta aŇčgwa vagay.
14.6: Masa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey cew ke…óe ma c…ôndamara mey a la na, a hwam da Ikwaniyum, a diyam Ňčgadaa berney Ňčga List…ôra, Ňčgadaa berney Ňčga Derbe masa daa hwayak Ňčga Likwani, leŇč aa slala hay mekele mekele daa hwayak a.
14.7: Fete…óe may, ta wuzam *Mey-maaya-mawiya la. Ata Pawl ta Barnabas a wuzam mey Ňčga Gazlavay da List…ôra
14.8: Da List…ôra, ndaw daha maah…ôl…ďakaya d…ôga Ňčga mayawa aŇčga, a gwa ma daw ba.
14.9: Aa fa j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey masa Pawl maa guzlda. Pawl a n…ôkfa, a s…ôra ndaw a fa t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu, a gwa a h…ôtar salay aŇčga la.
14.10: Pawl aa guzlar ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, lecey deŇč! ta salay akah!¬Ľ Ndaw a, ta‚Äô, a j…ôvey, a zlar ma daw ta salay aŇčga.
14.11: Nd…ôhay a h…ôtmar cek masa Pawl ma ka, a zlamar Ňčga wudey ta mey ata Likwani, a l…ôvam: ¬ęKuley hay ta samawa la fa al…ôkwa, a t…ôram anda nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
14.12: A pamata ata Pawl ta *Barnabas Ňčga kuley hay, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlmara Barnabas *Zus ta mez…ôley Ňčga kuley ata. A z…ôlmara Pawl may Hermes maja ara Pawl maa guzltar.
14.13: Way Ňčga kuley mez…ôley Zus aa gweegwe ta mey-slam Ňčga berney a. Ta‚Äô, ndaw ma ta kuley a, a handawa gusaŇč hay ta meefekwey hay fa mey-slam Ňčga way Ňčga kuley a, amba a tamata ata Barnabas ta Pawl anda kuley ata hay.
14.14: Ama masa ata Barnabas ta Pawl ma c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe la na, a Ňčg…ôrmata zana ata hay, a hwam a wuzlah nd…ôhay a ta mewudey, a l…ôvam:
14.15: ¬ęHaya! Akwar nd…ôhay ke…óe, ka kam ke…óe na, s…ôkway Ňčga me? Ala na, nd…ôhay anda akwar, ba diya? Ya samawa fe…óe Ňčga wuzmakwar *Mey-maaya-mawiya. Ya fa l…ôvmakwar, mb…ôkdamara metey kuley hay masa ma gwa Ňčga j…ônkwar ba Ňčgene. Mb…ô…ómawa dey fa Gazlavay, ndaw masa aŇčga daha ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw, ma l…ôma slam da va…ó ta cek hay da hwa…ó a, ma l…ôma slam da hwayak ta cek hay da hwa…ó a, ara aŇčga ma ka b…ôlay ta cek hay da hwa…ó a.
14.16: Zleezle na, a mb…ôkdata nd…ôhay da b…ôla tabiya masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay Ňčga s…ôpam c…ôve…ó anda ata ma wu…óam.
14.17: Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, Gazlavay fa wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč aŇčga da wuzlah ata mandaw mandaw c…ôŇčga ta fa maaya aŇčga masa aŇčga ma ka. AŇčga fa pakwar var, fa v…ôlkwar cek mez…ômey fa mevey a fa mevey a anda akwar ma wu…óam, fa r…ôhdakwar ta cek mez…ômey, faa s…ômdakwar ga.¬Ľ
14.18: Kwa ata maa guzlmatar la anda ke…óe na, ata Barnabas ta Pawl a t…ôkmata nd…ôhay a ta banay Ňčga mb…ôkdamara metey kuley a.
14.19: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, J…ôwif hay ma samawa da Antiyaws masa daa hwayak Ňčga Pisidi, leŇč J…ôwif hay ma samawa da Ikwaniyum, a h…ôldamata nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga List…ôra Ňčgaa zakamara Pawl ta aŇčgwa vagay. Ta‚Äô, aa zakamara, a …óa…óamara la daa berney a Ňčgada palah maja a wulkam aŇčga ta m…ôcey sem.
14.20: Ama nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu na, a kusam a cakay a. Pawl heyey, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a v…ôhwa aa berney a. Ata Pawl ta Barnabas a v…ôhmawa a Antiyaws masa da Siri Pep…ôrek e, Pawl, ta‚Äô, a diyam ta Barnabas aa berney Ňčga Derbe.
14.21: A wuzam *Mey-maaya-mawiya da Derbe he. Nd…ôhay ga fete…óe a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu. Ta‚Äô, ata Pawl ta *Barnabas a v…ôham aa berney Ňčga List…ôra, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a v…ôham aa berney Ňčga Ikwaniyum, leŇč a Antiyaws masa daa hwayak Ňčga Pisidi.
14.22: Daa berney hay a, a v…ôlmatar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe Ňčga jaram maaya maaya daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu. A l…ôvmatar: ¬ęSi ya s…ôrkwa banay ga amba ya mb…ôzkwa aa slam masa Gazlavay fa wey da hwa…ó a.¬Ľ
14.23: Daa mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu tabiya na, a walam nd…ôhay Ňčga key *bay-ray hay. Masa ata ma walamata cay na, a kam *daliyam, a d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay maja ata. Ta‚Äô, ata Pawl ta Barnabas a v…ôldamata nd…ôhay a, a har Bay Mahura masa ata ma pamara Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara, amba a j…ô…óta.
14.24: A diyam ta daa hwayak Ňčga Pisidi, a wusam aa hwayak Ňčga Pamfili.
14.25: Da Pamfili a na, Ňčgeeme, a wuzam mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa berney Ňčga Perze, fa d…ô…ďa ha a diyam a wuzam mey daa berney Ňčga Ataliya.
14.26: Da Ataliya ha na, a diyam ta kwambiwal a Antiyaws masa daa hwayak Ňčga Siri. Ara da Antiyaws a zleezle nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu fete…óe ma d…ôram daŇčgay maja ata Pawl ta Barnabas amba Gazlavay a p…ôstar mey Ňčga key sl…ôra aŇčga, sl…ôra masa wure ke…óe ata ta kamara cay.
14.27: Masa ata ma wusam a Antiyaws a la na, a kusmata nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu fete…óe. A kadamatara cek hay tabiya masa Gazlavay ma ka ta ata. Asaya, a wuzdamatara cek hay masa Gazlavay ma ka Ňčga wurtara c…ôve…ó Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay amba a pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara.
14.28: Ata Pawl ta Barnabas ta njam la ga fete…óe ta nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu.

15.1: Nd…ôhay siya hay a samawa daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude Ňčgadaa berney Ňčga Antiyaws masa da Siri, aa s…ôrkadamata m…ôlmaŇč hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęDa akwar ma t…ô…ďmara *mesley mandawal anda *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma l…ôvey daa ba na, Gazlavay fa da l…ôhdakwar daa meb…ôrey daa ba may.¬Ľ
15.2: Ata Pawl ta *Barnabas na, ta t…ô…ďmara mey a daa ba. Ta‚Äô, a kam yawa ga ta nd…ôhay a da ray mey a. M…ôlma ata hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu da Antiyaws heyey, a walamata ata Pawl ta Barnabas leŇč nd…ôhay mekele da wuzlah ata, amba a diyam a *Jeruzelem Ňčgaa guzlwa ta nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey hay, ta *bay-ray hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da ray mey a.
15.3: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray da Antiyaws a, a v…ôlmatar cek hay Ňčga j…ônta daa madaw ata a Jeruzelem. Nd…ôhay a, a diyam taa hwayak Ňčga Fenisi leŇč taa hwayak Ňčga *Samari, fa diyam ta meeguzley da ray nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay, a l…ôvam ata ta mb…ôkdamara mekey meb…ôrey sem, a t…ô…ďam mey Ňčga Yesu d…ô…ďa. Da ray Ňčgene, masa m…ôlma ata hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu tabiya fete…óe ma c…ôndamara na, aa s…ômam ga.
15.4: A wusam a Jeruzelem na, nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, ta bay-ray hay, leŇč nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu a t…ô…ďmata ta mees…ômey. Ata Pawl ta Barnabas a wuzdamatara cek hay tabiya masa Gazlavay ma ka ta fa ata.
15.5: Ama nd…ôhay *Fariza hay siya ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu na, a sl…ôk…óam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay na, si a t…ô…ďmara Ňčga sley mandawal, si ya l…ôvmatar Ňčga s…ôpam kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz.¬Ľ
15.6: Nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey a, ta bay-ray hay a, a kusam tabiya da slam a Ňčga n…ôkey mey a.
15.7: Masa ata fa kam yawa ga da ray mey a na, *Piyer ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęM…ôlma a…óaw hay, ka s…ôrmara zleezle Gazlavay a walaya da wuzlah akwar na, Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay, amba a c…ôndamara, a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu.
15.8: Gazlavay na, ara ndaw ma s…ôra mevel Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya. AŇčga ma v…ôltar Mes…ôfney aŇčga la a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay anda aa ma v…ôldandakwara may. Anda ke…óe, fa wuzd…ôrwa, aŇčga fa t…ô…ďta nd…ôhay a.
15.9: Gazlavay ta wunkandakwar ta nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay na, daa ba. Ta p…ôrtara mevel ata la, maja ata ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu.
15.10: Kaa wure ke…óe, ka jadamara Gazlavay na, maja me? Ka wu…óam ka t…ôkmatar …óay a nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu Ňčga s…ôpey kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, maja me? Kwa papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay, kwa al…ôkwa, ya gwakwa Ňčga s…ôpkwa kwakwas a tabiya ba!
15.11: Sas…ôkar jak, ya fa s…ôrkwa Gazlavay a l…ôhdandakwar na, ta fa maaya Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu, letek ta nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay may!¬Ľ
15.12: Wure Ňčgene, nd…ôhay makustakaya tabiya fete…óe a njam teete, a j…ôkam sl…ômay fa ata Barnabas ta Pawl. A wuzdamatara mey da ray maazla hay tabiya ma r…ôzla ndaw masa Gazlavay ma v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga ka da wuzlah nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay.
15.13: Masa ata ma nd…ôvdamara mey ata cay na, *Jak a zlar meeguzley may, a l…ôvey: ¬ęM…ôlma a…óaw hay, j…ôkam sl…ômay!
15.14: Wure ke…óe *SimaŇčw Piyer ta kadandakwara mey da ray pas masa Gazlavay ma zlar Ňčga n…ôkfatar dey fa nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay la. D…ôga ta pas Ňčgene a weley nd…ôhay da wuzlah ata Ňčga t…ôrey nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
15.15: Mey a, aa letek ta mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, ma l…ôvey:
15.16: Bay Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúWay Ňčga *Davit ta b…ôzley sem. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya v…ôhwa la, ya l…ôma way a la, ya lacada aa slam a.
15.17: Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay siya a s…ôpmaya la, yah Bay Gazlavay, kwa nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay wura wura tabiya, masa yah ma z…ôlta Ňčga key nd…ôhay a…óaw hay na, a s…ôpmaya la. Ehe, Bay Gazlavay a l…ôvey anda ke…óe. A key cek hay anda ke…óe na, ara cek hay masa
15.18: aa ma wu…óey Ňčga wuzdat…ôrwa d…ôga zleezle.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
15.19: Jak a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęMaja mey a ke…óe, ya wulkey maaya na, nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay ma mb…ô…ómawa dey fa Gazlavay na, ya s…ôrdamatakwa banay ba.
15.20: Ama, wuzlalamatakwa leeter, ya l…ôvmatakwa a da z…ômam aslaw Ňčga kuley Ňčga zl…ô…ďta ba, a da lam vaw saw ba, a da z…ômam aslaw Ňčga cek met…ôr…óey ta t…ôr…óey ba, asaya, a da z…ômam mambaz ba.
15.21: Maja d…ôga zleezle haa wure ke…óe na, fa wuzam mey da ray kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz da slala hay tabiya, asaya, fa jaŇčgamara mey a daa way hay mewuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw.¬Ľ A sl…ôrmatar leeter a nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu masa J…ôwif hay ba hay
15.22: Masa *Jak ma nd…ôvda mey aŇčga la na, nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey, ta *bay-ray hay, leŇč nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu tabiya, a c…ômdamara …óay ata. Ta‚Äô, a walam nd…ôhay da wuzlah ata, amba a sl…ôrdamata aa berney Ňčga Antiyaws ta ata Pawl ta *Barnabas. A walam na, Jud ma z…ôlmara Barsabas, leŇč Silas. Ata cewete faa h…ômdamata da wuzlah m…ôlmaŇč hay fete…óe.
15.23: A wuzlalamatar leeter a har. Daa leeter e, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAra ala, m…ôlmakw akwar hay masa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu, ta bay-ray hay Ňčga mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu ma wuzlalamakwara leeter ke…óe. Akwar masa J…ôwif hay ba hay, ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu da Antiyaws, daa hwayak Ňčga Siri, leŇč daa hwayak Ňčga Silisi, ya camakwar har.
15.24: Ya c…ôndamara nd…ôhay da wuzlah ala hay ta diyam la fa akwar. A h…ô…ďmakwar ray, a mb…ô…ódamakwara leŇčgesl ta mey ata hay. Ama ara ala ma sl…ôrdamata ba.
15.25: Da ray Ňčgene, ya c…ômdamara …óay ala pal, ya kam ma…óay da ray mey a, ta‚Äô, ya walam nd…ôhay amba ya sl…ôrdamata fa akwar. A diyam ta ata Pawl ta Barnabas nd…ôhay masa ala ma wu…ómata kalah.
15.26: Ata Pawl ta Barnabas a na, ara nd…ôhay masa ma v…ôldamara ray ata sem Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu *K…ôriste.
15.27: Da ray Ňčgene, ya sl…ôrmakwar Jud ta Silas, amba a wuzdamakwara mey a letek anda ala ma wuzlalamakwara ke…óe.
15.28: Maja ta mbafar la a *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč Ňčgada ala, amba ya v…ôlmakwar *mewey mekele saba, si mewey hay masa ala ma wuzlalamakwara ke…óe gway. Ehe, ala fa l…ôvmakwar:
15.29: ka da z…ômam aslaw Ňčga kuley ba, ka da z…ômam mambaz ba, ka da z…ômam aslaw met…ôr…óey ta t…ôr…óey ba, ka da lam vaw saw ba. Da akwar ta t…ôkmata ray akwar hay la fa cek hay a ke…óe na, akwar ta kam maaya la. Gazlavay Ňčga njadandakwar daa zazay aŇčga.¬Ľ
15.30: Ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkdamata nd…ôhay masa ata ma walamata Ňčga sl…ôrey heyey Ňčga diyam aa berney Ňčga Antiyaws. Masa ata ma wusam la na, ta‚Äô, a kusmata nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu fete…óe, a v…ôldamatara leeter heyey.
15.31: Nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu fete…óe a jaŇčgamara leeter e, aa s…ômam ga da ray a, mey da hwa…ó a, a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč.
15.32: Ata Jud ta Silas heyey na, ata nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Aa guzlmatar mey hay ga a m…ôlmaŇč hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu. A v…ôlmatar g…ôdaŇč amba a njam daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu.
15.33: Ta‚Äô, a njamawa nek…ô…óey fete…óe. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a wu…óam Ňčga v…ôhmawa fa nd…ôhay ma sl…ôrdamata heyey. Da ray Ňčgene, m…ôlma ata hay fete…óe heyey, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęDiyam ta zazay. Ka camatar har a nd…ôhay ma sl…ôrdamakurwa may.¬Ľ [
15.35: Ata Pawl ta Barnabas na, a njamawa da Antiyaws a. Ata ta nd…ôhay mekele ga, faa s…ôrkadamata nd…ôhay, fa wuzam *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga Bay Mahura. Ata Pawl ta Barnabas a wu…ókam …óay
15.36: Fa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey, Pawl a l…ôvar a *Barnabas: ¬ęNakwa la fa m…ôlma al…ôkwa hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu daa berney hay mekele mekele masa al…ôkwa ma wuzmatakwar mey Ňčga Bay Mahura zleezle, amba ya n…ôkakurwa menjey ata na, aa kwara.¬Ľ
15.37: Barnabas na, a wu…óey a Ňčg…ôla JaŇč-Mark asi ata.
15.38: Ama Pawl a t…ô…ďa ba, maja JaŇč-Mark a, ta mb…ôkdat…ôrwa la daa hwayak Ňčga Pamfili. A mb…ôkdat…ôrwa na, daa masa sl…ôra ata, ta nd…ôvey daa ba araŇč.
15.39: Ata Pawl ta Barnabas a kam yawa ga. Ta‚Äô, a wu…ókam …óay. Da ray Ňčgene, Barnabas a Ňčg…ôla JaŇč-Mark, a diyam cew e, a t…ôŇčgam ta kwambiwal aa hwayak da wuzlah b…ôlay mez…ôley Sip…ôre.
15.40: Ama Pawl na, a Ňčg…ôla Silas may. M…ôlma ata hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe a d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay maja ata, amba Gazlavay a p…ôstar mey. Ata Pawl ta Silas, ta‚Äô, a diyam.
15.41: A diyam a slala hay mekele mekele daa hwayak Ňčga Siri leŇč daa hwayak Ňčga Silisi. A v…ôlmatar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga Yesu fete…óe.

16.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Pawl a daw aa berney Ňčga Derbe, asaya, a daw aa berney Ňčga List…ôra. Fete…óe, ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu daha mez…ôley Timawte. Mamaha dam *J…ôwif ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu, ama papaha na, ndaw G…ôrek.
16.2: M…ôlmaŇč hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu da List…ôra, ta daa berney Ňčga Ikwaniyum faa h…ômdamara.
16.3: Pawl a wu…óey Timawte a l…ôgda aa sl…ôra aŇčga, ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôla. A slara mandawal maja J…ôwif hay da slala hay fete…óe na, a s…ôrmara papaha ara ndaw G…ôrek.
16.4: A diyam, a p…ôkam aa berney hay mekele mekele. Daa berney hay a na, a kadamatara mey maj…ôwkaya Ňčga nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey, ta Ňčga *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da *Jeruzelem heyey Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe. A l…ôvmatar Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey a.
16.5: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu a h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč Ňčga t…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Yesu ma f…ôna ma f…ôna. Fa …óar a, fa …óar a, nd…ôhay fa s…ôkmawa. Gazlavay a wuzar cek a Pawl da T…ôrwas
16.6: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ata Pawl ta nd…ôhay ma l…ôgdamara a wu…óam a diyam Ňčga wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa hwayak Ňčga Azi, ama *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, a v…ôltar c…ôve…ó ba. Da ray Ňčgene, a diyam taa c…ôve…ó ma daw ta daa hwayak Ňčga F…ôrizi, leŇč taa c…ôve…ó ma daw ta daa hwayak Ňčga Galati.
16.7: Masa ata ma wusam gweegwe ta hwayak Ňčga Misi la na, a s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga daw aa hwayak Ňčga Bitini, ama Mes…ôfney Ňčga Yesu a v…ôltar c…ôve…ó ba.
16.8: Ta‚Äô, a diyam taa hwayak Ňčga Misi, a wusam aa berney Ňčga T…ôrwas da mey-b…ôlay.
16.9: Ta tava…ó, Gazlavay a wuzar cek a Pawl. Pawl a h…ôtar ndaw Masad…ôwan daha malacakaya, ndaw aha fa kar ambahw, a l…ôvar: ¬ęSawa a Masad…ôwan amba ka j…ônndar.¬Ľ
16.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa Gazlavay ma wuzdara cek aha cay a Pawl na, wure Ňčgene, ya s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga t…ôŇčgey ta kwambiwal a Masad…ôwan, maja ya s…ôrmara ara Gazlavay ma z…ôlndar, amba ya wuzmatar Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay daa hwayak a. Lidi a t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Bay Mahura da F…ôlepi
16.11: Da T…ôrwas na, ya t…ôpam aa kwambiwal, ya diyam kasl aa hwayak da wuzlah b…ôlay mez…ôley Samawt…ôras. Pep…ôrek e, ya t…ôŇčgam aa berney Ňčga Niyapawlis. Ya pam salay.
16.12: Ta‚Äô, ya diyam ta salay aa berney Ňčga F…ôlepi masa berney mahura daa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan. Berney Ňčga F…ôlepi a na, ara berney masa Rawma hay ma wamara . Ta‚Äô, ya njam daa berney a, …óar nek…ô…óey.
16.13: Ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, ta‚Äô, ya bamawa daa berney a, ya diyam a mey wayam daha, maja ya wulkam da ya h…ôtfam slam med…ôrey-daŇčgay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay fete…óe la kwa. Masa ala ma h…ôtam slam med…ôrey-daŇčgay a la na, ta‚Äô, ya njam, yaa guzlmatar a Ňčgusay makustakaya fete…óe.
16.14: Ňägwas pal da wuzlah ata daha mez…ôley Lidi, a sawa daa berney Ňčga Tiyatir. Ara Ňčgwas ma ka filaw Ňčga zana magaza ma h…ô…ókey ba. AŇčga Ňčgwas J…ôwif ba, ama fa nar ray a Gazlavay anda J…ôwif hay. A j…ôkfandar sl…ômay, Bay Mahura a wurara mevel aŇčga amba a t…ô…ďa mey masa Pawl ma kada.
16.15: Anda ke…óe, ta‚Äô, a h…ôtam *baptem ta nd…ôhay da way aŇčga tabiya. A l…ôvndar: ¬ęDa ka n…ôkmara, ya fa t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu fara fara na, samawa, njam a way a…óaw.¬Ľ A kandar ambahw ta mevel aŇčga ndav Ňčga daw a way aŇčga. Ata Pawl ta Silas daa f…ôrs…ône daa berney Ňčga F…ôlepi
16.16: Ta pas laŇčgar daha, ala fa diyam aa slam med…ôrey-daŇčgay heyey saya na, ta‚Äô, ya cam ray ta dam beke daha. AŇčga ta fakalaw da ray, a wu…ókey har. Bay aŇčga hay fa h…ôtam dala ga maja aŇčga ma wu…ókey har aha.
16.17: Dam beke he a sawa asi ala ta ata Pawl ta mewudey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęNd…ôhay ke…óe ara nd…ôhay ma kam sl…ôra Ňčga Bay Gazlavay Mawaca-waca. Ata fa wuzmakwar c…ôve…ó masa akwar ma da l…ôham daa meb…ôrey ta da hwa…ó a.¬Ľ
16.18: Aa fa ka anda ke…óe …óar ga haa Pawl a cey mevel a ray a. Pawl a, p…ôla! a mb…ô…óey dey, a l…ôvar a fakalaw da ray dam aha: ¬ęFakalaw, ya fa l…ôvka ta mez…ôley Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste, bey da ray dam ke…óe.¬Ľ Wure Ňčgene, fakalaw kaa heyey, ta‚Äô, a bey da ray dam aha.
16.19: Bay aŇčga hay a, a n…ôkmara na, fa h…ôtam dala fa v…ô…óa daa saba. Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a k…ôrzamata ata Pawl ta Silas. A …óa…óamata fa mahura hay Ňčga Rawma hay, a handamata aa slam mekey sariya Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya.
16.20: A handamata fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay Rawma hay ma ka sariya hay, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęNd…ôhay ke…óe fa handamawa mey aa berney al…ôkwa. Ara nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay,
16.21: ata faa s…ôrkadamata nd…ôhay ta kwakwas mekele, kwakwas masa al…ôkwa Rawma hay ma t…ôkakwa sem.¬Ľ
16.22: Nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe a c…ômam a ray ata Pawl ta Silas. Nd…ôhay ma ka sariya hay a l…ôvmatar a nd…ôhay Ňčga c…ôkwmatara zana fa vaw Ňčga ata Pawl ta Silas Ňčga g…ôdaŇč, asaya, a l…ôvmatar Ňčga sl…ô…ómata ta laway.
16.23: Masa ata ma sl…ô…ómata la ga na, ta‚Äô, a handamata aa f…ôrs…ône, a l…ôvmar a ndaw ma j…ô…óa f…ôrs…ône he Ňčga j…ô…óta maaya maaya.
16.24: Masa ndaw ma j…ô…óa f…ôrs…ône ma c…ônda anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, a handata aa way masa da wuzlah daa f…ôrs…ône he, a nd…ôkwdatara salay aa hwadam.
16.25: Ta wuzlah-tava…ó na, ata Pawl ta Silas a d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay, a h…ôlmamara Gazlavay ta walay. Nd…ôhay siya maj…ôwtakaya daa f…ôrs…ône he fa j…ôkfamatar sl…ômay.
16.26: Wure wure Ňčgene, hwiyak a wusey, salay Ňčga way Ňčga f…ôrs…ône he a wusey. Mey-slam hay tabiya a wuram, calalaw hay masa ata ma j…ôwmata nd…ôhay tabiya ta aŇčga na, a p…ôskam.
16.27: Ndaw ma j…ô…óa f…ôrs…ône he a sl…ôk…óey daa …óar, a n…ôkta mey-slam hay mawurtakaya, a wulkey da nd…ôhay daa f…ôrs…ône he ta hwam sem kwa. Da ray Ňčgene, a m…ô…ó…ôrwa d…ôlaw aŇčga, amba a k…ô…óa ray aŇčga.
16.28: Ama Pawl aa guzlar ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da k…ô…óa ray akah ba! Ala tabiya, ala daha!¬Ľ
16.29: Ndaw ma j…ô…óa f…ôrs…ône heyey, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óey awaw Ňčga n…ôkey dey, a wusey vaw, a mb…ôzey aa slam masa ata Pawl ta Silas da hwa…ó a heyey. A t…ô…óey asi salay ata, ta meewesey maja aa fa zlurey.
16.30: Ta‚Äô, a badat…ôrwa daa slam aha, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęBay a…óaw hay, ya da key kwara amba ya l…ôhey daa meb…ôrey na!¬Ľ
16.31: Ata Pawl ta Silas a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęPa Bay Mahura Yesu Ňčga ndaw akah fara fara, a l…ôhdaka la daa meb…ôrey, kah ta nd…ôhay da way akah.¬Ľ
16.32: Ta‚Äô, a wuzdamara mey Ňčga Bay Mahura, Ňčgada aŇčga, ta Ňčgada nd…ôhay da way aŇčga tabiya.
16.33: Dasi tava…ó a Ňčgene na, ndaw ma j…ô…óa f…ôrs…ône heyey, ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlta ata Pawl ta Silas, a p…ôrtara mb…ôlek ata hay Ňčga mesl…ô…óey heyey. AŇčga ta nd…ôhay da way aŇčga tabiya, ta‚Äô, a h…ôtam *baptem wure Ňčgene.
16.34: Ta‚Äô, a handata ata Pawl ta Silas a way aŇčga, a v…ôltar cek mez…ômey. AŇčga ta nd…ôhay da way aŇčga tabiya aa s…ômam ga, maja ata ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara.
16.35: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, slam ma wurey la na, nd…ôhay Rawma hay ma ka sariya hay, a sl…ôram sewje hay Ňčga l…ôvmar a ndaw ma j…ô…óa f…ôrs…ône Ňčga mb…ôkdata ata Pawl ta Silas heyey Ňčga diyam.
16.36: Ndaw ma j…ô…óa f…ôrs…ône heyey a daw a l…ôvar a Pawl: ¬ęNd…ôhay Rawma hay ma ka sariya hay ta v…ôlmaya c…ôve…ó la Ňčga mb…ôkdakwar. Anda ke…óe, ka gwamara ka bam, ka diyam ta zazay.¬Ľ
16.37: Ama Pawl a l…ôvtar a sewje hay ma sl…ôrdamat…ôrwa heyey: ¬ęTa kam sariya da ray ala daa ba s…ôlak, ama a sl…ô…ómandar meedey nd…ôhay tabiya, yaw, ala na, nd…ôhay Rawma hay may! A handamand…ôrwa aa f…ôrs…ône, ama wure ke…óe, a wu…óam Ňčga mb…ôkdamandar, ya diyam ta mayal a na, kwara d…ô…ďa wura? A key ba. Si nd…ôhay ma ka sariya ha, a samawa, ata ray ata, a mb…ôkdamandar.¬Ľ
16.38: Sewje hay heyey, a diyam, a mb…ô…ódamatara mey masa ata Pawl ta Silas ma l…ôvmatar heyey a ma ka sariya hay a. Masa ata ma c…ôndamara ata Pawl ta Silas ata nd…ôhay Rawma hay na, a zluram.
16.39: Daa Ňčgene, a diyam ata ray ata fa ata Pawl ta Silas heyey, a kamatar ambahw. Ta‚Äô, a badamat…ôrwa daa f…ôrs…ône he, a l…ôvmatar Ňčga diyam la daa berney ata.
16.40: Masa ata Pawl ta Silas heyey ma bamawa la daa f…ôrs…ône na, ta‚Äô, a diyam a way Lidi. A h…ôtfamatar m…ôlma ata hay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe, a v…ôlmatar g…ôdaŇč. Ta‚Äô, a diyam aa slam mekele saya.

17.1: Ata Pawl ta Silas a diyam taa berney Ňčga Amfipawlis leŇč taa berney Ňčga Apawlani, a wusam a Tesalawnik. Fete…óe, *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay daha.
17.2: Pawl, ta‚Äô, a daw aa way a, Ňčga d…ôrwa daŇčgay anda aŇčga ma ka mandaw mandaw. Pawl fa daw fa luma ha fa luma ha ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw luma maakar, fa kam yawa ta nd…ôhay makustakaya daa way a da ray …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay.
17.3: Faa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay maaya maaya da ray …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey si *K…ôriste na, a s…ôrey banay, a m…ôcey, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey. Pawl a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYesu masa yah ma wuzkwar mey da ray a wure ke…óe kaa na, ara K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
17.4: *J…ôwif hay siya fete…óe a t…ô…ďmara mey a, a diyam asi ata Pawl ta Silas. Nd…ôhay siya hay ga da wuzlah G…ôrek hay masa ma s…ôpam mey Ňčga Gazlavay anda J…ôwif hay ta Ňčgusay ga masa daa s…ôkway Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay, a t…ô…ďmara mey a may.
17.5: Ama J…ôwif hay siya may, s…ôleŇč a katar. Ta‚Äô, a kusam nd…ôhay saw k…ône daa c…ôve…ó hay. Nd…ôhay a, a diyam a kusmata nd…ôhay, a h…ôldamata Ňčga yam mey daa berney a. Ta‚Äô, a diyam a way ndaw Ňčga Yesu, mez…ôley JasaŇčw, a s…ôpmata ata Pawl ta Silas amba a handamata fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sariya.
17.6: Ama ta h…ôtfamat…ôrwa daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a …óa…óam…ôrwa JasaŇčw ta m…ôlmaŇč hay mekele mekele daa mey Ňčga Yesu, a handamat…ôrwa fa mey Ňčga mahura hay ma wamara berney a. A wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNd…ôhay ke…óe na, fa h…ôldamata nd…ôhay Ňčga n…ôsa hwayak kwa daa wura daa wura c…ôpa. Wure ke…óe, ta wusmawa la fe…óe saya.
17.7: JasaŇčw ta t…ô…ďta la Ňčga njam da way aŇčga. Nd…ôhay a tabiya a t…ô…ďmara mewey Ňčga Bay *Sezere saba, a l…ôvam bay mekele daha mez…ôley Yesu.¬Ľ
17.8: Masa J…ôwif hay a ma l…ôvam anda ke…óe la na, mevel Ňčga mahura hay daa berney a, ta Ňčga nd…ôhay makustakaya tabiya a ku…óferey ta g…ôdaŇč.
17.9: Nd…ôhay mahura hay a, a t…ôkmatar …óay Ňčgada ata JasaŇčw ta nd…ôhay mak…ôrzatakaya heyey Ňčga p…ôlam dala a Ňčgwamna, amba baazlam a key saba. Ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkdamata. Ata Pawl ta Silas a diyam aa berney Ňčga Bere
17.10: Ta tava…ó a Ňčgene m…ôlmaŇč hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu a sl…ôrdamata ata Pawl ta Silas aa berney Ňčga Bere. A wusam fete…óe, a diyam aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
17.11: Nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Bere he, mevel ata maaya, ata anda nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Tesalawnik ba. A wu…óam Ňčga j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey da ray Yesu maaya maaya. Fa …óar a, fa …óar a, fa jaŇčgam mey Ňčga Gazlavay amba a s…ôrmara mey masa Pawl ma kada na, ara mey fara fara.
17.12: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay ga da wuzlah ata a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu. Ňägusay G…ôrek hay ga masa-zleley hay, leŇč nd…ôhay G…ôrek hay ga ta t…ô…ďmara mey a la may.
17.13: Ama J…ôwif hay da Tesalawnik ma c…ôndamara Pawl fa wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa berney Ňčga Bere saya na, ta‚Äô, a diyam a Bere he may. A zlamar Ňčga h…ôldamata nd…ôhay daa berney a.
17.14: Da ray Ňčgene, m…ôlmaŇč hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe, a bam daa berney a ta ata Pawl. A handamara Pawl a, a mey-b…ôlay, ama ata Silas ta Timawte na, manjatakaya da Bere he.
17.15: Nd…ôhay ma handamara Pawl aha na, a diyam bama kasl aa berney Ňčga Aten. Fete…óe Pawl a l…ôvtar: ¬ęL…ôvmatar Ňčgada ata Silas ta Timawte Ňčga samawa fa yah fiyaw fiyaw.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a v…ôhmawa a Bere. Pawl daa berney Ňčga Aten
17.16: Masa Pawl fa s…ôkwta ata Silas ta Timawte daa berney Ňčga Aten na, aa fa p…ôkey, a h…ôtey kuley hay ga fete…óe. Da ray Ňčgene, ray aŇčga a h…ô…ďey.
17.17: A kam yawa daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe ta *J…ôwif hay leŇč ta nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay masa ma namar ray a Gazlavay. Asaya, fa …óar a, fa …óar a, aŇčga fa daw aa luma, fa kam yawa ta nd…ôhay fete…óe.
17.18: Da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma kam yawa ha na, nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mees…ôrkedey Ňčga *Epikur hay ta nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mees…ôrkedey Ňčga S…ôtawik hay daha. A zlamar mekey yawa ta aŇčga may. Nd…ôhay siya hay a l…ôvam da ray a: ¬ęNdaw masa baazlam kalah ke…óe a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey na, kwara?¬Ľ Siya hay a l…ôvam: ¬ęA key aa s…ôrkadandakwar mey da ray kuley hay daa hwayak mekele kwa.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay a l…ôvam anda ke…óe maja Pawl fa wuzey mey da ray Yesu ta da ray masl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey.
17.19: Ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlmara Pawl, a handamara fa nd…ôhay mahura ma sla yawa. Nd…ôhay ma sla yawa ha mez…ôley ata na, Ariyawpaz . A l…ôvam: ¬ęMees…ôrkey mawiya masa kah ma kada ke…óe na, ya wu…óam ka wuzdandara,
17.20: maja mees…ôrkedey akah ha ala ta c…ôndamara ta sl…ômay ala daa ba araŇč. Ya wu…óam ya s…ôrmara mabara Ňčga mey a.¬Ľ
17.21: Yaw, nd…ôhay Aten hay tabiya, ta m…ôlak hay ma njam daa berney a na, a kam sl…ôra saba, si fa j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mees…ôrkey hay mawiya mekele mekele, a kam ma…óay da ray a.
17.22: Ta‚Äô, Pawl a lecey fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma sla yawa heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay Aten hay, ya n…ôka na, akwar fa s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga kuley akwar hay ta c…ôve…ó e.
17.23: Ya s…ôra maja daa masa ya fa p…ôkey daa berney akwar ke…óe na, ya ta h…ôtey kuley akwar hay la ga mal…ômtakaya. Daa slam laŇčgar ya ta h…ôtey slam metey kuley la mawuzlalakaya fa v…ô…óa, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKuley ma s…ôrey ba.‚ÄĚ Kwa ka s…ôrmara kuley a ba, akwar fa ragadamar. Ama wure ke…óe ya ta sawa la Ňčga wuzdakwara mey da ray a.
17.24: Gazlavay na, ara ndaw ma l…ôma b…ôla ta cek hay da hwa…ó a tabiya. AŇčga Bay Mahura da ray cek hay da va…ó ta da hwayak. AŇčga na, a njey daa way masa nd…ôhay ma l…ômamara ta har ba.
17.25: Aa fa wu…óey amba nd…ôhay a kamar cek na, daa ba, maja ara aŇčga ma v…ôlda heter leŇč mes…ôfney a nd…ôhay tabiya da b…ôla, ara aŇčga ma v…ôlda kwa meeme tabiya.
17.26: Ndaw masa Gazlavay ma l…ôma pal Ňčgeeme na, ara ta fa aŇčga Gazlavay ma zlar Ňčga key s…ôkway hay Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, amba a njam da b…ôla ke…óe. Asaya, Gazlavay ta pata …óar hay masa nd…ôhay ma da njam da b…ôla cay, ta pata kwakway Ňčga hwayak ata hay cay.
17.27: A l…ômt…ôrwa nd…ôhay na, amba a s…ôpmara, da kaa t…ô…óe a h…ôtfamar la kwa. Ama fara fara na, Gazlavay aa d…ôreŇč kwa ta waawa ba.
17.28: ¬ęAra anda mawuzlalakaya, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa h…ôtkwa heter Ňčga s…ôfney na, maja aŇčga. Ya h…ôtkwa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga p…ôkey na, maja aŇčga. Al…ôkwa ta dey na, maja aŇčga.‚ÄĚ Anda nd…ôhay siya hay da wuzlah akwar ma zla walay hay ma l…ôvam: ‚ÄúAl…ôkwa may, b…ôz aŇčga hay.‚ÄĚ
17.29: ¬ęAl…ôkwa na, b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, ya da wulkakwa Gazlavay na, ara kuley ba. AŇčga anda kuley mav…ô…ókaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza ba s…ôlak, asaya, aŇčga anda kuley ma…ó…ôzlkaya ta aŇčgwa ba. Kuley hay a ke…óe na, ara cek hay masa nd…ôhay ma kamata ta har ata, ta leŇčgesl ata.
17.30: Gazlavay ta cey mevel da ray nd…ôhay zleezle na, daa ba, maja daa Ňčgene nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara mey aŇčga ba …óagay. Ama, wure ke…óe, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay da b…ôla tabiya kwa daa wura daa wura Ňčga mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata, Ňčga s…ôpmara ta mevel pal.
17.31: Bay Gazlavay a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay tabiya anda ke…óe na, maja aŇčga ta pa …óar a cay Ňčga key sariya da b…ôla. A da ka sariya ha ta c…ôve…ó e ta fa ndaw pal masa aŇčga ma wala. Ta wuzd…ôrwa la a nd…ôhay tabiya fara fara ara ndaw aha ma da ka sariya ha maja Gazlavay ta sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa ndaw a sem daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
17.32: Masa nd…ôhay ma c…ôndamara Pawl ma kada mey da ray masl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey la na, nd…ôhay siya hay aa saŇčg…ôrfamar. Ama siya hay a l…ôvam: ¬ęYa wu…óam ka sawa, ka kadandara mey a ke…óe ta pas mekele saya.¬Ľ
17.33: Pawl, ta‚Äô, a daw, a mb…ôkdata.
17.34: Nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah ata, a diyam asi Pawl, a t…ô…ďmara mey a. Ara ata Deni, ndaw mahura da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma sla yawa Ňčga Ariyawpaz a, ta Ňčgwas mez…ôley Damaris, leŇč nd…ôhay mekele mekele hay may.

18.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Pawl a sl…ôk…óey da Aten, a daw aa berney Ňčga Kwarinti.
18.2: Fete…óe, a h…ôtfey ndaw *J…ôwif daha mez…ôley Akilas, ndaw aha a yawa daa hwayak Ňčga PaŇčw. Akilas a, a sawa daa berney Ňčga *Rawm masa daa hwayak Ňčga Itali na, menjey ga daa ba. A samawa na, ta Ňčgwas aŇčga P…ôresil, maja K…ôlawt, bay mahura Ňčga hwayak hay masa berney Ňčga Rawm ma wata, ta …ď…ôlta J…ôwif hay sem tabiya daa berney a. Pawl, ta‚Äô, a daw fa ata Akilas ta P…ôresil,
18.3: a njam bama, a kam sl…ôra daa slam a, maja sl…ôra ata letek. A kam way-mek…ôrcey Ňčga h…ô…ókedey.
18.4: Mandaw mandaw ta *pas mem…ôskey-vaw, a daw aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe, a wuzdatara mey da ray Yesu a nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay, kwa a nd…ôhay G…ôrek hay tabiya makustakaya daa way a. A s…ôpey Ňčga kusta ta mey amba nd…ôhay a, a t…ô…ďmara mey a.
18.5: Masa ata Silas ta Timawte ma samawa la daa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan na, Pawl a mb…ôkda mekey way-mek…ôrcey …óagay. A wuztar *Mey-maaya-mawiya mandaw mandaw a J…ôwif hay, a l…ôvtar Yesu na, ara *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.
18.6: Ama J…ôwif hay a, a wu…óam mey Ňčga Pawl ba, a c…ô…ómara. Da ray Ňčgene, Pawl a rara lagwada fa zana aŇčga a ray ata, aa guzltar ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKa g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey a ba, anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a kakwar sariya la Ňčgaa z…ô…ódakwar. S…ôrmara, Ňčgene na, mey a…óaw da hwa…ó a daa ba. Wure ke…óe, ya mb…ôkdakwar, ya daw la, ya wuzdatara mey a, a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay.¬Ľ
18.7: P…ôla! a mb…ô…ótar d…ô…ďa. A bawa daa way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, a daw a way ndaw mez…ôley Titiyus Justus. AŇčga ndaw J…ôwif ba ma nar ray a Gazlavay anda J…ôwif hay. Way aŇčga aa da cakay way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay a.
18.8: K…ôrispus, *bay-ray Ňčga way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay a, a t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu. Nd…ôhay da way aŇčga hay a t…ô…ďmara mey a may. Nd…ôhay Kwarinti hay ma j…ôkam sl…ômay fa Pawl na, ata ga, a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu, a h…ôtam *baptem.
18.9: Ta pas laŇčgar daha ta tava…ó, mes…ôfney a kar a Pawl. Daa mes…ôfney a, Bay Mahura a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da zlurey Ňčga wuzey mey a…óaw ba, ka da njey teete ba, wuzdatara a nd…ôhay c…ôŇčga,
18.10: maja yah manjakaya ta kah. Kwa ndaw fa da gwa Ňčga k…ôrzaka Ňčga s…ôrdaka banay daa ba, maja nd…ôhay a…óaw hay ga daa berney a ke…óe daha.¬Ľ
18.11: Da ray Ňčgene, Pawl manjakaya daa berney a mevey pal ta kiya maakwaw, fa wuzdatara mey Ňčga Gazlavay a nd…ôhay fete…óe.
18.12: Masa Galiyaw, aŇčga guverner daa hwayak Ňčga Akay na, J…ôwif hay, ta‚Äô, a c…ômdamara …óay ata a ray Pawl. A k…ôrzamara, a handamara fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sariya fete…óe.
18.13: A l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe fa t…ôknata nd…ôhay Ňčga d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay taa c…ôve…ó mekele masa ma n…ôsndakwara kwakwas al…ôkwa.¬Ľ
18.14: Anja Pawl fa da mb…ô…ódatara, ama Galiyaw ta‚Äô, aa guzley, a l…ôvtar a J…ôwif hay: ¬ęAkwar J…ôwif hay, da ndaw a ke…óe ta key meb…ôrey mahura la, da daa ba, ta key cek masa maaya ba mekele la na, Ňčgene, ya j…ôkfakwar sl…ômay la.
18.15: Ama ka handamawa yawa da ray mees…ôrkey akwar, da ray mez…ôley Ňčga nd…ôhay akwar hay, ta da ray kwakwas akwar na, anda ke…óe, si akwar ta ray akwar, ka kamara sariya ha. Yah na, ya t…ô…ďa Ňčga key sariya da ray s…ôkway Ňčga mey hay anda ke…óe ba.¬Ľ
18.16: Ta‚Äô, a …ď…ôlt…ôrwa daa slam mekey sariya ha.
18.17: Nd…ôhay tabiya a k…ôrzamara Sawsten, bay-ray Ňčga way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe, a k…ô…ómara fa mey-mbew Ňčga way mekey sariya ha. Ama Galiyaw ta wulkey da ray mek…ô…óey a daa ba s…ôlak. Pawl a v…ôhwa aa berney Ňčga Antiyaws daa hwayak Ňčga Siri
18.18: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Pawl a njey …óar ga da Kwarinti ta m…ôlmaŇč hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe. Ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkdata, a diyam ta ata P…ôresil ta Akilas aa berney Ňčga Senk…ôre amba a lam kwambiwal Ňčga daw aa hwayak Ňčga Siri. Da Senk…ôre na, Pawl ta h…ôja ray aŇčga la , maja ta mba…óar la a Gazlavay, a l…ôvar a da kar cek, wure ke…óe, ta ka cek aha cay. Ta‚Äô, a t…ôpam aa kwambiwal, a diyam aa hwayak Ňčga Siri.
18.19: A wusam aa berney Ňčga Efez. Pawl a mb…ôkdata ata P…ôresil ta Akilas Ňčga njam fete…óe. Ta‚Äô, a daw aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay, a kam yawa ta *J…ôwif hay daa way a.
18.20: Siya hay aa c…ôf…óamara Ňčga njey nek…ô…óey fa ata saya, ama Pawl a t…ô…ďa ba.
18.21: A mb…ôkdata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDa Gazlavay ta t…ô…ďa la na, ya v…ôhwa la fa akwar saya.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óey daa berney Ňčga Efez ta kwambiwal, a daw.
18.22: A wusey aa berney Ňčga Sezere, a pey salay, a daw a *Jeruzelem Ňčga catar har a nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu fete…óe. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a daw aa berney Ňčga Antiyaws masa da Siri.
18.23: A njawa fete…óe nek…ô…óey, a daw a p…ôkwa daa hwayak Ňčga Galati ta daa hwayak Ňčga F…ôrizi, a daw a slala hay mekele mekele fete…óe. A v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu tabiya. Apalaws a wuzey mey da ray Yesu
18.24: Ndaw *J…ôwif daha mez…ôley Apalaws, a daw, a wusey a Efez. A yawa daa berney Ňčga Alekzand…ôri. Apalaws a na, ara ndaw ma s…ôra meeguzley maaya maaya, asaya, a s…ôra …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay maaya maaya.
18.25: Nd…ôhay taa s…ôrkadamara maaya maaya la da ray Bay Mahura Yesu. A s…ôrey na, si *baptem Ňčga *JaŇč-Baptis gway, ama fa wuzdatara mey da ray Yesu a nd…ôhay ta mees…ômey, aa s…ôrkadata ta c…ôve…ó e c…ôŇčga.
18.26: A wuzey mey daa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay fa …óar a, fa …óar a. Aa guzley ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba. Ata P…ôresil ta Akilas a c…ôndamara na, ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlm…ôrwa a way ata, a wuzmar mey Ňčga Gazlavay amba a s…ôra ma f…ôna saya.
18.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Apalaws a wu…óey Ňčga daw aa hwayak Ňčga Akay. M…ôlmaŇč hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu da Efez, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmar g…ôdaŇč, a wuzlalamatar leeter Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu da Akay a, amba a t…ô…ďmara maaya maaya. Ta‚Äô, Apalaws a daw. Masa Apalaws ma wusey la na, a j…ôney nd…ôhay ga ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe maja maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray a.
18.28: Apalaws a kadatara mey a J…ôwif hay fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, a wuzdatara na, mewulkey ata, aa d…ôr e ba. A wuzdatara daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, fara fara Yesu na, ara *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.

19.1: Daa masa Apalaws aŇčga daa berney Ňčga Kwarinti daa hwayak Ňčga Akay heyey na, Pawl, ta‚Äô, a daw ta daa aŇčgwa hay, a wusey kasl aa berney Ňčga Efez. A h…ôtfey nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu nek…ô…óey fete…óe.
19.2: Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ta h…ôtam *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay la ta pas masa akwar ma t…ô…ďmara Yesu daw?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęŇäga menjey ala na, ala ma c…ônam mey da ray Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba.¬Ľ
19.3: Pawl aa c…ôf…óata, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, ka h…ôtam *baptem na, wura?¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęYa h…ôtam baptem Ňčga *JaŇč.¬Ľ
19.4: Pawl a l…ôvtar: ¬ęZleezle JaŇč a key baptem na, Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa ma wu…óam Ňčga mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata maaya ba. JaŇč a, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay, ndaw daha a sawa la fa d…ô…ďa aŇčga. Maaya na, a pamara Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Ndaw a na, ara Yesu.¬Ľ
19.5: Masa ata ma c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe la na, ta‚Äô, a h…ôtam baptem ta mez…ôley Ňčga Yesu Bay Mahura.
19.6: Pawl a patar har a ray. Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa a ray ata, aa guzlam ta mey mekele mekele masa ata ma s…ôrmara ba, a zlamar ma wuzdamara mey masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldatara Ňčga kedey.
19.7: Nd…ôhay a tabiya a key kuraw a ray a cew.
19.8: Kiya maakar, Pawl fa daw fa daw aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Fete…óe, aa guzltar a nd…ôhay ta mand…ôrzay daa dey ba da ray mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay. A kam yawa ta J…ôwif hay a, aa guzltar mey mekele mekele amba a t…ô…ďmara mey da ray Yesu.
19.9: Ama nd…ôhay siya hay da wuzlah ata a g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey a ba. Aa guzlam mey maaya ba da ray c…ôve…ó Ňčga Bay Mahura fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe. Da ray Ňčgene, Pawl, mbak! a mb…ôkdata, ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôlta nd…ôhay masa Ňčga Yesu, a diyam bama. Anda ke…óe, mandaw mandaw Pawl fa daw Ňčga wuzey mey a nd…ôhay daa lekwel Ňčga ndaw daha mez…ôley Tiranus.
19.10: Aa fa ka k…ône haa kasl mevey cew. Maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga Azi tabiya, kwa J…ôwif hay, kwa nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba, ta h…ôtam Ňčga c…ôney mey Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu la. Mey da ray b…ôza hay Ňčga Seva
19.11: Gazlavay fa key maazla hay mekele mekele ma r…ôzley ndaw ta fa Pawl.
19.12: Daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a lamat…ôrwa zana Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga Pawl ta zana aŇčga hay mekele mekele masa ma g…ôsam la fa vaw aŇčga, a handamara fa masa-macay hay. Anda ke…óe, ndaw masa macay ma g…ôsey ta aŇčga na, a mb…ôley. Ndaw masa ta malula da ray ma g…ôsey ta aŇčga may, malula ha a bey.
19.13: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, *J…ôwif hay daha, fa p…ôkam Ňčga …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay. A jadamara Ňčga …ď…ôley malula da ray nd…ôhay ta mez…ôley Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu. Anda ke…óe, a l…ôvmar a malula: ¬ęAla fa l…ôvmaka ta mez…ôley Ňčga Yesu, masa Pawl ma wuzda mey da ray a, bey da ray ndaw ke…óe.¬Ľ
19.14: B…ôza hay maasala Ňčga ndaw daha mez…ôley Seva, ata fa kamara k…ône may. Seva na, ara ndaw da wuzlah *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay.
19.15: Ama pas pal daha na, malula a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYesu na, ya s…ôra. Pawl may, ya s…ôra mey da ray a. Kaa akwar na, wa hay wa?¬Ľ
19.16: Ndaw masa ta malula kaa heyey na, ta‚Äô, a hway a ray ata. A f…ônta tabiya ta g…ôdaŇč, a k…ô…óta, a katar mb…ôlek fa vaw, a Ňčg…ôrtara zana fa vaw, haa b…ôza hay a, a bamawa da way aŇčga, a hwam ta vaw …ďa‚Äô k…ône.
19.17: Masa J…ôwif hay, ta nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay daa berney Ňčga Efez e ma c…ôndamara mey a la na, ata c…ôpa, mand…ôrzay a katar, a h…ôlmamara Bay Mahura Yesu ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
19.18: Nd…ôhay ga masa ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu a diyam, a wuzdamara cek hay maaya ba hay masa ata ma kamara zleezle fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, a kam ambahw maja.
19.19: Nd…ôhay ga masa ma kam slalak Ňčga n…ôsey nd…ôhay na, a handamat…ôrwa …óerewel ata hay masa ta mey hay ma n…ôsey nd…ôhay mawuzlalakaya da hwa…ó a na, aa k…ôrmata ta awaw fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya. Dala Ňčga …óerewel hay a tabiya na, ga kalah .
19.20: Anda ke…óe, ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay, nd…ôhay ga a c…ôndamara mey Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu. Nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey a, fa s…ôkmawa a dey a, a dey a. Nd…ôhay a yam mey da Efez
19.21: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga cek hay a ke…óe ma kam la na, Pawl a wulkey maaya na, a daw a *Jeruzelem. A wu…óey a daw aa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan ta aa hwayak Ňčga Akay …óagay, wara a daw a Jeruzelem e. A l…ôvey: ¬ęDa yah ma wusey la a Jeruzelem na, si ya daw aa berney Ňčga *Rawm may.¬Ľ
19.22: Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey nd…ôhay cew ma j…ônmara aa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan. Nd…ôhay a, ara ata Timawte ta Eraste. Ama Pawl na, a njey daa hwayak Ňčga Azi …óar nek…ô…óey.
19.23: Daa …óar hay a Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a yam mey ga da Efez da ray c…ôve…ó Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu.
19.24: Ndaw daa berney a daha, mez…ôley Demet…ôriyus. A v…ô…óey cek hay mec…ôhe mec…ôhe Ňčga …ď…ôrey ma h…ô…ókey ba, masa ma n…ôkam anda way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga kuley mez…ôley Artemis . AŇčga ta nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra ha fa h…ôtam dala ga ta sl…ôra ha Ňčgene.
19.25: Demet…ôriyus ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa gula aŇčga hay ta nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra hay anda aŇčga, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay ke…óe, ka s…ôrmara sl…ôra al…ôkwa ke…óe fa handandakwar zleley ga.
19.26: Ama akwar ta ray akwar fa c…ôndamara, akwar fa h…ôtmar cek masa ndaw mez…ôley Pawl ma ka. A l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay na, ‚ÄúKuley masa nd…ôhay ma kamara ta har na, ara cek ma j…ôney ndaw ba.‚ÄĚ Maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay ga da Efez ke…óe ta mb…ô…ódamara mewulkey ata sem, a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga. Ma t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga na, ara nd…ôhay daa berney ke…óe daada ba, ama kwa nd…ôhay ga daa hwayak Ňčga Azi tabiya.
19.27: Da cek aha fa key anda ke…óe na, nd…ôhay a da r…ôsmara sl…ôra al…ôkwa ha. A da r…ôsam sl…ôra al…ôkwa daada ba, ama nd…ôhay a da mb…ôkdamara meregedey daa way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga kuley Artemis may. Fara fara kuley Artemis na, ara kuley mahura masa nd…ôhay daa wura daa wura daa hwayak Ňčga Azi ta da b…ôla tabiya ma ragadamar. Ama da nd…ôhay ta t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Pawl ke…óe la na, kuley a, fa da z…ôldamara sl…ômay daa saba.¬Ľ
19.28: Masa nd…ôhay ma c…ôndamara mey masa Demet…ôriyus ma kada anda ke…óe la na, mevel a catar ga. A wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęArtemis, kuley Ňčga nd…ôhay Efez hay na, ara kuley mahura!¬Ľ
19.29: Mewudey a, a c…ôney fa nd…ôhay mekele mekele daa berney a na, ta‚Äô, leŇčgesl ata a mb…ô…óey. Nd…ôhay a …óa…óamata ata Gayus ta Aristarke, nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan masa ma l…ôgdamara Pawl, a hwam tabiya Ňčgada b…ôrakw.
19.30: Pawl a wu…óey Ňčga daw fa nd…ôhay a, ama nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu a t…ôkmara.
19.31: Nd…ôhay da wuzlah mahura hay ma wamara hwayak Ňčga Azi na, ara jam hay Ňčga Pawl. A sl…ôrmawa nd…ôhay fa v…ô…óa, a l…ôvmar a da daw a b…ôrakw a ba.
19.32: Nd…ôhay makustakaya tabiya fete…óe na, ray ata ta h…ô…ďey sem, fa yam mey saw k…ône. Nd…ôhay siya a wudam, a l…ôvam mey pal, siya hay a wudam, a l…ôvam mey mekele. Ama har-g…ôdaŇč Ňčga nd…ôhay da wuzlah ata na, a s…ôrmara a kusam maja me ba.
19.33: Ndaw *J…ôwif daha, mez…ôley Alekzand…ôre. J…ôwif hay mekele a walamara da wuzlah nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay siya, a lacadamara fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay makustakaya amba a wuzdatara mey a maaya maaya. Alekzand…ôre a baŇčga…óa har Ňčgaa guzley, a wu…óey a wuztar mey a nd…ôhay makustakaya ha.
19.34: Ama masa ata ma s…ôrmara aŇčga ndaw J…ôwif na, a zlamar ma wudam ta …óay pal, a l…ôvam: ¬ęArtemis, kuley Ňčga nd…ôhay Efez hay na, ara kuley mahura!¬Ľ Haa ler cew, ata fa wudam anda ke…óe.
19.35: Sek…ôreter mahura daa berney a, a t…ôkta Ňčga yey mey, ta‚Äô, a njam teete. Sek…ôreter e a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay da Efez, nd…ôhay tabiya a s…ôrmara aŇčgwa Ňčga kuley Ňčga Artemis na, a k…ôzlwa da gazlavay da va…ó. Asaya, a s…ôrmara ara nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Efez ma j…ô…ómara way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga kuley mahura ha ta aŇčgwa Ňčga kuley a.
19.36: Ndaw ma da r…ôsa mey ke…óe na, daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, si ka njam teete, ka wulkam maaya maaya …óagay.
19.37: Ka handamat…ôrwa nd…ôhay a ke…óe na, maja me? Ta lalamawa cek daa way a la daw? Ta c…ô…ómara kuley a la daw?
19.38: ∆äar hay daha mapakaya Ňčga key sariya. Nd…ôhay ma ka sariya hay daha. Da Demet…ôriyus ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay a wu…óam Ňčga wudey nd…ôhay na, Ňčgama a diyam a …ó…ôslmara sariya ha fa ata.
19.39: Da ka wu…óam Ňčga …óiyey mey mekele ma f…ôna ke…óe saya na, si ka handamara mey a fa mec…ômey-ray mahura Ňčga Ňčgwamna Ňčga n…ôka mey a.
19.40: Ama da ray cek ma key tasana ke…óe na, a gwamara Ňčga pamandakwar meb…ôrey, a da l…ôvam al…ôkwa fa wu…ókwa Ňčga n…ôsey mewey Ňčga *bay-ray hay daa berney a. Maja da mahura hay aa c…ôf…óamandakwar da ray mekusey a ke…óe na, al…ôkwa fa da gwakwa Ňčga mb…ô…ódamatakwara daa ba.¬Ľ
19.41: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa sek…ôreter heyey maa guzltar la anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey Ňčga diyam.

20.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa baazlam da Efez heyey ta nd…ôvey cay na, Pawl, ta‚Äô, a kusta nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe. Aa guzltar mey mekele mekele Ňčga v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč. Cay, a catar har a nd…ôhay a, a mb…ô…ótar mey, a wunkam, ta‚Äô, a daw aa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan.
20.2: Masa aŇčga fa p…ôkey daa hwayak a na, a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe ta mey hay mekele mekele ga. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a wusey aa hwayak Ňčga G…ôrek hay .
20.3: A njey daa hwayak a kiya maakar. Masa fa da nd…ôkwey aa kwambiwal Ňčga daw aa hwayak Ňčga Siri na, a c…ônda *J…ôwif hay ta c…ômdamara …óay ata cay amba a k…ô…ómara vagay. Da ray Ňčgene, a wulkey maaya na, a v…ôhey, a daw a Siri taa c…ôve…ó ma daw a Masad…ôwan.
20.4: Pawl a diyam na, ta ata Sawpater, b…ôzey Ňčga Pirus daa berney Ňčga Bere, Aristarke ta Sekundus nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Tesalawnik, Gayus ndaw daa berney Ňčga Derbe, leŇč Timawte, Tisik ta T…ôrawfim nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga Azi.
20.5: Nd…ôhay a ke…óe na, a diyam teese…ó fa mey ala , a s…ôkwmandar da T…ôrwas.
20.6: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga Gwagway Ňčga peŇč manjar cek ma h…ôsla da hwa…ó a, ala na, ya sl…ôk…óam daa berney Ňčga F…ôlepi, ya nd…ôkwam aa kwambiwal, ya diyam a T…ôrwas. ∆äar zlam fa d…ô…ďa ha na, ya wusam a T…ôrwas a, ya h…ôtfamatar fete…óe. Ya njam luma pal. Pawl a v…ôhwa fa nd…ôhay da T…ôrwas
20.7: Ta pas luma Ňčga D…ôram taa kwa…ó, ya kusam Ňčga z…ômey …óaf Ňčga s…ôrfedey mem…ôcey Ňčga Yesu. Pawl ta‚Äô, aa guzltar a nd…ôhay makustakaya. AŇčga faa guzley, faa guzley, kasl wuzlah-tava…ó, maja slam ta wurey la na, a da daw aa slam mekele.
20.8: Daa way da ray way masa ala makustakaya da hwa…ó a, pet…ôrla hay daha ga daa way a.
20.9: B…ôz-gula daha mez…ôley Yutik manjakaya daa feneeter Ňčga way masa ala makustakaya da hwa…ó a ha. Pawl fa wuzey mey, fa wuzey mey, gula kaa heyey a g…ôrey Ňčga menjey. ∆äar a kar, ta‚Äô, a ney aa …óar. Masa aa daa …óar na, ta‚Äô, a t…ô…ówa da ray way masa Ňčga maakar a da va…ó a hwayak. Nd…ôhay a sl…ôk…óadamara, ama ta m…ôcey sem.
20.10: Pawl, ta‚Äô, a b…ôrŇčgawa, a daw a ray b…ôz-gula ha, a ney a ray a, humbat! a humbta, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay: ¬ęKa t…ôwam ba, aa ta dey.¬Ľ
20.11: Ta‚Äô, Pawl a v…ôhey aa way da ray way heyey, a wuna peŇč, a z…ômamara daa slam a. Aa guzley haa slam ma wurey. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a daw.
20.12: B…ôz-gula heyey na, aŇčga maaya maaya ta mb…ôley cay. Nd…ôhay a Ňčg…ôlmara, a diyam a way. Masa ata ma h…ôtmar b…ôz-gula heyey ma mb…ôley cay na, mevel ata a d…ôkey, kwa ara mey ba. Pawl a daw da T…ôrwas aa berney Ňčga Mile
20.13: Pawl a wu…óey Ňčga daw a Asaws ta salay …óagay. Da ray Ňčgene, a l…ôvndar Ňčga daw ta kwambiwal fa mey a Asaws. Ta‚Äô, ya diyam, ya s…ôkwmara daa Asaws a amba ya diyam bama.
20.14: Masa aŇčga ma h…ôtfandar la da Asaws na, a nd…ôkwey aa kwambiwal may, ta‚Äô, ya diyam aa berney Ňčga Mitilen.
20.15: Ya sl…ôk…óam fete…óe, ta kwambiwal. Pep…ôrek e, ya wusam aa kwakway Ňčga hwayak da wuzlah b…ôlay mez…ôley Kiyaw. Pep…ôrek e mekele, ya t…ôŇčgdamara b…ôlay, ya diyam aa hwayak da wuzlah b…ôlay mekele mez…ôley Samaws. Pep…ôrek e mekele saya na, ya wusam aa berney Ňčga Mile.
20.16: Ya diyam a Mile, ya mb…ôkdamara berney Ňčga Efez na, maja Pawl fa wu…óey Ňčga njey daa hwayak Ňčga Azi ga daa ba. AŇčga fa wusey vaw Ňčga daw aa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem, amba wuskwaa …óar Ňčga gwagway Ňčga *Pantekwat a da wuswa na, aŇčga ta wusey cay. Pawl aa guzltar a bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da Efez
20.17: Masa Pawl aa daa berney Ňčga Mile na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrwa a Efez Ňčga z…ôley *bay-ray hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu fete…óe.
20.18: Masa bay-ray hay a ma wusam la a cakay a, a Mile na, Pawl a l…ôvtar: ¬ęD…ôga yah ma sawa fa akwar Ňčgeeme aa hwayak Ňčga Azi ke…óe na, ka s…ôrmara menjey a…óaw da wuzlah akwar mandaw mandaw na, aŇčga kwara.
20.19: Ya kar sl…ôra a Bay Mahura na, ta meney ray, ta mat…ôway daa dey, asaya, ya ta s…ôrey banay la ga maja *J…ôwif hay fa s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga k…ô…ómaya vagay.
20.20: Ka s…ôrmara kwa ya ta …ďey cek fa akwar masa ma j…ônkwar na, daa ba s…ôlak. Ya fa wuzdakwara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ya faa s…ôrkadakwara kwa daa papalah, kwa da way akwar hay.
20.21: Ya faa guzltar a J…ôwif hay ta a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay, amba a mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata, a mb…ô…óam dey fa Gazlavay, a s…ôpmara ta mevel pal, a pamara Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara.
20.22: Wure ke…óe, ya fa daw a *Jeruzelem maja *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma t…ôkya …óay Ňčga daw, ama ya s…ôra cek ma da h…ôtfaya fete…óe ba.
20.23: Cek masa yah ma s…ôrey na, kwa daa berney wura wura Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay fa wuzdiwa, a s…ôrdamaya banay la, a k…ôzlamaya la aa f…ôrs…ône.
20.24: Ama kwa ya m…ôcey, kwa yah ta dey, Ňčgada yah na, a mbafaya gway. Cek mahura Ňčgada yah na, ara Ňčga nd…ôvey sl…ôra masa Bay Mahura Yesu ma v…ôldiwa a har a…óaw Ňčga key. Sl…ôra ha, ara mewuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray maaya Ňčga Gazlavay.
20.25: ¬ęYa ta p…ôkey la da wuzlah akwar tabiya, ya ta wuzkwar mey la da ray mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay. Ama wure ke…óe, ya s…ôra kwa ndaw pal dasi akwar fa da h…ôtya daa saba.
20.26: Da ray Ňčgene, ya fa l…ôvkwar d…ôga tasana, da ndaw dasi akwar taa z…ô…óey la na, mey a…óaw da hwa…ó a daa ba,
20.27: maja ya ta wuzdakwara mey hay tabiya la da ray cek masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey Ňčga ka. Kwa ya ta …ďey mey fa akwar daa ba.
20.28: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, wam vaw fa ray akwar, j…ô…ómata nd…ôhay tabiya masa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôldakwara asi har akwar anda mec…ôkwer ma j…ô…óta t…ô…ďaŇč aŇčga hay. Kam mec…ôkwer Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay. Ata na, Gazlavay a pata wal Ňčgada aŇčga ta fa mem…ôcey Ňčga B…ôzey aŇčga.
20.29: Ya s…ôra, pas masa ya ta daw sem na, nd…ôhay a mb…ôzmawa la a wuzlah akwar anda wagalak hay ma diyam a wuzlah t…ô…ďaŇč hay. A da n…ôsmata nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu.
20.30: Kwa nd…ôhay da wuzlah akwar may, a mb…ôrzlam la, amba a t…ôknamata nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu Ňčga diyam asi ata.
20.31: Anda ke…óe, wam vaw fa ray akwar. S…ôrfadamara, mevey maakar yah da wuzlah akwar, taa va…ó, taa pas, ya ta k…ôtkwar la pal pal tabiya akwar, haa ya t…ôway maja akwar.
20.32: ¬ęWure ke…óe, ya fa v…ôldakwar a har Gazlavay, ya k…ôtkwar Ňčga s…ôrfedey mey da ray maaya Ňčga Gazlavay. AŇčga na, a gwa a v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga t…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Yesu ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, a gwa a v…ôlkwar cek hay maaya masa aŇčga ma …ďadatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay tabiya.
20.33: Dey ta kaya fa dala akwar, ta zleley akwar daa ba. Dey ta kaya kwa fa zana Ňčga ndaw pal daa ba.
20.34: Akwar ta ray akwar ka s…ôrmara ya ta key sl…ôra la ta har a…óaw, amba ya h…ôtey dala Ňčga h…ô…ókey cek mez…ômey Ňčgada yah ta Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma l…ôgdamaya.
20.35: Anda ke…óe, yah ma wuzdakwara la, si ka kam sl…ôra amba ka j…ônmata nd…ôhay masa-viya hay. S…ôrfadamara mey Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu maa guzley ta mey aŇčga, ma l…ôvey heyey: ‚ÄúNdaw ma v…ôley cek, aa ta mees…ômey a f…ôna ndaw ma t…ô…ďa cek aha.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
20.36: Masa Pawl ma nd…ôvda meeguzley la na, nd…ôhay tabiya a ragadam. Pawl ta‚Äô, a d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay a daa slam a.
20.37: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay tabiya a t…ôwam, cacam! a cac…ômamara fa dadak, a camar har Ňčga daw ta zazay.
20.38: A t…ôwam ga na, maja aŇčga ma l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar fa da h…ôtmaya daa saba.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a l…ôgdamara kasl aa slam met…ôpey kwambiwal.

21.1: Masa ala ma mb…ôkdamat…ôrwa *bay-ray hay da Efez heyey cay na, ta‚Äô, ya diyam ta kwambiwal cer aa hwayak da wuzlah b…ôlay mez…ôley Kwas. Pep…ôrek e, ya diyam ya wusam aa hwayak da wuzlah b…ôlay mekele mez…ôley Rawdes. Da fete…óe, ta‚Äô, ya diyam ta kwambiwal aa berney Ňčga Patara.
21.2: Da Patara ha, ya h…ôtam kwambiwal mekele ma daw aa hwayak Ňčga Fenisi, ta‚Äô, ya nd…ôkwam a hwa…ó a, ya diyam.
21.3: Masa ala da wuzlah b…ôlay na, ya h…ôtmar hwayak Ňčga Sip…ôre ta har-gula, ama ya diyam na, Ňčgadaa hwayak Ňčga Siri. Ta‚Äô, kwambiwal a lecey da Tir daa hwayak Ňčga Siri heyey, amba a padamata salay ta cek hay da hwa…ó a.
21.4: Daa Ňčgene ya pam salay, ya diyam, ya h…ôtfam nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe. Ta‚Äô, ya njam bama ta ata luma pal. *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a wuztar cek ma da kar a Pawl da *Jeruzelem. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a, a l…ôvmar a Pawl na, a da daw a Jeruzelem e ba.
21.5: Ama masa ala ma kam luma pal la ta ata na, ta‚Äô, ya sl…ôk…óam, ya diyam a p…ôkey. Ata tabiya ta Ňčgwas ata hay, ta b…ôz ata hay, a l…ôgdamand…ôrwa daa berney a haa a palah. Ya wusam a mey-b…ôlay na, ta‚Äô, ya ragadam, ya d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay.
21.6: Masa ala ma d…ôram daŇčgay cay na, ta‚Äô, ya cam har pal pal da wuzlah ala tabiya, ya nd…ôkwam aa kwambiwal. Ata may, ta‚Äô, a v…ôham a way ata hay.
21.7: Ya diyam ta kwambiwal da Tir aa berney Ňčga P…ôtawlemayis. Fete…óe, ya pam salay. Ya camatar har a m…ôlma ala hay daa mey Ňčga Yesu, ya njam …óar pal bama.
21.8: Pep…ôrek e, ta‚Äô, ya diyam, ya wusam aa berney Ňčga Sezere. Fete…óe, ndaw ma wuzey mey da ray Yesu daha mez…ôley *F…ôlep. AŇčga na, ara ndaw pal da wuzlah *nd…ôhay maasala masa ata ma walamata da Jeruzelem heyey. Ya diyam, ya njam da way aŇčga.
21.9: Dam aŇčga hay m…ôfa…ó, ta diyam a way zel daa ba araŇč, fa wuzam mey masa Gazlavay ma wuzdatara.
21.10: Masa ya ta njam cay …óar ga fete…óe na, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey daha mez…ôley Agabus a sawa da *Jude aa berney a.
21.11: Ta‚Äô, a wuswa fa ala, leŇč! a la senter Ňčga Pawl, a j…ôwta salay aŇčga hay ta har aŇčga hay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęEhe, Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ‚Äú*J…ôwif hay daa hwayak Ňčga Jeruzelem a da j…ôwmara ndaw Ňčga senter ke…óe anda yah ma j…ôwa har a…óaw ta salay a…óaw ke…óe, a da v…ôldamara a har nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
21.12: Masa ala ma c…ôndamara mey a ke…óe la na, ala ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu daa Sezere he, ya kamar ambahw a Pawl, a da daw a Jeruzelem e ba.
21.13: Ama Pawl a mb…ô…ódandara, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa t…ôwam na, maja me? Ka wu…óam ka pamaya mand…ôrzay aa dey daw? Yah na, kwa a j…ôwmaya, kwa a k…ô…ómaya vagay da Jeruzelem e maja Bay Mahura Yesu na, cay.¬Ľ
21.14: Anda ke…óe, ala ta gwamara Ňčga mb…ô…ódamara mewulkey aŇčga daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, mbak! ya mb…ôkdamara Ňčga daw, ya l…ôvmar: ¬ęBay Mahura Yesu Ňčga key anda aa ma wu…óey.¬Ľ
21.15: Ya njam fete…óe …óar nek…ô…óey saya, ta‚Äô, ya …óiyam vaw, ya diyam a Jeruzelem.
21.16: Nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu siya da Sezere, ta‚Äô, a l…ôgdamandar a way ndaw daha mez…ôley M…ônasaŇčw. Ara ndaw daa hwayak Ňčga Sip…ôre ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu d…ôga zleezle. Ya nam da way aŇčga fete…óe. Pawl a daw a n…ôk…ôrwa Jak
21.17: Masa ala ma wusam la a *Jeruzelem na, m…ôlmaŇč hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu a t…ô…ďmandar ta mees…ômey.
21.18: Pep…ôrek e, ala ta ata Pawl, ta‚Äô, ya diyam a way *Jak. *Bay-ray hay tabiya Ňčga mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu makustakaya fete…óe.
21.19: Pawl, ta‚Äô, a catar har, a wuzdatara cek hay tabiya maaya maaya, cek hay masa Gazlavay ma kata da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay ta fa sl…ôra aŇčga.
21.20: Nd…ôhay a ma c…ôndamara mey a Ňčgene na, ta‚Äô, a h…ôlmamara Gazlavay. A l…ôvmar a Pawl: ¬ęM…ôlma ala, ka s…ôra da wuzlah nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay na, nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu, a key gabal weewe. Ata tabiya a wu…óam mey Ňčga *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz kalah c…ôŇčga.
21.21: Nd…ôhay a, a c…ôndamara ka fa wuztar mey a J…ôwif hay tabiya masa daa hwayak mekele hay, ka l…ôvtar Ňčga mb…ôkdamara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. Asaya, ka fa l…ôvtar a da slamatara mandawal Ňčga b…ôz ata hay ba, a da s…ôpam kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay saba.
21.22: Fara fara, kah ma sawa fe…óe kaa na, a c…ôndamara la. Ya da kakwa na, kwara?
21.23: Maaya na, ka ka cek masa ala ma da l…ôvmaka ke…óe. N…ôka, nd…ôhay m…ôfa…ó fe…óe daha ta mba…óamar la a Gazlavay.
21.24: Pas masa ata ma da kam kwakwas a Gazlavay Ňčga nd…ôvey *membe…óey ata ha na, gweegwe a wuswa. A da kam kwakwas a Gazlavay amba a t…ôram nd…ôhay mazl…ô…ďtakaya saba, fa d…ô…ďa ha a h…ôjmata ray ata hay . Maaya na, ka diyam bama, ka h…ô…ókatar cek hay Ňčga key kwakwas a ta dala akah. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay tabiya a da s…ôrmara mey hay masa ata ma c…ôndamara da ray akah na, ara memb…ôrzley. Asaya, a s…ôrmara kah, ta ray akah, ka fa nar ray a kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a may.
21.25: Ňägada nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu na, ala ta …óiymara mey a cay, ya ta wuzlalamatar leeter la da ray a, ya l…ôvmatar, a da z…ômam aslaw Ňčga kuley ba, a da z…ômam mambaz ba, a da z…ômam aslaw met…ôr…óey ta t…ôr…óey ba, a da lam vaw saw ba.¬Ľ
21.26: Masa ata ma l…ôvmar anda ke…óe la na, Pawl, ta‚Äô, a daw ta nd…ôhay m…ôfa…ó heyey. Pep…ôrek e, a kam kwakwas a Gazlavay amba a t…ôram nd…ôhay mazl…ô…ďtakaya saba. Ata Pawl ta nd…ôhay m…ôfa…ó heyey ta‚Äô, a mb…ôzam aa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. A diyam fa nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęMend…ôrey …óar maasala amba ya t…ôram nd…ôhay masa mazl…ô…ďtakaya saba. Masa ala ta t…ôram nd…ôhay masa mazl…ô…ďtakaya ba cay na, ya v…ôhmawa la Ňčga v…ôley cek a Gazlavay.¬Ľ A k…ôrzamara Pawl daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay
21.27: Mamba …óar maasala heyey a nd…ôvey, *J…ôwif hay mekele ma samawa daa hwayak Ňčga Azi a h…ôtmar Pawl daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. A h…ôldamata nd…ôhay tabiya fete…óe Ňčga k…ôrzamara Pawl, ta‚Äô, a k…ôrzamara.
21.28: A wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNd…ôhay *Israyel hay, j…ônmandar! Ehe, ndaw masa maa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay kwa daa wura daa wura ta mey maaya ba da ray nd…ôhay Israyel hay leŇč da ray *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, asaya, da ray Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay heyey na, a ke…óe. Wure ke…óe kwa nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay na, ta Ňčg…ôlt…ôrwa sem aa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay amba a zl…ô…ďmara way a!¬Ľ
21.29: A l…ôvam anda ke…óe maja ata ma h…ôtmatar ata Pawl ta T…ôrawfim, ndaw Efez, daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem. A wulkam Pawl ta mb…ôzda la aa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay.
21.30: Mey a ke…óe a c…ôney fa nd…ôhay tabiya da Jeruzelem na, a hwamawa da slala hay mekele mekele, a kusam aa way a. A k…ôrzamara Pawl, a badam…ôrwa aa ambaw. Ta‚Äô, a g…ôrcamata mey-slam hay Ňčga Way-mekey-kwakwas a fiyaw fiyaw.
21.31: Masa ata fa da k…ô…ómara vagay na, *bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay Ňčga *Rawm a c…ônda nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem tabiya fa yam mey.
21.32: Wure wure Ňčgene, a h…ôlwa sewje hay ta sewje mahura hay da ray sewje hay a, a hwamawa fa nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey. Masa nd…ôhay makustakaya ha ma h…ôtmatar la na, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôkdamara Pawl, a k…ô…ómara saba.
21.33: *Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey, ta‚Äô, a daw fa Pawl, a k…ôrza, a l…ôvtar a sewje hay Ňčga j…ôwmara ta calalaw cew. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay makustakaya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAra na, wa? A key na, me?¬Ľ
21.34: Nd…ôhay tabiya a l…ôvam mey wal wal. Bay a ta c…ônda mey a maaya maaya daa ba, maja nd…ôhay fa yam mey kalah. Da ray Ňčgene, a l…ôvtar a sewje aŇčga hay Ňčga handamara Pawl aa way Ňčga sewje hay.
21.35: Masa ata ma wusam la fa slam met…ôpey Ňčga mb…ôzey Ňčgada way a na, sewje hay a lamara ta ley, maja nd…ôhay fa kam h…ôma a ray a.
21.36: Nd…ôhay ga fa diyam asiya, fa wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęK…ô…ómara vagay! K…ô…ómara vagay!¬Ľ Pawl a kada mabara Ňčga mey aŇčga
21.37: Masa ata fa da mb…ôzdamara Pawl aa way Ňčga sewje hay heyey na, Pawl a l…ôvar a *bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay a: ¬ęKa v…ôlya c…ôve…ó Ňčgaa guzlka la daw?¬Ľ *Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa s…ôra meeguzley mey G…ôrek daw?
21.38: Kah na, ndaw *Ejip ma h…ôldata nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…óey vaw daa …óar hay a ke…óe ba daw? Ara kah ma handat…ôrwa nd…ôhay gabal m…ôfa…ó a wuzlah-ley Ňčga n…ôsa mewey Ňčga *Rawm heyey, ba diya?¬Ľ
21.39: Pawl a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYah, ndaw *J…ôwif. Ya yawa da Tars daa hwayak Ňčga Silisi, berney masa nd…ôhay ma z…ôldamara sl…ômay. Ambahw, v…ôlya c…ôve…ó, amba yaa guzltar a nd…ôhay ke…óe.¬Ľ
21.40: Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlar c…ôve…ó. Pawl deŇč! a lecey aa slam met…ôpey Ňčgada way heyey, ta‚Äô, a baŇčga…óa har amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara fa wu…óey Ňčgaa guzley. Nd…ôhay a c…ôpa, a njam teete, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar ta mey *Heb…ôre.

22.1: Pawl a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWaa papay hay, ta m…ôlma a…óaw hay J…ôwif hay, j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey a…óaw masa yah ma da l…ôvkwar wure ke…óe da ray cek ma key ta yah.¬Ľ
22.2: Masa ata ma c…ôndamara aŇčga faa guzley ta mey ata Heb…ôre na, a njam teete ma f…ôna, ma f…ôna, a j…ôkam sl…ômay. Ta‚Äô, Pawl a l…ôvtar d…ô…ďa:
22.3: ¬ęYah na, ndaw J…ôwif, ya yawa da Tars daa hwayak Ňčga Silisi. Ama ya g…ôley da *Jeruzelem fe…óe, ya ta jeŇčgey la fa Gamaliyel, ndaw maa s…ôrkadaya ta c…ôve…ó e da ray kwakwas Ňčga papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay. Yah ndaw ma key sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay ta mevel a…óaw c…ôpa anda akwar tasana ke…óe may.
22.4: Ya ta s…ôrdata banay la ga ta nd…ôhay ma s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu haa nd…ôhay a, a m…ôcam. Ya ta k…ôrzey zel hay leŇč Ňčgusay la, ya nd…ôkwdata aa f…ôrs…ône.
22.5: *Ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay tabiya a s…ôrmara mey masa yah ma kada na, ara mey fara fara. Ta v…ôlmaya leeter hay masa ata ma wuzlalamatara a m…ôlmaŇč hay J…ôwif hay daa berney Ňčga Damas la a har. Leeter hay a, a v…ôlmaya c…ôve…ó Ňčga daw a Damas a Ňčga k…ôrzawa nd…ôhay ma s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu, amba ya j…ôwt…ôrwa, ya handat…ôrwa a Jeruzelem, amba mahura hay a kamatar sariya Ňčga s…ôrdamata banay.¬Ľ Pawl a kada mey da ray pas masa aŇčga ma t…ô…ďa Yesu (SNM 9.1-19; 26.12-18)
22.6: ¬ęMamba wuzlah-pas, ya fa daw daa c…ôve…ó. Gweegwe ya wusey aa berney Ňčga Damas na, wure wure Ňčgene, slam a wa…óawa p…ôray! da gazlavay da va…ó a ray a…óaw.
22.7: Ya t…ô…óey a hwayak, ya c…ônda …óay ma l…ôvya: ‚Äú*Sawl, Sawl, ka s…ôrdaya banay anda ke…óe na, maja me?‚ÄĚ
22.8: Ya mb…ô…ódara, ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúBay Mahura, kah na wa?‚ÄĚ A mb…ô…ódiwa, a l…ôvya: ‚ÄúAra yah, Yesu, ndaw *Nezeret, masa kah ma s…ôrda banay.‚ÄĚ
22.9: Nd…ôhay masa dasi a…óaw na, ta h…ôtmar slam-mewe…óey a la, ama ta c…ôndamara …óay masa maa guzlya na, daa ba.
22.10: Ta‚Äô, ya cac…ôf…óa, ya l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay Mahura, kaa ya da key na, kwara?‚ÄĚ A mb…ô…ódiwa, a l…ôvya: ‚ÄúSl…ôk…óey, daw aa berney Ňčga Damas. Fete…óe, a da wuzdamakawa cek hay tabiya masa Gazlavay ma walaka Ňčga kata.‚ÄĚ
22.11: Slam-mewe…óey kaa heyey ta wulfayawa dey sem, nd…ôhay dasi a…óaw heyey, ta‚Äô, a …óa…óamaya fa har, a handamaya aa berney Ňčga Damas a.
22.12: ¬ęDaa berney a Ňčgene, ndaw mez…ôley *Ananiyas daha, aa fa s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay ta mevel pal, fa s…ôpa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta c…ôve…ó e, *J…ôwif hay daa berney Ňčga Damas a tabiya faa h…ômdamara.
22.13: A sawa a h…ôtfaya, a lecey a cakay a…óaw, a l…ôvya: ‚ÄúSawl, m…ôlma a…óaw, dey akah Ňčga wurey aa slam a.‚ÄĚ Wure wure Ňčgene, dey a…óaw ta‚Äô, a wurey aa slam a, ya h…ôtar Ananiyas a maaya maaya.
22.14: Ananiyas ta‚Äô, a l…ôvya: ‚ÄúGazlavay masa papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay ma ragadamar ta walaka la, amba ka s…ôra sl…ôra masa aŇčga ma wu…óey ka kara, amba ka h…ôtar ndaw pal ma key cek ta c…ôve…ó e ta dey akah, asaya, amba ka c…ônda …óay aŇčga.
22.15: Maja Ňčgene, ka da key sede da ray ndaw aha, ka da wuztar mey a nd…ôhay tabiya da ray cek masa kah ma h…ôtar ta da ray cek masa kah ma c…ônda.
22.16: Kaa wure ke…óe ka s…ôkwey na, me? Sl…ôk…óey, h…ôtey *baptem, cac…ôf…óa Bay Mahura Ňčga j…ônka, amba Gazlavay a mb…ôkdakawa meb…ôrey akah.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Mey da ray Gazlavay ma sl…ôrda Pawl fa nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay
22.17: Pawl a l…ôvey saya: ¬ęFa d…ô…ďa ha ya v…ôhwa a *Jeruzelem. Pas pal daha, ya fa d…ôrey daŇčgay daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay a wuzya cek,
22.18: ya h…ôtar Bay Mahura. Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvya: ‚ÄúWusey vaw, bey fiyaw da Jeruzelem ke…óe, maja nd…ôhay daa berney a ke…óe fa da t…ô…ďmara mey masa kah ma da kada da ray a…óaw na, daa ba.‚ÄĚ
22.19: Ya mb…ô…ódara, ya l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay Mahura, ata na, a s…ôrmara fara fara, ya ta daw la aa *way-mewuzey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay mekele mekele, ya k…ôrzawa nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey akah hay, ya k…ô…óta, ya k…ôzlata aa f…ôrs…ône.
22.20: Etiyen, ndaw ma key sede da ray akah na, ta pas masa ata ma k…ô…ómara vagay na, yah ta ray a…óaw, yah daha fete…óe. Masa ata ma k…ô…ómara vagay la na, ta mbafaya la. Yah ma j…ô…ótara j…ôbe hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma k…ô…ómara ha.‚ÄĚ
22.21: Ama Bay Mahura a l…ôvya c…ôŇčga: ‚ÄúDaw, ya sl…ôrdaka d…ôreŇč fa nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Pawl fa mey Ňčga bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay Ňčga Rawm
22.22: Nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey fa j…ôkam sl…ômay fa Pawl haa kasl fa mey aŇčga madagway-dakw, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęDaw, ya sl…ôrdaka d…ôreŇč fa nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay.¬Ľ Masa ata ma c…ôndamara mey a la na, ta‚Äô, a wudam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęLamara ndaw ke…óe, k…ô…ómara vagay! Ka da mb…ôkdamara Ňčga njey ta dey ba!¬Ľ
22.23: A wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, aa zakadamata zana ata hay a va…ó, a h…ôlam hwiyak a va…ó.
22.24: *Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay Ňčga handamara aa way Ňčga sewje hay heyey. A l…ôvtar Ňčga sl…ô…ómara ta laway amba a wuzd…ôrwa nd…ôhay makustakaya a wudam a ray a na, maja me.
22.25: Ama masa ata ma j…ôwmara cay Ňčga sl…ô…óey na, Pawl a l…ôvar a mahura Ňčga sewje hay masa da cakay a: ¬ęAkwar ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga sl…ô…óey ndaw Rawma masa sariya manjar Ňčga key araŇč daw?¬Ľ
22.26: Masa mahura Ňčga sewje hay ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe la na, ta‚Äô, a daw fa *bay-ray ata heyey, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa wu…óey Ňčga kar a ndaw ke…óe na, me? Ndaw aha ara ndaw Rawma.¬Ľ
22.27: Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey, ta‚Äô, a daw fa Pawl, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKadiwa, kah na, ndaw Rawma daw?¬Ľ Pawl a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAhaw.¬Ľ
22.28: Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey a l…ôvar: ¬ęYah ma da t…ôrey Ňčga ndaw Rawma ke…óe na, ya ta v…ôley dala la ga.¬Ľ Pawl a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAma yah na, ndaw Rawma d…ôga Ňčga mayawa a…óaw maja papay ndaw Rawma.¬Ľ
22.29: Nd…ôhay ma da sl…ô…ómara Ňčgaa guzley heyey, a c…ôndamara aŇčga ma l…ôvey anda ke…óe na, a Ňčg…ôcham la da cakay a. Masa bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay kaa heyey ma c…ônda Pawl aŇčga ndaw Rawma na, a zlurey maja aŇčga ma j…ôwa ta calalaw . Pawl fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay
22.30: *Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey, a wu…óey a s…ôra fara fara *J…ôwif hay a wudmara Pawl na, maja me. Da ray Ňčgene, pep…ôrek e, ta‚Äô, a p…ôska Pawl, a l…ôvtar a *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay leŇč a nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay tabiya Ňčga kusam. Ta‚Äô, a hand…ôrwa Pawl, a lacada fa mey ata.

23.1: Pawl ta‚Äô, a n…ôkfata nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa makustakaya kaa heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęM…ôlma a…óaw hay, yah na, ya s…ôra daa mevel a…óaw sl…ôra masa yah ma ka Ňčgada Gazlavay haa kasl tasana na, aŇčga maaya.¬Ľ
23.2: *Ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay fete…óe daha mez…ôley *Ananiyas. A l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay malacatakaya da cakay Pawl a Ňčga sl…ôŇčgmar maarawa.
23.3: Ta‚Äô, Pawl a l…ôvar: ¬ęGazlavay a k…ô…óka la, kah ndaw masa ta neneh cew! Kah manjakaya Ňčga kaya sariya anda mey Ňčga *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma l…ôvey, ama ka fa s…ôpa kwakwas a daa ba maja ka fa l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay Ňčga k…ô…ómaya anda ke…óe.¬Ľ
23.4: Nd…ôhay da cakay a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęHaya! Ka c…ô…óa *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, kwara?¬Ľ
23.5: Pawl a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęM…ôlma a…óaw hay, yah na, ya s…ôra ara ndaw mahura ba. Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKa daa guzley mey maaya ba da ray bay Ňčga nd…ôhay akah hay ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
23.6: Pawl a s…ôra da wuzlah nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa makustakaya ha na, *Saduse hay daha, *Fariza hay daha. Maja Ňčgene, aa guzley ta g…ôdaŇč fa mey ata, a l…ôvey: ¬ęM…ôlma a…óaw hay, yah ndaw Fariza, b…ôzey Ňčga ndaw Fariza. A kamaya sariya ke…óe na, maja ya fa s…ôkwa masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey.¬Ľ
23.7: AŇčga ma l…ôvey la anda ke…óe na, Fariza hay ta Saduse hay a, a zlamar mekey yawa, nd…ôhay makustakaya heyey a wunkam cew.
23.8: Nd…ôhay Saduse hay a wulkam nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya a sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey daa ba. Asaya, a l…ôvam maslaŇč hay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó daa ba, kwa mes…ôfney hay wura wura daa ba may. Ama Fariza hay a l…ôvam cek hay a Ňčgene tabiya na, daha.
23.9: Nd…ôhay fa kam baazlam ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč, nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkada kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz masa Fariza hay, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óam, a kam mey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAla ta h…ôtam meb…ôrey fa ndaw ke…óe kwa nek…ô…óey daa ba. Da maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó ma sawa maa guzlar kwa, da daa ba, mes…ôfney kwa.¬Ľ
23.10: Yawa ha fa key ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč. Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey a zlurey, a wulkey J…ôwif hay a, a da p…ôwmara Pawl. Da ray Ňčgene, a l…ôvtar a sewje aŇčga hay Ňčga diyam, Ňčga Ňčg…ôlm…ôrwa Pawl la da wuzlah nd…ôhay a. Ta‚Äô, a handamara aa way Ňčga sewje hay.
23.11: Dasi tava…ó a Ňčgene, Bay Mahura Yesu a wuzar vaw a Pawl, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da zlurey ba! Anda kah ma key sede da ray a…óaw da *Jeruzelem ke…óe na, si ka daw ka key sede da ray a…óaw daa berney Ňčga *Rawm may.¬Ľ J…ôwif hay a c…ômdamara …óay ata Ňčga k…ô…óey Pawl vagay
23.12: Pep…ôrek e, *J…ôwif hay a kusam, a c…ômdamara …óay ata pal. A mba…óam, a l…ôvam a z…ômam …óaf ba, a sam yam ba, si ata ma k…ô…ómara Pawl vagay la …óagay.
23.13: Nd…ôhay a, ata a f…ôna nd…ôhay kwakwar m…ôfa…ó.
23.14: Ta‚Äô, a diyam fa *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta fa mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęAla ta mba…óam sem, tasana, ya z…ômam …óaf ba, ya sam yam ba, si ala ma k…ô…ómara Pawl vagay la.
23.15: Wure ke…óe, akwar ta nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay mekele, si ka sl…ôram fa bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay Ňčga *Rawm Ňčga hand…ôrwa Pawl fa akwar. Ka l…ôvmar ka wu…óam amba ka cac…ôf…óamara saya, ka n…ôkmara mey aŇčga maaya maaya. Ama, ala na, ya da lacam aa c…ôve…ó, amba ya k…ô…ómara vagay daa masa aŇčga ta wuswa fa akwar daa ba araŇč.¬Ľ
23.16: Masa ata maa guzlam Ňčgene na, b…ôzey Ňčga dam-mamaŇč Ňčga Pawl a ta c…ônda mey a sem. Ta‚Äô, a daw a mb…ôzey aa way Ňčga sewje hay heyey, a kadara mey a, a Pawl.
23.17: Pawl, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlwa ndaw pal da wuzlah mahura hay da ray sewje hay a, a l…ôvar: ¬ęHanda gula ke…óe fa bay-ray akwar, a da kadar mey daha.¬Ľ
23.18: Ndaw kaa ta‚Äô, a handa gula ke…óe fa bay-ray ata heyey, a wusam, a l…ôvar: ¬ęPawl, ndaw daa f…ôrs…ône heyey a z…ôlya, a l…ôvya ya hand…ôrwa gula ke…óe fa akah, mey aŇčga daha Ňčga kadakawa.¬Ľ
23.19: *Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay kaa, a Ňčg…ôla gula ha ta cakay. Ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa l…ôvey na, kwara?¬Ľ
23.20: Gula kaa a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęJ…ôwif hay ta c…ômdamara …óay ata cay pal, amba aa c…ôf…óamaka mandaw ka handa Pawl fa nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay. A l…ôvam a wu…óam amba aa c…ôf…óamara maaya maaya saya.
23.21: Ama ka da t…ô…ďa mey ata ba, maja nd…ôhay a f…ôna kwakwar m…ôfa…ó fa j…ô…ómara daa c…ôve…ó. Ata tabiya ta mba…óam sem, a l…ôvam a z…ômam …óaf ba, a sam yam ba, si ata ma k…ô…ómara Pawl la vagay …óagay. Ata ta mba…óam sem, a kamara la. A s…ôkwam kaa na, mey masa kah ma da mb…ô…ódatara.¬Ľ
23.22: Da ray Ňčgene, bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey a l…ôvar a gula ha: ¬ęMey masa kah ma kadiwa ke…óe na, ka da wuzda kwa a ndaw ba.¬Ľ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar Ňčga daw. Bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay a sl…ôrda Pawl fa Guverner F…ôlekes
23.23: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey, ta‚Äô, a z…ôlwa mahura Ňčga sewje hay cew, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKusam sewje hay temere cew, ta sewje hay masa ma diyam ta p…ôles hay kwakwar maasala, leŇč sewje hay masa ta z…ôwet hay temere cew. Akwar c…ôpa …óiyam vaw, Ňčga daw aa berney Ňčga Sezere ta …ď…ôrey zlam-letek Ňčga tava…ó.
23.24: Asaya, s…ôpam p…ôles hay Ňčgada Pawl, amba a t…ôpey, ka handamara ta zazay fa Guverner F…ôlekes.¬Ľ
23.25: Ta‚Äô, a wuzleley leeter, a l…ôvey:
23.26: ¬ęAra yah K…ôlawt Liziyas ma wuzlalakawa leeter ke…óe, Ňčgada akah, bay a…óaw mahura, Guverner F…ôlekes. Ya caka har.
23.27: Ya wu…óey yaa guzlka da ray ndaw ke…óe. *J…ôwif hay ma k…ôrzamara, a wu…óam Ňčga k…ô…ómara vagay. Masa yah ma c…ônda la aŇčga ndaw Rawma na, ta‚Äô, ya daw ta sewje hay, ya l…ôhd…ôrwa dasi har ata.
23.28: Ya wu…óey Ňčga s…ôra a wudmara na, maja me. Anda ke…óe, ta‚Äô, ya handa fa nd…ôhay ata hay mahura ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay.
23.29: Ya n…ôka a wudmara na, da ray mey Ňčga kwakwas ata gway. Aa ta key meb…ôrey t…ô…óe kwa Ňčga k…ô…óa vagay, kwa Ňčga nd…ôkwda aa f…ôrs…ône na, daa ba.
