23.30: Ama ya c…ônda na, J…ôwif hay ta c…ômdamara …óay ata cay Ňčga k…ô…ómara vagay. Ya sl…ôrdakawa fiyaw fiyaw ke…óe na, maja. Ya l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ma wudmara na, Ňčga diyam Ňčga wudmara fa akah. Ke…óe ara mey a…óaw Ňčgada akah.¬Ľ
23.31: Ta‚Äô, sewje hay, a Ňčg…ôlm…ôrwa Pawl anda bay-ray ata ma l…ôvtar. A handamara dasi tava…ó a Ňčgene aa berney Ňčga Antipat…ôris.
23.32: Pep…ôrek e, sewje hay ma diyam ta salay, ta‚Äô, a v…ôhmawa a way, a mb…ôkdamata sewje hay ta p…ôles hay Ňčga handamara Pawl a.
23.33: A wusam a Sezere heyey. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôldamara leeter e a Guverner F…ôlekes, Pawl may, a mb…ôkdam…ôrwa asi har aŇčga.
23.34: Guverner kaa a jaŇčga leeter e, ta‚Äô, aa c…ôf…óa Pawl, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, daa hwayak wura?¬Ľ Pawl a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYah, ndaw Silisi.¬Ľ
23.35: Daa Ňčgene, F…ôlekes a l…ôvar: ¬ęDa nd…ôhay ma wudmaka ta samawa la na, yaa c…ôf…óaka la da ray mey a.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar a sewje hay Ňčga j…ô…ómara daa way meney mahura Ňčga guverner masa Bay *Herawt ma l…ôma.

24.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha …óar zlam, *Ananiyas, *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, a wusey a Sezere. Mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay mekele mekele, leŇč ndaw mez…ôley Tertulus ma s…ôra mewey Ňčga Rawma hay a diyam bama ta ata Ananiyas a. A wusam fa mey Ňčga Guverner F…ôlekes a, amba a wudmara Pawl.
24.2: Ta‚Äô, a z…ôlm…ôrwa Pawl. Masa Pawl ma wuswa a cakay ata la na, Tertulus a zlar Ňčgaa guzlar da ray a, a guverner, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWaa bay ala mahura F…ôlekes, ala manjatakaya ta zazay fara fara maja kah. Ka ta …óiya hwayak al…ôkwa la amba cek tabiya da hwa…ó a, a daw maaya maaya, maja kah ndaw ta leŇčgesl maaya.
24.3: Nd…ôhay tabiya daa hwayak al…ôkwa fa t…ô…ďmara cek masa kah ma ka tabiya, ala fa kamaka suse.
24.4: Ama ya wu…óey ya g…ôrdaka ta mey hay ga ba. Da ray Ňčgene, ya kaka ambahw Ňčga j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey ala nek…ô…óey, maja kah ndaw maaya ma s…ôra dey-ceceh fa ndaw.
24.5: Ya n…ôkmara ndaw ke…óe na, ndaw mak…ôwkaya kalah, ara aŇčga ma hand…ôrwa meyey-mey a wuzlah nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay da b…ôla tabiya. AŇčga ndaw mahura Ňčga nd…ôhay ma s…ôpam c…ôve…ó memb…ôrzley masa ma z…ôlmata *Nezeret hay.
24.6: Asaya, aŇčga na, a wu…óey Ňčga zl…ô…ďa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Ara maja Ňčgene, ala ma k…ôrzam…ôrwa. [Ya wu…óam amba ya kamar sariya anda *mewey Ňčga J…ôwif hay ma l…ôvey,
24.7: ama Liziyas, *bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay ta‚Äô, a sawa, a t…ô…ďa da har ala ta g…ôdaŇč.
24.8: Ta‚Äô, Liziyas a, a l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ma wudmara ha, Ňčga samawa fa mey akah ke…óe.] Da ka cac…ôf…óa Pawl a na, ka s…ôra la, ya wudmara na, da ray mey fara fara.¬Ľ
24.9: J…ôwif hay fete…óe a l…ôvam: ¬ęFara fara, mey masa Tertulus maa guzley kaa na, ara aŇčga.¬Ľ Pawl a kada mabara Ňčga mey aŇčga fa mey Ňčga F…ôlekes
24.10: Guverner F…ôlekes kaa heyey a lar har, a l…ôvar a Pawl Ňčgaa guzley. Pawl, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa s…ôra, mevey ga ara kah ma ka sariya daa hwayak ke…óe. Anda ke…óe, mevel a…óaw faa s…ômey ga, amba ya kada mabara Ňčga mey a…óaw fa mey akah.
24.11: Masa yah ma daw a *Jeruzelem Ňčga ragadawa a Gazlavay na, a f…ôna …óar kuraw a ray a cew ba. Da kaa c…ôf…óa mey a na, ka h…ôtfar la k…ône.
24.12: Kwa ndaw ta h…ôtfaya masa ala fa kam yawa ta ndaw daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, daa ba. Asaya, ndaw ta h…ôtfaya masa ya fa h…ôldata nd…ôhay Ňčga yey mey daa way hay mewuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay, kwa daa berney na, daa ba.
24.13: Ata ma wudmaya kaa na, ndaw da wuzlah ata ma gwa ma wuzdakawa mey a, ara mey fara fara daha daw?
24.14: Ama ya wuzdakawa, yah na, ya fa ragadar a Gazlavay masa papaŇč Ňčga papa ala hay ma ragadamar. Ya ragadar na, ta mes…ôpey c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu. Ata na, a l…ôvam c…ôve…ó e ara c…ôve…ó ma mb…ôrzley nd…ôhay. Ama ya fa t…ô…ďa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz tabiya, ta mey mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya may.
24.15: Yah, ya pa leŇčgesl a…óaw si a ray Gazlavay, ya t…ô…ďa mey ma l…ôvey a da sl…ôk…óadat…ôrwa nd…ôhay maaya ta nd…ôhay maaya ba hay daa mem…ôcey. Kwa nd…ôhay a ma wudmaya ke…óe na, fa pam leŇčgesl a ray mey a may.
24.16: Da ray Ňčgene, ya fa key sl…ôra ta mevel pal amba mandaw mandaw mevel a…óaw a njey maaya fa Gazlavay leŇč fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay.
24.17: ¬ęMasa yah ma mb…ôkda berney Ňčga Jeruzelem mevey ga la na, ta‚Äô, ya v…ôhwa aa berney a, ya handatar dala Ňčga j…ôney nd…ôhay masa-viya hay da wuzlah s…ôkway a…óaw hay *J…ôwif hay ta Ňčga key kwakwas a Gazlavay.
24.18: A h…ôtfamaya daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Daa Ňčgene, ya fa nd…ôvda mekey kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay amba ya t…ôrey ndaw mazl…ô…ďkaya saba. Nd…ôhay da cakay a…óaw ga daa ba, ya fa key baazlam daa ba.
24.19: Ama J…ôwif hay daa hwayak Ňčga Azi ata fete…óe. Da ata ta mey da ray a…óaw daha na, anja ara ata ha ma da wudmaya fa mey akah jak.
24.20: Da daa ba na, kaa c…ôf…óata nd…ôhay fa mey akah ke…óe Ňčga kadamakawa meb…ôrey masa yah ma ka ta pas masa ata ma k…ôrzamaya, ma handamaya fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay ma sla yawa Ňčga J…ôwif hay taw.
24.21: Fara fara, fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma sla yawa na, ya ta lecey la, ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa fa s…ôkwa pas masa Gazlavay ma da sl…ôk…óadat…ôrwa nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey.‚ÄĚ A wudmaya fa mey akwar kaa na, maja mey a ke…óe daw?¬Ľ
24.22: F…ôlekes na, a s…ôra mey da ray c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu maaya maaya. A g…ômey Ňčga …ó…ôsla sariya ha wure Ňčgene ba, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęYa da …ó…ôsla sariya akwar na, si ta pas masa Liziyas, *bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay heyey, ma sawa.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, a l…ôvtar Ňčga diyam a way.
24.23: A l…ôvar a mahura Ňčga sewje hay ma j…ô…ómara Pawl Ňčga j…ô…ómara maaya maaya daa f…ôrs…ône, ama a da s…ôrdamara banay ba, Ňčga v…ôlmatar c…ôve…ó a jam aŇčga hay ma samawa Ňčga j…ônmara. Pawl fa mey Ňčga F…ôlekes
24.24: ∆äar nek…ô…óey fa d…ô…ďa ha, F…ôlekes, ta‚Äô, a samawa ta Ňčgwas aŇčga D…ôrusil, dam *J…ôwif. Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrey, a z…ôlm…ôrwa Pawl, amba a c…ônda mey da ray met…ô…ďey-mey Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste.
24.25: Pawl, ta‚Äô, aa guzltar da ray menjey ma mbafar a Gazlavay, ta da ray menjey ta mewey vaw fa cek hay saw, leŇč da ray sariya masa Gazlavay ma da ka ta pas mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla. Pawl fa wuzda mey a Ňčgene na, F…ôlekes a zlurey, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWure ke…óe, mey a mak …óagay. Mb…ôkdaya. Pas masa yah ma h…ôtey har la na, ya z…ôlka la saya.¬Ľ
24.26: Asaya a wulkey na, Pawl a v…ôlar dala la, da ray Ňčgene, a z…ôla Pawl dey weewe Ňčga key ma…óay.
24.27: Fa d…ô…ďa ha mevey cew, guverner mekele a njey aa slam a Ňčga F…ôlekes, mez…ôley Ňčga ndaw aha na, Parsiyus Festus. F…ôlekes na, a g…ômey Ňčga p…ôskarawa Pawl daa f…ôrs…ône ba maja a wu…óey J…ôwif hay aa s…ômam da ray a.

25.1: Festus a wuswa aa hwayak Ňčga *J…ôwif hay Ňčga key guverner fete…óe. Fa d…ô…ďa ha …óar maakar, a sl…ôk…óey daa berney Ňčga Sezere, a daw a *Jeruzelem.
25.2: Da Jeruzelem e, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, ta mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay a samawa fa v…ô…óa, a wudmara Pawl saya. A kamar ambahw a Festus,
25.3: aa c…ôf…óamara Ňčga v…ôltar c…ôve…ó amba a handatara Pawl a Jeruzelem e. Aa c…ôf…óamara na, maja ta c…ômdamara …óay ata cay, amba a k…ô…ómara Pawl vagay daa c…ôve…ó.
25.4: Ama Festus a mb…ô…ódatara, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęPawl aa daa f…ôrs…ône daa berney Ňčga Sezere. Yah kwa ya v…ôhey la fete…óe daa …óar hay a ke…óe.
25.5: Maaya na, ya diyam bama ta mahura akwar hay a Sezere he. Da ndaw a ta key cek maaya ba la na, a wudmara fete…óe.¬Ľ
25.6: Festus a njawa ta ata da Jeruzelem e, a key …óar daaŇčgafa…ó, da daa ba kuraw gway. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôhwa aa berney Ňčga Sezere. Pep…ôrek e, a njey aa slam mekey sariya, a l…ôvey Ňčga handam…ôrwa Pawl.
25.7: Masa ata ma wusdam…ôrwa Pawl la na, J…ôwif hay ma samawa da Jeruzelem a zl…ôrmar ray. A wudmara, a mb…ôrzlafamar a ray, ta mey hay maadakw a maadakw a hay ga. Ama ata ta ray ata, a gwamara Ňčga wuzdamara mey da ray mey hay a fara fara ba.
25.8: Pawl, ta‚Äô, a kada mabara Ňčga mey aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa ta key meb…ôrey da ray kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay daa ba, ya ta zl…ô…ďa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba. Kwa *Sezere, bay mahura Ňčga *Rawm na, yah ta key meb…ôrey fa v…ô…óa daa ba.¬Ľ
25.9: Yaw, Festus a wu…óey aa s…ômdata J…ôwif hay. Da ray Ňčgene, aa c…ôf…óa Pawl, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa t…ô…ďa Ňčga daw a Jeruzelem daw? Fete…óe a da kamaka sariya fa mey a…óaw da ray mey masa ata ma wudmaka maja ke…óe.¬Ľ
25.10: Pawl a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęWure ke…óe, yah malacakaya daa slam mekey sariya Ňčga bay mahura Ňčga Rawm. Da sariya a key ta c…ôve…ó e na, anja maaya sariya a…óaw a, a key fe…óe. Ya ta key meb…ôrey fa J…ôwif hay daa ba. Kah ta ray kah, ka s…ôra maaya maaya.
25.11: Da ya ta key meb…ôrey la t…ô…óe Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay na, Ňčgene, k…ô…ómaya, ya t…ô…ďa Ňčga m…ôcey. Ama ata ma wudmaya ke…óe na, ara memb…ôrzley. Da ray Ňčgene, ndaw ma da gwa Ňčga v…ôldaya asi har ata daa ba. Anda ke…óe, yah na, yaa c…ôf…óey c…ôve…ó Ňčga hendey sariya a…óaw fa Sezere, bay mahura Ňčga Rawm.¬Ľ
25.12: Festus a slam yawa ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar a Pawl: ¬ęKa taa c…ôf…óey c…ôve…ó la Ňčga daw fa mey Ňčga Sezere, bay mahura Ňčga Rawm. Anda ke…óe, ya v…ôlka c…ôve…ó, ka daw fa aŇčga.¬Ľ Pawl fa mey Ňčga Bay Ag…ôripa
25.13: ∆äar nek…ô…óey fa d…ô…ďa ha, Bay Ag…ôripa ta dam-mamaha Berenis, a diyam aa berney Ňčga Sezere Ňčga cey har a Festus.
25.14: A njam …óar ga daa berney a. Da ray Ňčgene, Festus ta‚Äô, a kadara mey da ray Pawl heyey a Bay Ag…ôripa ha, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNdaw fe…óe daha, aa daa f…ôrs…ône d…ôga fa Bay F…ôlekes.
25.15: Masa yah da *Jeruzelem na, *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, a wudmara fa yah, aa c…ôf…óamaya Ňčga …ó…ôsla sariya aŇčga ha Ňčga k…ô…óa vagay.
25.16: Ama ya l…ôvtar, kwakwas Ňčga Rawma hay a l…ôvey na, nd…ôhay Rawma hay a v…ôldamara ndaw masa nd…ôhay ma wudmara Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay saw saw ba. Si ndaw masa ata ma wudmara a sawa fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma wudmara ha, a c…ônda mey ata la …óagay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw masa ata ma wudmara ha a kada mabara Ňčga mey aŇčga.
25.17: Ta‚Äô, ya samawa fe…óe ta J…ôwif hay aha. Ya ta njey ga daa ba, pep…ôrek e gway na, ta‚Äô, ya daw aa slam Ňčga sariya, ya l…ôvtar Ňčga handam…ôrwa ndaw aha.
25.18: Nd…ôhay ma wudmara ha, ta‚Äô, a samawa. Ya wulkey na, a wudmara da ray aŇčga ma key cek malamba hay. Ama, anja k…ône ba.
25.19: Si ata ma kam yawa da ray kwakwas ata, ta da ray ndaw daha mez…ôley Yesu. Ndaw aha ta m…ôcey sem, ama Pawl a l…ôvtar ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey, aŇčga ta dey.
25.20: Ya s…ôra Ňčga …ó…ôsla mey a ba. Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, yaa c…ôf…óa Pawl, ya l…ôvar: ‚ÄúKa t…ô…ďa ma daw a Jeruzelem amba a …ó…ôslmakawa sariya akah fete…óe daw?‚ÄĚ
25.21: Ama Pawl a l…ôvya, a wu…óey a njey daa f…ôrs…ône, a s…ôkwa sariya aŇčga fa Bay Mahura *Sezere gway. Anda ke…óe, ya l…ôvtar Ňčga j…ô…ómara …óagay, wara ya sl…ôrda fa Sezere he.¬Ľ
25.22: Bay Ag…ôripa a l…ôvar a Festus: ¬ęYah may, ya wu…óey ya c…ônda mey Ňčga ndaw aha.¬Ľ Festus a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęMandaw na, ka c…ônda mey aŇčga ha la.¬Ľ
25.23: Taa p…ôrek, Bay Ag…ôripa ta Berenis a diyam ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay, fa h…ôslmatar ray. A mb…ôzam aa slam mekey sariya ta bay-ray hay Ňčga sewje hay, leŇč mahura hay daa berney a. Festus a l…ôvtar Ňčga Ňčg…ôlm…ôrwa Pawl. Ta‚Äô, a handam…ôrwa Pawl a.
25.24: Festus a l…ôvey: ¬ęWaa, Bay mahura Ag…ôripa, ta nd…ôhay tabiya masa fe…óe, akwar fa h…ôtmar ndaw ke…óe, masa J…ôwif hay tabiya ma wudmara fa yah. A wudmara da Jeruzelem, ta‚Äô, a samawa a wudmara fe…óe may. Ata tabiya a l…ôvmaya ta g…ôdaŇč, ya da mb…ôkda ba, si ya k…ô…óa vagay.
25.25: Ama Ňčga yah na, yah ta h…ôtey meb…ôrey fa v…ô…óa masa t…ô…óe Ňčga k…ô…óa vagay na, daa ba. Yaw, maja aŇčga ta ray aŇčga, taa c…ôf…óey c…ôve…ó la amba bay mahura Ňčga *Rawm a …ó…ôslra sariya ha na, ya wulkey maaya ya sl…ôrdara fete…óe.
25.26: Ama ya s…ôra mey masa yah ma da wuzlalar a bay mahura Ňčga Rawm aha da ray sariya ha ba. Ara maja Ňčgene, yah ma hand…ôrwa fa mey akwar, teese…ó na, fa mey akah …óagay, Bay Ag…ôripa. Cac…ôf…óa, amba ya s…ôra cek masa yah ma da wuzleley da ray a, a bay mahura Ňčga Rawm.
25.27: Daa mewulkey a…óaw, da ya sl…ôrda ndaw fa bay mahura Ňčga Rawm Ňčga …ó…ôslra sariya da ray a, ama ya ta wuzdara mey masa ata ma wudmara maja daa ba na, Ňčgene, a c…ôney ba.¬Ľ

26.1: Bay Ag…ôripa a l…ôvar a Pawl: ¬ęYa v…ôlka c…ôve…ó Ňčga kada mabara Ňčga mey akah.¬Ľ Pawl, ta‚Äô, a baŇčga…óa har aŇčga, a zlar Ňčga kada mabara Ňčga mey aŇčga, a l…ôvey:
26.2: ¬ęWaa Bay Ag…ôripa, tasana yah faa s…ômey ga, Ňčga kada mabara Ňčga mey a…óaw fa mey akah, da ray mey masa *J…ôwif hay ma wudmaya tabiya,
26.3: maja kah na, ka s…ôra mey da ray kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay maaya maaya. Asaya, ka s…ôra mey hay masa J…ôwif hay ma kam yawa da ray a. Da ray Ňčgene, j…ôkfaya sl…ômay ta d…ôk-vaw cey.
26.4: ¬ęYaw, J…ôwif hay tabiya a s…ôrmara menjey a…óaw d…ôga daa zariya a…óaw haa wure ke…óe. A s…ôrmara, menjey a…óaw da wuzlah nd…ôhay a…óaw hay, ta da *Jeruzelem.
26.5: J…ôwif hay a ke…óe, a s…ôrmaya d…ôga zleezle. Da a wu…óam na, a gwamara ma kam sede da ray a…óaw. A s…ôrmara daa menjey a…óaw na, ya ta s…ôpa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz la ta g…ôdaŇč a…óaw ndav maja yah ndaw Fariza. *Fariza hay na, ara nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ma s…ôpam kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta g…ôdaŇč ata c…ôpa, ma f…ôna nd…ôhay mekele hay.
26.6: Wure ke…óe, fa kamaya sariya na, maja yah ma pa leŇčgesl a…óaw a ray cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvtar a papaŇč Ňčga papa ala hay zleezle a katara la heyey.
26.7: Cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvtar a da katara ha na, s…ôkway ala hay kuraw a ray a cew tabiya fa pam leŇčgesl a ray a, a wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtmar. Da ray Ňčgene, taa va…ó, taa pas, ata fa ragadamar a Bay Gazlavay. Waa Bay Ag…ôripa, J…ôwif hay a, a wudmaya na, maja.
26.8: Akwar J…ôwif hay, Gazlavay a sl…ôk…óadat…ôrwa nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey la, kaa ka t…ô…ďmara mey a ba na, maja me?
26.9: ¬ęZleezle yah ta ray a…óaw, ya ta wulkey la, maaya na, si ya s…ôpey wewer mekele mekele amba ya n…ôsa mez…ôley Ňčga Yesu, ndaw *Nezeret.
26.10: Ke…óe ara cek masa yah ma ka da Jeruzelem. *Bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta v…ôlmaya c…ôve…ó la Ňčga k…ôrzey nd…ôhay ga ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu, ta‚Äô, ya nd…ôkwdata aa f…ôrs…ône. Masa ata fa kamatar sariya Ňčga k…ô…ómata vagay na, ya l…ôvey maaya.
26.11: Ya daw ya s…ôrdata banay dey weewe daa way hay mewuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya. Ya t…ôktar …óay Ňčga r…ôsmara Yesu. Mevel ta caya la a ray ata kwa ara mey ba. Da ray Ňčgene, ya ta daw la ya s…ôpt…ôrwa kwa daa hwayak Ňčga nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay, ya s…ôrdat…ôrwa banay.¬Ľ Pawl a kada pas masa aŇčga ma t…ô…ďa Yesu (SNM 9.1-19; 22.6-16)
26.12: ¬ęAra maja Ňčgene, yah ma daw aa berney Ňčga Damas. Ara *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdamaya. Ya daw na, ta leeter da har masa ata ma wuzlalamara Ňčga v…ôlya c…ôve…ó Ňčga k…ôrzawa nd…ôhay.
26.13: Yaw, Bay Ag…ôripa, ta wuzlah-pas ya fa daw daa c…ôve…ó, ya h…ôtar slam ma wa…óawa a ray a…óaw. A wa…óawa da gazlavay da va…ó, ama a f…ôna mewe…óey Ňčga pas. A we…óey da ray a…óaw, ta nd…ôhay dasi a…óaw.
26.14: Ala tabiya ya t…ô…óam a hwayak. Yah na, ta‚Äô, ya c…ôney …óay Ňčga ndaw maa guzlya ta mey *Heb…ôre, a l…ôvya: ‚Äú*Sawl, Sawl, ka s…ôrdaya banay anda ke…óe na, maja me? Kah fa n…ôsa ray akah anda sla ma mb…ôzley zlanday Ňčga mec…ôkwer aŇčga.‚ÄĚ
26.15: Ta‚Äô, yaa c…ôf…óa, ya l…ôvar: ‚ÄúBay Mahura, kah na wa?‚ÄĚ Bay Mahura a mb…ô…ódiwa, a l…ôvya: ‚ÄúAra yah, Yesu ndaw masa kah ma s…ôrda banay.
26.16: Ama sl…ôk…óey, lecey ta lecey. Ya wuzka vaw ke…óe na, maja ya ta walaka sem amba ka t…ôrey ndaw ma ka sl…ôra a…óaw. Ka da key sede da ray a…óaw, ka l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay mey da ray kah ma h…ôtya tasana ke…óe. Asaya, ka da kadatara cek masa yah ma da wuzdakawa.
26.17: Ya sl…ôrdaka fa *J…ôwif hay, leŇč fa nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway hay mekele. Kwa da a kamaka cek maaya ba na, ya l…ôhdaka la dasi har ata.
26.18: Ya sl…ôrdaka fa ata na, amba ka wurtara leŇčgesl ata, amba ka badat…ôrwa daa l…ôvaŇč Ňčgadaa slam-mewe…óey. Ya sl…ôrdaka fa ata, amba ka badat…ôrwa dasi har Ňčga *SataŇč bay-malula, a mb…ô…ómawa dey Ňčgada fa Gazlavay. Da ata ma pamaya la Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara na, ya mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey ata la, asaya a h…ôtam slam-menjey la da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Pawl aa guzley da ray sl…ôra aŇčga
26.19: Pawl a l…ôvey saya: ¬ęWaa Bay Ag…ôripa, d…ôga mezley ta pas masa Bay Mahura ma wuzya vaw da va…ó Ňčgene na, ya fa pey leŇčgesl a ray a, ya fa ka cek aha anda aa ma wuzdiwa.
26.20: Anda ke…óe, ya zlar Ňčga wuzey mey Ňčgeeme na, a nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga Damas, fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya wuzdatara mey a, a nd…ôhay da *Jeruzelem, a nd…ôhay da *Jude tabiya, leŇč a nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay ba hay daa hwayak mekele mekele may. Ya l…ôvtar: ‚ÄúSi ka mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, mb…ô…óam dey fa Gazlavay, s…ôpmara ta mevel pal. Kam sl…ôra maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga wuzd…ôrwa na, akwar ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar sem.‚ÄĚ
26.21: Ara maja Ňčgene, J…ôwif hay ma k…ôrzamiwa daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, a wu…óam Ňčga k…ô…ómaya vagay.
26.22: Ama haa kasl tasana ke…óe, Gazlavay fa j…ônya. Maja Ňčgene, wure ke…óe yah malacakaya fa mey akwar, ya fa wuzda mey Ňčga Gazlavay fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, kwa a mahura hay, kwa a nd…ôhay wura wura c…ôpa. Ya wuzey na, si mey Ňčga *Mawiz ta mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzlam da ray cek ma da key. A l…ôvam
26.23: *K…ôriste a s…ôrey banay la. AŇčga, ara ndaw Ňčgeeme da wuzlah nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya ma da sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey. Maja masl…ôk…óawa aŇčga daa mem…ôcey a na, a wuzdatara mewe…óey Ňčga Gazlavay a J…ôwif hay ta a nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway hay mekele tabiya.¬Ľ Pawl a l…ôvar a Bay Ag…ôripa Ňčga t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu
26.24: Masa Pawl fa kada mabara Ňčga mey aŇčga anda ke…óe na, ta‚Äô, Festus a kar mey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvar: ¬ęPawl, ray akah ta mb…ô…óey sem, mes…ôrey cek akah kalah Ňčgene, ta n…ôskawa leŇčgesl sem.¬Ľ
26.25: Pawl a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęWaa bay mahura, leŇčgesl a…óaw, ta n…ôsey daa ba. Mey masa yah ma kada ke…óe na, ara mey saw ba, ama ara mey fara fara.
26.26: Bay Ag…ôripa na, a s…ôra mey a ke…óe. Ya gwa Ňčgaa guzlar ta mand…ôrzay daa dey ba, maja ya wulkey a s…ôra mey da ray cek hay a tabiya, maja cek hay a ma…ďadakaya daa ba, fa key fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya.
26.27: Waa Bay Ag…ôripa, ka t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ba diya? Yah na, ya s…ôra, ka fa t…ô…ďa mey ata.¬Ľ
26.28: Ta‚Äô, Ag…ôripa a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa wulkey ka gwa Ňčga t…ôrdaya ndaw Ňčga Yesu wure wure ke…óe la gway daw?¬Ľ
26.29: Pawl a mb…ô…ódara, a l…ôvar: ¬ęYah fa d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay, amba kwa wure ke…óe, kwa Ňčgada fa mey, kah ta nd…ôhay ma c…ôndamara mey a…óaw tasana ke…óe tabiya, ka t…ôram anda yah, ama a da j…ôwmakwar ta calalaw ke…óe ba may tarah.¬Ľ
26.30: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Bay Ag…ôripa, ta Guverner Festus, ta Berenis heyey leŇč nd…ôhay tabiya da cakay ata, a sl…ôk…óam, a diyam.
26.31: Masa ata ma Ňčg…ôcham la nek…ô…óey na, aa guzlam da wuzlah ata, a l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw ke…óe ta key meb…ôrey t…ô…óe Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay ta Ňčga nd…ôkwey aŇčga aa f…ôrs…ône na, daa ba.¬Ľ
26.32: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Ag…ôripa a l…ôvar a Festus: ¬ęYa gwakwa ya mb…ôkdakwa ndaw ke…óe, ama a key saba maja aŇčga taa c…ôf…óey c…ôve…ó sem Ňčga daw fa *Sezere, bay mahura da *Rawm.¬Ľ

27.1: Masa ta slam yawa cay amba ya diyam aa hwayak Ňčga Itali ta kwambiwal na, ta‚Äô, a v…ôldamata ata Pawl, ta daŇčgay hay siya a har ndaw mez…ôley Juliyus, mahura Ňčga sewje hay. AŇčga mahura da wuzlah sewje hay Ňčga Rawm, masa ata ma z…ôlmata ¬ęSewje hay Ňčga Bay Agustus.¬Ľ
27.2: Ta‚Äô, ya nd…ôkwam aa kwambiwal ma sawa daa berney Ňčga Ad…ôramit. Kwambiwal a, a daw Ňčgadaa slam-mepey-salay mekele mekele ta dey b…ôlay Ňčga hwayak Ňčga Azi. Ta‚Äô, ya diyam. Ala bama ta ata ndaw daha mez…ôley Aristarke, ndaw Masad…ôwan daa berney Ňčga Tesalawnik.
27.3: Pep…ôrek e, ya wusam aa berney Ňčga SidaŇčw. Juliyus, a s…ôrfar dey-ceceh a Pawl, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlar c…ôve…ó Ňčga pey salay Ňčga daw aa berney a Ňčga n…ôkt…ôrwa jam aŇčga hay, amba a j…ônmara.
27.4: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya t…ôpam aa kwambiwal saya. Ya gwamara Ňčga diyam d…ôr e ba, maja meme…ó fa kawa a ray ala. Ta‚Äô, ya diyam ta cakay hwayak da wuzlah b…ôlay mez…ôley Sip…ôre masa meme…ó fa key ga daa ba.
27.5: Ya t…ôŇčgam a dey b…ôlay gweegwe ta hwayak Ňčga Silisi leŇč hwayak Ňčga Pamfili, ta‚Äô, ya wusam a Mira daa hwayak Ňčga Lisi.
27.6: Fete…óe, mahura Ňčga sewje hay heyey a s…ôpey kwambiwal mekele. A h…ôtndar kwambiwal ma sawa daa berney Ňčga Alekzand…ôri ma daw Ňčgadaa hwayak Ňčga Itali. Ta‚Äô, a t…ôpdandar aa kwambiwal a.
27.7: ∆äar ga, ala fa diyam nek…ô…óey, nek…ô…óey. Ya wusam gweegwe ta berney Ňčga K…ônit na, banay daha ga Ňčga daw maja meme…ó faa b…ôrey. Meme…ó e a t…ôkndar Ňčga daw fa mey, ta‚Äô, ya slapalam ta fa slam da wuzlah b…ôlay mez…ôley Salmawne, Ňčga wusey a dey laŇčgar Ňčga hwayak da wuzlah b…ôlay mez…ôley K…ôret, dey masa meme…ó daa ba.
27.8: Ya diyam ta banay taa kwakway Ňčga hwayak a, ya wusam aa slam da K…ôret mez…ôley Slam-mepey-salay Maaya, masa gweegwe ta berney Ňčga Laze.
27.9: Daa madaw ala ha na, ya ta kam …óar ga sem. Nd…ôhay ta kamara *daliyam Ňčga mb…ôkey meb…ôrey sem. Anda mel…ôvey, piya gweegwe a wuswa, madaw ta kwambiwal a key saba maja b…ôrgadaŇč fa key. Maja Ňčgene, Pawl a l…ôvey:
27.10: ¬ęWaa jam a…óaw hay, ya s…ôra madaw al…ôkwa ke…óe a kandakwar banay ga la. Kwambiwal ta cek hay da hwa…ó a, a da nd…ôkwam asi yam, a daa z…ô…óam. Ma daa z…ô…óam na, cek hay a daada ba, ama kwa al…ôkwa ray al…ôkwa may.¬Ľ
27.11: Mahura Ňčga sewje hay heyey a c…ônda mey Ňčga Pawl ba, ama a c…ôney na, mey Ňčga ndaw ma hwada kwambiwal ta bay Ňčga kwambiwal a gway.
27.12: Slam-mepey-salay fete…óe na, aŇčga maaya Ňčga lecey kwambiwal a hwa…ó a ta piya ba. Daa Ňčgene har-g…ôdaŇč Ňčga nd…ôhay a, a wu…óam Ňčga diyam. Da a gwamara ma wusam na, a wu…óam a diyam aa slam-mepey-salay daa berney Ňčga Fenikis, amba a njam fete…óe ta piya ha. Berney Ňčga Fenikis na, aa daa hwayak Ňčga K…ôret da wuzlah b…ôlay heyey. Slam-mepey-salay da Fenikis ha na, aa ta har-gula Ňčga ndaw ma n…ôkey dey Ňčgada mey-aŇčgwa leŇč ta har-z…ômay Ňčga ndaw ma n…ôkey dey Ňčgada wurza. B…ôrgadaŇč a key da ray b…ôlay
27.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, meme…ó ta dey Ňčga M…ôzam a kawa nek…ô…óey. A wulkam a h…ôtam c…ôve…ó la Ňčga wusey a Fenikis anda ata ma wu…óam. Da ray Ňčgene, a …óa…óam…ôrwa …ď…ôrey mandandal a ma lacada kwambiwal, a pamara a hwa…ó a. Ta‚Äô, a diyam ta mey kwakway Ňčga hwayak Ňčga K…ôret.
27.14: Ama fa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey b…ôrgadaŇč ta‚Äô, a kawa. B…ôrgadaŇč a na, a z…ôlmara ErakilaŇčw , a sawa taa aŇčgwa Ňčga K…ôret.
27.15: A f…ôna kwambiwal ta g…ôdaŇč. Ya gwamara Ňčga handamara kwambiwal a d…ôr e saba. Mbak! ya mb…ôkdamara, meme…ó e Ňčga handa.
27.16: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya diyam ta d…ô…ďa hwayak mekele mec…ôhe da wuzlah b…ôlay mez…ôley Kwada. Hwayak a, a t…ôka meme…ó nek…ô…óey ma da sawa Ňčgada ray ala. Fete…óe, ya baŇčga…óam…ôrwa kwambiwal mec…ôhe Ňčgadaa kwambiwal mahura maja kwambiwal mec…ôhe a daa z…ô…óey, ama aa ta banay ga maja meme…ó e kalah.
27.17: Masa nd…ôhay ma hwada kwambiwal a ma pamara kwambiwal mec…ôhe heyey la aa kwambiwal mahura na, ta‚Äô, a t…ôk…óam laza fa kwambiwal mahura heyey. Asaya, ta‚Äô, a k…ôzlam cek aa b…ôlay Ňčga t…ôka kwambiwal Ňčga daw a rav-zazay Ňčga hwayak Ňčga Libi maja a zluram da a wusam haa a rav-zazay a na, a da sl…ônam aa mawur…ďay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mbak! a mb…ôkdamara kwambiwal a amba meme…ó a handa aa wuzlah b…ôlay.
27.18: Meme…ó e, fa key, fa key ta g…ôdaŇč c…ôŇčga. Anda ke…óe, pep…ôrek e, a k…ôzlamata cek hay Ňčga filaw masa daa kwambiwal a aa b…ôlay.
27.19: Pep…ôrek e mekele, meme…ó e fa key c…ôŇčga. Cek hay masa maadakw a maadakw a fa kwambiwal a na, nd…ôhay ma hwada a c…ôkwmata, a hazakadamata aa b…ôlay ta har ata.
27.20: ∆äar ga, ya h…ôtmar pas ba, ya h…ôtmatar wurzla hay ba, maja b…ôrgadaŇč a. Fa key ta g…ôdaŇč, ta g…ôdaŇč haa ya wulkam ya l…ôham la na, daa ba.
27.21: Menjey ga, nd…ôhay daa kwambiwal a ta z…ômam cek daa ba. Pawl ta‚Äô, a lecey fa mey ata tabiya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęHaya, jam a…óaw hay, anja da akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw la na, ya ta sl…ôk…óakurwa daa hwayak Ňčga K…ôret daa ba. Da al…ôkwa ma sl…ôk…óakurwa da K…ôret e daa ba na, anja cek al…ôkwa hay ke…óe fa da n…ôsam daa ba, fa daa z…ô…óam daa ba.
27.22: Ama wure ke…óe, ya fa l…ôvkwar, k…ôrzamara mevel, kwa ndaw pal dasi al…ôkwa fa daa z…ô…óey daa ba, si kwambiwal ma daa z…ô…óey gway.
27.23: Dasi tava…ó ke…óe, Gazlavay, ndaw masa ma walaya, masa yah ma ragadar, ta sl…ôrwa maslaŇč aŇčga la da va…ó fa yah.
27.24: A l…ôvya: ‚ÄúPawl, ka da zlurey ba, fara fara si ka wusey, ka lecey fa mey Ňčga Bay *Sezere da *Rawm Ňčga kaka sariya. Gazlavay a l…ôhdata nd…ôhay tabiya daa kwambiwal ke…óe la, aa z…ô…óam daa ba maja maaya aŇčga aa da ray akah.‚ÄĚ
27.25: Da ray Ňčgene, jam a…óaw hay, k…ôrzamara mevel, ka da zluram ba, maja ya s…ôra Gazlavay a ka la fara fara anda aŇčga ma l…ôvya.
27.26: Ama si kwambiwal a lecey a ray hwiyak da wuzlah b…ôlay la …óagay.¬Ľ
27.27: ∆äar kuraw a ray a m…ôfa…ó, meme…ó e fa d…ôkdandar daa b…ôlay Ňčga Mediterene c…ôŇčga. Ta wuzlah-tava…ó, nd…ôhay ma hwada kwambiwal a wulkam na, ala gweegwe ya wusam a ray-…ó…ôgar.
27.28: Ata a padam…ôrwa salay ta …ď…ôrey maj…ôwkaya fa kwambiwal a, amba a wamara yam a. A h…ôtfamar yam a seleleŇč, a key meeter kwakwar maakar a ray a maasala. A diyam fa mey nek…ô…óey, a wamara yam saya, a h…ôtfamar yam a seleleŇč, a key meeter kwakwar cew a ray a daaŇčgafa…ó.
27.29: A zluram maja meme…ó a da handa kwambiwal fa aŇčgwa. Da ray Ňčgene, a padamat…ôrwa salay ta …ď…ôrey hay m…ôfa…ó mandandal a mandandal a ma lacada kwambiwal fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga kwambiwal a. A s…ôkwam slam Ňčga wurey, ama slam a wurfatar gweegwe ba.
27.30: Nd…ôhay ma hwada kwambiwal a, a wu…óam ma bamawa da hwa…ó a amba a l…ôham. Ta‚Äô, a padam…ôrwa salay ta kwambiwal mec…ôhe heyey aa yam. A kam anda a da padamat…ôrwa salay ta …ď…ôrey mandandal a mandandal a ma lacada kwambiwal fa mey Ňčga kwambiwal mahura.
27.31: Ama Pawl a l…ôvtar a sewje hay, ta Ňčgada mahura ata: ¬ęDa nd…ôhay ma hwada kwambiwal a, a njam a hwa…ó a ba na, akwar fa da gwamara Ňčga l…ôhey daa b…ôlay a daa ba.¬Ľ
27.32: Sewje hay heyey ta‚Äô, a …ó…ôslmara laza ma k…ôrza kwambiwal mec…ôhe, a mb…ôkdamara aa yam, a daw.
27.33: Gweegwe slam a wurey na, ta‚Äô, Pawl a z…ôlta nd…ôhay tabiya Ňčga z…ômey …óaf, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęAkwar ta …ď…ôsmara banay la …óar kuraw a ray a m…ôfa…ó, akwar ta z…ômam kwa meeme daa ba.
27.34: Maaya na, ya z…ômkwa …óaf Ňčga h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč Ňčga l…ôhey. Kwa eŇčgwec pal fa ray Ňčga ndaw da wuzlah akwar fa daa z…ô…óey daa ba.¬Ľ
27.35: Masa aŇčga ma l…ôvey la anda ke…óe na, leŇč! a ley peŇč, a kar suse a Gazlavay fa mey ata tabiya, ta‚Äô, a h…ô…ďey, a z…ômey.
27.36: Da ray Ňčgene, ata tabiya a k…ôrzamara mevel. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a z…ômam peŇč e may.
27.37: Ala daa kwambiwal a tabiya a key temere cew ta kwakwar maasala a ray a maakwaw.
27.38: Masa ata ma r…ôham la na, ta‚Äô, a k…ôzlamara cek anda daw daa kwambiwal a aa yam, maja a wu…óam kwambiwal a, a key dadakw ba. VaŇčgwala Ňčga yam a h…ô…ďa kwambiwal
27.39: Fa d…ô…ďa ha slam ma wurey la na, nd…ôhay ma hwada kwambiwal a h…ôtmar hwiyak, ama a s…ôrmara slam aha ba. Daa slam aha, a h…ôtmar slam masa maaya Ňčga lecey kwambiwal da ray-…ó…ôgar, mawur…ďay da hwa…ó a. Da a gwamara na, anja a wu…óam Ňčga handamara kwambiwal fete…óe, a wu…óam a mb…ôkdamara fete…óe.
27.40: Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a …ó…ôslmara laza Ňčga …ď…ôrey m…ôfa…ó mandandal a mandandal a heyey, a mb…ôkdamata aa yam. Ta‚Äô, a p…ôskamata laza hay masa ma j…ôwa hwadam ma hwada kwambiwal. Ta‚Äô, a baŇčga…óamara zana fa mey Ňčga kwambiwal amba meme…ó a handa a rav-zazay.
27.41: Ama kwambiwal kaa a daw, a h…ôtfey slam, yam da hwa…ó a ga daa ba, deŇč! a lecey aa mawur…ďay daa yam a, mey a, caca‚Äô! aa mawur…ďay a, kwa a wusey ba s…ôlak. VaŇčgwala Ňčga yam a sawa a h…ô…ďa hwadam fa d…ô…ďa.
27.42: Maja Ňčgene, sewje hay a wu…óam a k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay daŇčgay hay vagay maja a zluram nd…ôhay a, a daa ndavam, a da l…ôham.
27.43: Ama mahura Ňčga sewje hay a wu…óey ma l…ôhda Pawl, ta‚Äô, a t…ôkta siya hay Ňčga k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay daŇčgay hay a. A l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara mendendevey Ňčga j…ôvam teese…ó aa yam a, amba a wusam kasl a rav-zazay.
27.44: Siya hay, a l…ôhmawa na, a k…ôrzam har ta hwadam hay Ňčga kwambiwal mah…ô…ďkaya. Anda ke…óe, ala tabiya ma l…ôhmawa sem a palah, kwa cek ma kandar daa ba s…ôlak.

28.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa ala ma l…ôham la aa hwayak da wuzlah b…ôlay a na, ya c…ôndamara a l…ôvam hwayak a mez…ôley Malta.
28.2: Nd…ôhay fete…óe ta t…ô…ďmandar la maaya maaya ta mees…ômey. Var fa pey, meme…ó daha. Maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a, a g…ô…ómandar awaw mahura, a Ňčg…ôlmandar a cakay awaw a.
28.3: Pawl ta‚Äô, a h…ôlwa sasam, a pa fa awaw a, anja kucesl daa sasam a daha. Awaw a car a zezekw e, a bawa, a za Pawl fa har, aa sl…ôpet e fa har a.
28.4: Nd…ôhay daa hwayak a, a h…ôtmar zezekw kaa masl…ôptakaya fa har aŇčga, a l…ôvam da wuzlah ata: ¬ęFara fara ndaw ke…óe, ara ndaw ma k…ô…óa ray Ňčga ndaw. Kwa ta l…ôhwa sem daa b…ôlay na, kuley al…ôkwa masa ma mb…ô…ótar ray a nd…ôhay na, ta hufar sem a ray, ta v…ôlar c…ôve…ó Ňčga njey ta dey daa ba.¬Ľ
28.5: Ama Pawl, ta‚Äô, a kuca har, a k…ôzla zezekw e aa awaw. Kwa ta c…ônda mecey Ňčga zezekw e daa ba s…ôlak.
28.6: Nd…ôhay fa n…ôkmara, a wulkam, a l…ôvam: ¬ęHar aŇčga a da h…ôsley, da daa ba, aŇčga ray aŇčga a da m…ôcey wure Ňčgene.¬Ľ Ama a njam ga, a n…ôkmara kwa cek ta kar a Pawl daa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, a h…ôtam mewulkey mekele saya, aa guzlam da ray a, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAŇčga na, ara kuley ma t…ôrey Ňčga ndaw.¬Ľ
28.7: Bay Ňčga hwayak a, mez…ôley Pub…ôliyus. Way aŇčga ta ley aŇčga hay aa gweegwe ta slam masa ala ma pam salay. AŇčga ta t…ô…ďndar la a way aŇčga ta mees…ômey. Ya njam da way aŇčga ha …óar maakar.
28.8: PapaŇč Ňčga Pub…ôliyus a, aa manakaya, aa gwa ba, awaw fa vaw, fa kuhwey zay mambaz mambaz. Pawl ta‚Äô, a daw fa v…ô…óa, a d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay, a par har a ray, ta‚Äô, a mb…ôlda.
28.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa-macay hay mekele mekele tabiya daa hwayak a, a samawa fa Pawl, ta‚Äô, Pawl a mb…ôldata.
28.10: -11 Nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga Malta ha, a v…ôlmandar cek hay mekele mekele Ňčga h…ôslmandar ray. Ya kam kiya maakar daa hwayak a. Masa ala fa da mb…ôzam aa kwambiwal amba ya diyam na, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmandar cek hay tabiya Ňčga j…ônndar daa madaw ala Ňčgada *Rawm saya. Pawl a wusey a Rawm Ya diyam ta kwambiwal ma sawa daa berney Ňčga Alekzand…ôri. Kwambiwal a ta njey la ta piya daa hwayak Ňčga Malta ha. A z…ôlmara kwambiwal a ¬ęKuley Mawusa hay .¬Ľ
28.12: Ya t…ôŇčgam ta kwambiwal a, ya wusam aa berney Ňčga Sirakuz, ya njam fete…óe …óar maakar.
28.13: Ta‚Äô, ya sl…ôk…óam da Sirakuz a ta kwambiwal a, ya diyam ta mey-b…ôlay, ya wusam aa berney Ňčga Reziyaw. Pep…ôrek e, meme…ó ta dey Ňčga M…ôzam a zlar Ňčga kawa, ta‚Äô, ya diyam. Fa d…ô…ďa ha …óar cew ya wusam aa berney Ňčga Puzawl, ya pam salay.
28.14: Daa berney a, ya h…ôtfam m…ôlmaŇč hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga Yesu. A z…ôlmandar amba ya njam ta ata luma pal. Ara anda ke…óe, ala ma diyam Ňčgada *Rawm.
28.15: Yaw, m…ôlmaŇč hay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga Yesu daa berney Ňčga Rawm a c…ôndamara mey da ray ala. Masa ata ma c…ôndamara na, ta‚Äô, a samawa a cadamandar ray daa c…ôve…ó ma daw a Rawm a. Siya hay a samawa a cadamandar ray daa luma Ňčga Apiyus. Mekele hay a samawa a cadamandar ray da slala mez…ôley Way-Maakar-Mez…ômey-Cek. Masa Pawl ma h…ôtatar na, a kar suse a Gazlavay, mevel aŇčga a d…ôkey, a h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč.
28.16: Masa ala ma wusam a Rawm la na, sewje mahura fete…óe a v…ôlar c…ôve…ó a Pawl Ňčga njey daa way daha taava aŇčga, ama sewje pal fa j…ô…óa daa way a. Pawl fa mey Ňčga J…ôwif hay da Rawm
28.17: Fa d…ô…ďa ha …óar maakar, Pawl a z…ôlt…ôrwa mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay da *Rawm a way aŇčga. A kusta, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęM…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya s…ôra ya ta key cek maaya ba Ňčgada nd…ôhay al…ôkwa hay na, daa ba, kwa ya ta n…ôsa kwakwas Ňčga papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay na, daa ba may, ama ta k…ôrzamiwa la da *Jeruzelem, a v…ôldamaya a har Rawma hay.
28.18: Ata ta cac…ôf…óamaya la da ray cek masa yah ma ka. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta wu…óam la Ňčga mb…ôkdamaya maja ta h…ôtam meb…ôrey masa t…ô…óe Ňčga k…ô…óya vagay na, daa ba.
28.19: Ama J…ôwif hay ta t…ô…ďmara Ňčga mb…ôkdamaya daa ba, da ray Ňčgene, dabaray a…óaw mekele daa ba, si ya l…ôvtar Ňčga handam…ôrwa sariya a…óaw fa bay mahura Ňčga Rawm. Ama ya ta sawa Ňčga wudey s…ôkway a…óaw hay na, daa ba.
28.20: Ehe, yah ma z…ôlkurwa na, maja ke…óe, amba ya h…ôtkwar, yaa guzlkwar. A j…ôwmaya ta calalaw ke…óe na, maja yah ma pa leŇčgesl a…óaw a ray ndaw masa al…ôkwa J…ôwif hay ma s…ôkwakwa.¬Ľ
28.21: J…ôwif hay a mb…ô…ódamara, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęAla ta h…ôtam leeter fa J…ôwif hay masa daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude da ray akah daa ba. Asaya, kwa ndaw pal da wuzlah m…ôlma ala hay ma samawa daa hwayak a ta handandar mey maaya ba da ray akah daa ba may.
28.22: Ama ya wu…óam ya c…ôndamara mey da hwa…ó akah, maja ya s…ôrmara nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay mekele mekele fa r…ôsmata nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey anda akah.¬Ľ
28.23: Ta‚Äô, mahura hay Ňčga J…ôwif hay a, a pam …óar masa ata ma da kusam ta Pawl saya. Pawl a wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay da Rawm Masa …óar a ma wuswa la na, nd…ôhay ga a kusam a way Pawl. D…ôga Ňčgaa p…ôrek haa pas Ňčgaa kwa…ó Pawl fa wuztar mey Ňčga Gazlavay. A kadatara Bay Gazlavay a wey da ray nd…ôhay na, kwara. A jeŇčgey …óerewel da ray kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta …óerewel hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, amba nd…ôhay a, a mb…ô…ódamara leŇčgesl ata hay, a t…ô…ďmara Yesu na, ara *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay.
28.24: Siya hay a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Pawl, ama siya hay a g…ômam Ňčga t…ô…ďmara ba.
28.25: Daa Ňčgene, a kam yawa da wuzlah ata maja mewulkey ata wal wal. Masa ata fa da diyam na, Pawl ta‚Äô, aa guzltar mey pal saya, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęMey masa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley a papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay ta mey *Izay, *ndaw ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle heyey na, ara mey fara fara.
28.26: Mes…ôfney a, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúDaw, l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay a: Akwar fa j…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya, ama ka c…ôndamara ba. Akwar fa n…ôkam dey maaya maaya, ama ka h…ôtmar dey ba.
28.27: Maja nd…ôhay a, a g…ômam Ňčga c…ônam mey ba, a d…ôzlmata sl…ômay ata hay, a …ó…ôpmata dey ata hay. A kamara k…ône amba a h…ôtmar dey ba, a j…ôkam sl…ômay ba, a t…ô…ďmara mey a, aa mevel ata ba. Da ray Ňčgene, fa da mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata amba ya mb…ôldata na, daa ba.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
28.28: Pawl a l…ôvtar saya: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, s…ôrmara, Gazlavay a sl…ôrd…ôrwa mey da ray mel…ôhey daa meb…ôrey na, a nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay. Ata na, a c…ôndamara mey a la!¬Ľ [
28.29: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga mey a ke…óe, J…ôwif hay a diyam ta mekey yawa ta g…ôdaŇč da wuzlah ata.]
28.30: Yaw, mevey cew Pawl manjakaya daa way masa aŇčga fa p…ôley dala maja. AŇčga fa t…ô…ďta nd…ôhay tabiya ma samawa Ňčga n…ôkmara.
28.31: AŇčga fa wuzey mey da ray mewey Ňčga Gazlavay da ray nd…ôhay, aa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay da ray Bay Mahura Yesu *K…ôriste ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba. Kwa ndaw ma t…ôka daa ba.

1.1: Ara yah Pawl ma wuzlalakwara leeter ke…óe. Yah ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga *Yesu *K…ôriste. Ara *Gazlavay ma walaya Ňčga key *ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu, a paya Ňčga wuzey mey aŇčga maaya mawiya.
1.2: *Mey-maaya-mawiya ha na, Gazlavay a l…ôvey d…ôga zleezle a da sl…ôrd…ôrwa ta fa nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga. Mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga ha na, mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay.
1.3: -4 Mey-maaya-mawiya ha na, ara mey da ray Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay. A t…ôrey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč, a yawa daa s…ôkway Ňčga Bay *Davit. Ama Gazlavay ta wuzd…ôrwa la fara fara, ara B…ôzey aŇčga masa ta g…ôdaŇč daa masa aŇčga ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Mes…ôfney aŇčga.
1.5: Gazlavay ta wuzdiwa maaya aŇčga la ta fa Yesu K…ôriste he. A paya Ňčga ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu amba ya wuzdatara Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway hay wura wura c…ôpa. Ya wuzdatara na, amba nd…ôhay a, a t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga, a namar ray. Anda ke…óe, ya fa h…ôslar ray a K…ôriste.
1.6: Akwar Rawma hay may, akwar da wuzlah nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, maja Yesu K…ôriste ta z…ôlkwar la Ňčga t…ôrey nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
1.7: Ya fa cakwar har, akwar nd…ôhay c…ôpa da *Rawm, akwar masa Gazlavay ma wu…ókwar kalah. Gazlavay ta z…ôlkwar la, ta t…ôrdakwar la Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. Anja Papa al…ôkwa, Bay Gazlavay, ta Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste Ňčga p…ôsmakwar mey, asaya, Ňčga njadamakwar daa zazay. Pawl a wu…óey Ňčga daw Ňčga n…ôkt…ôrwa Rawma hay
1.8: Yaw, teese…ó na, ya fa kar suse a Papay Bay Gazlavay ta fa Yesu *K…ôriste maja akwar tabiya. Ya fa kar suse he na, maja nd…ôhay da b…ôla tabiya fa z…ôldamakwar sl…ômay maja akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste.
1.9: Gazlavay a s…ôra, daa masa ya fa d…ôrey daŇčgay na, ya fa s…ôrfadakwar. Ya fa kar sl…ôra ta mevel pal daa masa ya fa wuzda *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray B…ôzey aŇčga.
1.10: Ya faa c…ôf…óa mandaw mandaw daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay a…óaw amba a v…ôlya c…ôve…ó Ňčga daw fa akwar anda aa ma wu…óey.
1.11: Ahaw, ya wu…óey fara fara Ňčga h…ôtkwar fa dey amba ya v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč ma sawa ta fa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, ka da h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč ma f…ôna ma f…ôna daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu.
1.12: Ya wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey na, ya da daw fa akwar a na, amba ya j…ônkwa vaw Ňčga v…ôley g…ôdaŇč da wuzlah al…ôkwa. Anda mel…ôvey, ya da h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč maja akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu. Akwar may, ka da h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč maja yah ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu.
1.13: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, maaya na, ka s…ôrmara ya ta wulkey la dey ga Ňčga daw fa akwar, ama ya ta h…ôtey har Ňčga daw daa ba araŇč. Ya wu…óey Ňčga daw fa akwar a na, Ňčga kawa sl…ôra Ňčga j…ônkwar Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu anda yah ma j…ônt…ôrwa nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay mekele mekele may.
1.14: Si ya wuzda Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay tabiya, kwa Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa berney hay Ňčga G…ôrek hay, kwa Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa slam hay mekele, asaya, kwa Ňčgada nd…ôhay ta leŇčgesl ma s…ôra cek, kwa Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma s…ôra cek ba.
1.15: Ara maja Ňčgene, yah ma wu…óey Ňčga daw fa akwar Rawma hay may Ňčga wuzdakwara Mey-maaya-mawiya. Mey-maaya-mawiya aa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga l…ôhey nd…ôhay
1.16: Ya fa da zlurey Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya na, daa ba, maja Mey-maaya-mawiya aa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay ma pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara daa meb…ôrey. Gazlavay a l…ôhey teese…ó na, nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay, fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba.
1.17: Mey-maaya-mawiya na, fa wuzd…ôrwa Gazlavay a n…ôkta nd…ôhay, ata maaya fa mey aŇčga na, kwara. A da n…ôkta nd…ôhay, ata maaya na, ta fa ata ma pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara gway, ba na, cek mekele daa ba. Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęNdaw masa maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ara ndaw ma pa Gazlavay a Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Anda ke…óe, a h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba la.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay tabiya ata ta meb…ôrey na, maja me?
1.18: Gazlavay da va…ó fa cey mevel da ray meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč tabiya. Ata fa kam cek hay malamba Ňčgada nd…ôhay, a namar ray a Gazlavay ba s…ôlak. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a da katar sariya maja ata fa t…ôkmata nd…ôhay siya Ňčga s…ôrey mey masa fara fara da ray Gazlavay.
1.19: A da s…ôrdata banay maja c…ôve…ó mawuzdakaya maaya maaya cay Ňčgada kwa waawa amba a s…ôrey cek da ray Gazlavay. Ara Gazlavay a, ray aŇčga, ma wuzdatara c…ôve…ó e fa mey ata. Ama ata ta s…ôpmara c…ôve…ó e daa ba.
1.20: Fara fara, ndaw a gwa Ňčga h…ôtar Gazlavay ta dey ba, ama d…ôga aŇčga ma l…ôma b…ôla haa wure ke…óe, nd…ôhay a gwamara Ňčga s…ôrmara ta fa cek hay masa aŇčga ma kat…ôrwa. Cek hay a na, fa wuzd…ôrwa Gazlavay aa ta g…ôdaŇč mend…ôvey ba Ňčga s…ôrmataw, asaya, aŇčga Gazlavay Mawaca-waca. Anda ke…óe, fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, mey ata Ňčga wurey amba Gazlavay a s…ôrfatar dey-ceceh fa meb…ôrey ata na, daa saba.
1.21: Nd…ôhay a fa s…ôrmara Gazlavay na, daha. Ama a namar ray ba, a kamar suse ba anda ara Gazlavay ata ba. A wulkam na, a ray cek hay Ňčga tede. Ata na, anda ata daa l…ôvaŇč maja cek maaya ta maaya ba na, a s…ôrmara ba.
1.22: A pamara ray ata Ňčga nd…ôhay ta leŇčgesl ma s…ôra cek, anja ara nd…ôhay manjar-leŇčgesl.
1.23: Gazlavay masa ta g…ôdaŇč, ndaw masa ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw na, ata fa namar ray daa ba. Sas…ôkar a nam ray na, Ňčgada cek mav…ô…ókaya ta …ď…ôrey anda ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč masa ma da m…ôcey jak. Asaya, a nam ray na, Ňčgada cek hay masa ata ma v…ô…ómata ta har ata hay aa slam a Ňčga …óiyaŇč hay, aa slam a Ňčga cek hay masa salay m…ôfa…ó leŇč aa slam a Ňčga zezekw hay.
1.24: Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ma mb…ôkdata sem amba a kam cek hay ma ka hezey masa ata ma wu…óam. Anda ke…óe, fa n…ôsmara vaw ata ta cek hay ma ka hwaray.
1.25: Yaw, ta mb…ôkdamara mey masa fara fara da ray Gazlavay sem amba a j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey memb…ôrzley. A ragadam na, Ňčgada cek hay masa Gazlavay ma kat…ôrwa jak, a namatar ray. Ama Gazlavay ta ray aŇčga masa ma kat…ôrwa cek hay a na, ta mb…ôkdamara sem jak. AŇčga na, Gazlavay pal masa nd…ôhay ma da h…ôlmamara Ňčga s…ôrmataw. *Amen.
1.26: Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ta mb…ôkdata sem amba a kam cek hay malamba ma ka hwaray anda ata ma wu…óam kalah daa mevel ata. Ňägusay a mb…ôkdamara meney ta zel hay anda maamandaw, a nam ta Ňčgusay c…ôla ata hay. Ňägene ara cek malamba, ara cek Ňčga key k…ône ba.
1.27: Zel hay may k…ône, a mb…ôkdamara meney ta Ňčgusay. A wu…óam na, si Ňčga nam ta zel hay c…ôla ata hay. Zel a ney ta zel c…ôla na, ara cek ma ka hwaray kalah. Anda ke…óe, fa handamawa banay Ňčgada ray ata, t…ô…óe ta sl…ôra ata maaya ba ha Ňčgene.
1.28: Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene ta wu…óam Ňčga s…ôrmara Gazlavay daa ba. Ara maja Ňčgene Gazlavay ma mb…ôkdata sem amba a wulkam saw, a kam cek ta c…ôve…ó e ba.
1.29: Cek hay maaya ba daa mevel ata daha. Ata fa kam cek masa ta c…ôve…ó e daa ba, fa s…ôrdamata banay ta nd…ôhay, fa kam dey fa cek Ňčga nd…ôhay, fa kam maagway, fa kam s…ôleŇč, fa k…ô…óam nd…ôhay vagay, fa kam baazlam da wuzlah ata, fa kam wewer fa cek Ňčga nd…ôhay, fa f…ôcam nd…ôhay. Asaya, ata fa slam mey a ray nd…ôhay,
1.30: fa kam mba…óa fa nd…ôhay, a wu…ómara Gazlavay ba, fa c…ô…óam vaw saw, fa zlapam, faa h…ômdamara ray ata. Mandaw mandaw ata fa s…ôpam wewer hay mekele mekele Ňčga key cek hay maaya ba a nd…ôhay. A namatar ray Ňčgada papa ata hay ta mama ata hay ba.
1.31: Ata manjar leŇčgesl, aa guzlam ta neneh cew cew, a wu…óam vaw p…ôreh, a s…ôram dey-ceceh fa ndaw ba.
1.32: Ama, ata fa s…ôrmara, nd…ôhay ma kam cek hay maaya ba anda Ňčgene na, Gazlavay a katar sariya la. Nd…ôhay anda Ňčgene hay na, ata t…ô…óe Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay maja meb…ôrey ata. Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, fa kam cek hay malamba ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, asaya, aa h…ômdamata nd…ôhay mekele ma kam cek hay malamba anda ata.

2.1: Jam a…óaw hay, da akwar fa mb…ô…ómatar ray a nd…ôhay na, mey akwar Ňčga wurey amba Gazlavay a s…ôrfakwar dey-ceceh fa meb…ôrey akwar na, daa ba, maja akwar ta meb…ôrey anda ata may. Da ka mb…ô…ómatar ray a nd…ôhay na, a key Ňčgene, ka mb…ô…óam ray Ňčgada akwar ray akwar, maja akwar fa kam cek maaya ba letek anda ata.
2.2: Ya s…ôrkwa Gazlavay a key sariya la, a da s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay ma kam cek hay malamba. Sariya Ňčga Gazlavay a na, ara ta c…ôve…ó e fara fara.
2.3: Akwar nd…ôhay ma kam cek hay malamba, ka mb…ô…ómatar ray Ňčgada nd…ôhay mekele ma kam cek malamba anda akwar na, ka wulkam Gazlavay a kakwar sariya Ňčgaa z…ô…ódakwar daa ba daw?
2.4: Gazlavay na, ara ndaw maaya, a s…ôrda banay ta ndaw fiyaw fiyaw maja meb…ôrey aŇčga ba. AŇčga fa …ď…ôsa meb…ôrey a, kaa ka r…ôsmara Gazlavay a jak na, kwara? AŇčga ma kakwar maaya Ňčgene na, amba ka mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, ba diya?
2.5: Akwar, nd…ôhay masa ray maŇčg…ôr…óakaya Ňčgene, ka wu…óam amba ka mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar ba. Anda ke…óe, akwar fa c…ôha…óamawa sariya Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčgada ray akwar ma f…ôna ma f…ôna. Yaw, ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da cey mevel a ray nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey fara fara na, a da katar sariya t…ô…óe ta meb…ôrey ata.
2.6: A da p…ôlra mawur…ďay a ndaw a, a ndaw a, t…ô…óe fa sl…ôra maaya ta maaya ba masa aŇčga ma ka.
2.7: Nd…ôhay masa ma s…ôpam Ňčga key maaya mandaw mandaw na, a wu…óam Gazlavay a h…ôsltar ray, a njadata aa slam aŇčga mewe…óey, a wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba. Gazlavay a da v…ôlda heter mend…ôvey ba ha na, Ňčgada ata.
2.8: Ama nd…ôhay masa ma kam h…ôma a ray Gazlavay, ma r…ôsmara mey masa fara fara, ma s…ôpam Ňčga key cek hay malamba mandaw mandaw na, Gazlavay a cey mevel la ga a ray ata, a s…ôrdata banay la.
2.9: Ahaw, nd…ôhay masa ma kam cek hay malamba na, a s…ôram banay la ga, a t…ôwam la. Ma da s…ôrey banay teese…ó na, nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay, fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway hay siya tabiya may.
2.10: Ama nd…ôhay ma kam cek hay maaya na, Gazlavay a da h…ôsltar ray, a njadata daa zazay aa slam aŇčga mewe…óey. A da ka k…ône Ňčgada nd…ôhay aŇčga hay tabiya, teese…ó na, Ňčgada J…ôwif hay, fa d…ô…ďa ha, Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway hay siya tabiya may,
2.11: maja Gazlavay na, a weley nd…ôhay ta weley ba.
2.12: Gazlavay ta wuzdara kwakwas aŇčga la a *Mawiz. Da nd…ôhay masa ma s…ôrmara kwakwas a ba, a kam meb…ôrey na, nd…ôhay a, aa z…ô…óam la tabiya, ama a daa z…ô…óam na, maja kwakwas a ba. J…ôwif hay na, a s…ôrmara kwakwas a. Ata may, da a zl…ô…ďmara kwakwas a na, Gazlavay a katar sariya la anda kwakwas a ma l…ôvey.
2.13: Gazlavay a n…ôkta nd…ôhay, ata maaya fa mey aŇčga na, maja ata ma c…ôndamara kwakwas a ta sl…ômay daada ba, ama maja ata ma kamara cek anda kwakwas a ma l…ôvey.
2.14: Yaw, nd…ôhay mekele masa J…ôwif hay ba, ma s…ôrmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ba na, ta pas laŇčgar ata ray ata fa kam cek hay anda kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a ma l…ôvey c…ôŇčga. Anda ke…óe, kwa a s…ôrmara kwakwas a ba na, ata fa s…ôrmara Ňčga key cek hay ta c…ôve…ó e c…ôŇčga.
2.15: Menjey ata na, fa wuzda Gazlavay ta wuzdatara kwakwas a sem, aa daa mevel ata. Asaya, ta pas mekele, mewulkey ata fa wuzdatara cek masa ata ma kamara maaya ta maaya ba.
2.16: Fara fara, pas pal Gazlavay a katar sariya la a nd…ôhay ta fa Yesu *K…ôriste. Ta pas Ňčgene, Gazlavay a da wuzd…ôrwa mewulkey masa ma…ďadakaya daa mevel Ňčga ndaw a, Ňčga ndaw a. *Mey-maaya-mawiya masa yah ma wuzda na, fa l…ôvey k…ône. J…ôwif hay a s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ba na, maja me?
2.17: Kaa akwar *J…ôwif hay na, kwara? Ka l…ôvam akwar na, J…ôwif hay, asaya, ka wulkam ka l…ôvam cek hay tabiya ata ta c…ôve…ó e maja ka s…ôrmara *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, ka zlapam ka l…ôvam akwar nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay.
2.18: Ka s…ôrmara cek masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey, asaya, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz fa wuzdakwara c…ôve…ó Ňčga s…ôrey cek masa maaya ta maaya ba.
2.19: Ka wulkam na, ka gwamara Ňčga wuzmatar c…ôve…ó Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa wulaf hay daw? Asaya, ka wulkam na, akwar nd…ôhay ma wa…óamatar dey a nd…ôhay masa daa l…ôvaŇč daw?
2.20: Nd…ôhay ma s…ôra cek ba na, ka wulkam ka gwamara Ňčga k…ôtmata la daw? Asaya, ka wulkam na, ka gwamara Ňčgaa s…ôrkadamata b…ôza hay daw? Ka wulkam anda ke…óe maja ka l…ôvam kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta wuzdakwara cek hay sem c…ôpa ta fa mey masa fara fara.
2.21: Ehe, j…ôkam sl…ômay, akwar nd…ôhay masa maa s…ôrkadamata nd…ôhay siya, kaa s…ôrkam ray akwar ba na, maja me? Akwar nd…ôhay ma k…ôtmata nd…ôhay siya Ňčga leley ba, kaa ka lalam na, kwara?
2.22: Asaya, akwar fa l…ôvmatar a nd…ôhay ka da lam vaw saw ba, kaa ka lam vaw saw saya na, kwara? Ka l…ôvam saya ka tam kuley ba, kaa ka lalamata cek hay da ver-kuley hay saya na, kwara?
2.23: Akwar fa zlapam kalah, ka l…ôvam ka s…ôrmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, ama akwar fa zl…ô…ďmara kwakwas a saya na, kwara? Anda ke…óe, a key ka pamar hwaray a Gazlavay.
2.24: Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey: ¬ęNd…ôhay siya faa guzlam mey maaya ba da ray Gazlavay maja akwar J…ôwif hay.¬Ľ
2.25: Akwar J…ôwif hay, ka l…ôvam Gazlavay a s…ôrkwar ta fa *mesley mandawal. Da akwar fa s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta c…ôve…ó e na, mesley mandawal a, a j…ônkwar la. Ama da akwar fa s…ôpmara kwakwas a ta c…ôve…ó e daa ba na, mesley mandawal a ara cek Ňčga tede Ňčgada akwar, fa da j…ônkwar daa ba.
2.26: Anda ke…óe, da ndaw mandawal manjar Ňčga sley, a s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta c…ôve…ó e na, Gazlavay a n…ôka ndaw a anda ndaw maslakaya mandawal ba daw?
2.27: Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway hay mekele mandawal manjar Ňčga sley masa ma s…ôpmara kwakwas ta c…ôve…ó e, a mb…ô…ómakwar ray la. A da mb…ô…ómakwar ray na, maja akwar J…ôwif hay, akwar ta kwakwas akwar mawuzlalakaya, asaya, akwar fa slam mandawal, ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, akwar fa zl…ô…ďmara kwakwas a c…ôŇčga.
2.28: Ndaw a da s…ôrey aŇčga ndaw J…ôwif fara fara na, ta fa me? A da s…ôrey aŇčga ndaw J…ôwif fara fara na, ta fa cek masa ndaw ma gwa Ňčga h…ôtar ta dey fa vaw aŇčga daada ba, anda mel…ôvey, ta fa mesley mandawal daada ba.
2.29: Ama ndaw J…ôwif fara fara na, ara ndaw masa Gazlavay ma mb…ô…ódara mevel aŇčga sem. Ndaw maslakaya mandawal fara fara na, ara ndaw masa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay fa key sl…ôra daa mevel aŇčga, ba na, ara ndaw masa ma s…ôpey kwakwas mawuzlalakaya daada ba. Ndaw masa J…ôwif fara fara na, ara ndaw masa Gazlavay maa h…ômda, ba na, ara ndaw masa ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč maa h…ômda ba.

3.1: Da anda ke…óe na, *J…ôwif hay a f…ônmata nd…ôhay mekele fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ta me? *Mesley mandawal na, ara cek ma j…ôney ndaw daw?
3.2: Ahaw, J…ôwif hay a f…ônmata nd…ôhay mekele na, ta cek hay ga. Teese…ó na, Gazlavay a v…ôldatara mey aŇčga na, Ňčgada J…ôwif hay a.
3.3: Fara fara, nd…ôhay ga da wuzlah ata fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba. Kaa Gazlavay na, a mb…ô…óda mewulkey aŇčga, a ka cek anda aa ma l…ôvey saba maja ata daw?
3.4: Kay, fa da mb…ô…óda daa ba. Kwa nd…ôhay tabiya fa mb…ôrzlam na, Gazlavay a da ka cek anda aŇčga ma l…ôvey c…ôŇčga. Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey: ¬ęKah, Bay Gazlavay, mey akah tabiya ara mey fara fara ta c…ôve…ó e. Da ndaw aa d…ô…ófaka mey na, ka gwa Ňčga wuzda ara meb…ôrey akah ba.¬Ľ
3.5: Da kwa nd…ôhay siya a da l…ôvam meb…ôrey masa al…ôkwa ma kakwa fa wuzd…ôrwa maaya Ňčga Gazlavay na, ya da l…ôvkwa kwara? Yaa guzley kaa na, anda nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč maa guzlam may. Kaa da Gazlavay a s…ôrdandakwar banay maja meb…ôrey al…ôkwa na, ya gwakwa Ňčga l…ôvey Gazlavay a na, fa key cek ta c…ôve…ó e daa saba daw?
3.6: Kay, k…ône ba! Gazlavay na, ara ndaw ma key cek ta c…ôve…ó e. Da Gazlavay fa key cek ta c…ôve…ó e daa ba na, kaa a da katar sariya a nd…ôhay ta c…ôve…ó e na, kwara?
3.7: Da kwa ndaw a l…ôvey, mekey cek ta c…ôve…ó e ba na, fa wuzdatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay Gazlavay ara ndaw maa guzley mey fara fara, Ňčga wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč aŇčga. Da k…ône na, Gazlavay a daa z…ô…ódata nd…ôhay maja meb…ôrey ata na, fa me d…ô…ďa me?
3.8: Nd…ôhay siya fa l…ôvam: ¬ęKakwa cek hay maaya ba amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara Gazlavay na, ara ndaw maaya kalah.¬Ľ Ahaw, a l…ôvam anda ke…óe ba, kwara? Kwa nd…ôhay siya na, faa guzlam maaya ba da ray a…óaw, a l…ôvam ya faa guzley anda ke…óe may. Sariya a t…ô…ódata nd…ôhay a la, t…ô…óe fa mewulkey ata maaya ba ha Ňčgene. Ndaw ma key cek anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey na, daha daw?
3.9: Kaa wure ke…óe na, kwara? Al…ôkwa *J…ôwif hay na, ya f…ônmatakwa nd…ôhay siya hay daw? Kay, ya f…ônmatakwa ba s…ôlak! Ya ta wuzdakwara cay, nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ta nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba c…ôpa na, meb…ôrey fa f…ôntar ray.
3.10: Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey: ¬ęKwa ndaw masa maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, daa ba, kwa ndaw pal daa ba s…ôlak.
3.11: Kwa ndaw masa ta leŇčgesl ma s…ôra cek na, daa ba, kwa ndaw pal ma wu…óey Ňčga s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay na, daa ba.
3.12: Ata c…ôpa ta mb…ôkdamara c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay sem. Ata c…ôpa daa slam a ta mb…ô…ómar d…ô…ďa sem a Gazlavay. Kwa ndaw ma key cek maaya na, daa ba. Kwa ndaw pal daa ba s…ôlak.
3.13: Mey ma bawa da mey ata na, maaya ba anda c…ôvay mawurkaya ma zey. Neneh ata na, fa t…ôknata nd…ôhay kalah. Nd…ôvez Ňčga mey ata na, a k…ô…óey ndaw vagay anda mewer Ňčga zezekw.
3.14: Mey ma bawa da mey ata na, ara mey mee…ó…ôwek e, ma n…ôsa ndaw.
3.15: Salay ata na, fa h…ôldata Ňčga wusey vaw fiyaw fiyaw Ňčga k…ô…óey nd…ôhay vagay.
3.16: Kwa daa wura daa wura daa mep…ôkey ata na, fa n…ôsam cek hay, fa s…ôrdamata banay ta nd…ôhay.
3.17: Asaya, a s…ôrmara ma handawa zazay a wuzlah nd…ôhay ba.
3.18: Ata na, a zluram ta Gazlavay ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
3.19: Ahaw, al…ôkwa fa s…ôrkwa, cek hay tabiya masa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz maa s…ôrkada na, ara Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldatara kwakwas a. Anda ke…óe, kwa ndaw ma gwa Ňčga wura mey amba a …óiya ray aŇčga na, daa ba, nd…ôhay c…ôpa ta meb…ôrey fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
3.20: Maja Ňčgene, ndaw masa maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maja aŇčga ma s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz tabiya na, daa ba. Kwakwas a, a wuzwa na, meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay gway. Nd…ôhay a da t…ôram maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, kwara?
3.21: Wure ke…óe, Gazlavay ta wuztar c…ôve…ó la a nd…ôhay amba a pata Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga. C…ôve…ó e na, kwa mey Ňčga *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz da hwa…ó a daa ba s…ôlak. Ama kwakwas a, leŇč nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay taa guzlam la da ray c…ôve…ó e d…ôga zleezle, a l…ôvam Gazlavay a wuzwa c…ôve…ó la mawiya.
3.22: Gazlavay ma pata Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga na, maja ata ma pamara Yesu *K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Gazlavay a pey Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga na, nd…ôhay tabiya masa ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu, maja Gazlavay a weley nd…ôhay ta weley ba.
3.23: Nd…ôhay tabiya ta kam meb…ôrey la. Anda ke…óe, ata d…ôreŇč ta maaya Ňčga Gazlavay.
3.24: Ama Gazlavay ta s…ôrfatar dey-ceceh la, a t…ôrdata Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga ta fa Yesu K…ôriste, ndaw masa ma l…ôhdata daa meb…ôrey. A ka k…ône na, ara Ňčga maaya, ba na, ta cek ba.
3.25: Ara Yesu a masa Gazlavay ma v…ôlda Ňčga m…ôcey amba a mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay ta fa mambaz aŇčga. Ara mambaz a ma mb…ô…ówa fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma pamara Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Gazlavay a ka anda ke…óe na, amba a wuzdatara a nd…ôhay, aŇčga na, ndaw ma ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e. Ahaw, daa masa aŇčga ma s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay maja meb…ôrey ata masa zleezle daa ba heyey na, Gazlavay ta ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e la.
3.26: Daa Ňčgene, Gazlavay ta …ď…ôsa meb…ôrey a la. Gazlavay a ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e wure ke…óe may, maja ta fa mem…ôcey Ňčga Yesu na, a gwa Ňčga key sariya ta c…ôve…ó e. Asaya, a gwa Ňčga pata nd…ôhay masa ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga.
3.27: Da anda ke…óe na, al…ôkwa ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga zlepey maja al…ôkwa ma kadakwa sl…ôra maaya ta kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daw? Kay! al…ôkwa ta c…ôve…ó daa ba. Al…ôkwa ta c…ôve…ó daa ba na, maja me? Maja cek mahura fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ara mes…ôpey kwakwas ba, ama ara met…ô…ďey-mey Ňčga Yesu.
3.28: Ahaw, ya s…ôrmara fara fara Gazlavay a n…ôka ndaw aŇčga maaya fa mey aŇčga na, maja ndaw a ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu, ba na, maja aŇčga ma s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz tabiya ba.
3.29: Ka wulkam Gazlavay na, ara Gazlavay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay daada daw? Nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba na, ara Gazlavay ata may, ba diya? Ahaw, fara fara aŇčga na, ara Gazlavay Ňčga nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba may,
3.30: maja Gazlavay na, aŇčga pal. Da J…ôwif hay a pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara na, Gazlavay a t…ôrdata Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya la fa mey aŇčga. Yaw, da nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway mekele a pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara na, Gazlavay a t…ôrdata la Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga may.
3.31: Anda ke…óe, da ya pakwa Yesu Ňčga ndaw al…ôkwa fara fara na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey al…ôkwa fa t…ôrdakwa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz Ňčga cek Ňčga tede daw? Kay, k…ône ba! Sas…ôkar al…ôkwa fa k…ôrzakwa kwakwas a maaya maaya ta har cew cew jak.

4.1: Yaw, kaa ya wulkakwa da ray *Ab…ôraham, dede al…ôkwa zleezle na, kwara? Ta h…ôtey cek ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga la daw?
4.2: Da Gazlavay ta pa Ab…ôraham Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga la ta fa sl…ôra aŇčga masa maaya na, anja Ab…ôraham a, t…ô…óe a zlepey. Ama ta gwa Ňčga zlepey fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba.
4.3: Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey: ¬ęAb…ôraham a t…ô…ďa mey masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvar. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a n…ôka na, aŇčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga, maja aŇčga ma pa Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara.¬Ľ
4.4: Ndaw ma key sl…ôra na, a h…ôtey dala. Dala ha ara mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga, ba na, a v…ôldamara Ňčga tede ba.
4.5: Ama ndaw ma n…ôkey dey fa sl…ôra aŇčga ba, a pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara na, Gazlavay a pa ndaw a la Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga. Ara Gazlavay ma gwa Ňčga pa ndaw ta meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga maja Gazlavay a n…ôka na, ndaw a ma t…ô…ďa mey aŇčga la.
4.6: Zleezle Bay *Davit taa guzley la letek k…ône. A l…ôvey nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma pata Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga kwa ta n…ôka sl…ôra ata daa ba na, mep…ôsey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray ata.
4.7: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey ata sem. Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma n…ôkey dey fa meb…ôrey ata saba.
4.8: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma sl…ôfa meb…ôrey ata saba.
4.9: Davit e maa guzley anda ke…óe na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aha aa da ray nd…ôhay masa maslakaya mandawal daada gway daw? Kay, k…ône ba! Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a na, aa da ray nd…ôhay masa mandawal manjar Ňčga sley may. Ahaw, ya ta l…ôvkwa la: ¬ęGazlavay a n…ôka na, Ab…ôraham aŇčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga, maja aŇčga ma pa Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara.¬Ľ
4.10: Masa Gazlavay ma t…ôrda Ab…ôraham a Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga na, daa masa aŇčga ta sla mandawal cay daw, daa ba daw? Fara fara daa Ňčgene na, Ab…ôraham a ta sla mandawal daa ba araŇč.
4.11: Daa masa Ab…ôraham ma sla mandawal daa ba araŇč na, Gazlavay ta n…ôka cay aŇčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga, maja aŇčga ma pa Gazlavay a Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Gazlavay ta‚Äô, a l…ôvar Ňčga sla mandawal. *Mesley mandawal a Ňčgene na, fa wuzda aŇčga ndaw maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, Ab…ôraham na, ara papaŇč Ňčga nd…ôhay masa mandawal manjar Ňčga sley, masa ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
4.12: Asaya, aŇčga papaŇč Ňčga nd…ôhay masa mandawal maslakaya may. Ya wu…óey Ňčgaa guzley ke…óe na, da ray nd…ôhay maslakaya mandawal c…ôpa ba, ama yaa guzley na, da ray nd…ôhay maslakaya mandawal masa ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw ata anda papa al…ôkwa Ab…ôraham ma pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara daa masa aŇčga ta sla mandawal daa ba araŇč. Gazlavay a da v…ôltar a nd…ôhay ma pamara Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara na, me?
4.13: Gazlavay a l…ôvar Ňčgada *Ab…ôraham ta Ňčgada b…ôza hay ma da yamawa da hwa…ó aŇčga na, a da v…ôldatara b…ôla c…ôpa Ňčgada ata. Gazlavay a da v…ôldatara b…ôla ha na, ara maja Ab…ôraham ma nar ray a *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ba, ama maja aa ma pa Gazlavay a Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ma pa Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga.
4.14: Anja da Gazlavay a da v…ôltar cek a nd…ôhay maja ata ma s…ôpam kwakwas daada na, Ňčgene, mepey Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw fara fara, ara cek Ňčga tede. Asaya, anja cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara ha na, ara cek Ňčga tede may.
4.15: Yaw, da nd…ôhay a zl…ô…ďmara kwakwas na, Gazlavay a cey mevel. Ama da anja kwakwas daa ba na, nd…ôhay a da zl…ô…ďam me?
4.16: Anda ke…óe, cek maaya masa Gazlavay ma da v…ôlda na, a da v…ôldatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa ma pamara Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. A da v…ôldatara na, Ňčga maaya maja a wu…óey ndaw kalah. Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da v…ôltar cek heyey na, ara Ňčgada b…ôza hay ma da yamawa da hwa…ó Ab…ôraham tabiya. A da v…ôlda cek aha na, Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey aŇčga masa ma s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daada ba, ama Ňčgada nd…ôhay mekele tabiya ma pamara Ňčga ndaw ata anda Ab…ôraham zleezle. Ab…ôraham na, ara papa al…ôkwa, al…ôkwa tabiya ndav.
4.17: Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, Gazlavay a l…ôvar a Ab…ôraham: ¬ęYa ta paka la Ňčga papaŇč Ňčga s…ôkway hay ga.¬Ľ Yaw, fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, Ab…ôraham ara papa al…ôkwa. AŇčga ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara, Gazlavay ma sl…ôk…óadat…ôrwa nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey, asaya, ma gwa Ňčga kata cek hay masa ma kam daa ba araŇč.
4.18: Kwa nd…ôhay siya a wulkam Gazlavay a gwa Ňčga v…ôlar cek Ňčgada Ab…ôraham anda aa ma l…ôvar heyey daa ba na, Ab…ôraham a fa pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara c…ôŇčga. Anda ke…óe, aŇčga ta t…ôrey la Ňčga ¬ępapaŇč Ňčga s…ôkway hay ga¬Ľ anda Gazlavay maa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęB…ôza hay da hwa…ó akah a laslam la ga anda wurzla hay.¬Ľ
4.19: Daa masa Gazlavay maa guzlar Ňčgene na, Ab…ôraham a key mevey temere. Ab…ôraham a s…ôra aŇčga maraw, g…ôdaŇč aŇčga daa saba, asaya, a s…ôra Ňčgwas aŇčga Sara na, aŇčga madaŇčgwas cay. Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, Ab…ôraham fa t…ô…ďa Gazlavay a kar cek la anda aa ma l…ôvar c…ôŇčga.
4.20: Fara fara, aŇčga fa t…ô…ďa mey masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvar. A wulkey cew cew da ray cek masa Gazlavay ma da v…ôldara ba. Ama fa h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč ma f…ôna ma f…ôna daa met…ô…ďey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay, fa h…ôslar ray.
4.21: Yaw, Ab…ôraham a s…ôra Gazlavay aa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga kara cek anda aa ma l…ôvar.
4.22: Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ma pa Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga.
4.23: Mey ma l…ôvey: ¬ęGazlavay a pa Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga¬Ľ na, mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay na, Ňčgada Ab…ôraham daada ba,
4.24: ama mey a mawuzlalakaya Ňčgada al…ôkwa may. Da al…ôkwa fa pakwa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw al…ôkwa fara fara, Gazlavay ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu daa mem…ôcey na, Gazlavay a, a pandakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga la may.
4.25: Yesu a na, Gazlavay ta v…ôlda la a har nd…ôhay Ňčga m…ôcey maja meb…ôrey al…ôkwa. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey amba Gazlavay a pandakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga.

5.1: Ahaw, Gazlavay a t…ôrdandakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga na, maja al…ôkwa ma pakwa Ňčga ndaw al…ôkwa fara fara. Anda ke…óe, al…ôkwa manjatakaya daa zazay fa mey aŇčga maja Bay al…ôkwa Mahura, Yesu *K…ôriste.
5.2: Ara Yesu ma v…ôlndakwar c…ôve…ó amba ya s…ôrkwa maaya Ňčga Gazlavay maja al…ôkwa fa pakwa Ňčga ndaw al…ôkwa fara fara. Al…ôkwa majaratakaya daa mey aŇčga ta fa maaya aŇčga ha. Asaya, al…ôkwa faa s…ômkwa maja ya s…ôrkwa ya h…ôtkwa mewe…óey aŇčga la a ray al…ôkwa.
5.3: Ara Ňčgene daada ba, ama al…ôkwa faa s…ômkwa saya daa masa al…ôkwa fa s…ôrkwa banay, maja banay a, a j…ônndakwar Ňčga …ď…ôsey banay hay mekele mekele.
5.4: Me…ď…ôsey banay na, a v…ôley g…ôdaŇč a ndaw Ňčga jerey. Yaw, da al…ôkwa majaratakaya na, ya s…ôrkwa ya da h…ôtkwa cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a v…ôldandakwara la heyey.
5.5: Cek aha na, fa da pandakwar hwaray daa ba, maja Gazlavay ta wuzd…ôrwa mewu…óey-vaw aŇčga sem ta fa Mes…ôfney aŇčga masa aa ma v…ôldandakwara.
5.6: Daa masa al…ôkwa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga l…ôhda ray al…ôkwa daa ba na, K…ôriste ta m…ôcey la maja al…ôkwa, al…ôkwa nd…ôhay ma kam h…ôma a ray Gazlavay. A m…ôcey a na, ta pas masa Gazlavay ma wala …óar a.
5.7: Ya s…ôrkwa aŇčga ta banay amba ndaw a t…ô…ďa Ňčga m…ôcey aa slam a Ňčga ndaw ma ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e. Ay…ôwa, da kwa ndaw a gwa Ňčga m…ôcey aa slam a Ňčga ndaw meekwe…ó-mey kwa.
5.8: Ama kwa al…ôkwa ta meb…ôrey na, ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, K…ôriste ta m…ôcey la maja al…ôkwa c…ôŇčga. Ara anda ke…óe Gazlavay ma wuzda, aŇčga fa wu…óndakwar kalah.
5.9: Wure ke…óe, Gazlavay ta t…ôrdandakwar la Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga ta fa mambaz Ňčga Yesu ma mb…ô…ówa daa mem…ôcey aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, ya s…ôrkwa fara fara Yesu K…ôriste a l…ôhdandakwar la, Gazlavay fa da cey mevel da ray al…ôkwa daa saba.
5.10: Daa masa al…ôkwa masa-g…ôra hay Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay a ta c…ômndakwar …óay la ta aŇčga ray aŇčga, ta fa mem…ôcey Ňčga B…ôzey aŇčga. Wure ke…óe, al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya …óay ta aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, ya s…ôrkwa fara fara a l…ôhdandakwar la maja B…ôzey aŇčga ma sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey.
5.11: Ara ke…óe daada ba, ama al…ôkwa faa s…ômkwa da ray Gazlavay maja Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste may. Ara maja aŇčga, al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya ta Gazlavay. Mey da ray Adam ta K…ôriste
5.12: Meb…ôrey a sawa a b…ôla na, ta fa ndaw pal mez…ôley *Adam. Nd…ôhay a m…ôcam na, maja meb…ôrey a. Anda ke…óe, mem…ôcey fa paslata nd…ôhay da b…ôla maja nd…ôhay tabiya ata ta meb…ôrey.
5.13: D…ôga Gazlavay ta wuzdara kwakwas aŇčga a *Mawiz daa ba araŇč na, meb…ôrey aa daha da b…ôla cay. Ama daa masa kwakwas a daa ba araŇč na, Gazlavay fa sl…ôfa meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay daa ba may.
5.14: Ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa d…ôga fa Adam haa kasl fa Mawiz na, nd…ôhay tabiya ta l…ôham fa mem…ôcey daa ba c…ôŇčga. Adam ta c…ônar mey a Gazlavay daa ba. Kwa nd…ôhay a ta kam meb…ôrey anda Adam a daa ba na, ta m…ôcam sem c…ôŇčga. Ya gwakwa Ňčga wa Adam a na, ta ndaw ma da sawa.
5.15: Ama Adam a na, ata letek ta ndaw ma da sawa ha ba. Meb…ôrey Ňčga Adam aŇčga wal ta cek maaya masa Gazlavay ma da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay maja mewu…óey-vaw aŇčga. Ahaw, fara fara nd…ôhay ga ta m…ôcam sem maja meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw pal. Ama, Gazlavay a katar maaya la ma f…ôna a nd…ôhay ga. A da katar maaya ha na, ta fa ndaw pal mez…ôley Yesu *K…ôriste.
5.16: Cek masa nd…ôhay ma h…ôtam ta fa Gazlavay na, a f…ôna cek masa nd…ôhay ma h…ôtam ta fa ndaw pal mez…ôley Adam. Ara aŇčga ma hand…ôrwa meb…ôrey a b…ôla. Anda ke…óe, meb…ôrey masa ndaw pal ma ka ha na, sariya Ňčga Gazlavay ta t…ô…ódata nd…ôhay sem maja. Ama maaya masa Gazlavay ma katara a nd…ôhay na, a pata nd…ôhay a Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, kwa nd…ôhay a, ata ta meb…ôrey ga na, sariya Ňčga Gazlavay fa da t…ô…ódata daa ba.
5.17: Ahaw, fara fara ndaw pal ta key meb…ôrey la. Anda ke…óe, mem…ôcey ta k…ô…óta nd…ôhay tabiya sem maja ndaw aha. Ama ndaw mekele daha wal, ara Yesu K…ôriste. Ara ta fa aŇčga, Gazlavay ma katar maaya a nd…ôhay ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, a nd…ôvey ba, a c…ômtar …óay ta aŇčga ray aŇčga. Maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba la, asaya, a da wam da ray cek hay bama.
5.18: N…ôka, nd…ôhay tabiya na, sariya ta t…ô…ódata sem maja meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw pal, Adam. Ama ndaw pal daha, ara Yesu K…ôriste. AŇčga na, ara ndaw ma key cek maaya ta c…ôve…ó e. Ara ta fa aŇčga Gazlavay a pata nd…ôhay Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba la.
5.19: Ahaw, nd…ôhay ga ata ta meb…ôrey maja ndaw pal daha ma c…ônar mey a Gazlavay ba. Ama ndaw pal daha, ara Yesu K…ôriste. AŇčga na, ta c…ônar mey la a Gazlavay. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay ga ta t…ôram Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya la fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maja ndaw aha.
5.20: Gazlavay ta wuzdatara kwakwas aŇčga la a nd…ôhay. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay fa kam meb…ôrey ma f…ôna ma f…ôna. Ama daa masa nd…ôhay fa kam meb…ôrey ma f…ôna ma f…ôna na, Gazlavay fa key dey-ceceh, fa wuzdatara mewu…óey-vaw aŇčga ma f…ôna ma f…ôna a nd…ôhay may.
5.21: Meb…ôrey a h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč da ray nd…ôhay Ňčgaa z…ô…ódata na, ta fa mem…ôcey. Ama wure ke…óe maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray nd…ôhay. Gazlavay na, aa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga pata nd…ôhay Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga. A wuzd…ôrwa maaya aŇčga ha amba ya h…ôtkwa heter mend…ôvey ba ta fa Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste.

6.1: Kaa wure ke…óe na, ya da l…ôvkwa kwara? Maaya na, ya kakwa meb…ôrey mandaw mandaw amba Gazlavay a s…ôrfandakwar dey-ceceh, a wu…óndakwar ma f…ôna ma f…ôna daw?
6.2: Kay, k…ône ba s…ôlak! Ta dey Ňčga meb…ôrey na, al…ôkwa anda nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya. Meb…ôrey a gwa a wandakwar saba. Kaa wara ya njakwa mandaw mandaw daa meb…ôrey na, kwara d…ô…ďa wura?
6.3: Ka s…ôrmara maaya maaya daa masa al…ôkwa ma h…ôtkwa *baptem na, al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya ta Yesu *K…ôriste. Anda mel…ôvey, al…ôkwa ma m…ôckwa la ta aŇčga may.
6.4: Daa masa al…ôkwa mam…ôctakaya ta K…ôriste daa yam Ňčga baptem na, Ňčgene anda al…ôkwa map…ôshatakaya ta aŇčga amba menjey al…ôkwa a t…ôrey mawiya. Menjey al…ôkwa a t…ôrey mawiya na, letek anda Gazlavay PapaŇč ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa Yesu daa mem…ôcey ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga masa maaya kalah.
6.5: Ahaw, al…ôkwa ma m…ôckwa la anda aŇčga, anda ke…óe, al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya ta aŇčga. Da ray Ňčgene, ya da sl…ôk…óakurwa daa mem…ôcey anda aŇčga may.
6.6: Ya s…ôrkwa daa masa Yesu ma m…ôcey fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya na, menjey al…ôkwa masa zleezle aa fa hwadam a ta pas Ňčgene may amba menjey al…ôkwa masa zleezle he a nd…ôvey. Anda ke…óe, al…ôkwa beke Ňčga meb…ôrey saba,
6.7: maja ndaw masa mam…ôckaya na, meb…ôrey a wa saba.
6.8: Yaw, da al…ôkwa mam…ôctakaya ta K…ôriste na, ya s…ôrkwa ya da njakwa ta dey bama ta aŇčga may.
6.9: Ya s…ôrkwa fara fara K…ôriste na, ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey. Yaw, aŇčga fa da m…ôcey daa saba, mem…ôcey fa da wey da ray a daa ba may.
6.10: K…ôriste ta m…ôcey la dey pal maja nd…ôhay tabiya. Ta fa mem…ôcey aŇčga ha na, meb…ôrey a gwa a wandakwar saba. Wure ke…óe na, aŇčga ta dey, manjakaya da cakay Gazlavay.
6.11: Akwar may, akwar k…ône. S…ôrmara, akwar na, mam…ôctakaya, meb…ôrey fa wakwar daa saba. Wure ke…óe, akwar ta dey, manjatakaya ta Gazlavay maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste.
6.12: Anda ke…óe, ka da v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó a meb…ôrey Ňčga wey da ray vaw akwar ma da m…ôcey Ňčgene ba. Cek hay maaya ba masa akwar ma wu…óam kalah na, ka da pamara mewulkey akwar a ray a ba.
6.13: Ka da v…ôldamara vaw akwar Ňčgada meb…ôrey amba a t…ôrda vaw akwar Ňčga cek ma ka sl…ôra malamba ba. Ama v…ôldamara ray akwar na, Ňčgada Gazlavay anda nd…ôhay masa mam…ôctakaya ma sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey. V…ôldamara ray akwar tabiya a Gazlavay amba a t…ôrdakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka cek maaya ta c…ôve…ó e.
6.14: Anda ke…óe, ara meb…ôrey ma da wey da ray akwar saba, maja akwar fa s…ôpmara *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daa saba, ka s…ôpam na, Ňčga h…ôtey maaya Ňčga Gazlavay. Al…ôkwa na, nd…ôhay ma ka cek maaya daw, maaya ba daw?
6.15: Kaa ya da kakwa na, kwara? Da al…ôkwa fa s…ôpkwa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daa saba, ya s…ôpkwa maaya Ňčga Gazlavay na, al…ôkwa ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga key meb…ôrey daw? Kay, daa ba!
6.16: Ka s…ôrmara da ka v…ôldamara ray akwar Ňčgada ndaw, ka l…ôvmar ka namar ray la na, akwar ma t…ôram sem Ňčga beke aŇčga hay, ba diya? Anda ke…óe, da akwar ma v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó sem a meb…ôrey Ňčga wey da ray akwar na, Ňčgene akwar beke hay Ňčga meb…ôrey a, asaya, akwar fa c…ôha…óamawa mem…ôcey a ray akwar. Ama da akwar fa namar ray a Gazlavay na, akwar ta t…ôram sem Ňčga beke aŇčga hay, anda ke…óe, a pakwar la Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga.
6.17: Zleezle na, akwar beke Ňčga meb…ôrey, ama wure ke…óe akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkadamakwara ta mevel pal. Ya kakwa suse a Gazlavay maja.
6.18: Gazlavay ta p…ôskakwar sem daa beke Ňčga meb…ôrey. Anda ke…óe, ka da kam cek masa maaya ta c…ôve…ó e.
6.19: Ya wakwara mey a ta beke ke…óe na, maja aŇčga ta banay Ňčgada akwar amba ka c…ôndamara mey a. Zleezle na, akwar anda beke hay. Ka ta v…ôldamara ray akwar la Ňčga key cek hay malamba ma h…ôldakwar Ňčga r…ôsa Gazlavay. Ama wure ke…óe na, v…ôldamara ray akwar tabiya Ňčgada Gazlavay amba ka kam cek masa maaya ta c…ôve…ó e anda akwar na, beke aŇčga hay. Anda ke…óe, menjey akwar a mbafar la a Gazlavay.
6.20: Zleezle daa masa akwar beke Ňčga meb…ôrey na, ka wu…óam Ňčga key cek masa maaya ta c…ôve…ó e ba.
6.21: Daa Ňčgene na, akwar fa kam cek hay malamba masa fa pakwar hwaray wure ke…óe. Kaa cek maaya masa akwar ma h…ôtam da hwa…ó a na, me? Sas…ôkar cek hay a Ňčgene na, fa handawa mem…ôcey a ray akwar jak, ba diya?
6.22: Wure ke…óe na, Gazlavay ta p…ôskakwar sem daa beke Ňčga meb…ôrey. Anda ke…óe, akwar nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay. Cek maaya masa akwar ma h…ôtam na, ara menjey akwar maaya ma mbafar a Gazlavay. Asaya, menjey akwar a, a da v…ôlkwar heter mend…ôvey ba Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
6.23: N…ôka, cek meh…ôtey fa meb…ôrey na, ara mem…ôcey. Ama cek masa Gazlavay ma v…ôlda Ňčga maaya na, ara heter mend…ôvey ba maja al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya ta Yesu *K…ôriste, Bay al…ôkwa mahura.

7.1: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya faa guzlkwar, akwar masa ma s…ôrmara *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. Ka s…ôrmara kwakwas a, a wey da ray ndaw na, daa masa ndaw aha aŇčga ta dey gway.
7.2: Wakwa mey a ta Ňčgwas da way zel. Daa masa zel e aa ta dey …óagay na, Ňčgwas a, aa ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga ley zel mekele daa ba, maja kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a v…ôlar c…ôve…ó ba. Ama da zel e ta m…ôcey sem na, Ňčgwas a, aa ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga ley zel mekele, kwakwas a, a t…ôka saba.
7.3: Anda ke…óe, da Ňčgwas masa zel e aa ta dey, a ley zel mekele na, Ňčgene Ňčgwas aha ta ley vaw sem da palah. Ama da zel e ta m…ôcey sem na, kwakwas a, a v…ôlar c…ôve…ó Ňčga ley zel mekele. Ňägene, ara meley-vaw saw da palah ba.
7.4: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, Ňčgada akwar na, aa letek k…ône may, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz fa wey da ray akwar daa saba. Akwar anda nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya maja *K…ôriste ta m…ôcey la aa slam a Ňčga akwar. Wure ke…óe, akwar na, Ňčgada aŇčga, ndaw masa Gazlavay ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey. Akwar mac…ômkaya ta aŇčga amba ka kamar sl…ôra maaya ma mbafar.
7.5: Zleezle daa menjey al…ôkwa na, al…ôkwa fa kakwa cek hay saw anda mevel al…ôkwa ma wu…óey gway. Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a wuzdandakwara cek hay masa ma kar meb…ôrey a ndaw. Masa al…ôkwa ma s…ôrtakwa cek hay a la na, sas…ôkar al…ôkwa fa katakwa ma f…ôna ma f…ôna jak. Cek hay a fa h…ôldandakwar Ňčga key sl…ôra maaya ba ma handawa mem…ôcey a ray al…ôkwa.
7.6: Zleezle al…ôkwa anda beke hay maja kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, al…ôkwa anda nd…ôhay mag…ôrcatakaya daa f…ôrs…ône. Wure ke…óe, al…ôkwa map…ôskatakaya dasi har Ňčga kwakwas a, amba ya kakwa sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay taa c…ôve…ó mekele mawiya masa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wuzdandakwara. Ya kakwa sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay taa c…ôve…ó magurma masa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma wuzdandakwara saba. Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a wuzwa na, me?
7.7: Kaa wure ke…óe na, ya da l…ôvkwa kwara? *Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, ara cek maaya ba daw? Kay, k…ône ba. Anja da kwakwas a daa ba na, ya fa da s…ôra meb…ôrey daha na, daa ba. Kwakwas a, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa da kam dey fa cek Ňčga ndaw ba.¬Ľ Anja da kwakwas a ta l…ôvey k…ône daa ba na, ya s…ôra mekey dey fa cek Ňčga ndaw na, ara meb…ôrey la daw?
7.8: Ama kwakwas a ta wurar c…ôve…ó sem a meb…ôrey Ňčga key sl…ôra daa yah. Meb…ôrey a ta h…ôldaya la Ňčga key dey fa cek Ňčga ndaw. Anja da kwakwas a daa ba na, meb…ôrey fa da h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč da ray ndaw daa ba.
7.9: Zleezle daa masa ya s…ôra mey da ray kwakwas a ba na, yah ta dey, ya fa wey Ňčga yah. Ama daa masa ya ta c…ônda mey da ray kwakwas a cay na, meb…ôrey ta h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč sem da ray a…óaw.
7.10: Da ray Ňčgene, yah na, anda ndaw mam…ôckaya. Gazlavay ta v…ôld…ôrwa kwakwas aha la amba nd…ôhay a h…ôtam heter. Ama Ňčgada yah na, kwakwas a ta c…ôha…óaya mem…ôcey sem a ray.
7.11: Ama masa yah ma c…ônda mey da ray kwakwas a la na, kwakwas a ta wurar c…ôve…ó sem a meb…ôrey Ňčga key sl…ôra daa yah. Meb…ôrey a ta h…ôtey c…ôve…ó sem Ňčga t…ôknaya ta fa kwakwas a. Anda ke…óe, meb…ôrey a ta c…ôha…óaya mem…ôcey sem a ray.
7.12: Fara fara, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, aŇčga maaya, meb…ôrey da hwa…ó a daa ba. Asaya, mey hay da ray kwakwas a na, a samawa fa Gazlavay. Ata maaya, meb…ôrey da hwa…ó a daa ba. A j…ônta nd…ôhay Ňčga key cek ta c…ôve…ó e.
7.13: Anda ke…óe, cek masa maaya na, a gwa Ňčga handawa mem…ôcey a ray a…óaw daw? Kay, k…ône ba! Ma hand…ôrwa mem…ôcey a ray ndaw na, ara meb…ôrey. Meb…ôrey a ta h…ôtey c…ôve…ó sem ta fa cek masa maaya Ňčga handaya mem…ôcey a ray. A key anda ke…óe na, amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara meb…ôrey ara cek maaya ba kalah ta fa kwakwas a. Cek maaya ta maaya ba a c…ômam daa ndaw na, kwara?
7.14: Ya s…ôrkwa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, a sawa ta fa Gazlavay, ama al…ôkwa na, nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč gway. Ya ta t…ôrkwa beke Ňčga meb…ôrey sem.
7.15: Fara fara, cek masa yah ma ka na, ya ka maja me na, ya s…ôra ba, maja cek maaya masa yah ma wu…óey na, ya ka ba. Ama ya key na, cek masa yah ma wu…óey ba jak.
7.16: Da ya key cek masa yah ma wu…óey ba na, Ňčgene, ya t…ô…ďa, ya s…ôra kwakwas a na, aŇčga maaya.
7.17: Anda ke…óe, da ya key cek maaya ba na, ara yah ma ka ba. Ara meb…ôrey masa daa yah ma ka cek aha.
7.18: Ahaw, ya s…ôra yah ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key cek maaya ta c…ôve…ó e na, daa ba. Anda mel…ôvey yah na, ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč. Ya wu…óey Ňčga key cek maaya ta c…ôve…ó e, ama g…ôdaŇč a…óaw daa ba.
7.19: Yaw, cek maaya masa yah ma wu…óey Ňčga ka na, ya fa ka daa ba, ama ya key na, cek maaya ba masa yah ma wu…óey Ňčga ka ba jak.
7.20: Da ya key cek maaya ba masa yah ma wu…óey Ňčga ka ba na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ara yah ma ka ba. Ara meb…ôrey masa daa yah ma ka cek aha.
7.21: Ya wu…óey Ňčga key cek maaya, ama ya da key na, cek masa maaya ba gway. Ke…óe ara cek masa yah ma saŇčgala daa menjey a…óaw.
7.22: Daa mevel a…óaw na, ya fa wu…óey fara fara Ňčga s…ôpa *kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay.
7.23: Ama ya n…ôka na, cek maaya ba ma f…ônya ray daha. Cek aha fa t…ôka mewulkey a…óaw Ňčga key cek masa maaya. Cek maaya ba ha ma f…ônya ray a na, ta t…ôrdaya sem Ňčga beke Ňčga meb…ôrey.
7.24: Ay! Yah na, ndaw ta mat…ôway daa dey. Yah na, mem…ôcey aa da ray a…óaw. Ma da l…ôhdaya daa mem…ôcey a na, wa?
7.25: Ara Gazlavay ma da l…ôhdaya ta fa Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu *K…ôriste. Ara maja Ňčgene, ya fa kar suse ta mevel a…óaw c…ôpa. Anda ke…óe, daa mewulkey a…óaw na, ya wu…óey Ňčga s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Ama maja yah ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč na, ya key na, cek masa ma handaya meb…ôrey a ray jak.

8.1: Wure ke…óe nd…ôhay masa mac…ômkaya ta Yesu *K…ôriste na, sariya Ňčga Gazlavay fa da t…ô…ódata daa ba.
8.2: Meb…ôrey fa da h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč Ňčga handawa mem…ôcey a ray al…ôkwa daa saba, maja g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray al…ôkwa. G…ôdaŇč Ňčga Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a, a v…ôlndakwar heter mawiya ta fa Yesu K…ôriste.
8.3: *Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, a gwa Ňčga key sl…ôra anda Gazlavay ba, maja b…ôle Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ta t…ôrda kwakwas a sem Ňčga cek manjar g…ôdaŇč. Gazlavay aa ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ôna kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. Gazlavay a wuzda aŇčga na, a wu…óey Ňčga c…ôney meb…ôrey fa sl…ômay aŇčga ba s…ôlak, a kar sariya a ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč maja meb…ôrey aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, ta sl…ôrd…ôrwa B…ôzey aŇčga la a b…ôla, a t…ôrey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč, vaw aŇčga anda al…ôkwa nd…ôhay ma ka meb…ôrey. Gazlavay a ka anda ke…óe, Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay daa meb…ôrey ta fa mem…ôcey Ňčga B…ôzey aŇčga ha. Anda ke…óe, ta f…ôna g…ôdaŇč Ňčga meb…ôrey sem ta fa B…ôzey aŇčga ha.
8.4: Gazlavay a ka anda ke…óe na, amba ya t…ôrkwa nd…ôhay ma ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e fara fara anda kwakwas a ma wu…óey ya kakwa. Ya kakwa na, anda mewu…óey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč saba, ama ya kakwa anda Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wu…óey.
8.5: Nd…ôhay ma s…ôpam Ňčga njey anda nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč ma wu…óam na, a wulkam mandaw mandaw da ray cek masa ma mbafatar gway. Ama nd…ôhay ma kam cek anda Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wu…óey na, a wulkam mandaw mandaw da ray cek masa ma mbafar a Mes…ôfney a.
8.6: Da ndaw a wulkey mandaw mandaw da ray cek masa ma mbafar gway na, a key Ňčgene, a c…ôha…óawa mem…ôcey a ray aŇčga. Ama da ndaw a wulkey mandaw mandaw a ray cek ma mbafar a Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, Ňčgene, Gazlavay a da v…ôlar heter mawiya, asaya, a da njada daa zazay.
8.7: Nd…ôhay ma wulkam mandaw mandaw da ray cek masa ma mbafatar a vaw ata hay na, ata masa-g…ôra hay Ňčga Gazlavay. Ata fa s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba, kwa a gwamara Ňčga key sl…ôra ta kwakwas a ba.
8.8: Nd…ôhay ma s…ôpam Ňčga key cek masa ma mbafatar a vaw ata hay gway na, nd…ôhay a, fa da mbafamar a Gazlavay daa ba.
8.9: Ama akwar na, akwar fa kam cek ma mbafar a vaw akwar hay daa ba. Ka s…ôpam na, cek masa ma mbafar a Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay maja Mes…ôfney a, aa da ray akwar. Ndaw masa Mes…ôfney Ňčga K…ôriste da ray a daa ba na, ndaw aha ara ndaw Ňčga K…ôriste ba.
8.10: Da K…ôriste aa daa mevel akwar na, Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a v…ôlkwar heter mawiya la maja aa ma pakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga. Kwa ka m…ôcam la, vaw akwar a zey la maja meb…ôrey na, ka h…ôtam heter mawiya la.
8.11: Asaya, da Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa Yesu K…ôriste daa mem…ôcey aa da ray akwar na, Ňčgene Gazlavay a da sl…ôk…óadakurwa daa mem…ôcey may. Anda ke…óe, a da sl…ôk…óadakurwa ha na, ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Mes…ôfney aŇčga masa da ray akwar a.
8.12: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ara maja Ňčgene si ya njakwa anda Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wu…óey, ba na, anda vaw al…ôkwa ma wu…óey ba.
8.13: Yaw, da akwar fa kam cek masa ma mbafar a vaw akwar gway na, ka m…ôcam la. Ama da akwar fa v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó a Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga j…ônkwar Ňčga mb…ôkda mekey cek hay maaya ba na, Ňčgene, ka h…ôtam heter mawiya la.
8.14: Nd…ôhay c…ôpa masa ma v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó a Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray ata na, nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, ara b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay.
8.15: Mes…ôfney masa akwar ma t…ô…ďmara Ňčga wey da ray akwar a na, fa da t…ôrdakwar Ňčga beke hay daa ba, akwar fa da njam ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa saba. Ama Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a, a da t…ôrdakwar Ňčga b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay, a da j…ônndakwar Ňčga z…ôla Gazlavay a: ¬ęAba¬Ľ, anda mel…ôvey, ¬ęPapay.¬Ľ
8.16: Mes…ôfney a, fa wuzdandakwara daa mevel al…ôkwa na, al…ôkwa b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay fara fara.
8.17: Ahaw, al…ôkwa na, b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, ya h…ôtkwa cek masa aŇčga ma …ďada maja al…ôkwa la.
