5.10: Maja al…ôkwa c…ôpa na, ya wuskwa la fa mey Ňčga *K…ôriste amba a kandakwar sariya. A da n…ôkta cek hay maaya ta maaya ba masa al…ôkwa ma kakwa da b…ôla. Yaw, a da p…ôlar mawur…ďay a ndaw a, a ndaw a, t…ô…óe fa sl…ôra aŇčga. Mey da ray Yesu ma c…ômtar …óay Ňčga nd…ôhay ta Gazlavay
5.11: Ya s…ôrkwa, Bay Mahura Yesu a kandakwar sariya la. Maja Ňčgene, ala fa namar ray ta mevel ala c…ôpa. Anda ke…óe, si ya s…ôpam c…ôve…ó Ňčga j…ônmata nd…ôhay Ňčga s…ôrey mey masa fara fara. Gazlavay na, a s…ôrndar maaya maaya. Asaya, ya wulkey na, akwar may, ka s…ôrmaya fara fara.
5.12: Mey tabiya masa ala maa guzldamara ke…óe na, nd…ôhay da wuzlah akwar a wulkam, a key ya zlapam c…ôŇčga daw? Kay, k…ône ba. Ama ya wuzmakwar na, mey da ray ala amba kaa s…ômam da ray sl…ôra ala. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, da nd…ôhay siya fa slam mey a ray ala na, ka gwamara Ňčga lacafamandar a ray, ka kam sede da ray ala. Nd…ôhay ma slam mey a ray ala ha na, ara nd…ôhay ma zlapam fa sl…ôra ata da b…ôla ke…óe gway, a wulkam fa cek hay masa daa mevel ata ba.
5.13: Nd…ôhay siya a wulkam ala na, nd…ôhay manjar leŇčgesl. Yaw, da ala nd…ôhay manjar leŇčgesl na, ara maja ala ma v…ôldamara ray ala Ňčgada Gazlavay. Ama da ala nd…ôhay ta leŇčgesl na, ara Ňčga j…ônmakwar.
5.14: Fara fara, sl…ôra masa ala ma kamara na, ya kamara maja *K…ôriste fa wu…óndakwar kalah. Al…ôkwa fa s…ôrkwa, aŇčga na, ta m…ôcey sem aa slam a Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya. Anda mel…ôvey, nd…ôhay tabiya ta m…ôcam sem ta aŇčga may.
5.15: Fara fara, Yesu a m…ôcey aa slam a Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya na, amba nd…ôhay da b…ôla a njam anda ata ma wu…óam saba, ama amba a njam Ňčga s…ôpey c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu. A s…ôpmara c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu a na, maja aŇčga ma m…ôcey, ta aŇčga ma sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey maja ata.
5.16: Ara maja ke…óe, ya s…ôrmata nd…ôhay ta fa cek ata hay da b…ôla saba. Ahaw, fara fara zleezle na, ya s…ôrmara K…ôriste na, anda nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč ma wulkam, ama wure ke…óe, ala fa wulkam da ray a k…ône saba.
5.17: Ndaw masa mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste na, ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga ndaw mawiya. Menjey aŇčga masa zleezle ta mb…ô…óey sem, ta t…ôrey sem mawiya.
5.18: Ara Gazlavay ma ka cek aha tabiya. Ara Gazlavay ma c…ômndakwar ta aŇčga ray aŇčga ta fa mem…ôcey Ňčga K…ôriste. Wure ke…óe, Gazlavay ma v…ôlndar sl…ôra la. Sl…ôra ha na, ara Ňčga wuzey mey Ňčgada nd…ôhay mekele masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey Ňčga c…ômey ta ata.
5.19: Anda mel…ôvey, Gazlavay a sl…ôrd…ôrwa K…ôriste na, maja a wu…óey Ňčga c…ômey ta nd…ôhay tabiya. A sl…ôfa meb…ôrey ata saba. Anda ke…óe, a sl…ôrdandar na, Ňčga wuzey mey a nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey Ňčga c…ômey ta ata ha.
5.20: Ala na, nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga K…ôriste. Ara anda Gazlavay ta ray aŇčga ma z…ôlkwar maja ara aŇčga ma balandar mey. Anda ke…óe, ya kamakwar ambahw ta mez…ôley Ňčga K…ôriste, samawa asi har Ňčga Gazlavay, amba ka c…ômam ta aŇčga.
5.21: Yesu K…ôriste na, ta key meb…ôrey daa ba s…ôlak. Ama Gazlavay ta pa sem Ňčga ndaw ta meb…ôrey aa slam a Ňčga al…ôkwa, amba da al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste he na, Gazlavay a pakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga.

6.1: Wure ke…óe, Gazlavay aa ta ala daa sl…ôra masa ala ma kamara c…ôpa. Gazlavay ma kakwar maaya la. Anda ke…óe, ala fa kamakwar ambahw, ka da t…ôrdamara maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a Ňčga cek Ňčga tede ba.
6.2: Wulkam fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley zleezle, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęTa pas masa amba ya kakwar maaya na, ya ta j…ôkfakwar sl…ômay la. Ta pas masa amba ya l…ôhdakwar na, ya ta j…ônkwar la.¬Ľ N…ôkmara d…ô…ďa taw, wure ke…óe pas a ta wuswa cay amba Gazlavay a kakwar maaya, fara fara pas a ta wuswa cay amba a l…ôhdakwar.
6.3: Ala fa wu…óam Ňčga key cek kwa wura wura Ňčga t…ôkta nd…ôhay Ňčga t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, daa ba, maja ya wu…óam nd…ôhay a slam mey a ray sl…ôra ala ba.
6.4: Ama daa sl…ôra ala ha c…ôpa na, ala fa wuzdamara, ala na, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay fara fara. Kwa ala daa banay, kwa fa pamandar dey a ray daa ba, kwa cek fa f…ônndar ray, ala fa …ď…ôsmara gway.
6.5: N…ôka, ta k…ô…ómandar la, ta handamandar la aa f…ôrs…ône, asaya, ta h…ôldamata nd…ôhay la Ňčga key h…ôma a ray ala. Ahaw, sl…ôra ta f…ônndar ray la haa ya gwamara Ňčga ney ba, asaya, ya gwamara Ňčga h…ôtey cek mez…ômey ba.
6.6: Fara fara, ala na, fa kam cek ma mbafar a Gazlavay, ya s…ôrmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay fara fara, ala nd…ôhay meekwe…ó-mey, mevel ala maaya, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray ala. Asaya, ya wu…ómata nd…ôhay ta mevel pal.
6.7: Ala fa wuzdamara mey masa fara fara a nd…ôhay, maja Gazlavay fa v…ôlndar g…ôdaŇč. Yaw, ta fa cek hay a ke…óe tabiya na, ala fa wuzdamara, ala na, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay fara fara. Cek ala ma ka v…ôram ta masa-g…ôra ala hay, ta cek ala ma j…ô…óndar fa masa-g…ôra ala hay na, ara mekey cek ta c…ôve…ó e ke…óe fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
6.8: Nd…ôhay siya faa h…ômdamandar, siya hay may, fa r…ôsmandar. Nd…ôhay siya saya fa namandar ray, siya hay may, fa c…ô…ómandar. Ala na, nd…ôhay maa guzlam mey masa fara fara, ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, a padamandar Ňčga nd…ôhay memb…ôrzley.
6.9: A l…ôvam saya, ala na, ndaw ma s…ôrndar daa ba, ama anja nd…ôhay tabiya a s…ôrmandar jak, ba diya? Nd…ôhay a wulkam na, ala fa da njam ga da b…ôla daa ba, ama n…ôkmara taw, ala daha ta dey c…ôŇčga. Ta s…ôrdamandar banay la ga, ama ta k…ô…ómandar vagay daa ba.
6.10: Ata fa kamandar cek ma ka mat…ôway aa dey, ama ala mandaw mandaw daa mees…ômey c…ôŇčga. Nd…ôhay a n…ôkmandar na, ala anda masa-viya hay, ama ala fa j…ônam nd…ôhay ga Ňčga h…ôtey menjey maaya fa Gazlavay. Ndaw a n…ôkndar anda cek ala daa ba, ama fara fara cek ma h…ôcndar na, daa ba s…ôlak.
6.11: Akwar nd…ôhay da Kwarinti, ala na, ma kadamakwara mey daa mevel ala la c…ôpa, kwa ya ta cam mey fa akwar daa ba s…ôlak.
6.12: Ala na, ya wu…ómakwar kalah, ama ma wu…ómandar ba na, akwar jak.
6.13: Ehe, ya faa guzlkwar anda akwar b…ôz a…óaw hay, wu…ómandar anda ala ma wu…ómakwar may, wu…ómandar ma f…ôna ma f…ôna ta mevel pal. Mewe…óey ta l…ôvaŇč na, a c…ômam daw?
6.14: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu ba na, ka da c…ômam …óay ta ata ba. Cek maaya ta cek maaya ba a c…ômam aa slam a daw? Mewe…óey ta l…ôvaŇč na, a c…ômam aa slam a daw?
6.15: Ata *K…ôriste ta *SataŇč, bay-malula na, a c…ômam …óay daw? Yaw, ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu ta ndaw ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu ba na, c…ôve…ó ata letek daw?
6.16: Asaya, kuley hay na, slam ata daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay daha daw? Al…ôkwa na, anda Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, Gazlavay, ndaw masa aŇčga daha ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Ara anda aa ma l…ôvey: ¬ęYah, Gazlavay, ya da njey ta nd…ôhay a…óaw hay. Yah na, Gazlavay ata, ata may, nd…ôhay a…óaw hay.¬Ľ
6.17: Ara maja Ňčgene, Bay Gazlavay a maa guzltar a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęWu…ókam ta nd…ôhay malamba hay, ka da njam daa slam a saba. Njam manjar meb…ôrey, anda ke…óe, yah na, ya t…ô…ďkwar la Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay.
6.18: Yah na, Papakw akwar, akwar may, b…ôz a…óaw hay, mez…ôle hay ta maŇčgusa hay. Ara Bay Gazlavay masa ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ônta cek hay c…ôpa maa guzley anda ke…óe.¬Ľ

7.1: Ahaw, jam a…óaw hay, mey hay tabiya masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey ke…óe na, a kandakwara la anda aa ma l…ôvey. Anda ke…óe, si ya mb…ôkdakwa cek hay tabiya masa ma zl…ô…ďa, kwa vaw al…ôkwa, kwa mes…ôfney al…ôkwa . Si ya nakwar ray a Gazlavay, anda ke…óe, ya da njakwa maaya fa mey aŇčga. Pawl aa s…ômey da ray Kwarinti hay
7.2: Wu…ómandar maaya maaya d…ô…ďa. Ala ta kam cek maaya ba Ňčgada ndaw pal dasi akwar na, daa ba. Ala ma n…ôsam ndaw daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay na, daa ba. Ala ta f…ôcam cek Ňčga ndaw pal dasi akwar na, daa ba.
7.3: Yaa guzley anda ke…óe na, a key ya mb…ô…ókwar ray ba. Ara anda yah ma l…ôvey, ala fa wu…ómakwar kalah, kwa cek fa da wunkandakwar na, daa ba s…ôlak. Kwa da ara Ňčga njey ta dey, kwa da ara Ňčga m…ôcey na, al…ôkwa bama c…ôŇčga.
7.4: Ahaw, ya s…ôra na, akwar nd…ôhay a…óaw hay fara fara. Ya faa s…ômey da ray akwar. Yah na, ya ta s…ôrey banay la ga, ama mevel a…óaw ta d…ôkey la, ya faa s…ômey ga c…ôŇčga.
7.5: Kwa daa masa ala ma wusmawa a Masad…ôwan fe…óe na, ya ta h…ôtam c…ôve…ó Ňčga m…ôskey vaw daa ba, maja banay hay mekele mekele daha. Nd…ôhay ta cakalafamandar mey la, asaya, ray ala ta h…ô…ďey la da ray cek hay mekele mekele.
7.6: Ama Gazlavay na, ara ndaw ma d…ôkar mevel a ndaw masa leŇčgesl aŇčga ta mb…ô…óey sem maja banay ma h…ôtfar. Ara aŇčga ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa Tit Ňčga d…ôkndar mevel may.
7.7: Ma d…ôkndar mevel e na, ara masawa Ňčga Tit e daada ba, ama ara mey masa aŇčga ma kadandara da ray akwar may. Ahaw, Tit e, a l…ôvndar akwar ta d…ôkmar mevel la may, asaya, akwar fa wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtmaya fa dey c…ôŇčga. Akwar fa z…ôlam marava da ray cek maaya ba masa akwar ma kamara, asaya, akwar fa wu…óam Ňčga key g…ôdaŇč Ňčga j…ônmaya fa masa-g…ôra a…óaw hay. Masa yah ma c…ônda mey a ke…óe na, yah daa mees…ômey ara mey ba.
7.8: Leeter masa yah ma wuzlalakwara heyey na, ya s…ôra ta wulkadakwar la ga. Anja dey pal daha, ya da z…ôley marava da ray a, maja leeter e Ňčgene ta wulkadakwar la. Ama ya fa da z…ôley marava da ray leeter e daa saba.
7.9: Wure ke…óe, ya faa s…ômey da ray leeter e. Yaa s…ômey maja leeter e ma wulkadakwar da ray malamba akwar hay daada ba, ama yaa s…ômey maja mewulkey akwar a ta mb…ô…ódakwara menjey akwar sem. Mewulkey akwar a Ňčgene a mbafar a Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, leeter ala ha na, ta kakwar cek maaya ba na, daa ba s…ôlak.
7.10: Anda mel…ôvey, da ndaw fa wulkey da ray menjey aŇčga maaya ba amba a mb…ô…óda anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey na, mewulkey aŇčga Ňčgene na, a mb…ô…ódara menjey aŇčga la. Ara anda ke…óe, Gazlavay ma da l…ôhda ndaw a daa meb…ôrey. Kwa waawa ma wulkey anda Ňčgene, a z…ôley marava da ray a daa ba. Ama da mewulkey Ňčga ndaw anda Ňčga nd…ôhay da b…ôla ma mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata ba na, Ňčgene he, ara mewulkey ma hendey ndaw aa mem…ôcey.
7.11: Fara fara, mewulkey akwar Ňčgene a mbafar a Gazlavay. N…ôkmara cek masa aŇčga ma ka fa akwar d…ô…ďa taw. Wure ke…óe, akwar ma mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar cay. Ka wu…óam Ňčga wuzdamara, akwar na, da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma kam meb…ôrey ba. Akwar ma cam mevel la da ray meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay da wuzlah akwar. Akwar ma zluram la. Akwar fa wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtmaya fa dey saya. Yaw, ka wu…óam Ňčga key cek masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey d…ô…ďa, ka wu…óam Ňčga k…ôtmara ndaw masa ma key cek maaya ba heyey. Wure ke…óe, daa mey a ke…óe, akwar fa wuzdamara kwa ta fa meeme na, akwar ta zay da mey.
7.12: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, fara fara leeter masa yah ma wuzlalakwara heyey na, ara maja ndaw ma key cek maaya ba Ňčgene daada ba, asaya, ara maja ndaw masa ndaw a ma kar cek maaya ba Ňčgene daada ba may. Ama ya wuzlala na, amba ya wuzdakwara fara fara fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, akwar fa wu…ómaya ta mevel pal.
7.13: Ara maja Ňčgene, mevel ala ma d…ôkey cay wure ke…óe. Ahaw, mevel ala ma d…ôkey cay, ama yaa s…ômam ma f…ôna ma f…ôna na, maja Tit aa daa mees…ômey maja ray aŇčga fa h…ô…ďey da ray akwar tabiya fete…óe daa saba.
7.14: N…ôka, daa masa yah ma sl…ôrda Tit e fa akwar na, yah maa h…ômdakwar la meedey aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, akwar ta pamaya hwaray daa ba. Mey masa ala ma l…ôvmakwar mandaw mandaw na, ara mey masa fara fara. Anda ke…óe, cek masa yah maa h…ômdakwar fa mey Ňčga Tit maja na, akwar fa wuzdamara fa mey Ňčga Tit e ta fa sl…ôra akwar, meeh…ômey a, ara aŇčga fara.
7.15: Daa masa Tit ma wusey fa akwar na, akwar ma t…ô…ďmara la maaya maaya, ka namar ray, ka c…ônmar mey. Anda ke…óe, daa masa aŇčga fa s…ôrfada cek masa akwar ma kamar tabiya na, a wu…ókwar ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
7.16: Yah Pawl may, ya faa s…ômey da ray akwar maja akwar nd…ôhay a…óaw hay fara fara.

8.1: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya wu…óam Ňčga kadamakwara cek masa nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu daa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan ma kamara. Cek aha fa wuzd…ôrwa na, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray ata.
8.2: Nd…ôhay a ta s…ôram banay la, ama ata daa mees…ômey c…ôŇčga. Ata c…ôpa masa-viya hay, ama a v…ôlam ta har cew cew, ta v…ôlam dala la ga Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay.
8.3: Ya fa l…ôvkwar fara fara, ata ta v…ôlam dala la t…ô…óe ta g…ôdaŇč ata, haa a f…ôna g…ôdaŇč ata ha. Ara ata ta ray ata ma samawa fa ala,
8.4: a kamandar ambahw, aa c…ôf…óamandar amba ya v…ôlmatar c…ôve…ó Ňčga j…ônmata nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da *Jeruzelem may.
8.5: N…ôka, cek masa ata ma kamara na, ta f…ôna masa ala ma wulkam da ray a sem. Teese…ó na, a v…ôldamara ray ata Ňčgada Bay Mahura, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a t…ô…ďmara mey ala amba a kamara cek anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey.
8.6: Da fa akwar na, Tit ta zlarawa cay Ňčga cakalarawa dala ha. Ara maja Ňčgene, ala ma l…ôvmar amba a v…ôhey fa akwar saya Ňčga nd…ôvd…ôrwa sl…ôra masa maaya Ňčgene.
8.7: Akwar na, fa huram cek daa ba. Anda mel…ôvey, akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga *K…ôriste la maaya maaya, akwar fa wuzdamara *Mey-maaya-mawiya ta c…ôve…ó e. Gazlavay ta wurkwara leŇčgesl la Ňčga s…ôrey mey masa fara fara. Akwar ma v…ôldamara ray akwar la c…ôpa Ňčga key sl…ôra aŇčga, asaya, ka wu…ómandar kalah. Yaw, maja akwar fa huram cek daa ba ke…óe na, maaya na, ka wuzdamara akwar ta mees…ômey Ňčga v…ôley dala ha ta har cew cew.
8.8: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, yah maa guzley anda ke…óe na, a key ya t…ôkakwar …óay Ňčga v…ôley dala ba. Ama yaa guzlkwar da ray nd…ôhay siya hay maa s…ômam Ňčga v…ôley dala, amba ka h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč, ka wuzdam…ôrwa mewu…óey-vaw akwar Ňčgada nd…ôhay siya hay may.
8.9: Ka s…ôrmara Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste na, ta kakwar maaya la. AŇčga na, aa daa wiya fa Bay Gazlavay da va…ó, ama ta mb…ôkd…ôrwa wiya ha la, a sawa a b…ôla, a t…ôrey Ňčga ndaw masa-viya, maja akwar. A t…ôrey Ňčga ndaw masa-viya na, amba ka h…ôtam wiya da gazlavay da va…ó may.
8.10: Yah maa guzley ke…óe na, a key ya t…ôkakwar …óay ba. Ama ya wu…óey ka s…ôrmara mewulkey a…óaw da ray mev…ôley dala ha. Ňäga mev…ô…óey ara akwar ma wulkam teese…ó Ňčga v…ôley dala. Ara akwar ma cakalamara dala ha teese…ó. Maaya na, ka nd…ôvdamara mecekeley dala ha d…ô…ďa.
8.11: Wure ke…óe, kamara sl…ôra ha ta mevel akwar c…ôpa anda akwar ma zlamara Ňčgeeme, nd…ôvdamara mecekeley dala ha la. V…ôlam dala ha na, t…ô…óe ta g…ôdaŇč akwar.
8.12: Maja da ndaw a v…ôley cek a Gazlavay ta mees…ômey, ta mevel aŇčga c…ôpa, asaya, t…ô…óe ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga na, Gazlavay a t…ô…ďa la. Ama da cek aŇčga daa ba na, Gazlavay a s…ôra.
8.13: Ka da wulkam a key ya s…ôrdakwar banay amba nd…ôhay siya a njam daa wiya na, k…ône ba. Ama ya wu…óey na, nd…ôhay tabiya Ňčga njam kal kal.
8.14: Wure ke…óe na, cek mez…ômey fa akwar suha. Anda ke…óe, aŇčga maaya amba ka j…ônmata nd…ôhay masa cek mez…ômey fa ata p…ôreh. Yaw, ta pas masa cek mez…ômey fa akwar p…ôreh, ama fa ata suha na, a j…ônmakwar may. Anda ke…óe, ka da njam kal kal.
8.15: Mey a…óaw ke…óe na, aa letek ta mey Ňčga Gazlavay maa guzley da ray cek mez…ômey ma k…ôzlwa ta da va…ó zleezle, a l…ôvey: ¬ęNd…ôhay masa ma h…ôlmawa cek mez…ômey a ga la na, ta katar kalah daa ba. Nd…ôhay ma h…ôlmawa nek…ô…óey na, ta katar p…ôreh daa ba may.¬Ľ Tit a da diyam ta mandala aŇčga hay a Kwarinti
8.16: Ya kamar suse a Gazlavay maja Tit ta wu…óey la Ňčga j…ônkwar anda ala may. Ta wu…óey la Ňčga j…ônkwar ta mevel pal. Ara Gazlavay ma ka amba Tit e, a t…ô…ďa Ňčga j…ônkwar.
8.17: Tit e ta t…ô…ďa la anda ala ma l…ôvmar Ňčga daw fa akwar saya. Ara maja ala ma l…ôvmar daada ba, ama ara aŇčga ta ray aŇčga ma wu…óey Ňčga daw fa akwar a.
8.18: Ya sl…ôram ndaw pal da wuzlah ala la Ňčga diyam cew e. Ndaw aha na, nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga Yesu tabiya faa h…ômdamara kalah maja sl…ôra aŇčga maaya daa mewuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya.
8.19: Ala ma da sl…ôrdamara na, ara maja ke…óe daada ba. Ama ara nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu ma walamara amba ya p…ôkam bama Ňčga j…ônndar daa mecekeley dala heyey. Sl…ôra maaya masa ala ma kamara ke…óe na, ya kamara Ňčga h…ôslar ray a Bay Mahura, ray aŇčga, asaya, Ňčga wuzwa na, ya wu…óam Ňčga j…ôney nd…ôhay kalah.
8.20: Ala fa wam vaw Ňčga k…ôrzey dala masa akwar ma cakalam…ôrwa ga ke…óe amba nd…ôhay a slam mey a ray sl…ôra ala ha ba.
8.21: Anda ke…óe, ya wu…óam Ňčga key sl…ôra maaya na, fa dey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay daada ba, ama fa dey Ňčga nd…ôhay may.
8.22: Ya sl…ôram ndaw mekele la da wuzlah ala, asi ata Tit e saya. Ndaw a na, ala ta saŇčgalamara la dey weewe daa sl…ôra hay masa aŇčga ma kata. Anda ke…óe, ya s…ôrmara, aŇčga ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay. Wure ke…óe, ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la ma f…ôna saya Ňčgada akwar maja aa ma c…ôney mey maaya da ray akwar.
8.23: Tit na, ala mandaw mandaw cew e, ara ndaw masa ala fa kam sl…ôra cew e Ňčga j…ônkwar. Yaw, nd…ôhay cew ma diyam ta Tit e na, ara nd…ôhay masa nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga Yesu ma sl…ôrdamata fa akwar. A kam sl…ôra ha na, amba nd…ôhay a h…ôslmar ray a *K…ôriste.
8.24: Wu…ómata fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya amba nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray hay ma sl…ôrdamata heyey a c…ôndamara, asaya, amba a s…ôrmara masa ala maa h…ômdamakwar heyey na, anja fara.

9.1: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, kwa yah maa guzlkwar da ray dala masa ala ma da sl…ôrdamara Ňčgada nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da *Jeruzelem heyey daa saba na, cay gway.
9.2: Ya s…ôra na, akwar may, fa wu…óam Ňčga j…ônmata. Yah ma kadatara mewulkey akwar Ňčga j…ônmata nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem sem a nd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan, ya l…ôvtar: ¬ęNd…ôhay daa hwayak Ňčga Akay ta zlamar cay d…ôga Ňčga mev…ô…óey Ňčga j…ôney nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da Jeruzelem.¬Ľ Masa nd…ôhay da Masad…ôwan ma c…ôndamara sl…ôra akwar masa maaya Ňčgene na, a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay ga da wuzlah ata Ňčga j…ôney nd…ôhay da Jeruzelem e may.
9.3: Ehe, ya fa sl…ôrdakwara ata Tit ta nd…ôhay cew Ňčgene Ňčga j…ônmakwar Ňčga cekeley dala ha taazak, amba yah maa h…ômdakwar ke…óe na, a t…ôrey Ňčga cek Ňčga tede ba. Anda ke…óe, da ala ma wusam la fa akwar na, ya h…ôtfamar cek hay tabiya ma…óiytakaya cay, anda yah ma l…ôvey.
9.4: Da masa ala ma wusam la fa akwar ta nd…ôhay da Masad…ôwan a, asaya, da dala ha manjar Ňčga cekeley na, hwaray a da kaya fa mey ata, maja ya ta l…ôvtar cay ka cakalamara dala ha la fara fara. Ňägada akwar may, hwaray a kakwar la.
9.5: Ara maja Ňčgene, yah ma wulkey Ňčga sl…ôrdata nd…ôhay maakar Ňčgene teese…ó fa mey a…óaw. Ya wu…óey amba a j…ônmakwar Ňčga cekeley dala ha taazak, anda akwar ma l…ôvmandar. Anda ke…óe, wuskwaa ya da wusey na, akwar ma cakalamara cay. Ňägene, mecekeley dala ha a da wuzwa na, ara akwar ma wu…óam Ňčga cakalamara ta mevel pal, ba na, ta menj…ôr…ďey-mey ba.
9.6: S…ôrfadamara, mey daha a l…ôvey: ¬ęNdaw ma sl…ôkey nek…ô…óey na, a da h…ôtey cek nek…ô…óey may. Yaw, da a sl…ôkey ga na, a da h…ôtey cek ga may.¬Ľ
9.7: Anda ke…óe, si ndaw a v…ôley cek anda aa ma wu…óey. Ka da v…ôldamara ta menj…ôr…ďey-mey ba. Ndaw a da t…ôkakwar …óay ta t…ôkey ba may. Ama v…ôldamara na, ta mees…ômey, maja Gazlavay a wu…óey na, ndaw masa ma v…ôley cek ta mees…ômey.
9.8: S…ôrmara, Gazlavay na, aŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga v…ôlkwar cek hay ga. Anda ke…óe, kwa meeme fa da h…ôckwar daa ba s…ôlak. Ka da h…ôtam cek hay masa ma f…ôna amba ka v…ôldamara Ňčga key sl…ôra ma mbafar a Gazlavay.
9.9: Ara anda mey Ňčga Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęNdaw masa maaya na, har aŇčga mawurkaya Ňčga j…ôney masa-viya hay. Maaya aŇčga masa aŇčga ma ka Ňčgene, aŇčga daha Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ
9.10: Ma v…ôlda hulfa…ó Ňčga sl…ôkey ta ma v…ôlda …óaf Ňčga z…ômey a nd…ôhay na, ara Gazlavay. A da v…ôlkwar hulfa…ó hay c…ôpa masa akwar ma wu…óam Ňčga sl…ôkey may. Hulfa…ó a, a da p…ôcwa, a da yey ga. Anda ke…óe, ka da kamatar maaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
9.11: Fara fara, a v…ôlkwar cek hay la ga mekele mekele amba ka gwamara Ňčga j…ônmata nd…ôhay siya hay ma f…ôna ma f…ôna. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay ga a da h…ôlmamara Gazlavay maja cek masa akwar ma v…ôldamatara ta har ala amba ya handamatara.
9.12: Cek masa akwar ma v…ôldamara Ňčgene na, ara Ňčga j…ônta nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay da Jeruzelem masa daa banay daada ba, ama amba nd…ôhay ga a kamar suse a Gazlavay maja may.
9.13: Nd…ôhay ma da h…ôtmar cek masa akwar ma da kamara Ňčgene na, a da h…ôlmamara Gazlavay maja akwar fa c…ônmar mey a Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, akwar fa wuzdamara na, akwar fa t…ô…ďmara *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga *K…ôriste. Yaw, nd…ôhay a da h…ôlmamara Gazlavay maja akwar nd…ôhay masa har mawurkaya Ňčga j…ôney nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay da Jeruzelem, asaya, maja akwar nd…ôhay ma j…ônam nd…ôhay c…ôpa.
9.14: A da wu…ómakwar kalah maja maaya Ňčga Gazlavay ga da ray akwar. Anda ke…óe, a da d…ôram daŇčgay maja akwar.
9.15: H…ôlmakwa Gazlavay maja maaya aŇčga kalah.

10.1: Yah, Pawl, ta ray a…óaw, ambahw, ya wu…óey Ňčgaa guzlkwar cey. Nd…ôhay faa guzlam da ray a…óaw, a l…ôvam, da masa yah da wuzlah akwar na, ya zlurey ta akwar. Ama da ya ta Ňčg…ôchey sem nek…ô…óey ta akwar na, yaa b…ôcey taa b…ôcey, mand…ôrzay a kaya ba. Fara fara, yah na, ya wu…óey Ňčga key ndaw maaya meekwe…ó-mey anda *K…ôriste.
10.2: Anda ke…óe, ya kakwar ambahw, maaya na, ka mb…ô…ódamara menjey akwar, amba da yah ma wusey la fa akwar na, ka t…ôkmaya …óay Ňčgaa b…ôckwar ba. Asaya, nd…ôhay ga da wuzlah akwar a wulkam saw, a l…ôvam ya key sl…ôra na, anda nd…ôhay Ňčga b…ôla gway. Nd…ôhay ma l…ôvam anda Ňčgene na, ya daa b…ôctar taa b…ôcey.
10.3: Fara fara, ala nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč, ama daa sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay na, ya kam v…ôram anda nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč ba.
10.4: Cek ala hay ma ka v…ôram a na, a sawa da b…ôla ke…óe ba, ama ara Gazlavay ma v…ôldandara. Cek hay a na, ata ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga p…ôlhata slam hay masa masa-g…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay ma …ďam a hwa…ó a. Asaya, ta cek hay a na, ya gwamara Ňčga g…ôrcamatara mey Ňčga nd…ôhay maa guzlam saw ta memb…ôrzley.
10.5: Asaya, ta cek hay a na, ya gwamara Ňčga n…ôsmara mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma zlapam saw, ma t…ôkmata nd…ôhay Ňčga s…ôrey Gazlavay. Ta cek hay a na, ya wu…óam Ňčga mb…ô…ódamara mewulkey ata maaya ba tabiya amba a t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga K…ôriste.
10.6: Da akwar fa wuzdamara, akwar fa namar ray fara fara a K…ôriste na, anda ke…óe, ya da k…ôtmata nd…ôhay siya masa ma namar ray ba.
10.7: N…ôka, akwar na, ka wulkam fa cek hay masa ma h…ôtey fa dey gway. Da ndaw a l…ôvey, aŇčga ndaw Ňčga K…ôriste na, maaya a s…ôra ala na, nd…ôhay Ňčga K…ôriste anda aŇčga may.
10.8: Bay Mahura Yesu ma pandar Ňčga mahura na, a pandar amba ya n…ôsmakwar ba, ama amba ya j…ônmakwar. Kwa ya fa zlepey kalah maja na, hwaray fa da kaya daa ba.
10.9: Yaw, ka da wulkam a key ya zluradakwar ta leeter a…óaw hay ba.
10.10: Nd…ôhay siya fa l…ôvam: ¬ęDaa leeter hay Ňčga Pawl na, Pawl a t…ôktar …óay a nd…ôhay Ňčga key cek masa ta banay Ňčga key, asaya, aa b…ôcey taa b…ôcey. Ama da aa da wuzlah al…ôkwa na, a p…ôskey vaw ba, a gucey ta gucey, mey masa aŇčga maa guzlda na, ara mey Ňčga tede.¬Ľ
10.11: Ndaw maa guzley anda Ňčgene na, si a wulkey maaya maaya, a s…ôra cek masa ala ma wuzlalamara ta wuzleley kaa na, ya kamara la da masa ala ma wusam la fa akwar.
10.12: Nd…ôhay siya fa pamata ray ata Ňčga mahura hay. Fara fara ya gwa Ňčga wa ray a…óaw, ya l…ôvey yah letek ta ata ba. A n…ôkam dey na, fa ray ata gway, a l…ôvam ndaw ma f…ônta daa ba. Ata na, nd…ôhay manjar leŇčgesl.
10.13: Ala na, ya fa zlapam anda Ňčgene daa ba. Ama ya zlapam na, da ray sl…ôra masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldandara Ňčga key gway. Daa masa Gazlavay ma wusdandar fa akwar heyey na, ya ta zl…ôŇčgdamara kwakway Ňčga sl…ôra ala daa ba. Ya zlapam na, da ray sl…ôra masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldandara ha gway.
10.14: Daa masa ala ma diyam fa akwar na, ya ta zl…ôŇčgdamara slam masa Gazlavay ma v…ôlndar c…ôve…ó Ňčga key sl…ôra da hwa…ó a na, daa ba. Fara fara, ala ta wusam la teese…ó fa akwar Ňčga kadakwara *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga K…ôriste.
10.15: Anda ke…óe, ala fa da zlapam da ray sl…ôra masa nd…ôhay mekele ma kamara na, daa ba, maja sl…ôra ata ha na, wal ta masa Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôldandara. Ala fa s…ôkwam na, amba ka t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, amba sl…ôra ala da wuzlah akwar a key maaya ma f…ôna saya. Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ala fa da zl…ôŇčgdamara slam masa Gazlavay ma slandara na, daa ba.
10.16: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya gwamara Ňčga diyam aa hwayak hay mekele masa d…ôreŇč ta akwar Ňčga wuzwa Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčgada nd…ôhay fete…óe. A da key anda ke…óe maja sl…ôra masa nd…ôhay mekele ma kamara sem daa slam masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldatara na, ya wu…óam Ňčga zlepey da ray a ba.
10.17: Yaw, mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga zlepey na, Ňčga zlepey da ray sl…ôra masa Bay Gazlavay ma ka gway.¬Ľ
10.18: Ahaw, fara fara ndaw maaya na, ara ndaw masa Gazlavay maa h…ômda, ba na, ara ndaw masa maa h…ômda ray aŇčga ba.

11.1: Ambahw, v…ôlmaya c…ôve…ó wure ke…óe amba yaa guzlkwar anda ndaw manjar-leŇčgesl cey. Fara fara, yaa c…ôf…óakwar, …ď…ôsmara mey a…óaw.
11.2: Mevel fa caya da ray nd…ôhay ma batamakwar Ňčgene, maja ya wu…ókwar kalah anda Gazlavay ma wu…ókwar. Ka s…ôrmara yah na, anda papakw akwar, ya ta pakwar la anda dam-sa…ďara mas…ôpkaya Ňčgada ndaw pal daha. Ndaw aha na, ara *K…ôriste masa yah ma da handakwar fa v…ô…óa, akwar maaya maaya manjar Ňčga n…ôsey.
11.3: Ama ya fa zlurey, da a da mb…ô…ódamakwara leŇčgesl Ňčga wu…ókakwar ta K…ôriste amba ka s…ôpmara maaya maaya saba kwa. A da key anda *Ev ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga zezekw ma bata zleezle heyey.
11.4: Kwa waawa ma sawa Ňčgaa s…ôrkadakwar mey masa fara fara ba na, ka v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó na, kwara? Nd…ôhay anda Ňčgene na, aa guzlam da ray Yesu mekele, ba na, da ray Yesu masa ala maa guzlam da ray a ba. Mes…ôfney masa akwar ma h…ôtam fa ata na, ara *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay masa akwar ma h…ôtam heyey ba. Asaya, ata fa wuzam *Mey-maaya-mawiya wal ta masa akwar ma t…ô…ďmara heyey. Ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, akwar fa j…ôkfamatar sl…ômay c…ôŇčga na, kwara?
11.5: Nd…ôhay masa akwar ma wulkam ara nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey maaya Ňčgene na, a f…ônmaya ba s…ôlak.
11.6: Ay…ôwa, da maja yah na, ya s…ôra meeguzley maaya maaya ba kwa, ama ya s…ôrta cek hay masa yah maa guzley da ray a c…ôŇčga. Cek masa yah ma s…ôra na, ya ta wuzdakwara la maaya maaya dey weewe.
11.7: Zleezle masa yah ma wuzdakwara Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga Gazlavay heyey na, yah maa c…ôf…óafakwar cek daa ba, ba diya? Anda ke…óe, ya ta nada ray a…óaw la fa mey akwar amba ya g…ôldakwar daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Ya key Ňčgene na, ara meb…ôrey daw?
11.8: Daa masa ya fa wuzey mey fa akwar heyey na, ma j…ônmaya ta dala na, ara nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu daa slam mekele. Yaw, ya ta h…ôley dala ata la amba ya j…ônkwar.
11.9: Daa Ňčgene na, m…ôrga fa kaya, ama yah taa c…ôf…óafakwar cek daa ba, maja nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da Masad…ôwan ta samawa la Ňčga v…ôlmaya cek hay mekele mekele masa fa yah daa ba. Anda ke…óe, ya taa c…ôf…óafakwar cek daa ba. Kaazla kwa ya fa daa c…ôf…óafakwar cek daa ba may.
11.10: Fara fara, kwa ndaw da slala wura wura masa daa hwayak akwar Akay ma gwa Ňčga t…ôkya Ňčga zlepey maja yah maa c…ôf…óafakwar cek ba na, daa ba. Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe na, ta mez…ôley Ňčga K…ôriste, ndaw masa aŇčga daha ta yah.
11.11: Ka wulkam yah maa c…ôf…óafakwar cek daa ba heyey na, a key ya wu…ókwar ba daw? Kay, k…ône ba. Kwa Gazlavay ta ray aŇčga na, a s…ôra ya fa wu…ókwar.
11.12: Mewulkey a…óaw kaa na, ya fa da mb…ô…óda daa ba c…ôŇčga. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkadam mey masa fara fara ba fa da h…ôtam dabaray Ňčga zlepey da ray ala daa ba. A gwamara Ňčga l…ôvey sl…ôra ala letek na, daa ba.
11.13: Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene na, ara nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey masa fara fara ba. A mb…ôrzlam kalah daa sl…ôra ata. A pamara ray ata Ňčga nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga K…ôriste.
11.14: Mey a ke…óe, a r…ôzley ndaw ba, maja kwa ta pas laŇčgar na, *SataŇč, bay-malula, ray aŇčga, fa pa ray aŇčga Ňčga maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay mewe…óey.
11.15: Yaw, da SataŇč, ray aŇčga, fa ka anda ke…óe na, kaa wara nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga, a pamara ray ata Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay ma ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e, ba kwara? Ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da ka sariya na, a s…ôrdata banay la fa sl…ôra ata ha. Mey da ray banay Ňčga Pawl
11.16: Ambahw, yaa guzlkwar saya, ndaw a da wulkey, yah na, ndaw manjar-leŇčgesl ba. Da akwar fa wulkam k…ône na, v…ôlmaya c…ôve…ó amba ya zlepey nek…ô…óey may.
11.17: Fara fara, mey masa yah maa guzlda ke…óe na, a mbafar a Bay Mahura ba. Da ya fa zlepey na, ya daa guzley anda ndaw manjar-leŇčgesl.
11.18: Nd…ôhay ga fa zlapam kalah da ray cek hay da b…ôla. Yah may, ya wu…óey Ňčga zlepey k…ône.
11.19: Akwar na, ka wulkam ka l…ôvam akwar nd…ôhay ma s…ôra cek hay, ba diya? Kaa ka …ď…ôsmara ndaw manjar-leŇčgesl na, kwara?
11.20: Ahaw, nd…ôhay fa t…ôrdamakwar Ňčga beke hay, faa fiymakwara cek akwar hay, fa lalamakwara cek hay c…ôpa, fa r…ôsmakwar, asaya, fa sl…ôŇčgmakwar matapa-har. Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, akwar fa …ď…ôsmara gway.
11.21: Ambahw, yah na, hwaray fa kaya Ňčga l…ôvkwar, maja vaw a…óaw ta p…ôskey Ňčga kakwar kwa meeme anda ata daa ba. Wure ke…óe, amba yaa guzley anda ndaw manjar-leŇčgesl. Ya zlepey da ray cek hay anda nd…ôhay mekele ma zlapam may.
11.22: Nd…ôhay a l…ôvam ata na, *Heb…ôre hay. Kaa yah na, ndaw Heb…ôre he may. A l…ôvam ata na, *Israyel hay. Kaa yah na, ndaw Israyel ehe may. A l…ôvam ata na, nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Ab…ôraham. Yaw, yah may, ndaw daa s…ôkway Ňčga Ab…ôraham a, ba diya?
11.23: Asaya, a l…ôvam, ata na, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga *K…ôriste. Yah may, yah ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga K…ôriste ma f…ônta jak, ba diya? Ya faa guzlkwar wure ke…óe na, anda ndaw manjar-leŇčgesl fara fara. Ya l…ôvey, yah na, ya fa ka sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay ma f…ônta. Yah na, ta k…ôzlamaya la aa f…ôrs…ône dey ga ma f…ônta, ta k…ô…ómaya la dey ga ma f…ônta, asaya, ya ta s…ôrey banay la ga haa kasl fa mem…ôcey.
11.24: Mahura hay Ňčga *J…ôwif hay ta sl…ô…ómaya la, laway kwakwar maakar a ray a zlam-letek haa dey zlam.
11.25: Mahura hay daa hwayak Ňčga *Rawm ta k…ô…ómaya la ta zlanday dey maakar. Pas pal daha, nd…ôhay ta hazakamaya la ta aŇčgwa haa kasl fa mem…ôcey. Asaya, kwambiwal ta t…ô…ódaya la aa yam dey maakar. Dey pal daha na, a mb…ôkdiwa daa yam a, ya v…ôrndawa, ya nawa daa yam a.
11.26: Ya ta p…ôkey la aa hwayak hay ga. Ya ta s…ôrey banay la. Anda mel…ôvey, wayam a wu…óey Ňčga laya dey weewe, mayal hay a wu…óam Ňčga lalamata cek a…óaw hay, a wu…óam Ňčga k…ô…ómaya. Nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay s…ôkway a…óaw hay leŇč nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba ta s…ôrdamaya banay la. Fara fara, yah ma s…ôrey banay la daa wura daa wura, kwa daa berney hay, kwa da wuzlah-ley, kwa daa b…ôlay, yah ma s…ôrey banay la ga. Asaya, nd…ôhay ma mb…ôrzlam, ma l…ôvam ata na, nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, ta s…ôrdamaya banay la may.
11.27: Ahaw, yah ma key sl…ôra la haa ya s…ôrey banay ga. Ta pas laŇčgar ya ney ba, may fa caya, yam fa kaya. Ta pas laŇčgar si ya key *daliyam. Asaya, ya h…ôtey zana Ňčga k…ôsley fa vaw ba, meme…ó a wu…óey Ňčga k…ô…óya.
11.28: Banay mekele mekele daha, ama ya fa da kadat…ôrwa siya daa saba. Daa Ňčgene na, mewulkey a…óaw aa da ray cek pal daha. Ya wulkey mandaw mandaw da ray nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga Yesu tabiya,
11.29: maja yah na, da ndaw aŇčga masa-b…ôle daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, b…ôle aŇčga ha a wusfaya may. Da ndaw a key meb…ôrey na, a g…ô…óya fa mevel anda awaw.
11.30: Da ya l…ôvey si ya h…ôsley ray na, Ňčgene ya da h…ôsley ray da ray b…ôle a…óaw.
11.31: Gazlavay, PapaŇč Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu, a s…ôra yah na, ya mb…ôrzley ba. Anja nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôlmamara Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
11.32: Zleezle masa yah daa berney Ňčga Damas, Aretas, bay Ňčga hwayak a na, ta pey ndaw la Ňčga wey da ray berney a. Ndaw ma wey da ray berney a ta‚Äô, a weley nd…ôhay Ňčga lacam aa c…ôve…ó ma bawa daa berney a amba a k…ôrzamaya.
11.33: Ama nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu fete…óe a pamaya aa lelek, a j…ôwam zewe…ó fa v…ô…óa, a t…ôldamaya Ňčgada d…ôbay taa maŇčgalaw Ňčga mahwal Ňčga berney a. A b…ôrŇčgadamaya a hwayak, a d…ô…ďa berney a. Anda ke…óe, yah ma l…ôhwa sem dasi har Ňčga nd…ôhay a.

12.1: Wure ke…óe si ya zlepey c…ôŇčga. Ahaw, ya s…ôra na, mezlepey a ara cek Ňčga tede. Ama ya wu…óey Ňčgaa guzley da ray cek hay masa yah ma h…ôtatar ta dey a…óaw, masa Bay Mahura ma wuzdatiwa.
12.2: Ya s…ôrey ndaw pal daha , ara ndaw Ňčga K…ôriste. Gazlavay a la fa v…ô…óa a va…ó, cay, ta‚Äô, a v…ôhwa. AŇčga kaa mevey kuraw a ray a m…ôfa…ó fa d…ô…ďa ha. Ay…ôwa, da ndaw aha ma daw la a va…ó ta vaw aŇčga fara, da daa ba, da ara cek anda mes…ôfney ma kar kwa, yah na, ya s…ôra ba, si Gazlavay ma s…ôra gway.
12.3: -4 Ahaw, fara fara Gazlavay ta la ndaw a la a va…ó a cakay a. Da ndaw aha ta daw la ta vaw aŇčga fara, da daa ba, da ara cek anda mes…ôfney ma kar kwa, yah na, ya s…ôra ba, si Gazlavay ma s…ôra gway. Mey masa aŇčga ma c…ônd…ôrwa da va…ó a na, ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč a gwa Ňčgaa guzlda mey a ba. Ara mey masa ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč aa ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga wuzda daa ba may.
12.5: Anda ke…óe, ya da zlepey da ray cek aha ma key Ňčgene. Ama maja cek mekele masa ma h…ôtfaya na, ya fa da zlepey da ray a daa ba, si da ray cek ma wuzda yah na, ndaw masa-b…ôle.
12.6: Kwa anja da ya fa zlepey na, ya faa guzley saw anda ndaw manjar-leŇčgesl daa ba, maja ya fa zlepey da ray cek hay masa fara fara. Ama ya da njey teete amba nd…ôhay a pamaya Ňčga ndaw ga ma f…ôna cek masa ata ma h…ôtmar fa yah ba, da daa ba, ma f…ôna cek masa ata ma c…ôndamara fa yah ba may.
12.7: N…ôka, yah na, anja t…ô…óe ya zlepey da ray cek hay masa Bay Mahura ma wuzdatiwa ke…óe. Ama ya ta zlepey daa ba maja cek fa caya mandaw mandaw. Cek aha a sl…ôkya anda hatak. Ara mesl…ôrey Ňčga *SataŇč, bay-malula, Ňčga k…ô…ódaya vaw. Cek ma caya ha na, ara amba ya zlepey saba.
12.8: Haa ya d…ôrar daŇčgay dey maakar a Bay Mahura Ňčga Ňčg…ôchada banay ke…óe la d…ôreŇč ta yah.
12.9: Ama a mb…ô…ódiwa, a l…ôvya: ¬ęMaaya a…óaw da ray akah na, a wusa amba ka …ď…ôsa banay a gway, maja da ndaw, aŇčga masa-b…ôle na, g…ôdaŇč a…óaw a key sl…ôra la daa ndaw aha maaya maaya jak.¬Ľ Da ara anda ke…óe na, yah daa mees…ômey, ya zlepey da ray b…ôle a…óaw ke…óe amba g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *K…ôriste a njey daa yah.
12.10: Ara maja ke…óe mevel a…óaw ma d…ôkey kwa da ray b…ôle a…óaw a, kwa a c…ô…ómaya, kwa a cakalafamaya mey, kwa a s…ôrdamaya banay dey ga, kwa yah ta mewulkey kalah maja K…ôriste na, ya daa s…ômey c…ôŇčga. Ya s…ôra, da yah masa-b…ôle na, K…ôriste a da v…ôlya g…ôdaŇč ma f…ôna jak. Mewulkey Ňčga Pawl da ray nd…ôhay Kwarinti hay na, kwara?
12.11: N…ôka, ya ta zlepey la, ya taa h…ômda ray a…óaw la anda ndaw manjar-leŇčgesl, ama ara akwar ma kamara, ba na, ara meb…ôrey a…óaw ba. Anja ma daa h…ômdamaya na, akwar jak ba diya? Kwa anja ka l…ôvam ya s…ôrey cek ba, ama nd…ôhay masa akwar ma wulkam ara nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey masa maaya heyey na, a f…ônmaya ba s…ôlak.
12.12: Daa masa yah da wuzlah akwar heyey na, ya ta …ď…ôsa la Ňčga key sl…ôra mandaw mandaw ta akwar c…ôŇčga. Gazlavay ta j…ônya la Ňčga key maazla hay mekele mekele. Maazla hay a, a wu…óam Ňčga l…ôvey na, yah *ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu fara fara.
12.13: Yaw, cek hay maaya masa yah ma katara Ňčgada nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu daa hwayak hay mekele na, yah ma kakwara daa ba daw? Ay…ôwa, da maja yah maa c…ôf…óafakwar cek Ňčga j…ônya daa ba heyey kwa. Da Ňčgene ara meb…ôrey na, ambahw, mb…ôkdamiwa meb…ôrey a.
12.14: Wure ke…óe, ya ta …óiya vaw cay Ňčga daw fa akwar saya, Ňčga dey maakar. Masa yah ma wusey la na, ya fa daa c…ôf…óafakwar cek Ňčga j…ônya daa ba c…ôŇčga. Ya daw na, maja zleley akwar ba, ama maja akwar ray akwar gway. N…ôka, yah na, anda papakw akwar. Ma v…ôlmatar cek Ňčga z…ômey a b…ôza hay mec…ôhe na, ara papa ata hay, ba na, ara b…ôza hay ma v…ôlmatar Ňčgada papa ata hay ba.
12.15: Kwa yaa z…ô…óda dala a…óaw c…ôpa maja akwar, kwa ya v…ôlda ray a…óaw c…ôpa kasl fa mem…ôcey maja akwar, Ňčgada yah na, a kaya cek ba. Ya daa s…ômey c…ôŇčga. Ay…ôwa, ka wu…ómaya saba kaa na, maja da ya fa wu…ókwar kalah kwa.
12.16: Akwar na, ka s…ôrmara ya ta s…ôrdakwar banay amba ka v…ôlmaya cek Ňčgada yah na, daa ba. Ama nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah akwar fa l…ôvam: ¬ęPawl na, a pa ray aŇčga Ňčga ndaw maaya, ama aŇčga ndaw masa-wewer. Ta t…ôknandakwara dala al…ôkwa sem.¬Ľ
12.17: Kaa ya t…ôknakwara dala akwar ha na, kwara? Ndaw pal dasi nd…ôhay masa yah ma sl…ôrdata fa akwar heyey na, ta t…ôknakwara cek akwar hay daa ba, ba diya?
12.18: N…ôka, ya ta kar ambahw la a Tit Ňčga daw fa akwar, ata ta m…ôlma al…ôkwa laŇčgar masa akwar ma s…ôrmara maaya maaya heyey. Kaa Tit e ta t…ôknakwara cek akwar hay sem daw? Cek masa Tit ma karawa fa akwar Ňčgene na, ara cek letek ta masa yah ma ka may, ba diya? Mewulkey ala na, letek.
12.19: D…ôga zleezle, ka wulkam a key ya wu…óam Ňčga m…ô…óey ray ala daa mey hay a ke…óe daw? Ara k…ône ba! Yaa guzlam na, fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay anda *K…ôriste ma wu…óey. Jam a…óaw hay, ala faa guzlmakwar na, maja ya wu…óam amba ka h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay.
12.20: Ya fa zlurey da ya da wusey fa akwar a na, menjey akwar a da mbafaya ba kwa. Da ara anda Ňčgene na, menjey a…óaw a da mbafakwar ba may. Ya zlurey ya da h…ôtfakwar, akwar fa t…ôram vaw ta t…ôrey, siya hay fa kam s…ôleŇč fa nd…ôhay siya, akwar fa cam mevel da wuzlah akwar, asaya, akwar fa wu…ókam …óay, akwar fa c…ô…óam vaw ta c…ô…óey, akwar fa slam mey ta sley da wuzlah akwar, akwar fa zlapam, asaya, akwar fa kam cek saw.
12.21: Ay…ôwa, yah ma da v…ôhey fa akwar a na, ya zlurey, da Gazlavay al…ôkwa a da paya hwaray fa mey akwar kwa. Ya fa zlurey saya maja da ya da h…ôtfey nd…ôhay malamba hay ga fa kam meb…ôrey anda zleezle c…ôŇčga kwa. Anda mel…ôvey, ata ta mb…ôkdamara mewulkey ata maaya ba Ňčgene daa ba. A wulkam mandaw mandaw Ňčga key cek ma n…ôsa ndaw, a lam vaw saw, asaya, a kam cek ma ka hwaray c…ôŇčga. Da ata ta mb…ô…ódamara mewulkey ata hay maaya ba Ňčgene daa ba na, ya da t…ôway fa mey akwar maja ata.

13.1: Ya da daw fa akwar kaa na, Ňčga dey maakar, ba diya? Da yah ma wusey la na, ya da z…ôlmatakurwa nd…ôhay ma kam cek malamba hay. Ya daa c…ôf…óamatakwa anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęKwa cek wura wura maaya ba masa ndaw ma ka, Ňčga s…ôrey mey da ray a fara fara na, maaya na, nd…ôhay cew, da daa ba, maakar a n…ôkmara mey a, a kam sede da ray mey a.¬Ľ
13.2: Daa masa yah ma daw fa akwar Ňčga dey cew heyey na, yah ma patar leŇčgesl la Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma kam meb…ôrey ta Ňčgada nd…ôhay siya c…ôpa. Ahaw, wure ke…óe na, yah d…ôreŇč ta akwar ama ya l…ôvkwar saya, da yah ma wusey la fa akwar Ňčga dey maakar na, ya fa da s…ôrfatar dey-ceceh a nd…ôhay c…ôpa ma kam meb…ôrey daa ba.
13.3: Akwar na, ka wu…óam ya wuzdakwara ara *K…ôriste ma balaya mey Ňčgaa guzley daw? Fara fara, ya fa wuzdakwara, K…ôriste he na, ara ndaw masa-b…ôle fa mey akwar ba, ama aa fa key sl…ôra da wuzlah akwar ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga.
13.4: Fara fara, daa masa ata ma d…ôrmara K…ôriste fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya heyey na, ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga ndaw masa-b…ôle, ama ta sl…ôk…óawa sem daa mem…ôcey ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, ala mac…ômkaya ta aŇčga ke…óe na, ala masa-b…ôle hay may. Ama ya wuzdamakwara la, ala daha ta dey bama ta aŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay.
13.5: Wulkam da ray menjey akwar, n…ôkmara ray akwar cey, akwar fa pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara daw? Akwar fa s…ôrmara na, Yesu K…ôriste aa ta akwar, ba diya? Da ka s…ôrmara aŇčga ta akwar ba na, Ňčgene, akwar fa pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara daa ba.
13.6: Asaya, ya wu…óey na, ka s…ôrmara fara fara, ala fa pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara ta fa cek masa ala ma kamara.
13.7: Ya d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay amba cek masa maaya ba na, ka kamara ba s…ôlak. Ya wu…óam Ňčga pamara ray ala Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e na, daa ba. Kwa da akwar fa s…ôrmara cek hay masa ma wuzda ala nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu ba na, ya wu…óam amba ka kam cek masa maaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay c…ôŇčga.
13.8: Anda ke…óe, ya k…ô…óam vaw na, amba mey masa fara fara a daw fa mey fa mey gway. Mey masa fara fara ha na, ya wu…óam Ňčga n…ôsmara ba.
13.9: Ahaw, da akwar ta g…ôdaŇč daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay na, kwa anja g…ôdaŇč ala p…ôreh na, ya daa s…ômam c…ôŇčga. Anda ke…óe, ala fa d…ôrmar daŇčgay a Gazlavay amba a j…ônkwar Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey daa c…ôve…ó aŇčga.
13.10: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ka s…ôrmara yah ma wuzlalakwara mey hay masa daa leeter ke…óe teese…ó na, maja me daw? Ara maja ta pas masa yah ma da wusey fa akwar na, maaya na, nd…ôhay tabiya ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata cay. Anda ke…óe, ya fa da kakwar mey ta key na, daa saba. Fara fara, Gazlavay ta v…ôlya g…ôdaŇč la Ňčga kakwar mey, amba ka diyam fa mey fa mey daa c…ôve…ó aŇčga, ama ta v…ôlya g…ôdaŇč amba ya n…ôskwar na, daa ba s…ôlak. Mey Ňčga madagway-dakw
13.11: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, wure ke…óe mey a…óaw daa saba. Njam daa mees…ômey. Maaya na, ka diyam fa mey fa mey daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay, ka v…ôlmatar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay mekele da wuzlah akwar, ka c…ômam …óay, ka njam daa zazay. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay ndaw ma wu…óa ndaw, ndaw ma njadata nd…ôhay daa zazay, a n…ôkfakwar dey la may.
13.12: Cam har da wuzlah akwar c…ôpa pal pal, anda akwar m…ôlmaŇč hay. Yaw, nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu c…ôpa fe…óe a camakwar har may.
13.13: Anja maaya Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu *K…ôriste Ňčga njey ta akwar, anja mewu…óey-vaw Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga njey ta akwar, asaya, anja *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga c…ômkwar ray tabiya.

1.1: Ara yah, Pawl, ma wuzlalakwara leeter ke…óe. Yah *ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga *Yesu *K…ôriste. Ara ndaw ma walaya Ňčga key ndaw-mesl…ôrey a ba, asaya, ara nd…ôhay ma sl…ôrdamiwa ba. Ma pamaya Ňčga ndaw-mesl…ôrey na, ara Yesu K…ôriste he ta ray aŇčga leŇč *Gazlavay PapaŇč ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa Yesu a daa mem…ôcey.
1.2: Ala mac…ômtakaya ta m…ôlma al…ôkwa hay siya fe…óe, ya camakwar har, akwar nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga Yesu daa hwayak Ňčga Galati.
1.3: Anja Papa al…ôkwa, Bay Gazlavay, ta Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste Ňčga p…ôsmakwar mey, asaya, Ňčga njadamakwar daa zazay.
1.4: K…ôriste ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la maja meb…ôrey al…ôkwa, amba a l…ôhdandakwar da b…ôla masa maaya ba ke…óe. K…ôriste he ma ka anda ke…óe na, a key a nar ray a mey masa Gazlavay Papa al…ôkwa ma wu…óey.
1.5: Anja nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôlmamara Gazlavay Ňčga s…ôrmataw. *Amen. Mey da ray Mey-maaya-mawiya
1.6: Gazlavay ma z…ôlkwar amba ka s…ôpmara na, menjey a ga daa ba. A z…ôlkwar na, maja aa ma s…ôrey dey-ceceh fa akwar ta fa mewu…óey-vaw Ňčga *K…ôriste. Wure ke…óe, akwar fa mb…ôkdamara Gazlavay a, akwar fa t…ô…ďam *Mey-maaya-mawiya mekele. Ya fa r…ôzley ga da ray akwar maja.
1.7: Fara fara Mey-maaya-mawiya mekele na, daa ba. Ama nd…ôhay mekele daha fa h…ô…ďmakwar ray. A wu…óam Ňčga n…ôsmara Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga K…ôriste.
1.8: Ala ta wuzdamakwara Mey-maaya-mawiya ha la. Anda ke…óe, da ndaw mekele, kwa ala, kwa maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó, a wuzkwar Mey-maaya-mawiya mekele wal na, anja Gazlavay Ňčga n…ôsa.
1.9: Ala ta kadamakwara la, ama ya kadakwara wure ke…óe saya. Da ndaw a wuzkwar Mey-maaya-mawiya mekele wal ta masa akwar ma t…ô…ďmara ke…óe na, anja Gazlavay Ňčga n…ôsa ndaw aha.
1.10: Yaw, wure ke…óe ka wulkam na, ya fa s…ôpey amba nd…ôhay aa h…ômdamaya daw? Kay, k…ône ba! Ya s…ôpey na, amba Gazlavay aa h…ômdaya. Asaya, ka wulkam ya fa s…ôpey amba ya mbafatar a nd…ôhay daw? Kay, k…ône ba, maja da ya fa s…ôpey amba ya mbafatar a nd…ôhay c…ôŇčga na, anja Ňčgene, ya fa da key ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga K…ôriste daa ba. Pawl a t…ôrey ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu na, kwara?
1.11: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya wu…óey ka s…ôrmara *Mey-maaya-mawiya masa yah ma wuzdakwara na, ara mewulkey Ňčga nd…ôhay ba.
1.12: Mey a na, ara ndaw ma kadiwa ba, ara ndaw maa s…ôrkadiwa ba, ama ara Yesu *K…ôriste ma wuzdiwa mey a.
1.13: Akwar ta c…ôndamara mey da ray menjey a…óaw zleezle la, daa masa ya fa s…ôpey kwakwas Ňčga *J…ôwif hay. Daa Ňčgene, ya ta s…ôrdata banay la ga kalah ta nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga Yesu. Ya ta wu…óey la Ňčgaa z…ô…ódata c…ôpa.
1.14: Ya ta nar ray la a kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay ma f…ônta J…ôwif hay mekele masa mandala a…óaw hay. Ya ta v…ôlda mevel a…óaw la c…ôpa a kwakwas Ňčga papaŇč Ňčga papa ala hay zleezle.
1.15: Ama Gazlavay ta s…ôrfaya dey-ceceh la, ta walaya sem d…ôga ya ta yawa daa ba araŇč, ta z…ôlya la amba ya t…ôrey ndaw ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga maja a mbafar.
1.16: Gazlavay ta wuryawa dey la, ta wuzdiwa B…ôzey aŇčga la amba ya wuzdatara Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray a, a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay. Daa Ňčgene, kwa ya taa c…ôf…óey ndaw Ňčga slaya yawa daa ba.
1.17: Asaya, ya ta daw a *Jeruzelem Ňčga j…ôkey sl…ômay fa nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu masa Ňčgeeme daa ba may. Ama wure wure Ňčgene, ya ta daw la aa hwayak Ňčga Arap hay. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, ya v…ôhwa aa berney Ňčga Damas.
1.18: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mevey maakar na, ya ta daw la aa berney Ňčga Jeruzelem amba ya camawa ray ta *Piyer, ya s…ôrmawa vaw. Ya njamawa cew e luma cew gway.
1.19: Fete…óe, ya ta h…ôtey *ndaw-mesl…ôrey mekele daa ba, si *Jak, m…ôlmaŇč Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura gway.
1.20: Mey masa yah ma wuzlalakwara ke…óe na, ara mey fara fara. Gazlavay a s…ôra a key ya mb…ôrzley ba.
1.21: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, ya daw aa hwayak Ňčga Siri ta Ňčga Silisi.
1.22: Maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga K…ôriste daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude ta h…ôtmaya ta dey ata daa ba.
1.23: Ama ata fa c…ônam mey masa nd…ôhay mekele maa guzlam da ray a…óaw ma l…ôvam: ¬ęNdaw ma s…ôrdandakwar banay zleezle heyey na, wure ke…óe fa wuzda Mey-maaya-mawiya masa aa ma wu…óey Ňčga n…ôsa heyey.¬Ľ
1.24: Ta‚Äô, nd…ôhay a, a h…ôlmamara Gazlavay maja yah.

2.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mevey kuraw a ray a m…ôfa…ó, ta‚Äô, ya diyam ta *Barnabas a *Jeruzelem saya. Ya ta Ňčg…ôla Tit la may.
2.2: Yah ma daw a Jeruzelem e na, maja Gazlavay ma l…ôvya, maaya na, ya daw. Fete…óe, ala ta gucam la ta cakay ta *bay-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu. Ya ta kadatara mey da ray *Mey-maaya-mawiya masa yah ma wuzdatara a nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba la, maja ya wu…óey sl…ôra a…óaw masa yah ma ka ta masa ya fa ka wure ke…óe a t…ôrey Ňčga cek Ňčga tede ba.
2.3: Tit masa ma l…ôgdaya na, ara ndaw G…ôrek. Ama kwa ta t…ôkmar …óay Ňčga sley mandawal anda J…ôwif hay na, daa ba.
2.4: Ama nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu fara fara ba ta samawa la a wuzlah ala, a wu…óam Ňčga t…ôkmar …óay a Tit e Ňčga sley mandawal. Nd…ôhay a, a samawa a wuzlah ala na, ta mayal a, amba a saŇčgalamandar da ala fa wam ray ala maja ala mac…ômkaya ta Yesu *K…ôriste kwa. A wu…óam Ňčga t…ôrdamandar beke hay Ňčga kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay c…ôŇčga.
2.5: Ala ta t…ô…ďmatara mey ata kwa Ňčga menjey nek…ô…óey daa ba s…ôlak. Mey-maaya-mawiya masa fara fara ke…óe na, ya wu…óam a n…ôsmara ba, amba a njey Ňčga mey masa fara fara Ňčgada akwar.
2.6: Daa masa ya fa kadatara mey da ray Mey-maaya-mawiya masa yah ma wuzdatara a nd…ôhay na, bay-ray hay heyey masa ata ma z…ôlmata mahura hay ta pam mey mekele a ray Mey-maaya-mawiya ha daa ba. Yaw, da ata mahura hay, da ata mahura hay ba, Ňčgada yah na, ara cek Ňčga tede, maja fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, nd…ôhay tabiya ata letek.
2.7: Ama sas…ôkar jak, a s…ôrmara Gazlavay ta v…ôlya sl…ôra la Ňčga wuzey Mey-maaya-mawiya anda aa ma v…ôldara Ňčgada *Piyer. Ňägada yah na, a l…ôvya Ňčga wuzey Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay, Ňčgada Piyer may, a l…ôvar Ňčga wuzey Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay.
2.8: Yaw, ara Gazlavay ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč a Piyer Ňčga t…ôrey *ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu Ňčgada fa J…ôwif hay. Ara Gazlavay a ma v…ôlya g…ôdaŇč Ňčga t…ôrey ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu Ňčgada fa nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay may.
2.9: Ata *Jak ta Piyer leŇč *JaŇč masa nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu ma z…ôlmata bay-ray ata hay na, a s…ôrmara Gazlavay ta v…ôldiwa sl…ôra ke…óe la fara fara Ňčga key maja maaya aŇčga. Maja Ňčgene, a gagazamandar har Ňčgada ala ta Barnabas, anda mel…ôvey, mey ala ta ata letek. Ala ta wulkam la daa slam a ta ata amba ala ta Barnabas ya diyam Ňčga wuzdamatara Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay. Ata may, a diyam a wuzdamatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay.
2.10: Aa c…ôf…óamandar na, cek pal gway. Ara Ňčga j…ôney masa-viya hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da Jeruzelem. Ara cek masa yah ma ka ta mevel a…óaw c…ôpa. Mey da ray ata Piyer ta Pawl daa berney Ňčga Antiyaws
2.11: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, *Piyer a sawa aa berney Ňčga Antiyaws daa hwayak Ňčga Siri. Ya ta mb…ô…óar ray la maja aa ma key cek maaya ba.
2.12: Yaw, daa masa Piyer ma wuswa a Antiyaws na, aa fa z…ômey …óaf ta nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay. Ama fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay masa da cakay *Jak ma wusmawa na, Piyer a mb…ôkda mez…ômey …óaf ta nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba ha, a Ňčg…ôchey ta cakay. A ka anda ke…óe na, maja a zlurey ta J…ôwif hay ma l…ôvam si nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba tabiya a slam mandawal.
2.13: Anda ke…óe, Piyer na, ara ndaw masa ta neneh cew. Nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay mekele ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu ta t…ôram nd…ôhay masa ta neneh cew la anda Piyer e may. Kwa *Barnabas ta ray aŇčga ta t…ôrey ndaw masa ta neneh cew sem anda ata may.
2.14: Daa masa yah ma h…ôtatar ata fa n…ôsmara *Mey-maaya-mawiya masa fara fara daa menjey ata Ňčgene na, ta‚Äô, yaa guzlar Ňčgada Piyer fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya: ¬ęKah ndaw J…ôwif, ama ka ta s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay na, daa ba. Ka ta key cek la anda nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba ma kamara. Anda ke…óe, ka l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba Ňčga s…ôpey kwakwas Ňčga J…ôwif hay na, maja me?¬Ľ Ndaw a t…ôrey maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, kwara?
2.15: Ala na, *J…ôwif hay fara fara ma yey ta yey. Ala na, wal ta nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway hay mekele. Nd…ôhay a na, fa s…ôpmara *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daa ba, ata nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey.
2.16: Ama ya s…ôrmara ndaw aa maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maja aa fa s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, k…ône ba, si aa fa pa Yesu Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Ala may, ya ta pamara Yesu *K…ôriste he la Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara amba ya t…ôram nd…ôhay maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Ala maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, maja ala fa s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daa ba, ama maja ala fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga K…ôriste. Mes…ôpey kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, a t…ôrda ndaw maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba s…ôlak.
2.17: Ala J…ôwif hay ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu na, ala fa pamara K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara amba ya t…ôram nd…ôhay maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Daa masa ala fa pamara K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara na, a padamandar Ňčga nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey maja ala fa s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daa saba. Da anda ke…óe na, K…ôriste fa mb…ôzdandar aa meb…ôrey daw? Kay, k…ône ba s…ôlak.
2.18: Da ndaw a mb…ôkda meney ray a kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz maja a s…ôra fa da j…ôna daa ba, ama fa d…ô…ďa ha, a v…ôhwa Ňčga nar ray c…ôŇčga na, anda ke…óe, ndaw aha ta key meb…ôrey sem.
2.19: Daa mes…ôpey kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, ya ta t…ôrey la anda ndaw mam…ôckaya. Anda mel…ôvey, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, ara cek Ňčga tede Ňčgada yah. Ara kwakwas a ma t…ôrdaya anda ndaw mam…ôckaya amba ya njey ta dey Ňčga kar sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay. Daa masa ata ma d…ôrmara K…ôriste fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya Ňčga m…ôcey na, ara anda a d…ôram na, yah, Ňčga m…ôcey may.
2.20: Anda mel…ôvey, menjey a…óaw masa anda zleezle na, daa saba, ama wure ke…óe K…ôriste aa ta yah. Maja Ňčgene, cek hay tabiya masa yah ma kata daa masa yah ta dey da b…ôla ke…óe na, ya kata ta meney ray a B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay. A wu…óya kalah, a v…ôlda heter aŇčga Ňčga m…ôcey maja yah.
2.21: Gazlavay a pandakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga na, ara maja al…ôkwa fa s…ôpkwa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ba, ama ara maja dey-ceceh aŇčga gway. Ya fa da r…ôsa maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a ke…óe daa ba. Da ndaw a gwa Ňčga t…ôrey maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maja aa fa s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, anja Ňčgene na, mem…ôcey Ňčga K…ôriste ara cek Ňčga tede.

3.1: Akwar Galat hay na, manjar leŇčgesl. Ta wuzdamakwara mey da ray mem…ôcey Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya la maaya maaya fa mey akwar tabiya, ba diya? Kaa ma batakwar na, wa?
3.2: Ya wu…óey Ňčgaa c…ôf…óakwar mey pal. Gazlavay ta v…ôlkwar Mes…ôfney aŇčga la. A v…ôldakwara na, maja akwar ma s…ôpmara *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daw? Kay, k…ône ba. Aa ma v…ôldakwara na, maja akwar ma j…ôkam sl…ômay fa *Mey-maaya-mawiya, asaya, maja akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey a, aa mevel akwar.
3.3: Daa masa akwar ma zlamar Ňčga s…ôpey c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu, ka s…ôpmara na, ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, ba diya? Kaa wure ke…óe, ka mb…ôkdamara Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a, ka kam sl…ôra ta g…ôdaŇč akwar daada na, maja me? Akwar nd…ôhay manjar leŇčgesl anda ke…óe na, kwara?
3.4: Akwar ta s…ôram banay la ga amba ka t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu. Mes…ôrey banay akwar a Ňčgene na, ara cek Ňčga tede daw? Anja Ňčga t…ôrey Ňčga cek Ňčga tede ba.
3.5: Yaw, Gazlavay a v…ôlkwar Mes…ôfney aŇčga na, maja akwar ma s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daw? Kay, k…ône ba. Gazlavay a key maazla hay da wuzlah akwar na, maja akwar ma s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz daw? Kay, k…ône ba. Ama Gazlavay a v…ôlkwar Mes…ôfney aŇčga, a key maazla hay da wuzlah akwar na, maja akwar ma j…ôkam sl…ômay fa Mey-maaya-mawiya ta akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey a, aa mevel akwar.
3.6: Wulkam da ray *Ab…ôraham taw, mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAb…ôraham a pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ma pa Ňčga ndaw maaya.¬Ľ
3.7: Anda ke…óe na, s…ôrmara, nd…ôhay ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara na, ara b…ôza hay Ňčga Ab…ôraham fara fara.
3.8: Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle da ray cek ma da key, a l…ôvey Gazlavay a t…ôrdata nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga. A ka anda ke…óe na, maja ata ma pamara Gazlavay a Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Mey maaya ke…óe na, Gazlavay taa guzldara la d…ôga zleezle a Ab…ôraham, a l…ôvar: ¬ęNd…ôhay daa s…ôkway hay tabiya a h…ôtam mep…ôsey-mey a…óaw la ta fa kah.¬Ľ
3.9: Ab…ôraham ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara, maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ta p…ôsar mey la. Yaw, nd…ôhay tabiya masa ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara na, Gazlavay ta p…ôstar mey la may anda Ab…ôraham a.
3.10: Nd…ôhay tabiya ma wulkam ata maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maja ata fa s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, Gazlavay a n…ôsta la. Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey: ¬ęKwa waawa ma s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz tabiya masa mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay mandaw mandaw ba na, Gazlavay a n…ôsa la.¬Ľ
3.11: Fara fara, ndaw fa da t…ôrey maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maja aŇčga fa s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, daa ba. Yaa guzley anda ke…óe na, maja mey Ňčga Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ¬ęNdaw masa maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ara ndaw ma pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Anda ke…óe, a h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba la.¬Ľ
3.12: Ama mawuzlalakaya saya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKwa waawa ma s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz mandaw mandaw, ma r…ôsa ba s…ôlak na, a h…ôtey heter la.¬Ľ Mey a, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey, mes…ôpey kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, ara cek wal ta mepey Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw fara fara.
3.13: Yaw, Gazlavay ta n…ôsndakwar sem maja al…ôkwa fa s…ôpkwa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta c…ôve…ó e daa ba. Ama K…ôriste ta sawa la a b…ôla, ta la men…ôsey al…ôkwa sem a ray aŇčga amba a l…ôhdandakwar daa men…ôsey a. Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęNdaw masa ata ma l…ôwmara fa hwadam na, Gazlavay ta n…ôsa sem.¬Ľ
3.14: Yesu K…ôriste a ka cek aha anda ke…óe na, amba Gazlavay a p…ôstar mey a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba, letek anda Gazlavay ma p…ôsar mey a Ab…ôraham heyey. Asaya, kwa waawa ma pa K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara na, a h…ôtey Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay la masa aa ma l…ôvey zleezle a da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay heyey. Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, a gwa Ňčgaa v…ôsa mey masa Gazlavay ma j…ôwa daw?
3.15: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya wu…óey ya wakwara mey masa Gazlavay ma j…ôwa ta cek ma key mandaw mandaw daa menjey al…ôkwa. Yaw, da nd…ôhay cew, a j…ôwam mey ta c…ôve…ó e fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay na, kwa ndaw a gwa Ňčgaa v…ôsa mey a ba, kwa ndaw a gwa Ňčga pey a dey a ba.
3.16: Fara fara, Gazlavay ta l…ôvar la a *Ab…ôraham a da p…ôsar mey Ňčgada aŇčga ta Ňčgada b…ôzey ma da yawa da hwa…ó aŇčga. Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, ta l…ôvey Ňčgada b…ôza hay ma da yamawa da hwa…ó aŇčga c…ôpa na, daa ba. Anda mel…ôvey, nd…ôhay ga ba. Ama aa guzley na, da ray b…ôzey da hwa…ó aŇčga pal letek gway, anda mel…ôvey *K…ôriste.
3.17: Ehe, mabara Ňčga mey masa yah ma wu…óey Ňčgaa guzldakwara ha: Gazlavay ta j…ôwey mey la ta Ab…ôraham, asaya, ta ka la amba mey ata maj…ôwkaya ha a p…ôskey ba. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mevey temere m…ôfa…ó ta kwakwar maakar na, Gazlavay a wuztar *mewey aŇčga a *J…ôwif hay amba a s…ôpmara. Mewey a, fa da p…ôska *mej…ôwey-mey Ňčga ata Gazlavay ta Ab…ôraham daa ba, fa da n…ôsa mej…ôwey-mey a daa ba may.
3.18: Yaw, da Gazlavay a p…ôskwar mey la maja akwar ma s…ôpmara *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, anja Ňčgene ara mep…ôsey-mey masa aŇčga mel…ôvey heyey saba. Ama a da p…ôskwar mey na, maja aŇčga ma l…ôvey a p…ôskwar mey la. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a kar maaya a Ab…ôraham na, maja aa ma l…ôvey a kara la.
3.19: Da anda ke…óe na, Gazlavay a wuzdatara mewey a, a J…ôwif hay na, maja me? Gazlavay a wuzdatara mewey a na, amba nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara cek maaya ba masa ata ma kamara. Gazlavay a wuzdatara mewey a na, Ňčga njey nek…ô…óey haa kasl masawa Ňčga b…ôzey da hwa…ó Ab…ôraham heyey. Ara b…ôzey masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvar a Ab…ôraham a da p…ôsar mey heyey. Gazlavay ta wuzd…ôrwa kwakwas a la ta fa maslaŇč aŇčga hay da va…ó. MaslaŇč aŇčga hay a ta wuzdam…ôrwa la ta fa ndaw ma c…ômtar …óay a nd…ôhay ta Gazlavay .
3.20: Ndaw ma c…ôma …óay na, a …óiyey mey da wuzlah nd…ôhay cew. Ama daa masa Gazlavay ma j…ôwey mey ta Ab…ôraham na, ara aŇčga pal taava aŇčga ma ka gway, ndaw ma c…ômtar …óay na, daa ba. Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a j…ônta nd…ôhay na, kwara?
3.21: *Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, aa guzley wal ta mey daa *mej…ôwey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay daw? Kay, k…ône ba! Da fara fara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a v…ôltar heter mawiya a nd…ôhay na, anja Gazlavay a pata nd…ôhay Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga la ta fa kwakwas a may.
3.22: Ama mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay na, nd…ôhay tabiya da b…ôla, meb…ôrey fa wey da ray ata. Ara anda ke…óe amba Gazlavay a v…ôldatara cek masa aa ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste. A v…ôldatara na, maja ata fa pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara.
3.23: Zleezle daa masa ala nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga K…ôriste daa ba araŇč na, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta j…ô…óndar la anda nd…ôhay daa f…ôrs…ône haa kasl Gazlavay ma wuzdandara c…ôve…ó Ňčga t…ô…ďey mey Ňčga K…ôriste.
3.24: Ara anda ke…óe, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma j…ô…óndar haa kasl masawa Ňčga K…ôriste a b…ôla. A sawa na, amba ya t…ôram nd…ôhay maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, maja ala ma pamara K…ôriste he Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara.
3.25: Wure ke…óe na, ala fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga K…ôriste, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz fa da j…ô…óndar daa saba.
3.26: Akwar tabiya b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay maja akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste, anda mel…ôvey, akwar mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste.
3.27: Akwar ta h…ôtam *baptem la, maja Ňčgene, akwar mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste. Wure ke…óe, akwar ta t…ôram sem anda K…ôriste he ta ray aŇčga.
3.28: Wure ke…óe, nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ta nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba na, ata letek fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Kwa beke hay ta nd…ôhay ma wam ray ata, kwa zel hay ta Ňčgusay, ata letek fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Anda mel…ôvey, akwar tabiya, akwar letek fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste.
3.29: Yaw, da akwar nd…ôhay Ňčga K…ôriste na, anda ke…óe, akwar b…ôza hay ma yamawa da hwa…ó *Ab…ôraham may. Maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay a da p…ôskwar mey anda aa ma l…ôvey a da p…ôsar mey Ňčgada Ab…ôraham ta Ňčgada b…ôza hay da hwa…ó aŇčga heyey.

4.1: Ehe, ya wu…óey Ňčgaa guzlkwar saya: wulkam da ray b…ôzey ma da wa zleley Ňčga papaha taw. Daa masa aŇčga b…ôzey …óagay na, kwa zleley tabiya masa mapakaya Ňčgada aŇčga na, a gwa a wa ba araŇč, aŇčga anda beke.
4.2: Daa Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a n…ôkfamar dey, asaya, a n…ôkfamar dey fa cek aŇčga hay may. A n…ôkfamar dey na, haa kasl pas masa papaha ma l…ôvey b…ôzey a ta g…ôley cay.
4.3: Al…ôkwa na, anda b…ôzey a may. Daa masa al…ôkwa ma s…ôrkwa cek masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey fara fara daa ba araŇč na, al…ôkwa beke hay Ňčga cek hay mekele mekele masa nd…ôhay ma namatar ray da b…ôla ke…óe.
4.4: Ama daa masa Gazlavay ma wusd…ôrwa …óar a cay na, ta‚Äô, a sl…ôrd…ôrwa b…ôzey aŇčga a b…ôla. B…ôzey a, a t…ôrey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč, a yawa da hwa…ó Ňčgwas. Ta s…ôpa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz la.
4.5: Gazlavay a ka anda ke…óe na, amba b…ôzey aŇčga ha a l…ôhdata nd…ôhay ma s…ôpmara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a, asaya, amba Gazlavay a, a t…ôrdandakwar Ňčga b…ôz aŇčga hay.
4.6: Ahaw, akwar na, b…ôz aŇčga hay fara fara. Ya s…ôrkwa maja Gazlavay ta sl…ôrwa Mes…ôfney Ňčga B…ôzey aŇčga la a ray al…ôkwa tabiya. Ara Mes…ôfney a, ma mb…ôzey aa al…ôkwa amba ya z…ôlkwa Gazlavay ¬ęAba,¬Ľ anda mel…ôvey, Papay.
4.7: Yaw, maja cek hay tabiya masa Gazlavay ma kakwara ke…óe na, akwar beke hay saba, ama akwar b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay. Asaya, maja akwar b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay a da v…ôlkwar cek hay maaya tabiya masa aa ma …óiytara Ňčgada b…ôz aŇčga hay. Menjey Ňčga Galat hay a h…ô…ďar ray a Pawl
4.8: Zleezle, daa masa akwar ma s…ôrmara mey fara fara da ray Gazlavay daa ba araŇč na, akwar beke hay, akwar fa nam ray Ňčgada mes…ôfney hay ma samawa ta fa Gazlavay ba.
4.9: Ama wure ke…óe, ka s…ôrmara mey fara fara da ray Gazlavay, Ňčgama ya l…ôvey, Gazlavay a s…ôrkwar fara fara. Kaa, ka v…ôham Ňčga s…ôpey mes…ôfney hay a, kwara d…ô…ďa wura? Ara cek hay masa-b…ôle, a gwamara Ňčga j…ônmakwar ba. Ka wu…óam Ňčga t…ôrey beke ata hay saya na, maja me?
4.10: Akwar fa walam …óar hay mekele ma f…ônta siya hay, asaya, akwar fa walam kiya hay, ta gwagway hay leŇč mevey hay ma f…ônta siya hay Ňčga key kwakwas.
4.11: Ray a…óaw fa h…ô…ďey fa menjey akwar, maja sl…ôra a…óaw masa yah ma ka da wuzlah akwar a da t…ôrey Ňčga cek Ňčga tede kwa.
4.12: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya fa kakwar ambahw, t…ôram anda yah, beke Ňčga *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz saba, maja ya ta t…ôrey la anda akwar nd…ôhay masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay. Zleezle na, akwar ta kamaya cek maaya ba daa ba.
4.13: Akwar fa s…ôrfadamara yah ma wuzdakwara *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčgeeme na, maja vaw fa caya.
4.14: Daa Ňčgene, macay a…óaw a, ta s…ôrdakwar banay la. Ama kwa akwar ta r…ôsmaya daa ba, akwar ta …ď…ôldamaya mey daa ba. Sas…ôkar jak, akwar ta t…ô…ďmaya la anda yah na, *maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó, da daa ba, anda yah na, Yesu *K…ôriste.
4.15: Daa Ňčgene, akwar ta mees…ômey ga, ama wure ke…óe, kaa s…ômam saba na, kwara? Ya s…ôra fara fara daa Ňčgene anja da ka gwamara na, akwar ta wuzlkamat…ôrwa dey akwar hay la Ňčgada yah.
4.16: Kaa wure ke…óe, ya ta t…ôrey masa-g…ôra akwar sem maja ya faa guzlkwar mey fara fara daw?
4.17: Nd…ôhay ma wu…óam amba ka s…ôpam kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz heyey na, fa …óa…óamakwar amba mewulkey akwar a t…ôrey anda Ňčga ata. Ama a kamara anda Ňčgene na, Ňčga n…ôskwar, ba na, Ňčga …óiykwar ba. A wu…óam ka wu…ókam ta yah, ka mb…ôkdamaya, ka t…ô…ďam mewulkey ata.
4.18: Da nd…ôhay a c…ômam …óay ta akwar Ňčga key cek maaya na, Ňčgene, ara cek maaya mandaw mandaw, kwa daa masa yah da wuzlah akwar, kwa daa masa yah da wuzlah akwar daa ba.
4.19: Akwar masa anda b…ôz a…óaw hay, ya fa s…ôrey banay maja akwar saya. Mes…ôrey banay a…óaw a na, anda hwa…ó ma car Ňčgada Ňčgwas ma da yey. Ya da s…ôrey banay a haa kasl mewulkey akwar ma t…ôrey anda Ňčga K…ôriste.
4.20: Ya wu…óey Ňčga daw Ňčga njey ta akwar wure ke…óe amba ya slakwar yawa. Fara fara, ray a…óaw fa h…ô…ďey, maja ya s…ôra cek masa yah ma da kakwara ba. Mey da ray b…ôza hay cew Ňčga Ab…ôraham
4.21: Akwar nd…ôhay ma wu…óam Ňčga ney ray a *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz, ya wu…óey Ňčgaa c…ôf…óakwar: akwar ta c…ôndamara kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz maa guzley na, daa ba daw?
4.22: Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey na, *Ab…ôraham aŇčga ta b…ôza hay cew. B…ôzey laŇčgar na, ara Ňčgwas beke mez…ôley Agar ma yarawa. B…ôzey laŇčgar may, ara Ňčgwas masa beke ba mez…ôley Sara ma yarawa.
4.23: B…ôzey ma yawa ta Ňčgwas beke na, a yawa ta fa mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč. Ama b…ôzey ma yawa ta Ňčgwas masa beke ba na, a yawa maja Gazlavay ma l…ôvar a Ab…ôraham a da v…ôlar b…ôzey.
4.24: Ya gwa ya wata Ňčgusay cew ke…óe ta *mej…ôwey-mey hay cew masa Gazlavay ma j…ôwa ta nd…ôhay. Agar Ňčgwas beke na, a wuzwa mej…ôwey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta *Mawiz daa aŇčgwa Ňčga Sinay zleezle. B…ôza hay masa Agar ma yat…ôrwa a t…ôram beke anda aŇčga.
4.25: Agar a na, mapakaya anda mej…ôwey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa aa ma j…ôwa daa aŇčgwa Ňčga Sinay daa hwayak Ňčga Arap hay heyey. Aa mapakaya saya anda berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem wure ke…óe, maja nd…ôhay daa berney a, ata beke Ňčga kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz.
4.26: Ama Jeruzelem masa da gazlavay da va…ó na, aŇčga anda Sara, Ňčgwas masa beke ba. Ara aŇčga mama al…ôkwa.
4.27: Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey: ¬ęSes…ômey Jeruzelem, kah anda Ňčgwas-d…ôrlay masa ta yey b…ôzey daa ba. Wudey ta mees…ômey, kah anda Ňčgwas masa hwa…ó ta car Ňčga mayawa b…ôzey daa ba, Maja Ňčgwas-d…ôrlay masa zel e a wu…óa saba na, a da h…ôtey b…ôza hay ga ma f…ôna Ňčga Ňčgwas ta zel e.¬Ľ
4.28: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, akwar na, b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay anda *Izak, b…ôzey Ňčga Ňčgwas masa beke ba masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey zleezle a da v…ôldara a Ab…ôraham heyey.
4.29: Daa Ňčgene, b…ôzey ma yawa ta fa mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč na, fa s…ôrda banay ta b…ôzey masa ma yawa ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay. Wure ke…óe, nd…ôhay fa kamara k…ône may.
4.30: Ama mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey na, kwara? A l…ôvey na: ¬ę∆Ā…ôla Ňčgwas beke la ta b…ôzey aŇčga. B…ôzey Ňčga Ňčgwas masa beke ba na, a da z…ôma way Ňčga papaha tabiya, ama b…ôzey Ňčga Ňčgwas beke na, kwa fa da z…ômey cek Ňčga papaha daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
4.31: Yaw, Ňčgwas beke na, al…ôkwa b…ôz aŇčga hay ba, ama al…ôkwa b…ôza hay Ňčga Ňčgwas masa beke ba ma yamawa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay.

5.1: *K…ôriste ta p…ôskandakurwa sem dasi har Ňčga *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz amba ya wakwa ray al…ôkwa fara fara. Da ray Ňčgene, kam g…ôdaŇč, wam ray akwar, ka da v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó a ndaw Ňčga t…ôrdakwar beke Ňčga kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz saba.
5.2: J…ôkfamaya sl…ômay, yah Pawl, ya faa guzlkwar, da ka slam mandawal amba ka s…ôpam kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz saya na, Ňčgene, cek masa K…ôriste ma ka Ňčgada akwar na, ara cek Ňčga tede.
5.3: Yaw, ya fa k…ôtkwar saya, kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďa Ňčga sla mandawal na, si a s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a tabiya, kwa a mb…ôkey kwakwas a pal ba.
5.4: Da akwar fa s…ôpam Ňčga t…ôrey maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta fa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, Ňčgene, ka ta wu…ókam sem ta K…ôriste. Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akwar daa ba s…ôlak.
5.5: Ala na, ya s…ôrmara Gazlavay a pandar Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya la fa mey aŇčga maja ala fa pamara K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara. Ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ala fa s…ôkwmara amba Gazlavay a pandar Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga ha.
5.6: Yaw, Ňčgada ndaw mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste na, ta sla mandawal la, kwa ta sla daa ba na, fa da mb…ô…óey cek fa aŇčga daa ba. Cek mahura na, ara mepey Yesu K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw fara fara ta mewu…óey nd…ôhay mekele.
5.7: Zleezle na, akwar fa kam g…ôdaŇč Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu. Kaa wure ke…óe, ma t…ôkakwar Ňčga s…ôpa mey masa fara fara na, wa d…ô…ďa wa?
5.8: Mey hay masa nd…ôhay maa guzldamara Ňčga batakwar na, mey hay a, ara mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay ba, maja ara Gazlavay a ma walakwar.
5.9: Mey hay maaya ba Ňčgene a da z…ôvey fa mey fa mey, anda cek ma h…ôsla hapa Ňčga makala na, aŇčga kuset k…ô…óey, ama a h…ôsla hapa Ňčga makala ma…óakaya c…ôpa.
5.10: Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ya s…ôra mewulkey akwar na, fa da key wal ta Ňčga yah daa ba, maja al…ôkwa tabiya mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste. Ndaw masa ma h…ô…ďkwar ray na, kwa da ara waawa na, Gazlavay a kar sariya la.
5.11: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, nd…ôhay fa mb…ôrzlafamaya, a l…ôvam ya fa wuzey mey, ya l…ôvey si nd…ôhay a slam mandawal c…ôŇčga. Kaa da anda ke…óe na, a s…ôrdamaya banay maja me d…ô…ďa me? Nd…ôhay fa s…ôrdamaya banay c…ôŇčga ke…óe na, a wuzwa fara fara yaa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay amba a l…ôham na, si ta fa mem…ôcey Ňčga K…ôriste fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya gway.
5.12: Nd…ôhay ma h…ô…ďmakwar ray da ray *mesley mandawal na, anja Ňčga njam anda g…ônaw hay maaŇčgwa…óatakaya.
5.13: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, Gazlavay a z…ôlkwar na, amba ka t…ôram nd…ôhay ma wam ray ata. Ama mewey ray akwar aha na, ta v…ôlkwar c…ôve…ó Ňčga key cek hay maaya ba ma bawa daa mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč na, daa ba. Sas…ôkar jak, wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar, asaya, j…ônam vaw da wuzlah akwar.
5.14: Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz c…ôpa na, mac…ômkaya tabiya daa mewey pal ma l…ôvey: ¬ęSi ka wu…óa meseembew akah anda kah ma wu…óa ray akah.¬Ľ
5.15: Ama da akwar fa zam vaw da wuzlah akwar, asaya, akwar fa z…ômam vaw da wuzlah akwar anda g…ônaw hay masa-h…ôma na, si ka pam leŇčgesl, ka mb…ôkdamara cek hay a Ňčgene, da daa ba na, ka daa z…ô…óam ray akwar. Mey da ray mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ta sl…ôra Ňčga Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay
5.16: Ehe, j…ôkam sl…ômay, ya fa l…ôvkwar, v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó a *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga wey da ray akwar. Anda ke…óe, akwar fa da kam cek hay maaya ba ma bawa daa mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč na, daa saba.
5.17: Cek hay maaya ba masa mevel Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma wu…óey Ňčga ka na, ata wal ta cek hay masa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wu…óey ya kakwa. Asaya, cek hay masa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wu…óey ya kakwa na, ata wal ta cek hay masa mevel Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma wu…óey Ňčga ka. Cek hay a na, ata wal wal, a c…ômam ba. Ara maja Ňčgene, ka gwamara Ňčga key cek mandaw mandaw anda akwar ma wu…óam ba.
5.18: Ama da Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay fa wey da ray akwar na, Ňčgene *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz fa da wey da ray akwar daa saba.
5.19: Ya s…ôrkwa fara fara, cek hay masa mevel Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma wu…óey Ňčga ka na, ara meley-vaw saw, mewulkey mandaw mandaw da ray cek hay ma n…ôsa ndaw, leŇč mekey cek hay ma ka hwaray.
5.20: Asaya, cek hay masa mevel Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma wu…óey Ňčga ka na, ara meney ray a kuley hay, mekey maazla hay maaya ba, mer…ôsey vaw, mewu…ókey …óay, mekey s…ôleŇč, mecey-mevel kalah, mes…ôpey Ňčga f…ôney ndaw mekele, meweley vaw ta weley, leŇč mewu…ókey …óay ta nd…ôhay mekele.
5.21: Yaw, cek hay masa mevel Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma wu…óey Ňčga ka na, mekele daha saya, ara mekey maagway fa cek Ňčga ndaw, mewey ta wuzam, mekusey daa slam a Ňčga key cek hay malamba leŇč mekey cek hay mekele mekele masa malamba anda ke…óe hay. Ya ta k…ôtkwar la, ama wure ke…óe, ya k…ôtkwar saya, nd…ôhay ma kam cek anda ke…óe hay na, fa da njam da wuzlah nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray ata na, daa ba.
5.22: Ama da Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay fa wey da ray ndaw na, ndaw a, a key sl…ôra maaya, aŇčga anda wudez ta slaslalay maaya ma yey bab…ôza. Cek hay maaya ma sawa ta fa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, ara mewu…óey-vaw, mees…ômey, zazay, me…ď…ôsey banay, mes…ôrey dey-ceceh fa ndaw, mekey maaya, mekey cek ta c…ôve…ó e mandaw mandaw,
5.23: met…ôrey Ňčga ndaw meekwe…ó-mey, leŇč mewey vaw fa mekey cek hay saw. Yaw, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, a t…ôkta nd…ôhay Ňčga key cek hay anda ke…óe ba.
5.24: Nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste na, ta mb…ôkdamara cek hay maaya ba masa ata ma wu…óam Ňčga kamara sem. A mb…ôkdamara na, ara anda a d…ôrmata cek hay maaya ba ha fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya.
5.25: Ara Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôlndakwar menjey mawiya. Da ray Ňčgene, v…ôlkwar c…ôve…ó a Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a Ňčga wey da ray al…ôkwa.
5.26: Ya da g…ôlkwa ray ba, ya da padatakwa nd…ôhay mekele Ňčga cek hay saw ba, asaya, ya da kakwa s…ôleŇč da wuzlah al…ôkwa ba may.

6.1: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, da ka h…ôtam ndaw da wuzlah akwar fa key meb…ôrey na, ara akwar nd…ôhay masa ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay da ray ke…óe ma da j…ônmara ndaw aha, ma da v…ôhdam…ôrwa aa c…ôve…ó maaya. Ama ka da j…ônmara ha na, ta mevel maaya ta mey maakwa…ó a. Kwa waawa da wuzlah akwar Ňčga wey vaw maja a da t…ô…óey aa meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw aha.
6.2: Da banay da wuzlah akwar daha na, j…ônam vaw. Da masa akwar fa kamara k…ône na, a key Ňčgene, ka namar ray a mewey Ňčga *K…ôriste.
6.3: Da ndaw a wulkey aŇčga mahura, anja aŇčga mahura ba na, a key Ňčgene, a b…ômey ray aŇčga.
6.4: Kwa waawa Ňčga n…ôka menjey aŇčga. Da a n…ôka aa maaya na, Ňčgaa s…ômey da ray menjey aŇčga ha gway, ba na, a da wulkey da ray menjey Ňčga ndaw mekele ba.
6.5: Yaw, kwa waawa Ňčga n…ôkey dey fa sl…ôra aŇčga masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldara.
6.6: Asaya, kwa waawa maa s…ôrkey mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, maaya a wunkamara cek aŇčga hay ta ndaw maa s…ôrkada ha. Mey-meŇčgey da ray menjey Ňčga ndaw ta makawa cek hay da ley
6.7: Ka da b…ômam ray akwar ba, Gazlavay a wu…óey ndaw Ňčga kada wasa ba. Cek wura wura masa ndaw ma sl…ôka a ley na, a da kawa da ley a na, cek aha.
6.8: Anda mel…ôvey, da ndaw a key cek ma mbafar a vaw aŇčga daada gway na, Ňčgene, a daa z…ô…óda ray aŇčga. Ama da a key cek ma mbafar a *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, Ňčgene, a da h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba ma sawa ta fa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a.
6.9: Da anda ke…óe na, si ya kakwa cek hay maaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay, ya da g…ôrkwa ba. Fara fara, da masa ya ta g…ôrkwa daa ba, pas a ma wuswa cay na, ya h…ôtkwa mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra al…ôkwa la.
6.10: Anda ke…óe, daa masa al…ôkwa ma h…ôtkwa har la kaa na, kakwa maaya a nd…ôhay tabiya. Kakwa maaya ma f…ôna saya na, Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste. Mey Ňčga madagway-dakw
6.11: N…ôkmara, mey Ňčga madagway-dakw ke…óe na, mawuzlalakaya mahura mahura, ara yah ma wuzlalakwara ta har a…óaw.
6.12: Nd…ôhay daha fa t…ôkmakwar …óay Ňčga s…ôpey *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ta fa *mesley mandawal. A t…ôkmakwar …óay a na, maja mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč gway. A kamara anda ke…óe na, a wu…óam nd…ôhay aa h…ômdamata. Asaya, a wu…óam Ňčga wuzey mey da ray mem…ôcey Ňčga *K…ôriste fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya ba, maja nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay a da s…ôrdamata banay.
6.13: Kwa nd…ôhay ma sla mandawal hay a ta ray ata na, fa namar ray a kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz tabiya daa ba. A wu…óam si ka slam mandawal na, amba a zlapam da ray akwar maja akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey ata.
6.14: Yah na, ya faa s…ômey si da ray mem…ôcey Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya gway, kwa ya faa s…ômey da ray cek mekele na, daa ba. Maja mem…ôcey Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste fa hwadam a na, ya n…ôkta cek hay da b…ôla ke…óe anda cek hay Ňčga tede fa mey a…óaw. Yah may, anda ndaw ma m…ôcey fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya masa ta mb…ôkdata cek hay da b…ôla sem.
6.15: Kwa ndaw ta sla mandawal la, kwa ta sla daa ba na, fa da mb…ô…óey cek daa ba. Cek mahura na, ara Gazlavay ma t…ôrdandakwar Ňčga nd…ôhay mawiya.
6.16: Anja Gazlavay Ňčga v…ôltar zazay, Ňčga s…ôrfatar dey-ceceh a nd…ôhay ma s…ôpmara mey a ke…óe, leŇč a nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Israyel masa ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay fara fara.
6.17: D…ôga wure ke…óe, anja ndaw Ňčga h…ô…ďya ray saba maja vevek Ňčga mb…ôlek fa vaw a…óaw fa wuzd…ôrwa yah ndaw Ňčga Yesu.
6.18: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, anja maaya Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste Ňčga njey ta akwar tabiya. *Amen.

1.1: Ara yah, Pawl, ma wuzlalakwara leeter ke…óe, yah ndaw masa *Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga key *ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga *Yesu *K…ôriste. Leeter ke…óe ara Ňčgada akwar, nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay daa berney Ňčga Efez, akwar mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste, asaya, akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ta mevel pal.
1.2: Anja Papa al…ôkwa, Bay Gazlavay, ta Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste Ňčga p…ôsmakwar mey, asaya Ňčga njadamakwar daa zazay. Cek hay maaya masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay ta fa Yesu K…ôriste
1.3: H…ôlmakwa Gazlavay, PapaŇč Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu *K…ôriste. Mep…ôsey-mey aŇčga kwa wura wura ma sawa ta da va…ó, aa da ray al…ôkwa. Ya h…ôtkwa mep…ôsey-mey a na, maja al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste.
1.4: S…ôrfadamara, d…ôga Gazlavay ta l…ôma b…ôla daa ba araŇč na, ta walandakwar sem Ňčga c…ômey ta K…ôriste, amba ya t…ôrkwa nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga, nd…ôhay masa ta meb…ôrey ba. Gazlavay a wu…óndakwar kalah,
1.5: maja Ňčgene, ta walandakwar sem d…ôga zleezle Ňčga t…ôrey b…ôz aŇčga hay ta fa Yesu K…ôriste. Gazlavay a ka k…ône na, maja ta mbafar la, a wu…óey Ňčga ka k…ône.
1.6: Da ray Ňčgene, h…ôlmakwa Gazlavay maja aa ma wu…óndakwar kalah. A wuzd…ôrwa mewu…óey-vaw a na, ta fa sl…ôra masa B…ôzey aŇčga mawu…ókaya kalah ma ka Ňčgada al…ôkwa.
1.7: Maja al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste na, Gazlavay ta l…ôhdandakurwa sem dasi har Ňčga bay-malula, asaya, ta mb…ôkdandakwara meb…ôrey sem ta fa mambaz Ňčga Yesu ma mb…ô…ówa daa mem…ôcey aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a wuzdandakwara mes…ôrey dey-ceceh aŇčga ta mewu…óey-vaw aŇčga ha na, aa ga kalah Ňčgada al…ôkwa.
1.8: Ta kandakwar maaya la ga kalah, ta v…ôlndakwar leŇčgesl maaya la,
1.9: ta wuzdandakwara cek masa ma…ďadakaya d…ôga zleezle sem, anda mel…ôvey, cek masa aa ma wu…óey Ňčga ka ta fa K…ôriste.
1.10: Ta pas masa …óar a ta wuswa cay na, a da nd…ôvda cek masa aa ma wu…óey Ňčga ka ha. Cek masa aa ma wu…óey Ňčga ka ha na, ara Ňčga c…ômtar ray a cek hay da gazlavay da va…ó ta cek hay da b…ôla tabiya asi har Ňčga Bay pal, K…ôriste.
1.11: Gazlavay ta wu…óey sem amba cek hay tabiya a kam maaya maaya anda aŇčga ma wu…óey Ňčga ka. Ta wu…óey sem d…ôga zleezle Ňčga walandar ala *J…ôwif hay wal amba ya t…ôram nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste.
1.12: Da ray Ňčgene, ala nd…ôhay masa Ňčgeeme ma pamara K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw ala fara fara na, ala fa h…ôlmamara Bay Gazlavay maja maaya aŇčga kalah.
1.13: Akwar nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay may, akwar ta c…ôndamara *Mey-maaya-mawiya la. Ara mey maaya fara fara ma l…ôhdakwar maja akwar ma pamara K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara. Maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ta v…ôlkwar Mes…ôfney aŇčga la a ray akwar anda aa ma l…ôvey zleezle a da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. Mes…ôfney a na, ara anda cek mat…ôhkaya fa daŇčgay Ňčga s…ôrey akwar na, nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
1.14: Maja al…ôkwa ma h…ôtkwa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay na, ya s…ôrkwa fara fara Gazlavay a da v…ôldandakwara cek hay maaya tabiya masa aŇčga ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay heyey. Ya da h…ôtkwa cek hay a na, daa masa al…ôkwa ta l…ôhkwa cay daa cek hay maaya ba da b…ôla ke…óe . Anda ke…óe, h…ôlmakwa Bay Gazlavay maja aa ta g…ôdaŇč. Pawl a kar suse a Gazlavay daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay
1.15: Anda ke…óe, d…ôga yah ma c…ônda akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu, ta akwar fa wu…ómata nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay c…ôpa na,
1.16: ya fa key suse a Gazlavay maja akwar mandaw mandaw. Daa masa ya fa d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay na, ya fa s…ôrfadakwar.
1.17: Ya fa d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu *K…ôriste. Gazlavay a, ara PapaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč. Yaa c…ôf…óa amba a v…ôlkwar leŇčgesl, a wuzdakwara ray aŇčga amba ka s…ôrmara maaya maaya.
1.18: Asaya, ya faa c…ôf…óa Gazlavay amba a pa mewe…óey aŇčga aa mevel akwar, amba ka s…ôrmara cek hay maaya kalah masa aa ma da v…ôldakwara. Da ray Ňčgene, cek hay maaya kalah ha na, akwar fa s…ôkwmara maja ka s…ôrmara ka h…ôtam la fara fara. Ka h…ôtam la fara fara, maja Gazlavay a z…ôlkwar Ňčga t…ôrey b…ôz aŇčga hay. Ya faa c…ôf…óa saya amba ka s…ôrmara mep…ôsey-mey aŇčga masa maaya ara mey ba, masa aa ma …óiya amba a v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
1.19: Asaya, ya faa c…ôf…óa Gazlavay amba ka s…ôrmara g…ôdaŇč aŇčga ma j…ônndakwar, al…ôkwa nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu. G…ôdaŇč aŇčga ha na, a f…ônta g…ôdaŇč hay Ňčga cek hay tabiya.
1.20: Ara g…ôdaŇč masa ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa K…ôriste daa mem…ôcey. Ara g…ôdaŇč a saya ma t…ôpda K…ôriste he a va…ó Ňčga njey aa slam maaya ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Gazlavay.
1.21: Fete…óe, K…ôriste he fa wey da ray mes…ôfney hay maaya ta maaya ba hay tabiya masa ma wam da ray cek hay tabiya da va…ó ta da b…ôla. G…ôdaŇč Ňčga Yesu na, a f…ônta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga bay hay tabiya ma wam wure ke…óe da b…ôla ta Ňčga bay hay tabiya ma da wam Ňčgada fa mey.
1.22: Ahaw, Gazlavay ta pata cek hay tabiya sem asi har Ňčga K…ôriste. Asaya a pa K…ôriste Ňčga *bay-ray Ňčga mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
1.23: Yaw, mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay na, ara anda vaw aŇčga. K…ôriste fa wuzwa vaw a nd…ôhay tabiya da b…ôla. A wuzwa vaw na, ta fa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay a. Ara aŇčga ma v…ôltar heter a cek hay tabiya kwa daa wura daa wura c…ôpa.

2.1: Zleezle masa akwar ta t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga *K…ôriste daa ba araŇč na, akwar anda nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya, maja akwar ta meb…ôrey, akwar fa kam cek hay malamba.
2.2: Daa Ňčgene, menjey akwar na, maaya ba, anda nd…ôhay da b…ôla ke…óe ma s…ôrmara Gazlavay ba. Akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga *SataŇč, bay-malula, ma wey da ray mes…ôfney maaya ba hay ma p…ôkam daa meme…ó da b…ôla. Bay-malula ha na, aŇčga fa wata nd…ôhay ma r…ôsmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay haa wure ke…óe.
2.3: Daa masa al…ôkwa ma t…ô…ďkwa mey Ňčga K…ôriste daa ba araŇč na, al…ôkwa k…ône may, maja daa Ňčgene na, ya kakwa cek hay maaya ba tabiya anda mevel al…ôkwa ma wu…óey. Al…ôkwa fa kakwa cek hay tabiya anda leŇčgesl al…ôkwa ta vaw al…ôkwa ma wu…óey. Maja cek hay maaya ba hay a na, Gazlavay a da cey mevel ga a ray al…ôkwa anda aa ma cey mevel a ray nd…ôhay siya may.
2.4: Ama Gazlavay na, ara ndaw ma s…ôrey dey-ceceh fa ndaw. Ta wu…óndakwar la ga kalah.
