2.5: Da ray Ňčgene, kwa daa masa al…ôkwa anda nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya maja meb…ôrey al…ôkwa na, Gazlavay ta c…ômndakwar la ta K…ôriste, ta v…ôlndakwar heter mawiya la. S…ôrfadamara, ara ta fa maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a, akwar ma l…ôham daa meb…ôrey.
2.6: Gazlavay ta sl…ôk…óadandakurwa sem daa mem…ôcey daa slam a ta Yesu K…ôriste na, maja al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste he. Asaya, ta njadandakwar sem daa slam a ta aŇčga da gazlavay a va…ó Ňčga wey da ray cek hay tabiya.
2.7: A wuzd…ôrwa maaya aŇčga Ňčgada al…ôkwa ta fa Yesu K…ôriste anda ke…óe na, amba a wuzdatara a nd…ôhay Ňčgada fa mey, mes…ôrey dey-ceceh aŇčga ta mewu…óey-vaw aŇčga ha na, aŇčga ga kalah.
2.8: Yaw, ara ta fa maaya aŇčga ha Gazlavay ma l…ôhdakwar daa meb…ôrey maja akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu. Akwar ma l…ôham a na, ara ta g…ôdaŇč akwar ba, ama ara Gazlavay ma v…ôldakwara g…ôdaŇč Ňčga l…ôhey a.
2.9: Gazlavay ma l…ôhdakwar na, ara maja sl…ôra akwar maaya masa akwar ma kamara ba. Anda ke…óe, ka da zlapam maja ba.
2.10: Yaw, ara Gazlavay ma ka amba ya c…ômkwa ta Yesu K…ôriste. Da ray Ňčgene, Gazlavay ta v…ôlndakwar heter mawiya la amba ya kakwa sl…ôra hay masa maaya kalah. Sl…ôra hay masa maaya hay a na, Gazlavay ta …óiyndakwara cay amba ya kakwa. J…ôwif hay ta J…ôwif hay ba hay mac…ômkaya pal ta fa Yesu K…ôriste
2.11: Da ray Ňčgene, wulkam, zleezle akwar na, kwara? Akwar ta yamawa daa s…ôkway Ňčga *J…ôwif hay daa ba. J…ôwif hay a, a z…ôlmakwar na, nd…ôhay manda-sla mandawal hay. Ata na, a l…ôvam ata nd…ôhay maslatakaya mandawal. Ama *mesley mandawal na, ara cek masa nd…ôhay ma kamara fa vaw ata hay gway.
2.12: Ahaw, daa Ňčgene na, akwar d…ôreŇč ta *K…ôriste, *ndaw masa Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay. Akwar na, nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Israyel hay ba, akwar m…ôlak hay. Akwar daa *mej…ôwey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta Israyel hay daa ba. Daa mej…ôwey-mey a, Gazlavay a l…ôvtar a da njey ta ata Ňčga mandaw mandaw. Akwar manjatakaya da b…ôla, Gazlavay aa ta akwar daa ba, ka njam na, Ňčga ray akwar gway.
2.13: Ama akwar masa d…ôreŇč ta Gazlavay heyey na, wure ke…óe, akwar mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste. Gazlavay ta Ňčg…ôchadakurwa la a cakay a, ta fa mambaz Ňčga K…ôriste ma mb…ô…ówa daa mem…ôcey aŇčga.
2.14: Fara fara, ara K…ôriste ta ray aŇčga ma hand…ôrwa zazay a wuzlah al…ôkwa. A hand…ôrwa zazay a daa masa aŇčga ma c…ômtar …óay a nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ta nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay, Ňčga key s…ôkway pal. Zleezle na, nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ta nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay a Ňčg…ôlam vaw ba. MeŇčg…ôley-vaw ata ba Ňčgene na, ta t…ôrey sem anda zleŇčger da wuzlah ata ma wunkata. Anda ke…óe, ta fa mem…ôcey Ňčga Yesu na, zleŇčger e, ta p…ôlhey sem.
2.15: *Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, mewey hay ga da hwa…ó a daha. Ama K…ôriste ta Ňčg…ôchada kwakwas a sem ta cakay, amba a c…ômtar …óay Ňčga nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ta nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay Ňčga t…ôrey s…ôkway pal mac…ômkaya ta aŇčga. Ara maja Ňčgene, zazay daha da wuzlah s…ôkway hay cew e.
2.16: Ta fa mem…ôcey aŇčga fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya na, K…ôriste ta vav…ôsa meŇčg…ôley-vaw ba da wuzlah s…ôkway hay cew ke…óe heyey sem Ňčga t…ôrey s…ôkway pal. Anda ke…óe, ta fa mem…ôcey aŇčga ha na, ta c…ômtar …óay cay ta Gazlavay.
2.17: K…ôriste a sawa na, Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya ma handawa zazay Ňčgada akwar J…ôwif hay ba hay ma s…ôrmara Gazlavay ba zleezle, ta Ňčgada ala J…ôwif hay masa ma s…ôrmara Gazlavay.
2.18: Yaw, ara ta fa K…ôriste he al…ôkwa c…ôpa ma h…ôtkwa c…ôve…ó Ňčga daw a cakay Gazlavay, PapaŇč, ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Mes…ôfney aŇčga pal.
2.19: Anda ke…óe, akwar nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay na, akwar m…ôlak hay saba, akwar maslah hay saba. Ama wure ke…óe na, akwar s…ôkway pal ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay, akwar nd…ôhay daa v…ôge…ó Ňčga way pal ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay.
2.20: Akwar na, anda aŇčgwa hay ma …ó…ôzla way. Salay Ňčga way a na, ara nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu ta nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Yesu K…ôriste ta ray aŇčga na, ara aŇčgwa mahura ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč a way a.
2.21: Ara ta fa Yesu K…ôriste he, way a ma njey maaya maaya ta g…ôdaŇč, a s…ôkey, a key mahura amba way a, a t…ôrey way Ňčga Bay Gazlavay.
2.22: Maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste na, K…ôriste he ta c…ômkwar la ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay mekele amba akwar may, ka t…ôram anda way a. Ara way masa Gazlavay ma njey da hwa…ó a ta fa Mes…ôfney aŇčga.

3.1: Ara maja Ňčgene, yah Pawl, ya fa d…ôrey daŇčgay maja akwar mandaw mandaw. Yah daa f…ôrs…ône maja sl…ôra Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste, masa yah ma ka Ňčgada akwar *J…ôwif hay ba hay.
3.2: Akwar ma c…ôndamara mey da ray sl…ôra masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldiwa Ňčga key maja akwar la, ba diya? A v…ôldiwa sl…ôra ha na, maja maaya aŇčga.
3.3: Gazlavay ta wuzdiwa mey masa ma…ďadakaya d…ôga zleezle sem amba ya s…ôra mey a. Yaw, daa leeter ke…óe na, ya taa guzlkwar la nek…ô…óey da ray mey ma…ďadakaya ha.
3.4: Masa akwar fa jaŇčgamara leeter he na, ka s…ôrmara la, yah na, ya s…ôra mey masa ma…ďadakaya da ray K…ôriste maaya maaya.
3.5: Zleezle na, Gazlavay ta wuzdatara mey ma…ďadakaya ha a nd…ôhay daa ba. Ama wure ke…óe, ta wuzdatara la ta fa Mes…ôfney aŇčga Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa aa ma walata wal Ňčga t…ôrey nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu ta Ňčga t…ôrey nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga hay.
3.6: Ehe, mey ma…ďadakaya ha na, a l…ôvey J…ôwif hay ba hay na, a h…ôtam cek hay maaya masa Gazlavay ma …óiytara Ňčgada nd…ôhay aŇčga hay la letek ta nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay. J…ôwif hay ba hay ta J…ôwif hay na, ta t…ôram sem anda vaw pal ta fa K…ôriste. Asaya, cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay na, nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay a da h…ôtam letek anda nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay may. A h…ôtam cek hay maaya ke…óe na, maja ata ma t…ô…ďmara *Mey-maaya-mawiya, asaya, maja ata mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste.
3.7: Mey-maaya-mawiya ha na, Gazlavay ta paya la Ňčga wuzda a nd…ôhay maja maaya aŇčga. Ara ta fa g…ôdaŇč aŇčga, yah ma t…ôrey ndaw ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga ha.
3.8: Yah na, ndaw mec…ôhe da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya. Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, Gazlavay ta s…ôrfaya dey-ceceh la, ta paya la Ňčga wuzey Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay J…ôwif hay ba hay. Ya fa wuzdatara mep…ôsey-mey ma sawa ta fa K…ôriste. Cek maaya daa mep…ôsey-mey a tabiya na, ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč a gwa a s…ôra ba.
3.9: Asaya, a paya Ňčga wuzda mey ma…ďadakaya zleezle heyey a nd…ôhay tabiya, amba a s…ôrmara cek hay a, a da kam na, kwara. Ara Gazlavay, ndaw ma l…ôma slam da va…ó ta slam da hwayak, ma …ďada mey a d…ôga zleezle.
3.10: Ama wure ke…óe ta wuzd…ôrwa sem ta fa nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu. A wuzd…ôrwa ta fa ata na, amba maslaŇč aŇčga hay da va…ó ta *bay-ray ata hay a s…ôrmara leŇčgesl maaya Ňčga Gazlavay ma s…ôrey cek hay mekele mekele c…ôpa.
3.11: D…ôga b…ôla ta zlar Ňčga l…ômey daa ba araŇč na, Gazlavay a, a ka k…ône maja ta wu…óey sem. A ka na, ta fa Yesu K…ôriste, Bay al…ôkwa Mahura.
3.12: Anda ke…óe, ya gwakwa Ňčga Ňčg…ôchakwa asi har Ňčga Bay Gazlavay ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba maja al…ôkwa mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste, asaya, maja al…ôkwa nd…ôhay ma pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw al…ôkwa fara fara.
3.13: Maja Ňčgene, ya kakwar ambahw, ka da m…ôcmara vaw akwar maja yah ma s…ôrey banay maja akwar ba. Banay yah ma s…ôra ke…óe na, sas…ôkar jak a da kakwar maaya Ňčgada fa mey. Mey da ray mewu…óey-vaw Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste
3.14: Ara maja Ňčgene, yah ma regedey fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay PapaŇč, Ňčga d…ôrar daŇčgay maja akwar.
3.15: Ara aŇčga ma patar mez…ôley a s…ôkway hay da gazlavay da va…ó ta da b…ôla c…ôpa, maja aŇčga Papa al…ôkwa.
3.16: Gazlavay aa ta g…ôdaŇč, cek hay tabiya ata dasi har aŇčga. Da ray Ňčgene, ya fa d…ôrar daŇčgay amba a v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč ta fa Mes…ôfney aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, g…ôdaŇč aŇčga ha Ňčga njey daa akwar ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
3.17: Anja *K…ôriste Ňčga njey daa mevel akwar maja aŇčga ndaw akwar fara fara. Asaya, anja akwar Ňčga wu…ómara Gazlavay, anja akwar Ňčga wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar. Da akwar fa wu…óam vaw k…ône na, ka da h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč anda wudez masa slaslalay a d…ôreŇč daa v…ôge…ó, da daa ba, anda way mal…ômkaya maaya maaya wurza ha mapakaya ta aŇčgwa.
3.18: Anda ke…óe, akwar ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay siya, ka s…ôrmara la, Yesu K…ôriste na, fa wu…óndakwar kalah. Ka s…ôrmara la, mewu…óey-vaw aŇčga ha na, kwakway a daa ba.
3.19: Ahaw, mewu…óey-vaw aŇčga ha na, ta f…ôna leŇčgesl Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč sem. Ama ya fa d…ôrey daŇčgay amba ka s…ôrmara mewu…óey-vaw aŇčga ha fara fara c…ôŇčga. Anda ke…óe, ka da h…ôtam menjey maaya letek anda Ňčga Gazlavay, asaya, Gazlavay a, ray aŇčga, a da njey ta akwar mandaw mandaw.
3.20: Yaw, Gazlavay a, a gwa Ňčga v…ôlndakwar cek ma f…ôna masa al…ôkwa maa c…ôf…óafakwar, asaya, a gwa Ňčga kandakwar cek masa ma f…ôna mewulkey al…ôkwa, maja aŇčga fa key sl…ôra daa mevel al…ôkwa ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga.
3.21: H…ôlmakwa Bay Gazlavay maja nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu leŇč maja Yesu K…ôriste he ray aŇčga. Anja nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôlmamara Gazlavay Ňčga s…ôrmataw. *Amen.

4.1: Maja cek hay tabiya masa Gazlavay ma kakwara ta fa *K…ôriste na, yah Pawl, ya fa k…ôtkwar, yah ndaw masa daa f…ôrs…ône maja Bay al…ôkwa Mahura. Akwar masa Gazlavay ma z…ôlkwar Ňčga t…ôrey b…ôz aŇčga hay na, ya fa k…ôtkwar amba menjey akwar a key anda aa ma wu…óey.
4.2: Anda mel…ôvey, daa cek hay masa akwar ma kamara c…ôpa na, kamara ta meney ray, ta meekwe…ó-mey, ka da cam mevel saw saw ba. Da nd…ôhay da wuzlah akwar ta kamakwar cek hay maaya ba la na, …ď…ôsmara gway, wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar.
4.3: *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ta c…ômkwar ray la pal. Anda ke…óe, kam g…ôdaŇč amba ka njam mac…ômkaya daa zazay.
4.4: Al…ôkwa nd…ôhay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu na, al…ôkwa ma t…ôrkwa sem anda vaw pal. Ara Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay pal da ray al…ôkwa. Asaya, al…ôkwa masa Gazlavay ma z…ôlndakwar na, al…ôkwa fa s…ôkwakwa cek hay maaya letek masa Gazlavay ma da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
4.5: Bay al…ôkwa Mahura, aŇčga pal. Mey masa al…ôkwa ma t…ô…ďkwa, aŇčga pal. *Baptem, aŇčga pal.
4.6: Gazlavay masa al…ôkwa ma nakwar ray may, aŇčga pal. AŇčga Papa al…ôkwa tabiya, fa wey da ray al…ôkwa tabiya, fa key sl…ôra da wuzlah al…ôkwa tabiya, asaya, aa daa mevel al…ôkwa tabiya.
4.7: Ama K…ôriste ta v…ôlndakwar g…ôdaŇč la wal wal Ňčga key sl…ôra aŇčga. A v…ôldandakwara g…ôdaŇč a na, ta har cew cew, anda aa ma wu…óey Ňčga v…ôlda sl…ôra a ndaw a, a ndaw a.
4.8: Ara maja Ňčgene, mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDaa masa aŇčga ma t…ôpey a va…ó na, Ta handata masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay masa aa ma k…ôrzat…ôrwa daa v…ôram la. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a v…ôley cek hay mekele mekele a nd…ôhay.¬Ľ
4.9: Yaw, mey ma l…ôvey: ¬ęAŇčga ma t…ôpey a va…ó na,¬Ľ a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey kwara? Mey a, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey na, K…ôriste ta pawa salay la a b…ôla fe…óe …óagay.
4.10: K…ôriste ma pawa salay a b…ôla heyey na, ara aŇčga saya ma t…ôpey a va…ó haa a wusey a cakay Bay Gazlavay, amba a wey da ray cek hay kwa daa wura daa wura c…ôpa.
4.11: G…ôdaŇč masa wal wal a na, ara K…ôriste he ta ray aŇčga ma v…ôltar a nd…ôhay. A v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč a siya hay Ňčga t…ôrey nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey aŇčga hay, siya hay Ňčga t…ôrey nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay, siya hay may Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay. Siya hay saya a v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga t…ôrey anda mec…ôkwer hay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu, aa s…ôrkadamata nd…ôhay da ray mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
4.12: K…ôriste he a ka k…ône na, amba nd…ôhay a, a j…ônmata nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčgada aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga K…ôriste, a h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay la ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
4.13: Ahaw, al…ôkwa tabiya ya c…ômkwa ray la pal daa met…ô…ďey-mey pal Ňčga B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay, asaya, ya da s…ôrkwa B…ôzey a fara fara. Da ray Ňčgene, ya da t…ôrkwa nd…ôhay maŇčgaratakaya daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, anda mel…ôvey, ya da t…ôrkwa nd…ôhay maaya kalah anda K…ôriste.
4.14: Anda ke…óe, al…ôkwa anda b…ôza hay saba, al…ôkwa anda hwahwayak masa meme…ó ma h…ôla saw saw saba. Yaw, nd…ôhay ma mb…ôrzlam fa da gwamara Ňčga batamandakwar ta mees…ôrkedey ata, amba ya t…ô…ďkwa memb…ôrzley ata ha Ňčgaa z…ô…ódandakwar na, daa saba.
4.15: Maaya na, ya mb…ôrzlakwa ba, ya wuzkwa mey maaya fara fara da ray Gazlavay, asaya, ya wu…ókwa vaw da wuzlah al…ôkwa. Da al…ôkwa fa kakwa k…ône na, ya nakwa la fa mey fa mey haa ya t…ôrkwa anda K…ôriste. AŇčga na, *bay-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray aŇčga.
4.16: Ara aŇčga ma c…ômtar ray Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay anda vaw Ňčga ndaw pal mal…ômkaya ta mez…ôvey hay mekele mekele. Da mez…ôvey Ňčga vaw hay c…ôpa ata wurwer na, Ňčgene vaw tabiya a g…ôley, a h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč. Ara k…ône may Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu. Da nd…ôhay a, fa wu…óam vaw da wuzlah ata, asaya, da kwa waawa fa ka sl…ôra aŇčga na, mec…ômey-ray a, a h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč la ma f…ôna ma f…ôna. Pawl a k…ôtata Efez hay Ňčga mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata
4.17: Ara maja Ňčgene, yah, Pawl, ya fa k…ôtkwar, asaya, ya fa pakwar leŇčgesl ta mez…ôley Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura, ya l…ôvkwar: ka da njam anda nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara Gazlavay ba saba. Mewulkey Ňčga nd…ôhay a na, saw k…ône.
4.18: Ata daa l…ôvaŇč. Cek masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey na, a gwamara Ňčga c…ôndamara ba. Ata m…ôlak hay fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ta h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba na, daa ba, maja a g…ômam Ňčga c…ôndamara ba s…ôlak, a s…ôrmara Gazlavay ba.
4.19: Hwaray daa dey ata daa ba, a kam cek anda mevel ata ma wu…óey. Fa lam vaw saw da palah mandaw mandaw, fa kam cek hay malamba mekele mekele may.
4.20: Ama akwar na, aa s…ôrkadamakwar da ray *K…ôriste na, anda Ňčgene ba.
4.21: Akwar ta c…ôndamara mey da ray K…ôriste la, ba diya? Akwar masa mac…ômkaya ta Yesu na, taa s…ôrkadamakwara mey fara fara masa Yesu a ma wuzdandakwara la, ba diya?
4.22: Zleezle na, ka wu…óam Ňčga key cek hay malamba ma bata ndaw. Cek hay malamba hay a ta n…ôskwar sem. Yaw, maaya na, ka mb…ôkdamara menjey akwar masa zleezle Ňčgene, anda ndaw ma mb…ôkda zana magurma.
4.23: Mb…ô…ódamara mevel akwar ta leŇčgesl akwar tabiya.
4.24: T…ô…ďmara menjey mawiya masa Gazlavay ma …óiykwara anda ndaw ma k…ôzley zana mawiya fa vaw. Menjey a na, ara menjey maaya ta c…ôve…ó e, ma mbafar a Gazlavay anda mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa fara fara maa s…ôrkadandakwara.
4.25: Da ray Ňčgene, ka da mb…ôrzlam saba. Maaya na, kwa waawa Ňčgaa guzley mey maaya fara fara a ndaw, maja al…ôkwa tabiya mac…ômkaya anda vaw pal.
4.26: Da mevel fa cakwar na, wam vaw, ka kam meb…ôrey ba. Ka da v…ôrndam daa mecey-mevel haa pas a k…ôzley ba.
4.27: Ka da v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó Ňčgada bay-malula Ňčga wey da ray akwar ba.
4.28: Da ndaw fa leley na, anja Ňčga leley saba. Ama maaya na, Ňčga key sl…ôra maaya ta har aŇčga, amba a h…ôtey cek, a j…ôney nd…ôhay masa-viya hay may.
4.29: Ka daa guzlam mey malamba a nd…ôhay ba. Ama da akwar faa guzlam na, gwaguzlam mey maaya ma j…ônta nd…ôhay daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, mey maaya ma …óiyta nd…ôhay masa ma j…ôkfamakwar sl…ômay.
4.30: Ka da kam cek ma car mevel a *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ba, maja Mes…ôfney a, ara anda cek mat…ôhkaya fa daŇčgay akwar Ňčga s…ôrey akwar na, nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay. Mes…ôfney a, a da njey a ray akwar haa ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da l…ôhdakwar daa cek hay maaya ba da b…ôla ke…óe.
4.31: Mb…ôkdamara mep…ôley c…ôhwal ta mepey mey aa mevel da ray ndaw, leŇč mecey-mevel da ray ndaw. Mb…ôkdamara mekey baazlam da wuzlah akwar ta mekey mba…óa fa ndaw. Cek hay malamba tabiya anda ke…óe na, Ňčg…ôcham d…ôreŇč ta ata.
4.32: Anda ke…óe, t…ôram nd…ôhay maaya, wu…óam vaw, s…ôram dey-ceceh da wuzlah akwar. Mb…ôkdamatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay da wuzlah akwar anda Gazlavay ma mb…ôkdakwara meb…ôrey akwar ta fa K…ôriste may.

5.1: Wure ke…óe, akwar na, b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay mawu…ótakaya. Da ray Ňčgene, kam cek maaya anda Gazlavay ma ka.
5.2: Daa menjey akwar tabiya na, wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar anda *K…ôriste ma wu…óndakwar. Ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la Ňčga m…ôcey maja al…ôkwa, anda g…ônaw masa nd…ôhay ma h…ôrmara zleezle Ňčga v…ôley a Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, a mbafar a Gazlavay anda cek mezey maaya.
5.3: Akwar na, nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay. Da ray Ňčgene, da wuzlah akwar na, aŇčga maaya ba Ňčga ley vaw saw da palah, ta Ňčga key cek hay ma ka hwaray, leŇč Ňčga key dey fa cek Ňčga ndaw. S…ôkway Ňčga cek hay anda Ňčgene na, kwa Ňčga c…ôney da wuzlah akwar ba s…ôlak.
5.4: Ka daa guzlam mey hay saw ba, asaya, ka daa guzlam mey hay ma ka hwaray ba. Mey hay anda Ňčgene na, maaya ba. Maaya na, ka kam suse a Gazlavay.
5.5: S…ôrmara maaya maaya, nd…ôhay ma lam vaw saw da palah, ta nd…ôhay ma kam cek hay ma ka hwaray na, fa da mb…ôzam aa slam masa K…ôriste ta Gazlavay fa wam da va…ó na, daa ba. Fa da h…ôtam cek hay maaya masa Gazlavay ma da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay na, daa ba. Asaya, nd…ôhay ma kam dey fa cek Ňčga ndaw na, fa da mb…ôzam aa slam aha daa ba may, maja da fa kam dey fa cek Ňčga ndaw na, a ragadamar a cek aha aa slam a Ňčga Gazlavay.
5.6: Ara maja cek hay malamba hay Ňčgene, Gazlavay ma da cey mevel a ray nd…ôhay ma namar ray ba. Da ray Ňčgene, ka da v…ôlmatar c…ôve…ó a nd…ôhay Ňčga batamakwar ta mey hay saw ba.
5.7: Kwa ka da c…ômam ta nd…ôhay anda Ňčgene ba s…ôlak.
5.8: Zleezle na, akwar daa l…ôvaŇč. Ama wure ke…óe na, akwar daa slam-mewe…óey maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta Bay Mahura. Anda ke…óe, kam cek anda nd…ôhay ma njam daa slam-mewe…óey,
5.9: maja nd…ôhay ma njam daa slam-mewe…óey na, a kam cek maaya, a kam cek ta c…ôve…ó e, a mb…ôrzlam ba.
5.10: S…ôpam Ňčga key cek masa ma mbafar a Gazlavay.
5.11: Ka da kam cek hay malamba anda nd…ôhay daa l…ôvaŇč ma kamara ba. Cek hay masa ata ma kamara Ňčgene na, ara cek Ňčga tede. Ama wuzdamara cek masa ata ma kamara maaya ba ha Ňčgene.
5.12: Fara fara, kwa Ňčgaa guzley da ray cek hay masa ata ma kamara ta me…ďey a Ňčgene na, a key hwaray.
5.13: Ama da cek malamba ma…ďadakaya ta wuzwa sem a palah na, nd…ôhay a h…ôtmar maaya maaya, a s…ôrmara ara cek malamba.
5.14: Anda mel…ôvey, daa slam-mewe…óey na, cek malamba a h…ôtey maaya maaya. Ara maja Ňčgene mey daha fa l…ôvey: ¬ęKah, ndaw masa manakaya, Sl…ôk…óey daa …óar. Kah, ndaw masa mam…ôckaya, Sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey a. Amba mewe…óey Ňčga K…ôriste a sawa a ray akah.¬Ľ
5.15: Da ray Ňčgene, wam vaw fa menjey akwar, ka da kam cek hay anda nd…ôhay manjar leŇčgesl hay ba. Ama kam cek hay anda nd…ôhay ta leŇčgesl maaya.
5.16: Da akwar ma h…ôtam har la Ňčga key cek maaya na, kamara, maja wure ke…óe na, nd…ôhay fa kam cek hay malamba kalah.
5.17: Anda ke…óe, ka da r…ôzlam ba, ama s…ôpam na, Ňčga s…ôrey cek maaya masa Bay Mahura ma wu…óey fa akwar.
5.18: Ka da sam wuzam Ňčga wey ba, maja wuzam na, a n…ôsa menjey Ňčga ndaw. Ama v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó a *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga njey daa mevel akwar mandaw mandaw.
5.19: Zlam walay da wuzlah akwar ta mees…ômey, walay hay masa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga zla. Zlam walay hay daa *P…ôsam hay , ta walay hay mekele ma h…ôlma Bay Gazlavay. Zlamar walay hay Ňčga h…ôlma Bay akwar Mahura, h…ôlmamara ta mevel akwar c…ôpa.
5.20: Kamar suse a Gazlavay Papa al…ôkwa maja cek hay tabiya. Kamar suse mandaw mandaw ta mez…ôley Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste. Mey da ray menjey Ňčga Ňčgwas ta zel e
5.21: Akwar nd…ôhay masa ma namar ray a *K…ôriste na, nam ray a ndaw a, a ndaw a da wuzlah akwar may.
5.22: Akwar Ňčgusay, namatar ray a zel akwar hay, ara cek ma mbafar a Bay Mahura.
5.23: Maja zel na, ara *bay-ray Ňčga Ňčgwas, anda K…ôriste ma key bay-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray aŇčga. Mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay a na, ara anda vaw aŇčga. Ara K…ôriste he ma l…ôhdata nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray aŇčga ha daa meb…ôrey.
5.24: Da ray Ňčgene, anda nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga K…ôriste ma namar ray a K…ôriste he na, akwar Ňčgusay may, namatar ray a zel akwar hay daa cek hay tabiya masa akwar ma kamara.
5.25: Akwar zel hay may, wu…ómata Ňčgwas akwar hay anda K…ôriste ma wu…óta nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray aŇčga. Ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la Ňčga m…ôcey maja ata,
5.26: amba a t…ôrdata Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya manjar meb…ôrey ta fa yam Ňčga *baptem, asaya, ta fa mey aŇčga.
5.27: K…ôriste a v…ôlda ray aŇčga na, amba a t…ô…ďta nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray aŇčga anda ndaw ma ley kwakwa membey, asaya, amba nd…ôhay aŇčga hay a, a t…ôram nd…ôhay map…ôrtakaya, kwa meb…ôrey ta cek maaya ba fa ata na, daa ba.
5.28: Ara anda ke…óe, zel may, si a wu…óa Ňčgwas aŇčga anda aŇčga ma wu…óa ray aŇčga. Ndaw ma wu…óa Ňčgwas aŇčga na, a key Ňčgene, a wu…óey ray aŇčga.
5.29: Fara fara, ndaw ma wu…óa ray aŇčga ba na, daa ba. Ama kwa waawa fa z…ômey cek, fa wey vaw ta ray aŇčga anda K…ôriste ma wey vaw ta nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray aŇčga may.
5.30: Kaa al…ôkwa na, nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga K…ôriste, ba diya?
5.31: Mawuzlalakaya daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMaja Ňčgene, ndaw-mez…ôle a mb…ôkda papaha ta mamaha, amba a c…ômam ta Ňčgwas aŇčga, a t…ôram anda ndaw pal.¬Ľ
5.32: Mey a ke…óe na, mey mahura ma…ďadakaya da hwa…ó a daha. Yah na, ya fa l…ôvkwar, mey a ke…óe aa guzley da ray K…ôriste ta nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray aŇčga.
5.33: Mey a faa guzley may Ňčgada akwar. Anja kwa waawa da wuzlah akwar Ňčga wu…óa Ňčgwas aŇčga anda aŇčga ma wu…óa ray aŇčga. Akwar Ňčgusay may, kwa waawa Ňčga nar ray a zel e.

6.1: Akwar b…ôza hay, akwar mac…ômkaya ta Bay Mahura, c…ônmatar mey a papakw akwar hay ta mamakw akwar hay maja ara cek maaya.
6.2: -3 *Mewey Ňčga Gazlavay daha fa l…ôvey: ¬ęNatar ray Ňčgada ata papakw ta mamakw.¬Ľ Mewey a ke…óe na, ara mewey Ňčgeeme daa masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da kandakwar cek maaya, da al…ôkwa ta s…ôpkwa mey a la. Cek maaya ha na, ara ¬ęKa h…ôtam zazay la, ka njam la ga da b…ôla ke…óe.¬Ľ
6.4: Akwar papaŇč hay may, ka da kam cek Ňčga catar mevel a b…ôz akwar hay ba. Ama, k…ôtmata, sas…ôrkadamata maaya maaya anda Bay Mahura ma wu…óey. Mey da ray beke hay ta nd…ôhay ma wamata
6.5: Akwar beke hay, namatar ray a bay akwar hay da b…ôla ke…óe ta mevel pal, c…ônmatar mey. Namatar ray anda akwar ma namar ray a *K…ôriste.
6.6: Ka da c…ônmatar mey na, fa dey ata daada amba aa h…ômdamakwar ba, ama kam cek masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey ta g…ôdaŇč akwar c…ôpa, maja akwar na, anda beke hay Ňčga K…ôriste.
6.7: Kamatar sl…ôra a bay akwar hay ta mees…ômey anda ka kamara na, Ňčgada Bay Mahura, ba na, Ňčgada ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ba.
6.8: S…ôrmara, da ndaw ta key sl…ôra maaya la kwa aŇčga beke, kwa aŇčga beke ba na, Bay Mahura a p…ôlra mawur…ďay aŇčga la.
6.9: Yaw, akwar nd…ôhay ma wamata beke hay may, k…ôrzamata beke akwar hay ta c…ôve…ó e, ka da h…ôlmatar dey ba. Si ka s…ôrmara na, akwar ta beke akwar hay a na, Bay akwar pal da gazlavay da va…ó daha. AŇčga na, a weley ndaw ta weley ba, a n…ôkta nd…ôhay tabiya letek fa mey aŇčga. Ma da key v…ôram ta bay-malula na, ta me?
6.10: Ehe, mey a…óaw mekele Ňčgada akwar: Njam mac…ômkaya ta Bay Mahura amba ka h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč aŇčga masa mahura.
6.11: J…ôwmata vaw akwar hay ta cek hay ma ka v…ôram masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldakwara. Anda ke…óe, ta pas masa bay-malula fa da batakwar na, ka h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč la Ňčga f…ôna wewer aŇčga.
6.12: Ya da kakwa v…ôram na, ta nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč ba, ama ta *bay-ray hay Ňčga mes…ôfney maaya ba hay masa ta g…ôdaŇč ga, ma wam da ray cek hay daa l…ôvaŇč da b…ôla ke…óe. Asaya, ya da kakwa v…ôram na, ta mes…ôfney maaya ba hay ma wam da va…ó.
6.13: Ara maja Ňčgene, lamata cek hay tabiya ma ka v…ôram masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldakwara heyey. Anda ke…óe, da masa pas Ňčga v…ôram ta wuswa cay na, ka jaram la fa masa-g…ôra akwar hay. Ka da kam v…ôram ta masa-g…ôra akwar hay a haa mend…ôvey a. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ka da lacam deŇč e! akwar bay-gula hay.
6.14: J…ôwmata vaw akwar hay maaya maaya, anda mel…ôvey, njam ta mey masa fara fara ta memb…ôrzley da hwa…ó a daa ba. Mey masa fara fara ha na, ara anda senter masa ndaw-sewje ma j…ôwda vaw amba a key v…ôram ta g…ôra ba. Kam cek ta c…ôve…ó e. Mekey cek ta c…ôve…ó e na, ara anda zana Ňčga …ď…ôrey masa sewje ma b…ôr…óa fa dadak Ňčga key v…ôram.
6.15: ∆äiyam vaw Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya ma handawa zazay. Me…óiyey vaw a na, ara anda tarak masa sewje ma pa a salay amba a jerey.
6.16: Daa cek hay masa akwar ma kamata c…ôpa na, pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara mandaw mandaw. Ka kamara k…ône na, ara anda mbaray masa sewje ma k…ôrza a har. Ta mbaray a, ka da jaram fa l…ôvat hay tabiya ta awaw da mey a masa bay-malula ma da m…ôlkwar ta aŇčga.
6.17: S…ôrmara na, Gazlavay ta l…ôhdakwar cay. Mel…ôhey a Ňčgene na, ara anda jikwew Ňčga …ď…ôrey masa sewje ma pa a ray Ňčga key v…ôram. Mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa Mes…ôfney aŇčga ma v…ôldakwara na, k…ôrzamara maaya maaya, ara anda d…ôlaw Ňčga key v…ôram ta bay-malula.
6.18: D…ôram daŇčgay mandaw mandaw ta g…ôdaŇč masa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôldakwara. Cac…ôf…óamara Gazlavay Ňčga j…ônkwar kwa daa meeme tabiya. Daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay akwar na, ka da g…ôram ba, maya…ó a da kakwar ba. D…ôram daŇčgay maja nd…ôhay tabiya ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
6.19: Daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay akwar a na, s…ôrfadamaya may, amba Gazlavay a balaya mey hay maaya maaya ta pas masa yah ma daa guzley fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay. Cac…ôf…óamara Gazlavay amba yaa s…ôrkadatara mey ma…ďadakaya daa Mey-maaya-mawiya a nd…ôhay ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba.
6.20: Yesu *K…ôriste ta walaya la Ňčga key ndaw aŇčga mesl…ôrey, amba ya wuzda Mey-maaya-mawiya ha. Ara maja Ňčgene, ata ma k…ôzlamaya aa f…ôrs…ône. Da ray Ňčgene, d…ôram daŇčgay maja yah, amba ya wuzda Mey-maaya-mawiya fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ta c…ôve…ó e, anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey. Mey Ňčga madagway-dakw
6.21: Ya fa wu…óey amba ka s…ôrmara menjey a…óaw fe…óe. Da ray Ňčgene, Tisik masa m…ôlma al…ôkwa daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga *K…ôriste, a kadakwara sl…ôra a…óaw ta menjey a…óaw ha la. AŇčga ndaw masa yah ma wu…óa kalah, aŇčga fa key sl…ôra Ňčga Bay Mahura ta mevel pal.
6.22: Maja Ňčgene, ya fa sl…ôrdakwara Tisik e amba ka s…ôrmara menjey ala fe…óe, asaya, amba a v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč.
6.23: Akwar m…ôlma a…óaw hay, anja Gazlavay Papa al…ôkwa ta Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste Ňčga njadamakwar daa zazay, Ňčga handamawa mewu…óey-vaw a wuzlah akwar, asaya, Ňčga njadamakwar daa met…ô…ďey-mey.
6.24: Anja maaya Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga njey ta nd…ôhay tabiya ma wu…ómara Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste ta mewu…óey-vaw masa fara fara mend…ôvey ba.

1.1: Ara yah Pawl leŇč Timawte, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga *Yesu *K…ôriste, ma wuzlalamakwara leeter ke…óe. Ya wuzlalamakwara Ňčgada akwar, nd…ôhay Ňčga *Gazlavay tabiya daa berney Ňčga F…ôlepi, akwar masa mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste. Asaya, ta Ňčgada akwar, *bay-ray hay, ta nd…ôhay ma j…ôna nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu.
1.2: Anja Papa al…ôkwa, Bay Gazlavay, ta Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu K…ôriste Ňčga p…ôsmakwar mey, asaya, Ňčga njadamakwar daa zazay. Pawl a key ambahw a Gazlavay maja F…ôlepi hay
1.3: Daa masa ya fa wulkey da ray akwar na, ya fa kar suse a Papay Bay Gazlavay maja akwar.
1.4: Daa masa ya fa d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay maja akwar na, ya faa s…ômey,
1.5: maja d…ôga akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu haa wure ke…óe, akwar fa j…ônmaya Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya.
1.6: Gazlavay ta zla sl…ôra maaya ha la da wuzlah akwar. Ya s…ôra fara fara a handa la fa mey fa mey, haa aa mend…ôvey a ta pas masa Yesu *K…ôriste ma da v…ôhwa.
1.7: Masa ya fa wulkey da ray akwar tabiya ta mees…ômey kaa na, ara cek maaya kalah, maja ya fa wu…ókwar kalah. Akwar ta v…ôlmaya g…ôdaŇč la. Ňägene, kwa wure ke…óe yah daa f…ôrs…ône, kwa yah fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sariya, ya fa wuzdatara Mey-maaya-mawiya na, ara mey fara fara. Maja Ňčgene, akwar tabiya ta h…ôtam mep…ôsey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay la anda yah.
1.8: Ahaw, ya fa wu…ókwar tabiya ta mewu…óey-vaw ma sawa ta fa Yesu K…ôriste. Gazlavay a s…ôra, mey a…óaw ke…óe ara mey masa fara fara.
1.9: Daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay a…óaw a Gazlavay maja akwar na, ya faa c…ôf…óa amba ka wu…óam vaw ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, amba ka s…ôrmara mey masa fara fara maaya maaya, asaya, amba ka s…ôrmara cek masa maaya Ňčga key.
1.10: Anda ke…óe, ka s…ôrmara Ňčga wunkey cek maaya ta maaya ba la amba ta pas masa K…ôriste ma da v…ôhwa na, a h…ôtfakwar, akwar nd…ôhay maaya, manjar meb…ôrey.
1.11: Asaya, ka da kam cek maaya ta c…ôve…ó e mandaw mandaw ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay a da namar ray a Gazlavay, a da h…ôlmamara. Cek ma t…ôka Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey na, daha daw?
1.12: M…ôlma a…óaw hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, ya wu…óey ka s…ôrmara kwa ya fa s…ôrey banay na, banay a, ta j…ôna *Mey-maaya-mawiya la Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey.
1.13: Fara fara, nd…ôhay tabiya ma j…ô…ómara way Ňčga bay, ta nd…ôhay mekele tabiya fe…óe, a s…ôrmara yah daa f…ôrs…ône na, maja *K…ôriste.
1.14: Asaya, har-g…ôdaŇč Ňčga m…ôlma a…óaw hay ta pamara Bay Mahura Yesu la Ňčga ndaw ata ma f…ôna ma f…ôna maja yah daa f…ôrs…ône. Da ray Ňčgene, ta h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč la Ňčga wuzdamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay fa mey fa mey, ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba.
1.15: Ya s…ôra fara fara, nd…ôhay siya hay da wuzlah ata, a wuzdamara mey da ray K…ôriste ta s…ôleŇč maja yah, a wu…óam Ňčga n…ôsmara mez…ôley a…óaw. Ama siya hay na, a wuzdamara mey a ta mevel maaya.
1.16: Nd…ôhay a, a kamara anda ke…óe na, maja fa wu…ómaya, a s…ôrmara Bay Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdiwa fe…óe amba ya wuzdatara Mey-maaya-mawiya na, ara mey masa fara fara.
1.17: Nd…ôhay masa s…ôleŇč hay heyey, a wuzdamara mey da ray K…ôriste na, a key Ňčgene, a wu…óam Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay ta c…ôve…ó e ba, ama a wu…óam Ňčga s…ôrdamaya banay saya a ray masa yah daa f…ôrs…ône ke…óe.
1.18: Kwa a wuzdamara mey Ňčga K…ôriste ta mevel maaya, kwa ta mevel maaya ba na, mey a…óaw da hwa…ó a me? Kwa a wuzdamara kwara kwara na, yah na, ya faa s…ômey maja mey Ňčga K…ôriste fa daw fa mey fa mey. Ahaw, yaa s…ômey la ma f…ôna,
1.19: maja ya s…ôra, banay hay a Ňčgene a da ka amba ya l…ôhey maja med…ôrey-daŇčgay akwar Ňčgada Bay Gazlavay maja yah, ta mej…ôney ma sawa ta fa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste .
1.20: Cek masa yah ma s…ôkwa, masa yah ma wu…óey kalah na, ya wu…óey hwaray a kaya da ray menjey a…óaw ba s…ôlak. Anda ke…óe, ya wu…óey ya njey ta g…ôdaŇč d…ôga wure ke…óe haa Ňčga s…ôrmataw amba nd…ôhay a namar ray a K…ôriste maja yah, kwa yah ta dey, kwa a k…ô…ómaya vagay.
1.21: Ňägada yah, cek mahura daa menjey a…óaw na, ara K…ôriste. Yaw, mem…ôcey na, ara cek a…óaw meh…ôtey.
1.22: Ama da yah ta dey na, ya gwa ya key sl…ôra maaya Ňčga j…ôney nd…ôhay la saya. Wure ke…óe, ya s…ôra c…ôve…ó masa yah ma da ley saba.
1.23: Ya fa wulkey cew cew. Ya wu…óey kalah na, ya mb…ôkda b…ôla ke…óe amba ya daw ya njam ta K…ôriste. Ara cek maaya kalah.
1.24: Ama cek mahura ma f…ôna saya na, si ya njey ta dey amba ya j…ônkwar …óagay.
1.25: Maja Ňčgene, ya fa s…ôra fara fara ya njey da b…ôla ke…óe la …óagay, asaya, ya s…ôra ya da njey ta akwar tabiya amba ya j…ônkwar Ňčga t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, asaya, amba kaa s…ômam daa c…ôve…ó aŇčga.
1.26: Ta pas masa yah ma da daw fa akwar saya na, ka h…ôlmamara Yesu K…ôriste la ma f…ôna saya, maja yah ta akwar. Si menjey akwar a key letek anda Mey-maaya-mawiya ma l…ôvey
1.27: Cek mahura na, si menjey akwar a key letek anda *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga *K…ôriste ma l…ôvey. Kwa ya ta h…ôtey har la Ňčga daw fa akwar, kwa ya ta h…ôtey har daa ba, ya wu…óey ya c…ônda na, akwar manjatakaya maaya maaya daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, mevel akwar mac…ômkaya letek, akwar fa k…ô…óam vaw ta mevel pal, amba nd…ôhay a t…ô…ďmara Mey-maaya-mawiya ha ta mevel maaya.
1.28: Ka da zluram ta masa-g…ôra akwar hay ba s…ôlak. Akwar ma zluram ba Ňčgene na, fa wuzda masa-g…ôra akwar hay a ata daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga meez…ô…óey, ama akwar na, daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga mel…ôhey. Ara cek masa Gazlavay ma ka.
1.29: Ahaw, Bay Gazlavay ta kakwar maaya la amba ka t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga K…ôriste. Ňäga t…ô…ďey mey aŇčga daada ba, ama amba ka s…ôram banay maja aŇčga may.
1.30: Zleezle daa masa yah da cakay akwar na, akwar ma h…ôtmaya la ya fa k…ô…óey vaw ta masa-g…ôra hay daa sl…ôra Ňčga Yesu. Wure ke…óe, akwar fa c…ôndamara ya fa k…ô…óey vaw saya. Akwar may fa k…ô…óam vaw daa sl…ôra ha anda yah.

2.1: Akwar mac…ômkaya ta *K…ôriste ke…óe na, fa v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč, ba diya? Mewu…óey-vaw aŇčga fa v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč, ba diya? Akwar mac…ômkaya ta *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay, ba diya? Akwar fa s…ôram dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay, ba diya?
2.2: Anda ke…óe, ya fa l…ôvkwar, wu…óam vaw, c…ômdamara …óay akwar letek, c…ômdamara mevel akwar letek, mewulkey akwar letek, amba yaa s…ômey ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
2.3: Ka da kam cek maja ray akwar daada ba. Ka da pamata ray akwar Ňčga mahura hay ba, ama n…ôkmata nd…ôhay anda a f…ônmakwar, namatar ray.
2.4: Kwa waawa a da s…ôpey cek Ňčga j…ôna ray aŇčga daada ba, ama Ňčga j…ôney nd…ôhay mekele da wuzlah akwar may.
2.5: Da wuzlah akwar na, kam cek anda Yesu K…ôriste ma ka.
2.6: AŇčga na, letek ta Gazlavay, ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ta s…ôpey c…ôve…ó amba a pa ray aŇčga anda Gazlavay daa ba.
2.7: Ama mbak! a mb…ôkd…ôrwa bay aŇčga ta mewe…óey aŇčga da va…ó, a pa ray aŇčga Ňčga ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga nd…ôhay, a yawa, aŇčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč. Daa masa aŇčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč na,
2.8: a pa ray aŇčga Ňčga mec…ôhe, a nar ray a Gazlavay mandaw mandaw haa a v…ôlda ray aŇčga Ňčga m…ôcey, kwa fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya .
2.9: Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay leŇč! a la aa slam da va…ó, slam maaya ma f…ônta slam hay tabiya. A par mez…ôley ma f…ôna mez…ôley Ňčga cek hay c…ôpa.
2.10: Da ray Ňčgene, cek hay tabiya kwa da va…ó, kwa da b…ôla ke…óe, kwa nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya hay, a da h…ôslmar ray a Yesu a, a da ragadamata mereŇčgwez ata hay fa mey aŇčga.
2.11: Asaya, nd…ôhay tabiya a da wuzdamara Yesu K…ôriste na, ara Bay Mahura. Anda ke…óe, a da h…ôlmamara Gazlavay PapaŇč maja. Wa…óam anda wurzla hay ma wa…óam da gazlavay da va…ó
2.12: Jam a…óaw hay, daa masa yah da wuzlah akwar na, akwar fa c…ônmar mey a Gazlavay mandaw mandaw. Ňägene ara cek maaya. Ama kwa wure ke…óe yah da wuzlah akwar daa ba ke…óe na, c…ônmar mey mandaw mandaw anda yah da wuzlah akwar c…ôŇčga. Ňägene ara cek maaya ma f…ôna saya. Da ray Ňčgene, kamara sl…ôra masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldakwara haa mend…ôvey a, ta meney ray ga fa mey aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, akwar fa wuzdamara Gazlavay ta l…ôhdakwar sem.
2.13: Kamara anda ke…óe maja ara Gazlavay ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga daa mevel akwar, amba ka wu…óam Ňčga key cek masa ma mbafar, asaya, amba ka h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key cek maaya masa aŇčga ma wu…óey Ňčga key.
2.14: Daa menjey akwar tabiya na, ka da kam cek ta meeŇčgurey-mey ba, ta meyey-mey ba,
2.15: amba ka t…ôram Ňčga nd…ôhay masa mey da ray ata daa ba, manjar meb…ôrey. Anda mel…ôvey, da wuzlah nd…ôhay manjar Ňčga k…ôtey ta nd…ôhay man…ôstakaya hay da b…ôla ke…óe na, ka da njam, akwar b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay, meb…ôrey fa akwar daa ba. Anda ke…óe, ka da wa…óam da wuzlah ata anda wurzla hay ma wa…óam da gazlavay da va…ó,
2.16: maja akwar fa wuzdamatara mey ma v…ôltar heter mend…ôvey ba. Da akwar fa kamara anda ke…óe na, ta pas masa *K…ôriste ma da v…ôhwa, Ňčgene ya gwa ya h…ôsley ray la fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maja akwar. Ňägene, a wuzd…ôrwa sl…ôra a…óaw masa yah ma ka ta g…ôdaŇč la a palah, ara sl…ôra saw ba.
2.17: Met…ô…ďey mey akwar ara anda cek mev…ôley a Gazlavay. Kwa da nd…ôhay a k…ô…ómaya vagay, mem…ôcey a…óaw a t…ôrey anda cek mev…ôley a Gazlavay a dey cek masa akwar ma v…ôldamara a Gazlavay. Da anda ke…óe na, ya faa s…ômey, ya wu…óey amba akwar may kaa s…ômam anda yah.
2.18: Akwar may, maaya na, kaa s…ômam k…ône, anda ke…óe, sas…ômkwa daa slam a. Mey da ray ata Timawte ta Epaf…ôrawdit
2.19: Ya fa wulkey fara fara, da Bay Mahura Yesu ta wu…óey la na, daa …óar a ke…óe ya sl…ôrda Timawte la fa akwar. Masa ta v…ôhwa cay na, a kadiwa mey masa aa ma c…ônd…ôrwa fa akwar, amba mey a, a v…ôlya g…ôdaŇč.
2.20: Ndaw fa wulkey da ray akwar anda yah na, daa ba, si Timawte pal. AŇčga na, fa wulkey fara fara da ray akwar.
2.21: Nd…ôhay siya hay tabiya a s…ôpam cek si Ňčgada ata gway, a wulkam da ray cek masa Yesu *K…ôriste ma wu…óey ba.
2.22: Ama Timawte na, ka s…ôrmara ya kam sl…ôra cew e amba *Mey-maaya-mawiya a daw fa mey fa mey. AŇčga ta j…ônya la ga anda b…ôzey ma kam sl…ôra ta papaha. Da ray Ňčgene, akwar ta saŇčgalamara la, ka s…ôrmara aŇčga ndaw ma ka sl…ôra ta c…ôve…ó e.
2.23: Anda ke…óe, ya wu…óey Ňčga sl…ôrey fa akwar na, aŇčga. Ya da sl…ôrda na, ta pas masa ta …ó…ôslmara sariya a…óaw cay.
2.24: Asaya, ya wulkey da Bay Mahura ta wu…óey la na, yah may, gweegwe cay, ya daw fa akwar.
2.25: M…ôlma al…ôkwa Epaf…ôrawdit, ndaw masa akwar ma sl…ôrdamiwa amba a sawa a j…ônya daa cek hay masa yah ma wu…óey heyey na, ala ta kam sl…ôra la cew e. AŇčga ta j…ônya la, anda ndaw ma j…ôney mandala aŇčga daa v…ôram. Ama wure ke…óe, ya wulkey si ya sl…ôrdakwara,
2.26: maja matakwam akwar tabiya fa kar, a wu…óey Ňčga h…ôtkwar fa dey. Ta wulkey la ga, maja akwar ma c…ôndamara vaw ta car la.
2.27: Fara fara vaw ta car la ga, nek…ô…óey a m…ôcey. Ama Gazlavay ta s…ôrfar dey-ceceh la, ta mb…ôlda sem. A s…ôrey dey-ceceh na, fa aŇčga pal ba, ama fa yah may. A wu…óey amba ya s…ôrey banay ma f…ôna ma f…ôna ba.
2.28: Yaw, ya wu…óey ya sl…ôrdakwara fiyaw fiyaw amba da masa akwar ma h…ôtmar la saya na, kaa s…ômam. Anda ke…óe, yah kwa, ya gwa ya wulkey ga saba.
2.29: Ta pas masa ta wusey la na, t…ô…ďmara ta mees…ômey ga, maja aŇčga m…ôlmakw akwar daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga Bay Mahura. H…ôslmar ray Ňčgada ndaw masa anda Ňčgene,
2.30: maja nek…ô…óey a m…ôcey daa sl…ôra Ňčga K…ôriste. Ta t…ô…ďa la Ňčga v…ôlda kwa heter aŇčga amba a j…ônya maja akwar tabiya.

3.1: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ehe, ya l…ôvkwar saya, sas…ômam maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta Bay Mahura Yesu. Yah na, ya g…ôrey ba Ňčga wuzlalakwar mey masa ya ta wuzdakwara sem, amba a j…ônkwar Ňčga njey daa c…ôve…ó maaya.
3.2: Pam leŇčgesl ta nd…ôhay ma ka cek hay maaya ba hay, mak…ôwtakaya anda g…ôdey hay. Ata na, ara nd…ôhay ma l…ôvam si ka slam mandawal amba Gazlavay a t…ô…ďkwar anda nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
3.3: Nd…ôhay maslakaya mandawal fara fara na, ara al…ôkwa, maja al…ôkwa nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay. Al…ôkwa fa d…ôrkwa daŇčgay a Gazlavay ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Mes…ôfney aŇčga. Asaya, al…ôkwa fa h…ôslkwa ray maja Yesu *K…ôriste. Al…ôkwa fa pakwa leŇčgesl al…ôkwa a ray kwakwas masa nd…ôhay ma kamara na, daa ba.
3.4: Da kwakwas a ara cek maaya na, anja Ňčgene yah may, ya pa leŇčgesl a…óaw la a ray a. Da ndaw a wulkey a l…ôhey la maja kwakwas a na, yah may, ya f…ôna ndaw a Ňčgene la ga ta mewulkey.
3.5: Yah ndaw *Israyel, daa s…ôkway Ňčga BenjameŇč. Yah na, ndaw *Heb…ôre masa fara fara maja papay ta mamay na, ara nd…ôhay Heb…ôre hay fara fara. Ya yawa, ya key luma pal, a slamiwa mandawal. Nd…ôhay ma s…ôpa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz fara fara na, yah da wuzlah ata, maja yah ndaw Fariza.
3.6: Ya ta s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz la maaya maaya kalah haa ya s…ôrdata banay ga ta nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu. Da ndaw a wulkey Gazlavay a pa Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga maja aa ma s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, anja daa Ňčgene, yah ndaw maaya, mey da ray a…óaw daa ba.
3.7: Cek hay masa yah ma kata zleezle Ňčgene na, ya n…ôkta anda cek hay ma j…ônmaya. Ama wure ke…óe, yah ndaw Ňčga K…ôriste kaa na, ya n…ôkta cek hay a anda cek hay Ňčga tede.
3.8: Fara fara, ya n…ôka kwa meeme anda cek Ňčga tede. Ya n…ôka anda cek Ňčga tede na, maja cek maaya ma f…ôna cek hay tabiya daha. Cek maaya ha na, ara mes…ôrey Yesu K…ôriste, Bay a…óaw. Ara maja aŇčga, yah ma mb…ôkdata cek hay tabiya, ya n…ôkta anda zay Ňčga tede, amba ya t…ôrey ndaw Ňčga K…ôriste,
3.9: ya njam ala mac…ômkaya cew e. Zleezle ya l…ôvey, yah, ndaw maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay maja ya fa s…ôpa kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz. Ama wure ke…óe, ya fa da l…ôvey k…ône daa saba. Gazlavay a paya Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga na, maja yah ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga K…ôriste. Ara Gazlavay ma paya Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga, maja yah ma pa K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw a…óaw fara fara.
3.10: Kwa cek mekele masa yah ma wu…óey na, daa ba. Ya wu…óey na, si Ňčga s…ôrey K…ôriste ta g…ôdaŇč aŇčga masa ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey. Asaya, ya wu…óey ya s…ôrey banay anda aŇčga ma s…ôra, ya wu…óey ya t…ôrey anda aŇčga daa masa aŇčga ma m…ôcey.
3.11: Da anda ke…óe na, ya wulkey Gazlavay a sl…ôk…óadiwa la daa mem…ôcey anda K…ôriste. Mekey g…ôdaŇč Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay
3.12: Ya gwa ya l…ôvey ya ta t…ôrey sem anda *K…ôriste na, daa ba. Anda mel…ôvey, ya gwa ya l…ôvey ya key meb…ôrey saba na, k…ône ba. Ama ya fa key g…ôdaŇč ma f…ôna ma f…ôna amba ya t…ô…ďa K…ôriste ta har cew cew, maja Yesu K…ôriste ta t…ô…ďya sem Ňčgada aŇčga.
3.13: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya gwa ya l…ôvey ya ta t…ôrey sem anda K…ôriste na, daa ba araŇč. Ama wure ke…óe, ya fa key g…ôdaŇč Ňčga key cek pal daha, ya wulkey da ray cek fa d…ô…ďa a…óaw ba, ama ya wu…óey Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey. Ya hway ta g…ôdaŇč anda nd…ôhay ma kam kwakur…óa, amba ya h…ôtey cek masa ya ta h…ôtar daa ba araŇč.
3.14: Ya hway ta c…ôve…ó e, kasl aa mend…ôvey a, maja Gazlavay fa z…ôlya da va…ó amba a v…ôldiwa cek Ňčga mahway a…óaw maja Yesu K…ôriste.
3.15: Yaw, al…ôkwa masa mawiya daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay saba kaa na, si ya kakwa k…ône. Da akwar fa s…ôpam Ňčga key cek wal na, Gazlavay a j…ônkwar la Ňčga s…ôra cek masa maaya Ňčga key ta c…ôve…ó e.
3.16: Cek mahura na, nakwa mandaw mandaw taa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay masa Ňčgeeme al…ôkwa ma nakwa da hwa…ó a.
3.17: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, akwar tabiya kam cek anda yah. N…ôkam dey fa nd…ôhay ma kam cek anda ala, kamara k…ône.
3.18: Nd…ôhay ga menjey ata fa wuzd…ôrwa ata na, masa-g…ôra hay Ňčga K…ôriste ma m…ôcey fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya. Ya ta kadakwara mey a ke…óe la dey ga. Wure ke…óe, ya fa kadakwara saya ta mat…ôway daa dey.
3.19: Pas masa …óar ata daa saba na, Bay Gazlavay a da k…ôzlata aa awaw magaza. A wu…óam c…ôve…ó Ňčga Bay Gazlavay ba s…ôlak, ama leŇčgesl ata, mapakaya mandaw mandaw da ray cek hay masa mevel ata ma wu…óey. A kam cek hay ma ka hwaray, ama faa s…ômam da ray cek hay a. A wulkam si da ray cek hay da b…ôla ke…óe gway.
3.20: Ama Ňčgada al…ôkwa na, wulkakwa da ray slam da va…ó, way al…ôkwa menjey fara fara. Al…ôkwa fa s…ôkwakwa Yesu K…ôriste, Bay al…ôkwa Mahura ma da sawa da va…ó. Ara ndaw ma da l…ôhdandakwar.
3.21: Vaw al…ôkwa masa ta g…ôdaŇč daa ba, ma da m…ôcey ke…óe na, Yesu a da t…ôrda Ňčga vaw masa ta g…ôdaŇč, letek ta vaw aŇčga. A da t…ôrda vaw al…ôkwa na, ta g…ôdaŇč masa aŇčga ma da wey da ray cek hay tabiya ta aŇčga.

4.1: Da ray Ňčgene, m…ôlma a…óaw hay mawu…ótakaya, njam maaya maaya daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Bay Mahura anda yah ma l…ôvkwar. Ya fa wu…ókwar kalah, matakwam akwar fa kaya, ya wu…óey Ňčga h…ôtkwar fa dey saya. Ya faa s…ômey da ray akwar, maja akwar ma wuzdamara sl…ôra a…óaw ara sl…ôra maaya. Cek hay maaya Ňčga key
4.2: Waa Evawdi ta Sintik, Ňčgusay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, ya kakwar ambahw, c…ômam …óay maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta Bay Mahura.
4.3: Yaw, kah Sizige , m…ôlma a…óaw maaya masa yah ma kakwa sl…ôra cew e, ya kaka ambahw may, j…ônta Ňčgusay a amba a njam daa zazay. Ya l…ôvka anda ke…óe na, maja ala ta k…ô…óam vaw la ga bama ta Ňčgusay a daa sl…ôra, amba nd…ôhay mekele mekele a t…ô…ďmara Mey-maaya-mawiya. Ala ta Ňčgusay a, ya ta kam sl…ôra la bama ta ata K…ôlemaŇč leŇč nd…ôhay mekele hay ma j…ônmaya daa sl…ôra ha. Gazlavay ta wuzlala mez…ôley ata sem c…ôpa aa …óerewel Ňčga nd…ôhay ma da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba.
4.4: Sas…ômam mandaw mandaw maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta Bay Mahura. Ya fa l…ôvkwar saya, sas…ômam.
4.5: Kam cek maaya amba nd…ôhay tabiya a n…ôkmakwar akwar nd…ôhay meekwe…ó-mey hay. Kamara k…ône maja gweegwe Bay Mahura a v…ôhwa.
4.6: Ka da wulkam ba s…ôlak, ama daa cek hay tabiya ma f…ônkwar ray na, kadamara a Gazlavay, d…ôrmar daŇčgay, cac…ôf…óamara Ňčga j…ônkwar, kamar suse.
4.7: Da akwar fa kamara anda ke…óe na, Gazlavay a njadakwar la daa zazay, maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta Yesu *K…ôriste. Zazay a, a f…ôna leŇčgesl Ňčga ndaw. Da zazay a daha na, akwar fa da wulkam daa ba. Kam cek hay maaya
4.8: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya wu…óey ya nd…ôvda mey a…óaw d…ô…ďa. Ya l…ôvkwar, pamara leŇčgesl akwar a ray cek hay maaya, masa nd…ôhay maa s…ômam da ray a. Anda mel…ôvey, mey masa fara fara, cek masa nd…ôhay maa h…ômdamara, cek masa ta c…ôve…ó e, cek manjar Ňčga zl…ô…ďey, cek ma mbafatar a nd…ôhay, leŇč cek masa nd…ôhay maa guzlam da ray a maaya.
4.9: Cek hay a tabiya masa yah maa s…ôrkadakwara, leŇč masa akwar ma t…ô…ďmara, masa akwar ma c…ôndamara fa yah, ta masa akwar ma h…ôtmar fa yah na, kadamara sl…ôra. Da akwar ta kadamara sl…ôra ta cek hay a c…ôpa la na, Gazlavay, ndaw ma njadata nd…ôhay daa zazay, a njey la ta akwar. Pawl a katar suse a F…ôlepi hay
4.10: Ya fa kar suse a Bay Mahura Yesu, ya faa s…ômey ga maja akwar ta h…ôtam c…ôve…ó Ňčga j…ônmaya la saya. Zleezle, akwar fa wulkam da ray a…óaw fara fara Ňčga j…ônmaya, ama menjey ga, akwar ta h…ôtam c…ôve…ó daa ba, si wure ke…óe.
4.11: Ya l…ôvkwar anda ke…óe na, a key ya r…ôkey maja viya fa kaya ba. Yah na, ya taa s…ôrkey sem Ňčga njey ta mees…ômey da ray cek da har a…óaw gway.
4.12: Anda mel…ôvey, kwa yah daa viya, kwa zleley a…óaw ga, ya s…ôra menjey k…ône. Kwa cek mez…ômey daha, kwa may fa caya, kwa ya ta cek hay ga ma f…ônmaya ta g…ôdaŇč, kwa cek a wusya ba na, ya taa s…ôrkey menjey ta zazay cay. Kwa daa banay, kwa daa wiya,
4.13: ya gwa ya key cek tabiya maja *K…ôriste fa v…ôlya g…ôdaŇč.
4.14: Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa na, akwar ta j…ônmaya la ga daa banay a…óaw c…ôŇčga.
4.15: -16 Akwar, F…ôlepi hay, s…ôrfadamara zleezle masa yah ma zlar Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčgeeme fete…óe heyey. Daa masa yah da Tesalawnik na, akwar ta sl…ôrmaya cek hay la dey ga Ňčga j…ônya. Masa yah ma mb…ôkd…ôrwa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan tabiya la na, nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz hay mekele ta j…ônmaya daa ba, si akwar gway.
4.17: Ka da wulkam a key ya s…ôpey dala fa akwar ba, ama ya wu…óey ka kamara anda ke…óe maja ya s…ôra Bay Gazlavay a p…ôskwar mey la maja cek hay a masa akwar ma v…ôldamiwa.
4.18: Ya fa l…ôvkwar, cek hay tabiya masa akwar ma sl…ôrdamiwa ta har Epaf…ôrawdit na, ta wusd…ôrwa la. Cek aha ta wusya la haa a f…ôna masa yah ma wu…óey. Wure ke…óe na, cek ma h…ôcya daa saba. Cek hay masa akwar ma v…ôldamiwa ha na, aa maaya kalah a mbafar a Gazlavay anda cek hay mev…ôley Ňčgada aŇčga masa mezey maaya.
4.19: Gazlavay al…ôkwa aŇčga ta zleley masa ma nd…ôvey ba. Da ray Ňčgene, cek masa da har akwar daa ba na, a v…ôlkwar la, maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta Yesu K…ôriste.
4.20: Anja nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôlmamara Gazlavay Papa al…ôkwa mandaw mandaw Ňčga s…ôrmataw. *Amen. Mey Ňčga madagway-dakw
4.21: Camatar har a nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya mac…ômkaya ta Yesu *K…ôriste. M…ôlma al…ôkwa hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu masa ala bama fe…óe a camakwar har may.
4.22: Asaya, nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu tabiya, a camakwar har. Fara fara ma camakwar har a ga kalah na, nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra da way bay da *Rawm.
4.23: Anja maaya Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu K…ôriste Ňčga njey ta akwar.

1.1: Ara yah, Pawl, ma wuzlalakwara leeter ke…óe, yah ndaw masa *Gazlavay ma wala Ňčga key *ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga *Yesu *K…ôriste. Ya wuzlalamara na, ala ta m…ôlma al…ôkwa Timawte.
1.2: Leeter e ke…óe, ara Ňčgada akwar, nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay daa berney Ňčga Kwalaws, akwar, m…ôlma a…óaw hay mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste, masa ma t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ta mevel pal. Anja Papa al…ôkwa, Bay Gazlavay, Ňčga p…ôskwar mey, Ňčga njadakwar daa zazay. Pawl a kar suse a Gazlavay maja Kwalaws hay
1.3: Daa masa ala fa d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay, PapaŇč Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu *K…ôriste, maja akwar na, ala fa kamar suse mandaw mandaw.
1.4: Ya kamar suse na, maja ya c…ôndamara akwar fa pamara Yesu K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara. Asaya, ya kamar suse maja akwar fa wu…ómata nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay c…ôpa.
1.5: Yaw, ka t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu, ka wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar na, maja akwar fa s…ôkwmara cek hay masa ka s…ôrmara fara fara ka h…ôtam la, cek hay masa Gazlavay ma …óiykwara da va…ó. Zleezle masa akwar ma c…ôndamara *Mey-maaya-mawiya, masa fara fara na, akwar taa s…ôrkam la da ray cek hay masa akwar ma da h…ôtmatar da va…ó a.
1.6: Mey-maaya-mawiya ha, fa daw fa mey fa mey da b…ôla tabiya, fa mb…ô…óda mevel Ňčga nd…ôhay amba a kam cek maaya. Anda ke…óe, fa mb…ô…ódakwara mevel akwar amba ka kam cek maaya may. A mb…ô…ódakwara mevel akwar a na, d…ôga ta pas masa akwar ma c…ôndamara mey a, ta masa akwar ma s…ôrmara fara fara, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray akwar.
1.7: Ara Epaf…ôras, mandala al…ôkwa masa yah ma wu…ókwa kalah, maa s…ôrkadakwara mey da ray maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a. Ya kam sl…ôra daa slam a. Ara ndaw ma key sl…ôra Ňčga K…ôriste ta c…ôve…ó e aa slam ala.
1.8: Ara aŇčga maa guzlndar da ray mewu…óey-vaw da wuzlah akwar masa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôldakwara.
1.9: Maja Ňčgene, d…ôga ta pas masa Epaf…ôras ma wuzdandara mey da ray akwar na, ala ta mb…ôkdamara med…ôrey-daŇčgay a Gazlavay maja akwar daa ba. Yaa c…ôf…óamara Gazlavay amba cek masa ma mbafar na, ka s…ôrmara maaya maaya. Asaya, yaa c…ôf…óamara Gazlavay amba Mes…ôfney aŇčga a v…ôlkwar leŇčgesl, a j…ônkwar Ňčga c…ôney cek hay da ray Gazlavay maaya maaya.
1.10: Anda ke…óe, daa menjey akwar, ka da kam cek hay masa Bay Mahura Yesu ma wu…óey, ka da kam cek hay ma mbafar mandaw mandaw. Maja Ňčgene, ka da kam sl…ôra wura wura tabiya maaya, ka da s…ôrmara Gazlavay ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
1.11: Ya d…ôram daŇčgay saya na, amba Gazlavay, ndaw manjakaya daa slam-mewe…óey, a v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč aŇčga mahura, amba ka …ď…ôsmara banay ta d…ôk-vaw.
1.12: Anda ke…óe, ka da kamar suse a Gazlavay, Papa al…ôkwa, ta mees…ômey. Ara aŇčga ma wurkwara c…ôve…ó, amba akwar may, ka h…ôtam cek masa aa ma …ďada Ňčgada nd…ôhay aŇčga hay daa slam aŇčga mawa…óakaya.
1.13: Papa al…ôkwa a badandakurwa daa l…ôvaŇč Ňčga bay-malula, a pandakwar a har B…ôzey aŇčga mawu…ókaya kalah.
1.14: Ara B…ôzey aŇčga ha ma v…ôlda heter aŇčga, amba a p…ôskandakwar dasi har Ňčga bay-malula, asaya, Gazlavay a mb…ôkdandakwara meb…ôrey al…ôkwa ta fa B…ôzey aŇčga ha. Yesu K…ôriste, aŇčga mahura da ray cek hay tabiya
1.15: Kwa ndaw pal ta h…ôtar Gazlavay daa ba, ama B…ôzey aŇčga, Yesu *K…ôriste, masa nd…ôhay ma h…ôtmar na, a lawa Gazlavay a, a key cek anda aŇčga. Yesu a, ara B…ôzey mahura Ňčga Gazlavay, ara aŇčga mahura da ray cek hay tabiya masa Gazlavay ma l…ômt…ôrwa.
1.16: AŇčga mahura maja ara ta fa aŇčga, Gazlavay ma l…ômta cek hay tabiya da va…ó ta cek hay tabiya da hwayak, cek hay tabiya masa al…ôkwa ma gwakwa Ňčga n…ôktakwa ta dey leŇč cek hay tabiya masa ma h…ôtam ba. Ta fa B…ôzey aŇčga ha, aa ta l…ômt…ôrwa cek hay masa ta g…ôdaŇč la, kwa maslaŇč aŇčga hay da va…ó, kwa bay hay da b…ôla, ta *bay-ray hay Ňčga mes…ôfney maaya ba hay leŇč kuley hay. Yaw, Gazlavay a l…ômt…ôrwa cek hay a tabiya na, ta fa har Ňčga B…ôzey aŇčga ha, asaya, a l…ômt…ôrwa Ňčgada B…ôzey aŇčga ha .
1.17: K…ôriste he na, aŇčga daha d…ôga b…ôla ta zley daa ba araŇč. Ara ta fa aŇčga, cek hay tabiya mapatakaya daa slam ata hay ta c…ôve…ó e.
1.18: Ara aŇčga bay-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz. A wey da ray nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz a anda ray Ňčga ndaw ma wey da ray vaw aŇčga. Nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz na, ara anda vaw aŇčga. Heter mawiya na, a zley ta fa aŇčga. AŇčga na, ara B…ôzey mahura, ara aŇčga ma sl…ôk…óawa teese…ó daa mem…ôcey. Maja Ňčgene, a f…ônta cek hay tabiya.
1.19: K…ôriste aŇčga mahura da ray cek hay tabiya na, maja ta mbafar la a Gazlavay amba mevel Ňčga K…ôriste he a key letek ta mevel aŇčga.
1.20: Asaya, Gazlavay ta sl…ôrd…ôrwa B…ôzey aŇčga ha la amba a c…ômtar …óay kwa a cek hay da va…ó, kwa a cek hay da hwayak, c…ôpa ta aŇčga. Ta handawa zazay la, a hand…ôrwa na, ta fa mambaz Ňčga B…ôzey aŇčga ma mb…ô…ówa fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya.
1.21: Zleezle akwar na, ta mb…ô…ómar d…ô…ďa la a Gazlavay, akwar masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay maja akwar ta mewulkey maaya ba, asaya, maja akwar ma kam cek hay maaya ba.
1.22: Ama wure ke…óe, Gazlavay ta c…ômkwar …óay la ta fa B…ôzey aŇčga, maja B…ôzey aŇčga ha ta t…ôrey ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč la, ta m…ôcey la fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya. A c…ômkwar …óay na, amba ka t…ôram nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga manjar meb…ôrey, masa ndaw a gwa ma mb…ô…ókwar ray ba.
1.23: Anda ke…óe, si ka pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara mandaw mandaw, ka da njam ta mevel cew cew ba, ama njam ta mevel pal. Cek hay masa ka s…ôrmara fara fara ka h…ôtam la da va…ó na, s…ôkwmara, ka da mb…ôkdamara ba. Cek hay masa akwar ma s…ôkwmara ha na, ara anda akwar ma c…ôndamara daa *Mey-maaya-mawiya. Mey-maaya-mawiya ha, ara mey masa nd…ôhay ma wuzdamara a nd…ôhay da b…ôla c…ôpa. Kwa yah, Pawl, sl…ôra a…óaw na, ara Ňčga wuzey mey a may. Sl…ôra masa Pawl ma ka Ňčgada Eg…ôliz
1.24: Wure ke…óe, ya faa s…ômey da ray banay ma sawa a ray a…óaw maja akwar. Zleezle *K…ôriste ta s…ôrey banay la. Yah fa s…ôrey banay may maja mec…ômey-ray Ňčga Eg…ôliz masa anda vaw Ňčga K…ôriste he. Ya s…ôrey banay a na, amba ya nd…ôvda sl…ôra aŇčga.
1.25: Ya ta t…ôrey ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz la, maja ara Gazlavay ma v…ôldiwa sl…ôra ha a har a…óaw amba ya wuzdakwara mey aŇčga tabiya Ňčgada akwar masa *J…ôwif hay ba hay.
1.26: Mey a na, zleezle ma…ďadakaya. Nd…ôhay a s…ôrmara mey a ba. Ama wure ke…óe, Gazlavay ta wuzd…ôrwa la a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
1.27: Gazlavay a wu…óey Ňčga wuzdatara cek masa aa ma wu…óey Ňčga ka. Cek aha na, ara cek maaya kalah ma handawa mep…ôsey-mey a ray s…ôkway hay tabiya. Mey a masa ma…ďadakaya ma wuzwa a palah na, ara Yesu K…ôriste ma njey aa mevel akwar. Ara maja Yesu a, akwar fa s…ôrmara Gazlavay a da mb…ôzdakwar aa slam aŇčga maaya.
1.28: Anda ke…óe, mey masa ala ma wuzdamara a nd…ôhay tabiya na, ara mey da ray K…ôriste. Da ray Ňčgene, ala fa k…ôtmata nd…ôhay tabiya, ala faa s…ôrkadamatar cek hay ta leŇčgesl masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldandara. Ya kam sl…ôra anda ke…óe na, amba nd…ôhay tabiya masa daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga K…ôriste, a t…ôram nd…ôhay maŇčgaratakaya daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
1.29: Ara maja ke…óe, ya key sl…ôra ta g…ôdaŇč tabiya masa K…ôriste ma v…ôldiwa, amba ya nd…ôvda sl…ôra ha.

2.1: Yaw, ya wu…óey na, ka s…ôrmara ya fa key g…ôdaŇč maja akwar Kwalaws hay, maja nd…ôhay da Lawdise, leŇč maja nd…ôhay mekele masa ma s…ôrmaya ba.
2.2: Ya fa key g…ôdaŇč, maja akwar tabiya na, amba ya v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga t…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Gazlavay ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, asaya amba ka wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar ta mevel pal. Ya fa key g…ôdaŇč maja ya wu…óey ka s…ôrmata cek hay masa Gazlavay ma wuzdat…ôrwa da ray K…ôriste, amba ka wulkam cew cew da ray cek hay a ba. Ya wu…óey ka s…ôrmara maaya maaya anda ke…óe na, amba Gazlavay a p…ôskwar mey ta mep…ôsey-mey mekele mekele tabiya. Anda ke…óe, ka da s…ôrmara mey ma…ďadakaya Ňčga Gazlavay maaya maaya. Mey ma…ďadakaya ha na, ara K…ôriste.
2.3: Ara ta fa K…ôriste he, ya gwakwa Ňčga h…ôtkwa leŇčgesl, ya gwakwa Ňčga s…ôrkwa cek maaya masa ma…ďadatakaya da har aŇčga.
2.4: Yaa guzlkwar anda ke…óe na, amba ndaw a batakwar ta mey hay ma mb…ô…óda leŇčgesl Ňčga ndaw ba.
2.5: Kwa yah da wuzlah akwar daa ba na, ama mevel a…óaw aa ta akwar mandaw mandaw c…ôŇčga. Ya faa s…ômey maja ya s…ôra, akwar fa kam cek hay ta c…ôve…ó e, asaya, akwar fa pamara K…ôriste Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara, akwar fa wulkam cew cew daa ba. Pam leŇčgesl ta nd…ôhay ma wu…óam Ňčga batamakwar
2.6: Wure ke…óe, akwar ta t…ô…ďmara Yesu *K…ôriste la amba a key Bay akwar Mahura. Anda ke…óe, njam, kam cek anda aŇčga ma wu…óey.
2.7: Yaw, njam ta aŇčga, anda wudez masa slaslalay a d…ôreŇč daa v…ôge…ó. T…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu ma f…ôna ma f…ôna anda ata maa s…ôrkadamakwara. Kamar suse a Gazlavay mandaw mandaw.
2.8: Pam leŇčgesl ta nd…ôhay maa guzlam saw maja a da batamakwar ta mees…ôrkey ata hay. Mees…ôrkey a, a sawa ta fa K…ôriste ba, ama a sawa ta fa kwakwas hay masa nd…ôhay ma kamara leŇč ta fa cek hay mekele mekele masa nd…ôhay ma namatar ray da b…ôla ke…óe.
2.9: Si ka j…ôkam sl…ômay fa K…ôriste gway, maja kwa daa masa aŇčga ma njey da b…ôla na, a lawa Papaha Bay Gazlavay, mevel aŇčga na, letek ta Ňčga aŇčga.
2.10: Akwar mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste Ňčgene na, ka h…ôtam heter mawiya ma sawa ta fa aŇčga la, heter e Ňčgene a h…ôckwar daa ba. K…ôriste he aŇčga mahura da ray nd…ôhay, aŇčga mahura da ray kuley hay, aŇčga mahura da ray maslaŇč hay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó, aŇčga mahura kwa da ray cek hay tabiya.
2.11: Zleezle na, Gazlavay ta l…ôvtar la a *J…ôwif hay Ňčga slam mandawal amba a wuzdamara fara fara ata nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. Ama daa mec…ômey akwar ta K…ôriste na, Gazlavay ta kakwar cek mekele la anda *mesley mandawal a. Cek aha na, ara memb…ô…óey mevel akwar maaya ba ma h…ôldakwar Ňčga key meb…ôrey. Gazlavay a ka ta fa har Ňčga ndaw ba, ama ta fa K…ôriste.
2.12: Masa ata ma kamakwar *baptem na, ta pas Ňčgene ara anda akwar daa c…ôvay ta Yesu K…ôriste daa slam a. Daa masa akwar fa bamawa daa yam Ňčga baptem e na, aŇčga anda akwar ta sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey sem ta K…ôriste he, maja ka s…ôrmara Gazlavay aa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga sl…ôk…óadat…ôrwa nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey. Gazlavay ta wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč aŇčga ha la ta pas masa aa ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa K…ôriste daa mem…ôcey.
2.13: Zleezle na, akwar anda nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya maja akwar ta meb…ôrey, asaya, maja akwar da wuzlah nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay ba, ka s…ôpmara *mewey Ňčga Gazlavay ba. Ama wure ke…óe, Gazlavay ta sl…ôk…óadakurwa sem ta K…ôriste amba a v…ôlkwar heter mawiya. Gazlavay ta mb…ôkdandakwara meb…ôrey al…ôkwa hay sem c…ôpa.
2.14: Zleezle na, al…ôkwa ta meb…ôrey maja al…ôkwa ma zl…ô…ďkwa mewey Ňčga Gazlavay. Ama Gazlavay ta mb…ôkdandakwara meb…ôrey al…ôkwa ha sem. A mb…ôkdandakwara na, anda ndaw ma p…ôley d…ôvaz da ray ndaw mekele. A mb…ôkdandakwara ta fa K…ôriste masa aa ma m…ôcey fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya.
2.15: Maja mem…ôcey aŇčga ha na, Gazlavay ta t…ô…ďa g…ôdaŇč da har kuley hay ta da har mad…ôrlam hay Ňčga bay-malula sem. Ta key bay-gula la da ray ata. Ta wuzda la fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya a f…ônta ta g…ôdaŇč.
2.16: Yaw, anda ke…óe, ka da j…ôkam sl…ômay fa ndaw ma wu…óey Ňčga h…ô…ďkwar ray ta mey Ňčga kwakwas da ray cek mez…ômey ta da ray cek mesey ba. Asaya, ka da j…ôkam sl…ômay fa ndaw ma h…ô…ďkwar ray da ray mekey gwagway Ňčga J…ôwif hay ba, kwa da ray mekey gwagway Ňčga maslawa Ňčga kiya ba, kwa da ray *pas mem…ôskey-vaw ba.
2.17: Kwakwas hay a Ňčgene na, ata anda meeze…ó Ňčga cek fara fara ma da sawa. Cek aha fara fara na, ara K…ôriste.
2.18: Nd…ôhay mekele fa kam cek amba nd…ôhay a wulkam ata nd…ôhay meekwe…ó-mey hay. Ata fa d…ôram daŇčgay a maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay. Mandaw mandaw ata fa zlapam, a l…ôvam Gazlavay fa wuztar cek. Da fa l…ôvmakwar akwar daa c…ôve…ó maaya ba na, ka da t…ô…ďmara ba! Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, ata fa zlapam Ňčga tede, mewulkey ata na, ara mewulkey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč.
2.19: Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, ata mac…ômkaya ta K…ôriste ba. K…ôriste na, ara *bay-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz. A wey da ray nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz a anda ray Ňčga ndaw ma wey da ray vaw tabiya. Nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga na, ata anda vaw aŇčga. Nd…ôhay mac…ômkaya ta aŇčga na, fa h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč ta fa aŇčga. Ata mac…ômkaya daa slam a na, anda vaw Ňčga ndaw maz…ôvkaya ta d…ômbazl hay. Nd…ôhay a, fa h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč ta fa Gazlavay Ňčga t…ô…ďey mey aŇčga ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, anda aŇčga ma wu…óey.
2.20: -21 Ka s…ôrmara, akwar mam…ôctakaya ta K…ôriste. Da ray Ňčgene, g…ôdaŇč Ňčga cek hay mekele mekele masa nd…ôhay ma namatar ray da b…ôla ke…óe fa da wam da ray akwar daa saba. Yaw, akwar fa njam, ka kam cek hay anda nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara Yesu ba na, maja me? Kwakwas ata hay fa l…ôvam: ‚ÄúKa da lamara cek ke…óe ba!‚ÄĚ, ‚ÄúKa daa c…ôkdamara cek ke…óe ba!‚ÄĚ, da daa ba, ‚ÄúKa da wusmara cek ke…óe ba!‚ÄĚ Ka namatar ray a kwakwas ata hay a Ňčgene na, maja me?
2.22: Da nd…ôhay fa s…ôpmara kwakwas hay a Ňčgene na, kwakwas hay a, aa z…ô…óam la. Kwakwas hay a na, ara mey hay mat…ôktakaya ta mees…ôrkey masa nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč ma kamara.
2.23: Fara fara, nd…ôhay a wulkam kwakwas hay a, ara cek maaya ma v…ôley leŇčgesl, maja fa d…ôram daŇčgay anda mevel ata ma wu…óey, fa nam ray, fa s…ôram banay ta vaw ata hay. Da ray Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a n…ôkmata kwakwas hay a anda cek maaya. Ama kwakwas hay a, a gwamara Ňčga j…ônmara ndaw ba, maja a gwamara Ňčga j…ônmara ndaw Ňčga wey da ray leŇčgesl aŇčga ba, a gwamara a t…ôkmara ndaw Ňčga key cek malamba ba.

3.1: Ka s…ôrmara Gazlavay ta sl…ôk…óadandakurwa sem daa mem…ôcey ta *K…ôriste daa slam a. Da ray Ňčgene, pamara leŇčgesl akwar a ray cek hay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó, daa slam masa K…ôriste manjakaya da hwa…ó a, ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Gazlavay.
3.2: Mandaw mandaw wulkam da ray cek hay Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó a. Ka da wulkam da ray cek hay da b…ôla ba.
3.3: Ka pamara leŇčgesl akwar a ray cek hay da va…ó a na, maja menjey akwar zleezle daa masa akwar ta s…ôrmara K…ôriste daa ba araŇč na, ta nd…ôvey sem, ama wure ke…óe, menjey akwar mawiya aa ma…ďadakaya da har K…ôriste maja akwar mac…ômkaya ta Gazlavay.
3.4: Ta pas masa K…ôriste, ndaw ma v…ôlkwar heter, ma da wuzwa vaw na, akwar may, ka da wuzmawa vaw ta aŇčga daa mewe…óey aŇčga.
3.5: Yaw, da ray Ňčgene, mb…ôkdamara mekey cek hay maaya ba da b…ôla. Anda mel…ôvey, mb…ôkdamara meley vaw saw, mewulkey Ňčga key cek maaya ba ma n…ôsa ndaw, mes…ôpey Ňčga key cek hay maaya ba ma ka hwaray, mes…ôpey Ňčga key cek malamba, asaya, mekey dey fa cek Ňčga nd…ôhay. Mekey dey fa cek Ňčga nd…ôhay na, ara anda mepey cek aha, aa slam a Ňčga Gazlavay.
3.6: Ke…óe na, ara cek hay maaya ba hay masa Gazlavay ma da cey mevel a ray nd…ôhay ma namar ray ba.
3.7: Zleezle daa masa akwar fa kam cek hay malamba fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, menjey akwar a, ta key la anda Ňčga ata ha may.
3.8: Ama wure ke…óe, mb…ôkdamara mecey-mevel, mekey cek Ňčga cey mevel a ndaw, mekey maagway, mec…ô…óey-vaw, meeguzley mey saw. Mb…ôkdamata cek hay ke…óe tabiya.
3.9: Asaya, ka da mb…ôrzlam da wuzlah akwar ba, maja akwar ta mb…ôkdamara menjey akwar zleezle sem, asaya, maja akwar ta mb…ôkdamara sl…ôra masa akwar ma kamara zleezle sem may.
3.10: Akwar nd…ôhay mawiya. Gazlavay ta v…ôlndakwar menjey mawiya la, aa fa …óiya menjey a mandaw mandaw amba a t…ôrey anda Ňčga aŇčga, amba ka s…ôrmara Gazlavay maaya maaya.
3.11: Anda ke…óe, cek ma wunkata nd…ôhay *J…ôwif hay ta s…ôkway hay mekele daa saba, cek ma wunkata nd…ôhay maslatakaya mandawal ta nd…ôhay manda-slam mandawal na, daa saba. Kwa nd…ôhay mar…ôzltakaya hay, kwa nd…ôhay ma s…ôra cek ba, kwa beke hay, leŇč nd…ôhay masa beke hay ba na, ata letek fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Ama cek mahura na, ara K…ôriste. AŇčga daa mevel Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay tabiya.
3.12: Gazlavay a walakwar, a t…ôrdakwar nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. AŇčga fa wu…ókwar. Da ray Ňčgene, daa menjey akwar c…ôpa na, s…ôram dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay, njam ta mevel maaya, kam sl…ôra ta meney ray, t…ôram nd…ôhay meekwe…ó-mey, ka da cam mevel saw saw ba.
3.13: Ka da cam mevel da wuzlah akwar ba. Da ndaw ma kaka cek maaya ba la na, mb…ôkdara meb…ôrey aŇčga ha. Mb…ôkdamatara meb…ôrey Ňčga m…ôlmakw akwar hay anda Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu ma mb…ôkdandakwara meb…ôrey al…ôkwa hay may.
3.14: Cek mahura na, wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar, maja da akwar fa wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar na, ka da njam mac…ômkaya tabiya daa slam a ta mevel pal.
3.15: Anja zazay Ňčga K…ôriste Ňčga wa mevel akwar. Gazlavay a z…ôlkwar Ňčga njey daa slam a na, amba ka h…ôtam zazay aŇčga ha Ňčgene. Kamar suse mandaw mandaw.
3.16: Pamara mey Ňčga K…ôriste aa mevel akwar maaya maaya. Sas…ôrkam da wuzlah akwar Ňčga njey maaya ta Gazlavay. K…ôtam vaw da wuzlah akwar ta leŇčgesl fara fara. Zlamar walay Ňčga *P…ôsam hay, zlamar walay Ňčga h…ôlma, asaya, zlamar walay hay masa Mes…ôfney aŇčga ma kadakwara. Zlamar walay a Gazlavay ta mevel akwar c…ôpa, kamar suse.
3.17: Daa cek hay c…ôpa masa akwar ma kamara ta mey hay c…ôpa masa akwar maa guzlam na, kamara ta mez…ôley Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu. Kamara ta mekey suse a Gazlavay, Papa al…ôkwa, maja Yesu. Mey da ray menjey Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu
3.18: Akwar Ňčgusay, namatar ray a zel akwar hay, maja meney ray na, ara cek maaya ma mbafar a Bay Mahura Yesu.
3.19: Akwar zel hay may, wu…ómata Ňčgwas akwar hay, ka da kam h…ôma a ray ata ba.
3.20: Akwar b…ôza hay, c…ônmatar mey a papakw akwar hay ta a mamakw akwar hay daa cek hay c…ôpa, maja mec…ôney-mey akwar a Ňčgene na, a mbafar a Bay Mahura Yesu.
3.21: Akwar papaŇč hay, ka da kam cek Ňčga catar mevel a b…ôz akwar hay ba, maja har ata a da r…ôwey Ňčga key cek maaya.
3.22: Akwar beke hay, namatar ray a bay akwar hay da b…ôla ke…óe daa cek hay tabiya. Ka namatar ray na, daa masa ata da cakay akwar Ňčga mbafatar daada ba, ama namatar ray kwa da masa ata da cakay akwar daa ba may. Sas…ôkar jak, kamatar sl…ôra ta mevel pal maja akwar fa namar ray a Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu.
3.23: Kwa sl…ôra wura wura masa akwar ma kamara na, kamara ta mevel pal, kamara sl…ôra ha anda Ňčgada Bay al…ôkwa Mahura, ba na, anda Ňčgada ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ba.
3.24: Ka s…ôrmara Bay Mahura masa akwar ma kamar sl…ôra na, ara *K…ôriste. Ara Bay Mahura ha ma da p…ôlkwara mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra akwar a, a da v…ôldakwara cek masa aa ma …ďada da va…ó Ňčgada nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
3.25: Ama nd…ôhay ma kam maagway na, Gazlavay a p…ôltara la anda sl…ôra masa ata ma kamara. Gazlavay na, a weley ndaw ta weley ba.

4.1: Akwar bay hay, kamatar cek a beke akwar hay ta c…ôve…ó e. S…ôrfadamara Bay akwar da va…ó daha may. Nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay a da kam na, me?
4.2: Mandaw mandaw d…ôrmar daŇčgay a Gazlavay. Maya…ó a da kakwar daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay akwar ba, asaya, kamar suse.
4.3: Daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay akwar, s…ôrfadamandar may, cac…ôf…óamara Gazlavay Ňčga …óiyndara c…ôve…ó maaya Ňčga wuzey mey aŇčga amba yaa s…ôrkadamatara mey ma…ďadakaya da ray *K…ôriste a nd…ôhay. Ka s…ôrmara, wure ke…óe yah daa f…ôrs…ône na, maja mey a.
4.4: D…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay Ňčga j…ônya daa mewuzey mey a, amba yaa guzltar a nd…ôhay na, a c…ôndamara mey a maaya maaya, anda Gazlavay ma l…ôvya Ňčga ka sl…ôra ha.
4.5: Wam vaw maaya maaya fa menjey akwar da wuzlah nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste ba. Mandaw mandaw da masa akwar ta h…ôtam har la na, j…ônmata nd…ôhay a Ňčga s…ôrmara mey Ňčga K…ôriste may.
4.6: Da masa akwar faa guzlam na, gwaguzlam mey hay maaya masa nd…ôhay ma wu…óam Ňčga j…ôkey sl…ômay fa v…ô…óa. Anda ke…óe, da ndaw aa c…ôf…óakwar da ray Yesu na, ka s…ôrmara mey masa akwar ma da mb…ô…ódamara. Mecey-har Ňčga madagway-dakw
4.7: Tisik, masa m…ôlma al…ôkwa daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste, ndaw masa yah ma wu…óa kalah, aŇčga fa key sl…ôra Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu ta mevel pal. Ala cew ala nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Bay Mahura ha. Tisik e na, a kadakwara cek hay c…ôpa la da ray a…óaw.
4.8: Maja Ňčgene, ya fa sl…ôrdakwara amba ka s…ôrmara menjey ala fe…óe, asaya, amba a v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč.
4.9: Ya fa sl…ôrdata ta Awnezim, m…ôlma al…ôkwa mawu…ókaya daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu. AŇčga na, ara ndaw ma s…ôpa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste ta mevel pal. Ara ndaw ma sawa fa akwar. Ata cewete, a kadamakwara mey da ray cek hay fe…óe la c…ôpa.
4.10: Aristarke, masa aŇčga wure ke…óe daa f…ôrs…ône ta yah, fa cakwar har. *Mark, ndaw daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Barnabas, fa cakwar har may. Ara ndaw masa yah maa guzlkwar da ray a heyey. Yaw, da masa ta wusey la fa akwar na, t…ô…ďmara maaya maaya.
4.11: Jes…ôwe , masa ata ma z…ôlmara Justus, fa cakwar har may. Nd…ôhay maakar a ke…óe, ara J…ôwif hay ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu masa ma j…ônmaya daa sl…ôra amba nd…ôhay a t…ô…ďmara Gazlavay Ňčga bay ata. A v…ôlmaya g…ôdaŇč ga. Wure ke…óe, J…ôwif hay mekele fa j…ônmaya fe…óe na, daa ba, si ara nd…ôhay maakar a ke…óe, ma j…ônmaya gway.
4.12: Epaf…ôras, ndaw akwar, fa cakwar har may. AŇčga ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste fara fara. Mandaw mandaw fa d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay ta mevel pal maja akwar. Fa d…ôrey daŇčgay amba ka mb…ôkdamara met…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Yesu ba, ka t…ôram nd…ôhay maŇčgaratakaya daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, asaya, amba ka s…ôrmara maaya maaya cek masa ma mbafar a Gazlavay.
4.13: Fara fara ya fa s…ôra Epaf…ôras aha fa s…ôrey banay daa sl…ôra maja akwar, asaya, maja nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da Lawdise ta nd…ôhay da Hirapawlis.
4.14: *Luk, dakwter masa ala ma wu…ómara kalah, leŇč Demas fa camakwar har may.
4.15: Camatar har a nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu da Lawdise, asaya, camar har a Nimfa, leŇč a nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu ma kusam da way aŇčga.
4.16: Masa akwar ma jaŇčgamara leeter masa yah ma wuzlalakwara ke…óe la na, sl…ôrdamatara a nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz da Lawdise amba a jaŇčgamara may. Nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz da Lawdise Ňčga sl…ôrdamakwara leeter masa yah ma wuzlalatara amba ka jaŇčgamara may.
4.17: L…ôvmar a Arkip Ňčga pey leŇčgesl fa sl…ôra masa Bay Mahura Yesu ma v…ôldara, Ňčga key g…ôdaŇč amba a nd…ôvda.
4.18: Ara yah, Pawl, ta har a…óaw, ma wuzlalakwara mecey-har a ke…óe. S…ôrfadamara yah na, yah daa f…ôrs…ône. Anja maaya Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga njey ta akwar.

1.1: Ara yah, Pawl, ma wuzlala leeter ke…óe. Ala ta ata Silas leŇč Timawte, ya camakwar har, akwar nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz da Tesalawnik, akwar masa mac…ômkaya ta *Gazlavay Papa al…ôkwa leŇč ta Bay al…ôkwa Mahura *Yesu *K…ôriste. Anja Gazlavay Ňčga p…ôskwar mey, asaya Ňčga njadakwar daa zazay. Pawl a kar suse a Gazlavay maja Tesalawnik hay
1.2: Daa masa ala fa d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay na, ala fa wulkam da ray akwar mandaw mandaw, ala fa kamar suse a Gazlavay maja akwar tabiya.
1.3: Asaya, daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay ala a Gazlavay Papa al…ôkwa na, ala fa s…ôrfadamara sl…ôra masa akwar ma kamara, maja akwar fa pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara. Ala fa s…ôrfadamara akwar fa kam sl…ôra ta g…ôdaŇč maja ka wu…ómara Yesu, asaya, akwar fa pam leŇčgesl mandaw mandaw a ray cek masa ka s…ôrmara ka h…ôtam la ta fa Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu *K…ôriste.
1.4: M…ôlma a…óaw hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, ya s…ôrmara Gazlavay a wu…ókwar kalah, asaya, ta walakwar la Ňčga key nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.
1.5: S…ôrmara daa masa ala fa wuzdamakwara *Mey-maaya-mawiya na, mey a, a wusey fa akwar na, ara ta mey meeguzley daada ba, ama ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay may. Mey masa ala maa guzldamara na, ya s…ôrmara ara mey fara fara. Daa masa ala da wuzlah akwar na, ka s…ôrmara menjey ala. Ya ta kam cek la Ňčga j…ônkwar.
1.6: Akwar na, akwar fa kam cek anda ala, asaya, akwar fa kam cek anda Bay Mahura Yesu. Akwar ta s…ôram banay la ga, ama ka ta t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay la c…ôŇčga, ka t…ô…ďmara ta mees…ômey, mees…ômey masa Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôldakwara.
1.7: Anda ke…óe, akwar fa kam cek maaya haa nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya da Masad…ôwan leŇč da Akay a n…ôkam dey fa akwar, a kamara k…ône.
1.8: Fara fara mey Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura a zlawa na, fa akwar haa a wusey fa nd…ôhay da Masad…ôwan leŇč da Akay. Asaya, kwa nd…ôhay daa wura, daa wura, fa c…ôndamara akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Da ray Ňčgene, ala fa daa guzlmatar da ray met…ô…ďey-mey akwar na, daa saba,
1.9: maja nd…ôhay a fa z…ôldamakwar sl…ômay, a l…ôvam akwar ta t…ô…ďmandar la maaya maaya daa masa ala da wuzlah akwar. Asaya, a l…ôvam akwar ta mb…ôkdamara metey kuley sem amba ka s…ôpam Gazlavay masa ta dey, Gazlavay masa fara fara.
1.10: Anda ke…óe, akwar fa s…ôkwmara B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay ma da v…ôhwa da gazlavay da va…ó. B…ôzey a na, ara Yesu masa Bay Gazlavay ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey heyey. Ara aŇčga ma da ka amba Gazlavay a cey mevel a ray al…ôkwa ba ta pas masa Gazlavay ma da ka sariya.

2.1: M…ôlma ala hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, akwar ta ray akwar, ka s…ôrmara ala ma diyam fa akwar heyey na, ara Ňčga tede ba.
2.2: Asaya, ka s…ôrmara daa masa ala ma wusam fa akwar daa ba araŇč na, nd…ôhay daa berney Ňčga F…ôlepi ta s…ôrdamandar banay la, ta c…ô…ómandar la. Masa ala ma wusam la fa akwar na, nd…ôhay ga ta kam h…ôma la a ray ala may. Ama Gazlavay ta v…ôlndar g…ôdaŇč la, amba ya wuzdamakwara Mey aŇčga maaya mawiya c…ôŇčga.
2.3: Masa ala fa wuzam mey da ray c…ôve…ó maaya a nd…ôhay na, ya wuzdamara na, ta memb…ôrzley da hwa…ó a daa ba, asaya, ala fa kam sl…ôra ta mevel maaya, ala fa batam nd…ôhay daa ba.
2.4: Ama Gazlavay ta saŇčgalandar la, ta s…ôra la, ala nd…ôhay aŇčga hay fara fara. Anda ke…óe, ta v…ôldandara *Mey-maaya-mawiya ha la amba ya wuzdamara a nd…ôhay. Maja Ňčgene, yaa guzlam na, amba a mbafatar a nd…ôhay ba, ama amba a mbafar a Gazlavay ma s…ôra mevel ala.
2.5: Ka s…ôrmara daa masa ala da wuzlah akwar na, ala faa guzlam mey maaya maaya Ňčga mbafakwar Ňčga f…ôcmakwar daa ba, ala fa wulkam amba ya batam cek fa nd…ôhay na, daa ba. Mey masa ala ma kadamara, kwa Gazlavay na, a s…ôra ara mey fara fara.
2.6: Ala ta wu…óam amba kwa waawa a h…ôlmandar na, daa ba. Kwa akwar, kwa nd…ôhay mekele, ala ta wu…óam amba ndaw a h…ôlmandar na, daa ba.
2.7: Ala na, ya gwamara Ňčga wey da ray akwar maja ala nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga Yesu. Ama ala ta kamara k…ône daa ba. Ala na, nd…ôhay meekwe…ó-mey da wuzlah akwar anda mamaŇč maaya ma n…ôkey dey fa b…ôz aŇčga hay.
2.8: Ala fa wu…ómakwar kalah. Da ray Ňčgene, ala ta wuzdamakwara Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga Gazlavay la. Ama ala ta mees…ômey Ňčga key cek mekele ma f…ôna saya. Ala ta mees…ômey ga Ňčga v…ôldamara kwa ray ala maja akwar, maja ala ta wu…ómakwar sem kalah.
2.9: M…ôlma ala hay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, sl…ôra masa ala ma kamara ta g…ôdaŇč ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčgada akwar na, akwar fa s…ôrfadamara, ba diya? Daa masa ala fa wuzdamakwara Mey-maaya-mawiya Ňčga Gazlavay na, ala ta m…ôskam vaw daa ba, ala ta kam sl…ôra la taa va…ó, taa pas, amba ya njam fa har akwar ba.
2.10: Daa masa ala da wuzlah akwar, akwar nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu na, menjey ala aŇčga maaya na, maja ala fa j…ôkam sl…ômay si fa Gazlavay, ala fa kam cek ta c…ôve…ó e, asaya, kwa nd…ôhay faa guzlam mey maaya ba da ray ala daa ba. Kwa akwar na, ka s…ôrmara menjey ala. Gazlavay may, a s…ôra.
2.11: Asaya, ka s…ôrmara ala ta kam cek la kwa Ňčgada waawa da wuzlah akwar anda papaŇč ma key cek Ňčgada b…ôz aŇčga hay.
2.12: Ala fa v…ôlmakwar g…ôdaŇč, ala fa d…ôkmakwar mevel, asaya, ala faa guzlmakwar mandaw mandaw amba ka njam, ka kam cek anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey. Ara aŇčga ma z…ôlkwar Ňčga njey a wuzlah nd…ôhay masa aŇčga fa wey da ray ata amba ka s…ôrmara maaya aŇčga.
2.13: Yaw, ala fa kamar suse a Gazlavay mandaw mandaw saya na, maja daa masa ala fa wuzdamakwara mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, akwar ta j…ôkam sl…ômay la. Akwar ta t…ô…ďmara mey a anda mey Ňčga nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč daa ba, ama ka t…ô…ďmara na, anda mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Fara fara mey a, ara mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Mey a, a v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč Ňčgada akwar nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay.
2.14: M…ôlma ala hay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, nd…ôhay akwar hay ta s…ôrdamakwar banay la anda *J…ôwif hay ma s…ôrdamata banay ta nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz hay Ňčga Gazlavay daa hwayak Ňčga *Jude. Anda ke…óe, akwar anda nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste daa hwayak Ňčga Jude he masa J…ôwif hay ma s…ôrdamata banay.
2.15: J…ôwif hay na, ta k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay la zleezle. J…ôwif hay mekele hay ta k…ô…ómara Bay Mahura Yesu la vagay. Asaya, J…ôwif hay mekele hay saya ta s…ôrdamandar banay la may. Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, Gazlavay faa s…ômey da ray ata daa ba. Ata masa-g…ôra hay Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya.
2.16: A t…ôkmandar Ňčga wuzey mey Ňčga Gazlavay a nd…ôhay masa J…ôwif hay ba hay, mey masa ma da l…ôhdata. J…ôwif hay a, ata ta meb…ôrey ga, ama ata fa kam meb…ôrey mandaw mandaw a dey a, a dey a. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a …ď…ôsa meb…ôrey ata ha saba, a cey mevel a ray ata, a katar sariya. Pawl a wu…óey Ňčga daw Ňčga n…ôkt…ôrwa Tesalawnik hay saya
2.17: M…ôlma ala hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, ala na, ta wu…ókam la ta akwar Ňčga …óar nek…ô…óey, ama mevel ala aŇčga ta akwar c…ôŇčga. Ala ta kam g…ôdaŇč la Ňčga v…ôhey fa akwar, maja ala fa wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtmakwar fa dey saya.
2.18: Ara maja Ňčgene, ala ta wu…óam la Ňčga v…ôhey fa akwar. Fara fara yah, Pawl, ta ray a…óaw, ya ta k…ô…óey vaw la dey weewe Ňčga daw fa akwar, ama *SataŇč ta t…ôkndar sem.
2.19: Ya wu…óam Ňčga v…ôhey fa akwar na, maja akwar nd…ôhay masa ala fa pamara mewulkey ala a ray akwar, akwar nd…ôhay ma v…ôlmandar mees…ômey, asaya, ara akwar ma da wuzdamandara ala ta kam sl…ôra maaya la. Maja Ňčgene, ya daa s…ômam fa mey Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu ta pas masa aŇčga ma da v…ôhwa.
2.20: Fara fara ala fa h…ôlmamara Bay al…ôkwa Mahura maja akwar, asaya, ala faa s…ômam maja akwar.

3.1: Masa ala ma c…ônam mey da ray akwar daa ba heyey na, ya gwamara Ňčga …ď…ôsmara ba. Anda ke…óe, ala ta wulkam la, maaya na, ya njam da Aten taava ala,
3.2: ya sl…ôrdamara Timawte fa akwar. Timawte he na, ara m…ôlma al…ôkwa daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, ala ma kam sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay bama Ňčga wuzey *Mey-maaya-mawiya da ray *K…ôriste. Da ray Ňčgene, ya ta sl…ôrdamara la fa akwar Ňčga j…ônkwar, asaya, Ňčga v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč daa mey Ňčga Yesu.
3.3: Ya sl…ôrdamara na, amba banay masa akwar ma s…ôrmara na, a mb…ô…óda leŇčgesl kwa Ňčga waawa da wuzlah akwar ba. Akwar na, ka s…ôrmara maaya maaya, banay hay a na, ara cek ma key daa menjey al…ôkwa, al…ôkwa nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay.
3.4: Daa masa ala da wuzlah akwar na, ya ta l…ôvmakwar la, ya da s…ôrkwa banay. Ka s…ôrmara fara fara banay a, ta wuswa la.
3.5: Da ray Ňčgene, daa masa ala ma gwamara Ňčga v…ôhey fa akwar daa ba heyey na, ya gwamara Ňčga …ď…ôsmara ba. Ta‚Äô, ya sl…ôrda Timawte fa akwar amba ya c…ônda mey da ray akwar, da akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu c…ôŇčga may kwa. Ya zlurey maja SataŇč a da batakwar. Da ta batakwar sem na, sl…ôra masa ala ma kamara da wuzlah akwar heyey na, a da t…ôrey Ňčga cek Ňčga tede.
3.6: Timawte ta daw la fa akwar, wure ke…óe ta v…ôhwa cay fa ala. Taa guzlndar mey maaya la da ray akwar, a l…ôvey akwar ta g…ôdaŇč daa mey Ňčga Yesu, asaya, akwar fa wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar. A l…ôvey saya, akwar fa s…ôrfadamandar maaya maaya c…ôŇčga. Akwar fa wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtmandar saya anda ala ma wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtmakwar saya may.
3.7: M…ôlma ala hay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, ala fa s…ôram banay kalah, ama daa masa ala ma c…ôndamara, akwar ta g…ôdaŇč daa mey Ňčga Yesu na, mey a ta v…ôlndar g…ôdaŇč la ga.
3.8: Wure ke…óe, ala ta mees…ômey ma f…ôna ma f…ôna maja akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Bay Mahura ta mevel pal.
3.9: Fara fara, ala faa s…ômam ga maja akwar. Ala fa kamar suse a Gazlavay, ama kwa ya kamar suse h…ôma kwara na, suse ala ha a wusa ba.
3.10: Ala fa d…ôram daŇčgay taa va…ó, taa pas mandaw mandaw ta mevel pal amba ya h…ôtmakwar fa dey, asaya, amba yaa s…ôrkadamakwar cek masa akwar ma s…ôrmara daa ba araŇč da ray c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay.
3.11: Anja Gazlavay Papa al…ôkwa ta ray aŇčga leŇč Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu Ňčga wurmandara c…ôve…ó amba ya diyam fa akwar.
3.12: Asaya, anja Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Ňčga ka amba ka wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, asaya, amba ka wu…ómata nd…ôhay tabiya anda ala ma wu…ómakwar may.
3.13: Anja Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Ňčga v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč amba cek malamba a njey aa mevel akwar ba, asaya, amba ta pas masa aŇčga ma da v…ôhwa a b…ôla ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay na, akwar nd…ôhay maaya manjar meb…ôrey fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay Papa al…ôkwa.

4.1: M…ôlma ala hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, wure ke…óe ya wu…óam Ňčgaa guzlmakwar da ray cek mekele. Zleezle na, ala taa s…ôrkadamakwar la da ray menjey maaya ma mbafar a Gazlavay. Fara fara menjey akwar a, aa k…ône. Ama wure ke…óe, ala faa c…ôf…óamakwar ta mez…ôley Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu, ala faa c…ôf…óamakwar ta mevel pal amba ka s…ôpam menjey maaya ma mbafar a Gazlavay ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
4.2: Ala taa s…ôrkadamakwar la da ray cek hay Ňčga key, maja ara Bay Mahura Yesu ma pandar Ňčgaa s…ôrkada. Ka s…ôrmara cek hay masa ala maa s…ôrkadamakwara ha, ba diya?
4.3: Gazlavay a wu…óey na, ka t…ôram nd…ôhay manjar meb…ôrey, ka da lam vaw saw ba.
4.4: Maaya na, kwa waawa da wuzlah akwar a s…ôra Ňčga njey maaya maaya ta Ňčgwas aŇčga anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey, amba nd…ôhay aa guzlam maaya ba da ray menjey akwar ba.
4.5: Ka da s…ôpam Ňčga key cek malamba ba. Ma kam cek anda Ňčgene na, ara nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara Gazlavay ba.
4.6: Da ray mey a ke…óe na, ndaw a da kar cek maaya ba a m…ôlmaha ba, a da bata ba s…ôlak, maja Bay al…ôkwa Mahura a da s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay ma kam cek malamba anda Ňčgene. Ala ta k…ôtmakwar la zleezle da ray cek aha.
4.7: Yaw, Gazlavay ta z…ôlndakwar Ňčga key cek hay malamba daa ba, ama a z…ôlndakwar na, amba ya t…ôrkwa nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga.
4.8: Ndaw ma r…ôsa mey a ke…óe na, a r…ôsey Ňčgene na, ndaw ba, ama a r…ôsey Gazlavay ma v…ôlkwar Mes…ôfney aŇčga. Mes…ôfney aŇčga ha na, maaya, manjar meb…ôrey.
4.9: Akwar fa wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar. Da ray Ňčgene, ala fa da wuzlalamakwar da ray mewu…óey-vaw na, daa saba, maja Bay Gazlavay taa s…ôrkadakwar cay Ňčga wu…óey vaw da wuzlah akwar.
4.10: Fara fara, akwar fa wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar, akwar fa wu…ómata nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu tabiya masa daa hwayak Ňčga Masad…ôwan. M…ôlma ala hay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu, ya kamakwar ambahw amba ka wu…óam vaw ma f…ôna ma f…ôna saya.
4.11: Asaya, kam g…ôdaŇč amba ka njam daa zazay, amba kwa waawa a n…ôkey dey fa sl…ôra masa fa mey aŇčga, amba kwa waawa a z…ômey cek si ta fa mawur…ďay aŇčga, anda ala ma k…ôtmakwar zleezle.
