Da al…ôkwa fa jarakwa maaya maaya daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa al…ôkwa ma t…ô…ďkwa, asaya, da al…ôkwa fa s…ôkwakwa cek masa Gazlavay ma da v…ôldandakwara ta mees…ômey na, Ňčgene, al…ôkwa nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. Mey da ray mem…ôskey-vaw Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay
3.7: Maja Ňčgene, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa akwar fa c…ôndamara …óay Ňčga Gazlavay tasana na,
3.8: ka da d…ôzlmata sl…ômay akwar hay ba. Ka da kamara anda papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay zleezle ma kam h…ôma a ray Gazlavay ba. Daa Ňčgene, ata da wuzlah-ley, ta jadamara Gazlavay la.¬Ľ
3.9: Gazlavay aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa wuzlah-ley a, ta h…ôtmatar cek hay maaya tabiya masa yah ma kata daa mevey kwakwar m…ôfa…ó la. Ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ta jadamaya la c…ôŇčga.
3.10: Ara maja Ňčgene, yah ma cey mevel a ray ata. Ta‚Äô, yaa guzley, ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúMewulkey ata, aŇčga maaya ba, cek masa yah ma wu…óey amba a kamara na, ta s…ôrmara daa ba.‚ÄĚ
3.11: Daa masa yah ma cey mevel heyey na, ya ta mbe…óey la, ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKwa fa da mb…ôzam aa slam masa yah ma …óiytara Ňčga m…ôskey vaw na, daa ba s…ôlak.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
3.12: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, wam vaw! Nd…ôhay masa ta mevel maaya ba, ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba na, kwa ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar a da t…ôrey anda ata ba, maja mevel maaya ba anda Ňčgene na, a da zlaŇčga…óadakwar ta Gazlavay, ndaw masa aŇčga daha ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
3.13: Ama maaya na, ka d…ôkam mevel da wuzlah akwar mandaw mandaw, amba *SataŇč a batakwar Ňčga key meb…ôrey ba, kwa ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar fa da d…ôzla sl…ômay daa ba. Ahaw, d…ôkam mevel da wuzlah akwar, maja tasana ke…óe, Gazlavay a wu…óey Ňčgaa guzlndakwar saya.
3.14: Mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa al…ôkwa ma t…ô…ďkwa d…ôga Ňčga mezley a haa mend…ôvey a na, da al…ôkwa fa jarakwa maaya maaya daa mey a na, Ňčgene, al…ôkwa nd…ôhay Ňčga *K…ôriste.
3.15: Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDa akwar fa c…ôndamara …óay Ňčga Gazlavay tasana na, ka da d…ôzlmata sl…ômay akwar hay ba. Ka da kamara anda papaŇč Ňčga papakw akwar hay zleezle ma kam h…ôma a ray Gazlavay ba.¬Ľ
3.16: Ma c…ôndamara …óay Ňčga Gazlavay ta ma kam h…ôma a ray a na, wa hay wa? Ara nd…ôhay tabiya masa *Mawiz ma badat…ôrwa daa hwayak Ňčga *Ejip.
3.17: Gazlavay a cey mevel mevey kwakwar m…ôfa…ó na, da ray wa hay wa? A cey mevel na, da ray nd…ôhay a ma kam meb…ôrey. Anda ke…óe, ata c…ôpa ta m…ôcam sem da wuzlah-ley.
3.18: Gazlavay ta mbe…óey la, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKwa fa da mb…ôzam aa slam masa yah ma …óiytara Ňčga m…ôskey vaw na, daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ A mbe…óey k…ône na, maja wa hay wa? A mbe…óey na, maja nd…ôhay a ma c…ônmar mey ba.
3.19: Fara fara, ya s…ôrkwa ta h…ôtam Ňčga mb…ôzey aa slam mem…ôskey-vaw a daa ba, maja ata ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba.

4.1: Zleezle na, Gazlavay taa guzley la amba ya mb…ôzkwa aa slam masa aŇčga ma …óiyndakwara Ňčga m…ôskey vaw. Mey a na, aa daha c…ôŇčga. Anda ke…óe, wakwa vaw, anja ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar Ňčga mb…ôkey fa d…ô…ďa ba.
4.2: Ta wuzdamandakwara mey maaya Ňčga Gazlavay la anda ata ma wuzdamatara a papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay zleezle may. Ama ata na, mey a ta j…ônta daa ba, maja ata ma t…ô…ďmara mey a ta mevel pal daa ba. Anda ke…óe, ta h…ôtam Ňčga mb…ôzey aa slam mem…ôskey-vaw masa Gazlavay ma …óiytara daa ba.
4.3: Ama al…ôkwa na, ya ta t…ô…ďkwa mey a la. Anda ke…óe, ya h…ôtkwa Ňčga mb…ôzey aa slam mem…ôskey-vaw a la. Gazlavay taa guzley la da ray nd…ôhay masa ma t…ô…ďmara mey a ba, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDaa masa yah ma cey mevel heyey na, ya ta mbe…óey la, ya l…ôvey: ‚ÄúKwa fa da mb…ôzam aa slam masa yah ma …óiytara Ňčga m…ôskey vaw na, daa ba s…ôlak.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ Ama Gazlavay na, ta nd…ôvda sl…ôra aŇčga sem d…ôga Ňčga mezley Ňčga b…ôla, ba diya?
4.4: Ya s…ôrkwa na, maja mawuzlalakaya da ray *pas mem…ôskey-vaw daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęGazlavay ta kata sl…ôra aŇčga hay la tabiya …óar maakwaw, Ňčga …óar maasala ha na, a m…ôskey vaw.¬Ľ
4.5: Anda mawuzlalakaya heyey saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKwa fa da mb…ôzam aa slam masa yah ma …óiytara Ňčga m…ôskey vaw na, daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
4.6: Nd…ôhay ma c…ôndamara mey maaya Ňčga Gazlavay teese…ó na, ta h…ôtam Ňčga mb…ôzey aa slam masa Gazlavay ma …óiytara ha na, daa ba, maja ata ma c…ônmar mey ba. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay mekele a h…ôtam Ňčga mb…ôzey la aa slam mem…ôskey-vaw a c…ôŇčga.
4.7: Maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ta pey …óar mekele la, a z…ôla …óar a ¬ętasana¬Ľ. Fa d…ô…ďa ha mevey ga, taa guzley la da ray …óar a ta mey *Davit. Mey a na, ara mey makadakaya heyey ma l…ôvey: ¬ęDa akwar fa c…ôndamara …óay Ňčga Gazlavay tasana na, ka da d…ôzlmata sl…ômay akwar hay ba.¬Ľ
4.8: Da fara fara Jes…ôwe ta handata papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay la aa slam mem…ôskey-vaw masa Gazlavay ma …óiytara na, anja Ňčgene, Gazlavay fa daa guzley da ray …óar mem…ôskey-vaw mekele fa d…ô…ďa ha na, daa saba.
4.9: Anda ke…óe, ya s…ôrkwa, Ňčgada nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay na, mem…ôskey-vaw daha. Mem…ôskey-vaw a na, ara anda Gazlavay ma m…ôskey vaw Ňčga …óar maasala ha.
4.10: Yaw, kwa waawa ma mb…ôzey aa slam mem…ôskey-vaw Ňčga Gazlavay a na, a da m…ôskey vaw fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga anda Gazlavay ma m…ôskey vaw fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga may.
4.11: Maja Ňčgene, kakwa g…ôdaŇč amba ya h…ôtkwa memb…ôzey aa slam mem…ôskey-vaw masa Gazlavay ma …óiya ha. Wakwa vaw amba kwa ndaw pal da wuzlah al…ôkwa a key h…ôma a ray Gazlavay anda papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay ba. Da daa ba na, ndaw aha a daa z…ô…óey.
4.12: Mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, aa ta g…ôdaŇč, fa key sl…ôra daa ndaw, a z…ômey a f…ôna d…ôlaw masa mey a cew. Mey a na, a mb…ôzey kasl aa mevel Ňčga ndaw anda d…ôlaw ma wunka mez…ôvey hay Ňčga tetesl ma mb…ôzey kasl aa sas…ôra…ď. A wuzd…ôrwa mewulkey daa mevel Ňčga ndaw, asaya, a wuzd…ôrwa cek masa ndaw ma wu…óey Ňčga ka.
4.13: Cek ma…ďakaya fa dey Ňčga Gazlavay na, daa ba. Cek hay tabiya masa aŇčga ma kata na, fa h…ôtam fa dey aŇčga maaya maaya. Cek hay tabiya masa al…ôkwa ma kakwa na, ya wuzdakwa la fa mey aŇčga. Yesu aŇčga ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay
4.14: Ndaw al…ôkwa mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay masa ma t…ôpey a cakay Gazlavay a va…ó na, daha. Ara Yesu, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay. Maja Ňčgene, jarakwa maaya maaya daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa al…ôkwa ma t…ô…ďkwa ta masa al…ôkwa ma wuzdakwa fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya.
4.15: Ndaw al…ôkwa mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a ta s…ôrfandakwar dey-ceceh la daa banay al…ôkwa maja al…ôkwa nd…ôhay masa-b…ôle hay. AŇčga na, ta s…ôrey banay la anda al…ôkwa, ta jadamara la Ňčga betey dey weewe ta fa cek hay mekele mekele Ňčga key meb…ôrey, ama kwa ta key meb…ôrey daa ba.
4.16: Anda ke…óe, Ňčg…ôchakwa Ňčgada fa Bay Gazlavay, ndaw masa ma wu…óta nd…ôhay kalah. Ňäg…ôchakwa ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba amba a s…ôrfandakwar dey-ceceh, a kandakwar maaya, a j…ônndakwar ta pas masa al…ôkwa daa banay.

5.1: Kwa *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay wura wura, a walamara na, da wuzlah nd…ôhay. Sl…ôra aŇčga na, ara mekey kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay maja nd…ôhay. A v…ôlar cek a Gazlavay, asaya, a h…ôrar g…ônaw Ňčgada Gazlavay, amba Gazlavay a mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay.
5.2: *Ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, aŇčga ray aŇčga, aŇčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč anda nd…ôhay mekele may. Anda ke…óe, a gwa Ňčga j…ôkfatar sl…ômay fa nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara cek ba ta nd…ôhay masa fa zlaŇčga…óam la daa c…ôve…ó masa maaya.
5.3: Maja aŇčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč na, a h…ôrey g…ônaw Ňčga v…ôley Ňčgada Gazlavay maja meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay daada ba, ama maja meb…ôrey aŇčga may.
5.4: Ndaw a gwa a pa ray aŇčga Ňčga ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta ray aŇčga ba. Si Gazlavay ma pa anda aa ma pa *AraŇčw.
5.5: *K…ôriste may ta pa ray aŇčga Ňčga ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta ray aŇčga na, daa ba. Ama ara Gazlavay ma pa, aa guzlar, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKah na, B…ôzey a…óaw, d…ôga tasana yah Papakw.¬Ľ
5.6: Daa slam laŇčgar, mawuzlalakaya saya, Gazlavay a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa da njey ndaw ma ka kwakwas a…óaw Ňčga s…ôrmataw anda Melkisedek.¬Ľ
5.7: Daa masa Yesu K…ôriste aŇčga da b…ôla na, a s…ôra Gazlavay aa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga l…ôhda daa mem…ôcey. Anda ke…óe, ta d…ôrar daŇčgay la ta mewudey, ta mat…ôway daa dey a Gazlavay. Gazlavay ta j…ôkfar sl…ômay la, ta sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa la daa mem…ôcey, maja aa ma nar ray.
5.8: Kwa aŇčga B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay na, taa s…ôrkey Ňčga ney ray la ta fa banay masa aa ma s…ôra.
5.9: Masa Gazlavay ma t…ôrda Ňčga ndaw ma gwa Ňčga kata cek hay tabiya maaya maaya cay na, nd…ôhay ma namar ray tabiya a h…ôtam mel…ôhey la ta fa v…ô…óa Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
5.10: Yesu a gwa a l…ôhdata, maja Gazlavay ma pa Ňčga ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas aŇčga anda Melkisedek. Ka da mb…ôkdamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba
5.11: Mey hay ga daha Ňčgaa guzley Ňčgada akwar da ray *K…ôriste, ndaw al…ôkwa mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay. Ama aŇčga ta banay amba ya wuzdakwara mey da ray a maaya maaya, maja akwar fa da c…ôndamara fiyaw fiyaw daa ba.
5.12: Pas a ta wuswa cay t…ô…óe amba kaa s…ôrkadamata nd…ôhay. Ama haa wure ke…óe, si nd…ôhay aa s…ôrkadamakwar da ray mey hay Ňčga Gazlavay masa Ňčgeeme masa akwar ma c…ôndamara cay c…ôŇčga. Akwar na, anda b…ôza hay ma sam …ó…ôwa ma wusmara Ňčga z…ômey …óaf ba araŇč.
5.13: Kwa waawa ma sey …ó…ôwa daada na, aŇčga b…ôzey mec…ôhe …óagay. Cek masa maaya ta maaya ba na, a gwa Ňčga wunkata ba.
5.14: Nd…ôhay mahura hay a z…ômam na, …óaf. Ata na, mak…ôtatakaya, a gwamara Ňčga wunkey cek masa maaya ta maaya ba.

6.1: Maja Ňčgene, nakwa fa mey fa mey, sas…ôrkakwa cek masa Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay. Ya da njakwa daa mees…ôrkey Ňčga nd…ôhay masa ma s…ôrmara mey Ňčga K…ôriste t…ôlam ba. Al…ôkwa taa s…ôrkakwa cek hay masa Ňčgeeme daa met…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste cay. Anda mel…ôvey, al…ôkwa taa s…ôrkakwa cay da ray memb…ôkey mekey cek ma hendey ndaw aa mem…ôcey, asaya, da ray mepey Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw fara fara.
6.2: Al…ôkwa taa s…ôrkakwa cay da ray *baptem mekele mekele, da ray mepey har a ray nd…ôhay , da ray masl…ôk…óawa Ňčga nd…ôhay daa mem…ôcey, leŇč da ray sariya masa Gazlavay ma da …ó…ôsla ma da njey Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
6.3: Ahaw, nakwa fa mey fa mey! Da Gazlavay ta t…ô…ďa la na, ya daa s…ôrkakwa mees…ôrkey Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay d…ô…ďa.
6.4: Nd…ôhay masa ma mb…ô…ómar d…ô…ďa sem a Gazlavay na, a gwamara a v…ôhmawa Ňčgaa c…ôf…óey ambahw fa Gazlavay saya na, kwara? Ta njam la dey pal daa mewe…óey Ňčga Gazlavay. Cek da va…ó masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay aŇčga hay na, taa c…ôkdamara la. *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ta sawa la a ray ata may.
6.5: Ta s…ôrmara la mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, ara mey maaya fara fara. Asaya, ta s…ôrmara maazla hay ma da kam Ňčgada fa mey la.
6.6: Ama, ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ta mb…ô…ómar d…ô…ďa sem a Gazlavay c…ôŇčga. Nd…ôhay a, a gwamara Ňčga v…ôhmawa Ňčgaa c…ôf…óey ambahw fa Gazlavay saba, maja da ndaw ta mb…ô…óar d…ô…ďa sem a Gazlavay na, a key Ňčgene, anda a d…ôra B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya saya. Asaya, a key Ňčgene, anda a c…ô…óa fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay.
6.7: Wulkakwa da ray ley cey! Ley masa var fa pey da hwa…ó a maaya maaya na, cek daa ley a, a key maaya maaya Ňčgada ndaw Ňčga ley a. Anda ke…óe, a wuzwa maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray ley a.
6.8: Ama da ley a, guzer ta hatak ta t…ô…ďa sem na, Ňčgene ara ley maaya ba. Ley a fa da njey ga daa ba, Gazlavay a da n…ôsa, a da mb…ôkda aa kusaf, fa d…ô…ďa ha, awaw a daa wura k…ôlme…óek!
6.9: Jam a…óaw hay, kwa da yaa guzlmakwar anda ke…óe na, ya s…ôrmara fara fara, akwar daa c…ôve…ó maaya masa ma da l…ôhdakwar.
6.10: Gazlavay na, ara ndaw ma key cek ta c…ôve…ó e, aa fa s…ôrfada sl…ôra maaya masa akwar ma kamara. Asaya, aa fa s…ôrfada akwar fa wu…ómara. Akwar fa wuzdam…ôrwa mewu…óey-vaw akwar a ta fa sl…ôra masa akwar ma kamara zleezle Ňčgada nd…ôhay mekele daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu. Kwa wure ke…óe, akwar fa kamara k…ône.
6.11: Ya wu…óam na, kwa waawa da wuzlah akwar a key g…ôdaŇč Ňčga njey k…ône haa mend…ôvey a, ka da g…ôram ba, amba ka h…ôtam cek hay tabiya masa akwar ma s…ôkwmara.
6.12: Ka da t…ôram nd…ôhay masa-maya…ó hay ba, ama njam anda nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay masa majaratakaya. Ata na, a h…ôtam cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay heyey la. Kam cek anda ata. Mey da ray Gazlavay ma da katar maaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay aŇčga hay
6.13: Masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvar a *Ab…ôraham a da kar maaya heyey na, ta mbe…óey la fara fara, a ka cek aha la. Ndaw ma f…ôna Gazlavay na, daa ba. Anda ke…óe, ta mbe…óey la ta mez…ôley aŇčga.
6.14: A l…ôvey: ¬ęFara fara, ya da p…ôska mey, ya da v…ôlka b…ôza hay ga ara mey ba.¬Ľ
6.15: Masa Ab…ôraham ma c…ônda mey a la na, ta‚Äô, a s…ôkwa ta d…ôk-vaw. Anda ke…óe, Ab…ôraham ta h…ôtey cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvar a da kara heyey la.
6.16: Da nd…ôhay fa mba…óam na, a mba…óam ta mez…ôley Ňčga nd…ôhay masa mahura da ray ata hay. *Membe…óey na, a …ó…ôsla mey da wuzlah nd…ôhay.
6.17: Maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay a mbe…óey amba nd…ôhay masa aa ma l…ôvey a da katar maaya heyey na, a s…ôrmara fara fara, a katara la, a mb…ô…óda mewulkey aŇčga ba. Anda ke…óe, a mbe…óey, a l…ôvtar a da katar cek maaya.
6.18: Mey ma l…ôvey Gazlavay a da katar maaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay aŇčga hay, leŇč membe…óey aŇčga na, ara mey hay cew masa a mb…ô…óam ba, maja Gazlavay na, a mb…ôrzley ba s…ôlak. Al…ôkwa masa ta Ňčg…ôchakwa sem Ňčgada fa Gazlavay ke…óe na, mey hay a ke…óe fa v…ôlndakwar g…ôdaŇč ga amba ya s…ôkwakwa cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldandakwara heyey.
6.19: Cek masa al…ôkwa ma s…ôkwakwa ha na, fa jarandakwar maaya maaya amba ya njakwa majaratakaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Maja Ňčgene, *Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a na, zana ma g…ôrca slam aha a wurey la, anda ke…óe, ya mb…ôzkwa la a hwa…ó a, a cakay Gazlavay.
6.20: Yesu ta mb…ôzey sem aa slam aha Ňčgene teese…ó da ray al…ôkwa. A mb…ôzey na, maja al…ôkwa, maja aŇčga ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga s…ôrmataw anda Melkisedek.

7.1: Melkisedek na, ara bay daa berney Ňčga Salem, asaya, aŇčga *ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, Gazlavay Mawaca-waca. Daa Ňčgene na, *Ab…ôraham ta f…ônt…ôrwa bay hay la ta g…ôdaŇč daa v…ôram. Masa aŇčga fa v…ôhwa na, ta‚Äô, Melkisedek a daw, a cad…ôrwa ray, a p…ôsar mey.
7.2: Ab…ôraham a wunka cek masa aŇčga ma t…ô…ďt…ôrwa daa v…ôram a, slam kuraw, a la slam pal, a v…ôldara a Melkisedek e. Mez…ôley aŇčga Melkisedek na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ¬ębay ma key cek ta c…ôve…ó e.¬Ľ Asaya, Melkisedek e aŇčga ¬ębay ma wu…óey zazay da wuzlah nd…ôhay,¬Ľ maja aŇčga bay Ňčga Salem. Salem na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ¬ęzazay¬Ľ.
7.3: AŇčga na, …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay faa guzley da ray papaha ta mamaha, leŇč da ray s…ôkway aŇčga hay na, daa ba. Asaya, faa guzley da ray mayawa aŇčga ta mem…ôcey aŇčga daa ba. AŇčga na, anda Yesu, B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay, aŇčga ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
7.4: N…ôkmara cey! Melkisedek na, aŇčga ndaw mahura, ba daw? Maja kwa Ab…ôraham zleezle, PapaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa hay na, ta wunka cek hay masa aŇčga ma t…ô…ďt…ôrwa daa v…ôram la slam kuraw, ta v…ôldara slam pal sem.
7.5: Kwakwas Ňčga *Mawiz a v…ôley c…ôve…ó a nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Levi masa ma ka kwakwas, Ňčga t…ô…ďey cek pal daa kuraw Ňčga cek hay tabiya da har nd…ôhay *Israyel hay. Kwa Israyel hay a, ara m…ôlma ata hay daa s…ôkway Ňčga Ab…ôraham. Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, fa t…ô…ďam cek da har ata c…ôŇčga.
7.6: Melkisedek na, aŇčga daa *s…ôkway Ňčga Levi ba, ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, ta t…ô…ďey cek pal daa kuraw la da har Ab…ôraham. Ab…ôraham masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvar a da kar maaya heyey na, ara aŇčga ma p…ôsar mey Ňčgada Melkisedek ba, ama ara Melkisedek ma p…ôsar mey a Ab…ôraham.
7.7: Ka s…ôrmara, ndaw ma p…ôsey mey a ndaw na, aa mahura da ray ndaw aha. Anda ke…óe, Melkisedek na, aa mahura da ray Ab…ôraham.
7.8: Nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas daa s…ôkway Ňčga Levi ma t…ô…ďam cek pal daa kuraw na, ata nd…ôhay masa ma da m…ôcam gway. Ama Melkisedek masa ma t…ô…ďa cek pal daa kuraw da har Ab…ôraham heyey na, aa ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw, anda …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay ma l…ôvey.
7.9: Ya gwakwa ya l…ôvkwa nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga Levi masa ma t…ô…ďam cek pal daa kuraw da har nd…ôhay mekele na, ta v…ôlmar la a Melkisedek may, maja papaŇč Ňčga papa ata Ab…ôraham ma v…ôlar la.
7.10: Anda mel…ôvey, masa Ab…ôraham ma v…ôlar cek a Melkisedek e na, ta yawa b…ôzey daa ba araŇč. Ama kwa ta yawa b…ôzey daa ba araŇč na, Ab…ôraham a v…ôlar cek a Melkisedek e. Ara anda ata cewete ta Levi, b…ôzey ma da yawa daa s…ôkway aŇčga may. Anda ke…óe, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey Melkisedek na, a f…ônta nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga Levi. Mey da ray Yesu, ndaw ma ka kwakwas anda Melkisedek
7.11: Daa *mewey Ňčga *Israyel hay na, nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, si nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Levi gway. Sl…ôra Ňčga nd…ôhay a Ňčgene na, ara anda *AraŇčw, papaŇč Ňčga papa ata hay zleezle, ma ka. Sl…ôra ha na, a gwa Ňčga nd…ôvda cek masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey Ňčga ka ba. Da a gwa Ňčga nd…ôvda na, anja Gazlavay fa da pey ndaw ma ka kwakwas mekele masa anda Melkisedek na, daa saba.
7.12: Da Gazlavay ta mb…ô…óda ndaw ma ka kwakwas aŇčga sem na, Ňčgene, si mewey Ňčga Israyel hay a mb…ô…óey may.
7.13: Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu masa al…ôkwa maa guzlkwa da ray a ke…óe na, s…ôkway aŇčga wal ta *s…ôkway Ňčga Levi. Kwa ndaw daa s…ôkway aŇčga pal masa aŇčga *ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, daa ba.
7.14: Ya s…ôrkwa fara fara Yesu na, a yawa daa s…ôkway Ňčga Juda. Daa masa *Mawiz maa guzley da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas na, kwa taa guzley da ray s…ôkway a daa ba.
7.15: Nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay masa daa s…ôkway Ňčga Levi na, a gwamara Ňčga handamata nd…ôhay fa Gazlavay ba. Mey a ke…óe, fa wuzwa maaya maaya maja Gazlavay ta pey ndaw mekele la Ňčga ndaw ma ka kwakwas aŇčga anda Melkisedek.
7.16: Ndaw a, a t…ôrey ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, ta fa mewey Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ba, ama ta fa g…ôdaŇč Ňčga heter mend…ôvey ba,
7.17: maja mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa da njey ndaw ma ka kwakwas a…óaw Ňčga s…ôrmataw anda Melkisedek.¬Ľ

7.20: -21 Asaya, Gazlavay a pa Yesu Ňčga ndaw ma ka kwakwas aŇčga na, ta mbe…óey la maja. Ama nd…ôhay mekele ma t…ôram Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas zleezle na, Gazlavay ta mbe…óey maja daa ba. Ahaw, Gazlavay ta mbe…óey la maja Yesu, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYah, Bay Gazlavay akah, ya fa mbe…óey, kwa ya fa da mb…ô…óda mey a…óaw daa ba s…ôlak: ‚ÄúKa da njey ndaw ma ka kwakwas a…óaw Ňčga s…ôrmataw.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
7.22: Maja Ňčgene, ya s…ôrkwa fara fara, Yesu na, ara aŇčga ma hand…ôrwa *mej…ôwey-mey maaya ma f…ôna masa zleezle.

7.25: Maja Ňčgene, Yesu aa ta g…ôdaŇč mandaw mandaw Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay masa ma Ňčg…ôcham Ňčgada fa Gazlavay ta fa aŇčga. A gwa a ka k…ône maja aa ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw, aŇčga fa d…ôrar daŇčgay mandaw mandaw a Gazlavay maja ata.
7.26: Yesu na, ara *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay masa ma gwa Ňčga j…ônndakwar. AŇčga na, aa maaya fa Gazlavay, maŇčg…ôra fa v…ô…óa daa ba, meb…ôrey da ray a kwa nek…ô…óey daa ba. Gazlavay a pa wal, aa da wuzlah nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey daa saba, a la a va…ó a cakay a.
7.27: Yesu na, aŇčga anda mahura hay da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay mekele hay ba. 7.28: Kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a pey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč gway. Nd…ôhay a na, ara nd…ôhay ta meb…ôrey. A pa na, Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Gazlavay ta t…ôrda sem Ňčga ndaw ma gwa Ňčga kata cek hay tabiya maaya maaya.

8.1: Fara fara ndaw al…ôkwa mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, daha. Ara Yesu, aa manjakaya ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó, fa wey da ray cek hay tabiya. Ke…óe he ara *bay-ray Ňčga mey masa ala ma wu…óam Ňčga l…ôvey.
8.2: AŇčga na, a ka sl…ôra aŇčga daa Way-mek…ôrcey fara fara masa da va…ó, daa *Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a masa fara fara. Ara slam masa Gazlavay ma …óiya da va…ó, ba na, ara slam masa ndaw ma …óiya da hwayak ba.
8.3: *Ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay wura wura na, sl…ôra aŇčga ara Ňčga v…ôley cek ta Ňčga h…ôrar g…ônaw a Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, Yesu na, si a v…ôlar cek a Gazlavay may.
8.4: Da haa wure ke…óe aŇčga da b…ôla na, anja kwa fa da key *ndaw ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, daa ba. Fa da key daa ba na, maja nd…ôhay ma v…ôlam cek a Gazlavay anda *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma l…ôvey na, daha cay.
8.5: Nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas a na, a kamara sl…ôra ata daa way Ňčga Gazlavay. Ama sl…ôra masa ata ma kamara ha na, ara anda meeze…ó e, ba na, ara anda da gazlavay da va…ó ba. 8.6: Ama wure ke…óe, sl…ôra masa Yesu ma ka na, a f…ôna sl…ôra masa nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas a ma kamara. 8.7: Da *mej…ôwey-mey Ňčgeeme ta gwa Ňčga ka cek tabiya anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey la na, anja Ňčgene, Gazlavay fa da j…ôwey mey mekele daa saba.
8.8: Ama Gazlavay ta mb…ô…ótar ray sem a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay maja meb…ôrey ata. A l…ôvtar: ¬ęYah, Bay Gazlavay, ya l…ôvey: pas a, a wuswa la masa yah ma da j…ôwey mey mawiya ta nd…ôhay Israyel hay leŇč ta nd…ôhay daa s…ôkway Ňčga Juda.
8.9: Mej…ôwey-mey a na, fa da key anda mej…ôwey-mey masa yah ma ka ta papaŇč Ňčga papa ata hay zleezle daa masa yah ma badat…ôrwa daa hwayak Ňčga Ejip heyey na, daa ba. Nd…ôhay a ta s…ôpmara mej…ôwey-mey a ta c…ôve…ó e daa ba. Ara maja Ňčgene, yah ma mb…ô…ótar d…ô…ďa.
8.10: Yah, Bay Gazlavay, ya l…ôvey: Mej…ôwey-mey masa yah ma da ka ta nd…ôhay *Israyel hay Ňčgada fa mey na, ara mewuzey kwakwas a…óaw Ňčgada ata, ahaw, ya wuzlalatara la aa mevel ata. Ya da t…ôrey Gazlavay ata, ata may, a da t…ôram nd…ôhay a…óaw hay.
8.11: Kwa ndaw ma daa s…ôrkada ndaw daa hwayak aŇčga, da daa ba, m…ôlmaha, a l…ôvar: ‚ÄúSi ka s…ôra Bay Gazlavay‚ÄĚ na, daa ba, maja ata tabiya, kwa b…ôza hay, kwa mahura hay na, a s…ôrmaya la.
8.12: Yaw, ya mb…ôkdatara maŇčg…ôra ata la, kwa ya fa da s…ôrfada meb…ôrey ata daa saba.¬Ľ
8.13: Masa Gazlavay maa guzley da ray mej…ôwey-mey mawiya na, ta t…ôrda mej…ôwey-mey masa Ňčgeeme sem Ňčga magurma. Cek wura wura masa magurma na, gweegwe cay aa z…ô…óey.

9.1: Daa *mej…ôwey-mey masa Ňčgeeme, *mewey hay daha. Mewey hay a fa wuzdatara c…ôve…ó a nd…ôhay Ňčga s…ôpey Gazlavay. Asaya, slam daha Ňčga d…ôrey daŇčgay masa nd…ôhay ma …óiymara.
9.2: Ta k…ôrcam way la, way a na, mawunkakaya ta zana slam cew. Slam masa Ňčgeeme na, a z…ôlmara *Slam maaya Ňčga Gazlavay. Daa slam aha na, pet…ôrla mahura ta neneh Ňčga awaw hay maasala daha, asaya, taabal daha. PeŇč mav…ôldakaya Ňčgada Gazlavay mapakaya da ray a.
9.3: Slam ta da d…ô…ďa zana na, a z…ôlmara *Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a.
9.4: Daa slam aha na, slam-meewurey cek mezey maaya Ňčgada Gazlavay daha, slam aha makakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza. Asaya, *akwatay Ňčga hwadam daha, …ď…ôrey magaza makakaya fa v…ô…óa. Daa akwatay a na, taasa makakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza daha. Daa taasa ha na, cek mez…ômey mez…ôley ¬ę*man¬Ľ da hwa…ó a daha. DaŇčgwar Ňčga *AraŇčw masa maa fekwey heyey aa daa akwatay a, asaya, beeler hay cew masa Gazlavay mawuzlala mewey aŇčga hay fa v…ô…óa heyey, ata daa akwatay a may. *Akwatay a na, ara akwatay Ňčga s…ôrfedey mej…ôwey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay.
9.5: Da ray akwatay a na, cek hay cew daha ta zlara mav…ô…ótakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza. Cek hay a na, ata anda maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay, fa wuzdam…ôrwa Gazlavay aa daa slam aha. Fa ciymata zlara ata hay a ray slam mewucey mambaz amba Gazlavay a mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay. Ama wure ke…óe, ya gwa Ňčga kada mey da ray cek hay masa daa slam aha c…ôpa ba.
9.6: Yaw, cek hay daa way a na, mapatakaya anda ke…óe. Nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay fa mb…ôzam mandaw mandaw aa slam masa Ňčgeeme Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay.
9.7: Aa slam masa ta d…ô…ďa zana na, si ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas ma mb…ôzey a hwa…ó a gway. A mb…ôzey na, dey pal fa mevey. 9.8: *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ta mey a ke…óe na, slam masa Ňčgeeme, da aa daha araŇč na, c…ôve…ó Ňčga mb…ôzey aa Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a ta d…ô…ďa zana a wurey ba araŇč.
9.9: Cek hay a c…ôpa ke…óe na, ara anda mey-meŇčgey ma wuzwa cek hay masa ma kam wure ke…óe. Anda mel…ôvey, cek masa ndaw ma v…ôldara a Gazlavay ta meh…ôrey g…ônaw Ňčgada Gazlavay na, a gwa Ňčga t…ôrda mevel Ňčga ndaw aha maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba.
9.10: Cek hay a ke…óe na, ara mewey hay da ray cek mez…ômey, da ray cek mesey, leŇč da ray mes…ôpey kwakwas Ňčga p…ôrey cek amba a t…ôram nd…ôhay ma zl…ô…ďa kwakwas saba gway. Mey da ray K…ôriste ma v…ôlda ray aŇčga maja al…ôkwa
9.11: Wure ke…óe *K…ôriste ta sawa la. AŇčga na, *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ma handandakwara maaya aŇčga masa al…ôkwa ma h…ôtkwa wure ke…óe. A ka sl…ôra aŇčga na, daa way mahura ma f…ôna Way-mek…ôrcey masa zleezle. Way a na, aa maaya kalah, ara ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč ma l…ôma ba. Way a na, aa da b…ôla ke…óe ba.
9.12: Masa K…ôriste ma mb…ôzey aa *Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a heyey na, ta mb…ôzey ta mambaz Ňčga kwakwa…ďa daa ba, ta mb…ôzey ta mambaz Ňčga b…ôz-sla daa ba. 9.13: Anda kwakwas al…ôkwa ma l…ôvey na, da ndaw ta zl…ô…ďa kwakwas la na, si a wucmar mambaz Ňčga kwakwa…ďa, da daa ba, Ňčga gusaŇč fa vaw. 9.14: Da anda ke…óe na, mambaz Ňčga K…ôriste na, a f…ôna cek masa ata ma kamara Ňčgene ba daw? Mambaz aŇčga na, a f…ôna mambaz Ňčga g…ônaw hay ba daw? K…ôriste na, kwa ta key meb…ôrey daa ba, ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la a Gazlavay ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay masa mend…ôvey ba Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Mambaz aŇčga na, a p…ôrndakwara mevel amba ya kakwa cek malamba Ňčga handandakwar aa mem…ôcey saba. Anda ke…óe, ya da kakwa sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay, ndaw masa aŇčga daha ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
9.15: Maja Ňčgene, K…ôriste na, ara ndaw ma c…ômtar …óay Ňčga nd…ôhay ta Gazlavay amba Gazlavay a j…ôwey mey mawiya ta nd…ôhay a. 9.16: Yaw, ya s…ôrkwa da ndaw a mb…ô…óey mey na, si ndaw aha a m…ôcey la …óagay amba mey aha, a key.

9.18: Ara maja Ňčgene, kwa mej…ôwey-mey masa Ňčgeeme a zley na, ta mambaz.
9.19: Ta pas masa Gazlavay ma j…ôwa mey ta nd…ôhay *Israyel hay na, teese…ó na, *Mawiz a wuzdatara *mewey masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay …óagay. 9.20: Aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęGazlavay a j…ôwey mey ta akwar na, ta fa mambaz a ke…óe. A l…ôvkwar Ňčga namar ray a mewey hay daa mej…ôwey-mey a.¬Ľ
9.21: Asaya, Mawiz a wucey mambaz heyey fa Way-mek…ôrcey leŇč fa cek hay tabiya mekey sl…ôra daa way a may.
9.22: Anda kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz ma l…ôvey na, har-g…ôdaŇč Ňčga cek hay a t…ôram maaya na, ta fa mambaz. Si mambaz a mb…ô…ówa la …óagay amba Gazlavay a mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay. Mey da ray K…ôriste ma v…ôlda ray aŇčga maja meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay
9.23: Ya taa guzlkwar la, ya l…ôvkwar cek masa *Mawiz maa s…ôrkadatara a nd…ôhay Ňčga key na, anda meeze…ó Ňčga cek hay masa fara fara da va…ó gway, ba na, ara cek hay a fara fara ba. 9.25: Asaya, *ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, fa mb…ôzey fa mevey a fa mevey a aa Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a daa Way-mek…ôrcey. 9.26: Da ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la dey weewe na, anja Ňčgene, ta s…ôrey banay la may dey weewe d…ôga Ňčga mezley Ňčga b…ôla. Ama ta wuzd…ôrwa vaw aŇčga la dey pal daa masa b…ôla fa da nd…ôvey ke…óe. Ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la Ňčga m…ôcey amba a la meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay.

10.1: Cek hay masa maaya ma da kam Ňčgada fa mey na, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz na, fa wuzdandakwara maaya maaya daa ba. Ama a wuzndakwar na, cek anda meeze…ó e gway. 10.5: Maja Ňčgene, daa masa K…ôriste ma da sawa a b…ôla na, taa guzlar la a Gazlavay, a l…ôvar: ¬ęKa fa wu…óey amba ndaw a h…ôrka g…ônaw, a v…ôlka cek na, daa ba, ama ka ta v…ôlya vaw Ňčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč la.

10.7: Anda ke…óe, ya ta l…ôvka la: ‚ÄúBay Gazlavay, ehe yah ke…óe, ya sawa a b…ôla na, Ňčga key sl…ôra masa kah ma wu…óey anda mawuzlalakaya da ray a…óaw daa …óerewel akah.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
10.8: K…ôriste aa guzlar teese…ó Ňčgada Gazlavay na, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa fa wu…óey amba ndaw a h…ôrka g…ônaw, a v…ôlka cek na, daa ba. Ka faa s…ômey da ray g…ônaw masa ma h…ôrmara ma f…ôkmara da ray slam-mef…ôkey cek na, daa ba. Asaya, meh…ôrey g…ônaw Ňčga mb…ôkey meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw na, a mbafaka ba may.¬Ľ Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz a wu…óey na, si nd…ôhay a v…ôlam cek a Gazlavay anda Ňčgene c…ôŇčga.
10.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, K…ôriste a l…ôvey saya: ¬ęEhe, yah ke…óe, ya sawa a b…ôla na, Ňčga key sl…ôra masa kah ma wu…óey.¬Ľ K…ôriste aa guzley anda Ňčgene na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ta vav…ôsa mekey kwakwas ta g…ônaw anda masa zleezle sem. Ta‚Äô, a bawa kwakwas mekele mawiya.
10.10: Yesu K…ôriste na, ta kar sl…ôra la a Gazlavay anda Gazlavay a ma wu…óey. Ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la dey pal Ňčga m…ôcey maja al…ôkwa. Anda ke…óe, ta t…ôrdandakwar sem Ňčga nd…ôhay manjar meb…ôrey fa mey aŇčga.
10.11: Nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, a kamara sl…ôra ata mandaw mandaw ta melecey. Ata fa h…ôram g…ônaw hay Ňčga key kwakwas letek mandaw mandaw a Gazlavay. Ama meh…ôrey g…ônaw ata Ňčgene, a la meb…ôrey da ray ndaw ba s…ôlak.
10.12: Ama K…ôriste na, ta v…ôlda ray aŇčga la Ňčga m…ôcey dey pal amba a mb…ôkdatara meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a daw a njey a har-z…ômay Ňčga Gazlavay.
10.13: Fete…óe, aa manjakaya fa s…ôkwa pas masa Gazlavay ma da pata masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay asi salay aŇčga.
10.14: Ta t…ôrdata nd…ôhay sem maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay manjar meb…ôrey Ňčga s…ôrmataw, maja aa ma v…ôlda ray aŇčga Ňčga m…ôcey. A v…ôlda ray aŇčga ha na, dey pal gway.
10.15: *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay may, ta wuzdandakwara cek aha la maaya maaya. Teese…ó na, aa guzley, a l…ôvey:
10.16: ¬ęBay Mahura a l…ôvey: ‚ÄúYa da j…ôwey mey ta ata daa …óar hay a Ňčgene. *Mej…ôwey-mey a na, ya da ka amba kwakwas a…óaw a njey aa mevel ata, asaya, ya da wuzlala aa leŇčgesl ata.‚ÄĚ¬Ľ
10.17: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, aa guzley saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa da wulkey da ray meb…ôrey ata leŇč da ray sl…ôra ata maaya ba Ňčgene na, daa saba.¬Ľ
10.18: Maja Ňčgene, da Gazlavay ta mb…ôkda meb…ôrey Ňčga ndaw sem na, meh…ôrey g…ônaw Ňčga mb…ôkey meb…ôrey na, daa saba. Mey da ray meŇčg…ôchey fa Bay Gazlavay ta mevel maaya
10.19: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, maja mambaz Ňčga Yesu ma mb…ô…ówa na, ya gwakwa Ňčga mb…ôzey la aa *Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a.
10.20: Ta wurndakwar c…ôve…ó mawiya la masa ma da handandakwar aa heter mend…ôvey ba ta fa zana meŇčg…ôrey daa *Way Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, anda mel…ôvey, ta fa vaw Ňčga *K…ôriste masa ma m…ôcey fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya heyey.
10.21: Ndaw al…ôkwa mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas daa Way Ňčga Gazlavay na, daha. AŇčga na, *bay-ray Ňčga way a.
10.22: Anda ke…óe, si ya Ňčg…ôchakwa fa Gazlavay ta mevel maaya, ta met…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta mevel pal, ta mevel manjar meb…ôrey, asaya, vaw al…ôkwa may map…ôrkaya ta yam masa maaya.
10.23: Gazlavay ta l…ôvey la, a da l…ôhdandakwar. Gazlavay na, a ka cek aha la anda aa ma l…ôvey. Anda ke…óe, al…ôkwa fa l…ôvkwa fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya, al…ôkwa fa t…ô…ďkwa aa mevel al…ôkwa cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da ka heyey. Mb…ôkdakwa mewulkey cew cew.
10.24: Al…ôkwa c…ôpa si ya j…ônkwa vaw da wuzlah al…ôkwa amba ya v…ôlkwa g…ôdaŇč da wuzlah al…ôkwa Ňčga wu…óey vaw, asaya, Ňčga key cek maaya.
10.25: Ya da mb…ôkdakwa Ňčga daw aa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu anda nd…ôhay siya ma mb…ôkdamara na, k…ône ba. Ama si ya v…ôlkwa g…ôdaŇč da wuzlah al…ôkwa ma f…ôna ma f…ôna, maja pas masa Bay Mahura ma da sawa na, aŇčga gweegwe cay.
10.26: Al…ôkwa taa s…ôrkakwa la da ray mey masa fara fara. Ama fa d…ô…ďa ha, da ya kakwa meb…ôrey tesu…óe na, kwa ya h…ôrkwar g…ônaw na, cek mekele Ňčga v…ôley a Gazlavay Ňčga mb…ôkey meb…ôrey al…ôkwa daha daw? Daa ba s…ôlak.
10.27: Da k…ône na, kwa cek mekele Ňčga key daa ba, si mes…ôkwey sariya ta mand…ôrzay daa dey, sariya masa Gazlavay ma da ka Ňčgaa z…ô…ódata masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay aa awaw menjem-njem e.
10.28: Kwa waawa ma r…ôsa *kwakwas Ňčga Mawiz masa nd…ôhay cew, da daa ba, nd…ôhay maakar ma kam sede da ray a la na, a da k…ô…ómara ndaw aha vagay, fa da s…ôrfamar dey-ceceh daa ba.
10.29: Da anda Ňčgene na, ka wulkam na, kwara? Ndaw ma r…ôsa B…ôzey Ňčga Gazlavay, ma pa mambaz Ňčga Yesu Ňčga cek Ňčga tede, mambaz Ňčga *Mej…ôwey-mey Mawiya masa ma p…ôra mevel aŇčga, asaya, ma c…ô…óa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wuzdandakwara maaya Ňčga Gazlavay na, Gazlavay a da kada ndaw a na, kwara? A da s…ôrda banay ta ndaw aha ma f…ôna Ňčgene saya.
10.30: Fara fara, ya s…ôrkwa ndaw masa maa guzley, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęCek masa ata ma kamiwa maaya ba na, ya p…ôla la, ya da katar sariya.¬Ľ Asaya, ndaw a, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęBay Gazlavay a da katar sariya a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay.¬Ľ
10.31: Da sariya Ňčga Gazlavay, ndaw masa aŇčga daha ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw, ta t…ô…óda ndaw la na, ndaw aha a z…ôley marava la.
10.32: S…ôrfadamara menjey akwar zleezle daa masa akwar ma t…ô…ďmara Ňčga njey daa mewe…óey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay t…ôlam. Fa d…ô…ďa ha nek…ô…óey, akwar ta s…ôram banay la ga, ama akwar ta …ď…ôsmara banay a la.
10.33: Daa Ňčgene, ta c…ô…ómata nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah akwar la fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ga, ta s…ôrdamata banay la. Nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah akwar ta d…ôkmatar mevel la a nd…ôhay ma c…ô…ómata ha Ňčgene.
10.34: Ahaw, akwar ta s…ôram dey-ceceh la fa nd…ôhay masa ata ma k…ôzlamata aa f…ôrs…ône maja Yesu. Asaya, daa masa nd…ôhay fa vamakwara cek akwar hay na, akwar ta mb…ôkdamatara la ta mees…ômey Ňčga t…ô…ďmara, maja ka s…ôrmara akwar ta cek hay maaya mekele ma f…ôna, ma da njey Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
10.35: Maja Ňčgene, pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara c…ôŇčga, ka da mb…ôkdamara ba. Da akwar fa kamara k…ône na, Gazlavay a p…ôlkwara mawur…ďay akwar la ma f…ôna.
10.36: Maaya na, ka …ď…ôsmara banay c…ôŇčga amba ka kam anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey, asaya, amba ka h…ôtam cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldakwara heyey.
10.37: Yaa guzley anda ke…óe na, maja ¬ęmenjey nek…ô…óey fe…óe, fara fara mend…ôrey nek…ô…óey gway, ndaw ma da sawa heyey na, a sawa la, aa fa sawa, fa da z…ônwa vaw daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
10.38: Gazlavay aa guzley, a l…ôvey saya: ¬ęNdaw a…óaw maaya na, ara ndaw ma paya Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Anda ke…óe, a h…ôtey heter mend…ôvey ba la. Ama da ndaw a v…ôhey fa d…ô…ďa na, ya fa daa s…ômey da ray a daa ba.¬Ľ
10.39: Al…ôkwa na, s…ôkway Ňčga nd…ôhay masa ma v…ôham sem fa d…ô…ďa amba aa z…ô…óam na, k…ône ba, ama al…ôkwa na, nd…ôhay ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a l…ôhdandakwar la.

11.1: Mepey Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw fara fara na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey cek masa al…ôkwa ma s…ôkwakwa fa Gazlavay na, ya s…ôrkwa ya h…ôtkwa la fara fara. Kwa al…ôkwa ta h…ôtkwar ta dey al…ôkwa daa ba na, ya s…ôrkwa ara cek fara fara.
11.2: Ara anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay masa zleezle ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay maa h…ômdata.
11.3: Al…ôkwa fa pakwa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw al…ôkwa fara fara. Ara maja Ňčgene, ya s…ôrkwa Gazlavay a l…ôma slam da va…ó ta slam da hwayak ta fa mey aŇčga meeguzley gway. Anda mel…ôvey, cek hay masa al…ôkwa ma h…ôtatakwar ta dey al…ôkwa na, Gazlavay a kat…ôrwa ta fa cek masa al…ôkwa ma h…ôtatakwar ta dey al…ôkwa ba.
11.4: Yaw, *Abel ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Anda ke…óe, ta v…ôlar cek la a Gazlavay ta mevel pal ma f…ôna Ňčga m…ôlmaha *Kayin. Maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ta t…ô…ďa cek masa aŇčga ma v…ôldara heyey la, a pa Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga. Kwa Abel e ta m…ôcey sem na, aa faa guzlndakwar anda aa ta dey c…ôŇčga, maja aa ma pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara.
11.5: Henakw ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Da ray Ňčgene, Gazlavay a la a va…ó a cakay a, kwa ta m…ôcey ta m…ôcey daa ba, kwa ndaw ma h…ôtar daa saba. Masa Gazlavay ta la Henakw a daa ba araŇč na, Henakw fa kar cek ma mbafar a Gazlavay, anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay.
11.6: Da ndaw ta pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara daa ba na, ndaw aha fa da kar cek ma mbafar a Gazlavay daa ba. Kwa waawa ma wu…óey Ňčga Ňčg…ôchey Ňčgada fa Gazlavay Ňčga d…ôrey daŇčgay na, si a s…ôra Gazlavay na, daha, asaya, si a s…ôra Gazlavay fa katar maaya Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma s…ôpmara.
11.7: N…ôwe ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Maja Ňčgene, ta pas masa Gazlavay ma wuzdara cek hay ma da kam Ňčgada fa mey masa kwa ta h…ôtatar ta dey aŇčga daa ba araŇč na, N…ôwe he ta j…ôkfar sl…ômay la a Gazlavay c…ôŇčga. Ta‚Äô, aa ce…óey kwambiwal mahura anda way Ňčga l…ôhda ray aŇčga ta nd…ôhay da way aŇčga hay. N…ôwe ma pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara Ňčgene na, a wuzd…ôrwa nd…ôhay siya da b…ôla fa pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara daa ba. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay may, a pa N…ôwe Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga.
11.8: *Ab…ôraham ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Maja Ňčgene, daa masa Gazlavay a ma z…ôla heyey na, ta j…ôkfar sl…ômay la. Da ray Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a daw aa hwayak masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvar a da v…ôldara heyey. Slam masa aŇčga ma daw a hwa…ó a na, kwa ta s…ôra fe…óe na, daa ba.
11.9: Ab…ôraham ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara, maja Ňčgene ta‚Äô, a daw a njey daa hwayak masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvar a da v…ôldara heyey, ama aŇčga manjakaya anda ndaw-m…ôlak. Anda ke…óe, a njey daa way-mek…ôrcey. Ata *Izak ta *Jakwap may, Gazlavay a l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara hwayak a anda aa ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldara a Ab…ôraham. Ata may, a njam daa way-mek…ôrcey anda Ab…ôraham a.
11.10: Ab…ôraham na, fa s…ôkwa berney masa salay a mapakaya maaya maaya. Ara Gazlavay ta ray aŇčga ma pa kwakway Ňčga berney a, asaya, ara aŇčga ma l…ôma berney a.
11.11: Yaw, Ab…ôraham ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Da ray Ňčgene, kwa aŇčga maraw, asaya, kwa Ňčgwas aŇčga Sara aa d…ôrlay na, ta key hwa…ó la c…ôŇčga. Ab…ôraham a s…ôra Gazlavay ma l…ôvar a da v…ôlar b…ôzey heyey na, a mb…ôrzley ba.
11.12: Ara anda ke…óe, Ab…ôraham, ndaw masa fa s…ôkwey mem…ôcey na, ta yawa b…ôza hay la, s…ôkway aŇčga ta key la ga anda wurzla hay da va…ó, a sl…ôfam ba anda mawur…ďay da wayam.
11.13: Nd…ôhay a ke…óe c…ôpa ta pamara Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara haa kasl fa mem…ôcey ata. Ata ta h…ôtam cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara heyey na, daa ba. Ama a s…ôrmara pas pal na, Gazlavay a v…ôldatara la anda aa ma l…ôvey a. Da ray Ňčgene, ata faa s…ômam da ray a, taa guzlam la, a l…ôvam ata na, ata anda m…ôlak hay da b…ôla ke…óe, fa da njam daa ba, kwa hwaray ta katar Ňčga l…ôvey k…ône na, daa ba.
11.14: Nd…ôhay a maa guzlam anda Ňčgene na, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey ata fa s…ôpam hwayak Ňčgada ata ray ata.
11.15: Ta wulkam da ray hwayak masa ata ma mb…ôkdam…ôrwa na, daa ba. Da ta wulkam la na, anja a v…ôham la aa hwayak a saya.
11.16: Fara fara a s…ôpam na, hwayak masa maaya, anda mel…ôvey slam da gazlavay da va…ó. Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ma l…ôvey, aŇčga Gazlavay ata, kwa hwaray fa da kar Ňčga l…ôvey k…ône na, daa ba. N…ôka, Gazlavay ta …óiytar berney maaya la, ba diya?
11.17: -18 Gazlavay aa guzlar a Ab…ôraham, a l…ôvar: ¬ęAra ta fa b…ôza hay Ňčga b…ôz akah Izak, sl…ômay akah ma da z…ôley.¬Ľ Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Gazlavay a jada Ab…ôraham a Ňčga v…ôldara b…ôzey aŇčga menduleŇč Izak Ňčga h…ôrey. Ab…ôraham ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara, maja Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a la b…ôzey a, a daw Ňčga h…ôrara Ňčgada Gazlavay.
11.19: Ab…ôraham a s…ôra Gazlavay na, a gwa Ňčga sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa ndaw daa mem…ôcey. Anda ke…óe, a h…ôtar b…ôzey aŇčga Izak na, ara anda a sl…ôk…óawa daa mem…ôcey.
11.20: Izak ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara, maja Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a p…ôstar mey Ňčgada ata Jakwap ta Ezayu da ray cek ma da kam Ňčgada fa mey.
11.21: Jakwap may, ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Da ray Ňčgene, daa masa Jakwap a fa da m…ôcey na, ta p…ôstar mey la Ňčgada b…ôza hay Ňčga *Jawzef, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a d…ôra daŇčgay fa zlanday aŇčga, a h…ôlma Gazlavay.
11.22: Jawzef ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Maja Ňčgene, daa masa aŇčga fa da m…ôcey na, taa guzltar la a nd…ôhay *Israyel hay, a l…ôvtar, cay na, a bam la daa hwayak Ňčga *Ejip. Asaya, taa guzltar la da ray cek masa ata ma da kam ta tetesl aŇčga.
11.23: Ata papaŇč Ňčga *Mawiz ta mamaha ta pamara Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Anda ke…óe, daa masa ata ma yam…ôrwa Mawiz a na, ta …ďadamara la ta …ďey kiya maakar da way. A n…ôkmara b…ôzey a na, a mbey ara mey ba. Ata na, kwa ta zluram ta mey Ňčga bay Ejip daa ba.
11.24: Masa Mawiz a ta g…ôley cay na, a wu…óey a z…ôlmara b…ôzey Ňčga dam Ňčga bay *FarawaŇč, bay Ejip ba. A wu…óey Ňčga z…ôley k…ône ba na, maja aŇčga fa pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara may.
11.25: A wu…óey Ňčga s…ôrey banay ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay da ray aa ma da njey nek…ô…óey daa mees…ômey daa mekey meb…ôrey.
11.26: A wu…óey na, nd…ôhay a r…ôsmara maja *K…ôriste, da ray aŇčga ma da h…ôtey zleley ga da Ejip Ňčgene. A wu…óey k…ône na, maja aŇčga fa s…ôkwa mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra aŇčga masa Gazlavay ma da v…ôldara Ňčgada fa mey.
11.27: Mawiz ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara, maja Ňčgene, ta bawa sem daa hwayak Ňčga Ejip. Kwa mevel Ňčga bay da Ejip e fa cey na, ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, Mawiz ta zlurey daa ba s…ôlak. AŇčga malacakaya deŇč e anda ta h…ôtar Gazlavay la, Gazlavay masa kwa ndaw ta h…ôtar ta dey aŇčga daa ba s…ôlak.
11.28: Mawiz ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara, maja Ňčgene, a zlar Ňčga key gwagway mez…ôley ¬ę*Pak¬Ľ. A l…ôvtar a nd…ôhay Israyel hay Ňčga wucam mambaz Ňčga g…ônaw fa mey-slam ata hay amba maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay masa ma k…ô…óta nd…ôhay vagay a sawa a k…ô…óta b…ôz ata hay maa-mey-ndaw saba.
11.29: Israyel hay ta pamara Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Ara maja Ňčgene, daa masa ata ma zl…ôŇčgdamara b…ôlay magaza na, b…ôlay a, a wunkey cew, daa c…ôve…ó ata na, yam da hwa…ó a daa ba. Ama nd…ôhay Ejip hay ma s…ôpmatar wurzay ma wu…óam Ňčga zl…ôŇčgam may na, ta‚Äô, yam a, a c…ômey aa slam a, a …ďa…ď…ôtata.
11.30: Asaya, Israyel hay ta pamara Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Ara maja Ňčgene, ata ma zl…ôrmara mahwal Ňčga berney Ňčga Jerikwaw …óar maasala, ta‚Äô, mahwal a, a b…ôzley.
11.31: *Rahap Ňčgwas-barlaw daha, ta pa Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara may. Maja Ňčgene, aŇčga ma t…ô…ďta nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey masa ma sl…ôrdamat…ôrwa Ňčga seŇčgeley berney a. Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ta k…ô…óa vagay anda aa ma k…ô…óta masa-g…ôra aŇčga hay na, daa ba.
11.32: Yaw, ya daa guzley da ray *ZedeyaŇčw, *Barak, *SamsaŇčw, *Jefte, *Davit, *Samiyel leŇč nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, kwara sura? Ya fa da h…ôtey har Ňčgaa guzley da ray ata pal pal na, daa ba.
11.33: Ata may, ta pamara Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara, maja Ňčgene, ta f…ônmata hwayak hay mekele mekele la ta g…ôdaŇč daa v…ôram. Ta kam cek la ta c…ôve…ó e anda Gazlavay ma wu…óey. Ta h…ôtam cek masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara heyey la. Ta g…ôrcamatara mey Ňčga mabar hay la maja a da p…ôwmata.
11.34: Ta m…ôcmara awaw masa ma g…ô…óey ta g…ôdaŇč la. Ta l…ôham la daa masa fa da k…ô…ómata ta d…ôlaw. Ata na, ta t…ôram la Ňčga masa-b…ôle hay, ama Gazlavay ta v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč la. Ta jaram la daa v…ôram, ta f…ônmata sewje hay ma samawa daa hwayak hay mekele mekele sem ta g…ôdaŇč.
11.35: Ňägusay may, ta pamara Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Ara maja Ňčgene, ata ma h…ôtmatar nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya fa sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey. Yaw, nd…ôhay siya ta s…ôram banay la ga ta mek…ô…óey haa a m…ôcam. Ama ta wu…óam Ňčga l…ôhey daa banay a na, daa ba. A wu…óam Ňčga m…ôcey daa banay a amba Gazlavay a sl…ôk…óadat…ôrwa daa mem…ôcey, a v…ôltar menjey masa ma f…ôna da b…ôla ke…óe.
11.36: Nd…ôhay mekele na, ta …ď…ôsmara mec…ô…óey la, ta …ď…ôsmara laway la. Asaya, ta j…ôwmata la ta calalaw, ta g…ôrcamata la aa f…ôrs…ône. Ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa ta …ď…ôsmara la.
11.37: Siya hay da wuzlah ata na, taa zakamata la ta aŇčgwa vagay, siya hay, ta …ó…ôslmata la cew cew. Siya hay, ta Ňčg…ômamata la ta d…ôlaw vagay. Nd…ôhay siya ta p…ôkam la saw k…ône, ata masa-viya hay, a k…ôzlam fa vaw na, zana Ňčga ambal Ňčga …óakw daa ba Ňčga t…ô…ďaŇč, ta s…ôram banay la ga.
11.38: Nd…ôhay maaya Ňčgene na, slam da b…ôla ke…óe t…ô…óe Ňčga njey Ňčgada ata ba. Fa p…ôkam saw da wuzlah-ley, da daa ba, da aŇčgwa, a nam daa b…ôdam hay, da daa ba, daa v…ôge…ó hay anda nd…ôhay masa ta …ď…ôlmata sem.
11.39: Nd…ôhay a ke…óe tabiya ta pamara Gazlavay la Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara. Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ma pata Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga. Ama ta h…ôtam cek maaya masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay heyey na, daa ba.
11.40: Fara fara, Gazlavay ta …ďey cek la maaya kalah Ňčgada al…ôkwa, amba ta pas masa ta nd…ôvda sl…ôra aŇčga cay na, a v…ôldandakwara cek aha Ňčgada al…ôkwa ta ata bama da mey pal.

12.1: Nd…ôhay a tabiya ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara Ňčgene, fa zl…ôrmandakwar ray Ňčga v…ôlmandakwar g…ôdaŇč. Ata fa wuzdamandakwara, ya da pakwa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw al…ôkwa fara fara na, ta fa banay masa ata ma …ď…ôsmara Ňčgene. Maja Ňčgene, hazakadakwa cek hay ma t…ôkndakwar Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey c…ôpa. Hazakakwa ma f…ôna na, meb…ôrey ma t…ôkndakwar Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey daa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Jarakwa, nakwa fa mey fa mey haa kasl mend…ôvey a.
12.2: N…ôkakwa dey na, si fa Yesu. Ya da mb…ôkdakwa ba, maja ara aŇčga ma pandakwara c…ôve…ó Ňčga l…ôhey, asaya, ara aŇčga ma da j…ô…óndakwar haa mend…ôvey a. Ta t…ô…ďa la Ňčga k…ô…ómara fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya, kwa hwaray ta kar Ňčga m…ôcey daa ba. A t…ô…ďa maja a wulkey a da h…ôtey mees…ômey masa Gazlavay ma …ďadara Ňčga v…ôldara fa d…ô…ďa ha. Wure ke…óe, aŇčga manjakaya ta har-z…ômay Ňčga Gazlavay ma wey da ray cek hay c…ôpa.
12.3: Ahaw, wulkam da ray Yesu a. Nd…ôhay malamba hay ta r…ôsmara la, ta s…ôrdamara banay la, ama ta …ď…ôsa la c…ôpa. Anda ke…óe, ka da g…ôram ba, ka da m…ôcmara vaw ba. Mey da ray mek…ôtey Ňčga Gazlavay
12.4: Akwar fa k…ô…óam vaw amba ka kam meb…ôrey ba, ama kwa ndaw pal da wuzlah akwar ta m…ôcey daa mek…ô…óey-vaw a daa ba araŇč.
12.5: Akwar fa s…ôrfadamara mey masa Gazlavay ma d…ôkakwar mevel ta aŇčga heyey, ba diya? Gazlavay aa guzlkwar anda aa maa guzltar Ňčgada b…ôz aŇčga hay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęB…ôz a…óaw, da yah, Bay Gazlavay, ya fa s…ôrdaka banay Ňčga k…ôtka na, t…ô…ďa mek…ôtey a. Da ya fa mb…ô…óka ray na, ka da cey mevel ba.
12.6: Maja yah, Bay Gazlavay, ya k…ôtey na, ndaw masa yah ma wu…óa. Ya s…ôrdey banay na, ta nd…ôhay c…ôpa masa yah ma pata Ňčga b…ôz a…óaw hay.¬Ľ
12.7: Gazlavay a s…ôrdakwar banay na, a key a k…ôtkwar. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a pakwar na, anda b…ôz aŇčga hay. B…ôzey masa papaha a k…ôta ba na, daha daw?
12.8: Gazlavay na, fa k…ôtata b…ôz aŇčga hay c…ôpa. Anda ke…óe, da aa fa k…ôtkwar daa ba na, Ňčgene akwar b…ôz aŇčga hay fara fara ba, akwar b…ôza hay manjar papaŇč.
12.9: Yaw, papa al…ôkwa hay da b…ôla na, fa k…ôtmandakwar, anda ke…óe, al…ôkwa fa namatakwar ray. Kaa wara ya nakwar ray a papa al…ôkwa Bay Gazlavay ma f…ôna ba na, kwara? Da al…ôkwa fa nakwar ray na, ya da h…ôtkwa heter mend…ôvey ba.
12.10: Papa al…ôkwa hay masa da b…ôla ke…óe a k…ôtmandakwar Ňčga menjey nek…ô…óey gway anda mevel ata ma wu…óey. Ama papa al…ôkwa masa da va…ó na, a k…ôtndakwar Ňčga …óiyndakwar amba ya t…ôrkwa nd…ôhay aŇčga hay maaya anda aŇčga Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
12.11: Daa masa Gazlavay fa k…ôtndakwar na, a mbafandakwar ba, a candakwar mevel. Ama, nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mek…ôtey a na, a h…ôtam menjey maaya la ta zazay fa d…ô…ďa ha. Nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay a da njam na, kwara?
12.12: Anda ke…óe, ka da m…ôcmara vaw ba, kam g…ôdaŇč Ňčga daw fa mey fa mey.
12.13: Maaya na, ka s…ôpmara c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay d…ôr e amba nd…ôhay siya da wuzlah akwar masa-b…ôle hay a mb…ôkdamara mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba, a s…ôpmara Gazlavay maaya maaya.
12.14: S…ôpam Ňčga njey ta zazay ta nd…ôhay tabiya, kam g…ôdaŇč amba ka kam cek ma mbafar a Gazlavay, da daa ba na, kwa ndaw fa da h…ôtar Gazlavay ta dey aŇčga daa ba.
12.15: Wam vaw, kwa waawa da wuzlah akwar a da mb…ô…óar d…ô…ďa a Gazlavay masa fa wu…óndakwar kalah ke…óe ba. Asaya, wam vaw amba kwa waawa da wuzlah akwar a t…ôrey anda slaslalay Ňčga wudez masa mee…ó…ôwek e ba, da daa ba na, a da pey har, a da n…ôsta nd…ôhay siya ta …óe…ó…ôwek aŇčga ha.
12.16: Wam vaw, kwa waawa da wuzlah akwar a da key cek malamba ba, a da r…ôsa cek maaya Ňčga Gazlavay anda Ezayu ba. Ezayu a na, ta l…ôvar la a m…ôlmaha mec…ôhe Ňčga key mahura da ray a amba a v…ôlar cek mez…ômey gway.
12.17: Ka s…ôrmara fa d…ô…ďa ha, Ezayu ta wu…óey la amba papaha a p…ôsar mey c…ôŇčga, haa a s…ôpa mep…ôsey-mey a ta mat…ôway daa dey. Ama papaha ta p…ôsar mey daa saba, maja Ezayu a gwa Ňčga mb…ô…óda cek maaya ba masa aŇčga ma ka heyey saba.
12.18: S…ôrmara, daa masa *Israyel hay ata da wuzlah-ley na, ata ta Ňčg…ôcham la a cakay aŇčgwa Ňčga Sinay, cek masa ndaw ma gwa Ňčga g…ôsfar. Ama akwar na, ka ta Ňčg…ôcham a cakay cek masa ndaw ma gwa Ňčga g…ôsfar anda Israyel hay zleezle na, daa ba. Daa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa ha na, awaw fa g…ô…óey njem! njem! da ray a, l…ôvaŇč …ď…ôk-…ďek asaya, b…ôrgadaŇč fa key ta g…ôdaŇč da ray a.
12.19: Asaya, daa aŇčgwa ha na, taalam fa c…ônwa, …óay fa c…ônwa. Israyel hay a ma c…ôndamara na, a t…ôwam, a wu…óam amba Gazlavay aa guzltar saba,
12.20: maja mey masa ata ma c…ôndamara na, a f…ôntar g…ôdaŇč. Gazlavay aa guzltar, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKwa ndaw, kwa cek Ňčga ley ma g…ôsfar fa aŇčgwa ha na, hazakamara ta aŇčgwa haa a m…ôcey.¬Ľ
12.21: Cek masa ata ma h…ôtmar a na, ta zluradata sem kalah. Kwa *Mawiz may, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa faa wesey maja mand…ôrzay fa kaya.¬Ľ
12.22: Ama akwar na, ka ta Ňčg…ôcham la aa aŇčgwa Ňčga *SiyaŇčw, aa berney Ňčga Gazlavay, Gazlavay ndaw masa aŇčga daha ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Berney a na, ara *Jeruzelem masa da gazlavay da va…ó. Fete…óe maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay makustakaya ga, a sl…ôfam ba, fa kam gwagway.
12.23: Asaya, akwar ta Ňčg…ôcham la a cakay b…ôza hay Ňčga Gazlavay masa maa-mey-ndaw makustakaya fete…óe may. B…ôza hay a na, ara nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma wuzlalatara mez…ôley ata sem aa …óerewel aŇčga. Ata fa kam gwagway da va…ó may. Akwar ta Ňčg…ôcham la a cakay Gazlavay, Gazlavay masa ma katar sariya a nd…ôhay da b…ôla tabiya. Akwar ta Ňčg…ôcham la a cakay nd…ôhay masa ma kam sl…ôra ta c…ôve…ó e ma t…ôram maaya kalah fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
12.24: Akwar ta Ňčg…ôcham la a cakay Yesu, ndaw masa ma mb…ô…ód…ôrwa mambaz aŇčga amba ya t…ôrkwa nd…ôhay maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Yesu a na, ara ndaw ma hand…ôrwa *Mej…ôwey-mey Mawiya masa Gazlavay ma j…ôwa ta al…ôkwa. Mambaz masa aŇčga ma mb…ô…ód…ôrwa na, a wuzwa cek maaya ma f…ôna cek masa mambaz Ňčga *Abel ma wuzd…ôrwa.
12.25: Anda ke…óe, wam vaw, j…ôkfamar sl…ômay a ndaw masa maa guzlkwar, ka da mb…ô…ómar d…ô…ďa ba. Zleezle na, nd…ôhay ta j…ôkfamar sl…ômay a ndaw ma wuzdatara mey Ňčga Gazlavay da b…ôla ke…óe daa ba. Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ma s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay a. Al…ôkwa masa fa c…ôndakwa …óay Ňčga Yesu, ndaw maa guzlndakwar ta da va…ó ke…óe, da ya j…ôkfakwar sl…ômay ba na, kaa ya da l…ôhkwa daa banay a kwara?
12.26: Zleezle na, …óay Ňčga Gazlavay ta c…ônwa la, hwiyak ta wusey la. Ama wure ke…óe, Gazlavay aa guzley da ray cek masa aa ma da ka, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa wusa hwiyak la dey pal saya. Ya da wusey na, hwiyak daada ba, ama slam da gazlavay da va…ó may.¬Ľ
12.27: Mey masa ma l…ôvey ¬ędey pal saya¬Ľ a wuzwa cek hay tabiya masa Gazlavay ma kat…ôrwa na, a wusam la. Asaya, cek hay a, aa z…ô…óam la. A ka k…ône amba cek hay masa ma wusam ba na, aa z…ô…óam ba, a njam k…ône.
12.28: Anda ke…óe, kakwar suse a Gazlavay maja aa ma v…ôlndakwar berney masa ma p…ôlhey ba, slam masa Gazlavay fa wey da ray nd…ôhay aŇčga hay Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Kakwar cek masa ma mbafar, nakwar ray.
12.29: S…ôrmara, Gazlavay masa al…ôkwa ma h…ôlmakwa na, aŇčga anda awaw maa wurey cek.

13.1: Akwar nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay, wu…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar c…ôŇčga anda akwar m…ôlmaŇč hay.
13.2: Anda ke…óe, s…ôrfadamara Ňčga t…ô…ďey m…ôlak hay a way akwar hay ta mees…ômey. Nd…ôhay mekele ta t…ô…ďam m…ôlak hay la k…ône, anja a t…ô…ďam na, maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay, kwa ta s…ôrmara daa ba.
13.3: Wulkam ta nd…ôhay daa f…ôrs…ône, anda akwar bama ta ata daa f…ôrs…ône he may. Asaya, wulkam ta nd…ôhay masa fa s…ôrdamata banay, anda akwar may, fa s…ôram banay bama ta ata.
13.4: Kwa waawa Ňčga j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey masa Gazlavay ma l…ôvey da ray meley Ňčgwas. Anda ke…óe, kwa waawa a da ley vaw saw da palah ba. S…ôrmara, Gazlavay a katar sariya la Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma lam vaw saw da palah ta Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma kam cek hay malamba.
13.5: Kwa waawa a da wulkey kalah da ray dala ba. Sas…ômam ta cek masa da har akwar gway, maja Gazlavay ta ray aŇčga taa guzley la, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYa fa da mb…ô…óka d…ô…ďa daa ba. Kwa ya fa da mb…ôkdaka daa ba.¬Ľ
13.6: Anda ke…óe, kwa waawa da wuzlah al…ôkwa a gwa Ňčga l…ôvey ta mand…ôrzay daa dey daa ba: ¬ęBay Gazlavay na, ara ndaw ma j…ônya. Maja Ňčgene, ya fa da zlurey kwa ta meeme daa ba, maja ndaw ma gwa Ňčga kaya cek maaya ba na, daa ba.¬Ľ
13.7: Wulkam ta *bay-ray akwar hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu masa ma wuzdamakwara mey Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle. Yaw, wulkam da ray menjey ata, asaya, da ray mem…ôcey ata. Pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara anda ata.
13.8: Yesu *K…ôriste na, a mb…ô…óey ba d…ôga zleezle haa wure ke…óe, aŇčga daha Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
13.9: Wam vaw maja nd…ôhay faa s…ôrkadamata nd…ôhay ta mees…ôrkey mekele mekele masa wal ta mees…ôrkey masa fara fara Ňčga Gazlavay. Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, a da zlaŇčga…óadamakwar ta mees…ôrkey ata da ray mes…ôpey kwakwas da ray cek mez…ômey. Ama kwakwas da ray cek mez…ômey a na, kwa ta j…ônta nd…ôhay masa ma s…ôpmara kwakwas a na, daa ba s…ôlak. AŇčga maaya amba nd…ôhay a h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay ta fa maaya Ňčga Gazlavay, da ray mes…ôpey kwakwas da ray cek mez…ômey.
13.10: Al…ôkwa na, ta slam al…ôkwa mef…ôkey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay, ama nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ata ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga z…ômey cek da ray slam aha daa ba.
13.11: Ata na, a h…ôram g…ônaw. *Ndaw mahura da ray nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay na, a mb…ôzey ta mambaz a aa *Slam masa Gazlavay aa da hwa…ó a Ňčga v…ôldara a Gazlavay Ňčga mb…ôkey meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay. Aslaw a na, a badamara ta cakay, aa wurmara fete…óe.
13.12: Yesu na, k…ône may, a da k…ô…ómara na, ta‚Äô, a badamara la daa berney Ňčga *Jeruzelem ta cakay. A s…ôrey banay anda Ňčgene na, amba a t…ôrdata nd…ôhay Ňčga nd…ôhay maaya manjar meb…ôrey ta fa mambaz aŇčga.
13.13: Da anda ke…óe na, ya da s…ôpkwa kwakwas Ňčga *J…ôwif hay saba. Bakwa la ta cakay, nakwa fa Yesu amba a pamandakwar hwaray bama ta aŇčga.
13.14: Da b…ôla ke…óe na, al…ôkwa manjatakaya daa berney masa ma da njey Ňčga s…ôrmataw ba, ama ya s…ôpkwa ta s…ôpey na, berney masa Gazlavay ma da l…ôma Ňčgada fa mey.
13.15: Anda ke…óe, kakwa suse a Gazlavay mandaw mandaw ta mez…ôley Ňčga Yesu. Mekey suse a Ňčgene na, ara anda cek mev…ôley Ňčgada Gazlavay ma bawa da mey al…ôkwa Ňčga h…ôlma.
13.16: Maaya na, ka kam cek masa maaya da wuzlah akwar, asaya, ka j…ônam vaw. Mekey cek anda Ňčgene na, ara anda mev…ôley cek masa ma mbafar a Gazlavay.
13.17: Maaya na, ka namatar ray a bay-ray akwar hay, ka c…ônmatar mey. Ara ata ma n…ôkfamakwar dey daa menjey akwar, maja Gazlavay a daa c…ôf…óata da ray sl…ôra ata masa ata ma kamara Ňčgada akwar. Anda ke…óe, da akwar fa namatar ray na, a kamara sl…ôra ata la ta mees…ômey, da daa ba na, har a da r…ôwtar. Da har ta r…ôwtar sem na, Ňčgene, fa da j…ônkwar daa ba s…ôlak.
13.18: Ambahw, d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay maja ala. Ya s…ôrmara fara fara, mevel ala maaya, ya wu…óam Ňčga key cek ta c…ôve…ó e mandaw mandaw.
13.19: Yaa c…ôf…óakwar kalah na, Ňčga d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay amba a v…ôlya c…ôve…ó Ňčga v…ôhey fa akwar wure ke…óe. Mep…ôsey-mey
13.20: Ara Gazlavay ma v…ôlndakwar zazay. Ara aŇčga ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa Bay al…ôkwa mahura Yesu da wuzlah nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya. Yesu a na, ta t…ôrey la anda mec…ôkwer al…ôkwa mahura ma n…ôkfandakwar dey, maja aŇčga ma m…ôcey maja al…ôkwa. Ta fa mambaz aŇčga ma mb…ô…ówa na, Gazlavay ta j…ôwey mey la ta al…ôkwa Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
13.21: Anja Gazlavay Ňčga v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč amba ka kam cek tabiya maaya anda aa ma wu…óey. Anja Ňčga ka sl…ôra aŇčga ta al…ôkwa ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste, amba ya t…ôrkwa nd…ôhay maaya fa mey aŇčga. Anja nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôlmamara Ňčga s…ôrmataw. *Amen. Mey Ňčga madagway-dakw
13.22: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya fa kakwar ambahw, t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw masa ma da v…ôlkwar g…ôdaŇč daa leeter ke…óe ta mees…ômey. Leeter ke…óe na, aa zazam daa ba.
13.23: Yaw, ya wu…óey Ňčga wuzdakwara, m…ôlma al…ôkwa Timawte na, ta bawa cay daa f…ôrs…ône. Da ta wuswa la fiyaw fe…óe na, ya da diyam cew e fa akwar.
13.24: Camatar har a *bay-ray akwar hay ta a nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu fete…óe tabiya may. M…ôlma al…ôkwa hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu daa hwayak Ňčga Itali a camakwar har may.
13.25: Anja Gazlavay Ňčga p…ôskwar mey, akwar tabiya ndav.

1.1: Yah, *Jak, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga *Gazlavay leŇč Ňčga Bay Mahura *Yesu *K…ôriste, ya fa cakwar har, akwar nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay daa s…ôkway hay kuraw a ray a cew maakwacatakaya ray da b…ôla tabiya. Mey da ray mees…ômey daa banay
1.2: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, da banay hay mekele mekele a h…ôtfakwar na, sas…ômam ga c…ôŇčga,
1.3: maja ka s…ôrmara na, Gazlavay a wu…óey Ňčga jadakwar ta fa banay hay a, da akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga fara fara kwa. Anda ke…óe, ka da h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč ma f…ôna Ňčga njey daa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay.
1.4: ∆Ā…ôsmara banay a haa aa mend…ôvey a, amba ka t…ôram nd…ôhay masa maaya kalah, manjar meb…ôrey, nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay fara fara. Mey da ray med…ôrey-daŇčgay
1.5: Da ndaw da wuzlah akwar a s…ôra cek maaya masa aa ma da ka ba na, Ňčgaa c…ôf…óa Gazlavay, amba a wuzdara cek aha, maja Gazlavay a fa v…ôley leŇčgesl maaya mandaw mandaw a kwa waawa maa c…ôf…óa. Ňägada ndaw maa c…ôf…óafar leŇčgesl na, a mb…ô…óar ray ba.
1.6: Ama si ndaw a, aa c…ôf…óa ta mevel pal, si a s…ôra daa mevel aŇčga, fara fara Gazlavay a v…ôldara cek aha la. Da ndaw a, aa ta mewulkey cew cew na, aŇčga anda yam daa b…ôlay masa meme…ó ma cawasla saw k…ône.
1.7: A da wulkey daa ray aŇčga amba a h…ôtey cek da har Bay Gazlavay ba,
1.8: maja aa ta mewulkey cew cew daa cek hay tabiya masa aŇčga ma ka, a gwa Ňčga njey daa c…ôve…ó pal ba. Ndaw masa-zleley ta ndaw masa-viya ata letek fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay
1.9: Anja m…ôlma al…ôkwa hay masa-viya hay daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu Ňčgaa s…ômam maja Gazlavay a t…ôrdata la Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura hay fa mey aŇčga da va…ó.
1.10: Asaya, anja ndaw Ňčga Yesu masa-zleley, kwa Gazlavay ta t…ôrda sem Ňčga mec…ôhe na, Ňčgaa s…ômey c…ôŇčga. A s…ôra a da m…ôcey anda meefekwey masa ma da …ďetey fiyaw fiyaw.
1.11: Da pas fa tey na, a …ďata meefekwey a, a k…ôzley a hwayak, membey aŇčga daa saba, ta n…ôsey sem. Yaw, ndaw masa-zleley may, a da nd…ôvey dey pal k…ône, kwa daa mekey sl…ôra aŇčga. Mey da ray me…ď…ôsey banay
1.12: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray ndaw masa ma …ď…ôsa banay tabiya ma h…ôtfar. Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga banay a na, Bay Gazlavay a da pa Ňčga ndaw maaya, maja aŇčga ta key bay-gula sem. A da v…ôlar heter mend…ôvey ba masa aa ma l…ôvey a v…ôldatara la a nd…ôhay masa ma wu…ómara heyey.
1.13: Da ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga key cek maaya ba na, Ňčgene ndaw a, a da l…ôvey: ¬ęAra Gazlavay ma handaya amba ya ka cek aha¬Ľ na, k…ône ba. Fara fara, ndaw a gwa Ňčga bata Gazlavay ba, asaya, Gazlavay fa hendey ndaw Ňčga key cek maaya ba na, daa ba.
1.14: Da ndaw a wu…óey Ňčga key cek maaya ba na, ara mewulkey aŇčga maaya ba ma bata, ma zlaŇčga…óada daa c…ôve…ó masa maaya.
1.15: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, mewulkey aŇčga maaya ba ha a handa ndaw a Ňčga key meb…ôrey. Meb…ôrey a, a da wey da ray ndaw a haa aa z…ô…óda.
1.16: M…ôlma a…óaw hay mawu…ótakaya, ka da t…ô…ďmara mey masa nd…ôhay ma l…ôvmakwar ma f…ôna mey a…óaw ke…óe ba.
1.17: S…ôrmara, cek hay maaya tabiya masa ma j…ônmandakwar na, fara fara a sawa da va…ó fa Gazlavay PapaŇč ma kata cek hay ma wa…óam da va…ó, anda mel…ôvey, pas ta kiya leŇč wurzla hay. Gazlavay na, a mb…ô…óey ba s…ôlak. Anda pas ma k…ôzley ma key l…ôvaŇč na, Gazlavay a mb…ô…óey k…ône ba.
1.18: Ta mbafar la a Gazlavay amba a v…ôlndakwar heter mend…ôvey ba ta fa mey aŇčga masa fara fara. Gazlavay a ka k…ône amba al…ôkwa nd…ôhay aŇčga hay na, ya t…ôrkwa mahura da ray cek hay tabiya masa aa ma kat…ôrwa. Mey da ray mec…ôney mey Ňčgada Gazlavay
1.19: M…ôlma a…óaw hay mawu…ótakaya, maaya na, kwa waawa Ňčga wusey vaw Ňčga c…ônda mey masa ndaw maa guzlda, a daa guzley fiyaw fiyaw ba, asaya, a da cey mevel fiyaw fiyaw ba may.
1.20: Fara fara, da ndaw mevel fa car na, a gwa a key sl…ôra ma mbafar a Gazlavay ba.
1.21: Da ray Ňčgene, mb…ôkdamara cek hay maaya ba ma n…ôsmakwar. Asaya, mb…ôkdamara mekey meb…ôrey. T…ô…ďmara mey masa Gazlavay ma pakwara aa mevel akwar ta mey maakwa…ó a, maja mey a ke…óe na, a gwa Ňčga l…ôhdakwar.
1.22: Ka da wulkam Ňčga j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay daada gway na, k…ône ba. Maaya na, ka kam cek anda mey a maa guzley. Da daa ba na, a key Ňčgene, ka b…ômam ray akwar.
1.23: Ahaw, da ndaw a j…ôkey sl…ômay fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay gway, ama a ka cek anda mey a maa guzley ba na, Ňčgene, ndaw a, ta t…ôrey sem anda ndaw ma n…ôka dey aŇčga daa baŇčg…ôra.
1.24: A n…ôka dey aŇčga maaya maaya, fa d…ô…ďa ha, masa ta la dey sem na, a daw, a s…ôrfada dey aŇčga ha saba.
1.25: Ama da ndaw a saŇčgala kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay ta d…ôk-vaw, asaya, da ndaw aha a j…ôkey sl…ômay fa kwakwas a, a s…ôrfada, a s…ôpa na, Ňčgene Gazlavay a kar maaya la maja. Fara fara, Gazlavay a kar maaya la maja kwakwas a, aŇčga maaya kalah, a gwa Ňčga l…ôhda ndaw daa meb…ôrey. Mey da ray menjey maaya ma mbafar a Gazlavay
1.26: Yaw, da ndaw a wulkey daa mevel aŇčga, aŇčga ndaw ma s…ôpa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta c…ôve…ó e, ama a wey vaw fa mey masa aŇčga maa guzlda ba na, Ňčgene mes…ôpey mey Ňčga Gazlavay a Ňčgada aŇčga na, ara cek Ňčga tede, a key a b…ômey ray aŇčga.
1.27: Ama fa Gazlavay Papa al…ôkwa na, amba ndaw a s…ôpa mey aŇčga fara fara, a mbafar a Gazlavay a na, si ndaw aha a n…ôkey dey fa matawak hay ta Ňčgwas-vagay hay daa banay ata. Asaya, si ndaw aha a wey vaw fa ray aŇčga maja meb…ôrey da b…ôla ke…óe a da zl…ô…ďa.

2.1: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, akwar masa fa t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu *K…ôriste Bay al…ôkwa Mahura, ndaw masa ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ônta cek hay tabiya Ňčgene na, ka da walam vaw ta weley da wuzlah akwar ba.
2.2: Wulkam cey! Nd…ôhay cew a mb…ôzam a wuzlah akwar daa mekusey, laŇčgar ta zana fa vaw maaya ta daŇčgwa da har maaya, laŇčgar ndaw masa-viya, aŇčga ta zana maaya ba maŇčg…ôrkaya.
2.3: Ka camar har Ňčgada ndaw ta zana maaya heyey, ka l…ôvmar: ¬ęNdaw mahura, njey fa jaŇčga maaya ke…óe¬Ľ, ama Ňčgada ndaw masa-viya heyey na, ka l…ôvmar: ¬ęLecey ta lecey¬Ľ, da daa ba, ka l…ôvmar: ¬ęNjey fete…óe a hwayak.¬Ľ
2.4: Da akwar fa kamara k…ône na, a key Ňčgene, ka walam vaw ta weley, ba daw? Anda ke…óe, meweley vaw ta weley Ňčgene na, a sawa daa mewulkey akwar maaya ba Ňčgene.
2.5: M…ôlma a…óaw hay mawu…ótakaya, j…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya. Gazlavay ta walata masa-viya hay da b…ôla ke…óe sem amba a pamara Yesu Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara, a l…ôham. Asaya, ta walata sem amba a mb…ôzam aa slam masa Gazlavay fa wey da va…ó, slam masa aa ma l…ôvey a da v…ôldatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma wu…ómara heyey.
2.6: Ama akwar na, ka ta r…ôsmata masa-viya hay sem. Akwar fa s…ôrmara, masa-zleley hay fa s…ôrdamakwar banay kalah da b…ôla ke…óe, ba diya? Asaya, ara ata ma …óa…óamakwar Ňčgada fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sariya, ba diya?
2.7: Yaw, maa saŇčg…ôram da ray mez…ôley maaya Ňčga Yesu K…ôriste masa aŇčga ma v…ôldakwara na, ara ata, ba diya?
2.8: Mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęSi ka wu…óa meseembew akah anda kah ma wu…óa ray akah.¬Ľ Da akwar fa namar ray Ňčgada *mewey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay a ke…óe na, Ňčgene ara cek maaya.
2.9: Ama da ka walam vaw ta weley da wuzlah akwar na, Ňčgene ara meb…ôrey. Anda ke…óe, mewey a, aa z…ô…ódakwar la maja akwar ma zl…ô…ďmara.
2.10: Kwa ndaw a nar ray a kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay c…ôpa, ama da ta mb…ôkda mewey pal sem daa kwakwas a na, Ňčgene ta key meb…ôrey sem da ray kwakwas a c…ôpa.
2.11: Ya l…ôvey anda ke…óe na, maja mewey pal ma l…ôvey: ¬ęKa da ley vaw saw da palah ba¬Ľ, mekele saya a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa da k…ô…óey ndaw vagay ba¬Ľ. Da ka ta ley vaw saw da palah daa ba, ama da ka ta k…ô…óey ndaw vagay sem na, Ňčgene ka ta zl…ô…ďa kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay a sem.
2.12: Maja Ňčgene, ya fa l…ôvkwar, wam vaw fa mey masa akwar ma daa guzldamara, asaya, wam vaw fa menjey akwar da b…ôla, maja akwar na, nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma da katar sariya ta fa mewey aŇčga, mewey masa ma gwa Ňčga badakurwa daa meb…ôrey.
2.13: Da ndaw ta s…ôrey dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay siya daa ba na, Gazlavay fa da kar sariya ta dey-ceceh daa ba may. Ama da ndaw ta s…ôrey dey-ceceh la fa nd…ôhay na, Ňčgene ndaw a, fa da zlurey fa Gazlavay ta pas sariya na, daa ba. Mey da ray ndaw ma wuzda met…ô…ďey-mey aŇčga ta fa sl…ôra aŇčga
2.14: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, da ndaw a l…ôvey aŇčga fa t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ama a ka cek anda Gazlavay ma l…ôvar Ňčga ka ba na, Ňčgene met…ô…ďey-mey Ňčga ndaw aha ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga cek Ňčga tede, fa da l…ôhda daa meb…ôrey daa ba s…ôlak.
2.15: Yaw, da m…ôlmakw, da daa ba, dam-mamakw daa *mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Yesu zana ata daa ba, a h…ôtam cek Ňčga z…ômey mandaw mandaw ba,
2.16: ka l…ôvtar: ¬ęAnja ka njam daa zazay, anja ka h…ôtam zana fa vaw, asaya, anja ka h…ôtam cek mez…ômey haa ka r…ôham¬Ľ, ama da ka ta v…ôltar cek masa Ňčga j…ônta daa ba na, mey akah Ňčgene ara mey Ňčga tede, ba diya?
2.17: Anda ke…óe, met…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, aa k…ône may. Da ka t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ama da ka kada sl…ôra ta mey a ba na, met…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčgene ara cek Ňčga tede Ňčgada kah.
2.18: Ama da kwa ndaw a gwa a l…ôvya: ¬ęNdaw laŇčgar a t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay gway, laŇčgar saya a kar sl…ôra maaya Ňčgada Gazlavay.¬Ľ Ňägada ndaw ma l…ôvey k…ône na, yah, *Jak, ya da mb…ô…ódara, ya l…ôvar: ¬ęKa gwa Ňčga wuzdiwa met…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Gazlavay manjar sl…ôra daw? Ama yah na, ya gwa Ňčga wuzdakawa met…ô…ďey-mey a…óaw ta fa sl…ôra masa yah ma ka.¬Ľ
2.19: Asaya, ka fa t…ô…ďa Gazlavay na, aŇčga pal, ba diya? Ňägene, ara cek maaya. Ama kwa mes…ôfney hay maaya ba na, fa t…ô…ďmara mey a k…ône may, a zluram ta mey a.
2.20: Fara fara, da ndaw ta t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay sem, ama a key sl…ôra ma mbafar a Gazlavay ba na, Ňčgene, met…ô…ďey mey a, ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga cek Ňčga tede. Kah ndaw mar…ôzlkaya, ka wu…óey ya wuzdakawa mey a saya daw?
2.21: S…ôrfada *Ab…ôraham, papaŇč Ňčga papa al…ôkwa zleezle taw. Gazlavay a pa Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga na, kwariya? A pa Ňčga ndaw maaya na, ta fa cek maaya masa aa ma ka. Cek aha na, ara aa ma v…ôlda b…ôzey aŇčga *Izak Ňčga sley …óay a Ňčgada Gazlavay heyey.
2.22: Anda ke…óe, ka s…ôra Ab…ôraham ta t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay la. Met…ô…ďey-mey aŇčga ta c…ômam la aa slam a ta sl…ôra masa aa ma ka Ňčgada Gazlavay. Sl…ôra masa Ab…ôraham ma ka ha fa v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga t…ô…ďey mey Ňčga Gazlavay ma f…ôna ma f…ôna.
2.23: Cek aha ke…óe a key anda mey mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay zleezle, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęAb…ôraham a pa Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw aŇčga fara fara. Ara maja Ňčgene, Gazlavay ma pa Ňčga ndaw maaya.¬Ľ Da ray Ňčgene, Gazlavay a z…ôla Ab…ôraham a ¬ęjam a…óaw.¬Ľ
2.24: Anda ke…óe, ya s…ôrkwa na, Gazlavay a gwa Ňčga pa kwa waawa Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga maja ndaw a ma t…ô…ďa mey aŇčga daada ba, ama maja sl…ôra maaya masa aa ma ka may.
2.25: Asaya, wulkam da ray Ňčgwas-barlaw *Rahap. Ta t…ô…ďta nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey hay Ňčga *Israyel hay la a way aŇčga, ta j…ônta la Ňčga badat…ôrwa da slala Jerikwaw taa c…ôve…ó mekele. Anda ke…óe, Rahap a, Gazlavay ta pa sem Ňčga ndaw maaya fa mey aŇčga maja sl…ôra maaya masa aa ma ka Ňčgene.
2.26: Fara fara, da ndaw fa s…ôfney daa saba na, Ňčgene ta m…ôcey sem. Met…ô…ďey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, aa k…ône may. Da ndaw a l…ôvey aa fa t…ô…ďa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ama a kada sl…ôra ba na, met…ô…ďey mey aŇčga ha Ňčgene ara cek Ňčga tede.

3.1: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ka da t…ôram c…ôpa Ňčga nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkadam mey Ňčga Gazlavay a nd…ôhay ba, maja ala nd…ôhay maa s…ôrkadam nd…ôhay na, ta pas sariya, Gazlavay a daa c…ôf…óandar ma f…ôna nd…ôhay siya hay.
3.2: Al…ôkwa c…ôpa fa kakwa meb…ôrey mekele mekele mandaw mandaw. Ama da ndaw fa key meb…ôrey daa meeguzley aŇčga daa ba na, Ňčgene ara ndaw maaya fara fara ma gwa Ňčga wa vaw aŇčga c…ôpa.
3.3: N…ôka, p…ôles na, aŇčga mahura, ama al…ôkwa fa nd…ôkwakwa lagambal, cek mec…ôhe, a mey amba a c…ônndakwar mey. Anda ke…óe, ya gwakwa ya handakwa aa slam masa anda al…ôkwa ma wu…ókwa.
3.4: Asaya, wulkam da ray kwambiwal mahura masa meme…ó ma handa ta g…ôdaŇč. Ara cek mahura, ama ndaw ma hwada kwambiwal a na, a hwada ta hwadam mec…ôhe, a gwa a handa aa slam masa aa ma wu…óey.
3.5: Yaw, neneh may, aa k…ône. Ara cek mec…ôhe da wuzlah mez…ôvey Ňčga vaw hay tabiya, ama ta neneh na, ndaw a gwa aa guzley mey maadakw a ma n…ôsa ndaw. N…ôkmara, zay-awaw ndez k…ô…óey na, a gwa a g…ô…óey, aa k…ôra sidam da ley tabiya.
3.6: Neneh na, aŇčga anda awaw maa wura slam. Ara mez…ôvey pal da wuzlah mez…ôvey Ňčga vaw al…ôkwa hay, ama a gwa a n…ôsa vaw tabiya maja mey hay malamba da b…ôla tabiya na, ara aŇčga ma badat…ôrwa. A n…ôsa ndaw d…ôga mayawa aŇčga haa mem…ôcey aŇčga. Neneh na, aa wura ndaw k…ôlme…óek! ta awaw magaza.
3.7: Ndaw a gwa a wey da ray cek hay tabiya: cek hay da ley ta …óiyaŇč hay ta cek hay ma diyam ta hwa…ó ta hwa…ó, leŇč ewet hay daa yam c…ôpa. Ahaw, a wey da ray ata tabiya.
3.8: Ama Ňčga neneh na, ndaw a gwa a wa ba s…ôlak. Ara cek malamba, a wusey kalah, aŇčga mar…ôhkaya ta mewer, a gwa a k…ô…óey ndaw.
3.9: Ta neneh al…ôkwa na, al…ôkwa fa h…ôlmakwa Bay Gazlavay, Papa al…ôkwa. Yaw, al…ôkwa fa s…ôrkwa Gazlavay a l…ômta nd…ôhay na, k…ôra…ó! anda aŇčga. Ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, al…ôkwa fa c…ô…ókwa nd…ôhay ta neneh e c…ôŇčga.
3.10: Mep…ôsey-mey leŇč mey men…ôsey ndaw na, a gwa Ňčga bawa da mey ndaw pal. M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ya da kakwa k…ône ba.
3.11: Daa wurak Ňčga yam pal na, yam mawuryayak a ta yam mec…ôrey a gwamara a g…ôcwa daa slam a daw?
3.12: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, gudav a gwa a yey s…ôke…ó daw? Asaya, wudez mekele may a gwa a yey gudav daw? Wurak Ňčga yam mawuryayak a na, a gwa Ňčga g…ôcwa yam maaya daw? Mey da ray leŇčgesl masa Gazlavay ma v…ôlda a nd…ôhay aŇčga hay
3.13: Da ndaw ta leŇčgesl ma s…ôra cek da wuzlah akwar daha na, si a wuzda menjey aŇčga maaya ta fa sl…ôra masa aa ma ka ta mey maakwa…ó a, leŇč ta leŇčgesl masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldara.
3.14: Ama da akwar fa kam s…ôleŇč kalah, asaya, da akwar fa wu…ókam …óay, Ňčgene, kwa ka da zlapam maja leŇčgesl akwar a ba. Da daa ba na, mezlepey akwar ta s…ôleŇč akwar Ňčgene na, fa t…ôrda mey masa fara fara Ňčga mey memb…ôrzley.
3.15: LeŇčgesl akwar Ňčgene na, a sawa ta fa Gazlavay da va…ó ba, ara leŇčgesl Ňčga b…ôla ke…óe, ara leŇčgesl Ňčga nd…ôhay mag…ôdaŇč gway, a sawa ta fa *SataŇč, bay-malula.
3.16: N…ôka, da nd…ôhay fa kam s…ôleŇč, fa wu…ókam …óay na, Ňčgene nd…ôhay a, a kam cek ta c…ôve…ó e saba, cek hay maaya ba hay c…ôpa fa ata daha.
3.17: Ama leŇčgesl ma sawa ta fa Gazlavay da va…ó na, meb…ôrey da hwa…ó a daa ba, fa handawa zazay leŇč meeguzley ta mey maakwa…ó a, a wuzlah nd…ôhay, a s…ôrey dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay, a c…ômtar …óay a nd…ôhay, a key sl…ôra maaya mandaw mandaw, a weley ndaw ta weley ba, asaya, a betey ndaw ba.
3.18: Nd…ôhay ma c…ômamatar …óay a nd…ôhay na, fa handamawa zazay a wuzlah nd…ôhay. Mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra ata na, ara menjey maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay.

4.1: Mecekeley-mey ta mek…ô…óey-vaw da wuzlah akwar a sawa na, dama? A sawa na, daa mevel akwar ma k…ô…óey vaw Ňčga key cek hay maaya ba.
4.2: Akwar fa wu…óam Ňčga h…ôtey cek hay mekele mekele, ama ka h…ôtam ba. Ara maja Ňčgene akwar fa k…ô…óam nd…ôhay vagay. Asaya, akwar fa kam s…ôleŇč, akwar fa s…ôpam cek, ama ka h…ôtam ba. Da ray Ňčgene, akwar fa t…ôram vaw, akwar fa k…ô…óam vaw da wuzlah akwar. Ka h…ôtam cek masa akwar ma wu…óam ba na, maja akwar faa c…ôf…óamara cek aha fa Bay Gazlavay daa ba.
4.3: Da akwar faa c…ôf…óam cek fa Gazlavay, ka h…ôtam ba na, ara maja akwar ta mewulkey maaya ba. Anda mel…ôvey, kaa c…ôf…óam na, cek masa ma mbafakwar daada gway.
4.4: Akwar nd…ôhay ma mb…ôkdamara Gazlavay sem, anda Ňčgwas ma mb…ôkda zel e ma ley vaw saw! Akwar ma t…ô…ďmara mewulkey Ňčga b…ôla ke…óe, a key ka r…ôsmara Gazlavay na, ka s…ôrmara ba daw? Fara fara, kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďa mewulkey Ňčga b…ôla ke…óe na, a t…ôrey masa-g…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay la.
4.5: Mey Ňčga Gazlavay a l…ôvey: ¬ęGazlavay a wu…óey cek mekele a key sl…ôra daa mevel al…ôkwa ba, si Mes…ôfney aŇčga masa aa ma pa a ray al…ôkwa gway.¬Ľ Ka wulkam na, mey a ke…óe aa guzley Ňčga tede daw?
4.6: Ama fa kandakwar maaya ma f…ôna ma f…ôna c…ôŇčga. Ara anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga Gazlavay, ma l…ôvey: ¬ęNd…ôhay masa ma zlapam na, Gazlavay a mb…ô…ótar d…ô…ďa la. Ama nd…ôhay meekwe…ó-mey na, Gazlavay a katar maaya la.¬Ľ
4.7: Da ray Ňčgene, namar ray a Gazlavay, jaram maaya maaya amba *SataŇč a batakwar ba, Ňčgene SataŇč a, a hway la d…ôreŇč ta akwar.
4.8: Ňäg…ôcham fa Gazlavay , aŇčga may, a Ňčg…ôchawa la fa akwar. Akwar masa ta meb…ôrey Ňčgene, t…ôram nd…ôhay maaya manjar meb…ôrey. Akwar nd…ôhay masa ta mewulkey cew cew Ňčgene, p…ôrmara mevel akwar.
4.9: S…ôrmara akwar na, nd…ôhay maaya ba. Wudam, t…ôwam maja meb…ôrey akwar. Anja meeseŇčg…ôrey akwar Ňčga t…ôrey Ňčga mat…ôway. Ka daa s…ômam saba, ama nd…ôr…ďam dey.
4.10: Pamara ray akwar Ňčga mec…ôhe fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a g…ôldakwar la. Ka da slam mey a ray nd…ôhay ba
4.11: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ka da slam mey a ray nd…ôhay anda akwar nd…ôhay ma ka sariya ba. Ndaw ma sley mey a ray m…ôlmaha, asaya, a mb…ô…óar ray na, Ňčgene aŇčga letek ta ndaw maa guzley mey maaya ba da ray *mewey Ňčga Gazlavay, a pa mewey a Ňčga vagas. Da ka ka anda Ňčgene na, ka fa nar ray a mewey a daa saba, ama ka ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga ndaw ma r…ôsa mewey a.
4.12: Ara Gazlavay taava aŇčga ma v…ôldandakwara mewey a, asaya, ara aŇčga pal ma gwa Ňčga katar sariya a nd…ôhay. Anda ke…óe, ara aŇčga pal ma gwa Ňčga l…ôhda ndaw daa sariya ha, ara aŇčga pal ma gwa Ňčgaa z…ô…óda may. Kah na, wa, amba ka sley mey a ray m…ôlmakw anda nd…ôhay ma ka sariya na! Mek…ôtey da ray mezlepey
4.13: J…ôkfamaya sl…ômay, akwar nd…ôhay ma l…ôvam: ¬ęTasana, da daa ba, mandaw na, ya diyam la a slala daha, ya kamawa mevey pal, fete…óe ya mb…ô…ómawa har, ya h…ôtam dala ga.¬Ľ
4.14: Akwar maa guzlam anda ke…óe na, ka s…ôrmara cek ma da key mandaw ba, maja ka s…ôrmara menjey akwar da b…ôla ke…óe ba. Menjey akwar a ara anda kakas mec…ôhe ma wuzwa vaw nek…ô…óey, fa d…ô…ďa ha, aa z…ô…óey caca‚Äô!, kwa a h…ôtey saba.
4.15: Maaya na, ka l…ôvam: ¬ęDa Bay Gazlavay ta t…ô…ďa la, ala daha ta dey na, ya da kam cek k…ô…óey ta k…ô…óey.¬Ľ
4.16: Ama wure ke…óe akwar fa zlapam daa meeguzley akwar kalah. Mezlepey anda Ňčgene na, maaya ba.
4.17: Yaw, kwa waawa ma s…ôra mekey maaya a ndaw, ama da ta ka daa ba na, Ňčgene ta key meb…ôrey sem.

5.1: J…ôkfamaya sl…ômay wure ke…óe, akwar nd…ôhay masa-zleley hay. T…ôwam, wudam, maja banay mahura a sawa la a ray akwar.
5.2: Zleley akwar hay a, ta zam sem. Maaca ta z…ômta zana akwar hay sem.
5.3: Dala akwar ta key maadar sem. Maadar a Ňčgene na, a wuzd…ôrwa meb…ôrey akwar la ta pas mekey sariya. Kwa aslaw Ňčga vaw akwar na, aa z…ô…óey la c…ôpa daa sariya ha, maja maadar a Ňčgene. Fara fara, kaa z…ô…óam la anda cek maa wurey k…ôlme…óek! Menjey nek…ô…óey, b…ôla a nd…ôvey la, ama akwar na, ka wulkam si Ňčga …ď…ôcey zleley ga da b…ôla ke…óe gway.
5.4: N…ôka, mawur…ďay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra da ley akwar hay na, akwar ta p…ôlmatara daa ba. C…ôndamara mat…ôway Ňčga nd…ôhay a. Mat…ôway a, ta wusey sem kasl fa Bay Gazlavay Mawaca-waca.
5.5: Akwar fa kam wiya da b…ôla ke…óe, akwar fa kam cek anda akwar ma wu…óam. Akwar faa …ď…ôldamara vaw akwar anda g…ônaw hay Ňčga h…ôrey.
5.6: Akwar fa kamatar sariya Ňčgada nd…ôhay manjar meb…ôrey, ka k…ô…ómata vagay, kwa ta kam h…ôma a ray akwar daa ba. Mey da ray mes…ôkwey Yesu ta d…ôk-vaw
5.7: Da ray Ňčgene, m…ôlma a…óaw hay, s…ôkwakwa ta d…ôk-vaw pas Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu ma da v…ôhwa. N…ôkmara, ndaw meh…ôvey cey! A s…ôkwa mey-var, amba a sl…ôkey. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a s…ôkwa daw aŇčga ha ta d…ôk-vaw amba a n…ôhey maaya maaya haa kasl fa var Ňčga madagway-dakw.
5.8: Akwar may, si ka s…ôkwmara Bay al…ôkwa Yesu ta d…ôk-vaw. Ka da g…ôram ba, maja pas masa aŇčga ma da v…ôhwa na, gweegwe cay.
5.9: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, ka daa Ňčguram mey da ray nd…ôhay ba, daa ba na, Gazlavay a da kakwar sariya. Kwa wure ke…óe, aa fa mey-slam Ňčga way mekey sariya, fa da mb…ôzey aa way a Ňčga key sariya.
5.10: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, s…ôrfadamara nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey hay maa guzlam anda Bay Gazlavay ma l…ôvtar. Banay ma h…ôtfatar la, ta …ď…ôsmara banay a la. Anda ke…óe, …ď…ôskwa banay anda ata ma …ď…ôsmara Ňčgene may.
5.11: Al…ôkwa fa l…ôvkwa, anja maaya Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga njey a ray nd…ôhay ma …ď…ôsmara banay ma h…ôtfatar. S…ôrfadamara mey da ray J…ôwab ma …ď…ôsa banay zleezle. Yaw, s…ôrmara daa mend…ôvey Ňčga banay a na, Gazlavay ta kar maaya la, maja Bay Gazlavay a na, ara ndaw ma s…ôrey dey-ceceh fa nd…ôhay, asaya, fa katar maaya.
5.12: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, cek mahura na, ka da mba…óam ba s…ôlak, kwa ta slam da va…ó, kwa ta slam da hwayak, kwa ta meeme, maja Gazlavay a da kakwar sariya. Da ahaw na, l…ôvam ¬ęahaw¬Ľ, da k…ône ba na, l…ôvam ¬ęk…ône ba¬Ľ. Ňägene, a wusa gway. Mey da ray med…ôrey-daŇčgay
5.13: Ndaw masa fa s…ôrey banay da wuzlah akwar daha daw? Ňäga d…ôrey daŇčgay a Gazlavay. Ndaw masa ta mees…ômey da wuzlah akwar daha daw? Ňäga h…ôlma Gazlavay ta walay.
5.14: Ndaw masa-macay da wuzlah akwar daha daw? Ňäga z…ôlwa *bay-ray hay daa Eg…ôliz amba a d…ôram daŇčgay a Gazlavay maja aŇčga, a takwa…óamar mal ta mez…ôley Ňčga Bay Mahura.
5.15: Daa med…ôrey-daŇčgay ata ha na, da ta t…ô…ďmara la aa mevel ata Gazlavay a mb…ôlda ndaw a la na, Ňčgene, a mb…ôlda la. Bay Gazlavay a sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa la daa macay aŇčga ha. Asaya, da ndaw a, ta key meb…ôrey la na, Gazlavay a mb…ôkdara la.
5.16: Da ray Ňčgene, wuzdamata meb…ôrey akwar hay da wuzlah akwar, d…ôrmar daŇčgay pal pal da wuzlah akwar a Gazlavay amba ka mb…ôlam daa macay. Med…ôrey-daŇčgay Ňčga ndaw masa maaya fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, aa ta g…ôdaŇč ga.
5.17: N…ôka, *Eli na, aŇčga ndaw-mag…ôdaŇč anda al…ôkwa. Ta d…ôrar daŇčgay la a Gazlavay ta mevel pal amba var a pawa ba. Da ray Ňčgene, mevey maakar ta kiya maakwaw var ta pawa daa ba s…ôlak.
5.18: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a d…ôrar daŇčgay a Gazlavay saya amba var a pawa. Maja Ňčgene, var ta‚Äô, a pawa d…ô…ďa, cek hay da ley ta kam la. Mey da ray ndaw ma v…ôhd…ôrwa ndaw ta meb…ôrey aa c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay
5.19: M…ôlma a…óaw hay, da ndaw da wuzlah akwar ta zleŇčge…óey sem daa c…ôve…ó masa fara fara na, maaya na, ndaw mekele a v…ôhd…ôrwa aa c…ôve…ó ehe.
5.20: S…ôrmara, kwa waawa ma v…ôhd…ôrwa ndaw ta meb…ôrey aa c…ôve…ó masa fara fara na, Ňčgene, a key a l…ôhda heter Ňčga ndaw a. Kwa ndaw a, aa ta meb…ôrey ga na, Gazlavay a mb…ôkdara la.

1.1: Ara yah *Piyer ma wuzlalakwara leeter ke…óe, yah *ndaw-mesl…ôrey Ňčga *Yesu *K…ôriste. Ya wuzlalakwara Ňčgada akwar nd…ôhay masa *Gazlavay ma walakwar sem, akwar nd…ôhay masa m…ôlak hay maakwacatakaya ray daa hwayak Ňčga PaŇčw, daa hwayak Ňčga Galati, daa hwayak Ňčga Kapad…ôwas, daa hwayak Ňčga Azi, leŇč daa hwayak Ňčga Bitini.
1.2: D…ôga zleezle na, Gazlavay PapaŇč ta walakwar cay Ňčga t…ôrey nd…ôhay aŇčga hay anda aa ma wu…óey. A pakwar wal ta fa Mes…ôfney aŇčga amba ka namar ray a Yesu K…ôriste, asaya, amba ka t…ôram Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay maaya manjar meb…ôrey ta fa mambaz aŇčga. Anja maaya Ňčga Gazlavay ta zazay aŇčga Ňčga njey ta akwar ma f…ôna ma f…ôna. Mey da ray mel…ôhey
1.3: H…ôlmakwa Gazlavay, PapaŇč Ňčga Bay al…ôkwa Mahura Yesu *K…ôriste. Ta s…ôrfandakwar dey-ceceh la ga, ta yandakurwa la Ňčga dey cew ta fa aa ma sl…ôk…óad…ôrwa Yesu K…ôriste daa mem…ôcey. Ara maja Ňčgene, al…ôkwa fa s…ôrkwa daa mevel al…ôkwa, ya sl…ôk…óakurwa la daa mem…ôcey may.
1.4: Anda ke…óe, akwar fa s…ôkwmara cek hay maaya masa Gazlavay ma …ďadata Ňčgada nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. A …ďadatara cek hay a na, da gazlavay da va…ó. Fete…óe na, cek hay a, a zam ba, a n…ôsam ba, a mb…ô…óam ba.
1.5: Gazlavay na, ndaw masa ta g…ôdaŇč. A j…ô…ókwar la amba a l…ôhdakwar maja akwar fa pamara Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara. Mel…ôhey a Ňčgene, Gazlavay a da wuzd…ôrwa fara fara na, ta pas masa b…ôla ma da nd…ôvey.
1.6: Ara maja Ňčgene, kwa wure ke…óe, masa akwar daa banay wura wura ma da njey nek…ô…óey ke…óe na, sas…ômam c…ôŇčga.
1.7: Banay a Ňčgene na, fa wuzd…ôrwa akwar fa pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara daw, daa ba daw? N…ôka …ď…ôrey magaza cey, kwa ara cek maaya na, a n…ôsey la. Ama Ňčga s…ôrey aŇčga maaya na, si a pamara aa awaw. AŇčga letek k…ône ta akwar ma pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara. Mepey Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw fara fara na, a f…ôna …ď…ôrey magaza ta maaya, ba daw? Ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, fa jadamakwar Ňčga s…ôrey, da akwar fa pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara kwa. Anda ke…óe, ta pas masa Yesu K…ôriste ma da wuzwa vaw na, Gazlavay a h…ôslkwar ray la, a h…ôlmakwar la, aa h…ômdakwar la maja akwar ma pamara Ňčga ndaw akwar fara fara ha.
