Nd…ôhay a l…ôvam, akwar nd…ôhay masa ta dey, ama akwar anda nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya.
3.2: Fara fara, sl…ôra akwar fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčgene na, a h…ôcey. Anda ke…óe, sl…ôk…óam, kam g…ôdaŇč, amba kaa z…ô…óam Ňčga s…ôrmataw fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay ba.

Da akwar ta sl…ôk…óam daa ba na, ya sawa la a wuzlah akwar d…ôrfafay anda ndaw-mayal, akwar fa da s…ôrmara pas a masa yah ma da sawa ha daa ba.
3.4: Ama ta Ňčgene c…ôpa, nd…ôhay siya hay da wuzlah akwar fete…óe da Sardes, ta dakalamata zana ata hay daa ba. Ya da p…ôkam daa slam a ta zana mabara, maja ya n…ôkta na, ata t…ô…óe Ňčga p…ôkam ta yah.

Mez…ôley aŇčga mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga nd…ôhay ma da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba na, ya fa da vav…ôsa daa ba. Ya da l…ôvey ta g…ôdaŇč fa mey Ňčga Papay, Bay Gazlavay, ta maslaŇč aŇčga hay na, ke…óe he, ara ndaw a…óaw.
3.6: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, da ndaw, aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, si a j…ôkey sl…ômay Ňčga c…ôney mey masa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wuzdatara Ňčgada mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay.¬Ľ Mey masa Yesu ma sl…ôrdatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz da Filadelfi
3.7: Ndaw a heyey aa guzlya saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKah, *JaŇč, wuzlala mey a…óaw masa yah ma daa guzldakawa ke…óe amba ka sl…ôrdara Ňčgada maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay ma j…ô…óa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay daa berney Ňčga Filadelfi. L…ôvtar na, ke…óe he ara mey a…óaw, yah, ndaw Ňčga Gazlavay, yah ndaw ma mb…ôrzley ba s…ôlak. Yah ndaw ma k…ôrza lek…ôle ma wura mey-slam Ňčga slam masa Bay Davit ma wa. Da ya ta wura mey-slam a la na, kwa ndaw mekele ma gwa ma g…ôrca daa saba. Yaw, da ya ta g…ôrca sem may, kwa ndaw mekele ma gwa Ňčga wura daa ba s…ôlak.
3.8: ¬ęYa s…ôra sl…ôra akwar. Asaya, ya s…ôra, akwar ta g…ôdaŇč nek…ô…óey gway. Ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, akwar fa t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw ta mevel pal c…ôŇčga, akwar ta mb…ôkdamara mey a…óaw daa ba. Ehe, ya ta wurkwar mey-slam la, kwa ndaw pal ma gwa Ňčga g…ôrca daa ba.
3.9: J…ôkam sl…ômay maaya maaya fa cek masa yah ma da katara Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga *SataŇč, bay-malula. Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene a padamara ray ata Ňčga *J…ôwif hay, ama a mb…ôrzlam, ata J…ôwif hay ba. N…ôkmara, cek masa yah ma da ka: ya da t…ôktar …óay a nd…ôhay a, amba a samawa, a ragadam fa mey akwar. Anda ke…óe, a da s…ôrmara ya fa wu…ókwar kalah.
3.10: Akwar nd…ôhay a…óaw hay, akwar ta t…ô…ďmara mey a…óaw la, akwar ta …ď…ôsmara banay la maja yah. Da ray Ňčgene, ta pas masa banay ma da sawa a ray ndaw a, ndaw a, amba Gazlavay a n…ôka mevel Ňčga nd…ôhay c…ôpa da b…ôla na, ya n…ôkfakwar dey la.
3.11: Fara fara, menjey nek…ô…óey fe…óe ya sawa la. Anda ke…óe, si ka pamara mey masa akwar ma c…ôndamara ke…óe aa mevel akwar maaya maaya, amba ndaw a gwa Ňčga vakwara mawur…ďay masa yah ma da v…ôldakwara ba. Mawur…ďay a na, ara heter mend…ôvey ba.
3.12: Anda ke…óe, ndaw ma f…ôna bay-malula sem ta g…ôdaŇč na, ya da njada a cakay Gazlavay Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Kwa cek ma da bad…ôrwa a palah daa ba s…ôlak. Ya da wuzlala mez…ôley Ňčga Gazlavay a…óaw fa v…ô…óa leŇč mez…ôley Ňčga berney Ňčga Gazlavay a…óaw. Anda mel…ôvey, berney a na, ara *Jeruzelem mawiya, berney masa Gazlavay ma da sl…ôrd…ôrwa ta da va…ó. Asaya, ya wuzlala mez…ôley a…óaw masa mawiya la fa ndaw a Ňčgene.
3.13: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, da ndaw, aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, si a j…ôkey sl…ômay Ňčga c…ôney mey masa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wuzdatara Ňčgada mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay.¬Ľ Mey masa Yesu ma sl…ôrdatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa Eg…ôliz da Lawdise
3.14: Ndaw a heyey aa guzlya saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKah, *JaŇč, wuzlala mey a…óaw masa yah ma daa guzldakawa ke…óe amba ka sl…ôrdara Ňčgada maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay ma j…ô…óa mec…ômey-ray Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay daa berney Ňčga Lawdise. L…ôvtar na, ke…óe he ara mey a…óaw, yah, ndaw mez…ôley Amen. Asaya, ara yah, ndaw ma key sede da ray Gazlavay fara fara ta c…ôve…ó e, ya mb…ôrzley ba s…ôlak. Gazlavay a kat…ôrwa cek hay tabiya na, ta fa yah.
3.15: Ya s…ôra sl…ôra akwar. Sl…ôra akwar a, a mbafaya ba, maja akwar fa s…ôpmara c…ôve…ó a…óaw ta mevel pal daa ba. Akwar fa wu…ómaya maaya maaya daa ba, asaya akwar fa r…ôsmaya daa ba, akwar na, baŇč ta baŇč gway. Kay, yah na, ya wu…óey ka njam baŇč ta baŇč k…ône ba.
3.16: Da ka njam baŇč ta baŇč ta yah, anda ke…óe na, ya da k…ôzlakwar a hwayak ta g…ôdaŇč, anda ndaw ma k…ôr…óawa cek maaya ba da mey.
3.17: ¬ęKa wulkam na, akwar nd…ôhay masa-zleley hay, akwar ta zleley ara mey ba. Asaya, ka wulkam na, cek ma h…ôcfakwar daa ba s…ôlak. Ama fara fara akwar nd…ôhay masa-viya hay na, ka s…ôrmara, ba daw? Ya n…ôkakwar na, ka kamaya dey-ceceh. Akwar masa-viya hay ta vaw …ďa‚Äô k…ône. Akwar wulaf hay.
3.18: Anda ke…óe, ya fa k…ôtkwar. Samawa, h…ô…ókam …ď…ôrey magaza ma we…óey nj…ôlay nj…ôlay fa yah, amba ka t…ôram nd…ôhay masa-zleley fara fara. Samawa, h…ô…ókam zana hay mabara Ňčga k…ôzley fa vaw amba nd…ôhay a h…ôtmakwar akwar vaw …ďa‚Äô k…ône saba. Anda ke…óe, hwaray fa da kakwar daa saba. Asaya, samawa, h…ô…ókam slalak Ňčga dey, amba ka h…ôtmar dey nj…ô…ó-nje…ó, akwar wulaf hay saba.
3.19: Kwa waawa masa yah ma wu…óa na, ya mb…ô…óar ray, ya k…ôta. Da ara anda ke…óe na, si akwar, nd…ôhay da Lawdise, ka kam g…ôdaŇč Ňčga mb…ô…óey menjey akwar da b…ôla, ka s…ôpmara Gazlavay ta mevel pal.
3.20: Ehe, wure ke…óe ya fa lecey fa mey-slam Ňčga ndaw, ya fa z…ôley fa mey-slam a. Yaw, da ndaw a, ta c…ônda …óay a…óaw la, asaya, da ta wuryawa mey-slam a la na, ya da mb…ôzey fa aŇčga amba ya z…ômam …óaf daa slam a, yah ta aŇčga, aŇčga ta yah.
3.21: Yah, ndaw ma f…ôna bay-malula sem ta g…ôdaŇč, ala manjatakaya ta Papay, Bay Gazlavay daa slam aŇčga menjey. Anda ke…óe, da ndaw ma f…ôna bay-malula sem ta g…ôdaŇč na, ya da v…ôlar c…ôve…ó amba a sawa, ya njam cew e aa slam a…óaw menjey.
3.22: ¬ęAnda ke…óe, da ndaw, aŇčga ta sl…ômay na, si a j…ôkey sl…ômay Ňčga c…ôney mey masa *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma wuzdatara Ňčgada mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay.¬Ľ

4.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ya h…ôtey cek mekele saya. Ya h…ôtey na, mey-slam da va…ó mawurkaya. Ya c…ônda …óay Ňčga ndaw maa guzlya Ňčgeeme heyey. ∆äay a, a c…ônwa Ňčga g…ôdaŇč anda taalam ma fey, a l…ôvya: ¬ęT…ôpwa fe…óe a va…ó amba ya wuzdakawa cek masa ma da key Ňčgada fa mey.¬Ľ
4.2: Menjey nek…ô…óey na, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ta‚Äô, a sawa a ray a…óaw. Fete…óe da gazlavay da va…ó, ya da n…ôkey dey na, a ray slam-menjey Ňčga bay. Ndaw manjakaya da ray a.
4.3: Ndaw aha a mbey kalah anda aŇčgwa hay maaya ma wa…óam p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó daa pas. Slam-menjey a mazl…ôrkaya ta kwalay. Kwalay a, a we…óey kalah may anda aŇčgwa maaya ma we…óey p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó mez…ôley ¬ęemerat¬Ľ.
4.4: Slam-menjey hay mekele kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó a zl…ôrmar ray Ňčga slam-menjey heyey. *Bay-ray hay kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó manjatakaya da ray slam-menjey hay a Ňčgene. Nd…ôhay a, ata ta zana mabara fa vaw. Jikwew hay Ňčga bay-gula mapatakaya da ray. Jikwew hay a Ňčgene makatakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza ma we…óey.
4.5: Var a z…ômey w…ô…ó-we…ó, w…ô…ó-we…ó daa slam-menjey da wuzlah heyey. Asaya, var aa b…ôcey ta g…ôdaŇč t…ôzlaw! t…ôzlaw! daa slam-menjey a. Daa slam a Ňčgene, awaw hay maasala fa g…ô…óam Ňčg…ôler Ňčg…ôler. Awaw hay maasala hay a ara mes…ôfney hay maasala Ňčga Gazlavay heyey.
4.6: Asaya, cek anda d…ôhwa fa mey Ňčga slam-menjey a daha, fa we…óey p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó anda baŇčg…ôra, dey a h…ôtey gurgwar a wurza. Asaya, cek hay mekele daha m…ôfa…ó ta dey, fa zl…ôrmar ray Ňčga slam-menjey da wuzlah heyey. Vaw ata c…ôpa na, dey hay wurcacak-cak.
4.7: Ray Ňčga cek Ňčgeeme, a n…ôkey anda ray Ňčga mabar. Ňäga cek Ňčga dey cew e na, a n…ôkey anda ray Ňčga b…ôz-sla. Ňäga cek Ňčga dey maakar a, a n…ôkey anda ray Ňčga ndaw. Asaya, Ňčga cek Ňčga dey m…ôfa…ó a, a n…ôkey anda ray Ňčga b…ôrgaday mahura masa fa j…ôvey.
4.8: Cek hay m…ôfa…ó a, ata ta k…ôrpasl maakwaw maakwaw. Vaw ata c…ôpa na, dey wurcacak-cak gway, kwa dasi k…ôrpasl may. Cek hay a fa zlam walay taa va…ó, taa pas, a g…ôram ba, a l…ôvam: Kah pal, Bay Gazlavay. Kah pal, Bay Gazlavay. Ahaw, kah pal, Bay Gazlavay. Fara fara, kah, Bay Gazlavay, ndaw ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ônta cek hay c…ôpa. Kah na, kah daha d…ôga b…ôla ta l…ômey daa ba araŇč, haa kasl wure ke…óe, kah daha. Asaya, ka sawa la a b…ôla.
4.9: Anda ke…óe, cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey heyey fa zlamar walay Ňčgada Bay Gazlavay manjakaya daa slam-menjey aŇčga heyey, ara aŇčga ndaw masa ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw. A zlamar walay k…ône na, Ňčga h…ôslmar ray, Ňčga h…ôlmamara, ta Ňčga kamar suse.
4.10: Daa masa fa kamara k…ône na, *bay-ray hay kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó heyey fa ragadam fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, ndaw masa ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw, masa manjakaya daa slam-menjey aŇčga heyey. Bay-ray hay a Ňčgene fa h…ôlmamara Gazlavay na, a p…ôkwmata jikwew ata hay heyey, a pamata fa mey Ňčga slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay heyey, a l…ôvam:
4.11: Bay ala Gazlavay, g…ôdaŇč tabiya a sawa ta fa kah. Kah t…ô…óe amba nd…ôhay a h…ôlmamaka, a h…ôslmaka ray, asaya kah t…ô…óe Ňčga wey da ray cek hay tabiya maja kah ma kat…ôrwa cek hay tabiya. Cek hay tabiya da b…ôla daha ara maja kah ma wu…óey Ňčga kat…ôrwa.

5.1: Masa yah, *JaŇč, ya fa n…ôkey dey saya na, ya h…ôtey …óerewel daha mak…ôrzakaya da har ndaw masa manjakaya daa slam-menjey da wuzlah heyey. ∆äerewel e aa da har-z…ômay. Mawuzlalakaya dey cew e cew e, ama mapa…óakaya zlec! daa slam pal. Mey a masl…ôr…ďakaya ta tebe…ó slam maasala, amba ndaw a gwa Ňčga wura ba.
5.2: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay masa ta g…ôdaŇč. Aa fa wudey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMa gwa Ňčga p…ôslta tebe…ó ma sl…ôr…ďa …óerewel ke…óe na, wa? Ma wusa Ňčga wura …óerewel e ke…óe na, wa?¬Ľ
5.3: Ama, kwa ndaw pal ma gwa Ňčga wura daa ba s…ôlak. Kwa ndaw ma pawa salay da va…ó, kwa ndaw ma sawa dama dama da b…ôla ke…óe, kwa ndaw ma bawa daa v…ôge…ó ma gwa Ňčga wura …óerewel e amba a n…ôkey dey a hwa…ó a na, daa ba s…ôlak.
5.4: Anda ke…óe, yah, JaŇč, ya ta t…ôway la ga, maja kwa ndaw pal ma wusa Ňčga wura …óerewel e amba a n…ôkey dey a hwa…ó a daa ba.
5.5: Da ray Ňčgene, ndaw pal da wuzlah *bay-ray hay kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó heyey aa guzlya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa t…ôway ba. N…ôka mabar Ňčgene. A bawa daa s…ôkway Ňčga Juda. Ara ndaw ma yawa daa s…ôkway Ňčga Bay *Davit. Mabar a Ňčgene ta f…ônta cek hay c…ôpa sem ta g…ôdaŇč. Da ray Ňčgene, a gwa Ňčga p…ôslta tebe…ó masl…ôr…ďakaya slam maasala Ňčgene, a wura …óerewel e.¬Ľ
5.6: Daa Ňčgene, ya h…ôtey ndaw malacakaya da wuzlah slam-menjey heyey ta bay-ray hay leŇč cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey heyey. Ndaw a, a n…ôkey anda b…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč maslakaya …óay a, ama aa ta dey c…ôŇčga. Aa ta d…ôram maasala da ray, leŇč ta dey hay maasala . Dey hay maasala a Ňčgene ara mes…ôfney hay maasala masa Gazlavay ma sl…ôrdata aa slam wura wura da b…ôla c…ôpa.
5.7: Ndaw anda B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey ta‚Äô, a Ňčg…ôchawa, a t…ô…ďa …óerewel da har-z…ômay Ňčga ndaw manjakaya daa slam-menjey da wuzlah kaa heyey.
5.8: Masa aŇčga ma t…ô…ďa …óerewel e cay na, ta‚Äô, cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey, leŇč bay-ray hay kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó heyey a ragadam fa mey Ňčga ndaw anda B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč a. Ata c…ôpa ta ganjaval da har, ta taasa hay Ňčga …ď…ôrey magaza mar…ôhkaya ta cek meeŇčg…ôsey mezey maaya. Cek meeŇčg…ôsey a, aa mapakaya anda med…ôrey-daŇčgay Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay.
5.9: Mahura hay ta cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey heyey a zlamar walay mawiya Ňčgada ndaw anda B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč kaa heyey, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęKah na, ka wusa Ňčga la …óerewel ke…óe Ňčga p…ôslta tebe…ó fa v…ô…óa maja ta k…ô…ómaka la vagay. Mambaz akah ta mb…ô…ówa la. Anda ke…óe, ka ta mb…ô…ót…ôrwa nd…ôhay la dasi har Ňčga SataŇč amba a t…ôram nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay. Kwa nd…ôhay masa daa s…ôkway wura wura c…ôpa, masa maa guzlam ta mey wura wura c…ôpa, ta nd…ôhay daa wura daa wura c…ôpa masa daa hwayak hay c…ôpa na, ka ta mb…ô…ót…ôrwa sem.
5.10: Ka ta t…ôrdata la Ňčga nd…ôhay masa kah ma wey da ray ata, nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, mapatakaya Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčgada Gazlavay. Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay a, a da wam da ray nd…ôhay da b…ôla.¬Ľ
5.11: Fa d…ô…ďa ha yah, JaŇč, ya c…ôney …óay Ňčga maslaŇč hay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay da va…ó ga, a sl…ôfam ba. Ya h…ôtatar fa zl…ôrmar ray Ňčga slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay heyey, Ňčga cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey, leŇč Ňčga bay-ray hay kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó heyey.
5.12: MaslaŇč hay a, fa zlam walay ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęB…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč masa ma k…ô…ómara vagay heyey na, aa t…ô…óe Ňčga wey da ray cek hay tabiya, Ňčga h…ôtey zleley, Ňčga h…ôtey leŇčgesl, ta Ňčga h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč. Asaya, aa t…ô…óe amba nd…ôhay tabiya a h…ôslmar ray, aa s…ômam da ray mewe…óey aŇčga, a h…ôlmamara.¬Ľ
5.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya c…ônda …óay Ňčga cek hay tabiya masa Gazlavay ma kat…ôrwa. Cek hay da va…ó, da b…ôla, daa v…ôge…ó leŇč daa b…ôlay c…ôpa fa zlam walay, a l…ôvam: Anja nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôlmamara Gazlavay manjakaya daa slam aŇčga menjey, leŇč B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč may. Anja nd…ôhay Ňčgaa h…ômdamata, Ňčga h…ôslmatar ray, Ňčgaa s…ômam da ray mewe…óey aŇčga, anja Ňčga wam da ray cek hay tabiya Ňčga s…ôrmataw!
5.14: Cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey heyey a mb…ô…ódamatara, a l…ôvam: ¬ę*Amen, Ňčga key k…ône.¬Ľ *Bay-ray hay kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó heyey may a ragadam fa mey ata, a h…ôlmamata.

6.1: Masa yah, *JaŇč, ya fa n…ôkey dey saya na, ya h…ôtar B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč ma la …óerewel masl…ôr…ďakaya slam maasala heyey fa wura. Masa aŇčga fa p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam masa Ňčgeeme na, ya c…ônda …óay Ňčga cek pal da wuzlah cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey heyey. A wudey ta g…ôdaŇč anda var maa b…ôcey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęHawa fe…óe.¬Ľ
6.2: Ya da n…ôkey dey na, a ray p…ôles mabara fa bawa. Ndaw da ray p…ôles e. Ndaw aha aa ta lalaŇč mak…ôrzakaya da har. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmar jikwew Ňčga bay-gula. Aa fa daw Ňčga key bay-gula da ray masa-g…ôra hay Ňčga Gazlavay saya.
6.3: Ta‚Äô, B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč kaa heyey, a p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey cew e. Masa aŇčga fa p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey cew e na, ya c…ônda …óay Ňčga cek Ňčga dey cew e da wuzlah cek hay m…ôfa…ó masa ta dey heyey, …óay a aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęHawa fe…óe.¬Ľ
6.4: Daa Ňčgene, p…ôles mekele ta‚Äô, a bawa. P…ôles e magaza. A p…ôskamar mey a ndaw da ray a, amba a daw a wu…ókatar …óay Ňčga nd…ôhay da b…ôla, amba a k…ô…óam vaw da wuzlah ata vagay vagay. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmar d…ôlaw maaz…ôma a har.
6.5: Ta‚Äô, B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey a p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey maakar a. Masa aŇčga fa p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey maakar a na, ya c…ônda …óay Ňčga cek Ňčga dey maakar a da wuzlah cek hay m…ôfa…ó masa ta dey heyey, faa guzlwa, a l…ôvey: ¬ęHawa fe…óe.¬Ľ Ya da n…ôkey dey na, a ray p…ôles matara fa bawa. Ndaw da ray p…ôles e na, aŇčga ta k…ôlew ma wey cek da har.
6.6: Asaya, ya c…ôney …óay maa guzlwa da wuzlah cek hay m…ôfa…ó masa ta dey heyey. ∆äay a, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDala masa ndaw ma h…ôtar daa sl…ôra fa …óar pal na, a da h…ô…ókey daw-zlaraway t…ôra…ď-har gway. Da ara salaway na, a da key t…ôra…ď t…ôra…ď-har maakar. Ama mal ta wuzam na, ka da wusmata ba, ara cek hay Ňčga n…ôsam ba.¬Ľ
6.7: Ta‚Äô, B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey a p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey m…ôfa…ó a. Masa aŇčga fa p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey m…ôfa…ó a na, ya c…ônda …óay Ňčga cek Ňčga dey m…ôfa…ó a da wuzlah cek hay m…ôfa…ó masa ta dey heyey, faa guzlwa, a l…ôvey: ¬ęHawa fe…óe.¬Ľ
6.8: Ya da n…ôkey dey na, a ray p…ôles fa bawa. Vaw Ňčga p…ôles e b…ôrfakw a. Ndaw masa da ray a na, a z…ôlmara Mem…ôcey, maja ara aŇčga ma k…ô…óta nd…ôhay vagay. Slam masa nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya ma njam da hwa…ó a fa s…ôpar wurzay. Ňägada ata cewete, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmatar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga k…ô…óey nd…ôhay reta Ňčga reta da b…ôla vagay. A da Ňčg…ômamata ta d…ôlaw. Siya hay na, may a da k…ô…óta vagay. Siya hay saya, macay ma da k…ô…óta vagay. Asaya, siya hay, cek hay da ley ma da p…ôwmata.
6.9: Cay, B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey a p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey zlam a. Masa aŇčga fa p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey zlam a na, ya h…ôtatar mes…ôfney Ňčga nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya dasi slam-mef…ôkey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay . A k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay a Ňčgene vagay maja ata ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Gazlavay, asaya maja ata ma kam sede fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay da ray mey Ňčga Yesu.
6.10: Mes…ôfney hay Ňčga nd…ôhay kaa heyey a wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęBay Mahura, kah na, Bay Gazlavay pal. Kah ndaw ma mb…ôrzley ba. Nd…ôhay da b…ôla ma k…ô…ómandar vagay na, ka da katar sariya na, ta vara? Ka da s…ôrdata banay na, ta vara?¬Ľ
6.11: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmatar j…ôbe mabara Ňčgada nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya kaa heyey, a l…ôvmatar: ¬ęNjam fe…óe, m…ôskam vaw nek…ô…óey. M…ôskam vaw haa ata ma k…ô…ómata m…ôlmakw akwar hay masa ma kam sl…ôra da b…ôla Ňčgada Gazlavay anda akwar la …óagay. Ata na, mapatakaya Ňčga m…ôcey anda akwar. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, sariya Ňčga Gazlavay a key la.¬Ľ
6.12: Masa yah, JaŇč, ya fa n…ôkey dey saya na, ya h…ôtar B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey fa p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey maakwaw a. Masa aŇčga ma p…ôslta tebe…ó daa slam Ňčga dey maakwaw a cay na, hwiyak a wusey ta g…ôdaŇč. Pas a mb…ô…óey matara t…ôlekw t…ôlekw. Kiya may a mb…ô…óey magaza anda mambaz.
6.13: Asaya, wurzla hay aa kwacamawa kurtata-ta‚Äô da gazlavay da va…ó anda bab…ôza Ňčga wudez maŇčgurlakw a masa meme…ó ma kwiyd…ôrwa a hwayak.
6.14: Slam da gazlavay da va…ó taa yihey sem anda ndaw ma pe…óey …óerewel, ma la, ma pa aa slam mekele. AŇčgwa hay ta hwayak hay da wuzlah b…ôlay ta Ňčg…ôcham sem daa slam ata.
6.15: Nd…ôhay da b…ôla c…ôpa ta …ďam sem. Kwa bay hay, kwa nd…ôhay mahura hay, kwa *bay-ray Ňčga sewje hay, kwa masa-zleley hay, kwa masa-g…ôdaŇč hay, leŇč beke hay ta nd…ôhay masa beke ba hay, nd…ôhay c…ôpa ta hwam sem Ňčga …ďamawa aa b…ôdam hay, a d…ô…ďa hutkwam hay da aŇčgwa.
6.16: Nd…ôhay a ke…óe a wudam Ňčgada aŇčgwa hay ta Ňčgada hutkwam hay masa ata ma …ďam asiya kaa heyey, a l…ôvam: ¬ęB…ôzlmawa a ray ala, …ďadamandar amba ndaw manjakaya daa slam-menjey da wuzlah heyey a h…ôtndar ba, asaya, amba B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey a k…ôrzandar ta sariya aŇčga ba.
6.17: Fara fara …óar a masa ata cewete ma da kamara sariya ha ke…óe na, ta wuswa sem. Da ray Ňčgene, kwa ndaw fa da gwa Ňčga l…ôhey ta pas a Ňčgene daa ba.¬Ľ

7.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč hay mekele m…ôfa…ó Ňčga Gazlavay. Ata malacatakaya pal pal ta mey cakay hay m…ôfa…ó Ňčga b…ôla. Fa t…ôkmara meme…ó ma kawa ta mey cakay hay a amba meme…ó e, a key saba. Anda mel…ôvey, a key da hwayak saba, a key kwa da ray b…ôlay saba, kwa da ray wudez hay saba.
7.2: Cay, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč pal mekele fa sawa ta wurza. AŇčga ta cek masa Bay Gazlavay, ndaw masa aŇčga daha ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw, ma da t…ôhtara fa daŇčgay Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. Ta‚Äô, a z…ôlt…ôrwa maslaŇč hay m…ôfa…ó masa Gazlavay ma v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga n…ôsey hwayak ta b…ôlay heyey. A z…ôlt…ôrwa ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvtar:
7.3: ¬ęKa da n…ôsmata hwayak ta b…ôlay leŇč wudez hay ba …óagay. Si wara ala ma t…ôhmatar cek fa daŇčgay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay al…ôkwa la …óagay.¬Ľ
7.4: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a wuzdamatiwa nd…ôhay masa ta cek mat…ôhtakaya fa daŇčgay kaa heyey tabiya. Ya c…ônda na, ata gabal temere ta kwakwar m…ôfa…ó a ray a m…ôfa…ó. Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, ata daa s…ôkway hay tabiya Ňčga *Israyel.
7.5: Nd…ôhay a na, ata gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga Juda, gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga Ruben, gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga Gat,
7.6: gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga Aser, gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga Naftali, gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga Manase,
7.7: gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga SimeyaŇčw, gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Levi, gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga Isakar,
7.8: gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga ZabulaŇčw, gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga *Jawzef, leŇč gabal kuraw a ray a cew daa s…ôkway Ňčga BenjameŇč. Mey da ray nd…ôhay da b…ôla tabiya makustakaya
7.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha masa yah ma h…ôtatar nd…ôhay *Israyel hay la na, ta‚Äô, ya h…ôtey nd…ôhay mekele ga makustakaya saya, a sl…ôfam ba. A samawa da wuzlah nd…ôhay daa wura daa wura c…ôpa, daa hwayak hay c…ôpa, a bamawa daa s…ôkway wura wura c…ôpa, aa guzlam mey hay wal wal c…ôpa. Ata tabiya fa mey Ňčga slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay leŇč fa mey Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč Ňčga Bay Gazlavay heyey. Ata c…ôpa ta j…ôbe mabara fa vaw, ta mey-har Ňčga gendew da har Ňčga h…ôsley ray a Bay Gazlavay ta B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč aŇčga.
7.10: Nd…ôhay a faa guzlam ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęMa l…ôhdamandar na, ara Gazlavay al…ôkwa manjakaya daa slam aŇčga menjey ta B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč aŇčga ha ke…óe.¬Ľ
7.11: Slam-menjey masa da wuzlah heyey ta *bay-ray hay leŇč cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey heyey na, maslaŇč hay tabiya Ňčga Bay Gazlavay, a zl…ôrmatar ray. MaslaŇč hay a, a ragadam, daŇčgay dar! a hwayak fa mey Ňčga slam-menjey heyey, a h…ôlmamara Gazlavay,
7.12: a l…ôvam: ¬ęAmen, Bay Gazlavay al…ôkwa. Anja nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôlmamaka, Ňčgaa h…ômdamaka, kah ndaw masa ta leŇčgesl. Anja nd…ôhay Ňčga kamaka suse, Ňčga h…ôslmaka ray, kah ndaw ma wey da ray cek hay tabiya, kah ndaw masa ta g…ôdaŇč. Cek hay a ke…óe Ňčga key k…ône Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Amen.¬Ľ
7.13: Ndaw pal dasi bay-ray hay kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó heyey aa c…ôf…óaya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa s…ôrta nd…ôhay ta j…ôbe mabara ke…óe daw? A samawa na, dama?¬Ľ
7.14: Ya mb…ô…ódara, ya l…ôvar: ¬ęAra kah ma s…ôra, Bay a…óaw. Yah na, ya s…ôra ba.¬Ľ A mb…ô…ódiwa, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAra nd…ôhay ma bamawa cay daa banay mahura da b…ôla. Ta p…ôrmata j…ôbe ata hay la daa mambaz Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč Ňčga t…ôrey mabara.
7.15: Ara maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a ma lacam fa mey Ňčga slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay heyey. Fa h…ôlmamara Gazlavay taa va…ó, taa pas daa Way-mekey-kwakwas aŇčga da va…ó. Ndaw masa manjakaya daa slam-menjey da wuzlah heyey, fa n…ôkfatar dey, fa b…ôr…óata.
7.16: May fa da catar Ňčgada nd…ôhay a Ňčgene daa saba, yam fa da katar daa saba may. Kwa pas fa daa wurwa Ňčga nd…ôlta daa ba, kwa meeme fa da nd…ôlta daa ba,
7.17: maja B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč masa daa slam-menjey heyey, a da t…ôrey Ňčga mec…ôkwer ata. A da handata aa wurak Ňčga yam ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba. Asaya, Gazlavay a da takwa…óatara mat…ôway daa dey ata c…ôpa.¬Ľ

8.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey a p…ôslta tebe…ó Ňčga dey maasala ha. Daa masa aa ma p…ôslta la, cek hay tabiya da gazlavay da va…ó manjatakaya teete haa m…ônet kwakwar maakar.
8.2: Yah, *JaŇč, ya da n…ôkey dey na, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč hay maasala Ňčga Gazlavay malacatakaya fa mey aŇčga. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmatar taalam hay maasala a maslaŇč hay a.
8.3: Daa Ňčgene, maslaŇč mekele daha fa k…ôrzey taasa Ňčga …ď…ôrey magaza. Taasa ha maamandaw na, faa Ňčg…ôsam cek mezey maaya Ňčgada Gazlavay da hwa…ó a Ňčga d…ôrmar daŇčgay. MaslaŇč a, a sawa, deŇč! a lecey gweegwe ta slam-meewurey cek mezey maaya Ňčgada Gazlavay makakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza. Ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmar cek mezey maaya ga Ňčgaa Ňčg…ôsey amba kakas aha ta med…ôrey-daŇčgay Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay tabiya a wusam fa v…ô…óa. Anda ke…óe, a pa cek mezey maaya heyey a ray slam aha, aa Ňčg…ôsa fa mey Ňčga slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay heyey.
8.4: Daa masa maslaŇč faa Ňčg…ôsa cek mezey maaya kaa heyey, kakas a, a bawa daa taasa da har maslaŇč a, ta‚Äô, aa Ňčg…ôsey, a wusey fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay a va…ó ta med…ôrey-daŇčgay Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay heyey.
8.5: Masa maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay heyey ma ka cek aha la, anda ke…óe na, leŇč! a la taasa heyey, a h…ôrcawa awaw da ray slam-meewurey cek heyey, ta‚Äô, a kwiyd…ôrwa awaw a, a b…ôla. Menjey nek…ô…óey, var ta‚Äô, a z…ômey w…ô…ó-we…ó, w…ô…ó-we…ó, ta‚Äô, aa b…ôcey t…ôzlaw! t…ôzlaw! Hwiyak a wusey ta g…ôdaŇč g…ôdek g…ôdek anda aŇčgwa ma b…ôzley. Mey da ray taalam hay m…ôfa…ó Ňčgeeme
8.6: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga cek hay a Ňčgene, maslaŇč hay maasala ta taalam hay da har a …óiyam vaw amba a famata taalam hay a.
8.7: MaslaŇč Ňčgeeme ta‚Äô, a fa taalam aŇčga. Lanja a kwiywa a b…ôla majaha…óakaya ta awaw ta mambaz. B…ôla ha a wunkey slam maakar. Slam pal awaw a wawura ta wudez hay da hwa…ó a c…ôpa. Kusaf masa meend…ô…ďek e c…ôpa ta wewurey sem.
8.8: Cay, maslaŇč Ňčga dey cew e, ta‚Äô, a fa taalam aŇčga may. Cek anda aŇčgwa mahura, awaw fa g…ô…óey nj…ôm-njem da ray a, a k…ôzlwa t…ôzlem! aa b…ôlay. B…ôlay a, a wunkey slam maakar. Slam pal a t…ôrey Ňčga mambaz.
8.9: Cek hay masa daa yam a, a wunkey slam maakar. Slam pal, cek hay a c…ôpa a m…ôcam. Kwambiwal hay ma p…ôkam da ray yam a, a wunkam slam maakar. Slam pal, kwambiwal hay a c…ôpa a n…ôsam.
8.10: Cay, maslaŇč laŇčgar ta‚Äô, a fa taalam aŇčga. Ara maslaŇč Ňčga dey maakar a. Wayam hay leŇč wurak hay Ňčga yam a wunkam slam maakar. Slam pal, wurzla mahura fa g…ô…óey nj…ôm-njem anda awaw, a k…ôzlwa a hwa…ó a.
8.11: Mez…ôley Ňčga wurzla ha ¬ęWurzla-∆äe…ó…ôwek¬Ľ. Masa aa ma k…ôzlwa la aa wayam kaa heyey na, ta‚Äô, wayam hay a, a wunkam slam maakar. Slam pal, yam da hwa…ó a ta t…ôrey sem …óe…ó…ôwek. Nd…ôhay ga ta m…ôcam sem maja yam mee…ó…ôwek ehe, aa ta mewer da hwa…ó a.
8.12: Cay, maslaŇč mekele saya a fa taalam aŇčga may. Ara maslaŇč Ňčga dey m…ôfa…ó a. Masa aa ma fa la na, cek a t…ô…ďzla mewe…óey Ňčga pas, mewe…óey Ňčga kiya, leŇč Ňčga wurzla hay. Mewe…óey Ňčga pas, Ňčga kiya, leŇč Ňčga wurzla hay a wunkey slam maakar. Slam pal a we…óey saba. Anda ke…óe, l…ôvaŇč a key nek…ô…óey. Anda mel…ôvey daa mev…ôrndey na, pas a tey …ď…ôrey daaŇčgafa…ó gway. Dasi tava…ó na, kiya ta wurzla hay a wa…óam …ď…ôrey daaŇčgafa…ó gway may. Mey da ray banay ma da sawa
8.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya da n…ôkey dey na, ya h…ôtey b…ôrgaday fa j…ôvey d…ôreŇč da va…ó. Ya c…ônda fa wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWaay! Waay! Banay a sawa la a ray nd…ôhay c…ôpa da b…ôla. MaslaŇč hay maakar daha ta famata taalam ata hay daa ba araŇč. Da ta famata cay na, banay a sawa la ga.¬Ľ

9.1: Cay, maslaŇč mekele ta‚Äô, a fa taalam aŇčga may. Ara maslaŇč Ňčga dey zlam a. Menjey nek…ô…óey, yah, *JaŇč, ya h…ôtey wurzla ma k…ôzlwa da va…ó a hwayak. A v…ôlmar lek…ôle amba a wura v…ôge…ó meseleleŇč e .
9.2: Ta‚Äô, wurzla ha a wura v…ôge…ó e. Kakas a bawa da hwa…ó a anda ndaw ma nd…ôley mel…ômey hay ga daa wurak mahura. S…ôrat! a s…ôrta pas. L…ôvaŇč t…ô…ďzlelem! a key.
9.3: Ta‚Äô, ayakw hay a bamawa daa kakas a, a b…ôla, a h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč Ňčga zey nd…ôhay anda arac.
9.4: A l…ôvmatar a ayakw hay a amba a z…ômam kwa guzer ba, kwa wudez pal ba, asaya, a da z…ômam cek mekele ma p…ôcwa daa hwiyak ba. Ama a da zam na, si nd…ôhay masa Gazlavay ma t…ôhtar cek fa daŇčgay ata hay daa ba s…ôlak.
9.5: Asaya, a l…ôvmatar a ayakw hay a Ňčga k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay vagay ba. Si a s…ôrdamata banay gway haa kiya zlam. Mezey Ňčga ayakw hay a na, a da catar anda mecey Ňčga arac.
9.6: Daa kiya zlam a ke…óe, nd…ôhay a, a daa c…ôf…óam mem…ôcey amba a s…ôram banay saba, ama fa da h…ôtam mem…ôcey daa ba. Fara fara a wu…óam Ňčga m…ôcey, ama kwa fa da h…ôtam slam Ňčga m…ôcey daa ba s…ôlak.
9.7: Ayakw hay kaa a n…ôkam anda p…ôles hay masa ma j…ôwmata cay Ňčga daw aa v…ôram. Ata ta cek anda jikwew Ňčga bay-gula da ray, makakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza. Dey ata na, anda Ňčga nd…ôhay.
9.8: EŇčgwec da ray ayakw hay a, maaz…ôma s…ôlep s…ôlep anda Ňčga Ňčgusay. Sler ata hay yiŇč-yeŇč anda Ňčga mabar.
9.9: Ayakw hay a, dadak ata hay mas…ôrtatakaya ta cek anda zana Ňčga …ď…ôrey masa ma k…ôzlamata Ňčgadaa v…ôram. Zlara ata hay a mbam mey anda seret hay ga masa p…ôles hay ma hwadamara Ňčgadaa v…ôram.
9.10: Asaya, kwetel ata c…ô…ď-ce…ď anda Ňčga arac. A zam ndaw anda arac may. Ara kwetel hay a Ňčgene ma v…ôlmatar g…ôdaŇč Ňčgada ayakw hay a, amba a zamata nd…ôhay daa kiya zlam heyey.
9.11: Bay Ňčga ayakw hay a na, ara maslaŇč Ňčga bay-malula masa ma wa v…ôge…ó masa seleleŇč heyey. Ta mey *Heb…ôre a z…ôlmara maslaŇč a ¬ęAbadaŇčw¬Ľ, ta mey G…ôrek a z…ôlmara ¬ęApaliyaŇčw¬Ľ. Mez…ôley hay cewete ke…óe a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey: ¬ęcek ma n…ôsey cek hay mandaw mandaw.¬Ľ
9.12: Anda ke…óe, banay Ňčgeeme na, ta nd…ôvey cay. Ama wam vaw, maja banay hay mekele cew daha a samawa la saya. Mey da ray taalam Ňčga dey maakwaw a
9.13: Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč masa Ňčga dey maakwaw a, a fa taalam aŇčga may. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ya c…ôney …óay maa guzlwa ta cakay hay m…ôfa…ó Ňčga slam-meewurey cek mezey maaya Ňčgada Gazlavay heyey. Slam aha makakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza, aŇčga fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay.
9.14: ∆äay heyey ta‚Äô, aa guzlar Ňčgada maslaŇč Ňčga dey maakwaw a masa ta taalam da har heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęP…ôskata maslaŇč hay Ňčga bay-malula m…ôfa…ó masa maj…ôwtakaya da mey-wayam mahura Ňčga Ef…ôrat Ňčgene.¬Ľ
9.15: MaslaŇč hay m…ôfa…ó Ňčgene ma…óiytakaya vaw d…ôga zleezle Ňčga k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay da b…ôla vagay. Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč a, a daw a p…ôskata maslaŇč hay a m…ôfa…ó ata. A p…ôskata na, amba a kam sl…ôra, ta l…ômla ke…óe, daa kiya ha ke…óe, ta pas a ke…óe, asaya, daa ler e ke…óe may. Gazlavay a wunkata nd…ôhay da b…ôla slam maakar. Slam pal na, maslaŇč hay a, a k…ô…ómata vagay.
9.16: Ta‚Äô, ya h…ôtey sewje hay da ray p…ôles hay fa samawa. A kadamiwa sewje hay a, ata na, we. A l…ôvam ata maliyaŇčw temere cew.
9.17: Anda yah ma h…ôtar daa cek masa Yesu ma wuzdiwa na, sewje hay a, ata ta zana Ňčga v…ôram fa vaw. Zana hay a magaza anda awaw, matara t…ôlekw t…ôlekw anda l…ôvaŇč Ňčga var, asaya maa kuray-b…ôzey. Ray Ňčga p…ôles hay a, a s…ôram ba ta ray Ňčga mabar hay. Awaw ta kakas matara leŇč aŇčgwa maa kuray-b…ôzey, ma g…ô…óey nj…ôm-njem a bawa da mey p…ôles hay a.
9.18: Nd…ôhay da b…ôla mawunkakaya slam maakar. Slam pal na, banay hay maakar a ke…óe a k…ô…ómata vagay. Anda mel…ôvey, ara awaw ta kakas matara leŇč aŇčgwa maa kuray-b…ôzey, ma g…ô…óey nj…ôm-njem, ma bawa da mey ata heyey ma k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay a vagay.
9.19: Anda ke…óe, ara cek hay a Ňčgene ma bamawa da mey p…ôles hay a, ma v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč Ňčga s…ôrdata banay ta nd…ôhay. Asaya, kwetel ata hay fa s…ôrdamata banay may. Kwetel hay a na, a n…ôkam anda zezekw hay, maja mey Ňčga kwetel hay a na, ata anda ray Ňčga zezekw hay. Da ray Ňčgene, p…ôles hay a, a zam nd…ôhay ta kwetel ata hay a.
9.20: Nd…ôhay masa ma m…ôcam ta fa banay hay maakar kaa heyey daa ba na, kwa ta mb…ôkdamara sl…ôra ata maaya ba daa ba c…ôŇčga. Ata fa namatar ray Ňčgada mes…ôfney maaya ba hay ma bamawa ta fa bay-malula, leŇč Ňčgada kuley hay. Kuley hay a siya hay makatakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza, siya hay ta …ď…ôrey mekele mekele, siya hay ta aŇčgwa, siya hay may ta hwadam maaca…óakaya. Kuley hay a c…ôpa Ňčgene a h…ôtmar dey ba, a c…ônam sl…ômay ba, asaya, a gwamara Ňčga diyam ba. Ama ta Ňčgene he c…ôpa, fa namatar ray gway.
9.21: Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene fa k…ô…óam nd…ôhay mekele hay vagay, fa kam maazla hay maaya ba, fa lam vaw saw da palah, asaya fa lalam. Ata fa kamata cek hay a c…ôŇčga, kwa ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata da b…ôla daa ba s…ôlak.

10.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč mekele masa ta g…ôdaŇč fa pawa salay da gazlavay da va…ó. AŇčga mas…ôrtakaya ta gazlavay Ňčga var. Ray aŇčga matulakakaya ta kwalay. Dey aŇčga a we…óey anda pas. Salay aŇčga hay a n…ôkam anda neneh Ňčga awaw maaz…ôma.
10.2: MaslaŇč a, aa ta …óerewel mec…ôhe mawurkaya da har. Salay aŇčga hay maazlakatakaya, salay Ňčga z…ômay aa da ray b…ôlay, salay Ňčga gula aa da ray hwiyak.
10.3: MaslaŇč a, a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, anda mabar maa zlehey. Masa aa ma wudey cay na, ya c…ôney var maa b…ôcey dey maasala Ňčga mb…ô…ódara mey a, a maslaŇč a.
10.4: Masa var a maa b…ôcey ta meeguzley cay na, anja ya da wuzlala mey a. Ama, ya c…ôney …óay Ňčga ndaw mekele da gazlavay da va…ó maa guzlya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa da wuzlala cek masa var maa guzld…ôrwa Ňčgene ba. Ka da kada a ndaw ba.¬Ľ
10.5: Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč masa ma pa salay aŇčga pal a ray yam, laŇčgar a ray hwiyak heyey, a baŇčga…óa har-z…ômay Ňčgada va…ó,
10.6: a mbe…óey ta mez…ôley Ňčga Gazlavay, ndaw masa aa daha Ňčga s…ôrmataw, ara aŇčga ma l…ôma slam da va…ó ta cek hay da hwa…ó a c…ôpa, leŇč slam da hwayak ta cek hay da hwa…ó a c…ôpa. Asaya, ara aŇčga ma kat…ôrwa b…ôlay hay ta cek hay da hwa…ó a c…ôpa. A mbe…óey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęCek ma da key heyey na, cek ma da t…ôka daa saba.
10.7: Yaw, daa masa maslaŇč Ňčga dey maasala ha ma da fa taalam aŇčga ke…óe na, Gazlavay a da nd…ôvda cek ma…ďadakaya masa aa ma wulkey Ňčga ka. Cek ma…ďadakaya ha na, ara cek masa aŇčga ma wuzdatara Ňčgada ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay, nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga hay zleezle.¬Ľ
10.8: Cay, …óay masa yah, JaŇč, yah ma c…ônda da gazlavay kaa heyey aa guzlya saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęDaw ta t…ô…ďa …óerewel mawurkaya heyey masa da har maslaŇč, salay pal da ray yam, laŇčgar da ray hwiyak katay.¬Ľ
10.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, ya daw fa maslaŇč a heyey d…ô…ďa, ya l…ôvar: ¬ęV…ôldiwa …óerewel mec…ôhe ke…óe.¬Ľ MaslaŇč a, a mb…ô…ódiwa, a l…ôvey: ¬ęEhe, z…ôma. A da c…ôrfaka da mey anda amam, ama da ka ta nda la a hwa…ó na, a da kaka …óe…ó…ôwek .¬Ľ
10.10: Cay, ta‚Äô, ya t…ô…ďa …óerewel mec…ôhe kaa heyey, zam! ya z…ôma. Fara fara ta c…ôrfaya la anda amam, ama daa masa yah ma nda la a hwa…ó na, ta t…ôrey sem …óe…ó…ôwek.
10.11: Asaya, a l…ôvya: ¬ęSi ka daw dey pal saya, Ňčga wuzda mey masa Gazlavay maa guzlda da ray cek ma da key da ray s…ôkway hay ga, da ray nd…ôhay daa wura daa wura, da ray hwayak hay ga maa guzlam ta mey hay mekele mekele, asaya, da ray bay hay ga.¬Ľ

11.1: Menjey nek…ô…óey, ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmaya zlanday. Ara zlanday ma wey cek ta aŇčga. Cay, ndaw daha aa guzlya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęSl…ôk…óey, daw ta wa meg…ôley Ňčga *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay, leŇč slam-mef…ôkey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay. Asaya, sl…ôfta nd…ôhay masa ma d…ôram daŇčgay daa way a .
11.2: Ama ka da wa slam daa ambaw ba, mb…ôkda maja slam a Ňčgene aa mapakaya Ňčgada s…ôkway hay tabiya ma s…ôrmara Bay Gazlavay ba, maja nd…ôhay a Ňčgene a da wam da ray *Jeruzelem, berney Ňčga Gazlavay, a da n…ôsmara, haa kiya kwakwar m…ôfa…ó a ray a cew .
11.3: Asaya, ya da sl…ôrdata nd…ôhay a…óaw hay cew daha Ňčga key sede da ray mey a…óaw fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay. Nd…ôhay cew e na, a da k…ôzlam zana ma t…ôwa vagay fa vaw, amba a t…ôwam maja meb…ôrey Ňčga nd…ôhay a. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a wuzdamara mey a…óaw masa yah maa guzlda la haa kiya kwakwar m…ôfa…ó a ray a cew e ke…óe.¬Ľ
11.4: Nd…ôhay a cew ke…óe na, ata malacatakaya fa mey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay ma wa b…ôla tabiya. Ara wudez hay cew ma z…ôley *Awliviye. Asaya, ata cewete pet…ôrla hay.
11.5: Da nd…ôhay masa-g…ôra ata hay a wu…óam Ňčga kamatar cek maaya ba na, awaw a da bawa da mey Ňčga nd…ôhay cew e, asaya, awaw a, a da takwarata masa-g…ôra ata hay a k…ôlme…óek! Ara anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay masa-g…ôra ata hay a, ma da m…ôcam. Kwa fa da h…ôtam dabaray Ňčga l…ôhey daa ba s…ôlak.
11.6: Daa masa nd…ôhay cew e fa t…ôlam mey Ňčga Gazlavay na, a gwamara Ňčga t…ôkey var ma da pawa haa kasl ata ma nd…ôvdamara met…ôley-mey a. Yaw, ata ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga t…ôrdamara yam Ňčga mambaz. Asaya, ata ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčga handawa banay hay mekele mekele a ray nd…ôhay da b…ôla, kwa ta …óar wura wura anda ata ma wu…óam.
11.7: Da nd…ôhay cew e ke…óe ta nd…ôvdamara met…ôley-mey Ňčga Gazlavay cay na, cek Ňčga ley mahura a bawa la daa v…ôge…ó meseleleŇč e heyey, a da k…ôrzata nd…ôhay cew e. A da f…ônta ta g…ôdaŇč, a da k…ô…óta vagay.
11.8: Vagay hay a, a da njam makwiydatakaya daa b…ôwal Ňčga berney mahura, slam masa Bay ata Mahura Yesu ma m…ôcey da hwa…ó a fa hwadam mazlaŇčgalakaya heyey. Berney a Ňčgene a, a pamar sl…ômay-wazlay *Sadawm, da daa ba, *Ejip .
11.9: Nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay tabiya, daa s…ôkway hay tabiya, maa guzlam ta mey hay tabiya, nd…ôhay mekele mekele tabiya a da n…ôkmata vagay hay a daa b…ôwal haa …óar maakar ta reta. Fa da v…ôlmatar c…ôve…ó Ňčga p…ôshamata na, daa ba.
11.10: Nd…ôhay maaya ba hay c…ôpa da b…ôla aa s…ômam la ara mey ba da ray vagay hay a. A da kam gwagway ta mev…ôley cek hay da wuzlah ata. Aa m…ôlkam la fa mem…ôcey Ňčga nd…ôhay cew ma t…ôlam mey Ňčga Gazlavay ke…óe, maja ata ta s…ôrdamata banay la kalah ta nd…ôhay da b…ôla.
11.11: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga …óar maakar ta reta kaa heyey, Bay Gazlavay a da f…ôtatar mes…ôfney a nd…ôhay cew mam…ôctakaya kaa heyey, amba a mb…ôlam. Ta‚Äô, a sl…ôk…óam, a lacam ta lecey. Nd…ôhay masa ma h…ôtmar cek aha na, a r…ôzlam ga, mand…ôrzay a katar.
11.12: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, nd…ôhay cew heyey a c…ônam …óay maa guzlwa ta g…ôdaŇč da va…ó, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęSamawa, t…ôpmawa fa yah fe…óe a gazlavay.¬Ľ Cay, a t…ôpam a va…ó, gazlavay Ňčga var a s…ôrtata meedey masa-g…ôra ata hay heyey.
11.13: Daa Ňčgene, hwiyak a wusey ta g…ôdaŇč g…ôdek g…ôdek, anda aŇčgwa ma b…ôzley. Da wuzlah slam hay kuraw Ňčga berney a na, pal a p…ôlhey. Hwiyak a ma wusey na, ta k…ô…óey nd…ôhay gabal maasala vagay la. Nd…ôhay siya masa ta dey na, a zluram ga, a h…ôlmamara Bay Gazlavay da va…ó.
11.14: Ara anda ke…óe, banay Ňčga dey cew e ma nd…ôvey. Ama wam vaw, maja menjey nek…ô…óey fe…óe banay mekele Ňčga dey maakar a, a sawa la saya. Mey da ray taalam masa Ňčga dey maasala ha
11.15: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga banay Ňčga dey cew e ke…óe, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay Ňčga dey maasala ha, a fa taalam aŇčga may. ∆äay hay a c…ônmawa ta g…ôdaŇč da gazlavay, a l…ôvam: ¬ęWure ke…óe, Bay Gazlavay al…ôkwa leŇč *K…ôriste, ndaw aŇčga masa aa ma wala, fa wam da ray b…ôla. A da wam Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ
11.16: Masa …óay hay a maa guzlam la na, *bay-ray hay kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó manjatakaya daa slam-menjey hay fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay heyey, ta‚Äô, a ragadam, daŇčgay dar! dar! a hwayak fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay, a h…ôlmamara,
11.17: a l…ôvam: Bay Gazlavay, kah Gazlavay ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ônta cek hay tabiya. Kah na, kah daha d…ôga b…ôla ta l…ômey daa ba araŇč, haa kasl wure ke…óe, kah daha Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Ala fa kamaka suse, maja wure ke…óe ka fa wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč akah mahura. Ka fa wey da ray cek hay tabiya d…ô…ďa.
11.18: S…ôkway hay tabiya ta cam mevel la da ray akah. Ama wure ke…óe na, ara kah, Bay Gazlavay, ma cey mevel da ray ata d…ô…ďa. Pas masa kah ma da katar sariya Ňčgada nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya tabiya ta wuswa cay. Ara pas masa kah ma da p…ôltara mawur…ďay Ňčga sl…ôra Ňčga nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra akah hay, masa ma t…ôla mey akah hay. Asaya, ka p…ôltara mawur…ďay Ňčga nd…ôhay akah hay ma namaka ray, kwa Ňčgada nd…ôhay mahura hay ta mec…ôhe hay. Ama Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa ma n…ôsmara b…ôla na, ara pas masa kah ma daa z…ô…ódata.
11.19: Masa bay-ray hay a Ňčgene maa guzlam cay na, *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó b…ô…óaŇč! a wurey haa kwa waawa a h…ôtar *akwatay Ňčga *mej…ôwey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta Israyel hay daa way a. Asaya, var a z…ômey w…ô…ó-we…ó, w…ô…ó-we…ó, aa b…ôcey t…ôzlaw! t…ôzlaw! dey ga. Hwiyak a wusey anda aŇčgwa ma b…ôzley. Asaya, lanja mahura mahura a kwiymawa a hwayak.

12.1: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga cek hay a ma kam Ňčgene, cek daha mer…ôzley ndaw a wuzwa vaw da gazlavay da va…ó. Ara Ňčgwas. Ňägwas aha pas mas…ôrtakaya fa vaw aŇčga anda zana. Kiya aa dasi salay aŇčga. Adikwaw Ňčga wurzla kuraw a ray a cew da ray, anda jikwew Ňčga bay-gula.
12.2: Ňägwas aha aa ta hwa…ó, fa da yey. Fa wudey maja hwa…ó a, fa car, fa s…ôrey banay ga.
12.3: Cek mekele daha mer…ôzley ndaw, a wuzwa vaw da va…ó saya. Ara cek Ňčga ley mahura magaza. A s…ôram ba ta g…ôdem mahura. Cek aha, aa ta ray hay maasala leŇč gursaw Ňčga bay hay maasala da ray hay a. Asaya, cek aha, aa ta d…ôram hay kuraw da ray.
12.4: G…ôdem e vey! a vawa wurzla hay ga da va…ó ta kwetel aŇčga. Daa wurzla hay makustakaya slam maakar, a vawa slam pal, a hazakadat…ôrwa fakw! fakw! a hwayak. Ta‚Äô, a lecey fa mey Ňčga Ňčgwas heyey, amba da Ňčgwas aha ma yey cay na, a la b…ôzey a, a z…ôma.
12.5: Daa Ňčgene, Ňčgwas a, ta‚Äô, a yawa b…ôzey mez…ôle. Ara b…ôzey a ma da wey da ray hwayak hay tabiya ta g…ôdaŇč. Daa masa aa ma yarawa cay, ta‚Äô, a lamara b…ôzey a, a va…ó a cakay Gazlavay manjakaya daa slam-menjey aŇčga.
12.6: Ňägwas aha na, ta‚Äô, a hway a wuzlah-ley aa slam masa Gazlavay ma …óiya amba a v…ôlar cek mez…ômey da hwa…ó a. A da njey daa slam aha kiya kwakwar m…ôfa…ó a ray a cew .
12.7: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, v…ôram a key da gazlavay da va…ó. Misel, mahura Ňčga maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay, leŇč maslaŇč aŇčga hay siya a k…ô…óam vaw ta g…ôdem heyey. G…ôdem may ata ta maslaŇč aŇčga hay daa v…ôram a.
12.8: -9 Ata Misel ta f…ônmata g…ôdem ta maslaŇč aŇčga hay sem ta g…ôdaŇč, leŇč! a lamat…ôrwa, fakw! fakw! a hazakadam…ôrwa a palah, maja Bay Gazlavay a wu…óey a njam da va…ó saba. G…ôdem e na, ara zezekw masa ma t…ôknata nd…ôhay da b…ôla d…ôga zleezle. Mez…ôley aŇčga, *SataŇč, bay-malula. Ta k…ôzlam…ôrwa sem da va…ó Ňčgada hwayak ta maslaŇč aŇčga hay c…ôpa.
12.10: Menjey nek…ô…óey, ya c…ôney …óay Ňčga ndaw maa guzlwa ta g…ôdaŇč da va…ó, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWure ke…óe Gazlavay al…ôkwa ta l…ôhndandakwar cay fara fara daa banay. AŇčga fa wuzd…ôrwa *mewey aŇčga, a f…ônta cek hay c…ôpa ta g…ôdaŇč. Asaya, wure ke…óe, *K…ôriste, ndaw aŇčga masa aa ma wala Ňčga l…ôhdata nd…ôhay, fa z…ôma bay aŇčga. Ta hazakadam…ôrwa SataŇč, ndaw maa d…ô…ófatar mey a m…ôlma al…ôkwa hay sem. Ara ndaw maa d…ô…ófatar mey taa va…ó, taa pas fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay al…ôkwa.
12.11: Ama m…ôlma al…ôkwa hay a, ta f…ônmara SataŇč sem ta g…ôdaŇč ta fa mambaz Ňčga *B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay ma mb…ô…ówa. Asaya, ta f…ônmara sem ta g…ôdaŇč, maja ata ma kam sede da ray Yesu fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay ta mand…ôrzay daa dey ba, ta zluram ta mem…ôcey daa ba.
12.12: Da ray Ňčgene, mees…ômey Ňčga key da gazlavay da va…ó. Akwar nd…ôhay masa da gazlavay da va…ó, sas…ômam. Ama, akwar, nd…ôhay da ray hwayak ta nd…ôhay da ray b…ôlay, akwar na, banay a sawa la a ray akwar maja SataŇč, bay-malula, ta k…ôzlam…ôrwa sem a wuzlah akwar, fa cey mevel ga, maja a s…ôra na, pas aŇčga mend…ôrey nek…ô…óey gway.¬Ľ
12.13: Daa masa ta hazakadam…ôrwa g…ôdem sem a b…ôla na, ta‚Äô, g…ôdem e a wusey vaw, a s…ôpar wurzay Ňčga Ňčgwas ma yawa b…ôzey mez…ôle heyey.
12.14: Ama ta‚Äô, a v…ôlmar zlara hay cew Ňčga b…ôrgaday mahura a Ňčgwas aha amba a j…ôvey ta aŇčga a wuzlah-ley, aa slam masa Gazlavay ma da v…ôlar cek mez…ômey heyey, amba a njey fete…óe haa mevey maakar ta reta. G…ôdem kaa heyey a gwa a h…ôtfar fete…óe saba.
12.15: Ta‚Äô, g…ôdem e a v…ôŇčgwa yam ga da mey, a vevey anda wayam ma ley, a s…ôpar wurzay Ňčga Ňčgwas aha amba a la.
12.16: Ama hwiyak ta j…ôna Ňčgwas aha la. Hwiyak a, …ďazl! a …ď…ôzley anda ndaw ma wura mey, nd…ôr…ďac! a sa yam masa g…ôdem ma v…ôŇčgwurwa heyey.
12.17: Daa masa g…ôdem kaa heyey ma h…ôtar hwiyak ma sa yam ke…óe la na, a cey mevel ga a ray Ňčgwas aha. Da ray Ňčgene, a v…ôhwa amba a daw Ňčga kawa v…ôram ta b…ôz aŇčga hay siya. B…ôza hay a na, ara nd…ôhay ma namar ray a mewey hay Ňčga Bay Gazlavay, asaya, ara nd…ôhay ma kam sede da ray Yesu fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay.
12.18: Cay, ta‚Äô, g…ôdem kaa heyey a daw a lecey a mey-b…ôlay.

13.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ya h…ôtey cek Ňčga ley fa bawa daa b…ôlay. Cek aha aa ta ray hay maasala, d…ôram aŇčga hay kuraw. Gursaw Ňčga bay hay mac…ô…ďtakaya da ray d…ôram hay kuraw ata. Mez…ôley maaya ba Ňčga c…ô…óey Gazlavay mawuzlalakaya fa ray aŇčga hay a.
13.2: Cek Ňčga ley masa yah ma h…ôtar a na, a s…ôram ba ta d…ôva. Ama salay aŇčga hay na, zlelek da mey a maaz…ôma yiŇč-yeŇč . Mey aŇčga may, a s…ôram ba ta mey Ňčga mabar. G…ôdem heyey a v…ôldara g…ôdaŇč aŇčga ta bay aŇčga amba a wey da ray b…ôla, a key cek ta g…ôdaŇč.
13.3: Ray Ňčga cek Ňčga ley a pal dasi maasala hay heyey, a n…ôkey na, anda ta Ňčg…ômamara la haa a m…ôcey. Ama, cek Ňčga ley a ta‚Äô, a mb…ôlwa daa mem…ôcey, mb…ôlek e kaf! a k…ôfey. Maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay c…ôpa da b…ôla a r…ôzlam da ray a, ta‚Äô, a s…ôpmara.
13.4: Ata c…ôpa a ragadamar Ňčgada g…ôdem maja aa ma v…ôlar g…ôdaŇč Ňčgada cek Ňčga ley kaa heyey. Asaya, a ragadamar Ňčgada cek Ňčga ley a, a l…ôvam: ¬ęMa f…ôna cek Ňčga ley ke…óe ta mahura na, wa? Ma gwa Ňčga f…ôna ta mek…ô…óey-vaw na, wa? Kwa ndaw pal ma gwa daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
13.5: Daa Ňčgene, a v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó a cek Ňčga ley a Ňčga h…ôsley ray ga ta Ňčga c…ô…óa Gazlavay. A h…ôtey g…ôdaŇč Ňčga c…ô…óa Gazlavay haa kiya kwakwar m…ôfa…ó a ray a cew.
13.6: Anda ke…óe, aa guzley maaya ba da ray Gazlavay, a c…ô…óa. Asaya, a c…ô…óa slam-menjey aŇčga leŇč nd…ôhay da va…ó tabiya.
13.7: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a v…ôlmar c…ôve…ó a cek Ňčga ley a amba a k…ô…óam vaw ta nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay, a f…ônta ta g…ôdaŇč. Asaya, a f…ônta s…ôkway hay c…ôpa, nd…ôhay daa wura daa wura c…ôpa, maa guzlam ta mey wura wura c…ôpa, leŇč hwayak hay c…ôpa, a f…ônta ta g…ôdaŇč. Ata c…ôpa dasi har Ňčga cek Ňčga ley a.
13.8: Nd…ôhay c…ôpa da b…ôla a d…ôrmar daŇčgay la a cek Ňčga ley a. Ara nd…ôhay masa mez…ôley ata mawuzlalatakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga nd…ôhay masa fa da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba daa ba. ∆äerewel Ňčga nd…ôhay ma da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba na, mawuzlalakaya d…ôga zleezle masa b…ôla ta l…ômey daa ba araŇč, ara …óerewel Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč masa ma slamara …óay a heyey.
13.9: Yah, JaŇč, ya fa l…ôvey: ¬ęDa ndaw aa ta sl…ômay, si a j…ôkey sl…ômay maaya maaya fa mey masa yah ma kada ke…óe.
13.10: Ndaw masa mapakaya Ňčga k…ôrzey na, si a k…ôrzamara k…ône. Ndaw masa mapakaya Ňčga k…ô…óey vagay ta d…ôlaw na, si a k…ô…ómara k…ône. Anda ke…óe, si nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay a …ď…ôsmara banay, a pamara Gazlavay Ňčga ndaw ata fara fara c…ôŇčga.¬Ľ
13.11: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya h…ôtey cek Ňčga ley mekele ma bawa daa v…ôge…ó. AŇčga ta d…ôram da ray cew. D…ôram aŇčga hay a na, ata anda Ňčga b…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč. ∆äay aŇčga a c…ôney anda g…ôdem.
13.12: Cek Ňčga ley a ke…óe fa key cek ta g…ôdaŇč tabiya anda Ňčga cek Ňčga ley Ňčgeeme heyey. A ka sl…ôra ha fa mey Ňčga cek Ňčga ley Ňčgeeme. A t…ôktar …óay Ňčgada nd…ôhay c…ôpa da b…ôla Ňčga ragadamar ta meney ray Ňčgada cek Ňčga ley Ňčgeeme masa ray maŇčg…ômkaya haa a m…ôcey, mb…ôlek ma k…ôfey heyey.
13.13: Cek Ňčga ley mecew e a key maazla ga haa a kwiywa awaw da gazlavay da va…ó a hwayak fa mey Ňčga nd…ôhay c…ôpa.
13.14: A t…ôknata nd…ôhay c…ôpa da b…ôla ta fa maazla hay masa Gazlavay ma v…ôlar c…ôve…ó Ňčga key fa mey Ňčga cek Ňčga ley Ňčgeeme kaa heyey. Ta fa maazla hay a na, a h…ôldata nd…ôhay da b…ôla c…ôpa Ňčga l…ômam cek ma s…ôram ba ta cek Ňčga ley Ňčgeeme masa ma Ňčg…ômamara ta d…ôlaw haa a m…ôcey, ama aŇčga ta dey c…ôŇčga. A h…ôldata nd…ôhay Ňčga h…ôsley ray a cek aha.
13.15: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Gazlavay a v…ôlar c…ôve…ó a cek Ňčga ley mecew e Ňčga f…ôtey meme…ó a cek mal…ômkaya ha, amba a s…ôfney, aa guzley, a k…ô…óta nd…ôhay masa ma ragadamar ba vagay.
13.16: Asaya, cek Ňčga ley a, a t…ôktar …óay Ňčgada nd…ôhay tabiya, kwa b…ôza hay, kwa nd…ôhay mahura hay, kwa masa-zleley hay, kwa masa-viya hay, asaya, kwa beke hay ta nd…ôhay masa beke ba hay, amba a t…ôhtar cek fa daŇčgay, da daa ba, fa har-z…ômay ata.
13.17: Ndaw masa cek mat…ôhkaya fa v…ô…óa daa ba na, a gwa a h…ô…ókey cek saba, asaya, a gwa a h…ô…ókedey cek saba may. Cek mat…ôhkaya ha na, ara mez…ôley Ňčga cek Ňčga ley masa Ňčgeeme, da daa ba, ara lamba mapakaya anda mez…ôley a.
13.18: Anda ke…óe, yah, JaŇč, ya fa l…ôvey: ¬ęMaaya na, nd…ôhay a wulkam maaya maaya da ray mey a. Ndaw ta leŇčgesl na, si a pey leŇčgesl fa cek masa lamba ha ma wu…óey Ňčga wuzd…ôrwa. Lamba ha na, aa mapakaya anda mez…ôley Ňčga ndaw, ara temere maakwaw ta kwakwar maakwaw a ray a maakwaw.¬Ľ

14.1: Daa masa yah, *JaŇč, ya fa n…ôkey dey saya na, ya h…ôtar B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey malacakaya da ray aŇčgwa mez…ôley *SiyaŇčw. Nd…ôhay masa mez…ôley Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč ta mez…ôley Ňčga Bay Gazlavay Papaha mawuzlalatakaya fa daŇčgay ata na, ata tabiya malacatakaya ta B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč a, daa slam a. Nd…ôhay a tabiya, ata gabal temere ta kwakwar m…ôfa…ó a ray a m…ôfa…ó.
14.2: Asaya, ya c…ôney …óay maa guzlwa ta g…ôdaŇč da gazlavay da va…ó. Aa guzley …óay mahura, a mbey mey ta g…ôdaŇč anda yam ma vavawa daa maaj…ôrav mahura. Asaya, aa b…ôcey ta g…ôdaŇč anda var. ∆äay a masa yah ma c…ônda Ňčgene, a c…ôney anda nd…ôhay ma k…ô…óam ganjaval ga daa slam a.
14.3: Nd…ôhay gabal temere ta kwakwar m…ôfa…ó a ray a m…ôfa…ó heyey malacatakaya fa mey Ňčga cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey heyey, leŇč fa mey Ňčga *bay-ray hay heyey. Ata tabiya fa mey Ňčga slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay. Ata fa zlam walay mawiya masa kwa ndaw mekele ma s…ôra Ňčga zla daa ba s…ôlak, si nd…ôhay masa gabal temere ta kwakwar m…ôfa…ó a ray a m…ôfa…ó heyey, masa Yesu ma mb…ô…ót…ôrwa da wuzlah nd…ôhay da b…ôla.
14.4: Ata na, ara nd…ôhay masa ta har-d…ôlay ba, maja ta nam ta Ňčgusay daa ba s…ôlak. Kwa aa slam wura wura masa B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč ma daw na, nd…ôhay a, fa s…ôpmar wurzay. Ara ata, nd…ôhay masa aŇčga ma mb…ô…ót…ôrwa teese…ó da wuzlah nd…ôhay da b…ôla, amba a njam Ňčgada Gazlavay ta Ňčgada aŇčga, anda cek ma key da ley teese…ó masa nd…ôhay ma v…ôldamara a Gazlavay ta Ňčgada B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč a.
14.5: Kwa ndaw ta c…ôney memb…ôrzley pal da mey ata daa ba s…ôlak, asaya, kwa meb…ôrey fa ata daa ba. Mey da ray maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay maakar
14.6: Cay, yah, *JaŇč, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay mekele fa p…ôkey d…ôreŇč da gazlavay da va…ó. *Mey-maaya-mawiya masa fara fara ma da njey Ňčga s…ôrmataw na, aa daha da har aŇčga. A da wuzdatara Ňčgada nd…ôhay da b…ôla c…ôpa, kwa nd…ôhay daa hwayak wura wura, daa s…ôkway wura wura hay c…ôpa, leŇč Ňčgada nd…ôhay masa maa guzlam ta mey hay wura wura c…ôpa.
14.7: Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay a, aa guzltar ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęNamar ray a Gazlavay, h…ôlmamara, maja pas masa aa ma da katar sariya Ňčgada nd…ôhay na, ta wuswa cay. H…ôslmar ray, ara aŇčga ma l…ôm…ôrwa slam da va…ó ta da hwayak, ara aŇčga ma kat…ôrwa b…ôlay hay leŇč wurak hay Ňčga yam c…ôpa.¬Ľ
14.8: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, JaŇč, ya h…ôtar maslaŇč Ňčga dey cew e fa s…ôpar wurzay Ňčga maslaŇč Ňčgeeme heyey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęBerney mahura Ňčga *BabilaŇčw heyey ta p…ôlhey sem. Fara fara ta p…ôlhey sem p…ôlah! p…ôlah!, maja BabilaŇčw aha ta ley vaw saw la, taa s…ôrkadata s…ôkway hay tabiya sem Ňčga mb…ôkdamara c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay amba a kam cek hay maaya ba mekele mekele anda aŇčga. Ara anda aa ma v…ôltar wuzam Ňčga sey mandaw mandaw Ňčga n…ôsta.¬Ľ
14.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, JaŇč, ya h…ôtar maslaŇč Ňčga dey maakar a fa s…ôptar wurzay Ňčga maslaŇč hay cew heyey. A wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKwa waawa ma nar ray Ňčgada cek Ňčga ley ma bawa daa b…ôlay ke…óe, ta Ňčgada cek mal…ômkaya anda aŇčga heyey, asaya, kwa waawa ma t…ô…ďa amba cek aha a t…ôhar cek fa daŇčgay, da daa ba, fa har na,
14.10: Ňčgene, Gazlavay a s…ôrda banay la. A cey mevel la a ray a. Maja Ňčgene, a da s…ôrey banay, anda ndaw ma sey cek mee…ó…ôwek e mar…ôhkaya pece pece daa v…ôley, kwa cek meede…óek e da hwa…ó a daa ba s…ôlak. Fara fara, Gazlavay a da s…ôrda banay daa awaw, fa g…ô…óey nj…ôm-njem. A da s…ôrda banay k…ône fa mey Ňčga maslaŇč aŇčga hay ta fa mey Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč aŇčga.
14.11: Kakas Ňčga awaw a, faa Ňčg…ôsey Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Nd…ôhay a, ta namar ray la Ňčgada cek Ňčga ley heyey, leŇč Ňčgada cek mal…ômkaya anda aŇčga, asaya, ta t…ô…ďmara la amba cek aha a wuzlalatar mez…ôley aŇčga fa ata. Anda ke…óe, fa da h…ôtam mem…ôskey-vaw daa ba s…ôlak. A da s…ôram banay taa va…ó, taa pas maja awaw a.¬Ľ
14.12: Yah, JaŇč, ya fa l…ôvey: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay ma namar ray Ňčgada kwakwas aŇčga, asaya, ma t…ô…ďmara mey Ňčga Yesu, banay masa akwar ma s…ôrmara da b…ôla Ňčgene na, si ka …ď…ôsmara gway.¬Ľ
14.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya c…ôney …óay maa guzlya d…ôga da va…ó, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWuzlala mey a ke…óe: Nd…ôhay ma m…ôcam daa sl…ôra Ňčga Bay Mahura na, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray ata d…ôga wure ke…óe haa Ňčga s…ôrmataw.¬Ľ Ta‚Äô, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a mb…ô…ódara a …óay maa guzlya heyey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAhaw, wure ke…óe, sl…ôra ata ta nd…ôvey cay, a da m…ôskam vaw maja banay masa ata ma …ď…ôsmara da b…ôla heyey ta sl…ôra maaya masa ata ma kamara na, fa wuzd…ôrwa ata nd…ôhay ma kam cek maaya.¬Ľ Mey da ray mend…ôvey Ňčga b…ôla
14.14: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ya da n…ôkey dey na, a ray mekwtene mabara. Ndaw anda B…ôz Ňčga Ndaw manjakaya da ray mekwtene he. Ndaw aha, jikwew Ňčga bay-gula da ray. Jikwew a makakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza. Asaya, ndaw aha aa ta …ďe…ďey da har, mey a mak…ô…ókaya maaya maaya.
14.15: Menjey nek…ô…óey, maslaŇč mekele a bawa daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó, aa guzlar ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčgada ndaw da ray mekwtene he, a l…ôvar: ¬ęLa …ďe…ďey akah amba ka Ňčg…ôma daw, maja pas a ta wuswa cay. Cek hay da b…ôla ta n…ôham cay.¬Ľ
14.16: Da ray Ňčgene, ndaw manjakaya da ray mekwtene kaa heyey leŇč! a la …ďe…ďey aŇčga, Ňčgam! Ňčgam! a Ňčg…ôma daw da b…ôla.
14.17: Cay, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč mekele ma bawa daa Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó heyey saya. AŇčga ta …ďe…ďey da har, mey a mak…ô…ókaya maaya maaya may.
14.18: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga maslaŇč a ke…óe, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay mekele a sawa da cakay slam-mef…ôkey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay. Ara maslaŇč ma wey da ray awaw. Aa guzlar ta g…ôdaŇč Ňčgada maslaŇč masa …ďe…ďey da har heyey, a l…ôvar: ¬ęLa …ďe…ďey akah, daw ta slat…ôrwa bab…ôza Ňčga wudez ma vevey ta vevey da b…ôla, bab…ôza masa yam a ma kam wuzam ta aŇčga, daw ta slat…ôrwa da b…ôla c…ôpa, maja ta n…ôham cay.¬Ľ
14.19: Anda ke…óe, maslaŇč kaa heyey leŇč! a la …ďe…ďey aŇčga ta‚Äô, a daw a slat…ôrwa bab…ôza Ňčga wudez hay heyey , kway! a kwiyda aa slam masa nd…ôhay ma mb…ôrzlamara Ňčga …ó…ôcey yam a. A wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey na, Gazlavay fa cey mevel ga a ray nd…ôhay siya da b…ôla.
14.20: Slam masa aa ma mb…ôrzlamara bab…ôza Ňčga wudez e na, aa da d…ô…ďa berney a . Masa fa mb…ôrzlamara Ňčga …ó…ôcey yam a, ama ma da bawa na, ara mambaz. A vevey, a ley wayam anda yam haa a daw d…ôreŇč a key k…ôlemeeter temere maakar. Da p…ôles a nd…ôkwey a hwa…ó a na, mambaz a, a k…ôrza kasl aa mey.

15.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ya h…ôtey cek maaya mekele ma r…ôzley ndaw a wuzwa vaw da gazlavay da va…ó. Ara maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay maasala ma da s…ôrdamata banay mekele mekele ta nd…ôhay haa dey maasala. Banay hay a Ňčgene, ara mecey-mevel Ňčga Gazlavay madagway-dakw a ray nd…ôhay da b…ôla.
15.2: Cay, ta‚Äô, ya h…ôtey cek mekele saya anda d…ôhwa ma we…óey p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó anda baŇčg…ôra, ta awaw da hwa…ó a, dey a h…ôtey gurgwar a wurza. Nd…ôhay malacatakaya da mey d…ôhwa ha, ata ta ganjaval masa Gazlavay ma v…ôldatara da har. Ara nd…ôhay ma f…ônmara cek Ňčga ley ta g…ôdaŇč, ma namar ray Ňčgada cek mal…ômkaya anda aŇčga heyey ba, ma t…ô…ďmara amba a h…ôtam lamba aŇčga heyey fa daŇčgay ata ba s…ôlak.
15.3: Fa zlam walay masa *Mawiz, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay ma zla zleezle. Ňägene he, ara walay Ňčga *B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay may . Nd…ôhay a, a zlam walay, a l…ôvam: Bay Gazlavay, kah Gazlavay ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ônta cek hay tabiya. Sl…ôra akah masa kah ma ka ke…óe na, aa kwakwa…ó ba, aa maaya ara mey ba. Kah na, Bay ma wey da ray hwayak hay c…ôpa. Cek hay masa kah ma kata na, ka kata ta c…ôve…ó e, memb…ôrzley da hwa…ó a daa ba s…ôlak.
15.4: Bay Gazlavay, ndaw ma zlurey ta kah ba na, wa? Ndaw ma l…ôvey a h…ôslka ray ba na, ndaw a dama? Kah na, kah Gazlavay pal. Nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay c…ôpa a samawa la fa mey akah Ňčga h…ôslmaka ray ta meregedey, maja ata ma h…ôtmar sl…ôra akah makakaya ta c…ôve…ó e.
15.5: Menjey nek…ô…óey, yah, JaŇč, ya h…ôtar *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó mawurkaya. Slam-mek…ôrcey ta ambal aa da hwa…ó a. *Akwatay Ňčga *mej…ôwey-mey Ňčga Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay aŇčga hay aa daa slam-mek…ôrcey a.
15.6: Cay, ya h…ôtatar maslaŇč hay maasala ma da s…ôrdamata banay ta nd…ôhay haa dey maasala heyey, fa bamawa daa way a. Ata ta zana fa vaw mabara, ma ley dey. Asaya, z…ôwet hay Ňčga …ď…ôrey magaza ma we…óey p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó maj…ôwtakaya fa dadak ata hay .
15.7: Cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey heyey, pal da wuzlah ata ta‚Äô, a v…ôltar taasa hay Ňčga …ď…ôrey magaza pal pal a maslaŇč hay a maasala heyey. Taasa hay a mar…ôhdatakaya ta mecey-mevel Ňčga Gazlavay, Gazlavay ndaw masa ta dey Ňčga s…ôrmataw.
15.8: Daa Ňčgene, kakas fa bawa, fa bawa haa a r…ôhda way a heyey. Kakas a, a bawa daa mewe…óey Ňčga Gazlavay ta daa g…ôdaŇč aŇčga. Ndaw a gwa Ňčga mb…ôzey aa way a ba s…ôlak, si banay hay maasala masa maslaŇč hay maasala ma handam…ôrwa heyey ma nd…ôvam la c…ôpa …óagay.

16.1: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga cek hay ma kam ke…óe, yah, *JaŇč, ya c…ôney …óay maa guzlwa ta g…ôdaŇč daa *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó heyey. ∆äay a, aa guzlwa Ňčgada maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay maasala heyey, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęDiyam ta mb…ô…ódamara mecey-mevel Ňčga Gazlavay daa taasa hay maasala ke…óe c…ôpa a b…ôla.¬Ľ
16.2: Anda ke…óe, maslaŇč masa Ňčgeeme ta‚Äô, a daw a mb…ô…óda masa daa taasa aŇčga a ray b…ôla. Daa Ňčgene, mb…ôlek hay ma cey kalah a bamawa nja…ďa-nja…ďa fa nd…ôhay masa lamba Ňčga cek Ňčga ley mat…ôhtakaya fa vaw ata, masa ma namar ray Ňčgada cek mal…ômkaya anda cek Ňčga ley a heyey.
16.3: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč masa Ňčga dey cew e ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…óda masa daa taasa aŇčga may aa b…ôlay. Daa Ňčgene, yam daa b…ôlay a, a t…ôrey anda mambaz Ňčga ndaw mam…ôckaya ma bawa. Anda ke…óe, cek hay daa yam a c…ôpa ta m…ôcam sem.
16.4: Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč masa Ňčga dey maakar a, a mb…ô…óda masa daa taasa aŇčga may aa wayam hay ta aa wurak Ňčga yam hay. Anda ke…óe, yam daa wayam hay a ta daa wurak hay a ta t…ôrey sem anda mambaz may.
16.5: Cay, yah, JaŇč, ya c…ônda …óay Ňčga maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay ma wey da ray yam fa h…ôslar ray Ňčgada Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKah na, Bay Gazlavay pal taava akah. Kah daha d…ôga zleezle haa wure ke…óe. Ka ta ka sariya ke…óe la ta c…ôve…ó e.
16.6: Nd…ôhay ma k…ô…ómata ma t…ôla mey akah hay vagay, ta nd…ôhay ma k…ô…ómata nd…ôhay akah hay siya na, ka ta v…ôltar mambaz la Ňčga sey. Ňägene he, ara cek t…ô…óe fa sl…ôra ata.¬Ľ
16.7: Cay, ya c…ôney …óay mekele maa guzlwa ta g…ôdaŇč da cakay slam-meewurey cek Ňčgada Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAhaw, Bay Gazlavay, ndaw masa ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ônta cek hay c…ôpa. Ka fa katar sariya a nd…ôhay ta c…ôve…ó e, memb…ôrzley da hwa…ó a daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
16.8: Menjey nek…ô…óey, maslaŇč Ňčga dey m…ôfa…ó a, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…óda masa daa taasa aŇčga may a ray pas. Anda ke…óe, pas a h…ôtey c…ôve…ó Ňčga cey Ňčgulca-ca haa a nd…ôlta nd…ôhay.
16.9: Daa masa pas a fa nd…ôlta nd…ôhay a Ňčgene, ta‚Äô, a c…ô…ómara Gazlavay, maja ara aŇčga ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa banay a ke…óe. Ama ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata da b…ôla daa ba, a namar ray a Gazlavay ba c…ôŇčga.
16.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč Ňčga dey zlam a, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…óda masa daa taasa aŇčga may a ray slam-menjey Ňčga cek Ňčga ley heyey. Daa Ňčgene, l…ôvaŇč a key daa slam masa cek Ňčga ley a ma wa c…ôpa. Nd…ôhay c…ôpa daa slam aha aa p…ô…óam sler maja fa s…ôram banay.
16.11: Ama ta banay Ňčgene c…ôpa na, kwa nd…ôhay a ta mb…ô…ódamara menjey ata daa ba, ata fa kam cek maaya ba hay c…ôŇčga. A c…ô…ómara Gazlavay da va…ó maja banay ata ta mb…ôlek hay mekele mekele ma catar.
16.12: Cay, maslaŇč Ňčga dey maakwaw a, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…óda masa daa taasa aŇčga aa wayam mahura Ňčga Ef…ôrat. Yam daa wayam a, taa s…ôkey sem mbasl! amba bay hay ma da samawa ta daa dana a h…ôtam c…ôve…ó Ňčga zl…ôŇčgey a dey laŇčgar.
16.13: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ta‚Äô, yah, JaŇč, ya h…ôtey mes…ôfney hay maaya ba maakar. Ata a s…ôram ba ta kak…ôraŇč hay. Mes…ôfney a pal a bawa da mey g…ôdem heyey. LaŇčgar a bawa da mey cek Ňčga ley heyey. LaŇčgar may, a bawa da mey *ndaw ma t…ôla mey ta memb…ôrzley.
16.14: Mes…ôfney hay a Ňčgene a samawa ta fa bay-malula. Fa kam maazla hay mandaw mandaw Ňčga r…ôzley nd…ôhay. Fa diyam a way bay hay da b…ôla c…ôpa Ňčga kusmat…ôrwa amba a kam v…ôram ta Gazlavay ta pas masa Gazlavay, ndaw ma f…ônta cek hay c…ôpa, ma da wuzd…ôrwa g…ôdaŇč aŇčga.
16.15: Da ray Ňčgene, Bay Mahura a l…ôvey: ¬ęWam vaw maaya maaya, maja ya da sawa na, d…ôrfafay anda ndaw-mayal. Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay aa da ray ndaw ma j…ô…óa vaw aŇčga, a ney ba, ma wada vaw ta zana aŇčga, amba …óar masa yah ma da sawa na, ndaw a, a gwa Ňčga p…ôkey ta vaw …ďa‚Äô k…ône ba, asaya, hwaray fa da kar maja nd…ôhay a da h…ôtmar vaw …ďa‚Äô k…ône na, daa ba.¬Ľ
16.16: Ta‚Äô, mes…ôfney hay maaya ba maakar ma diyam a way bay hay heyey, a kusmata bay hay a aa slam daha mez…ôley ta mey *Heb…ôre ¬ęHarmagwadaŇčw¬Ľ.
16.17: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč masa Ňčga dey maasala ha, ta‚Äô, a mb…ô…óda masa daa taasa aŇčga aa meme…ó. ∆äay a c…ônwa Ňčga g…ôdaŇč daa slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay daa Way-mekey-kwakwas aŇčga, a l…ôvey: ¬ęBanay hay a, ta kam cay.¬Ľ
16.18: Da ray Ňčgene, var a z…ômey w…ô…ó-we…ó, w…ô…ó-we…ó, aa b…ôcey ta g…ôdaŇč t…ôzlaw! t…ôzlaw! Hwiyak a wusey ga anda aŇčgwa ma b…ôzley. D…ôga Gazlavay ma zlar Ňčga l…ômt…ôrwa nd…ôhay a b…ôla na, hwiyak ta wusey anda Ňčgene daa ba s…ôlak.
16.19: Ta‚Äô, hwiyak a …ď…ôzley, berney mahura heyey a wunkey slam maakar. Berney hay c…ôpa da b…ôla a p…ôlham p…ôlah! p…ôlah! may. Gazlavay a s…ôrfad…ôrwa berney mahura Ňčga BabilaŇčw, ta‚Äô, a cey mevel a ray a, a s…ôrda banay ga, anda ndaw ma sa cek mee…ó…ôwek e mar…ôhkaya pece pece daa v…ôley.
16.20: Daa Ňčgene, hwayak hay da wuzlah b…ôlay c…ôpa, yam aa z…ô…ódata. Asaya, aŇčgwa hay a yayiham.
16.21: Lanja ga a kwiywa da va…ó a ray nd…ôhay. Lanja ha pal na, mahura anda hutkwam. Maja Ňčgene, nd…ôhay a c…ô…ómara Gazlavay maja lanja ha fa s…ôrdamata banay ga kalah.

17.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč pal dasi maslaŇč hay Ňčga Gazlavay maasala masa ta taasa hay da har heyey, ta‚Äô, a sawa, aa guzlya Ňčgada yah, *JaŇč, a l…ôvey: ¬ęSawa fe…óe amba ya wuzdakawa banay masa Ňčgwas-barlaw daha ma da s…ôra. Ňägwas a na, mapakaya anda berney mahura masa gweegwe ta wayam hay mahura mahura.
17.2: Bay hay c…ôpa da b…ôla ta lam vaw la ta aŇčga. Asaya, nd…ôhay ma sam wuzam aŇčga la haa a wam. Anda mel…ôvey, nd…ôhay a ta lam vaw la ta aŇčga may.¬Ľ
17.3: Ta‚Äô, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa a ray a…óaw. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč kaa heyey a handaya a ley. Daa masa yah da ley a na, ya h…ôtey Ňčgwas manjakaya da ray cek Ňčga ley. Cek Ňčga ley a na, aa magaza anda mambaz, ta ray hay maasala, d…ôram hay kuraw cegwegw e da ray hay a. Vaw aŇčga c…ôpa mawuzlalakaya ta mez…ôley hay ma c…ô…óey Gazlavay.
17.4: Ňägwas aha na, aa ta zana fa vaw. Zana ha magaza l…ômter e ta magaza anda mambaz. Asaya, aŇčga ta cek hay Ňčga …ď…ôrey magaza mekele mekele ta aŇčgwa hay ma wa…óam p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó ma h…ô…ókam ba leŇč bersle hay fa vaw. Asaya, taasa Ňčga …ď…ôrey magaza mak…ôrzakaya da har. Taasa ha na, mar…ôhdakaya ta cek hay maaya ba ma zl…ô…ďa ndaw daa meley-vaw aŇčga saw da palah heyey.
17.5: Fa daŇčgay aŇčga mez…ôley Ňčga cek masa nd…ôhay ma s…ôrmara ba mawuzlalakaya daha. Mez…ôley a, a wu…óey Ňčga l…ôvey: ¬ęKe…óe he, berney mahura Ňčga BabilaŇčw, ara mamaŇč Ňčga Ňčgwas-barlaw hay ta mamaŇč Ňčga cek hay maaya ba da b…ôla c…ôpa.¬Ľ
17.6: Ya h…ôtar Ňčgwas aha fa wey ta mambaz Ňčga nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay, nd…ôhay ma kam sede da ray Yesu. Daa masa yah ma h…ôtar na, ya r…ôzley ga da ray a.
17.7: Da ray Ňčgene, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay heyey aa c…ôf…óaya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęKa r…ôzley na, maja me? J…ôkfaya sl…ômay amba ya wuzdakawa mey ma…ďadakaya da ray Ňčgwas ke…óe ta da ray cek Ňčga ley masa ta ray maasala leŇč d…ôram hay kuraw, masa Ňčgwas a, aa da ray a Ňčgene.
17.8: Yaw, cek Ňčga ley masa kah ma h…ôtar ke…óe na, aŇčga na, aa ta dey, ama wure ke…óe, ta m…ôcey sem. Menjey nek…ô…óey fe…óe na, a sl…ôk…óawa la daa v…ôge…ó meseleleŇč e. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, Gazlavay a daa z…ô…óda. Nd…ôhay da b…ôla masa mez…ôley ata mawuzlalatakaya d…ôga b…ôla ta l…ômey daa ba araŇč daa …óerewel Ňčga nd…ôhay ma da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba, daa ba na, a h…ôtmar cek Ňčga ley a Ňčgene na, a r…ôzlam la da ray a. A da r…ôzlam maja zleezle cek aha aŇčga ta dey, wure ke…óe aa ta m…ôcey sem, ama a lacawa la daa v…ôge…ó e c…ôŇčga.¬Ľ
17.9: MaslaŇč a, a l…ôvya saya: ¬ęSi ndaw a pey leŇčgesl Ňčga s…ôra mey da ray cek hay a ke…óe maaya maaya. Ray hay maasala Ňčga cek Ňčga ley a Ňčgene na, a wuzwa aŇčgwa maasala masa Ňčgwas a ma njey a ray a . Ray hay a Ňčgene may a wuzwa bay hay maasala.
17.10: Dasi bay hay maasala ha Ňčgene na, zlam ata daa bay daa saba, pal na, aa daa bay, laŇčgar ta sawa Ňčga z…ôma bay aŇčga daa ba araŇč. Ama pas masa aŇčga ma sawa cay na, fa da njey daa bay a ga daa ba.
17.11: Ňäga cek Ňčga ley masa zleezle aa ta dey, ama wure ke…óe, aŇčga daa saba heyey na, a da key bay Ňčga dey daaŇčgafa…ó a. AŇčga na, aa da wuzlah bay hay maasala heyey may, Gazlavay a daa z…ô…óda.
17.12: ¬ęD…ôram hay kuraw Ňčga cek Ňčga ley masa kah ma h…ôtatar Ňčgene, a wuzwa bay hay kuraw ma da samawa. Ata na, fa z…ômamara bay ata daa ba araŇč. Ata ta cek Ňčga ley heyey a h…ôtam g…ôdaŇč la Ňčga wey da ray nd…ôhay, ama Ňčga menjey nek…ô…óey gway.
17.13: Bay hay a, a c…ômam …óay la pal, amba a kamar sl…ôra a cek Ňčga ley a Ňčgene ta g…ôdaŇč ata c…ôpa.
17.14: A kam v…ôram la ta B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey. Ama B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč a, a f…ônta la ta g…ôdaŇč, maja aŇčga na, ara Bay Mahura da ray mahura hay, aŇčga Bay da ray bay hay c…ôpa. Asaya, nd…ôhay masa aa ma z…ôlta, aa ma walata, nd…ôhay masa ma t…ô…ďmara mey aŇčga ta mevel pal na, a c…ômam la ta B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč a, a kam bay-gula la da ray bay hay a ta cek Ňčga ley a heyey.¬Ľ
17.15: Ta‚Äô, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay kaa heyey aa guzlya saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęYam masa kah ma h…ôtar Ňčgwas-barlaw manjakaya gweegwe ta aŇčga Ňčgene na, a wuzwa nd…ôhay ga, s…ôkway Ňčga nd…ôhay wura wura masa maa guzlam ta mey wura wura, asaya, hwayak wura wura.
17.16: Ama, d…ôram hay kuraw masa kah ma h…ôtatar ta cek Ňčga ley a ray aŇčga na, a da r…ôsmara Ňčgwas-barlaw ke…óe. A t…ô…ďmara cek aŇčga hay tabiya la, a c…ôkwmata zana aŇčga hay fa vaw la c…ôpa ta g…ôdaŇč, amba a njey vaw …ďa‚Äô k…ône. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a k…ô…ómara vagay la, a z…ômamara aslaw Ňčga vaw aŇčga la. Siya Ňčga aslaw a, ma da g…ôrey na, a da nd…ôlmara daa awaw.
17.17: Ara Gazlavay ma da ka amba bay hay kuraw a, a c…ômam …óay pal Ňčga key sl…ôra Ňčgada cek Ňčga ley heyey. Bay hay a, a pamara g…ôdaŇč ata asi har Ňčga cek Ňčga ley a, amba a wam da ray nd…ôhay tabiya haa kasl mey masa Gazlavay maa guzlda zleezle heyey a key fara fara.
17.18: Anda ke…óe, Ňčgwas masa kah ma h…ôtar heyey na, ara berney mahura masa ma wey da ray bay hay c…ôpa da b…ôla.¬Ľ

18.1: Fa d…ô…ďa Ňčga cek hay a Ňčgene, yah, *JaŇč, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč mekele fa pawa salay da va…ó. AŇčga ta g…ôdaŇč ga. Mewe…óey aŇčga ta wa…óa b…ôla la c…ôpa.
18.2: MaslaŇč a, a wudey ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvey: ¬ę*BabilaŇčw, berney mahura heyey, ta p…ôlhey sem. Ta p…ôlhey sem p…ôlah! p…ôlah! fara fara. Berney a, ta t…ôrey sem Ňčga way Ňčga mes…ôfney maaya ba wura wura c…ôpa. Asaya, …óiyaŇč hay maaya ba hay masa nd…ôhay ma z…ômamara ba s…ôlak, ata c…ôpa daa slam aha.
18.3: BabilaŇčw ta p…ôlhey sem maja ta ley vaw saw sem, taa s…ôrkadata nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay tabiya sem Ňčga mb…ôkdamara c…ôve…ó Ňčga Gazlavay amba a kam cek hay maaya ba mekele mekele anda aŇčga. Ara anda aa ma v…ôltar wuzam Ňčga sey mandaw mandaw Ňčga n…ôsta. Asaya, bay hay c…ôpa da b…ôla ta lam vaw saw la ta aŇčga. Nd…ôhay ma ka filaw hay c…ôpa da b…ôla, ta h…ôtam dala la ga, maja cek hay maaya ma mbafar kalah masa ata ma h…ô…ókadamara.¬Ľ
18.4: Ta‚Äô, ya c…ôney …óay faa guzlwa ta g…ôdaŇč da va…ó, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay a…óaw hay, bamawa da wuzlah nd…ôhay daa berney a Ňčgene, amba ka kam meb…ôrey anda ata ba. Bamawa amba ka s…ôram banay anda ata ba.
18.5: Fara fara, bamawa daa berney a, maja meb…ôrey ata ga kalah, mambakaya kasl a gazlavay a va…ó. Yaw, Gazlavay fa s…ôrfada sl…ôra ata maaya ba masa ata ma kamara c…ôŇčga.
18.6: S…ôrdamata banay ta nd…ôhay daa berney a anda ata ma s…ôrdamata banay ta nd…ôhay siya hay. Cek masa ata ma kamara a nd…ôhay siya ha na, ka da kamatara ma f…ôna Ňčgene. Da ta v…ôlmatar cek mee…ó…ôwek e v…ôley pal Ňčga sey la na, ka da v…ôlmatar Ňčgada ata v…ôley cew.
18.7: S…ôrdamata banay ga ta nd…ôhay daa berney a amba a cam mevel, anda ata ma pamara vaw ata zleezle Ňčga Ňčgwas ta g…ôdaŇč ga, anda ata ma njam ga daa wiya. Asaya, anda ata ma l…ôvam: ‚ÄúYah manjakaya fe…óe daa bay. Yah Ňčgwas-vagay ba, kwa ndaw a…óaw fa da m…ôcey amba ya t…ôway na, daa ba.‚ÄĚ
18.8: ¬ęDa ray Ňčgene, banay a da sawa a ray nd…ôhay daa BabilaŇčw a c…ôpa dey pal. Anda ke…óe, macay mepesley nd…ôhay, mem…ôcey leŇč may a sawa la a ray nd…ôhay a ta pas pal. Asaya, awaw a daa wura berney a k…ôlme…óek! maja Bay Gazlavay na, aŇčga ndaw ta g…ôdaŇč, ara aŇčga pal ma da katar sariya a nd…ôhay a.¬Ľ
18.9: Bay hay c…ôpa da b…ôla ma lam vaw saw da palah daa berney a heyey, ta ma njam daa wiya a heyey, a da h…ôtmar kakas Ňčga awaw ma daa wura berney aha na, a t…ôwam la, aa huram la.
18.10: Bay hay a, a da lacam d…ôreŇč ta berney a, maja banay da hwa…ó a ta zluradata sem. A l…ôvam: ¬ęWaay! Waay! BabilaŇčw, kah berney mahura masa ta g…ôdaŇč heyey, ka ta p…ôlhey sem p…ôlah! p…ôlah! ler pal gway. Sariya akah ta njey ga daa ba.¬Ľ
18.11: Asaya, nd…ôhay c…ôpa da b…ôla ma kam filaw, a t…ôwam la, aa huram la, maja berney a ma p…ôlhey sem. Kwa ndaw pal fa da h…ô…ókey cek ata hay Ňčga filaw daa saba.
18.12: Cek Ňčga h…ô…ókedey hay a na, ara …ď…ôrey hay ma h…ô…ókam ba, aŇčgwa hay ma wa…óam p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó ma h…ô…ókam ba ta bersle hay, zana mabara ma ley dey, zana masa magaza l…ômter e ta magaza anda mambaz ma h…ô…ókey ba, leŇč zana s…ôwal ma we…óey wurek! wurek! Cek hay mekele Ňčga filaw a na, ara anda hwadam mezey maaya, cek hay maaca…óakaya Ňčga sler Ňčga beg…ôney, hwadam ma h…ô…ókey ba leŇč cek hay mekele mekele Ňčga …ď…ôrey ta Ňčga aŇčgwa meekule…ó e.
18.13: Asaya, nd…ôhay Ňčga filaw a fa h…ô…ókadam cek hay mezey maaya anda …ď…ôrdey, mal ma tekwe…óey fa vaw, slalak mez…ôley ¬ę*mir¬Ľ leŇč mat…ôway Ňčga wudez mezey maaya. Cek hay mekele na, ara wuzam, mal metey lar, hapa leŇč daw. Fa h…ô…ókadam saya sla hay, t…ô…ďaŇč hay, p…ôles hay leŇč seret hay. Kwa beke hay, kwa nd…ôhay ma k…ôrzawa daa v…ôram na, nd…ôhay a Ňčgene fa h…ô…ókadamata may. Cek hay c…ôpa kaa na, kwa ndaw pal Ňčga h…ô…ókata da BabilaŇčw a daa saba s…ôlak.
18.14: Da ray Ňčgene, ma ka filaw hay a, a t…ôwam la, a daa guzlmar aa berney a, a l…ôvmar: ¬ęCek hay masa ma mbafamaka kalah heyey na, taa wuram sem c…ôpa. Zleley akah hay ta wiya masa kah ma ka heyey na, daa saba. Anda ke…óe, kwa ka fa da h…ôtatar daa saba may.¬Ľ
18.15: Ma ka filaw hay masa ma kam zleley ga daa berney a heyey, a da lacam d…ôreŇč ta berney a, maja banay da hwa…ó a ta zluradata sem. A t…ôwam la ta g…ôdaŇč, aa huram la,
18.16: a da l…ôvam: ¬ęWaay! Waay! BabilaŇčw, berney mahura heyey, ta p…ôlhey sem p…ôlah! p…ôlah! AŇčga anda Ňčgwas ta zana mabara fa vaw ma ley dey, asaya, ta zana masa magaza l…ômter e ta magaza anda mambaz ma h…ô…ókey ba. Asaya, aa ta daŇčgwa Ňčga …ď…ôrey magaza leŇč ta bersle ma h…ô…ókey ba.
18.17: Zleley hay a ga ke…óe a n…ôsam tabiya dey pal gway, kwa ta njey ga daa ba.¬Ľ Nd…ôhay ma hwadamara kwambiwal hay ta bay-ray ata, leŇč nd…ôhay ma ka filaw ta kwambiwal hay a, asaya, nd…ôhay tabiya masa ma diyam a m…ôlak ta kwambiwal hay a na, a lacam la d…ôreŇč ta BabilaŇčw heyey,
18.18: a wudam la maja ata ma h…ôtmar kakas Ňčga awaw a maa wura berney a, a l…ôvam: ¬ęBerney mahura ma f…ôna ke…óe daha saya daw?¬Ľ
18.19: Nd…ôhay a, a da p…ôtkwalam da hwayak ta mat…ôway, a daa huram, a da wudam ta g…ôdaŇč, a l…ôvam: ¬ęWaay! Waay! BabilaŇčw, berney mahura heyey na, ta p…ôlhey sem. Ara berney masa nd…ôhay ta kwambiwal hay ma h…ôtam zleley ga da hwa…ó a. Berney a na, a p…ôlhey p…ôlah! p…ôlah!, a n…ôsey ler pal gway, kwa ta njey ga daa ba.¬Ľ
18.20: Yaw, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay heyey a l…ôvey: ¬ęAkwar nd…ôhay da gazlavay da va…ó, sas…ômam maja BabilaŇčw a ma p…ôlhey ke…óe. Akwar nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay ta nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey leŇč nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga hay, sas…ômam may, maja Gazlavay ta kar sariya sem a berney a ke…óe, fa cek maaya ba masa aŇčga ma kakwara.¬Ľ
18.21: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay masa ta g…ôdaŇč daha ta‚Äô, a daw, a lawa aŇčgwa mahura masa dadakw anda lavar. T…ôzlem! a k…ôzla aa b…ôlay ku…óap! aa z…ô…óey. A l…ôvey: ¬ęBabilaŇčw, berney mahura, a da p…ôlhey anda ke…óe may. Kwa ndaw fa da h…ôtar fa dey daa saba.
18.22: Da BabilaŇčw a, nd…ôhay fa da c…ônam …óay Ňčga nd…ôhay ma k…ô…óam ganjaval, ma zlam walay, leŇč ma fam sl…ôlam ta taalam hay na, daa saba. Asaya, ndaw fa da h…ôtey ndaw ma …óiya cek hay membey kwa pal daa saba. Kwa ndaw fa da c…ôney …óay Ňčga cek mek…ôrey daw daa berney a daa saba may.
18.23: Da BabilaŇčw a, pet…ôrla hay fa da wa…óam daa saba. Kwa ndaw fa da c…ôney mees…ômey Ňčga meley kwakwa daa berney a daa saba. A key daa saba na, maja me? Ara maja, zleezle nd…ôhay ma ka filaw da BabilaŇčw a, a zlapam ta zleley ata hay ma f…ônmata siya hay da b…ôla, asaya, ta t…ôknata nd…ôhay tabiya da b…ôla la ta mekey maazla hay maaya ba.¬Ľ
18.24: Gazlavay a kar sariya a BabilaŇčw anda ke…óe maja aa ma h…ôtar mambaz Ňčga nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga da hwa…ó a. Asaya, maja aa ma h…ôtar mambaz Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay siya da hwa…ó a. Asaya, nd…ôhay mak…ô…ótakaya vagay daa wura daa wura da b…ôla na, Gazlavay ta h…ôtar mambaz ata la daa berney a may.

19.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, JaŇč, ya c…ôney …óay hay masa maa guzlmawa ta g…ôdaŇč da va…ó anda nd…ôhay ga maa guzlam daa slam a, a l…ôvam: ¬ę*Aleluya! H…ôlmamara Bay Gazlavay! Ara Gazlavay al…ôkwa ma l…ôhdata nd…ôhay daa banay. Ara aŇčga ndaw masa nd…ôhay ma h…ôslmar ray, ara aŇčga ndaw ma wey da ray cek hay tabiya.
19.2: AŇčga fa katar sariya a nd…ôhay ta c…ôve…ó e, memb…ôrzley da hwa…ó a daa ba s…ôlak. Da ray Ňčgene, ta kar sariya cay Ňčgada Ňčgwas-barlaw masa ma n…ôsa b…ôla, ma batata nd…ôhay Ňčga lam vaw saw da palah heyey. Gazlavay ta s…ôrda banay la ta Ňčgwas aha maja aa ma k…ô…óta ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay vagay.¬Ľ
19.3: ∆äay hay masa yah ma c…ôndat…ôrwa Ňčgene fa h…ôlmamara Gazlavay, a l…ôvam: ¬ęAleluya! H…ôlmamara Bay Gazlavay, maja kakas masa faa Ňčg…ôsey daa berney a Ňčgene, a da njey Ňčga s…ôrmataw, kwa fa da nd…ôvey daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
19.4: Daa Ňčgene, *bay-ray hay kwakwar cew a ray a m…ôfa…ó heyey leŇč cek hay m…ôfa…ó ta dey heyey a ragadam fa mey Ňčga Gazlavay daa slam aŇčga menjey, a h…ôlmamara, a l…ôvam: ¬ę*Amen. Aleluya! H…ôlmamara Bay Gazlavay!¬Ľ Mey da ray mekey m…ôlak Ňčga kwakwa Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč
19.5: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, …óay mekele aa guzlwa ta daa slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay, a l…ôvey: ¬ęH…ôlmamara Gazlavay al…ôkwa, akwar nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay tabiya, akwar nd…ôhay masa ma namar ray, kwa b…ôza hay, kwa nd…ôhay mahura hay.¬Ľ
19.6: Ta‚Äô, ya c…ôney …óay hay mekele saya faa guzlmawa ta g…ôdaŇč anda nd…ôhay ga maa guzlam daa slam a. Asaya, …óay hay a, a mbam mey ta g…ôdaŇč anda yam ma vavawa daa maaj…ôrav mahura. A c…ônmawa anda var maa b…ôcey may. Ya c…ônda …óay hay a na, fa l…ôvam: ¬ę*Aleluya! H…ôlmamara Gazlavay, maja Bay Gazlavay al…ôkwa, ndaw masa ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ônta cek hay tabiya, fa wey da ray cek hay tabiya fara fara.
19.7: Wure ke…óe, njakwa daa meem…ôlkey, sas…ômkwa, h…ôlmakwa Gazlavay, maja gwagway Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč ma ley kwakwa ta wuswa cay. Kwakwa ha ta …óiya vaw cay,
19.8: maja ta v…ôlmar zana ma we…óey ma ley dey mabara manjar d…ôlay cay.¬Ľ (Zana ha Ňčgene a wuzwa sl…ôra maaya masa nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay ma kamara.)
19.9: Cay, maslaŇč heyey a l…ôvya saya: ¬ęWuzlala mey masa yah ma da kadakawa ke…óe aa …óerewel: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa la a ray nd…ôhay c…ôpa maz…ôltakaya a gwagway Ňčga kwakwa Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč a.¬Ľ MaslaŇč a, a l…ôvya saya: ¬ęMey masa yah ma kadakawa ke…óe na, ara mey fara fara, maja mey a ara mey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
19.10: Masa maslaŇč a maa guzlya cay na, ta‚Äô, ya regedey fa mey aŇčga amba ya h…ôlma. Daa Ňčgene, a l…ôvya: ¬ęKa regedey fa mey a…óaw anda ke…óe na, maja me? Yah na, yah ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay anda kah ta m…ôlmakw hay, ma t…ô…ďmara mey masa Yesu ma hand…ôrwa a b…ôla may. Maaya ka regedey, ka d…ôrey daŇčgay na, Ňčgada Gazlavay gway.¬Ľ Mey masa Yesu ma hand…ôrwa a b…ôla na, ara *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ma v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč a nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey Ňčga wuzdamara mey a. Ndaw da ray p…ôles mabara
19.11: Cay, yah, *JaŇč, ya da n…ôkey dey na, slam da gazlavay da va…ó mawurkaya. Ya h…ôtey p…ôles mabara ta ndaw da ray a. A z…ôlmara ndaw aha na, ¬ęNdaw ma ka cek anda aa ma l…ôvey, ma mb…ôrzley ba.¬Ľ AŇčga na, ndaw ma ka sariya a nd…ôhay ta c…ôve…ó e, asaya, aŇčga ndaw ma key v…ôram Ňčga …óiyey cek ta c…ôve…ó e.
19.12: B…ôz Ňčga dey Ňčga ndaw aha na, Ňčg…ôler Ňčg…ôler anda awaw mag…ô…ókaya. AŇčga ta gursaw hay ga da ray. Mez…ôley mawuzlalakaya fa vaw aŇčga daha, kwa ndaw mekele ma gwa Ňčga s…ôra mez…ôley a daa ba s…ôlak, si aŇčga gway.
19.13: Zana aŇčga fa vaw na, magwacakaya ta mambaz . Mez…ôley Ňčga ndaw a na: ¬ęMey Ňčga Gazlavay.¬Ľ
19.14: Asaya, maslaŇč hay ga Ňčga Gazlavay da va…ó fa s…ôpmar wurzay Ňčga ndaw aha anda nd…ôhay ma diyam Ňčgadaa v…ôram. Ata ta zana mabara fa vaw ma ley dey manjar d…ôlay. Ata da ray p…ôles mabara hay.
19.15: Da mey ndaw aha na, d…ôlaw masa mey a mak…ô…ókaya Ňčga k…ô…óta nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay da b…ôla daha. A da wey da ray hwayak hay tabiya ta g…ôdaŇč. A da bacata anda ndaw ma becey bab…ôza Ňčga wudez fa p…ôra…ó Ňčga …ó…ôcey yam a, Ňčga tey wuzam ta aŇčga. Anda ke…óe, a da wuzd…ôrwa mecey-mevel Ňčga Bay Gazlavay, ndaw masa ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ônta cek hay tabiya.
19.16: Fa zana Ňčga ndaw a, leŇč fa tat…ôwal na, mez…ôley mawuzlalakaya daha. Mawuzlalakaya ha a l…ôvey: ¬ęBay Mahura da ray bay mahura hay, Bay da ray bay hay c…ôpa.¬Ľ
19.17: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, JaŇč, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay mekele malacakaya da ray pas. MaslaŇč a, aa guzley ta g…ôdaŇč, a z…ôlt…ôrwa …óiyaŇč hay c…ôpa masa ma j…ôvam d…ôreŇč da gazlavay da va…ó, a l…ôvtar: ¬ęKusmawa Ňčga z…ômey …óaf daa gwagway mahura masa Gazlavay ma da ka.
19.18: Samawa amba ka z…ômam aslaw Ňčga vaw Ňčga bay hay, Ňčga *bay-ray hay Ňčga sewje hay, ta Ňčga sewje hay a, leŇč Ňčga p…ôles hay ta nd…ôhay da ray a ke…óe. Samawa Ňčga z…ômey aslaw kwa Ňčga waawa: Ňčga beke hay ta Ňčga beke hay ba hay, Ňčga nd…ôhay mahura ta Ňčga nd…ôhay mec…ôhe hay tabiya.¬Ľ
19.19: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya h…ôtar cek Ňčga ley heyey, leŇč bay hay c…ôpa da b…ôla. Sewje ata hay makustakaya daa slam a, amba a kam v…ôram ta ndaw da ray p…ôles mabara heyey, leŇč ta sewje aŇčga hay may.
19.20: Cay, ta‚Äô, ndaw da ray p…ôles mabara kaa heyey a sawa, kaw! a k…ôrza cek Ňčga ley a, leŇč *ndaw ma t…ôla mey ta memb…ôrzley, fakw! fakw! a hazakadata ta dey aa d…ôhwa Ňčga awaw masa ta aŇčgwa maa kuray-b…ôzey, ma g…ô…óey nj…ôm-njem. Ndaw ma t…ôla mey ta memb…ôrzley a na, ta key maazla ga fa mey Ňčga cek aha Ňčga t…ôknata nd…ôhay da b…ôla masa ta lamba Ňčga cek Ňčga ley mat…ôhtakaya fa vaw ata heyey ta ma namar ray Ňčgada cek mal…ômkaya anda cek Ňčga ley a heyey.
19.21: Sewje hay masa Ňčga cek Ňčga ley a na, ndaw da ray p…ôles e heyey ta k…ô…óta sem vagay ta d…ôlaw maŇčg…ôkakaya da mey aŇčga heyey. Ta‚Äô, …óiyaŇč hay heyey c…ôpa a samawa, a z…ômamara aslaw Ňčga vaw Ňčga sewje hay a, haa a r…ôham.

20.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ya h…ôtey maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay mekele fa pawa salay da va…ó. Aa ta lek…ôle da har Ňčga wurey v…ôge…ó meseleleŇč e heyey. Asaya, maslaŇč a, aa ta calalaw meegure…ó e da har.
20.2: -3 Cay, maslaŇč a ta‚Äô, a daw, kaw! a k…ôrzarawa g…ôdem heyey, j…ôw! a j…ôwa ta calalaw a. G…ôdem e ara zezekw masa zleezle heyey, anda mel…ôvey, *SataŇč, bay-malula. Daa masa aa ma j…ôwa cay, a k…ôzla kem! aa v…ôge…ó meseleleŇč e heyey, a g…ôrca mey a ta lek…ôle, sl…ôra…ď! a sl…ôr…ďey tebe…ó fa mey a. A ka k…ône amba g…ôdem e a t…ôknata nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay da b…ôla saba. A da njey maj…ôwkaya daa v…ôge…ó e haa mevey gabal. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, a p…ôskam…ôrwa la a b…ôla, ama a da njey nek…ô…óey gway.
20.4: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya h…ôtey slam-menjey hay Ňčga bay, nd…ôhay manjatakaya da ray a. Gazlavay ta v…ôltar g…ôdaŇč la amba a kamatar sariya Ňčgada nd…ôhay da b…ôla. Asaya, ya h…ôtey mes…ôfney hay Ňčga nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya, masa ma k…ô…ómata vagay, ma …ó…ôslmata ray ata, maja ata ma kam sede, ma l…ôvam Yesu na, ara c…ôve…ó masa fara fara, asaya maja ata ma wuzam mey Ňčga Gazlavay. Ata na, ta namar ray Ňčgada cek Ňčga ley, ta Ňčgada cek mal…ômkaya anda aŇčga heyey daa ba. Asaya, ta t…ô…ďmara amba cek Ňčga ley a, a t…ôhtar cek fa daŇčgay, da daa ba, fa har na, daa ba s…ôlak. Ya n…ôkta na, ata mam…ôctakaya, ama ta sl…ôk…óamawa sem daa mem…ôcey a. Ata ta *K…ôriste na, ta wam la da ray b…ôla, haa mevey gabal.
20.5: Ke…óe he ara nd…ôhay Ňčgeeme ma sl…ôk…óamawa daa mem…ôcey. Nd…ôhay siya na, ta sl…ôk…óamawa daa ba araŇč, si mevey gabal a c…ôhwey la …óagay.
20.6: Fara fara, maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa la a ray nd…ôhay masa ma sl…ôk…óamawa teese…ó daa mem…ôcey. Ata na, nd…ôhay Ňčga Gazlavay. Fa da m…ôcam Ňčga dey cew daa ba s…ôlak. Nd…ôhay a, a da t…ôram nd…ôhay ma ka kwakwas Ňčgada Gazlavay leŇč Ňčgada K…ôriste. Nd…ôhay a na, a da wam ta K…ôriste da ray b…ôla, haa mevey gabal. Mey da ray v…ôram Ňčga madagway-dakw
20.7: Masa *SataŇč, bay-malula, ta key cay daa calalaw mevey gabal daa v…ôge…ó heyey na, fa d…ô…ďa ha, a p…ôskam…ôrwa daa v…ôge…ó e.
20.8: A daw la aa wura aa wura aa hwayak hay da b…ôla c…ôpa amba a batata nd…ôhay. A z…ôlmata nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay a Ňčgene na, Gakw ta Magakw . SataŇč a, a da kusta s…ôkway hay a tabiya aa slam a, amba a kam v…ôram ta Gazlavay. Nd…ôhay a ata ga, a sl…ôfam ba, anda mawur…ďay da wayam.
20.9: Daa masa yah ma h…ôtatar na, ata fa samawa t…ôl…ďeŇč e daa wura daa wura c…ôpa, a zl…ôrmara slam masa nd…ôhay aŇčga hay manjatakaya da hwa…ó a, berney masa Gazlavay ma wu…óey. Daa masa ata ma zl…ôrmara berney a sem na, awaw …ďa‚Äô, a k…ôzlwa da gazlavay, aa wurta k…ôlme…óek!
