20.10: Bay-malula, ndaw ma batata nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay tabiya heyey na, ta‚Äô, a k…ôrzamara, a k…ôzlamara aa d…ôhwa Ňčga awaw masa ta kakas maa kuray-b…ôzey mezey maaya ba, ma g…ô…óey nj…ôm-njem heyey. A k…ôzlamara ha na, a cakay ata cek Ňčga ley leŇč *ndaw ma t…ôla mey ta memb…ôrzley heyey. Daa awaw aha na, ata c…ôpa a da s…ôram banay taa va…ó, taa pas Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Mey da ray sariya Ňčga b…ôla
20.11: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ta‚Äô, ya h…ôtey slam-menjey mahura Ňčga bay. Slam-menjey aha mabara, ndaw manjakaya da ray a. Slam da va…ó ta da hwayak taa z…ô…óam sem ku…óap! fa mey Ňčga ndaw aha. Fa da h…ôtmatar daa saba s…ôlak.
20.12: Asaya, ya h…ôtatar nd…ôhay masa mam…ôctakaya. Kwa nd…ôhay mahura hay, kwa mec…ôhe hay, ata c…ôpa malacatakaya fa mey Ňčga slam-menjey a. Cay, ya h…ôtey ndaw fa wurey …óerewel hay. Ara …óerewel hay masa sl…ôra Ňčga nd…ôhay tabiya ma kamara mawuzlalatakaya da hwa…ó a. Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ya h…ôtey ndaw fa wurey …óerewel mekele. Daa …óerewel e, mez…ôley Ňčga nd…ôhay ma da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba mawuzlalatakaya da hwa…ó a. Anda ke…óe, Gazlavay a katar sariya Ňčgada nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya ha t…ô…óe fa sl…ôra ata mawuzlalatakaya daa …óerewel hay a.
20.13: Asaya, kwa nd…ôhay masa yam daa b…ôlay ma …ďa…ď…ôtata na, yam a ta badat…ôrwa sem a ray-…ó…ôgar. Kwa nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya daa Slam masa nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya ma njam da hwa…ó a na, ta bamawa sem daa mem…ôcey a. Ata c…ôpa, Gazlavay a katar sariya fa sl…ôra ata.
20.14: Cay, a k…ôzlamata ata bay-mem…ôcey ta slam Ňčga nd…ôhay mam…ôctakaya aa d…ôhwa Ňčga awaw heyey. D…ôhwa Ňčga awaw aha na, ara slam masa nd…ôhay ma da m…ôcam Ňčga dey cew da hwa…ó a.
20.15: Kwa waawa masa mez…ôley aŇčga mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga nd…ôhay ma da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba ha daa ba na, a k…ôzlamara aa d…ôhwa Ňčga awaw a.

21.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, yah, *JaŇč, ya da n…ôkey dey na, ya h…ôtey slam da gazlavay da va…ó ta slam da hwayak mekele mawiya. Hwiyak ta slam da va…ó masa Ňčgeeme heyey na, daa saba. Aa slam ata na, cek hay c…ôpa mawiya. Asaya, b…ôlay hay tabiya na, taa z…ô…óam sem.
21.2: Asaya, ya h…ôtar *Jeruzelem, berney Ňčga Gazlavay. Berney a, a pey mawiya, fa sawa ta fa Gazlavay da va…ó Ňčgada hwayak. Gazlavay ta ka berney a la maaya maaya, a mbey kalah anda dam ma …óiyey vaw cay Ňčgada way zel.
21.3: Asaya, ya c…ôney …óay faa guzlwa ta g…ôdaŇč daa slam-menjey Ňčga bay heyey, a l…ôvey: ¬ęN…ôkmara, Gazlavay aa manjakaya da wuzlah nd…ôhay. Gazlavay a, ta ray aŇčga, a da njey ta nd…ôhay a. Nd…ôhay a Ňčgene may, a da t…ôram Ňčga nd…ôhay aŇčga hay. AŇčga na, a da njey Ňčga Gazlavay ata.
21.4: A takwa…óatara mat…ôway daa dey ata la c…ôpa. Nd…ôhay fa da m…ôcam daa saba. Anda ke…óe, mat…ôway-vagay daa saba. Nd…ôhay fa daa huram daa saba may. Kwa vaw fa da catar a nd…ôhay daa saba s…ôlak, maja cek hay masa Ňčgeeme taa z…ô…óam sem c…ôpa.¬Ľ
21.5: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, ndaw masa manjakaya daa slam-menjey heyey aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęN…ôkmara, ya da kat…ôrwa cek hay tabiya mekele.¬Ľ Menjey nek…ô…óey, a l…ôvya: ¬ęWuzlala cek masa yah ma wuzdakawa ke…óe, maja ara mey masa fara fara, memb…ôrzley da hwa…ó a daa ba s…ôlak.¬Ľ
21.6: Cay, ndaw a, a l…ôvya saya: ¬ęSl…ôra ha ta nd…ôvey cay. Yah na, ndaw masa Ňčgeeme, asaya yah ndaw madagway-dakw. Yah ndaw ma kat…ôrwa cek hay tabiya, asaya, yah ma nd…ôvdata. Nd…ôhay masa yam fa katar na, ya da v…ôltar yam Ňčga maaya daa wurak, yam masa ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba.
21.7: Kwa waawa ma f…ôna *SataŇč, bay-malula, ta g…ôdaŇč na, ya da v…ôldara cek hay a ke…óe c…ôpa. Yah, Gazlavay, ya n…ôkfar dey la fa ndaw aha. Ya da njey Ňčga Gazlavay aŇčga. AŇčga may, a da t…ôrey Ňčga b…ôzey a…óaw.
21.8: Ama nd…ôhay masa ta mand…ôrzay daa dey, nd…ôhay masa ma mb…ôkdamaya sem, ta nd…ôhay masa mazl…ô…ďkaya, leŇč nd…ôhay ma k…ô…óam ndaw vagay, nd…ôhay masa ma lam vaw saw da palah, leŇč nd…ôhay ma ka maazla hay maaya ba ta ma ta kuley hay, asaya, nd…ôhay ma mb…ôrzlam hay tabiya, slam ata na, daa d…ôhwa Ňčga awaw masa ta aŇčgwa maa kuray-b…ôzey, ma g…ô…óey nj…ôm-njem. Ňägene, ara mem…ôcey Ňčga dey cew.¬Ľ Mey da ray Jeruzelem, berney masa Gazlavay ma l…ôma mawiya
21.9: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay pal a Ňčg…ôchawa Ňčgada fa yah. Ara maslaŇč pal da wuzlah maasala hay masa taasa hay ta banay hay Ňčga madagway-dakw mar…ôhdatakaya da hwa…ó a heyey. Masa aa ma Ňčg…ôchawa la fa yah na, ta‚Äô, a l…ôvya: ¬ęSawa fe…óe amba ya wuzdakawa kwakwa Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč.¬Ľ
21.10: Masa yah ma wusey fa aŇčga cay na, *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ta‚Äô, a sawa a ray a…óaw. Cay, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay ta‚Äô, a handaya aa ray Ňčga aŇčgwa maaz…ôma, a wuzdiwa *Jeruzelem, berney Ňčga Gazlavay, fa pawa salay da va…ó, da fa Gazlavay.
21.11: Berney a, a we…óey kulŇčgwa…ó kulŇčgwa…ó ta mewe…óey ma sawa ta fa Gazlavay. Mewe…óey a aŇčga anda aŇčgwa maaya ma h…ô…ókey ba. A mbey kalah anda aŇčgwa hay maaya ma wa…óam p…ôlŇčge…ó p…ôlŇčge…ó anda baŇčg…ôra daa pas.
21.12: Berney a, ray a mazl…ôrkaya teleleŇč ta mahwal mee…ďer e, mag…ôlkaya maaz…ôma. Mey-slam hay Ňčga mahwal Ňčga berney a na, ata kuraw a ray a cew. MaslaŇč hay kuraw a ray a cew fa j…ô…ómata mey-slam hay a. Asaya, mez…ôley Ňčga s…ôkway Ňčga *Israyel kuraw a ray a cew mawuzlalatakaya pal pal fa mey-slam hay a.
21.13: Mahwal Ňčga berney a na, ata dey m…ôfa…ó. Yaw, ta dey m…ôfa…ó ata na, mey-slam hay maakar maakar daha.
21.14: V…ôrza Ňčga mahwal a na, makakaya ta aŇčgwa hay mahura mahura kuraw a ray a cew. Mez…ôley Ňčga nd…ôhay mesl…ôrey Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč mawuzlalatakaya pal pal fa aŇčgwa hay a.
21.15: MaslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay masa maa guzlya heyey na, aa ta zlanday Ňčga …ď…ôrey magaza da har. Ara zlanday ma wey meg…ôley Ňčga cek hay. A da wa berney a, leŇč mey-slam hay ta mahwal Ňčga berney a may.
21.16: Mahwal Ňčga berney a na, mal…ômkaya zeedere, dey m…ôfa…ó ata r…ôk-rak. Zazam Ňčga berney a, a key k…ôlemeeter gabal cew ta temere cew . Meg…ôley a may, ata letek.
21.17: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč heyey ta‚Äô, a wa meg…ôley Ňčga mahwal Ňčga berney a. Meg…ôley a na, meeter kwakwar maasala a ray a maakwaw. A wa anda nd…ôhay ma wam cek hay mandaw mandaw.
21.18: Mahwal a na, mal…ômkaya ta aŇčgwa mez…ôley ¬ęjaspa¬Ľ, ma we…óey Ňčg…ôl-Ňčgel. Berney a may, mal…ômkaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza masa maaya ma we…óey anda baŇčg…ôra.
21.19: V…ôrza Ňčga mahwal a na, mapakaya ta aŇčgwa hay mekele mekele ma h…ô…ókey ba. AŇčgwa Ňčga wurza ma pey Ňčgeeme na, mez…ôley ¬ęjaspa¬Ľ. AŇčgwa Ňčga dey cew e mez…ôley ¬ęsafir¬Ľ, Ňčga dey maakar a mez…ôley ¬ęagat¬Ľ, Ňčga dey m…ôfa…ó a mez…ôley ¬ęemerat¬Ľ.
21.20: AŇčgwa Ňčga dey zlam a mez…ôley ¬ęawnikis¬Ľ, Ňčga dey maakwaw a, ¬ęsard…ôwan¬Ľ, Ňčga dey maasala a, ¬ęk…ôrizawlit¬Ľ, Ňčga dey daaŇčgafa…ó a, ¬ęberil¬Ľ, Ňčga dey zlam-letek a, ¬ętawpaz¬Ľ, Ňčga dey kuraw a, ¬ęk…ôrisawp…ôraz¬Ľ, Ňčga dey kuraw a ray a letek e, ¬ęturkwaz¬Ľ, leŇč aŇčgwa Ňčga dey kuraw a ray a cew e, mez…ôley ¬ęametista¬Ľ .
21.21: Mey-slam hay kuraw a ray a cewete na, makatakaya ta aŇčgwa ma mbey kalah, kule…ó kule…ó anda bersle. Mey-slam pal na, makakaya ta aŇčgwa ha pal may. B…ôwal mahura daa berney a na, makakaya ta …ď…ôrey magaza masa maaya anda kwalaba masa ndaw a gwa a n…ôkey dey a dey laŇčgar.
21.22: Daa berney a, yah, *JaŇč, ya ta h…ôtar *Way-mekey-kwakwas Ňčga Gazlavay daa ba, maja aa slam Ňčga way a na, ara Bay Gazlavay, Gazlavay masa ta g…ôdaŇč ma f…ônta cek hay tabiya, leŇč B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč aŇčga.
21.23: Asaya, berney a, fa wu…óey pas ta kiya Ňčga wa…óamawa a ray a daa saba, maja mewe…óey Ňčga Gazlavay fa wa…óa, B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey na, fa wa…óa berney a anda pet…ôrla.
21.24: S…ôkway hay c…ôpa da b…ôla a da p…ôkam daa mewe…óey aŇčga ha. Bay hay masa sl…ômay ata fa z…ôley, a da samawa ta cek ata hay masa maaya Ňčgadaa berney a.
21.25: Mey-slam hay Ňčga berney a, a da njam mawurtakaya hipas. Kwa ndaw fa da g…ôrcata daa saba s…ôlak, maja fete…óe he na, tava…ó a key daa saba.
21.26: Nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay c…ôpa da b…ôla masa sl…ômay ata fa z…ôley a da handam…ôrwa cek hay mekele mekele maaya hay Ňčgadaa berney a, amba a h…ôslmar ray a Gazlavay.
21.27: Ama kwa cek masa ta d…ôlay na, fa da mb…ôzey aa berney a daa ba. Asaya, nd…ôhay ma mb…ôrzlam ta nd…ôhay ma kam cek hay maaya ba mekele mekele c…ôpa fa da mb…ôzam daa ba may. Ma da mb…ôzam na, si nd…ôhay masa mez…ôley ata hay mawuzlalatakaya daa …óerewel Ňčga nd…ôhay ma da h…ôtam heter mend…ôvey ba, …óerewel masa Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč heyey.

22.1: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč heyey a wuzdiwa wayam Ňčga yam masa ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba. Yam a k…ôlar k…ôlar, dey a h…ôtey gurgwar a wurza, a bawa daa slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay ta Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč.
22.2: Yam a, a vevey da wuzlah b…ôwal Ňčga berney heyey. Ta dey cewete Ňčga wayam a na, wudez daha ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba , a yam bab…ôza dey kuraw a ray a cew fa mevey. Anda ke…óe, a yam dey pal fa kiya. Gwaslaf Ňčga wudez e, ara slalak masa ma mb…ôldata nd…ôhay daa hwayak hay tabiya.
22.3: Daa berney a, cek hay masa Gazlavay ma n…ôsta sem na, kwa pal daa ba s…ôlak. Daha na, slam-menjey Ňčga Bay Gazlavay ta Ňčga B…ôz-t…ô…ďaŇč, leŇč nd…ôhay ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay fa namar ray.
22.4: Nd…ôhay a, a h…ôtmar dey Ňčga Gazlavay la. Asaya, Gazlavay a wuzlala mez…ôley aŇčga la fa daŇčgay ata.
22.5: Daa berney a, tava…ó fa da key daa saba. Pas ta pet…ôrla hay na, sl…ôra ata daa saba may, maja ara Bay Gazlavay ta ray aŇčga ma da wa…óata nd…ôhay da hwa…ó a. A da wam da ray cek hay tabiya Ňčga s…ôrmataw. Mey da ray Yesu ma da v…ôhwa a b…ôla
22.6: Cay, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay heyey a l…ôvya saya: ¬ęMey hay tabiya masa kah ma c…ôndata ke…óe na, ara mey hay fara fara, kwa memb…ôrzley da hwa…ó a daa ba s…ôlak. Bay Gazlavay ta v…ôltar Mes…ôfney aŇčga la Ňčgada nd…ôhay ma t…ôla mey aŇčga, Ňčga wuzdamara mey aŇčga. Ara aŇčga ma sl…ôrd…ôrwa maslaŇč aŇčga Ňčga wuzdatara cek masa ma da key Ňčgada fa mey nek…ô…óey a ma ka sl…ôra aŇčga hay.¬Ľ
22.7: Yesu a l…ôvey: ¬ęWam vaw, menjey nek…ô…óey fe…óe, ya v…ôhwa la. Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa la a ray nd…ôhay ma t…ô…ďmara mey hay daa …óerewel ke…óe, ara mey masa Gazlavay ma wuzd…ôrwa da ray cek ma da key.¬Ľ
22.8: Yaw, ara yah, *JaŇč, ma c…ônda mey hay a ke…óe tabiya ta sl…ômay a…óaw. Asaya, ara yah ma h…ôtatar cek hay tabiya ma kam ke…óe ta dey a…óaw. Masa yah ma c…ônda mey a ta yah ma h…ôtatar cek hay a cay na, ta‚Äô, ya regedey fa mey Ňčga maslaŇč masa ma wuzdatiwa cek hay a ke…óe c…ôpa, amba ya h…ôlma.
22.9: Daa Ňčgene, a l…ôvya: ¬ęKa regedey fa mey a…óaw anda ke…óe na, maja me? Yah na, ndaw ma ka sl…ôra Ňčga Gazlavay anda kah ta m…ôlmakw hay ma t…ôlam mey Ňčga Gazlavay, leŇč nd…ôhay siya hay ma t…ô…ďmara mey daa …óerewel ke…óe aa mevel ata. Maaya ka regedey, ka d…ôrey daŇčgay na, Ňčgada Gazlavay gway.¬Ľ
22.10: Fa d…ô…ďa ha, maslaŇč Ňčga Gazlavay aa guzlya saya, a l…ôvey: ¬ęMey masa Gazlavay ma wuzdakawa, kah ma wuzlala aa …óerewel Ňčgene na, ka da …ďada aa mevel akah ba, ama wuzdatara a nd…ôhay, maja cek hay masa mey hay a ma wuzdamat…ôrwa Ňčgene na, a kam la fiyaw.
22.11: Anda ke…óe, nd…ôhay ma ka cek ta c…ôve…ó e ba na, Ňčga kamara k…ône c…ôŇčga. Nd…ôhay ma kam cek maaya ba ma ka hwaray na, Ňčga kamara k…ône c…ôŇčga. Yaw, nd…ôhay masa ma kam sl…ôra maaya na, Ňčga kamara k…ône c…ôŇčga. Asaya, nd…ôhay masa ma v…ôldamara ray ata Ňčgada Gazlavay ma njam manjar meb…ôrey na, Ňčga njam k…ône.¬Ľ
22.12: Cay, Yesu ta‚Äô, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęWam vaw, maja menjey nek…ô…óey fe…óe, ya v…ôhwa la. Ya da sawa ta cek da har, amba ya wurkara mawur…ďay Ňčga ndaw a, ndaw a t…ô…óe fa sl…ôra masa aa ma ka.
22.13: Yah na, ndaw masa Ňčgeeme, asaya yah ndaw madagway-dakw. Yah ndaw ma kat…ôrwa cek hay tabiya, asaya, yah ma nd…ôvdata.¬Ľ
22.14: Maaya Ňčga Gazlavay a sawa la a ray nd…ôhay masa ma p…ôrmata zana ata hay. Ata na, ata ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga mb…ôzey aa berney Ňčga Gazlavay ta daa mey-slam hay Ňčga mahwal Ňčga berney a. Asaya, ata ta c…ôve…ó Ňčga z…ômey bab…ôza Ňčga wudez ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba.
22.15: Yaw, nd…ôhay ma kam cek maaya ba ma ka hwaray, nd…ôhay ma kam maazla maaya ba hay leŇč nd…ôhay ma lam vaw saw da palah na, fa da mb…ôzam aa berney a daa ba s…ôlak. Asaya, nd…ôhay masa ma k…ô…óam ndaw vagay, nd…ôhay ma ta kuley hay, leŇč nd…ôhay ma mb…ôrzlam mandaw mandaw na, a da njam daa ambaw, fa da mb…ôzam daa ba may.
22.16: ¬ęYah, Yesu, ya ta sl…ôrd…ôrwa maslaŇč a…óaw la Ňčga wuzdatara mey a ke…óe Ňčgada nd…ôhay daa mec…ômey-ray hay Ňčga nd…ôhay a…óaw hay. Yah na, ndaw ma yawa daa s…ôkway Ňčga Bay *Davit. Yah, batay ma we…óey njuzl a ta slam Ňčgaa p…ôrek.¬Ľ
22.17: Ata *Mes…ôfney Ňčga Gazlavay ta kwakwa mawiya heyey a l…ôvmar a Yesu: ¬ęV…ôhwa.¬Ľ Akwar masa ma j…ôkam sl…ômay fa mey hay a ke…óe, si ka l…ôvmar may: ¬ęV…ôhwa.¬Ľ Yaw, nd…ôhay masa yam fa katar, Ňčga samawa Ňčga sam yam. Kwa waawa ma wu…óey Ňčga sey yam na, Ňčga sey yam ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba Ňčga maaya. Mend…ôvey Ňčga mey hay a
22.18: Yah, *JaŇč, ya fa k…ôtata nd…ôhay tabiya ma c…ôndamara mey masa Gazlavay ma wuzd…ôrwa daa …óerewel e ke…óe: da ndaw ta pey mey mekele la a ray masa daa …óerewel ke…óe na, Gazlavay a da pa ndaw aha Ňčga s…ôrey banay anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel e ke…óe heyey.
22.19: Yaw, da ndaw ta guhey mey a pal masa Gazlavay ma wuzd…ôrwa daa …óerewel e ke…óe la na, Gazlavay fa da v…ôlar c…ôve…ó Ňčga z…ômey bab…ôza Ňčga wudez ma v…ôley heter mend…ôvey ba heyey daa ba s…ôlak, anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel e ke…óe. Asaya, ndaw aha fa da h…ôtey c…ôve…ó Ňčga mb…ôzey aa berney Ňčga Gazlavay ke…óe daa ba s…ôlak, anda mawuzlalakaya daa …óerewel e ke…óe.
22.20: Yesu, ndaw ma key sede fara fara ta c…ôve…ó e da ray mey hay a ke…óe, aa guzley, a l…ôvey: ¬ęAhaw, ya fa v…ôhwa wure ke…óe.¬Ľ Amen. Yesu, Bay Mahura, sawa!
22.21: Anja maaya Ňčga Bay Mahura Yesu Ňčga njey ta nd…ôhay tabiya.
